I really enjoyed breakfast at Lumi. The food was delicious and the atmosphere was calm and relaxing. Ann provided wonderful service — she remembered my preferences and paid attention to the details, which made the experience feel very personal. Highly recommended.

It's a very delicious restaurant, a variety of dishes, a luxury dish affordable, quality ingredients, a great space, perfect for special meals, very nice staff, Mrs.Ann, Mr. Prraw is impressive, this meal has a mother's birthday surprise, the staff holds cakes, a lot of videos, a lot of photos.

The staff were so friendly and attentive! Especially Anne, Preaw, and Must who remembered us and would follow up on suggestions they gave. The food was amazing every time and came out quickly. My mom and I went during Valentine’s Day and the place was decorated beautifully. Was sad to leave.
Great drinks and great atmosphere! Ploy made our drinks, the Long Island iced tea was amazing! My friend had the whiskey sour as well.

I was really impressed by the restaurant. The ingredients are fresh, clean and selected with great care; each dish is prepared with authentic attention to detail. Do not miss the Tiramisù: it is like tasting it in a renowned pastry shop in Italy. The service is impeccable, all the staff are thoughtful and attentive. Mrs. Ann and Mr. Must offer valuable advice and take care of every detail. I stayed at the Amanor for four nights and had breakfast here every day: always delicious, never getting tired.
An amazing Bar and restaurant located in a great location,part of Amanor Hotel. All restaurant and bar staff were amazing especially Ann whose friendly smile welcomed us to breakfast each morning

“It’s a highly recommended restaurant in Chiang Mai. The food is exquisite, the staff offers exceptional service, and the ambiance inside the restaurant is warm and inviting, making it perfect for an evening dining experience.”

Chiang Mai location has had an interior remodel which is tastefully completed. The restaurant atmosphere is quiet. The kitchen offers a menu of traditional Italian food. The food is tasty. The service is attentive. I recommend you dine here.

The selection on the breakfast menu is excellent, offering both healthy and indulgent options, all made with fresh ingredients. Special mention to Iyu, Must and Ann, who provided outstanding service throughout our two-week stay.

Unfortunately, we couldn’t get a room here, but we still wanted to enjoy at least the restaurant of one of our preferred small luxury hotels from the experience. And what can I say? It was great as always! Staff, food and beverage choices (especially wine and gin) were very good! Overall, everything was also very clean and relaxed. Easy to feel good about! If we make it to Chiang Mai again, we will definitely stay here.
We stayed in this hotel for five days and had a beautiful trip. Each month we had breakfast here and a wonderful service from Iyu,Must,Praew and Toy.
We had breakfast here included in our stay at the Amanor, part of the same place. Really great breakfast buffet with à la carte dishes too. The service team of Iyu, Ann and Must are very very good.

We stayed at the adjoining hotel for two weeks in January with my fiancé and our newborn baby, and enjoyed breakfast at Lumi every morning. The experience was consistently excellent. The staff were outstanding — warm, professional, and genuinely attentive — making us feel very well looked after throughout our stay. The food was always fresh, with a generous and varied selection, and the restaurant itself was spotless, bright, and airy. Exceptional value for money. Special thanks to Iyu, Must, and Ann for their wonderful service. Highly recommended.
Beautiful views at sunset, bartenders and great wine! The rose by the glass is very good. Ploy and Oat are fantastic bartenders/servers
Great service with a smile at breakfast from Ann, Praew and Must!

Lumi provides a fantastic dining experience. The dining room is sophisticated and beautifully designed. The staff are friendly, attentive and very accommodating. Praew, Must, and Ann do a great job making every guest feel well taken care of. The best part of Lumi is the food. Always fresh, beautifully prepared and esquisitely plated, the food is just amazing. Every bite is an explosion of flavors. Lumi is a real treasure and always a pleasure to dine with. Thank you!!
Diner was amazing, Bom (manager) is very helpful. We had the pasta and pizza, both are excellent. And the Tiramisu was the best!
Travelers recommend this restaurant, the food is delicious, and the service of the staff, the restaurant at night is beautiful, and the food and service and the location are five-star.
Translate the following. Dinner at the transplant room was a wonderful experience. The food was amazingly delicious. Friendly staff service. Good. Thank you Ann and Must.
Good food and so delicious we hope to be back again well… should take a good comment to 2 trainees Toy and Noon and Ann to help us , Thanks
Very pleased to stay here, the staff is lovely, the breakfast is delicious and worth it. I have to introduce brothers, kids, interns trying to help and brothers.

We went to this restaurant for changing food, decided we had enough Indiana and Thai food, we are pasta lovers and the score took us to the place. I must emphasize that the attention is remarkable, but the food nothing to see. We ordered lobster ravioli, I figured it would come in some Italian sauce accompanied by some good cheese, and NO! I got some ravioli in use sauce flavored to anything but Italy.. It's not Italian food it's pasta food but the taste of Italy nowhere. Totally disappointed.
The helpful staff is very friendly, professional, highly recommended, the food is delicious and good quality.
Delicious food! No special children's menu but the pizzas are very tasty. Wafer-thin! We had brioche truffle, recommended! The meat as main course was also well fried. Sweet service.

Amazing restaurant!! Everything we ordered was amazing, the staff was attentive and very polite, and the vibes were great. We ordered the burrata & truffles pizza, and it was DELICIOUS, also the homemade pasta and ragu was a 10/10. Definitely worth the price!!
Food good and the staff professional and reasonable price. Location in Nimman soi 9. You can order food and drink on the rooftop see the Mountain View

This was our dinner place for the first night in Chiang Mai - the place is superb. I took beef carpaccio and my wife took tuna tartare which was splendid. Beef tenderloin steak was juicy and perfectly cooked. We ended our meal with tiramisu and sorbets/gelato mix. Amazing dinner - the best in our Thailand trip so far. We expect to come one more time before we leave Chiang Mai.

The atmosphere of the restaurant is wonderful. This time we sat on the rooftop , it was peaceful, relaxing, and perfect for chilling with friends. The food was delicious, and we were taken care of by a bar staff named Oat, who was very attentive and provided excellent service. He also recommended great drinks and dishes. Highly recommended, and we’ll definitely come back again!

We stumbled across this Italian restaurant in Chiang Mai. What a wonderful appetizer the Parma abs Fig Brushetta with truffle… yum yum yum! The gnocchi with truffle and mushrooms in a light cream sauce was amazing.
A marvelous meal, delicate in flavors, compliments to the chef. An exceptional pizza. One of the best experience in Thailand

I been here before when they were an Italian restaurant. The newly designed space is stylish, contemporary and welcoming. All dishes were suffused with delicacy and lightness, where subtle notes of creative ingredients reveal themselves in unexpected harmony. The service was exceptional under the new concept. The staff came from the former Italics team leading by Khun Bom or Bobby! Read less

I've stayed and eaten here on a few occasions when visiting Chang Mai, the food is always excellent. They've made a few changes to the restaurant which I really liked. Thank you to Khun Bom and his team for a wonderful experience, I loved the food and service.
It is very comfortable atmosphere, friendly staffs, tasty foods, so Lumi is one of my favorite restaurants in Chiang Mai
very nice ambiance and setting! the service was excellent and the food delicious and high quality. we had the rib eye steak and the lamb chops - both were amazing!
Best pizza I’ve ever had! Great service en very nice restaurant. Modern restaurant with nice flowers. Food is not expensive.
Good food, a bit expensive for thailand but great service. Will consider coming back happily. We had the seafood tagliatelle and pad thai.
Good restaurant with excellent choice of dishes. After dinner you can have a drink on the rooftop of the same hotel.
I ate here today with 4 of my friends. It was an amazing fine-dining experience. Each plate was filled with outstanding flavor.

Very fancy and posh restuarant with a mostly western menu. Food was good, but very expensive (think pricy for London) and so I think it shouldn't be a "mid range" on the pricing band on trip advisor. It was very tasty, slightly let down by the burrata that was off (and very quickly replaced). Would recommend a visit if you need a break from Thai food and want fancy western decor. Just be sure your wallet is ready. Service was very good. Read less

Arise Rooftop Bar in Chiang Mai is one of my favorite spots in the city. The staff are always super friendly and welcoming, and they consistently get my order right every time — which is something I really appreciate. The service is quick, the atmosphere is relaxed, and the view from the rooftop is just beautiful, especially around sunset. It’s the perfect place to unwind with a drink and enjoy the city from above. Highly recommended!

We stopped by Arise Rooftop Bar at the Amanor Hotel during happy hour and had a fantastic time. We tried the Passion'ista and the Mojithai from their Mojito Madness selection, both were refreshing, well-balanced, and perfect for the rooftop vibe. The setting was the real highlight. It was a quiet, relaxed area with just a few other guests, making it feel like a peaceful escape from the city. Cool breezes and panoramic views made for a calm and comfortable experience. We visited during the rainy season and stayed dry in the shaded area when a brief shower passed through, it actually added to the charm. Definitely worth a visit for drinks, views, and a tranquil atmosphere. We’d return again without hesitation. Complimentary snacks given out with drinks! Read less
Nice rooftop bar with beautiful views of Doi Suthep. The drinks were reasonably priced for a rooftop bar. The cocktails were good too.

Amazing menu- difficult to choose but we ended up with the seafood and onion/salami pizza 50/50 and the tuna tartar. Absolutely delicious both dishes. Service was very attentive and relaxed at the same time. We felt welcome from the moment we stepped in and the service at the parking lot even parked the car for us❤️
Wonderful hotel and bar. Very well worth the extra money on our trip. Very polite staff who are extremely accommodating

Honestly I'm done with these wanna be fine dining restaurants. Don't get me wrong the staff is lovely and they try their best but beside of them everything looks so cheap. The food is so much overpriced and not tasty at all. Everything loos so fake, they are trying to be something they are not... a fancy restaurant. It's not by reducing the portions and put the prices up that you magically become a high stand restaurant...

The restaurant atmosphere is great. All the staff are so welcoming and friendly. The food is all amazing. Delicious, clean, well prepared. Chef Prince’s was kind and he came to our table and explained about the food and very kind to us. You can park at the hotel and don’t need to find parking. Highly recommended.

The stunning rooftop view offers a breathtaking panorama of the city, where the skyline meets the horizon in a dazzling display. Each sip of the vibrant cocktails is a delightful experience, perfectly crafted and bursting with flavor. This venue comes highly recommended for anyone seeking a tranquil escape to indulge in the picturesque scenery of the city and the majestic mountains that embrace it.

Lumi Restaurant delivers an excellent dining experience! The **food** is consistently delicious, with fresh ingredients and authentic flavors that stand out. The **manager** Khun Bobby is exceptionally attentive and ensures every guest feels welcomed and valued. Most impressively, the **service** is top-notch—prompt, friendly, and genuinely thoughtful. Highly recommended for a memorable meal in Chiang Mai! Thank you, I will be back soon 🥰🥰 Read less

Lumi is restaurant with good atmosphere Suitable for dating Delicious food, high quality ingredients A variety of food to choose from The service staff K.Bobby and tram are cute and fun to talk to. Suitable for repeat visits.

The Dinner Sym conference was held at the new Lumi Restaurant Meeting Room (AMANOR Hotel Chiang Mai). Sip on the meeting rooms The staff is very professional. The food was a Western set, all dishes were served very delicious, 100/10. The standard here is never really down. If someone is looking for a restaurant with a meeting room, Lunch and Dinner, where delicious food and professional service are recommended, it is definitely not disappointing. P.S. often brings family food to the restaurant because her daughter loved the pizza here. And recommend foreign friends who love to stroll through the city, friends check it out every time. The conference facilities are fully equipped, the service is very good, the set menu is too expensive, and there are gots to use.
Great good, Professional services. I love its vibe and atmosphere of relaxing dining. Pizza 6 cheese, Summer Salad and Steaks are the must to try.

Honestly this place is so overrated. It is overpriced and I believe that the owner does not know much about Italian cuisine as some meals make no sense. That being said the gnocchi themselves were good (the sauce not really and the portion small for the price) and the staff was friendly.
Wonderful food, my husband and I returned to double our experience. And the second time was great too! We indicate with great certainty excellence

This restaurant is a tourist trap. When travelling to chiang mai we chose this restaurant as it was extremely highly rated. The food was awful my chicken was so overcooked and dry and my partners meal was also to the same standard. If you like fine dining such as the food you can get in London I do not recommend going here. The only thing that was good about the restaurant was the service, the staff were excellent and prompt and deserve more than they receive.
Great place with an amazing view, the pool is so good and the service is excellent. Drinks were 10/10 and offer a huge variety.
Fabulous bar in great setting with awesome view and cool pool. Friendly and fast service with good selection of drinks at reasonable prices. Highly recommend.
The food & service were excellent. My wife had Pappardelle Beef Ragu which was phenomenal. I had Pappardelle Gambierri Pesto, which was great as well
This spot is nice to visit with your lover. Placed in Nimman, easy to visit! Nice foods, wine lists and delicious mango dessert!
An elegant restaurant offering refined flavors and attentive, gracious service for an exceptional dining experience.

We had a splendid evening at this delight of an establishment! What a way to celebrate our arrival to Chiang Mai, beautiful surroundings, attentive staff, great selection on the menu, and most importantly, the food was wonderful! The restaurant has just had a refurbishment and so is looking lovely! When in Chiang Mai, put this on your to do list!

This place had and amazing food and excellent service. The starters were fresh and delicious. The pizza was cooked to perfection and the ribeye was prepared just as well. The incredible staff and food made this the best place my wife and I have eaten at yet 10/10

My husband and I are visiting for our honeymoon and for our last night in Chiang Mai came here for a nice dinner. We had amazing food and drinks, and spectacular service. definitely recommend coming here.

I visited Lumi with my family, including our baby, and we had a truly wonderful experience. The staff was incredibly attentive and welcoming, making sure we were comfortable throughout the evening. The food was excellent – everything we ordered was delicious, but the dessert and the meat dishes stood out in particular. The meat was of exceptionally high quality and cooked to perfection. We also really enjoyed the wine selection, which complemented the meal beautifully. The atmosphere was modern and elegant, creating a perfect setting for a relaxed family dinner. Thank you for such a lovely evening – we will definitely be coming back!

The restaurant is in the middle of renovations. Dinner was served in a characterless, oblong room with no character. It was accessed by a steep climb up an outside, grungy stairway. The service was good and the servers were friendly. We both had ribeye steak. My girlfriend’s steak was good, mine was full on fat, not good. I would suggest you give this restaurant a miss until the renovations are complete. It was an expensive restaurant with zero ambience. We had dressed for a great dining experience and were sadly disappointed. ☹️

This is a great little place. nice seating. We came here on our first night in Chiang Mai. There restaurant was fairly quiet but the staff were really nice and we really enjoyed our food. I had the salad which was massive and bruschetta to start. Would recommend.
We had a lovely dinner at Italics sitting on the outdoor terrace. We particularly enjoyed the lobster bisque ravioli and the bruschetta. The service was also excellent and very attentive. Thank you!
We are quite regular customers, the food and service is always excellent. We had the beef ragu and the mushroom and truffle risotto this time. Superb quality, absolutely delicious!

Really impressed with this place, we noticed the really cool lighting as we walked by another evening so checked it out and it had good reviews about home made pasta which I was craving. It was really good the chef knows what he is doing for sure. I also tried the Burrata salad which normally I wouldn't have salad but I highly recommend trying this and the home made beef ragu pasta. Will come back for sure 🙏🏿🙏☘️🙏🙏🏿

A suave and quaint restaurant with beautiful Italian food. The burrata salad was wonderful, incredibly fresh cheese. Handmade pasta with classics and some modern twists. Some Thai options also available. Award winning chefs, impressed with the quality of food and would visit again.
We had a delightful dinner in the stylish dining room. Lobster tortellini was the standout dish. Tuna tartar and burrata get honourable mentions. Will visit again.

We loved italics as soon as we walked in. The service was excellent along with the food and atmosphere. They have seating for larger parties and also outdoor seating. I would highly recommend. It is located in the One Nimmon area which is a great place to explore before or after.

Stayed at the Akyra Manor for a golf trip with friends, and breakfast at the Italics was part of the deal. An excellent choice of dishes from the menu. I especially enjoyed the oatmeal with fruit and seeds; a very healthy option. A well stocked buffet bar with yoghurt, fresh fruit, freshly squeezed fruit juices, breads and danish pastries was included in the deal along with any menu choices. Excellent service from Ann, Daow and Panda made for a bright start to each day.
We loved the staff! Panda, Ann and Daow did a great job! They were super nice to have a double expresso ready for me every morning. Breakfast was very yummy.

Here’s the updated review with their names included: We had the pleasure of dining at italics every morning during our stay at Akyra as Hilton Gold members, where breakfast was included. Each day was a wonderful experience! Panda, Daow, and Ann were incredible—so warm, attentive, and hospitable. They often customized the menu to our preferences, making every meal feel personal and special. The food was always fresh and delicious, and the service was truly exceptional. Panda, Daow, and Ann made us feel like family, and we will miss this place and their kindness so much. If you’re in the area, don’t miss dining here—it’s an unforgettable experience! Thank you, italics, for starting our mornings off perfectly! Read less

My husband and I stayed here at Akyra Hotel for 3 weeks and came to Italics for breakfast every morning. We got to know many of the workers, all of them are so friendly and helpful. Panda, Daow, and Ann always greeted us with a smile, accommodated all of our random requests, and anticipated our needs. They have a varied menu with healthy options also. We really liked the beet yogurt. And for a treat, they make delicious french toast! And my favorite local Thai breakfast was the Khai Krata- it has fried eggs and meat with a surprisingly tasty soy saucey flavor. I ordered that several times! And there’s also a buffet available with little muffins and yogurts if you don’t want to be served. Read less
It was ok..lobster ravioli was average pizza was ok..but a little expensive for what it was i went because of all the positive reviews but just found it fair to average
Very classy restaurant , the welcome is excellent and the pizzas huge and delicious. Thanks to Bobby for his kind attention on my birthday!
Best italian food in Chiang Mai! The Pasta, Gnocchi and the wine were divine. The dream team of, IYU, JC, Thanya, and Must, was amazing. Thank you very much! We will come again.
The staff is pleasant, and the food options are plentiful, and he likes the coconut juice, and Mr. Ann provides advice and attention to detail.
Loved the decor of the restaurant and the food very much, the atmosphere was nice and the staff was very attentive. The service staff, Mr. Panda, Mr. Le Ferne, Mr. Star, Mr. Ann, was also very good.
Go for lunch, pizza, pasta, it's delicious. Loved it. The staff named Yungbird was very helpful. 👏🏻 👏🏻 👏🏻 Smiling clearly.
Really delicious food, and high-class service. Cute and friendly servants who just put the dot over the i. Definitely worth a visit if you are in Chiang Mai
Everything about the food is delicious, the atmosphere is great and perfect for dinner, and the overall service is okay.
Had a great time here, lovely restaurant and nice atmosphere. Had a burrata salad and an akyra pizza which where amazing thank you Nokyung for the recommendations and impeccable service
Fantastic restaurant, the food was incredible, easily the best we've had in Chiang Mai so far, Bobby and his staff could not have been more helpful, 5stars all round!
A lovely dining experience in a contemporary setting with very attentive staff. The food was superb. We had the rib eye steak and pork chop, both delicious. Highly recommended
We had a wonderful New Year’s Eve dinner at Italics. Nok Yung and Thanya were very attentive and fun hostesses for our dinner. Highly recommend coming for a delighful and delicious meal!

Had the chance to try Italics today based on Chef Arm’s recommendation, and it was absolutely amazing! The food was incredibly delicious, especially the special pizza crafted by Chef Arm himself. The restaurant has a wonderful atmosphere beautiful, cozy, and perfect for a romantic date or even a stylish photo shoot. The prices are very reasonable and totally worth the quality of the food. The staff were super attentive and took great care of us. We booked for Christmas Day as we had friends who wanted a variety of food, we also had read positive reviews. Unfortunately it was disappointing. The cost of food & service charge you would expect a high standard, it was actually our least favourite place compared to the many places we have visited during our ten days in Chiang Mai. Firstly the service was poor, food orders were taken without some of us even knowing, meaning everyone was coming out at different times. Food was average, I had Gnocchi which was extremely hard, sauce bland. We had been to another Italian few days before which was incredible! I would save your money and visit less pretentious restaurants. Read less
Restaurant with peculiar decoration and excellent food. Good service and fair price. Good gastronomic experience in Chiang Mai.

Excellent restaurant with great rooftop bar. Food was great with friendly service and good choice. Headed up to rooftop for some drinks. This has an infinity pool and fab views over chiang mai. Highly recommend and very reasonable.

We enquired about a table for 3 for Xmas lunch and we were told none was available. After some extra pleas (wanted to try the best rated restaurant in Chiang Mai) we were given a table. Surprisingly during the 2 hour lunch, 90% of the restaurant was empty. The food was excellent. Especially recommend scallop truffle starter. The food service was good but perhaps hurried since entree was brought to table before we finished appetizers. The main issue was with cocktails. The mojito had no rum. Tasted soda water. The martini had no gin taste. When we complained about this the head waiter he went and talked to the bartender but nothing happened. I would recommend you stick to wine and beer and avoid cocktails. Hence our 3 star rating. Read less
Had a great lunch here went with some friends. I had a pizza 6 cheeses wich nokyung advised it was delicious. And panna cotta also very good. Thanks Nokyung for great care and service. See you soon

Italics Restaurant Today, there was a chance to grab a drink at Rise Roofbar, the bartender sister, made a delicious cocktail, good staff, a good atmosphere besides cocktails, and the Italian food was really delicious.
Foods and services were on point, so savory and flavorful. Wonderful service by khun Nokyung. Highly recommended for anyone looking for something special.
We had a couple delicious breakfasts with great service. Rise, the rooftop bar, is a must stop. we were thoroughly impressed by the mixology and service from our favorite bartender Oat!
Had a great time while having lunch at this restaurant. Nokyung recommended the summer salad wich was very good. Thanks for such good service!
Absolutely amazing food, the service was exceptional and the atmosphere was amazing. If you are in Chiang Mai come here!

We love this restaurant much and highly recommend to everyone who want to have a nice western meal in Nimman area. Friendly and cozy environment makes me feel like home , the servers - Ann and Daow , two sweet ladies provide professional services and caring attitude make my dining experience unforgettable. Plus … good coffee 🤍

Best food that I have had in Chiang Mai, must visit!!! The food was beyond exceptional, so too was the service and the atmosphere was just perfect for a nice romantic night out. If you are in Chiang Mai visit here!
The different banana roti, crispy spices and pineapple eggs, juice, and attentive staff service like your breakfast recommendations, Anne explains well.
Excellent! The dishes are wonderful and very good service!! We really liked the place and the food!!!!!!!’n
The food is very good, price, quantity and quality is great. Have parking and the service is excellent, Baifern was very kind and took good care of my food allergies . I will come back for sure!
Very good food, super nice and nice environment. Team Iyu, JC, Thanya and Baifran were extremely attentive and kind!! Congratulations!!
Excellent pizzas and very good service. Thank you to the team for its hospitality. Special thanks to JC, Thanya, Must and IYU who were great.

Highly recommend this place! We were here for our last night in Chiang Mai and were delighted with the quality of the place and the service! The staff - Ivy, Mast, JC and Bobby are amazing and super kind!
The best Italian restaurant in Chang Mai!!!! The pasta with the salmon was soooo delicious! Everything here is so tasty! Thank u Juy, Must,JC and Bobby for a perfect dinner service
The food was delicious, especially the fried fish, and Iyu's staff and Jc, who was very helpful and franny, recommended it.
Great food and service highly recommended. We enjoyed the rooftop terrace for drinks. Amazing sunset before heading to restaurant.
We had a very nice dinner here two nights in a row, the food is very delicious and our waiter Bobby was a very nice man, who fulfilled all our wishes
Great service, great drinks, good appearance and good taste, great atmosphere, great views of Chiang Mai!!!!! ..need to be next time.
Great food. Best meal during your stay in Chiang Mai! The service is impeccable. Authentic Italian food. All the waiters are very friendly and welcoming. Especially Bobby!
The restaurant really liked it, good choice of food and drinks, varied menu, salad with crab is just huge, you can have two and some other snacks, pasta is delicious, come back soon
Excellent experience! The food is great and the service is even better. I was served by Bobby, who was very attentive. When you come to Changmai, you have to try this restaurant!
Great location and ambience! The cocktails were tasty and the view of the mountains was amazing! Great drinks and service from Pup and Bobby!
So good vary nice the staff so enjoy and see sunset make me happy thank you for staff orio show unique coketall i like it have fun

My husband and I had our honeymoon in Chiang Mai and stayed at the Akyra Manor hotel. Every morning, we enjoyed breakfast at the Italics restaurant as it was included in our stay. For breakfast, I loved their menu, especially the burger, nutella banana toast, and oat with fruits. For drinks, they had the standard options: coffee, tea, and chocolate. Every morning, I ordered hot or cold chocolate, and my husband ordered a flat white. I only hope that they can also add Thai tea to the breakfast drinks menu. The service was very good! All servers were friendly and eager to meet the customer’s needs. I & my husband especially loved one of the restaurant staff member named Daow, whose English speaking and service was exceptional. I admire Daow's spirit; she's young, energetic, and eager to learn. I hope we'll meet again someday. P.S.: You can ask them to pack your food if you don't have time to eat breakfast at the restaurant. Read less
Great spot for sunset drinks with view of the mountains. Tasty margarita with fresh lime! 250thb to take a dip in the pool.

We have been here many times. Both bar and restaurant. Good food at Italic and It is an open bar and a pool on top. One of the best place to sit and chill seeing sunset. Bobby the bar manager is very attentive. Totally recommended
Nice Italian restaurant located in the Akyra Manor hotel. There's also a rooftop bar with nice view called Rise at the top of the hotel.

We absolutely loved our stay at Akyra hotel and the italics restaurant was very very delicious. The rise bar was absolutely stunning. Bobby took very good care of us. The drinks were seriously delicious and the sunset was magnificent!
Really nice view and vibes. We got cocktails and sparkling wine. Would recommend! This is one of the more upscale places in Chiang Mai.
Super rooftop bar with good food and drinks and a great sunset view! The staff was super friendly! Thank you Bobby and Readar for the great service!
Beautiful rooftop bar with great food and drinks! Bobby & Rezdzv were the friendliest bartenders, delicious aperitif done!
It’s a Lovely and calm rooftop with wonderful views and really amazing cocktails! The service was really good. I would 100% recommend this place :)

I had an amazing experience at Rise Rooftop Bar! The views were stunning, especially during their great happy hour at sunset, which made the evening even more special. The Singapore Sling I ordered was absolutely delicious, and my friend’s Rosé was also amazing. What really stood out was our server, Thanya—she was attentive, friendly, and gave excellent recommendations. Her warm personality made the night unforgettable. If you’re looking for a perfect spot to enjoy happy hour with breathtaking views and top-notch service, Rise Rooftop Bar is the place to go. Be sure to ask for Thanya—she’s the best! Read less
Had an amazing time - thanks Ploy! Loved the service, drinks were great, thanks for looking after us. Definitely, come back again.

I had such a lovely time at Rise. In particular, one employee named Ploy was very attentive and helped me when I was choosing which drink to have. She ended up making me a drink called “One Night in Chiang Mai”, which was amazing! I’ll be back when I’m next in Thailand ☺️☺️

I stayed at Akyra Manor for a few days as part of a cycling group of friends, and as our booking included dinner in Italics every day - and we had breakfast in the restaurant every morning - we spent a lot of time there! What a lovely restaurant. The food is varied and universally excellent, the atmosphere is refined but casual, and the staff are warm and friendly. I had a wonderful breakfast experience at Italics restaurant located in Akyra Manor. The prices were surprisingly affordable, the plating was beautiful and sophisticated, and the taste exceeded my expectations. With a variety of dishes to choose from, each made with fresh ingredients, it was easy to find something that suited my palate perfectly. The highlight of my visit was the service from the staff, especially the manager, Ann. She was exceptionally friendly and attentive, taking the time to recommend dishes and carefully explaining each one. Her thoughtful suggestions made the meal even more enjoyable. Jack and Daow also left a lasting impression with their warm smiles and friendly demeanor. They created a welcoming atmosphere, adding a touch of happiness to our morning. Thanks to them, the experience felt genuinely special and memorable. Italics isn’t just a place for great food – it’s a place where the service truly elevates the entire dining experience. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a delightful breakfast. Read less

After days of eating rice, chicken and pat thai we opted for this “Italian” restaurant based on the great reviews. The first welcome basket of focaccia served with pesto sauce and olive oil aside, seemed like a dream so much so that we asked for two more (without any supplement). We then ordered 3 coca-cole, 2 waters, 1 portion of tomato bruschetta and 4 fillets with side dish (2 mashed potatoes and 2 fries). Good bruschetta, meat really cooked properly and of excellent quality, as well as the side dishes, the sauce accompanying the gorgonzola and the salad seasoned Italian. We finished with two “lava cake” (soft chocolate heart cake with vanilla ice cream), delicious and that we were offered! Very kind staff, competent chef so much so that he preferred not to serve the "baby potatoes" that we had initially ordered as a side dish as not good enough. Very nice and clean room, perfect bathroom with disposable towels. Prices absolutely in line with those of Thailand, only 31€ per person. We do not know if the managers or the chef are really Italian but expectations were more than met, in fact in view of several other pat thai, we booked for the following evening! Tip: try offering coffee and liqueurs at the end of the meal, it would be perfect! Keep it up guys! Read less

Italics, the signature restaurant of Akyra Manor, delivers an outstanding breakfast experience. The modern décor, creates a warm and elegant atmosphere. The food, crafted under the expertise of award-winning Chef Gem Sitisanong, is a testament to quality and innovation. The Nutty Banana Bliss Roti is both visually and tastefully delightful, while the Eggs Benedict is executed flawlessly with a perfectly runny yolk and rich hollandaise sauce. The Kao Tom, despite its simplicity, is bursting with flavor and a must try. Exceptional service from Baifern and the team, including Nokyung, Iyu, Daow, and Jack, made every morning a pleasure. Plates were swiftly cleared, and we were never kept waiting. Italics at Akyra Manor delivers an unforgettable blend of flavor, style, and warm hospitality, making it a must-visit in Chiang Mai. About lunch meal, we have a lovely appetizer, main course, and yummy dessert! So worth it for the budget. Customer service is exquisite at all times. Not only do they have Italian dishes as we thought, they have a lot of variety of Western dishes, and everything was very good, we ate tuna tartare, prawn ravioli and a meat dish that was amazing (I don't remember the name), desserts just as good. The place is very nice and cozy. To finish a great dinner, you can climb onto the rooftop above in the same building with good views of Chiang May and have a coocktail, they make them very elaborate and are impressive.
We have been here with the whole family. Everyone ordered something different and everyone loved his/her dish. This place is a must.
This spot is very nice ! The food is really great. We ate with ten people and everyone had a great dish. Also very polite staff. Desserts delicious

Top restaurant with great food in a great atmosphere!! The dishes look delicious and taste even better!!👌🏻 Highly recommended if you are in Chang Mai and looking for a culinary treat for a really reasonable price 👌🏻🇨🇷
Best place in town. If you like good food, nice drinks and a friendly staff, this is the place to be. The steak and the dessert were exelent

"I had an exceptional dining experience at the hotel's Italian restaurant. The ambiance was warm and inviting, perfectly capturing the essence of Italy. The service was attentive and friendly especially Mr.Bobby making us feel welcomed from the moment we arrived. Very friendly and forthcoming staff. Special thanks to Thanya for her kind hospitality which really made it a great diner experience.
Excellent Italian cuisine, buratta with truffle on brioche, pasta stuffed with lobster, tiramisu: a superb dinner
We stayed here for dinner and loved it. We tried the pasta and it was very good, the location elegant and the staff attentive and kind

If you're in Chiang Mai and love good food, you've got to try Italics! This place takes Italian food to a whole new level and nails the dining experience from start to finish. I’m a local (but have been traveling worldwide), and I can safely say this is one of my favorite restaurants in town. Their Calamari Fritto is ridiculously good. You get these super crispy, fried squid rings with a cool twist - a sprinkle of kaffir lime leaf powder. It adds this unique citrusy kick that sends your taste buds on a tropical vacation. Then there's their Burrata & Truffle Pizza - talk about indulgence! The gooey burrata is a creamy dream, and the truffle slices are a game-changer. Each bite is a mouthful of luxury that leaves you wanting more. Don't miss out on their Italics Summer Salad, either. It's a refreshing combo of mixed leaves and tuna. It's simple but packed with flavor, the perfect side to balance out your meal. But the star of the show? The service. Their maitre'd, Mr. Bomb, is a true pro. He knows his stuff, gives great wine recommendations, and makes you feel like you're the most important person in the room. In a nutshell, Italics isn't just a restaurant; it's a food adventure combining Italy and Thailand's best. Great vibes, fantastic food, and top-notch service - what more could you ask for? Don't miss out on this gem when you're in Chiang Mai! Read less

Ironically, my Thai wife had a very Canadian-like dinner, a perfectly prepared and well presented pork chop with mashed potatoes and peas while I, a Canadian, had a combination of Italian and Thai, a delicious serving of mushroom and truffle risotto with a generous dish of pad Thai on the side. In addition to these excellent menu items, we were treated extremely well by Egg, our waiter.

We saw a few Google reviews that didn’t do Rise justice - they mentioned bad service and bad layout and high prices. We did not find any of that to be true!! The two bartenders there were friendly and helpful and built us great cocktails. Pricing is inline with all the other bars of similar style in Chiang Mai (think Drinksmith, Nophaburi, Latitude, Bubbles, Brit Bar, etc) at 300-350 thb each. The layout is fine. Yes, it is dominated by the swimming pool, but that’s a feature, not a bug. The view over Chiang Mai is limited - you’re on a rooftop, but not a super tall building - but you still get a very good view of the mountains. I am sure sunset drinks here would be great! It is hot there - it is after all an outdoor bar in Thailand, and it’s a hot part of the year - but that is part and parcel of visiting Thailand in this season. All in all - we will go back to Rise, and we are looking forward to trying Italics on our next visit. The menu looks great and the restaurant itself is quite nicely furnished. Read less

Italics is a perfect place for spending time with your friendsand family. I first visited Italics two years ago with friends. He explained that the original Gnocchi might make it hard for people who aren't familiar with traditional Italian style pasta. Deep fried Gnocchi provided such a little crispy texture outside and soft texture inside. Everything on the table is carefully, profoundly selected from the best resources by Chef Phubase so we can ensure the quality of food. Tomahawk is one of my favorite menu. With a perfect temperature and chef's skillful, my Tomahawk comes out very perfect. I love its buttery, juicy and tenderness. I would recommend you to try! Read less

My husband and I visited this bar on the beautiful rooftop overlooking the sunset. Nokyung was our server and she was so friendly and kind to us! I highly recommend coming here to anyone in Chiang Mai! Thank you Nokyung for your friendly face and wonderful service!
One of my favorite places to splurge in Chiang Mai. The food is excellent. The service is wonderful. And the views from the rooftop bar at sunset are unbeatable!!
Nice cocktails and cool ambiance, went here around happy hour. Our bartenders Noktung and Sak were friendly and gave some clutch complementary snacks.

Although we have never been guests in the hotel, my wife and I have visited the Rise rooftop bar a number of times in the last couple of years and always enjoyed it. The cocktails are expertly crafted, the atmosphere is pleasant and low key, and the view is magnificent. Recently we heard that Italics, the hotel restaurant, was starting to distinguish itself as a fine dining venue, so we -- foodies that we are -- decided to give it a try. We enjoyed cocktails on the roof and then came down to the dining room for dinner. We shared the tuna tartare and Caesar salad for appetizers, and for mains my wife had the seared Hokkaido scallops and I had the pork chop. For dessert we shared the tiramisu. Everything was excellent: perfectly prepared and artfully presented. The tuna and scallops were outstanding -- impressive in Chiang Mai, where we are so far from the ocean. Oh, and I had a glass each of the house white and red wines and would rate them superior for house wines. Now for a couple of minor criticisms... The Rise 2-for-1 "happy hour" schedule has changed from 5:30-6:30 to much later (8:30-9:30?), which is long after sunset -- the ideal time for enjoying the view -- and too late for cocktails before dinner. We preferred the old schedule and will probably no longer frequent the bar unless we are also having dinner at Italics. Secondly, the pacing of the dinner was a little off -- there was a delay between the salad and tuna, and again before the mains were served. We were not in a hurry and the dishes were worth waiting for, but this and the happy hour change are the reasons this is not a 5 star review. Nevertheless we will surely go back. Read less
Just visited, the bartender May was amazing and took really good care of us! Highly recommended! Try their mojito!
Loved the place. Great drinks and excellent atmosphere. Was served by May and Botan, both extremely welcoming! Highly recommend it!

We stayed at Akyra for three nights, and the highlight of every morning was breakfast at Italics! All the food was yummy and tastefully presented, but the Banana Roti was probably the best breakfast item I ever had in all our travels! Flakey, creamy, chewy and just loaded with flavors. Five Stars!!!

The hotel looks very stylish and cool, and while we were staying in another part of town, we decided to check their promising rooftop bar out for a sundowner. So my review is for the bar only, not for the Italian restaurant on entrance level. And the rooftop bar was very average. While views are certainly quite nice over town and the surrounding mountain ranges and also the pool looks quite cool, the bar itself somehow feels a bit crammed, even if not crowded. Drinks fall a bit short: I had a disappointingly unbalanced Negroni (which I couldn't tell if due to wrong ingredients or off proportions), and my wife had a Chiang Mai Sangria, which seemed to be an interesting take on the Spanish original, it was ok, not great. Prices are almost at Western level. Music: Most tourists won't realize music in a hotel bar, but I'm very much into good music, and here I was exposed to a completely irrelevant soundtrack consisting of commercial radio music. If you have a place like this and want to make it special, play special music, maybe even curated by a professional DJ. Read less

We really love the Italian food at Italics especially the pizza. Don't forget to take a cocktail at the pool-side bar at the rooftop. You could also enjoy the sunset there. We would definitely go back and stay again.
My girlfriend and I had lovely sunset drinks here with great service from Karn and Bell. The drinks were nice and cold and the complimentary snacks were a nice addition. Would recommend!
THank you for the attention Karn and Sak, we had a lovely evening and enjoyed our delicious cocktails. Will be back. Go, what are you waiting for?
We enjoyed a couple of drinks at Rise rooftop bar. The drinks were very well prepAred by Sak and Karn was very friendly to assist us in anything we needed. Definitely recommend
Best sunset rooftop view in Chiang Mai, come for the happy hour deals stay for excellent hospitality by server Karn.

This is without a doubt the best spot for sunset drinks in Chiang Mai. Bartenders Nokyung and May are friendly, attentive and add to the already great atmosphere. Try their Singapore sling, it’s delicious. A must do in Chiang Mai.

I have had the most amazing experience at Italics &Rise roof top. The staff, Nakyung and Sak are welcoming and friendly. Do try a mojito or two during happy hour. The atmosphere is pleasant! Best view for sunset 🌅 in Chiang Mai.
Chique bar with nice view. Has happy hour between 16-17, you get 1+1 for free. It has a beautiful pool which you can use when you are a hotel guest.

After a lovely dinner in Italics resteraunt downstairs we made our way up to the 8th floor of the akyra hotel to Rise rooftop bar. The views are stunning and great cocktails by Bell and incredible service by Jojo. Highly recommended.

I had a great time with my friends! it is always a surprise to find a good restaurant from Instagram, of course i made the reservation immediately. the service is nice and friendly, we enjoy the food, drink, and the happy memories in italics. Once you have a trip to Chiang Mai, must come and stay here....it won't make you down^^

First time for this place very impressive and nice atmosphere rooftop bar in this area. "Pang"she is friendly and welcoming for services and very good cocktail with bartender "Bell" I recommended to come here if you are looking for nice place to hangout with great Chiang Mai view.

We had an amazing breakfast at Italics! The buffet has a lot of great treats already and is combined with the free choice of 2 dishes per person. On top of this, my girlfriend received an amazing surprise cake for her birthday. Overall wonderful experience in a nice setting with enjoyable staff!

We came for happy hour in November and our waitress, Nokyung, took such good care of us while we were at the rooftop! We even were brought delicious chicken sate on the house! The bartender, Sak, makes delicious cocktails! Best we've had in Chiang Mai! Definitely recommended if you're in the city. Not to boot, there's a great view of the mountain!
We came to this bar and wanted good drinks and vibes. We really enjoyed the ambiance, service and views. Jojo and Bell were very helpful and provided great service! The drinks were delicious!
Came here during an extended stay in Chiang Mai. The rooftop bar has beautiful views of the city to accompany the tasty drinks. Bell and JoJo were extremely helpful in picking out drinks to try!

My friend and I went up to the rooftop during the Loy Krathong festival. The views were amazing. We had a great view of the fireworks and lanterns. Mr. Bell made our delicious lychee cocktails and the lovely Pang served us. Wonderful service and a great place for taking in the views of Chiang Mai. Would recommend stopping by for a rooftop cocktail to start the evening off.

This place is perfect for viewing the sunset. Great drink selection and reasonably priced. The atmosphere is relaxing and wonderful place to spend conversation. Our waitress, May Nokyung, was attentive and very sweet! I highly recommend a visit!
Beautiful rooftop views, delicious craft cocktails, and great 5-star service from May Nokyung! Highly recommend this rooftop bar for nice sunset views!!

Chiang Mai has a lot of bars but Rise is one of the best. What makes Rise stand out is the service. Jojo helped us get the exact table we wanted with the view of the city and Mr. Sak the bartender mixed us specialty drinks that were absolutely incredible. Definitely try the Passion Smash, that was our favorite!
Excellent place to visit... Staff very welcoming They both were extremely attentive and helped us navigate around the area. The local knowledge was second to none. Fabulous people.

This rooftop bar is perfect for an afternoon/sunset cocktail. Great view of the city and awesome pool. Nibbles and drinks are delicious. This place is a little more expensive than others around, but I think it’s definitely worth the money. The cocktails are far superior to others I’ve had in the area. The only downside would be the lighting is very dim at night, they do put small candles on the tables but the lady had to use a flashlight for me to be able to read my bill. Overall amazing place.

We had drinks up on the pool deck watching the sunset and lights come up. We moved to the bar area to have some food and more drinks. Shared the Seafood Set barbecue platter and the seared scallops off the Tapas menu. Just lovely. Recommended for a relaxed and beautiful evening.

It was a remarkable moment with our humorous household gang. We were from Pusan Korea 부산광역시. We came to Chiang Mai for being a Christians volunteer team for a year. Besides, We got three containers of a Singha beer, two fresh coconuts, and two goblets of the classic cocktail, which we call the old fashion. We recommend that if you come to Akyra’s Rooftop, visit this lounge to make a new companion or have a small discussion with your family members. Besides, Get some Hawaiian pizza would be extraordinary. Moreover, Mr. Sak, who is the most cheerful bartender of the hotel and Jojo, who is one of the excellent service staff, could give rise to your journey experiences, feel like a boss. Read less

My wife and I had dinner last night at Italics and had a great dining experience. We both we in the mood for steak and Italics has a very nice tenderloin on the menu. The meat was very tender and flavorful. Presentation was very well done. A pretty good wine selection however I would like to have seen more wines available by the glass.
Food was delicious! Service was faultless. Great atmosphere and decor. Prices are really good considering the standard of everything. Couldn’t recommend more.

We talked about how to make a cocktail with Sak and Jojo. They recommended us, Dirty Martini and Lychee Martini, it's so different, but we still love the classic one. Thanks for your excellent services. Tomorrow, we are going to fly back to China. It was a perfect moment to be here.

Sawaddeekaa, First time visit Chiang Mai with my colleagues. we had your unique cocktails Akyra cocktail and my favorite was Chiang Mai sangria. Thanks for your kindness Jojo and best cocktail from sir Sakky. We hope we will meet each other again.
Food was phenomenal and the service was the only thing better never beeen so satisfied in my life 10/10 recommend, mr may and jojo made sure we had an unbeatable experience from start to finish

Italics is a very nice Italian restaurant located in the center of the city. Even though the restaurant is just by the Hotel Lobby, it doesn’t feel that much. The food was very good and the service was amazing as well. Definitely worth given a try after so many days of only Thai food. Very good wines as well.

Shame that hotel foyer is nearly part of the restaurant.When making the reservation mentioned it was a 65th birthday dinner.However only when one of the guests asked the staff if they could put a candle on a dessert was anything done to celebrate the fact which was disappointing.Food was a bit hit and miss with some dishes like chefs pizza and lasagna being excellent but other noodle dishes only so so. Given the prices was disappointed.
The restaurant is well designed and the atmosphere is good. I had pizza and pasta and they were really good.

The food was good but the lasagna is spicy and not classic is more like Thai lasagna ! Not Italian ! .... French fries are really good so crunchy and the pizza is good it doesn’t have to much consistency like pizza it’s more like pizza-lasagna but the flavour from all the food it’s good

We wanted a drink after a long day out and found this place and decided to try it. The bartender Bell and server Nokyung took care of us promptly and gave us excellent service. They were very friendly, spoke excellent English and made sure we enjoyed our night. We will probably be making this our regular happy hour bar! Highly recommended!
I had a great time at rise bar - amazing views, great drinks and great service from Bell and Jojo on the roof :) Would highly recommend a visit!

I highly recommend coming to rise bar! The views are amazing and I love the pool! It’s my favourite spot in Chiang Mai... a big shoutout to JoJo and Bell- they were so friendly and catered to our every need. Definitely coming back soon.
Amazing service, had happy hour 2 for 1 cocktails from 5:30-6:30. Sak and nokyung provided extraordinary service, going above and beyond providing complementary snacks. Would recommend
Sak and Nokyung provided great service! Highly recommend and would definitely come again next time I visit.

While traveling around Southeast Asia, my friends and I stumbled upon this restaurant. The food was phenomenal, and the service was amazing! Pang was our waitress and May was the bartender! They were both amazing! 10/10 recommend!
Very beautiful and aesthetic restaurant! Went with my friends and they had great food and drinks! Would highly recommend.
Amazing service and a beautiful restaurant. So modern and great vibes. Amazing food. Will come back.
I went with three of my friends and we such a wonderful time! The food was amazing and there was a great aesthetic. Our server Pang was also extremely helpful and the bartender May was phenomenal!
Super cute bar, super chilled and good cocktails made by mr Sak at decent prices :). Nice waitress, Pang too. Cool view over Chang mai and good to come here in the day time too
Good place to visit if you fancy a good cocktail with excellent service from Sak and Pang. Would highly recommend for the view too!

The rise rooftop bar has great views and good vibes- perfect for a sunset drink in a classy atmosphere at not extortionate prices! The restaurant has good service however there is much better and cheaper places for a pizza! The crusts of the pizza reminded me of an over pizza from Tesco.. had a lovely meal but not sure it’s worth the price.
One day At rooftop bar with the best cocktail. Thank you bartender K.bell and a little girl K.botan!!
Best rooftop bar I’ve been to.. really relaxed atmosphere. Excellent service, really friendly staff- Mr. Ball and Pang! Very tasty cocktails.. Would highly recommend

This rooftop bar is a fantastic location for all occasions! The staff are top class, cocktails to die for and views are breathtaking... would highly recommend a visit while in Chang Moi! 🍹The banana daiquiri is fabulous!!
Lovely location. Great atmosphere. Friendly staff. The bar mr bell and Pang. Would 100% come again. 😊
Amazing coctails, friendly staff and nice chilled atmosphere. Would recommend for a group of friends or perfect for a date. Good selection of coctails
Excellent food, wine, service and place We love it !! Thank you for everything May, Boton and Kaowmaow from Mexico 🇲🇽

Surprisingly had a great time with this chic roof top bar here with their food and cocktails. And also k.Maow, she’s sooooo nice and took a very good care of us throughout the night. Just had another favorite hangout spot in Chiangmai. Will come back again for sure.
Good italian restaurant with prices a little bit too high for Thailand. Ok pizza and sublime lasagna, both cooked in the wood fired oven.
Nice rooftop bar with terrific service by Bell and Jojo. Highly recommend the frozen daiquiris. Will be back.
Had an amazing time at this chic rooftop! Sak & Nui made sure my girl and I had a great experience. One of Chiang Mai’s must see hangouts. Ask for their signature Mai Tai.

Stopped by Rise for a drink, and were welcomed by two amazing staffers Sak our bartender, and Nui our server. The drinks were delish (even the complimentary popcorn was great). It was a rainy day for us but on a day with sunny weather the view would be amazing and you could get some really cool shots. I would def come back! Thanks Sak and Nui!

I enjoyed much at this restaurant for their excellent Italian food as well as the hospitality of the staff. The ambient environment highlighted with the good food. Besides, the staff provided very courteous service that I was delighted to have a fine dining with their much caring. Especially Goi who also introduced much about the roof bar as well as the hotel, also showed me the wonder roof bar and the types of their boutique rooms. I felt like being stayed with a good friend. Thank you, Goi. Surely I will come back to this restaurant and hotel again.
Amazing rooftop bar and with beautiful views and cocktails ;) Bell and JoJo are the best! I would deffo recommend to anyone visiting chiang mai!
Great place to be. It is a must in Chhiang Mai. Excelent music and great cocktails. Bell and jojo are also great!!!
The rooftop is in a beautiful location with great cocktails to enjoy the views of the city. A must in Chang Mai.
Nice place, great cocktails and an amazing pool. If you want to relax a bit in chiang mai you should come!!!
NYC level drink menu with Thailand prices, chic ambiance, beautiful views of mountains and city, and wonderful service from Bell and JoJo! Definitely a must visit on your night out in chiang mai!

Nice atmosphere and attentive staff at Italics in Chiang Mai. We ordered flatbread and the crabmeat Summer Salad to start. For the main course we had the chicken saltimbocca and the spicy pork lasagne. The lasagne is a revelation; I’ve only eaten the traditional Italian version but this twist on an Italian classic is amazing - lean pork with a spicy chili flavor: I loved it. With a bottle of house red wine and some bottled water we spent 2,700 baht, I thought it was well worth it.
Just have a trip to Chiang Mai and found this restaurant. The food here is really good and flavouring of food is well balanced. Definitely deserve a try in this restaurant!

Great food. Great staff and PERFECT ENGLISH on the menus. Hard to find proper western food in Asia in general and this place delivers. I mean yes, it's expensive for the area...but it's still cheap for what you get. Dinner for 2 with a bottle of wine was like $50 US so the same as 2 sandwiches and 2 beers in San Francisco where I live. LOL I'd go here anytime I had someone I wanted to impress or something to celebrate. Hands down the nicest spot in Chiang Mai
lovely staff,thank you Chef Phubase for made a special dinner for us again.will come back again for sure
Amazing experience the Steak was the best steak I ever had, thank you pang and bill! Advise people to come here! Amazing experience

I met my brother for dinner and drinks at rise rooftop bar, we both had steak which was by far the best steak I have had to date. A very chilled relaxed rooftop bar with great cocktails and very friendly staff. Thanks to pang & mr bell who made our experience great. Highly recommend this restaurant.

I've been to Italics a couple of times and today I realised that they also have an amazing rooftop bar called Rise, which I checked out. I love the One Night in Chiang Mai cocktail, and the tuna & avocado tartare was mind-blowingly delicious. The service from Sak & Jojo was awesome. I'll always pay this place a visit every time I come to Chiang Mai.

We had an excellent experience first at Rise with drinks and appetizers on the rooftop then for dinner at Italics. The staff was great. We got there early for dinner so they held our table while we had drinks upstairs. Pang was our server and she was fantastic. Two of us went for Italian with a pizza and mushroom and truffle risotto and the other two went for Thai with cashew chicken and pad Thai. Everything was hot, fresh and perfectly prepared. It’s very reasonably priced as well. Highly recommend for couples or families there were all kinds of clientele in the restaurant.
One of the best sky bars in Chiang Mai. Nice cocktails and very cozy, romantic atmosphere. Sak & Jojo
Great cocktails by Säk and Jöjö, would definitely come again. The view is amazing and the atmosphere very chill.

We found this restaurant accidentally but it was one of the best dining experience in Chiang Mai. The staff was attentive, friendly, and her recommendations from the menu were all delicious. Thank you to Kaomaow & The Team. Must try the tuna avocado, & the pesto spaghetti with prawn! And, don't forget to leave room for dessert, Lava Cake!!! would definitely eat here again when we come back to Chiang Mai

We stayed at the Akyra manor Hotel in August 2019 and had two dinners, lunch and breakfast daily at the Italics restaurant. Lovely atmosphere and excellent polite staff. The food was top notch. I loved the Pizzas and ordered them twice, they are wood fired oven cooked. Lovely Thai food too. Highly recommend this restaurant. The rooftop bar "Rise" is great for a cocktail with a nice view of surrounding Chiang Mai and a view of the mountains. I would visit here again. The prices are reasonable for a five star Hotel. This is not street food here. Fine dining at a mid range price

The restaurant was built with a nice and stylish design. As a group of six, we had tried quite a lot of different dishes, they all taste good and well presented as well. We really wanna try the desert, unfortunately we were full.

Beautiful setting next to the pool on the roof. The drinks are amazing and the service is excellent. Mr.Bill whipped up some delicious cocktails and Pang was super attentive to any requests. It’s a nice little splurge if looking for a drink in Chiang Mai.

My wife and I came with another couple and had a wonderful time. The space is beautiful and even though it was raining, we had a great spot under cover next to the pool. Our bartender, Mr Bell, whipped up really tasty cocktails and our server, Pang, was great! If you’re looking for an upscale spot for a fancy cocktail, this is definitely the place.
Great cocktails at decent prices and a great view of the city. Mr Bell and Pang provided great service and drinks
Went here for drinks with my friends on our trip to Chiang Mai. It’s a swanky rooftop bar with fancy cocktails. The bartender Mr Bell and waitress Pang were attentive and made delicious drinks!
Beautiful view and great service from Pang and Bell. Highly recommend. Great for watching the sunset.
The atmosphere is nice for having several glassea of kocktai even you are alone here . And staffs are friendly enough :)
Food was very good and the restaurant has a very nice and stylish interior. Staff is super friendly and helpfull.
Beautiful view, great drinks, located in a really fun area of Chiang Mai. Definitely worth a stop if you’re nearby. Thanks Mr. Bill and Pang for a lovely night!

Had a great time at this rooftop bar! Had been prepared for a crowd but got there right as rain was finishing so it was very relaxed. Our server Pang was very kind and dried off a table and seats for us. The drinks from Mr Bell (the bartender) were great—highly recommend the Chiang Mai Sangria!
Bell and Pang took great care of us! Drinks were fantastic! With exceptional service and views, Rise is well worth a visit.
Amazing and friendly staff Bell and Nokyung were very kind Recommend you to visit this, if you are in Chiang Mai.
Very lovely people. Diner for a good price and it tastes delicious. The people helped us to make a plan for the rest of our trip in thailand
Great rooftop to chill out and relax after a day out. Ask Bell and JoJo to make you a refreshing cocktail!
After a day of touring, the Rise Rooftop was a perfect getaway. Jojo was an extremely welcoming and attentive host, and the cocktails by Sak are delicious. I will definitely be back!
Amazing view and pool. Recommend 10/10! Very nice hotel and rooftop view. Great service and quality prices.

Perfect if you would like a combination of amazing drinks and views. Including a pool on the rooftop Rise rooftop bar is one of the best rooftops bars I’ve been too all around south east asia. Thanks to Jojo and Bell for their service and lovely cocktails.

Once again, went back to Italics with my colleague. This time just told Chef Phubase to prepare anything for us, except beef. Really International selection ... from Italy to India to Korea to Mediterranean and back to Thailand ... love the Pork Belly with Kimji very very much ... so tender and tasty .... I have to admit that the service here is second to none .... Thanks to Khun Pam, Khun Khaomao, and Khun May for excellent service & entertaining ..... I will be back again ... PS ... Ask to meet Chef to prepare exotic menu for you ... super fun ... trust me ... hehehe ... especially after 2 bottles of nice Red Wine .... oops .... Read less

Went to the rise bar with two girl friends. Had an amazing time. Great atmosphere and great cocktails, I recommend the strawberry frozen daiquiri! Great staff, very welcoming. We were served by Bell and JoJo!!
Amazing place to sit and unwind with a drink in your hand! The staff are so friendly especially bell and jojo! Would advise anyone to come here!
Delicious cocktails, stunning views, friendly staff especially Bell and JoJo. Highly recommend the visit!!

We stayed at the hotel and as part of package we had a special Thai lunch and dinner which were exceptional. They even accommodated the amount of chilli for our grandson who although he will eat spicy/hot food does not like it too hot. We also one evening had pizzas which were delicious. Definitely recommend for both Thai and Italian options. The staff are very attentive to their customers needs. Thank you

Dash recommended this restaurant to us and we went there twice! We had the pesto linguine with prawns and the gnocchi and both were very well executed. We also had the cippocino and it was excellent. We could taste the freshness of the seafood used in all the dishes we had. Restaurant is nicely decorated but not pretentious. One of the best we've had in Chiangmai in our 4-day visit and definitely worth a visit.

Restaurant with a very nice ambience great food and the service is fantastic thanks a lot to the service team especially PAM you have been taking care of us in a very good way .Prices are reasonable ,we will definitely come back .
Met with nothing but hospitality from the moment we walked in! Sak & Jojo made great drinks and better conversation!!
Sak and Jojo surpassed all of my expectations. Their hospitality and friendliness made me and my fiancé feel right at home. Great cocktails and great ambience!
Had a wonderful time at Rise Bar - drinks were really good and have you a beautiful view of Chiang Mai. Service was also awesome thanks to Sak and Jojo - would definitely recommend!

Stopped by here with a friend one night looking for a casual bar to hang. Was so happy we stopped by. The drinks were really great - I had a mojithai and my friend got the passionista. Sak and Jojo were the ones helping us out that night and they really helped make the evening great. Would recommend!

Chill and relaxed place on the top of hotel in Nimman Road. Bar is quite nice and good to cathch up with friends. staff here is warmed welcome and good host as Sak and Nokyoong explained us about the menu and recommended some drinks. Very good and recommended!

Rise Rooftop Bar is a great spot for seeing out your day in Chiang Mai. Bell and JoJo looked after us well. Great Pool and view of the surrounding area. Fans and a decent breeze to keep you cool. Do yourself a favour and check this joint out.
Great escape from the city. Perfect pool and drinks for a night out. Worth a stop by on your trip. Try the lychee martini.

A stunning rooftop bar and restaurant with pool and incredible views of Chang Mai. Cocktails by Bell were made just right and JoJo’s service was impeccable. We will recommend to our friends and come back very soon. (Not to mention they have good air flow with fans to beat the heat and mosquitos.) Don’t miss this spot!

I really enjoyed this cocktail. I really enjoyed spending time here nightsight is really awesome. Thank you. Bell and JoJo is really good. 직원들이 매우 친절하고 분위기도 아주 좋습니다. 꼭 방문하세요. 야경이 정말 예뻐요 다음에 치앙마이에 오면 재방문할것같습니다 Read less
Very nice restaurant. Good environment and very nice food! The people are really friendly specially Pang and Nokyung.
I liked it a lot and the vibe was really nice. Excellent service and Pang and Nokyung were very nice and friendly!!
It was a great and delicious dinner, realy friendly, specially pang and nokyung. Thanks for everything

I go to this restaurant..once a week Why ??!! Best food..Best Executive Chef and the Best Restaurant Manager, Pam I have written before about Italics Restaurant Each time I visit this restaurant, I make my reservation for the next week. Only if Pam is working. She was a Supervisor before. Now the Manager. Pam knows what I want to eat..She knows where I want to be seated Table 1 A. She will tell the Chef what I want to eat. My reservation is always for 7 PM. I do not have to look at any menu. It is either beef or pork in a sandwich. ( I have also had their white fish which is great).With a glass of red wine. Everything is ready when I get there. And, I am out in 30 minutes. This is not a cheap place. But, worth the price If visitors to the Nimmanhemin area, do not visit Italics..you lose..!!! I can not say anything more than, please visit Italics Read less

I specially like this restaurant because it has been decorated impeccably, modern clean lines make you feel like a million dollars. The food and service are great too. We enjoyed the selection of cold cuts and the pasta was al dente. Recommend if looking for a special occasion.
Wonderful time at the Rise bar with our waiter Jojo and Saq. Cool that they have a rooftop bar! Would love to come for a pool party one day.

We stopped by the Rise bar for a drink before dinner, amazing views of the Doi Suthep temple and the city from the rooftop. They even have pool parties here on Sundays! Jojo and Saq were lovely waiters

I’m in Chiang Mai for business with two prospective clients. I took them to Rise for a few drinks after dinner. JoJo and Bell catered to all of our needs and made sure we were all more than comfortable. The drinks and the view were great. Highly suggest

Decided to come here with two of my good friends. Had dinner which was amazing. Staff was very friendly and the professionalism was impressive. After dinner we headed up to the rise rooftop bar and was served by Bell and JoJo. Two very nice guys that not only made you feel at home but made unbelievably good drinks as well. Would be a shame to visit Chiang Mia without stopping by this place.
One of the better restaurants in Nimmana Haeminda Rd. Food is fresh and tasty. Staffs are all lovely and accommodating, especially Pang who serve me and my girlfriend.

Not too expensive as I thought. Good atmosphere, but too many mosquitos Free breads with Pesto sauce and butter are hot and newly baked. The black cod with prawn squid and green tea miso soup menu is strongly recommended with it’s great taste. The pork-chop is a bit hard and fatty but not too bad. Great service, especially a waitress called Pang, she mindfully served us. The glass never been empty, but once the water bottle runs out, she ask whether we want a new one, not open another bottle by herself. But if you wanna visit here, reservation is recommended Read less

Came with my sister to the Rise rooftop bar on our last night in Chiang Mai. It’s got a stylish boutique vibe with a great view of the mountains and Nimman neighbourhood below. Some of the view is blocked a little by the pool but if you get one of the four seats on the platform it’s spectacular. Reasonably priced, comfy chairs and stools, and great service. Endless supply of popcorn too!
Get in early for sunset drinks as there is limited seating. Great view over looking the mountains. Stylish and reasonably priced.
Great drinks. Great view. Great staff. Thanks Bell and JoJo for the fantastic service and drink recommendations! I will be back again.

We came for drinks but the bar was shut due to an event but the staff were more than accommodating, finding us a table in the restaurant to have drinks. Karn in particular was lovely, made sure we were well looked after as well as bringing us snacks. Been coming here for a while now and service has always been at this excellent standard. Definitely recommend.

Rise was a gem. Great views, super friendly staff and excellent drinks made for a fantastic close to our evening. Jojo and Bell made us feel so welcome and gave excellent service. Huge shout out to them for making our experience for memorable. Can't rave about this place enough.

Rise rooftop bar provides a sophisticated and relaxing atmosphere against stunning, panoramic views of Chiang Mai! I had the Chiang Mai Sangria and it was refreshing and tasty. Bell and Jojo provided exceptional service and elevated this extraordinary experience ever further. I will definately be back on my next trip to Chiang Mai.
Restaurant is beautifully decorated, food came out in a timely manner and was very tasty. Big thank you to Pang, Pam, Maow and Sak for the amazing service and very friendly.
Starter of a meat and cheese platter was plentiful and very tasty. My main was chicken with cashew and rice was also fantastic. Staff were all attentive and polite. Thank you Pang, Pam, Maow and Sak.

A beautiful meal. The starter was amazing and the Seabass was beautifully presented and tasted amazing. The best place we visited for food in Chiang Mai. We also had some lovely drinks and desserts. All the staff were so helpful and friendly. Pang, Pam, Maow and Sak provided 5* service.

Myself & my boyfriend visited this bar and it’s got a lovely, classy atmosphere. We had a cocktail each - I had the One Night in Chiang Mai and it was delicious. It was the perfect blend of being sweet, but not too tasting sweet, & strong, but not too tasting strong. Really well made drinks. Loved the free popcorn too! We lay on the sun loungers by the pool, which was lovely in the evening darkness, surrounded by candles and a great view of the city. A special thanks to Jojo and Bell for making it a great night & going the extra mile, really friendly guys! We’ll definitely be coming back here in the day, so we can have a dip in the pool with a cocktail in hand. Read less

We came here for a cocktail in the evening, views of the city and mountains are great, drinks are delicious and very reasonably priced. JoJo and Bell were helpful and friendly and make a really good long island ice tea!

Rise was a wonderful choice for a rooftop bar in Chiang Mai, and I would highly recommend it! Their burnt lemon margarita was delicious and distinctive—not something one would find on any cocktail menu. Both Bell and JoJo made an awesome team and provided excellent service. If you’re in Chiang Mai, make sure to stop here!
I had the Passion Smash and it was delicious! Definitely a cool atmosphere with a poolside view of the mountain. Thank you Jojo and Bell for the great service!

I went by myself & then came back with my girlfriend the atmosphere is incredible and the food is delicious. Our waitress Karn was exceptional at her job. We liked thier roof top bar on the top floor as well visit it if you get a chance.

This is my first time here. So I have been visiting many international food in Chiang Mai but this place very delighted me. Because food is very delicious in a reasonable price and service is really great. My Staff is Maow, Pang, and Pam. I’ve not to require any thing because they ask me before every time. They really good take care of me. If you find some Italian food and pleasant service. I’m really recommend this restaurant. :)) Read less

I’ve been here a couple of times before. The food has been good as always but the service tonight was beyond. The staff was very nice and hospitable. Maow, Pang and Pam were exceedingly friendly and attentive. Thumbs up!

Awesome atmosphere with beautiful views of Chiang Mai. Catch the sunset for IG worthy pics on the rooftop at Rise. The staff was overly nice & easy to communicate with which was great. We spent a few hours here hanging out for a chill/casual Tuesday night. Not busy at all but probably because it was a week day. 100% recommend this place for the views, service, hospitality, & atmosphere! P.S. the Moscow Mules were perfect!
Fantastic views of the mountain and pool, drinks, and service at Rise. Pang, Sak, and May made our time even more special. I would definitely recommend this spot to anyone!

We came here to grab a drink and see the view. Bar area is modern and looks into the see through pool. You get a great view of the city with the mountains in the background. On top of the view and vibe our server Pang and the bartenders Sak and May were very friendly. Would recommend if you want a drink and some views while in town.

Read a bunch of reviews online about this place, wanted to check it out while in chiang mai for some nice views. The views are nice and the pool is see thru giving the place a cute ambiance. Pang was our waitress and was attentive and sweet. Would visit again!

Came to the rooftop of Rise to enjoy a scenic drink with a great friend! Pang (our server), and Sak and May (our bartenders) were all a delight! The drinks and apps were delectable - 10/10 would recommend for your Chiang Mai visit!!
Really amazing atmosphere and lovely setting. The staff were also great as the catered for everything we wanted. Thank you very much Bell and JoJo !!
