We had a great time! Great food and the staff was so friendly, Bell & Jojo were so kind! Beautiful view :)
Such a great vibe here. Perfect for after spending the day with elephants! Definitely order the dirty martini.

Wonderful rooftop with great views over the hills and the Doi Suthep temple. The staff is extremely friendly and will go out of their way to make you have the best of times. I was particularly impressed by JoJo and Bell (two great members of staff). Big smiles and great cocktail making skills- what else can you ask for? 100% a place not to miss if in Chiang Mai!

Rise Rooftop Bar does not disappoint, we came as a couple for sunset drinks, and were spoilt with delicious passionfruit cocktails from the dream team JoJo & Bell. Very much recommend for a relaxed sundowner with a lovely view.

Food is superb, service is outstanding. Do not forget asking to meet Chef Phubase who surprisingly creates great out of menu dishes when asked. Really love the place. Burrata Salad with Parma Ham. Gnocchi with Truffles. Steak .... And great wine selection ... my favorite is Chateau Bouteilley .... cannnot forget the year, but a must to try .... Maybe need to go back again soon .... Muah !!!
A great rooftop bar in nimman. High quality cocktails, both classic and original creations. Friendly staff.
Good service staff pang and delicious food the decor so beautiful ,good atmosphere people not speak loud ,yes sure i will come again

This bar has a great vibe! The beautiful poolside seating area is very relaxing and the service is wonderful. Jojo is an extremely friendly server and Säk makes delicious drinks that you can’t find anywhere else.
Akyra was absolutely wonderful. The view was breathtaking, and the cocktails were so creative and fruity!...especially the passion fruit mojitos :D Thank you Säk and Jöjö!

We went here for happy hour from 5:30-6:30PM. The view is so pretty. Tong makes the best drinks!! We ordered a shot made from sticky rice. Very smooth. 100% recommend to order it when you’re in Chiang Mai. Our waitress Pang was very sweet and attentive.
Tony and Pang handled our orders and drink at the rooftop bar. Nice staff, great drinks, and a good vibe. Definitely recommend to anyone in the Nimman area.

We had a lovely evening at the akyra building. Dinner in Italics was a really lovely atmosphere and great food. Service from Sak and JöJö was the highlight with them reserving us a table upstairs while we paid our bill for dinner. Both lovely guys who were attentive and charming. Definitely recommend.

My friend and I had the best service by the friendly staff. They were patient with our language barrier, kind in serving us and very joyful people. The views of this looftop are remarkably breathtaking, the food and drinks superb and the staff were the icing on the cake to this wonderful establishment. I will definitely be returning if ever in Chiang Mai again.
Last week ,Me and my friend went to eat in the hotel restaurant. Very Good service K.Bell and K.Nokyung , very good service, delicious food

The drinks were so so so good, staff was so friendly especially Tong, Pang, and Botan! The view was phenomenal on their rooftop bar and the hospitality and kindness shown to us was so lovely. Would definitely recommend!

Tong, Pang, and Botan did a great job taking care of our group! The drinks are unique and well-balanced, the view is great, and the atmosphere is relaxing. It's a great find if you're wanting to get away from the busyness of Nimman.

The view on the rooftop was incredible and the drinks were amazingly well done. The staff was so much fun to talk to, mainly Tong, Pang, and Botan - very friendly and they help take excellent photos of us ;)
Incredible rooftop bar! 10/10 would recommend!The staff (Tong, Pang and Botan) are incredibly friendly and welcoming.
We where here and got engaged last year now we are here for our honey moon and it’s amazing the staff are amazing

Last week we wanted to treat ourselves and went to italics, in hope that we will have a unforgettable dinner and we did, but not in the nice way. Food: we had truffle fries - they were ok, chiang rai four cheese - rather disappointing, homemade potato gnocchi with mushroom & truffle cream sauce - very dry and lacked flavor. service: mixed feelings, some of the staff tried their best, some should not serve guests. we also felt that there was no proper training for the staff. We watched the staff almost touch the middle of our plates - that's not 5 star serving. We sat outside, as inside wasn't a table for 3, or at least we weren't offered it. It was very hot, they had a fan outside but didn't turn it on for us and didn't offer to turn it on. Our drinks were refilled but ice wasn't offered. Overall my first and last time there. If you pay more than 1.5k for a dinner with soda and plain water, 50 baht for Singh soda, and you leave hungry and not satisfied, there is no reason to come back. We went around the corner to get some dessert and paid less than 250 baht, got a free little pitcher of hot tea with it and were much happier with that. Read less
Had some cocktails at the bar with a friend - really loved the view of Chiang Mai. Jöjö, Māy and Säk were working the bar and made for a fun atmosphere!
Really great views and an amazing atmosphere thanks to the wonderful staff Jöjö, Mäy and Säk! Will definitely come back on my next trip to Chiang Mai
The food was not as good as ranked. Bread is the soul of an Italian restaurant but bread there was not tasty & not even warm.
Fantastic location for looking at the sunset over Chiang Mai's mountains. Great food and drinks, still remember the stunning parmesan they used. Amazing staff service too!

The sight is to diiieee for! Litteraly the best spot in Chiang Mai to watch the sun set over the mountains! The happy hour 5:30-6:30 is great with 2 for 1 drinks Tong and Jöjö are just amazing at service!

First of all: the view. Amazing sight with the modern infinity pool overlooking Chiang Mai and what can I say about the beautiful sun setting over the mountains! Took my girlfriend there because she loves rooftops and she went crazy for the spot! Second: The happy hour is a great deal 2 for 1 on any type of drinks (which are pretty decent and don’t lack alcohol). Last but not least: Tong and Jöjö, bartender and waiter, are soo kind and pretty good at communicating in english! Definitely recommend!!! Read less

I came here with my boyfriend for a cocktail out on the roof deck. The drinks were excellent, we were able to sit on the day beds at the infinity pool and could put our feet in the water (you have to be staying at the hotel to use the pool). Great ambiance- the service was great and the place is intimate and cozy at night.

My partner and I enjoyed cocktails on the 8th story of the hotel—the rooftop bar Rise. Tong and Pang were our servers and were welcoming and helpful. They provided us service that felt genuinely personal. We will recommend visiting the rooftop to friends visiting the city in the future.

We’re so happy we stumbled upon Rise Rooftop. What a find. When we got out of the elevator we were warmly welcomed by Jo Jo the amazing waiter. He took great care of us from the moment we ordered our cocktails. Because of him we stayed for many hours, drank lots of delicious cocktails and had an amazing experience. Definitely would recommend cumming on a regular basis. We were so impressed by Jo Jo as he supervisor of this 5* location. The cocktails made by Sak were fantastic considering the high number of guests who were here at the time of our visit. Well done boys. You’re amazing! Love ya.
Absolutely loves our visit here. Rooftop cocktails without joJo and Sak. 100% recommend paying these guys a visit!

Great place to enjoy splendid view of Nimman Chiang Mai with a decent selection of cocktails. The music is good and the atmosphere is cozy. The service provided by JoJo and Sak is excellent. Definitely recommended for hangout or relaxing at night time.

The view is just simply breathtaking - I decided to come one night on my own and it’s probably one of the most beautiful moments I’ve had in Chiang Mai just looking at the sunsetting over the mountains. And I have to mention Tong and Jojo, the bartenders working tonight, and they are just both so lovely!!!

Today i have a mini surprise party here with my friends for my birthday party at the roof top pool, which have a very nice atmosphere. Food are very nice and cocktail​ are amazing. Very nice service we enjoy a lot :).
Very nice atmosphere, food good taste!!! It’s the best place to chilling with friend !! Especially Joe and Tong, the staff is so friendly and good service !!!! RECOMMENDED!!!!
I really love summer salad and potato Gnocchi. Joe and tong ,they are great services. I will comeback again :)
Highly recommend this restaurant , service was excellent ,best rooftop bar in chiangmai ,nice atmosphere ,good views ,food was very delicious too , Joe and Tong are the best!!!!

Very friendly staffs (thx JoJo May Sak!) and nice atmosphere. Around here is good to have time at night and it is one of a good option to have time with friends. Not that big but cozy and cool place. It's on the 8th floor of Akyra hotel. 님만해민 근처에서 루프탑 바를 찾다가 후기가 좋아서 와봤어요. 수영장이 있는 바였고, 수영장에 불이 환하게 들어왔으면 더 이뻤을것 같긴 해요. 분위기 좋고 조용하고 직원들도 친절해서 좋았어요.

We were really excited to try Italics, as we had seen it on a recent list of well-rated restaurants. Both of us love Italian (we have both lived in Italy), so we were excited to try it! We got the fried zucchini, mushroom truffle risotto, and akyra pizza for our meal and for dessert had the Cookie & Cream and Banana Ricotta cheesecake. Nothing was bad, but nothing was mind-blowing, either. The risotto especially was incredibly bland, and we ended up adding salt and a TON of parmesan to it. We also found ourselves pretty disappointed by the desserts. Overall, I personally don't think the food is worth it for the price. There is a different Italian place in Chiang Mai that we like much much better. Glad we tried it to know, though! Read less
We had a lovely evening here in Italics. The service was very good and my black cod was amazing. Nice ambience too with quirky design

I went to Italics Restaurant the food is very delicious, Staff very friendly My boyfriend and I I had excellent Service from K.Pam and K.Karn We would love to come back for our net visit in Chiang Mai

We were in search of a bar with a pool, as Chiang Mai is extremely hot. When we arrived, they took our order and then let us know that the majority of the facilities were not available to us. So, not only did we have overly priced tiny beers, we couldn't enjoy the pool or any facilities because we were not guests at the hotel. So be warned, you might want to ensure you're staying at this property before coming.

My girl friends and I spent our last night in Chiang Mai here and it was great. The couches have a very relaxing atmosphere, the views are great and the staff is attentive. JoJo and Sak, the bartenders are great and make an awesome lychee martini. I wish we’d known about this gem before our last night. Cheers!

Visited the Rise rooftop bar - nicely decorated place with chilled music and table service from May+JoJo. Good views (probably better when smoke clears) and not crowded - plenty of tables free. It's pricey for Chiang Mai but worth a visit for something a bit different.
Nice spot to get a drink, can get a sofa facing the mountains. Drinks are good and staff friendly. This is now my 5th visit and I highly recommend checking it out.

I went up to the rooftop of this building to see the full moon and ended up staying for drinks as it was so cool. Its a super chic space and the staff who looked after me Sak and Pang were lovely. You get free snacks with your drinks and the cocktails are great.
I always come back, the food is delicious and the ambience is impeccable, particularly love the space on the rooftop with the beautiful pool

The meals were incredible. We went there 2 times during our short stay in Chiang Mai. We were impressed by the Pizza and Italian Flat Bread, even though I am not a big pizza fan. Pizza dough was thin, crispy and most importantly, very tasty. Summer Salad made us feel really refreshing during the warm Summer in Thailand. Fresh pasta was well cooked and finest. Truffle Risotto is top quality, it's probably the best Risotto I ever had. Our friends also agreed that even though we have been traveling in Italy many times, however, this Risotto is even better than any that we had in Italy!! We would definitely come back here for our next visit in Chiang Mai. Highly recommended :)
Great rooftop bar and views of Chiang Mai. My friends and I had excellent service from JoJo and Sak, I would highly recommend coming here if you are nearby!

Great view, great food and great drinks! JoJo and Sak offered wonderful service - would definitely recommend for anyone looking to have a special dining experience in Chiang Mai! The mojito was delicious.
Cool rooftop bar on top of a hotel in Chiangmai. Watched the sun set over the city next to their infinity pool with friends! We had great service and cocktails from Jojo and Sak
Great service and ambiance! Came for drinks and snacks with friends—perfect night! Love Jojo and Sak

Been to "Italics by Akira" was definitly the best "Dinner Nigth" i had in Chiang Mai. The Staff as i remember Pam and Pang was so Attentive and kind. There was not mind that i was alone for dinner. PAM the Supervisor trully welcome me and suggest me everything she have on "à la carte Menu" she was really care about how my order "Pizza by Akira the signature of the restaurant" was and be so attentive to me. PANG was follow her to be sure that i have everything i need to past a great dinner. She bring me a Free Welcome Tapas and describe me all the condiments.These two girls are a real Pearl for this restaurant. The Hotel and The GM can be proud of Them as we know that in Thailand in the mostly restaurant the service is not a priority.The food was simply amazing i do recommand to everyone to try this restaurant. GREAT SERVICE, GREAT FOODS, GREAT ATTITUDE.I will definitly back.THANK U!!! Read less
The place is not far from the airport and it was good to have (very good) Italian food before leaving the north of the country. The restaurant is high level (food, service).

Our experience at Rise Bar was incredible. It rivals the rooftop bars of Bangkok...especially thanks to the incredible employees. Karn, Jo, and May took great care of us during happy hour. In addition to the wonderful and helpful staff, this bars got gorgeous views, good music, and complimentary popcorn. Will definitely return!!
Drinks were perfect, service was excellent (thanks Tong, May and Pang!) and the views were awesome. Live music later on was a bonus! Definitely recommend.

This pool and bar is the BEST place to be in Chiang Mai for sunset. The service is incredible and the sunset is absolutely gorgeous from here. I live in Chiang Mai and haven’t been to a better place. Will definitely come back every week. Special shoutout to our fabulous hosts Tong, May, and Pang for making this such an incredible experience!

My friends and I had an amazing experience at Rise rooftop bar. Tong, May and Pang gave us amazing service and we’re on top of filling our drinks every time they got below 1/4 drink left. It’s a very relaxed vibe and the pool was clean with an amazing view of the city. In my opinion, this is the best rooftop pool bar in Chiang Mai. Ask for Tong, May and/or Pang when you visit. They were wonderful.
Very cool hip and stylish rooftop bar. Sak and jojo are out of this world bartenders. Will def be coming back again!
i came here on april to enoy the city of changmai. Sak and JoJo were amazing with drinks and providing a beautiful vibe. In total love with this place!! much recommended.
Great bar in good location. Sak and jojo great hosts. Worth a visit. Chilled out vibes good back ground music and atmosphere amazin
Came here with a local, greeted immediately. Staff was very knowledgeable of menu/drinks and atmosphere was sexy. Would highly recommend! Sak, May & JoJo especially made this visit great.

A hotel rooftop bar, the bar itself overlooking to the hotel pool. Abit small but overall cozy. Variety selection of great cocktails both classic and the bar signature. Staff were helpful and attentive. Only down side is that as an outdoor rooftop bar, the place is best to enjoy on a low pullution night in CM.

Such a breathtaking venue - the downstairs restaurant is gorgeous and the food was amazing. We had calamari and the Chaing Mai pizza. Both exceeded our expectations. The upstairs is a roof top bar that over looks Chaing Mai. We were here during sunset and it was outstanding. The sun set behind the mountains while we sipped on our MojiThais - perfect night to our honeymoon. Highly recommend!

This bar(Rise) is not a party bar but definitely a good bar to catch up with friends or your lover. The staff is very attentive and friendly!! Food is also very good if you dont expect a full meal but just some tapas to go with your drinks. The pool is a great add on if you want to go for a plunge. Very relaxing! So go here! Read less

Really enjoyed the food and ambience at Italics. All the food was great and we tried a mixture across the family of western and Thai cuisines. Also the team was very on the ball about gluten free options - pasta available and the burger was GF and served in GF bread - we had one very happy little boy! Great experience - we will return!

There are a lot of Italian restaurants in Chiang Mai. This is one of the top two. The staff is incredibly attentive and very helpful. I was late for breakfast but they bent the rules and made me a wonderful waffle. I’ve been here numerous times for breakfast and dinner - it is one of my favorites.
We visited Rise bar on a Monday and enjoyed wonderful drinks made by the best bartender in Chiang Mai made by May. as we watched the sunset, karon provided great service to our table!!!
Had surprisingly wonderful Italian food in Thailand. Atmosphere is a small cozy place with attentive servers. Reasonably priced food as well.

Rise Rooftop Bar is an amazing lowkey bar in the Nimman Rd. area in Chiang Mai. Jojo is and great host and has a funny said. Tong make some amazing drinks. They both were great! I will be coming back.

This rooftop bar has an intimate setting with a unique drink menu. I ordered the “one night in Chiang Mai” and it was very tasty with a nice presentation. Our barista and server Tong and Jojo were very pleasant. Definitely recommend.
Very friendly staff and great service. Best rooftop bar in Chiang Mai, would highly recommend if you’re in the area!

Great drinks and some snacks on our last night in Chiang Mai. The service was very friendly and helpful, and was only amplified by the great view of the city as the sun went down. Thank you Tong and JoJo! 😄

We had breakfast here two mornings in a row and can honestly say both were some of the best meals I had during my whole 3 weeks in Thailand. They had a small buffet in the bar area with drinks, croissants, breads and yogurts etc but it was the à la carte menu with their Asian fusion meals that I really loved. Hard to pick favourites but the dish with roti, egg and massaman curry was definitely a stand out.

If you are looking for a relaxing time on Thai time, come here, beautiful views on the roof top bar with excellent drinks and food to accompany. JoJo and May took very good care of us while we sat and enjoyed our drinks. Easy going and fun, the happy hour is also great!
Great happy hour! Plus Jojo and May were so accomodating that we went back the next day. They rock!!

Wow! This place was incredible! I messaged in advance to say that is was my partner's birthday and the staff made every effort to make it a wonderful evening for us. We went to the very glamorous rooftop bar for a drink and then went downstairs for our meal which was so delicious. They have a cracking chef! The wine was gorgeous. The decor is creative and elegant. At the end of the meal they even brought out a complimentary piece of birthday Tiramisu with a candle on top and happy birthday written in chocolate! We were both very impressed by this place. It really couldn't have been a better place for a celebration. Would highly recommend.
Date_Written: in chocolate! We were both very impressed by this place. It really couldn't have been a better place for a celebration. Would highly recommend.

Detail: We were looking for some freshness in the heat of the afternoon.. we choose the Rise bar because of the swimmingpool.. First we were very disappointed by the prices of the cocktail.. (260 bahts for the cheapest cocktail, average price is around 300 bahts).. And then we discover that the swimmingpool is reserved to customer of the hotel.. so why do we have to pay that much for cocktails if we don't have access to the pool.. So if you want to enjoy a very expensive cocktail and watching other people enjoy the pool you can't access, it's you problem guys.. Read less

We found this place through trip advisor and boy are we happy we did! We felt bad traveling to Thailand and going to Italian but we needed a little break. It was AMAZING and we have a really high bar for Italian living in “little Italy” of our city. Bruschetta... unreal. Pizzas... delicious. Pesto risotto... no review will do it justice. It was that good!

We had breakfast here every morning and it was wonderful! Staff was great and food tasted awesome. We ordered smoked salmon benny, omelette, french toast and lattes. Portions were a little small, but they gave you a tower of complimentary fresh fruit, pastries and featured dish and there was also a side buffet bar area with extra food and goodies! :)

The food was so delicious and was very classic Italian! Pizza, pasta and the like were all offered and were all very yummy. The restaurant itself was very nice and stylish inside and the decor was very contemporary. The staff were all very friendly and happy to help with the being extremely attentive. I would definitely go back there, and recommend it if you are after western or Italian food in Chiang Mai!

I stayed in Chiang mai for 8 days and went to this restaurant 2 times because I loved it so much! The staff was really nice but we accidentaly paid twice for our food the last time we were there because they had a problem with the first card machine we tried. We went to talk to them about it the next day and they were super nice about it and we are in the process to get refunded. I would recommend this place! Super good food and the cookie and cream dessert is to die for!

After walking a long way through the streets of Chiang Mai searching for a particular restaurant that proved very hard to find, we stumbled across this delightful Italian restaurant. The ambience, service, food and drinks could not be faulted! We enjoyed our dinner so much we tried to make a booking for the following night but alas they were already booked out! I would recommend booking a table especially on popular nights.
Great rooftop place to watch sunset. The happy hour is very good too. Drinks are very reasonably priced and service is friendly:)

Small, intimate and quaint. The food us quite simply delicious. On the pricy side for Thailand. The menu is extensive with a heavy Italian theme. All that said the food is delicious and the service attentive and friendly.

Have been wanting to try this place for a drink and fancy drinks, it was great! Went mid for Happy hour with my good friends and enjoyed the whole experience. Service was great, really highly trained staff with personal and knowledgeable happy demeanors. Have I mentione that they have many delicious tapas!
One of the best restaurants in my foodie's life! It's been a long day but a warm welcome and the best service from Bell just made our day. Will be back again real soon!

If you’re looking for a great night out with a awesome dinner..... this is the place to be. Athmosphere is so nice. Food is great. We ordered pizza and it was the best choice. Great wine list. We definitely come back.

For roughly 600 baht, my wife and I ordered: a pizza (most of which we took home because we were so full) and a 3-course lunch special (antipasti, chicken, and ice cream). Plus, they bring you fresh bread with homemade pesto and these delightful apple crackers at the end of your meal. I imagine the dinner prices would make this more expensive, but for lunch, it was great value.

The rooftop bar is cute and cozy. There are a couple tables that give you direct access to the view and a few comfy couches that allows you to see the skyline. Sak checked in on us quite frequently through the night. He is cheerful and sweet. Plus, his English skills made our visit smooth. We tried 4 different cocktails and they were all refreshingly delicious.

Randomly stopped by after eating in area. The rooftop bar has great city views, it shares roof with a pool that was closed when. we stopped for drinks. Drink menu has nice selection of mixed drinks that were good. Fair price for being rooftop. Very great service, female server and male bartender Sak, stopped by to check if we needed more drinks. They provided free popcorn as we drink by poolside. Pina colada served in cute cup

Clearly the staff are well-trained because this is the kind of service you get in only the best restaurants anywhere in the world. And the food. . .oh my! The portions are ample and stunningly delicious. We were amazed by the beautiful salads that looked like each individual leaf had been hand selected and only the most perfect ones made it onto the plates. The Ravioli Beef Ragu is some of the best Italian food I have ever tasted. And I'm a huge fan of Kao Soi and I would rate Italics' kao soi number 1 in Chiang Mai. What took me so long to discover this restaurant? But I live here so I'll be back again and again and again and it's the first place I will think of when we are entertaining out of town guests. Bravo to the chef and everyone who made it such an enjoyable evening for us. I can't thank you enough! Read less
Boutique restaurant, amazing pizza, fantastic Thai food, and great prices. Bell was attentive and courteous throughout. Highly recommend!

As an American from Connecticut, with access to all of the famous New Haven pizzerias, I have a very high standard for a good pie. We booked a reservation here as we were looking for a taste of "home" after eating almost exclusively Thai food for a week straight. We went in with low expectations considering it was a pizza joint in the middle of Thailand. We could not have been more surprised. The pizza was phenomenal. The crust was thin and slightly charred, with an excellent crunch. The sauce was very good and the toppings were plentiful. This was probably the best pizza I've ever had outside of New Haven and New York City (I have not been to Italy). I highly recommend this restaurant to all pizza lovers. I cannot comment on the other menu items. Read less
We came for a few drinks to the rooftop bar. The location and the view were really nice. The service by Sak and Nuknick was great. I recommend to go there.

Went here for our Chinese New Year reunion dinner. And we were glad we choosed the right restaurant. The food here taste really good. We order the set dinner and some from the menu. All dishes are fantastic. Well done to the chef. Can not remember the name of the dish. Attached are the pictures. Service is best.

My friend and I came to the rooftop bar our last day in Chiang Mai for drinks. The staff were so pleasant the moment we arrived, opening the door for us, warm smiles at the front desk, and kind and informative at the bar. Our bartender Tong was so friendly and gave us great recommendations. Will be coming back for sure!
We had a great time at Rise. We were welcomed by Tong, very friendly, nice and made the best daquiri cocktails! View is stunning. A must see/go :)
We ordered breakfast from Italics and every dish was amazing. The french toast and banan nhutella crepe were particularly delicious!

This beautifully modern restaurant was a treat to find and experience! The relaxed atmosphere was enhanced by the competent staff, and excellent food made for a very enjoyable experience! The salads were especially good, given that we had been craving a good salad for days. We thought it was very reasonably priced for the quality and overall delightful evening

Rooftop has a contemporary and romantic feel, but still with upbeat music and fun staff! And it sits along the glass window of an infinity pool which is a first for me! Food and drinks are awesome, and not unreasonably priced. Perfect for couples or friends!! Ask for Jojo and Vak - they are the best!!!
Amazing views from the rooftop! Very good food and great service, will definitely be coming back here.
Impeccable service. Food was above average. Pricey for Thailand. Rooftop bar at top of building. Good date spot.

This rooftop bar I recommend to visit! Very good service, tasty drinks and music. Sak & Thoung were very friendly and provided us great service - they let me even to charge my phone at the bar. They are really cool :-) I reccommend Mojito and Banana Daikiri ! Enjoy it there
Great drinks, place is really cool and stuff is doing really good job! Best mojito in the town! I know where I will go again when I visit Chang mai second time !
Great rooftop bas with amazing cocktails and city view. Beat mojitos in town.... Thanks Sak and Thong!

Very cool rooftop bar with a pool and an amazing view of the city! We had some fancy coctails and they were so delicious. Sak & Thong were super friendly and helpful, I spilled my drink and they cleaned it straight away :)

Our family of 4 came here as we needed to get a fix of aussie type food during our holiday. We all thoroughly enjoyed all our meals. So cheap compared to a similar dining experience in Australia! The staff were so attentive. The only thing I would say we didnt enjoy, was sitting at a chair with no back. But that is a tiny compromise after the absolutely beautiful meal we had!!

I wouldn’t come here for a Bloody Mary. However, everything else was incredible! Staff was extremely attentive and food was delicious. As for the Bloody Mary, it just wasn’t to my liking. However, they did comp the drink and gave me a second complimentary.

We went to Italics twice while in Chiang Mai and it did not disappoint either time. The food was absolutely wonderful, we were taken care of so well and the atmosphere was fun and relaxing. I would recommend anyone to go to Italics to escape the craziness of the old city or just to have a beautiful dining experience. Thank you, Italics, for great food and a dinner experience that left us very happy.

If you are looking to impress someone by paying too much then you will love it. With great service, funky shaped couches trying to be chice and just about succeeding, you certainly wouldn't be disappointed by coming here. But 50 tbh for a bottled water.. c'mon. The pasta was good, the pizza was okay, good for Thailand. Not the best, certainly not the worst

We stayed at the Akyra Manor and therefore got to enjoy the breakfast at the Italics every morning. The breakfast that is included in the stay consists of a la carte items as well as a continental buffet and additional little treats. We had pretty much every item from the a la carte breakfast menu (good vegetarian options as well) and each of them was amazing. They also accommodate breakfast guests that are not staying in the hotel. One night we decided to stay in and eat dinner at the Italics which was also very good. The menu is Italian and Thai inspired, the dishes were very tasty and the presentation was beautiful. The service was outstanding whenever we were there - mornings or night. That being said, the Italics is a great spot for an outstanding breakfast or a relaxed date night. Read less

Wow how lucky to find this place.. Fabulous rooftop bar with infinity pool... cool music and fabulous cocktails. ... Tong and Jojo great hosts. .. and fabulous cocktail makers... Views are amazing ... wish I found this my first night not my last ..

We were a family group of 12 people in Chiang Mai for a holiday last week. Being a vegetarian family it becomes difficult to find food in abroad cities, so we prefer calling the place in advance to cross check. The restaurant was beautifully done having a very formal yet chic vibe to it.The person attending to us was very courteous and fluent in English which made our communication easier. It is a bit expensive place but its value for money when you are absolutely hungry and want to have that one proper meal. The food was simply delicious and we were satisfied with our meal. This prompted us to do take away from the same place a day after. For tip: We had ordered Brushetta , Zucchhini sticks (which were ok) and Minestrone Soup (well made) for starters. For main course it was tomato and cheese rissotto , Margharita pizzas all of which was very finely prepared. We has also ordered stir fried rice ,which tasted more like Indian vegetable pulao . For desserts they had delicious eggless gelato ice cream. This place clearly became our favorite and would highly recommend it. Read less
2 for 1 drinks btwn 5-6:30. Beautiful pool with view of the mountains. Service was at on point as well!

Wow such a magical view they have. As i walked outside I felt my eat pray love moment come to life, and the beverages and service are incredible. As someone who wasn’t staying at the hotel I appreciate their hospitality for guests entering just for the rise rooftop bar. I would recommend 10/10! JoJo was so kind to us and the drinks prepared by May we’re superb, fresh passion’ista is the best drink!
Jojo and May are as amazing as the atmosphere! Music selection is very relaxed and service is above and beyond.

Beautiful atmosphere, pool and an amazing place to visit! Jojo greeted us and really made for a phenomenal experience. Such great customer service from both Jojo and May! Drinks are amazing, get the burnt lemon margarita.

We arrived at the rooftop bar at 3pm and it was all empty. Maybe it was just opening because there was no staff there yet but there was a phone to make a call to downstairs so we did and the staff immediately came up to sell us drinks, wipe the tables etc. The service was exceptionally good. Prosecco and beer were tasteful and catered with nuts. We will definitely come again.
We stayed in the hotel so ate breakfast here every day. The breakfast was plentiful and very delicious. We also ordered a pizza to the room which was very good.

This place is way over priced and way over rated than the reality. Those who rave about the pizza here are only showing their ignorance. They were not even able to customize a pizza with different toppings. The decor with the trees of lights is way over the top. In fact one has to dodge them as you move around. Never again for me.
Garden green salad is very tasty. Akyra pizza is one of my favorite. Employee name "Nokyung" is the best!

Have been wanting to try this place for the pizza and wine and it was great! Went mid afternoon on New Years Day and enjoyed the whole experience. Service was great, really highly trained staff with personal and knowledgeable happy demeanors. Was told right away of 3 items not available, which I prefer so I don’t want something and can’t have it. We had our heart set on a nice bottle of red wine to go with our pizzas, and our Nebbiolo was delicious. Shared a calamari appetizer to start then chose the Margherita and the Chiang Rai 4 cheese. Again, the servers were outstanding without being intrusive. Shout out to the two guys making the pizzas, nice job! Finished with an after dinner drink rooftop just before sunset. Looking forward to returning, as we are 2 blocks away and need to explore the menu more! Thanks Italics! Read less

Fantastic drinks, friendly staff, great views, and a fabulous BOGO happy hour. We just had drinks on the rooftop and no food. Bell and May took care of us with lots of popcorn snacks and great drinks. The lychee martini and passion smash were great. One of the top tier cocktail bars in Chiang Mai.

Gorgeous view of the sunset over the hills just outside Chiang Mai’s old city in the funky Nimmanhamin area. The cocktails were great - all the classics and some delicious ones with a Thai twist. Highly recommend.

Absolutely stunning hotel, beautiful entrance and lovely staff. Rooftop bar is on the 8th floor and the view is great. Nice pool, great seating area and a very chilled out atmosphere. Food is incredible and the cocktails are beaut!! JoJo and May are very hospitable. Spot on experience! Would recommend x

We took the lunch menu. We were able to exchange the pizza to a pizza of our choice. The pumpkin soup was amazing, and the pasta also tasted really Italian. As main course we had pizza, for me this pizza I took is the best of Chiang Mai. (see picture 2) especially if you like truffle taste. The dessert ice cream was very good. I took the coconut flavor. Hope this helps.
Me and a friend happened upon this place! Cool rooftop bar with tapas- ask for Sak and bell they were great company throughout our fun, delicious night!!
We came here tonight and everything was spectacular. Kudos to Bell and Sak for being great servers! We look forward to coming back again soon!

First time visiting, couldn’t be more pleased! Sak and Bell took great care of us. Checked on us frequently and ensured we were happy and well taken care of the entire time. Great appetizers and drinks, too!

My wife had a craving for pizza and I decided to open up Tripadvisor to see what is around me. Decided to go with the Italics after I saw the positive reviews and I must say that I wasn’t disappointed at all. I ordered a margherita pizza for takeaway. Mt wife was initially skeptical that we would be able to find a good Margarita pizza (the classic Italian pizza) here but eventually she conceded that that the reviews were indeed accurate. Kudos to the young Thai lady chef who made the pizza! We were very impressed to see someone at such a young age with such mastery over her own skills. Good job young padawan!
Prama Ham Pizza is very tasty, good vibe, nice hotel and staffs too. Especially K.Nokyung and K.Sak they are really good.

My first italian meal in Chiang Mai . Pleasantly surprised by the high quality italian food . Beautifully designed restaurant , the staff was most attentive and pleasant . The food was excellent . There was 12 of us and we ordered everything to share . All tasted very good . Prices was also reasonable . I will come back again

Not my cup of tea really. Decor a bit cold, clinical and a tad over the top for me, lacking in atmosphere, service okay but pretty average. We shared a cold cut platter as a starter. Lots of it, but rather ordinary (cheap selections?), and bread very uninteresting. We followed with three pizzas -- enormous size -- not too bad, but certainly not outstanding. Two would have been adequate....maybe the staff should have mentioned the size? Lots of more interesting, quirky restaurants around here in Nimman. Worth taking a risk and seeing what you get than eating at this rather predictable soulless place. Read less

The restaurant is in town near to hotel we stayed..we were 10 of us trying the place ambience was very nice with outdoor seating too ..food was excellent Italian starting from salads minestrone soup which was very fresh...penne arrabbiata ...risotto mushrooms...pizza and pizza black truffle was very good excellent service by Nokyung
it is very quality food here, excellent service, really nice décor and location, even the price is not cheap but not over price from what you get, totally like it here.

Whether eating by myself or sharing a good time with a large group of friends, Italics & Rise never disappoint. The ambience is pleasant, food pleasing to all senses, service friendly and all details tastefully attended to. One of my favorites in Chinangmai.

Apparently the best place for that sort of food in Chaing Mai. Prices are very high but the food is tasty. My pizza was definitely worth the money when looking at how much Burrata and Truffel was on it. On the other hand, it didn't help the taste, felt a bit overloaded. Friendly staff, didn't feel too posh.
The bar is nice. The food and drinks are really good with resonable price. The staffs are nice and friendly too. Thank you May and Sak for a great take care. We had such a greay time here
Great views, happy hour, friendly staff - couldn't ask for more! Next time will be back to eat as this visit was more of a liquid dinner...
Thanks for the amazing experience May & Tong! Great place to hang out! 100% recommended for a chillout moment!

This is my second visit to Chiang Mai and the 4th visit to Italics and Rise restaurant this year ! Great food, great ambience and great service from Pond, the manager and the staff. Fine dining at great prices and more importantly, fresh ingredients and prepared and cooked using herbs and spices and little sauces. It’s my type of cuisines as speaks a lot of the chef’s confidence in allowing the freshness of the food to be tasted. It’s just perfect! As a health and fitness fanatic, this type of food is delicious, comforting and less worrisome on sugar and salt (as flavours are not overwhelming.) Bon Appetit !

My boyfriend and I have been traveling for a couple months now and have fallen in love with this city. However, it is somewhat difficult to find good places to enjoy a few drinks that accept credit cards and that is a big deal for us. I stumbled upon great reviews about this rooftop located at a nice boutique hotel overlooking the mountains you can catch the sunset along with the 1 hr happy hour that goes on from 5:30 to 6:30pm. Its intimate, well designed, beautiful views, good music, great service and drinks! We stayed for a few extra after happy hour. Thank you Jojo and Tong for the great service :) Read less

My girlfriend and I are traveling the world for one (1) year straight and needed to scale it up a bit. Our challenge however was finding: 1) a rooftop bar; 2) a rooftop bar w/ a beautiful view; and 3) a rooftop bar w/ a beautiful view that takes Credit Card! We stopped off at the Maya Mall and had a meal while we quickly dud some research and my girlfriend nonchalantly told me about this place that met all of our needs that had a short happy hour from 5:30-6:30pm daily. We chowed down our pad thai at Maya Mall and headed to Italics & Rise Akyra Manor. And this is the part of travel I love so much...we were having an otherwise listless day then arrived at our rooftop bar to be treated with the standard Thai kindness and charm. We arrived on a moped to the hotel and the security guard ushered us to our parking spot in the garage below. The elevator is located in the garage and we promptly took it up to the rooftop bar where we were greeted by the bartender and staff, were quickly seated (w/ no reservation) on a hightop table, and once things had leveled out were told we could sit at the tables listed “reserved”. We made it right on time for Happy Hour AND the sunset and couldn’t be happier w/ how the afternoon shaped up for us in the service of Jojo (waiter) and Tong (bartender). Super kind and quick to take our order, supply us w / popcorn, and stay attentive to happy hour time so we got our last orders in. The drinks were terrific, the rooftop was comfortable and scenic (though a little small) and we otherwise couldn’t be happier w/ our day and the attention/service we received. Read less

My partner and I visited to watch the sunset. The staff were helpful and lovely. The drinks were very nice and we were provided with complimentary tapas with our drinks. Ps. Pool is only for hotel guests, which is understandable.

The food and drinks were good. It definitely curbed our pizza craving after dozens of Thai meals. However, the best part about this spot is the rooftop patio for sunset. If you can get a spot upstairs, the view is incredible!

Pasta to die for. Id steak and chips which was very good. My wife had the beef ravioli which was standout delicious. We shared a crab and avocado crostini to start which was equally as good. The staff were friendly and service excellent. The menu has huge choice and the restaurant is air conditioned.

Delightful view from the roof and nice cocktails. What I didn't like: On the ground floor there is a restaurant. When you sit in a restaurant, guests with suitcases walk at arm's length to the elevator. It seems as if you are sitting in a cafe at the railway station.
We visited Italics & Rise recently for a family dinner and the service and food were superb! Would highly recommend for any occasion and we would definitely be back again!

在清邁吃到最好的義大利餐廳，非常謝謝Sak 和Must 非常貼心且熱忱的幫我們介紹&建議每一道餐點，非常值得一來的餐廳，下次有機會會再來造訪 The best Italian restaurant ever been In Chiangmai, thanks Sak and Must provided good service and good suggestions, would like to come here next time and surely will recommend my friend visit here when they come Chiangmai.

We were looking for a place to watch the sunset and stumbled upon Rise. We had cocktails and a diy Thai bbq which was unbelievable. Sunset was perfect and infinity pool just topped it off. Amazing would 100% recommend

Came to the rise rooftop bar to watch the sunset and had an amazing time. The venue and the staff are equally brilliant. Great food and cocktails, would highly recommend to anybody in the area to come and visit and have your own little BBQ as you watch the sun go down 😎
Best cocktails in Chaing Mai & amazing gnocci. Lovely atmosphere and always great service- we especially love JoJo ❤️❤️
Thank you Nuk and all the staff for their excellent service as well as the birthday cakes for our friends.

Great drinks with an even better view. Stopped here on a whim to get out of old city and had a great view of the surrounding buildings and mountains. Perfect spot to enjoy a cocktail with the sunset over the hills.
Perfect pick for an afternoon drink. The staff was very welcoming and attentive. There was a wide variety of drinks including local beers and classic, well-made cocktails. Free popcorn was a plus!
The quality and service was excellent, nothing that was bad about the place. The food was very tasty and came on time too.
The food was very good and the service excellent. I had a pasta dish which was very tasty. Wine list is good. A little pricey but overall a good experience. We will go back and try dinner.
We ate the lamb steak which was excellent, together with the view you have over Chiang Mai made it an magnificent experience.
This place is a great location for a friendly or business meeting. Eating their awesome lamb steak on a rooftop with a pool was is definitely highly recommend 😁.

Greetings Italics! Hello there! I'm a business traveler and recently have visited Chaingmai 2 times in the past 3 months. This review has been long overdue and finally I have the time to post a review about the Italics Restaurant. Too often these days you go back to a restaurant where you've had memorable meals only to find that things have slipped in the kitchen(not as good as the first time) or elsewhere. I was very pleasantly surprised recently that this was not the case and quite on the contrary, in fact the execution and presentation of the dishes have even further improved. The main dishes are even tastier and the Service is impeccable and yet not too obtrusive. The setting of the Italics Restaurant is relaxing with high ceilings,comfortable furnishings, and mood lighting which makes it romantic and classy. The ambiance is wonderful, quiet and elegant. Because of my job I've had the opportunity to enjoy and explore some of the best Italian Dining around the world. Of course keep in mind Italy is the best ^^ ... but Italics in Chaingmai would definitely rank among the finest for Italian fusion. Definitely the best in Chaingmai. In some countries a Michelin rating is the standard but often not a reliable source of excellence. I can honestly say that the Italics Restaurant deserves a Michelin star Rating for it's Excellence in Fine Dining. Some of the dishes I would recommend at this restaurant are: 1) Rib Eye Steak( so moist and juicy) 2) Buratta Salad( Buratta cheese so fresh) 3) Homemade Beef Ravioli 4)Truffle Pizza or Parma Ham Pizza( both are delicious) 5) Any of the Desserts on the Menu Note: These are just a few of my Recommendations but honestly you can't go wrong with any of the main dishes or Chef Phubase recommended dishes. Pizza's are honestly the best in Chaingmai and you can't beat the price for 300 to 500 baht. Both my friends and family agree that there is no way that we'll ever travel back to Chaingmai and not eat here again.(we live in Seoul and Vancouver) It was that memorable! Finally a special mention to the Head Chef at the Italics Restaurant... Mr Phubase Chuprakong. Your attention to detail for your food is exceptional and your care and work ethic for your customers is unparalleled. You don't see this in many places but you go above and beyond. I can see why you're a well known Chef in Chaingmai. I was very fortunate to meet you a few years back and because of you I only go to Italics for Western food when in Thailand. Keep fine tuning your craft and I can only see great things for you and the Italics restaurant in the near future. Best Regards, Winston Read less
Big shout out to the staff, the service was top notch, food was spectacular, and the dining was magical,

Expansive menu with very tasty food. Started with fresh fruit plate. Requested for a bit more fresh papaya and a large plate was given. Onsen egg with waffles and bacon accompanied with fragrant coffee started our day on a positive note. Choice of dining indoor or outdoor
We were looking for a nice place to have a meal, and this place came up as highly recommended and I agree completely, pizza was incredible and so was the restaurant.

Lovely bar with lovely service! Came here in the afternoon for a a few drinks and ended up staying all evening! Great pool, beautiful sunset views, overall great atmosphere :) Perfect place to spend our 8 year anniversary x x x
Great view of the sunset from the Rise rooftop and the BOGO happy hour is a great deal. The burger from the tapas menu was so-so, and the service was a bit slow. The waiter Tong May was great though.

This boutique hotel is most conveniently located, with many restaurants and shopping malls within walking distance. Staff are most courteous and helpful. Breakfast is sumptuous and what a choice! Our room 701 is spacious, with beautiful decor, even a balcony. The Italian restaurant is excellent, if you just want some thing simple, you can have a piping hot pizza delivered to your room.

My fiance and I came here for a romantic night. Noon, our waiter took great care of us and it was super easy to make a reservation. I ordered the delicious Parma ham pizza and my fiance ordered the yummy black ink taglioini. I'll definelty come back to try their other pastas.
Pizza was good, the potion was quite big as well, good service, drinks are okay The environment is comfortable, price is reasonable

The location of this hotel is very good, it's inside the Nimman area which fully with a people especially Chinese people. The rooftop bar is the top spot so you can enjoy the city view of Nimman and Chiang Mai city and if you get lucky, you might see Doi Sutep up there. The quality of cocktail was very good and variety with the premium brand of liquor, we were tried the simple Mojito and the signature like the vodka well mixed with milk, It's simple but presentation was fascinated. The best part of experience was in the restaurant, the menu was well design with affordable price and tend to be real Italian cuisine. We were tried chef salad and Grill pork chop with spaghetti carbonara (Recommend one) and it extremely delicious, full flavor, huge portion and reasonable price. The staff were helpful, good menu product knowledge and always show up when you need something more, very good indeed. Recommend if you looking for quality real Italian cuisine. You can enjoy the rooftop bar until the sunset and relax with the fine dining experience later. Read less
After reading the reviews of this restaurant I would like to try its 4 cheeses pizza. It was ok. The staff is polite and efficient. Suggested

There comes a time even in Thailand when you tire of the local fare. Atmosphere is nice, waiting staff friendly and considerate. Good wines, very good food. Prices a bit on the steep side for Chiang Mai, but when you gotta have some nice brick oven-baked pizza, you gotta have it. The chef's favorite pasta is great, and we found the bruschetta exceptional. 현지음식에 질릴때, 시원한 실내에서 앉아 와인 한잔 즐기고 싶을 때 오면 좋은 곳입니다. 브루스케타가 아주 맛있습니다. 피자도 매우 맛있음. 와인은 하우스 와인 중 가장 싼거 시켜도 맛있습니다 Read less

Although it wasn't a very tall building (only 8 floors or so), there is a nice vibe at the rooftop bar - rather calm and soothing. Drinks were very reasonably priced too for a luxury hotel. 180 baht for a bottle of Leo beer (if I recall correctly) - eligible for buy 1 free 1 offers during their happy hours which run around 5pm to 8pm. We also order some food and they were really delicious - had a four cheese pizza and some deep fried squids. Would've wanted to have a full meal at the restaurant if we had the time.

We spent an amazing one time experience in this bar. Location and view are amazing for sunset. The staff here (Tong, Jojo and Sak) are very friendly. We had a great last night in Chiang Mai thanks to them ! Will come again for sure.
The food is really good. Staff friendly. We are downstairs and has drinks up on the roof. Great views of the city!

Was an awesome experience the moment we stepped through the door. Wait staff very helpful and friendly and delivered great service. Delicious high quality food and very tasty cocktails. My girlfriend was delighted by the complimentary birthday cake, it really topped off the meal. After dinner we resided to the rooftop bar for an awesome view of Chiang Mai and another yummy cocktail to finish the evening.

We came here to see the amazing view and we were overjoyed by the amazing atmosphere and staff. Sak and May were awesome at recommending drinks with a friendly smile. Thank so much Rise :) we had amazing time
Wonderful Hotel and great value! Cooking class gives me a great experience！ I'll choose ak～again next time

Went here with friends and had a lovely evening. The food was good, quite rich, and a variety (we have different dietary needs including vegetarian and a more paleo type diet). Ingredients were high quality. We especially enjoyed the panacotta and the chocolate fondue for dessert!
Great atmosphere!! Ridiculously comfy couches. Sak and May are great!! My whisky sour was too notch!!
Great dirty martini with a stunning view of Nimman. Sak and May are the best around. Will be back to use the pool

I enjoyed every bite I had in Italics. Very recommended. Great meals, great set & atmosphere, and the staff is polite, friendly and provides amazing service Prices are higher than your usual italian restaurant, but it is worthwhile.

I accidentally ran into this place and was impressed by the vibe, the food and the service. I had the avocado/crab toast and the Arrugula/prosciutto pizza. While I am biased to pizza from living in NYC for 10 years, the pizza was good but not great. However, I would highly recommend this place as I left very pleased with all aspects of my dinner. The red wines by the glass had 2 really great mellow options which I enjoyed.

Being in Chiang Mai for the first time, I really didn't know what kind of fine dining experiences to expect, but luckily my friend recommended the "Italics" restaurant located inside the Akyra Hotel and I can tell you it was absolutely perfect. The interior design of the room was very interesting and beautiful with large arrays of lights surrounding you. The service was impeccable and food very delicious and tasty ! We were fortunate to be able to try Chef Phubase Chuprakong's special fine Thai creations that evening (please see pictures) which aren't normally on the regular menu. All the dishes were very scrumptious and packed with flavour, but my favourite was Khai Look Kaey, Yum Mee Moo Young, Grilled Beef Main Dish, and the Coconut Pudding and Sticky Rice dessert. Will definitely be back. Thank you ! Read less

We don't normally write reviews but this one we couldn't let pass. We were charmed by the trees and the woodwork while walking by. Upon entering we saw the skybar on the backside of the menu. Not knowing what to expect we were escorted to the 8th floor. Welcomed by jojo and his colleagues we ordered the meat and cheese platter, crab and advocado brushcetta's and wine. Some chilled merlot and fresh white sauvignon blanc later, pong (the food and beverage manager) came up to us asking our opinion about the whine selection. Because quality and opinions really matter. Enjoying this all while seeing a beautiful sundown, made this evening perfect. We really recommend this place!! Read less
Beautiful restaurant, good food and attentive service. My only issue is that it is set in the entrance to the hotel and so there are always people wandering through the restaurant.
Amazing restaurant, from decor to food / wine & the exceptional service - you must try this place !!

We (4) visited Italics and Rise restaurant. My opinion of this restaurant is So So. 1. Restaurant Size : too small 2. Food quality : acceptable 3. Price : Quite high 4. Staffs : exessive (there were 2 or 4 managers with 3 waitress who did not do anything but just were standing in that small restaurant.) Read less

After one week of thai food, we felt like having a european dinner so we went to Italics. It was an amazing surprise. The food was absolutely delicious (much better than in most restaurants of Europe), the service was really great, the wine was good and the decoration was nice too.

Had a very good time with Italics celebrating the birthday of my boyfriend on 7 Sep. Staff was nice, food was of high quality, the environment was great! I sent emails to them before arriving in Chiangmai to arrange the dinner. The restaurant manager Ms Waraporn Chantorn replied, attended to my requests and arranged everything for me. She also came to make sure everything was alright when we were having a drink in their rooftop bar before dinner the sunset was beautiful!). It is absolutely an awesome experience with Italics. Indeed my boyfriend and our friend went there again for dinner last night. Thank you Italics! Will for sure go again when I go to Chiangmai again.

My boyfriend and I came for happy hour and had a wonderful time. This beautiful bar has an amazing view with a great pool. The atmosphere is chic and extremely relaxing. The drinks and apps were superb.
My girlfriend and and i had a great time having a view drinks and amzing food here. The view from the rooftop bar was incredible!
The plce is very cool with amazing decor. Authentic Italian and more ! Service was professional and enthusiastic. Also great eclectic pool bar on the roof. Highly recommended. K.
This is a must visit! The rooftop bar is to die for!! Make sure to come during happy hour for buy one get one drinks!!
I loved it here I have nothing bad to say about it! Great place to stay if you are visiting Chiang Mai.

This restaurant is in the Akyra hotel in Chiang Mai. The restaurant is beautiful and gorgeously decorated. The service was great. Most importantly, the menu is extensive and the food was delicious. We had the eggplant parmigiana, the chicken piccata, and the gnocchi. Everything was delicious and cooked to perfection. Will definitely be back!
Equitable price,nice atmosphere and delicious cuisine, but if the fresh juice or fruit blend has more choices would be better
The menu is limited, but nice, especially if you have had a big day sightseeing. Mixture of Thai and Western foods.

This is super late but I spent the day relaxing at the bar with some friends for my birthday and it was such a lovely day. Thank you Benchaporn for allowing us to visit and to all the wonderful staff who looked after us that day. They even brought out a birthday cake for me as a surprise which was really thoughtful. Great place unwind with great cocktails.

The food was excellent and well priced. The Chiang Mai pizza was so delicious and the ravioli was really nice as well. They gave us a complimentary desert for our anniversary. So nice of them. The service was excellent. Our only complaint is the seating is so uncomfortable.

Definitely recommend risebar at Akyra Chiangmai hotel to everyone thinking about visiting Chiangmai. Nice rooftop bar with a nice swimming pool and beautiful mountain’s view and great staff. Excellent service. 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
Lovely little place- great atmosphere, food delicious and such a cute baby parrot! We had Thai food- 2 types of curry with cocktails- scrummy!

In the quiet part of Nimmanahemin Soi 9, this modern decorated Italian restaurant serves tasty Italian dishes using quality ingredients. Although the majority of the hotel’s guests are Asian, most of the restaurant clients are Caucasian. Delicious foods and good services in modern atmosphere.

Very nice setting for dinner. Great authentic pizza which was thin and crispy. Blue crab spaghetti arrabbiata and chicken satay were also very satisfyingly tasty. The bill was 1,300thb including soft drinks, which we feel is more than fair for this standard of food and service. The service is second to none. The staff are a credit to the establishment.

I spent a nice Sunday afternoon with my friends at Rise Bar. The atmosphere is nice, you can relax on cozy sofas and enjoy the beautiful view on Doi Suthep - especially when the sun sets. The food tastes really good and the portions are huge. They definately know how to plate food up nicely! But the best thing up there are the drinks - super delicious cocktails, made by a bartender named Tong. A very nice and open minded guy who speaks English well. He was very attentive and took good care of us. The staff in general is very friendly and my friends and me felt really welcome! If you want to spend a nice afternoon with your favorite one - head up there, get a Mai Thai mixed by Tong and some starters or a pizza and just enjoy - it's worth it! Read less
Excellent food and nice service. Staffs are very friendly, especailly​ K Sak and K Joe. The atmosphere is so perfect. I enjoy all the moment here and would love to come back again.

It certainly be one of my wise decision to choose this restaurant for my "Marriage Proposal" to my fiancee. Thanks Restaurant Manager "Waraporn Chantorn",frontline staff and photographer, they did help me a lot prior to my arrival about the decoration, food menu, and some others personal areangement as well ...etc. The restaurant "Italics & Rise", I could say it was very marvellous with a grand and romantic decoration. All the foods are not only exquisite, but also delicious and tasty. I especially love one of their main dishes "Black cod fish with Tagliolinuand Kao Koi Source" (Waiter recommends, bravo), It was super great and make me feel the fusion style. If you choose to stay overnight in this hotel, you will be suprised by their restaurant "Buffet Breakfast" next morning. Really nice. My fiancee and me certainly have an unforgettable experience and good memory during our stay in this restaurant. I highly recommend this restaurant, putting on your "Must Go" list if you are planning to have a trip in Chiang Mai. Read less
We were welcomed by very pleasant, friendly staff. The food was of an exceptionally standard and likewise was the service. I will definitely return here before leaving Chiangmai!

No matter where you are the world, it's difficult to get a decent pizza or a decent Caesar salad--I got both. The mixed fruit smoothie was excellent as well but loved the Bolognese pizza as they were able to make it crispy as I asked for it despite the sauce choice. Caesar dressing wasn't sweet and the salad was one of the best I've had in years.
The staff in italics are fantastic with a wide choice on menu. The pad Thai is to die for. We will definitely be back before the end of our Chiang Mai holiday.
We were welcomed into the restaurant by the happy and welcoming staff. There was a great selection on the menu and the food was excellent and very tasty! Will 100% recommend to my friends.
The food was excellent and the best I have experienced in Chiang Mai so far. Great atmosphere and the service was exceptional.

The service staff are very attentive, primarily because it's a smallish dining room. Everything I've eaten here's been superb but for one desert where the ice cream had apparently been thawed and re-frozen and was more ice than cream, I mentioned it to the waiter and he kindly and unnecessarily did not charge me for the dessert. Other than that very minor glitch, Italics is wonderful.

We got here at 1130pm, no one there and most tables covered and closed. Top section was closed so didn’t get the view but it looked great from the little we saw Nice selection of drinks and good atmosphere so imagine if it was busy it would be nice The drinks were amazing, best cocktail I’ve had since being here Free popcorn too!

Awesome experience to sit & chill beside the infinity pool @ Rise Rooftop Bar. Lovely view of the city and I really luv watching the planes fly pass. The food & service was fantastic! Ordered the delicious 4 types pizza made from the wood fired oven, had to try all the flavours! ;) Great place to chill out with friends or bring your special love one for a romantic night out.

It was a very nice hotel and all the staff are very friendly and helpful. My wife and me also took a cooking class in the hotel with Executive Chef Phubase, which was the most wonderful experience in Chiangmai. We went to a local market in the morning and use the hotel kitchen for cooking. we also enjoyed the Thai cuisine we cooked for lunch, very delicious and highly recommended.

We spent 3 nights in Akyra Manor and were really impressed by their perfect service and unique activities. Above all, we highly recommend the cooking class with the Chef of Italics. We had a great time with Chef Phubase in local market and learnt how to cook 4 popular Thai Cuisines. Will definitely come back again!
The roof top bar is amazing! The staff were so friendly, happy hour was totally worth it and the food was delicious! We are coming back tomorrow for the rooftop pool party to see Pond and Tong!

Are you looking for the best possible service and food in Chiang Mai? THIS is the place to go! Went for seven days to this restaurant having breakfast and dinner every day and it ALWYS was a delight! The service is not only very friendly and attendive but adds a very personal note. The food - soly had Thai food - has an exceptional taste and quality. Have tried over 30 different Thai dishes - most of them have not even be on the regular card - created didividually by the chefs (THANK you chef "Base") - and with NO exception they all were prepared to perfection! This restaurant has my highest recommendation from all restaurants I ever visited!

We stopped in here for dinner one night about an hour before closing. By the time they took our order we were the only ones left in the restaurant. You would think that, being the only customers in the place, we would get great service and lots of attention. That was not the case. The waitress came by one time to give us water and did not return to fill our glasses even one time during our meal. We waited about 20 minutes after finishing before someone came over to see if we wanted our checks. The food was good with a chic atmosphere but the service ruined the experience entirely. Next time I would choose to take my service elsewhere. Read less

The menu offers wonderful options for all palettes- pasta, fish, meat. The carpaccio starter was delicious. And a rarity in Thailand they had a terrific wine list. We ordered a Chianti on special and was quite delicious and not terribly pricey. Staff was very attentive. The only disappointment was arriving early in order to go to Rise the rooftop and watch the sunset. We were turned away saying all the seats (even at the bar) were reserved. We mentioned we’d be happy to stand and enjoy the view with a cocktail but was told that wasn’t possible. After completing a survey by Italics and mentioning this I immediately received a note from the manager apologizing. The manager also said to let them know when I next planned to visit and they would make sure we we’re accommodated. That is thoughtful service. Read less
Love the truffle pizza , pasta and summer salad. Beautiful decorations and ambience. Another place for Italian food

The decoration is fantastic here. I seldom visit such a beautiful restaurant in my own city HK. It is a little bit more expensive comparing with other thai restaurant nearby for sure. The price is just like "pizza huts" but the food are much much better. You must try it.
The pizza was the best pizza we ever ate!!!! Great salad too Great service and beutifull place. Highly recommended!!

Food, presentation decor were fantastic. Didn't give it a 5 rating because the service staff was oblivious and unaware but this is typical of Thailand. For the food and decor, I highly recommend Italics.

My wife and I very much enjoyed our lunch meal at Italics. We were surprised that the restaurant is located as part of a hotel, but the atmosphere proved very attractive. My wife's mango shake was excellent and our Akyra pizza was very good. We're not big eaters, but we somehow managed to eat every bit of the pizza, which was plenty big for the two of us. What really set the place apart was the superb service from Khun Botan, who proved to be efficient and incredibly friendly. Prices are in line with expectations for this level of place.

Everything on that menu I wanted to try. The good was delicious the staff kind and it was great that you could order the pizza in 1/4's...pick 4 different types of pizza for personal pizza was awesome. The carbonara, hawian, and Bolognese were all great.

I went there last Friday quite late at night coz' of my hectic working day. I felt very impressed from the beginning until the end of eating. Guard was helpful to park a car and waitress friendly helped to recommend food. Seafood soup was so amazing. I also love the truffle dish and salad. I can feel how mindful the chef handle the cooking. Thanks for making my hectic Friday a fine day.

I'm usually skeptical about hotel restaurants, even 5*s, they often feel like an after thought. Italics however was not an after thought, it was exceptional! We ate in the restaurant a few times during our stay and the food was delicious. We had the Thai set menu on each occasion and each time it offered a different banquet of authentic Thai dishes. It was abundant and also beautifully presented (like the breakfasts). The waiting staff, like the rest of the staff at the hotel were also wonderful. Noting seemed too much trouble We also really enjoyed Rise, the pool cocktail bar, where again the service and overall environment were impeccable - the 'Passionista' cocktail is a must try!! Read less

Rise offers some of the most beautiful views at night with a beautiful pool and happy hour setup. Plenty of drinks to choose from and delicious Italian appetizers. Come during sunset for perfect views of the mountains.
Happy hour is a great deal— 2 for 1 and the apps are amazing! Great view and staff is so nice. You are allowed to swim until 7 so it’s perfect for pictures and guaranteed great time

Stopped by with a friend after seeing the rave reviews and I couldn’t recommend more. Not only was the view stunning, but the drinks were phenomenal and the staff super friendly. We got lychee martinis and passion fruit mojitos during the 5:30-6:30 happy hour, so they were buy one get one free. The sunset also fell during this time so it couldn’t have been better. Between the pool, city views, and mountains behind we were in awe. We shared the aperitivo board which was also delicious. You can’t miss this place on your trip.

We just got off of our plane from Bangkok and found this amazing rooftop bar. The views are unbeatable, and the drinks are phenomenal. We happened to catch the happy hour from 5:30-6:30, which was buy one get one free. I had the lychee martini and my friend had the passion fruit mojito. Both strong and tasty. Definitely add this to your list of places to visit in Chiang Mai!
Love this place, cozy and fine dining rooftop bar. Perfect for everyone. Don’t miss if you visit to Chiangmai.
Great place to come and see the views and have some cocktails. Perfect when there is a nice sunset. Staff are always friendly, recommended!
A very good time on the rooftop with my friend, in front of the swimming pool, cocktails are delicious, to recommends
A great place to enjoy some cocktails while the sun is setting. Great views all round and staff are always friendly.

Lovely hotel an oasis in the middle of bustling Chang mai city. Came here with my friend to the rooftop bar. Beautiful views over the city. The staff were so attentive and kind, we will definitely come back again. Thank you
Beautiful place off the main road with amazing views. Impeccable service, couldn't complain! 5 star service as soon as you enter the hotel.

We came early to enjoy cocktails when it is less crowded. Rise is the rooftop bar where the hotel guests can swim as the sun sets. We ate in Italics and we felt the seafood cioppino was equal to any we had in Italy! The pizza was thin and crispy and while I always bring a small container of my own oregano, basil, and crushed chillie flakes, we did not need it. The pizza is accompanied by at least ten small ceramic bowls of oils, herbs, chillie flakes, parmesan cheese, etc. The bread presented before the meal came with a freshly prepared pesto sauce...totally yummy! We shared a Caesar salad which was perfect. Lots of shaved hard cheese and bacon! The cosmopolitans are perfectly prepared and my husband enjoyed the Italian wine. We moved, after our meal, to the Rise rooftop bar. It was a beautiful evening with stars over Doi Suthep. Soon the city lights were on and the atmosphere was quite romantic! The wait staff, bar staff, and guests’ conviviality made our night out so special. We cannot wait to go back and try other authentic Italian dishes. We have eaten at all ranges of Italian restaurants in Chiang Mai and Italics is now at the top of our list! They are able to duplicate the tastes of Italy! I am Italian so this is a real testimonial! FINALLY, after living here a year, we found an authentic Italian restaurant which meets our tastes without an iota of disappointment. Thank you Italics and Rise owners, chefs, and staff! Read less

The moment we walked in we were treated with the utmost class and service. The staff were very welcoming and made us feel right at home. The speciality cocktails were especially refreshing on a hot day in Thailand. It was a perfect way to end a long day and start an ultimate night out. The rooftop infinity pool had a fantastic view of the city. Must visit spot in Chiang Mai!
Great spot for a sunset. Amazing service. Swimming pool is refreshing. And the views are to die for. Had an amazing time.
This place is extremely clean and modern, with views over Chiang Mai and a great place to watch the sunset. The drinks are delicious and the staff are super welcoming. Would definitely recommend
A little bit more expensive than other restaurants in the area but worth it for a lovely evening out with great food in a beautiful setting!

Both myself and the girlfriend went to Italics looking for top class food and boy we're we not disappointed. The freshness of the vegetables and food is out of this world. Forget italy the pizzas here are the best in the world.
This is the very best restaurant in nimman area. Oh my god!! I came here for a dinner once with my friends and they welcomed us very warm. Recommended for people looking for good food and nice view.
Food is so delicious. Staff are all nice and kind!! Really love it!! You will never regret dining here!!
The atmosphere here is very nice. Services are good and impressed. The food are very italically awesome!!! Hope to come back soon!!!

We stayed at the Akyra Manor Hotel for four nights and had four breakfasts and one "Special Thai dinner" included in our package. We can't judge Italics as an Italian restaurant because we didn't try any of the Italian dishes. However, the Thai dinner was disappointing in that it lacked a lot of flavour and spice. I do think that hotels dumb down their Thai recipes for westerners in the belief that we can't handle the heat but I wish they wouldn't! The breakfasts were nothing special. Rise, the rooftop bar serves great cocktails and the barmen, like all the staff, are very friendly and eager to please. A special mention to "Pond" for her efforts and attention!
Ordered the burrata cheese with truffle pizza. It was heavenly and the crust was perfect. Definitely recommended if you’re a pizza lover.

We went for a few cocktails at sunset. The cocktails we ordered were excellent quality (there is a happy hour from 5:30-6:30) as was the service. Our waiter was very attentive. I would definitely go back

Italics is the main restaurant and Rise is the rooftop lounge/bar of the Akyra Manor Hotel. Both are excellently run by the Restaurant Manager, Waraporn Chantorn. I had the pleasure of experiencing Italics and Rise over a two week period. Whether attending for breakfast, lunch, tea or dinner; I was never disappointed. While not budget places to eat, they are inline with what to expect for a luxury boutique restaurant/bar. I loved all my meals and drinks and look forward to returning in the near future. Thank you to Waraporn "Pond", Nokyoong, Botan and Stellar for your excellent service and professionalism!

The staff on both the rooftop and in the restaurant were incredibly attentive and friendly. The drinks were delicious as was the food, and the atmosphere at sunset by the pool is wonderful. Slightly more expensive than other places in Chiang Mai but you pay for what you get. We will definitely come back! :)
This is a great place to come for a drink, nice view of the city. Cool rooftop pool as well. Come for happy hour, 5:30-6:30 for a buy 1 get 1 free drink special!

Located at a rooftop pool st the top of a trendy hotel in nimmon, my friend and I stopped by here after a hot day on Chiang Mai for happy hour. The service was exceptional and their we're comfy couches and a great vibe. May just visit again

Outstanding Passionista cocktail and Tuna Tartare. I really love the tuna tartare as it is super fresh with a slight spicy (wasabi?) twist. Nice views from the rooftop of the hotel. We also got a pizza which was delicious.

What a great find! From the moment we arrived we were impressed with the exterior decor. The interior design and layout was also very impressive and gave an upscale ambiance to this quaint restaurant. The light fixtures which look like trees were integrated as part of the seating! The food selection varied with an "Italian" theme and was reasonably priced compared to US dollars. The service was exceptional from all staff.
