Pond took time to explain to us about the food and their preparation process. We were impressed by her English. They also have a boutique hotel and roof top bar!! My friend and I were puzzled why we didnt run across this hotel when we were looking for hotels in Chiang Mai. Well, now we know where to stay next time we return. I will definitely recommend checking out this place for dinner or drinks. Read less
Great place to visit. Valuably Foods and Money. Love their swimming pool. We’ll be back and recommend to our friends and family 👍🏻🥂😍

My friend said her dish was lovely although it was a slightly small portion, she ordered squid ink pasta with black cod. She also said the wine was really good. I had the vegetarian pizza which had a slight Thai twist to it which wasn’t to my taste (it had carrot and Thai mushrooms). The staff were lovely and super helpful. It was a nice change after having pad Thai all the time! I had a smoothie which was nice.
The best Italian food you would find in Chiangmai. Plus! Killer view on rooftop spot! Service is great. Definitely come back for sure
Great pizza , good service, good selection of wine. The homemade pasta is a must! Also the rooftop is the killer!

Downloaded trip advisor just to review this place!! Have been in Thailand for three weeks and are still talking about how great our evening was here, the staff were so amazing and friendly, and our meals were absolutely perfection. Went with my boyfriend who's a chef and a steak lover and finds it hard to enjoy a good steak out, but he couldn't stop talking about how good his steak and meal was there! A beautiful restaurant between the people, decor and food! You must go!
It’s a very cozy and romantic restaurant in the heart of Chiang Mai, ideal to bring your significant other. The food has impressed and the cocktails were just superb.
Interesting decor and we were sitting outside seeing the world pass by, entertained with live music across the road ! Heavenly making my birthday wish xxx

We came here after the first restaurant we stopped at had a broken kitchen. It did not disappoint! The restaurant has a modern feel to it, and the service was quick and friendly. We had the make your own pizza, and the mushroom and truffle rissoto both of which were fantastic. We finished the night off with the lava cake, which was plated extremely well, and delicious. We will definitely be back!

Came here for an anniversary dinner and we were very pleased! Decent prices, kind of the prices I would spend back home in the US and good food. The venue is beautiful with the funky bench seating and modern style. We had the pizza and risotto. Also if you have never reviewed the restaurant before, you get a free drink! (PLUS!!) definitely would come here again. Only reason for four stars is because you have to pay for water, I’m always a stickler for that!

The best spot for pizza Lovers in Chiang Mai! Delicate taste for picky ones. Truffle and wild mushroom combination just blow our minds. Definitely recommended for anyone looking for memorable experience

We were staying at Akyra Manor for 3 nights. Their food was beautifully cooked and we tried both their Thai and Italian offerings. The pizza was the best we have had outside Italy and the Thai dishes were sophisticated and delicate - you must try some to appreciate the difference between fine cuisine and more ordinary versions of classic Thai recipes. However, we particularly recommend taking a cookery class with Phubase, Akyra's Executive Chef. We went with him to a local market to choose fresh ingredients before going into the restaurant kitchen to learn how to create 5 Thai dishes. We then ate these for lunch. It was an exceptional experience and one of the highlights of our trip to Thailand. The Rise rooftop bar is a great spot in the evening to try some of their signature cocktails and enjoy the glass-fronted swimming pool. I also took a mixology class with the chief barman at Rise rooftop bar: I learnt to make two of their signature cocktails and afterwards shared them with my partner. I would highly recommend this to anyone wanting to learn about some sophisticated tips to creating smart cocktails. We even filled a glass with cinnamon smoke to give a finishing touch to "One night in Chiang Mai"! Read less
Visited this place with a few friends. All Americans about 20 years old. Great happy hour deal 2-1 drinks. Cool cozy bar with a rooftop pool overlooking the city. Highly recommend.

Akyra Manor, Chiang Mai, is the place to stay at, the destination to eat at and the venue to drink at- on the rooftop overlooking the beautiful ancient city of Thailand. The hotel itself oozes style and class, while being a frontrunner in modern design and customer-focused experiences. Meanwhile, the rooftop bar is a delight: something you will talk to your friends about at home. If you're lucky enough to stay at the hotel, you can sample a cocktail just after you go for a dip in the pool -built in a see-through container so guests outside the pool can see underwater- which is stepped just above the rest of the bar. If you're staying elsewhere in the city, you can still go for a drink poolside in the evening when the rooftop transforms into a trendy cocktail space, made for mingling and swooning to tunes. As for Italics- well this restaurant offers authentic Italian that is second to none in Chiang Mai. The ingredients are sourced locally, are seasonal and fresh. This adds a lot to the flavour of the dishes, which is increasingly becoming a staple for locals in the know. The good thing about this restaurant is that you can also try authentic Thai dishes, made with seasonal produce by a local Thai chef. The Khao Soi is a must - it's Thailand's version of laksa (it tastes better than a laksa). It's creamy, spicy, salty and sour: just as it should be. The chicken served with the Khao Soi falls off your chopstick. It was a real curry soup delight. The breakfast served at the restaurant was unbelievable: a real show-stopper. The chef exercised class and restraint in providing all diners with a 'high tea' selection of Thai and Anglo breakfast treats, served on a high tea layered tray. Diners then choose a dish from the seasonally variant menu - my tip is to try anything with truffle in it: it really enhances the taste of the eggs (my top pick is the crab royal: crab meat, avocado wedges, poached egg, hollandaise sauce and truffle vinaigrette on toast). The dishes are not too big: they are filling, generous and exceptionally well sized to make a diner feel full but not sick. This place is a must to visit. If you can't stay overnight, at least try and indulge in a cocktail on the rooftop or a breakfast (or nightime pizza) at Italics. Read less

We had some really awesome italian food here! Everything was on point and the service is excellent. We had starters, main dishes and a dessert (lava cake). Wooooooooow!!! Prices are absolute good for such food and service. If you are in CM - go get there! :)

The Rise rooftop bar is a great place to stop for a drink during their happy hour. There is a wide range of drink options to choose from. Along with a selection of great food dishes from the Italics restaurant in the lobby. Would highly recommend stopping in for a good meal and drink!

The Rise Rooftop Bar was an excellent choice to hang out, and enjoy Chiang Mai. The Rise Rooftop Bar serves out some great drinks and modern style cuisine. The see through pool is an excellent option to look over the extensive city, and cool down. I highly recommend spending some time up there.

Amazing restaurant with lots of delicious Thai and Italian choice options. Spent an evening at the rooftop bar with great drinks and a beautiful see through swimming pool. Would highly recommend visiting this restaurant and/or rooftop bar.
Fresh prosciutto and mozzarella and very nice pasta. Don’t forget it to ask it “al dente”! Average ambiance and small portions.

We are on the 2nd week of our trip, and my gf and I were absolutely craving some pasta and pizza. Needless to say, we stumbled on Italics & Rise after being turned down by another restaurant in the city and I couldn’t be happier. The eggplant parm was 10/10, truffle gnocchi 10/10, pizza 12/10. Wine 100/10. Beyond this the service and ambience was amazing. Very romantic. Would definitely come back on our next trip, and may even return for Breakfast :)
Food was amazing and the service was great. The ambiance and vibe in the restaurant make for the perfect romantic date night. Highly recommend!!

The Italics & Rise at Akyra Manor is the best restaurant we were in during our stay in Chiang Mai. The restaurant is located on the main floor of this ultra elegant boutique hotel. Comfortable and quiet and with a good choice of Italian dishes. The staff is super friendly and even the chef will come out and make sure you have the best experience. Do not miss the desserts!

My friends and I went to Italic restaurant at Akyra Manor Chiang mai hotel for 90+points wine tasting event on March 22, 2018. Each of us got 6 glasses of wine (1 white, 1 rose and 4 red) at the price only THB 600++ per persons. Fantastic!!! For the food, we ordered bruchette, arugula&prosciutto salad, Pad Thai, chicken piccata and 2 dishes of pasta. All foods was fabulous, especially Homemade potato gnocchi. Really recommend this dish if you go there. Also the service was good and so friendly. All staffs is always smile^_^. I will be back there again definitely. Read less

I enjoyed my meal here. The service was attentive and friendly and I found the salad to be very fresh, while the gnocchi was delightful. I just moved into the area and will be back any time the craving for Italian food hits. Thanks for the good experience !
We were exploring the neighborhood and happened across Rise Rooftop Bar. Great view and great drinks. If it’s a hot day they even have a swimming pool.

It goes without saying that the view is greater especially at sunset. The cocktails, while on the more expensive for Chiang Mai, were specialty/artisan and still <$10 USD. Hot it at sunset (530-630) or cocktail hour (8-9) for bogo deals. Worth it!

We had the pleasure to stay in the Akyra Manor for nine nights. So we had more than enough opportunities to try every aspect of the menu. First of all there was not one dish we didn't enjoy. The balance between authentic thai food and mediterranean inspired food is an experience. The breakfast buffet is rich in options and the menu provides a lot of culinary finenesses. The ambiente matches the rest of the hotel as it is modern designed and very comfortable. It definitly invites to spend some time to enjoy the wonderful food. Last the staff has to be pointed out as it was the most attentive staff we ever met. They were always interested about our preferences to give great advise on food choice. Furthermore they kept our preferences in mind to provide them the next time in advance. For example the first morning we asked for some extra fruit so from the next day on they served us an extra plate of fruit right in the beginning. Moreover they had always time for a quick chat or some jokes. I can highly recommend to give this restaurant a try. Read less

We went to Rise Bar for happy hour (buy one get one free) drinks from 5:30-6:30... the service was excellent, as well as the drinks. I recommend the Mojito and the free popcorn! The cheese platter is delicious as well. Definitely worth checking out!
Rise rooftop bar is a great place for sunset drinks! Sat in the middle of Nimman area, the view is of the mountains and the drinks are great too! Great happy hour prices!
Great happy hour; buy one get one free drinks! The passion fruit mojito was really good and the staff was very friendly!
Rise is an amazing rooftop bar in Chiang Mai! It has a great rooftop pool. The happy hour (5:30-6:30) has buy one get one free drinks! Always good service, drinks and food!
Coffee and orange juice were so fresh and delicious as was the food .Pond was out server and she was so professional and kind!!

What a great experience at this hip rooftop in Chiang Mai! Great cocktails, sunset views of the city and mountains, personal and friendly service (thank you Poon!), and super-yummy snacks make this the perfect date location! Love the relaxed & hip vibe. Next time, I'll bring my swimsuit to enjoy the pool too! 🙂
Came here for sunset drinks with my bae and was not disappointed. Strong cocktail game (try the whisky sour), delish apps (tuna tartar was yummy) and free popcorn (yay!). Will be back!

I spent my 50th Birthday at this amazing hotel! It was one of the best days of my life! The hotel is elegant, contemporary and staffed with the kindest employees in Thailand! Pond, Nee, May and Tong made us feel so special! Our room was amazing, the Rise Roof Top Bar was our favorite place to hang out and the Italics Restaurant was so delicious!! My Birthday dinner at Italics started with a gift and card from the staff..... my Akyra Elephant is on my nightstand in America today to remind me of this beautiful place! I can’t wait to go back! If you get the chance to go to this beautiful place, take the time to talk to the staff..... the people here are truly lovely!!! ❤️
Very nice restaurant, especially the taste of the food, it is very worth to try it once. No matter with your family or friends, quiet and unique place.
Wonderful view of the mountain we just biked up and down then we made it just in time for happy here and the staff was very cool and classy. The wait staff was on point! #adventureswithluckandmagic
Great bar! Great bartender! Great everything! We loved hanging out here! Thanks May, you’re the best! - Spencer & Vanessa
Great bar! Great location! Great everything! Make sure to ask for Tong at the rooftop bar, he’s the best!! - Spencer & Vanessa
The quality of the food was very good frmo the Antipasti to the main courses. Very attentive service which is not always easy to find!

We stayed at Nim mahn and needed winding down in the evening. Best Italian restaurant. Been back 3 times. Order the truffle gnocchi. Their wine selection is great. I am vegetarian as well and the selection is great.

Had a very pleasant lunch by the pool on the rooftop. Service is excellent,staff are very accommodating as to let us choose dishes from the main menu & be served upstairs. The Beef Ragu Ravioli was very good & if I had to nit-pick I would have liked a lot more ragu stuffed into the pocket of the ravioli, followed that with a wonderful Mango Pannacotta with passion fruit which was gorgeous & came in a very generous portion. Proceeded by a cocktail or 2, the lunch & the setting made for a very pleasant couple of hours.
a few outside seats, above street. quality professional and friendly staff. food was well prepared and delicious. thai choices too,
Wonderful rooftop bar and restaurant. Great food and cocktails. I ordered the pasta with crab meat which was delicious.

During our month in Chiang Mai we came here 3 times and each time was wonderful. Twice we came for dinner and once for their breakfast. For the dinners each time we got a pizza (The akyra and a Parma ham one, both of which were excellent and about $10usd) and a salad (a classic Caesar and one with rocket and prosciutto which were both enough for a single person to eat as a meal and ran about $7usd) and once we got a a avocado crab prosciutto which was very interesting and good as an appetizer. We each got a glass of wine with dinner both times which was 190 baht (about $6 usd). We went later in the evening when there were few other customers so our food was done very quickly and the service was excellent. For breakfast we did the buffet which is 490 baht after tax and service charge (just under $15usd) which came with a fruit and bread tower, buffet with breads, cheeses, dimsun, toast and artesan jams, yogurt, cereal and juices as well as any 2 entrees of your choice. We both got a crab eggs Benedict and then she got pancakes and I got a salmon eggs Benedict. The eggs were poached perfectly and both entrees were astounding. I would highly recommend to anyone who is wanting to eat somewhere fancy without having to spend egregious amounts! Read less
Lovely little restaurant with great pasta and pizza! Surprised the pizza took so long but was so good!
great vive great food great wine!! We had family dinner during the stay and it was one of the best place in Chiang Mai. If you are looking for good italian you should visit here!!

Stumbled upon this restaurant on trip advisor and was so glad my girlfriend and I gave it a try. We had the Parma Ham and minty lemonades, both of which were awesome. Pizza is thin crust and great to share.

Came here with my boyfriend for lunch and ordered the Parma Ham pizza, which was delicious!! Nice thin crust with great quality ham. We also shared the Minty Lemonade, which was very refreshing. I highly recommend!

The food in At Italics & Rise at Akyra Manor is fresh, in both style and taste. If you’re looking for a place that puts a twist on Italian cuisine and mixes it with true Thai sensibilities and taste, this is the place for you. It has a refreshing set of choices for beverages, including a wonderfully blended Thai ice tea and deliciously refreshing minty lemonade. Their signature pesto is flavorful and smooth without excessive use of salts. I give this place the highest marks and cannot recommend it enough.
Amazing view with very friendly staff. Good choice of tasty cocktails and they also have happy hours everyday!
The staff was kind and view was awesome. Come here when the sun is coming down, glowing against the nearby mountain.
Relaxing atmosphere and high quality cocktails, what's not to love! The mountain view is something u dont see every day.
This hotel was wonderful- the rooms are very nice and fun to stay in. The pool deck on the top of the hotel is a great spot to hang out, eat food, swim etc. Food and breakfast was yummy.

We visit the Italics Restaurant with some friends for lunch. No difficult to seat 4 persons and a lot of options in the menu. We ordered four appetizers to start. Bruschetta, calamari fritti, scallops and chicken cashnuts. The bruschetta lacked personality, the others were tasty. After the appetizers we then ordered a pizza and two risottos, one risotto with truffles and another one without. A little tasteless, although presentation was very good. We put some salt to enhance it more. Actually it's not an Italian restaurant. It's a fusion of Italian and Thai food. The Italics restaurant is much praised for the sunset and happy hour on the roof top. Read less
I went there to have a drink and watch the view.. amazing! Better then I expected! The staff is friendly and kind

I’ve been there for my birthday and would definitely go again. The food is delicious: I especially want to recommend four cheese pizza and tiramisu for a desert. The staff is professional and transforms the whole experience from good to I-loved-this-place. Thank you!

We started off small, but at the end we kept eating haha. Everything was excellent. We asked for some thing to have as takeaway and they came to us and said "we notice you are taking a lot of food away...did you like your meal?" Hahaha yes it's because we ordered way to much. Expect to pay North American prices.
We visit rise rooftop bar during our honeymoon trip in Thailand/Chiang Mai. This place is very cozy. The staff is super friendly and nice. I totally recommend this place.
After a long day my travel companion and I stumbled upon this gem.. we were blown away by the outstanding views and delicious drinks!
The pizza was amazing! Thin crust and lovely waiters. If you have the time, you should visit the rooftop with it’s good cocktails and amazing view.

Amazing dining experience and by far the best Italian restaurant in ChiangMai. Food was great, tasty and excellent quality. Service is very professional, attentive and staff are courteous. Great decor, modern and love to eat on the terrace. Good value for money even with bottle of wine. Strongly recommend this restaurant to all Italian food lovers. Also you have to know everything is homemade and pizza are authentic Roma style.

The place is very cosy and the staff are very friendly. They have this amazing horse statue that makes the place even more classy looking. I would recommend beef carpaccio as starter. A very delightful experience.

I didn’t take any pictures, however the food was probably very photogenic! We devoured our dishes at breakfast this morning, they were incredibly delicious. We had roti with banana and hazelnut spread, the Thai style eggs and sausage,(served in its own skillet), and a roti with massaman curry and an egg. Yum yum yum Bonus was good coffee! In a place like this we seldom repeat places, but we will definitely return on this trip and hopefully the next.

We decided to visit this restaurant as local friends recommended it to us. The decor and ambience were absolutely first class. The menu is interesting and varied, with Italian and local dishes to choose from. The dishes are very inventive and beautifully presented by staff that are highly trained , very professional, yet warm and welcoming at the same time. Don’t hesitate to dine here - you won’t be disappointed. Thank you to Khun Pond and your excellent team for a wonderful evening. Regards Sean and Karen Scotland Read less
Had an amazing dinner in this beautiful restaurant in the centre of Chiang Mai! Definitely worth visiting!
Great relaxing environment with mountain views. Staff are pleasant and happy to make cocktail adjustments for your flavours.
Definitely recommend for a more chill and intimate setting. It's not a big place so great for small groups. Great views and solid drinks!
Super convenient location in Nimman area, rooftop pool, great cocktails, and super friendly staff. Couch seating makes for perfect for late afternoon cocktails with friends.
The skybar @ Akyra is an oasis in Chiang Mai. Great drinks, staff and the view on the mountain is best in town! Go!
Wide assortment of cheeses & meats. Outstanding pizzas & pasta.Good value for the cost. Buffet and menu items for breakfast, AND delicious coffee!
We have a corckage with our own wine. and pork chop and parma ham pizza. yeah it’s good time :)

We had planned a large dinner for 25 people in July, 2017. Setting it up was a breeze - the staff were all very helpful. The meal was delicious and the panna cotta was noteworthy. In fact the entire experience was so good we returned there a couple of days later and the food, service and experience was just as good. Thank you Ms Nattakita for a wonderful experience.

Dessert menu is nice. Service and presentation are very good. Excellent staff, always smiling. Clean restroom. Cosy and chic restraurant. Definitely come back again for amazing lava cake. Also recommend to try ‘One night at Chiang Mail’ cocktail.

This was my 4th visit here, the staff have been so impressive that it almost overshadows the fantastic drinks and food they serve! I highly recommend coming for happy hour at the rooftop bar from 17:30-18:30, having a few drinks and moving downstairs to the resturant (pro tip, get your last cocktail right before you are ready to go eat, you can bring it downstairs!) The food is really amazing. I have eaten the seared tuna everytime and my dinning mates have had a variaty of other excellent dishes. Come here as a group or a couple, be assured a great experience everytime! We were served at the bar by Tong and in the resturant by Nuk. Both incredibly friendly. Tong is a cocktail genius! Read less

We ordered Agio and arugula salad. They tasted really good. Agio is a shrimp dish cooked with garlic served with bread. The service was good. I would come back and recommend anyone to try their food. We sat on the rooftop deck with a wonderful view of Chiang Mai, also.
Don’t think it’s a real Italian but only a try to hard coffee shop in a hotel! Menu includes breakfast lunch dinner ! ...in newspaper style! Food expensive and very bland.
Delicious cocktails, complimentary popcorn, nice views from the rooftop bar. A nice place to visit!!
Good Cocktails and a really nice view over Chiang Mai. Very friendly and fast service. Great spot to relax after a busy day in Chiang Mai.

the atmosphere and the scenic is extra chill yet unique got me forget the busy nimman somehow after travel all day long Rise is the great place to stop by. The staffs were friendly and welcome. definitely be back soon

The best place for cocktails and very delightful dinner! We found the menu very fresh and exciting, the chef definitely has his own style. All of the dishes were winners in our opinion. The staff really pay attention to you and details. We will definitely come back and probably quicker than we think!
Made it here for Happy Hour for buy one get one free drink. Great view of the sunset and I love the floaty unicorn!
Absolutely amazing view of Chiang Mai. Beautiful infinity pool and very friendly staff. A definite must do for everyone.
The rooftop views are incredible. Make sure you catch a sunset here at happy hour! Drinks are yummy too!

I visited here alone at 6:00pm. I enjoyed drinking beer on happy hour with amazing sunset view. Their hospitality is quite awesome. Moreover foods there are so nice and delicious:) you should visit here before 7:00pm cause you can sit by swimming pool if you visit earlier:)
I love I love. I’m gonna come here every day. Beautiful sunset view. So many drinks and I wanna know if I can swim in the pool
Good vibes and amazing atmosphere! The staffs are really nice and friendly! Reasonably rooftop price! Highly recommend!

We had a lovely happy hour drink while explorint nimman rd. Great view with a pool (unused at night), and a wide menu with cocktails wine and beer. Nice happy hour deal between 5:30 and 6:30. Very peaceful atmosphere with chill music.

First time at Italics in over a year, and was as good as I remembered Started with drinks at the roof bar as the sun set, great view. Then downstairs to the restaurant for dinner. The decor is very modern and stylish, though not to everyones taste. The food and service was very good, and the wine list had many good selections. The price is a bit higher than other Italian restaurants in town, but it is reasonable for the quality of food and service.

Did not make a reservation however they seemed to have a few spare tables for couples on our arrival. Great service, we sat outside and had a lovely young female waitress who looked after us very well! The food was amazing!! Highly recommend the spaghetti carbonara! Only regret that we did not leave enough room for dessert.

Yes, everyone has an opinion about the forest of chandeliers. I liked them and the ultra modern decor as well. Food was authentic, fresh and really well presented. The portion sizes are not large. Adequate menu choices for vegetarians. The prices are reasonable given the exception quality of the ingredients. Service is efficient and professional. Would definitely visit again.

The only surprise I had that when we called they said they are fully booked, and when we left at 9:30pm.they were still half empty, so even if they tell you fully booked, insist on the phone and show up. They have a great kids menu, and is child's friendly. We love the potato gnocchi, the Italian salad is very fresh and the crab really tasty, my wife loved the Tom yum soup, and the spinach Calzone was great! All in all a great mix for all tastes if you feel not only for Thai food, in a nice neighbourhood not too crowded, in a very design hotel and setup.

A trendy hotel with a casual restaurant and roof top bar. Reservations are helpful for dinner. Service was impeccable, and the menu offered a wide range of thai and western food. We fell in love with the flat bread pizza and fried zucchini sticks.Cocktails took almost 10 minutes to arrive which was annoying.The breakfast menu was not as western as we hoped- it's difficult to find a traditional western breakfast in Chiang mai. The french toast was only half of a slice of bread covered in fruit and honey so it came to the table pretty soggy. Placing the fruits to the side would help. Ambiance is great and the food is delicious yet pricey!
Awesome place to hang out with friends with good view, nice drink with really good services people. Love it.
High quality fusion food. All staff so nice, roof top bar with pool, nice for chilling out, good top view for night lights and easy to find in Center of landmarks of Chiangmai.

Had dinner here and we both loved it. Mozzarella + Chiang mai pizza amazing and full of flavour. Carbonara unsurprisingly stole the show but their other pasta was also delicious. Steak was perfection. Definitely book ahead, people were turned away. No parking but valvet is available to help.

We went to italics for dinner. The interior is beautiful and the staff very friendly! They served some really nice bread and pesto for us to start with. Super delicious. I ordered a Pizza Parma and my boyfriend a Steak. The Steak was supposed to be Medium but it was quite dry. My Pizza was really bad. It looked very promising but there was a super thick layer of cheese underneath the Parma and the aragula. In fact it was more cheese than Pizza dough. Couldn‘t eat more than one piece. Prices were very European which would have been ok for us if the food would have been great... I hope they improve in the future because the place itself and the staff were amazing. Read less

This restaurant serves high quality Italian fusion food. The best part is the excellent table service. I didn't experience any better service in Chiang Mai. The wait staff was attentive to my every need. I highly recommend experiencing this place while visiting Chiang Mai. Pond and Nuk took very good care of me, and are prime examples of the great staff at Italics.
The place was really nice. We had a summer salad which was yummy and mushrooms risotto which I like the crispy porcini on top. Prices were a bit higher compare to local places but worth to try.

Visited Italics for lunch, service was great. My mom and I were the second table in the whole restaurant, later the third table came in and was placed on a particular table right next to us sharing the same bench, almost sitting back to back, while they statf could've placed them in literally any other empty table. They were a loud family with two small children crying non-stop. We asked to switch to table, which I felt was a bit annoying to do mid-meal, however the staffs were very attentive and helpful. We ordered the summer salad and mushroom risotto. I find the risotto a bit bland, could use a little more seasoning, and I expected a tastier dish since the price was higher than average italian restaurants in chiang mai; about the same price as good italian restaurants in bangkok that make tastier food. Enjoyed the nice atmosphere nonetheless. Read less
The dinner that we eat was spaghetti with pesto and pizza masrums and one salad... The food was very tasty.. Also the view from the roof bar was really nice.

I had a great time at this bar which is on 7th floor. Perfect spot for sunset session and some good drinks. The outdoor pool is very refreshing and the view over Chiang Mai is the best in the city! I highly recommend this place!

I have always loved Italian food like pizza etc. This is one of my favorite restaurants for breakfast, lunch and dinner. I recommend it. Servers are very welcoming and we have even gotten to know some of them as friends as well. I have been there for every meal and have been satisfied for every meal. Pizza for dinner and french toast for breakfast. Very delicious and a great environment. Atmosphere is very welcoming. I recommend this restaurant.
We had the summer salad, potato gnocchi and ham and spinach pizza. Very close to actual italian fare. Slightly expensive compared to local restaurants, but worth it.

Great surprise to find such good Italian food in Chiang Mai. The food is excellent, so do staffs. They provide very professional service and are very friendly. The food is a bit expensive compared to other restaurant. But definitely worth a try for this quality.

Good service and attentive staff. Thank you for your recommendation, Khun Tong....my cocktail is nice! I will try to come earlier next time. Heard the sun set is beautiful when looking up from here....with the happy hour 17:30-18:30...cool!
i like summer salad,pizza and mango pana cotta very nice food reccommed for dating and dinner or party wite friends

This is a must do while in Chiang Mai for those looking for a relaxing start to their evenings. The drinks are amazing, the view is breathtaking, and the service was excellent. (Their English is great also!)

My girlfriend and I been in Thailand for four days, in Chiang Mai for two days. After searching the top places to drink and be in Chiang Mai, RISE rooftop bar was always top of the list. Let me tell you they exceeded expectations! The service was pristine. Always attentive but NOT over your shoulder type. The drinks were classy and strong which for us was a huge plus. I recommend you catch the views from 18:00-19:00 just breathtaking sun setting on the city like no other view. I loved the drinking atmosphere. It reminded me so much of the quality in San Diego, CA.

I recently visited this restaurant during my stay at The Akyra Manor Chiang Mai. A friend had recommended to try this restaurant but I am usually a bit sceptical and like to form my own opinion. But I can tell you: After dining here for the first time, I could not help but return also on the following two evenings of my stay at the hotel. The food was just so delicious and really tasted like in Italy (I have visited Italy before, so I can compare it). I was impressed not only by the taste of the food but also by the beautiful setting of the restaurant and the attentive staff working at "Italics". They patiently listened to my wishes and answered all my questions regarding the food. They furthermore gave me a lot of recommendations of food to try after they knew the types of dishes I personally enjoy. They also kept coming back to my table to check if everything was alright, refilled my water without me having to request it and were generally just very friendly and made me feel incredibly welcome at this venue. I would recommend this restaurant not only to guests staying at Akyra Manor Chiang Mai but also to visitors in the area or Chiang Mai in general, as this restaurant really has some incredible food which you won't find anywhere else in the city. 5 stars from me! Read less

We decided to treat ourselves to the Italics restaurant as we read it’s in the top 10 restaurant guide. We had starters, main meals, cocktails & a bottle of wine. The staff were so accommodating as I ordered the mushroom risotto with truffle oil & I told them I’m allergic to truffles/truffle oil & they told me they would use a different oil & considering they were very busy they didn’t mind at all & I thought that was very thoughtful of them. At the end of the meal I asked for the bill & was quite surprised that all of what we had for three people only came to just over the equivalent of £100. Highly recommend.

My wife and I have been on holiday for several weeks and we wanted a break from Thai food. We were searching and searching when Italics came up as a choice, we checked out the menu and were sold, and we could not have been happier with our choice! The food is amazing, my wife and I had the pizza (which is large so come with an appetite) and it was perfect. The drinks are equally as good, and they have a great wine selection. If you have time before dinner I highly suggest heading upstairs to Rise for a pre-dinner drink on the rooftop! This is a must-do in Chiang Mai for your nice dinner while on holiday.

I had dinner with a friend at Italics during my visit in Chiang Mai. The home made Gnocci are excellent and so are the starters. Service was very friendly and efficient. The Rise rooftop bar serves some great cocktails with a unique view over Chiang Mai.

This restaurant was in the Akyra Manor Hotel and we decided to have dinner here on our last night in Thailand. This place did not disappoint us, amazing drinks, appetizers, entrees, and dessert. It was also an added plus that the chefs would cook certain things in view of customers so you know everything was fresh and made to order. Would highly recommend.

Being invited to this great restaurant from my friends Sharon and Chris was a privilege, great reception, friendly staff, great interior and above all the food 😍, very well served and the waiter was very observant and helpful. Top service special thanks to Bell top waiter 👌👍🙏🏻 I can only recommend, a must do place when visiting Chiangmai.
Great food, great place, great service. The pizza is just perfect. Would definately come back again....
Worth the $$$ - The pizza is delicious and some of the best options in the Chiang Mai area. The service is also very kind and attentive.

The staff are very attentive and helpful. The music playing didn't seem to fit the modern indoor decor giving it a strange vibe. For someone who loves pesto I never thought I'd ever say that there was just too much pesto, but that's also the dish I ordered. Perhaps next time I'll ask more questions about the dishes as the descriptions on the menu are quite short. My husband really enjoyed his meal and our appetizer was amazing. Would try it again but more inquiry into specific dishes. On the pricey side.

If you are in the mood for an excellent setting, great food and fantastic service, Italics is the place to come. Nothing beats a fire pizza oven cooked pizza, and their pasta dishes are innovative yet authentic. The place has a nice romantic feel if it is just a meal for two ;0). Small touches like linen napkins, refreshment towels, complimentary breads and after dinner sweets make it all the more special. We came to Italics on our first night in Chiang Mai and decided to return for our last meal.

The food is excellent, the service is nice and dedicated, this is a good place for a fine dinner, the meal was just very, very good. The dessert was too sweet but I really appreciate the effort made to offer real home made ice cream. It is a place that deserves your hard-earned money.

Very modern and stylish restaurant with good service. The food we sampled was mostly excellent but the risotto, although well flavoured, was not made with arboreal rice and so was the wrong consistency. Drinks are over priced.

In Few Words, Great Atmosphere, Great Service and the best part was really the food, which is delicious and extremely good Value for Money. I believe it was our best meal while in Chiang Mai. The Breakfast Items are too die for and really worth a visit while you visit Chiang Mai.

Ended up here on a Sunday after searching TA and finding my first choice nearby was closed. I was looking for a nice Western meal since I was still battling with a bad Papaya salad I had eaten in BKK a few days earlier. This place was just what the doctor ordered. Started with a complimentary bread and pesto that was very nice. Then came the fried zucchini which was perfectly done in a light batter. There was a little confusion when I requested a small amount of marinara sauce to dip the zucchini and received ketchup. A humorous teaching moment for a new member of the staff and was quickly mitigated by the head waiter. The main course of chicken saltimbucca over risotto was amazing. The prosciutto was A-grade and crisped to perrrrrfection... full flavored and just the right level of salty. The chicken itself was lovely...2 nicely seasoned breast pieces that were not overcooked. The risotto compliment gathered the flavors of the chicken and prosciutto and was the perfect starch supplement for my previously ailing stomache. This dish was more than a cure...I believe it has real possibilities for promoting world peace. The price was nice at around 700 baht. I'm aware of the taxes on fine wines in Thailand so I dont partake (sorry mr government minister). This was a 5-star meal for around 25 USD. Read less

Today we really wanted to have an Italian meal after days of very good Thai food. We originally sent a booking request the day before for a table in what TripAdvisor rank as the number one Italian Restaurant in Chiang Mai: The Secret Learning Restaurant. However arriving there, looking into a dirty an uninviting place, we were meet by a rude owner spitting his message in our faces : “We don’t take bookings, so I do not answer anybody that write to me on mail”. So my advice is - if you are not a hippi, or hash smoking twenty five year old that think a place like this is top of the world, find yourself another restaurant! So we ordered an Uber cab an went to the second best place according to TripAdvisor: the Italics & Rise. Very elegant, but may be a bit over decorated with lamps making you feel being in a cathedral. The staff however was very helpful and nice, though their level of knowledge of food and wine in general is too low - which is a common thing all over Thailand when you enter into a good restaurant with European menues. And this is not due to the willingness of the waiters, but a big management problem that to often totally ignores the education of their staff. We ordered an appetizer, a starter, a main course and a desert for the two of us. We ordered an aperitif before the meal, a glass of Prosecco in between, a bottle of white wine ( to a cost of 1400 bath) and a a coffee with a brandy for one of us. The food was delicious and tasty, the willingness of the staff irreproachable and we had a good time until we received the bill of nearly 7000 bath, taxes included ( something that was not mentioned in the menu) . That is by far the highest price we have paid for a meal for two in Thailand. But as time goes by, we will probably forget the price and remember the staff and the food... Read less

This restaurant offers a wide variety of food for all cravings. You can’t stop eating the food even though you are full. The food is that delicious. We were lucky enough to experience a Thai cooking class- I would highly recommend this to anyone.

We Spent the week at Akyra Manor. over the time we were there we had breakfast everyday and many dinners at Italics & Rise. Food was great, stuff were all super friendly & Decor and atmosphere was beautiful We had a cooking class with Chef Phubase, which was great many laughs and learn how to make a few different thai dishes. over all was just great Read less

It is our last night in Chiang Mai and on the strong recommendation of our hotel, we decided to visit Italics. Decor is beautiful with a friendly staff. We ate outside. We ordered the eggplant parmesan as an appetizer with snow fish and black ink pasta with squid and gelato for dessert. Ordered one glass of wine, and one bottle of water total not apiece. Total cost of meal was 1812 Baht. I love Italian food and my hotel gave really strong recommendations. We both thought the food was good but not memorable. Little things missing such as a bread to accompany meal not as something to munch on while waiting for food. I thought the pasta was good but frankly the pork sausage overpowered any other flavor. I expected stuff squid per the description on the menu. Instead, there was one small slice of squid with sausage inside of it and the rest was just rings. I think this approach means there is more sausage to dominate the meal. While servers are friendly, they really delivered the dishes and did not come back to check very often. This might sound picky but we came early. In fact, we were one of three people in the restaurant when we arrived. It appeared if one is seated outside, there is less attention. Read less

Several friends had a fun evening sharing a selection of Italian and Thai foods in an upscale, but casual, environment. The pizza was particularly good, as were the gnocchi and various spaghetti plates. Service was outstanding, prompt and attentive. English, Chinese & Thai are all spoken. Afterwards we went to the rooftop bar which has an amazing clear glass swimming pool. We had a very fun evening.
Excellent restaurant, from the impeccable service to the amazing food, I recommend this place as a nice dinner treat for both couples or friends outing. Loved it and will be coming back.
Really nice place, amazing service and the food was very tasteful! I would definitely come back one day!

Went to Italics for dinner with a group of friends because of all the positive reviews on Tripadvisor and I must say I was not disapointed! The place lived up to it's reputation. Though it was a little pricier than expected, the food was definetly worth it. I got the diavola pizza, and though it wasn't exactly a devil in terms of flavour in terms of spiciness. The waiter was quick to find a multitude of different spices and oils to add to your pizza. By the end of our meal a waitress asked a friend of mine and me why we hadn't finished our thai iced tea. When we told her that we just didn't like the taste of the drink she offered us a glass of wine on the rooftop bar, which by the way is amazing! Read less
The service is in top and the food is delicious. It's not cheap prices but it's fair. The view from the rooftop is amazing.

I got a pizza with ham, parmesan and ruccola, and it sad delicious. I could not eat it all, so I got the rest to go. Very professionel employes who serviced us very well. I got the tiramisu for dessert and it was so good! The prices were fair - a little expensive compared to the street kitchens, nyt worth the money!
Very beautiful restaurant and great service but the food was just good while the prices are high. I had a nice meal but can't see returning since nothing was memorable.
The servers are friendly. They recommend us its signature dishes and drinks that are delicious. The ambience is also welcoming. MUST-TRY diner it is!!

Best Italian food in Chiangmai so far. Fine dine in town and quite expensive in their standards but totally worth the price. Pizza is made of fresh ingredients and gigantic size, we ordered Parma ham one and were offered a group of herbs, shred cheese and spices for flavoring! Fushion chicken rice is a must-have

We went there with a friends, First time for us to visit chiangMai. We love all foods that we ordered. So delicious! Staffs very well trained! and location so easy to go..as in the center of Nimmarn. We went to the roof top bar. is also very chill..with a clear glass pool ! If we going back to Chiang Mai. definately we will going back to eat there again! :) Thank you for a wonderful time and foods! We love it!

I went to Rise rooftop bar at the Akyra hotel in Chiang Mai a couple of times, just to get a sip of their marvellous G&T based on Hendricks Gin, maybe the best I’ve had The bar is really nice and pretty upscale, with (among everything else) nice seatings, a very spectacular pool, a wonderful view of the mountains and the Doi Suthep Temple. The bar is definitely in the very high-price-level for beeing Thailand, but the ambience, the service and the quality of the drinks (wow!!) can be worth it if it fits your budget. Certainly worth a visit.

You do not need an Italian chef to cook authentic food. Chef Phubase, in charge of it does a great job, Excellent food, quality, freshness, presentation and taste. One of the spots in Chaing mai you should visit.. if you had enough of Thai food.
For people who want great taste at beautiful place 💕 recommend Gamberrie Pesto mushroom & Truffle Cream Risotto

You know those nice places you only think about going on special occassions? This one is just like that only you get the experience for a fraction of the price! Amazing pizza with grilled veggies that had a smokey flavour. Ample toppings. Attentive staff - even offered us a sample of an appetizer to along with it.
Best salads (simple with top quality produce) Good dishes Chic relaxing decor Semi-open kitchen which allows you to see how well they work. Can't wait to go for breakfast/brunch
I had a wonderful time with my friends here. We ordered drinks at happy hours and yammy Italian food.
Great food and even greater cocktail. The best rooftop view in town. Perfect atmosphere for dating you should visit
Really good pizza and gnocchi! Good bread and pesto to start! Nice service and nice quiet patio and decor inside!
I know I know, why come to Thailand and order a pizza? But oh my goodness it was worth it! I also got the sausage platter and it was ok but the pizza was to die for.
Wonderful rooftop bar! The staff are very nice and will help you with anything you need. The food/drinks are delicious and affordable and the pool is amazing!! Highly recommend:)
Excellent pizza and cocktails. This time we discovered thay will also serve them on the lovely Italics restrurant. Very very great service. Thank you
The food and service are excellent.Very good pizza and friendly staff.The pesto seafood pizza and cooktail were very like..
Fantastic food, very delicious European inspired style with organic ingredients from around Chiang Mai. Great place to enjoy great food in Chiang Mai. Everything perfect.
Excellent ambiance with a breathtaking views of Chiang Mai. Boom made our experience memorable, not to mention the best cocktails in town.
Boom was such a gentleman. He always made sure we were well taken care of and the bartender was very attentive. 5 stars. Love this atmosphere!!

We had a birthday dinner here and the staff was AMAZING! From the reservation to the appetizers and the complimentary birthday dessert! SUCH a great experience! I want to go back & take friends! The salad and pizzas were wonderful!

i love this spot for dates w my S. O. or get togethers w friends. Great for lunch or dinner i thik the price is very fair for the quality of the food they serve for example the crab in the crab salad is excellent and a generous serving. Also adore the mozarella salad the mozarella coming in a round ball when cut into absolutely creamy and fresh. Good variety in the menu for different tastes and good thin crust pizza as well. Well done.
Nice place in the lobby of my hotel, food was pretty good for breakfast. Very good location right in he lobby and open late till 11pm
Love this place. The food and service are excellent. My husband and I stayed here and after checking out all the places on Nimman we found our way back here.

We went here before and the the pizzas only got better it seems. This time we discovered they will also serve them on the lovely rooftop bar of the hotel with the original cocktails they serve up there. This is for sure a place we will visit every time when we go to Chiang Mai.
Very good pizza and friendly staff. The pesto and eggplant dips offered as a starter were very good and a nice touch.
Beautiful cocktail and yummy pizza. The food was very fresh. Great service. Would definitely recommend to friends!!!

During our Stay in Chiang Mai, we ate twice at the Italics restaurant. Awesome Pizza with a nice selection. Friendly staff and manager. Tasty cocktails at reasonable price compared to Europe for even better quality. definitely recommend!!!

Just had lunch at Italics restaurant which is housed in the unique boutique 'Akyra Manor hotel'. The first impression is first class, with quirky and very stylistic interiors and furnishings that are both classy and very practical. We thoroughly enjoyed our thin crusted but firm of base pizza done in their very own pizza oven and a very good quality and well presented steak, it was perfectly cooked neither being to rare nor overdone. Finally we shared a Gnocchi dish that would not have been out of place in Italy, I was surprised at the high class pasta quality and was informed that the Chef makes his own pasta, which then made sense. Service from the restaurant was friendly, attentive and the staff were all knowledgeable on their offerings, which resonates good training from the top. Will I be back and will I recommend? Without doubt! Thank you all for making a fussy guest happy. Read less

Absolutely beautiful restaurant inside. The service is very professional and good. The food is very expensive for Thailand but if you get pizza it's not too expensive. I love the rocket and cheese pizza! So fresh and tasty. The sauce on these pizzas are not too sweet like many other pizza places in Chiang Mai. If you can afford it, then this is a must go!

We had an incredible visit to Rise. The drinks were great, the staff was friendly and helpful, and views were unbeatable. All in all, a fantastic experience. I would recommend this to anyone visiting Chiang Mai.
The rooftop bar is fantastic! Beautiful views of the mountains on one side with a cool pool. The service is great and attentive!
Went there twice during our stay both nights were fantastic service was good food was excellent and we would highly recommend this resturant.

First time to this bar, the location is amazing..plan on coming at sunset, have a dip in the pool. They have happy hour from 5:30-6:30 (2 for 1 drinks). Boom our server was lovely! Definitely something special to do in Chiang Mai
Delicious cocktails and snacks with a great view and awesome staff. Leave the old city and come check out this part of Chiang Mai. 300 - 600 baht well spent.

We visited during the happy hour when they had buy one get one promotion deals! The bar has an amazing view over Chiang Mai. Our server Boom was very friendly and helpful as well. We went to a couple of rooftop bars in the town but this one was by far the best bar! :)
A server, named boom, he is very nice and kind. Happy hour was full of enjoyment. Sunset was beautiful. Atmosphere is awesome. I hope you have a nice time in here, too.

We ve got a pizza there, have to wait 45 min for it that is quite long, while other customers arrived later were served before. Pizza was good but for the price there are better options in chiang mai.
Grabbed a few drinks with friends during their amazing happy hour deal. Beautiful views, fun and friendly staff, and great atmosphere! Will definitely go again
Great little rooftop in nimman - very cozy, good food and good drinks. Special thanks to Boom for his hospitality.
A rooftop well situated, good service especially BOOM the server. Lovey swimming pool and the dishes are delicious
Excellent restaurant, food and service! Delicious all the food. 100% recomended We eat pizza, pasta, salad, and all was perfect
Fantastic bar. Amazing crevice from boom. Amazing place to visit. Enjoyed my stay and would definitely come back
Cosy and elegant atmosphere! Food is presented perfectly and my pasta was with super fresh ingredients. Another highlight was the fresh Vitamin C juice. Thumbs up!
Great atmosphere with delicious dishes, spending my weekend with my friends and love all staffs who take care of us. Highly recommended !!
The pizza's were very delicious and the service is great. The place looks really nice too. Thank you so much!

Italics restaurant was lovely and the food was great. The staff were so helpful and couldn't do enough to help. So much so that we came back the night after to go to the roof top bar. It didn't disappoint, the staff were so friendly and accommodating- especially Boom, he couldn't have done more for us. The view is spectacular and the pool is something else. We loved it.
Great food and mountain view. Highly recommended. If you ever had a chance to come down to nimman road in Chiang mai. This is the place to hang out with friends after dinner. Khun Boom&may

Found a lovely rooftop bar in Chiang Mai with its own pool. Lovely place to be as the sun goes down, with decent cocktails at reasonable prices. Staff were excellent and attentive, especially Boom who looked after us.

We found this amazing little jewel by searching rooftop bars in Chiang Mai. The cocktail list is vast and reasonably priced, food service quick, beautifully presented and delicious. The staff just add to the ambience, attentive, informative and friendly. Boom was our waiter of the evening and he went above and beyond. The views stretch out for miles taking in the beauty and contrast that is Chiang Mai.

I have lived in Chiang Mai for the last 3 months. I like to visit the local places to get a feel of what's happening and this place is so amazing! I feel so welcome and they have amazing wine and food! The music is great and the pool is beautiful! I highly recommend it. As for "Boom" to be your waiter when you come in. He's handsome, and fun!

Rise is the epitome of rooftops bars in Chiang Mai. The bartenders make the best cocktails in the city, they play deep house music and the view is awe inspiring. You can never go wrong with a place that serves popcorn with your drinks and randomly hands out smoked salmon pizza!
Great place to chill and relax in CM with friends. Boom was very polite and accommodating. Good drinks! Lots of booze.
Went there with three kids. Staff super friendly and food excellent. Had pizza, pasta and salad. All were licking good :)

Had a lovely meal in Italics this week. The staff were friendly, the restaurant setting was lovely and the food was spectacular. I think it was the best carbonara I've ever eaten, calamari starter was beautiful and the price was very reasonable. Easy to give this place 5 stars as it's a touch of class.
Best Pizza in Chiangmai is here !! Lovely Staff are always happy and friendly. Would strongly recommend this restaurant!

We went for happy hour drinks with friends at Rise bar and it was fantastic! It has the most amazing view of the sun setting over the mountain and the 2 for 1 drinks make the view even better. Boom (our waiter) was the best!
Great rooftop bar with amazing cocktails. I recommend the Fireball and the Margerita! Ask for Boom, he is the man!

The restaurant was not very big but the ambiance, staff and food were superb! The restaurant serves fusion Italian and Thai dishes. Highly recommend gnocchi and mushroom truffle Risotto, the serving of truffle was generous, it is a must try item for truffle lovers!
Was very good, service was fast & efficient Meals were served quickly, lovely customer service & very good prices. Will be back!
So impressive about staff with friendly service. Recommend to order Pizza Parma Ham which very good taste. Place is decorate so nice with good atmosphere.

My girlfriend and I booked into the Akyra Manor Hotel our visit to Chiang Mai. We dined at the Italics restaurant and loved the food and the service was outstanding. We tried several Thai dishes which were all amazing. We met the head chef, whose name is Base, and arranged to have a cooking lesson with him. What a memorable experience! He took us to the market which was sooo big with fresh vegetables, meats, fruits.... That alone was incredible. We chose the dishes we wanted to learn how to cook. It was great and the food we made was wonderful. Base is a terrific teacher with lots of patience and he even emailed us the recipes. I can't say enough about the food and the service. When I visit Chiang Mai in the future I would book the Akyra Manor and dine at Italics. Base is an excellent head chef and well as professional and fun. Read less

This place is an absolute winner...from the service, the decor, the food...Everything about this restaurant and staff deserves a mention. The food is absolutely 1st class and we ate here multiple times. Everything on the extensive menu is worthy of mention and the the Melbourne trained Head chef Phubase (BASE) is exceptionally talented and if you have the opportunity (make time....believe me) Take a personal cooking lesson with him. You can book this through reception. .We initially were going to book somewhere else and we are so pleased we decided to stay in-house and have this experience with Base, It was so worth it..(I would love another) He is meticulous with his preparation prior to your personal class and takes the time to ask your preference in food...how spicy etc....then he personally takes you to the market, whereby you then pick all of your ingredients (a great experience on its own) Once done..its back to the kitchen where he demonstrates cooking each dish....then guides you through to cook each one yourself....Then you get to sit and eat your own feast....Outstanding!!!! Treat yourself....You definately will not be disappointed Read less

Had an amazing last night in Chiang Mai here! Great cocktails up on the roof (would recommend the passion fruit mojito!), followed by a delicious Italian meal! I had the pesto pasta and it was honestly delectable! Would definitely recommend!

As we were just passing by we decided to have lunch at Italics, Fantastic food and good service. Being vegetarian there were good options. Staying in chiang mai we absolutely recommend this restaurant.
Some of the most amazing food ever. Breakfast is fantastic and they always give you fruit to start with in the mornings. Everything on the menu is a beyond belief winner.
This place is an experience with beautiful aesthetic and attention to detail. Food was delicious and fresh. They didn't dry the chicken and the pesto is yummy.
Special night for us, very nice set up and nice view, good service, awesome food, and good price...definitely we will back soon.

Just went to this restaurant with 2 friends last Sunday. It is on nimmarnhemin soi 9 in Akyra hotel. Pizza is the best I never has in Chiangmai. Restaurant is beautiful decoration and modern. Friendly staff. We will be back next week.
Fantastic atmosphere. Great food, i really love homemade gnocchi potato.Excellent service with attentive, friendly staff. Great ambiance and decor. Highly recommended.
I highly recommend iItalian restaurant nice atmosphere great service great food. Great experiance in Chiagamai we will coming back.
Very good taste with great dining atmosphere. Staff service was great at all. Definitely come back again. Enjoyable and would like to recommend!!!
Great restaurant, the food is really good and the people are very friendly. Nice atmosphere ... the appitizers were very good but also the pizza and pasta's

I was having diner with my family (3 teenage kids) at the restaurant and we enjoyed it so much. The choices are many and the calzone is sumptuous. Although a burger was not on the menu, the kitchen immediately offered "we make one for you!". Nice atmosphere either inside or outside on the porch.

We wanted a change from Thai food, so using Tripadvisor we noticed this restaurant not too far from our hotel, so it was worth going to. First of all the decor is great and very unique, the lighting and table stands out, yet subtle. The service was great, very polite, they were very observant when you needed their attention. We are both vegetarian, but there was plenty to eat, we get many up-market Italian restaurants in the UK and this was up there with them, the food was really good. They served complimentary break, butter and oil, this was nice and soft. We then got two mains and shared, Homemade Potato Gnocchi and the Vegetarian Pizza. The gnocchi was really good, the truffle made it stand out, the pizza was also very good, really thin crust, both were flavoursome. The thing that stood out the most was the "Mellow Mango" dessert we both had. I don't really have a massive sweet tooth, but this was the right level of sweet, but yet so light, I literally wanted another one! (I have even emailed to ask for the recipe, as I loved it that much). Overall it was pricey for Thailand, but the food, service and atmosphere made up for all of that. Read less

Service excellent. Wood-fired Bolognese and mushroom pizza tasty with dense, stretchy cheese and rich earthy wild mushrooms. Lasagna with Thai minced pork comforting but lacks an edge or spice or something I expect in a beef lasagna. Wine was great, will return to try the signature cocktails.
Great food, good service. Couldn't ask for more! I especially like the pizza from wood fire oven. Totally recommend when you are in Chiang Mai.
Superb deco, food, drinks and welcoming staff offering best service, we will always be back while in Chiangmai for sure, even stay if not fully booked like today.

I decided to give this restaurant a go as my favorite Italian restaurant in this hip and trendy area was no longer in business. Based on the number of reviews and positive feedback I was looking forward to dining here. Easy to get to using Uber. Very impressive curb appeal as we walked up and in. Greeted by a lovely hostess and taken to a table. Beautifully decorated interior, very modern looking. Menus presented quickly and the choices were sufficient for both Italian cuisine and Thai for those who were not Farangs. Non alcoholic drinks were very good, I had had enough beer at home so that was out while dining. The wine list was O.K. but man some of those prices for a bottle were staggering. I know the taxes on importing wines to Thailand is high but this place seems have passed all of off on its customers to maximize profit. On to the food where there were lots of positives but one major miss which ruined the whole dining experience for me. We ordered a small plate of cold cuts and cheese, wow very delicious and enough for two people, the spicy red seafood soup which was nothing more than a small bowl of soup not at all spicy and only a few small pieces of seafood plus one shrimp, the sea bass which turned out to be the highlight dish of the evening and the Italian Sausage pizza. The salumi plate came and we were maybe two minutes into eating it when the server brought the pizza. WTF, are you serious, we are eating our appetizer and still have a soap coming. Take it away but I knew what was going to happen and sure enough it did. After our soup the server brough the sea bass entre and returned with the pizza. Yep, the very same one I send back now brought back to the table. The crust was now soggy, the oil from the sausage had congealed, the entire pizza was only lukewarm, yuck. This place instead of realizing they had made a mistake and prepared a new pizza had simply put the original pizza under some heat lamps and served it once again. That one event turned me off and dispite good service, good location, decent prices for the food and a few hits with our food I would not revisit. Read less

Having had a few catastrophic cocktails thrown together for me in Chiang Mai, wandering into the Rise cocktail bar was a smart move. A rooftop bar with some charming views of the mountains to the northwest of the city, by happy accident I arrived during happy hour (5:30 - 6:30) and had two expertly mixed classics. Staff were very friendly and forgiving of my non-existent Thai. Light bar snacks thrown in for free. Stayed far longer than intended - a classy way to start a night in this city!

Excellent restaurant, very good service. Kind and friendly to kids, our 8 old son didn't find something he wants from the menu and the chef came to the table and offers him something that he likes and he made it especially for him.

We hesitated to go sice our hotel was quite far away, but we decided to give it a go in the last minute, and Im really happy we did. The food was amazing, me and my girlfriend tried both thai- and italian food, and I have to say its the best thaifood I've eaten so far in Thailand.

This was our most expensive meal in our nine days in Chiang Mai. My wife had chicken fried rice and I had a pizza. We drank three small bottles of beer and the total bill was nearly 1200 baht. I could possibly understand the price if it was an exceptional meal but it was average. A better and cheaper pizza meal can be found at Dukes in the Maya shopping centre and you get a view across the city. A small bottle of beer is priced at 150 baht. This would be ok for a large bottle but for a small bottle the price is excessive On reflection I think this restaurant justifies its high pricing by pretentiousness with an Italian style and good background music. Overall our experience was a disappointment and a better meal for a lower price can be had elsewhere Read less
It is a good place to chill out... Beautiful lighting. Staffs are very attentive! Mango passionfruit panacotta is best! We really enjoyed!
We stayed at this hotel and had breakfast at the restaurant also had dinner a few times great food and great staff a must do in Chiangmai
From soup to nuts (even though we had neither soup nor nuts) everything was delectable. I have never had gnocchi this good in my life. 1/3 of US prices. Twice as good
Very nice rooftop bar with a great view of the city and mountain. Pool is next to bar, very trendy design!
Amazing view of the city and great drinks! Go up to the 8th floor and ask for Boom and Tong. They will take care of you.
Had so much fun at this roof top bar! Not overcrowded like many places. Great environment, great prices, great service.
Easily the best bar in Chiang Mai. Great environment with the music, great view looking out at Wat Phra That Doi Suthep, and great service. Coming from the US, we felt right at home!
Even better than some michelin restaurants in Italy(rome and milano). The Thai food here is amazing.
Delicious, thin crust pizza! One of the top pizzas I have had! They also served homemade breads with a homemade pesto which was amazing. Highly recommend!

I am a pizza lover and have had a lot of pizza at home in Canada but this place was seriously the best I have ever had! The complementary bread and homemade pesto was also amazing! I would definitely get to this place in Chaing Mai!
This rooftop bar is one of the best in ninman. Gorgeous view of the sunset over the mountaintop. Also great happy hour and friendly service. Recommended!

Was nervous to try Italian food in Chiang Mai but I'm glad I did. They had their own little twist. The pesto pasta with prawn was recommended and I was not let down. They have the best panna cotta around. Please try it! So creamy. Awesome views and the staff really take good care of you.
Excellent food and lovely service! The portion sizes were huge and great value, highly recommend this restaurant.

We are locals. Phubase, the chef, again surprised us with outstanding quality food, and the service is excellent. Italics accept reservations online and answer promptly (WOW!). They always give gracious cheese toppings, the food is presented very nicely. The only minimally odd thing is that their benches at the restaurant tables inside are so low, that your face almost touches your plate if you are a short person, like myself. Higher cushions would do the trick, I think. Thanks, Italics!

We had one of the best dinners in Chiang Mai! The service was a bit slow (although our server was extremely nice and we did get a free baked oyster appetizer dish), the kitchen seemed to be overwhelmed! The food itself was very very very good! We ordered the burrata to start (our server mistakenly ordered the Scallops, which she ended up giving to us for free and were so good!), my wife ordered the gnocchi which were phenomenal and I ordered the lasagna. I had to order some tomato sauce because I thought it was a little dry, this made it out of this world. The chilean wine we ordered was amazing! Great value. Overall, we were very happy with our experience. We would definitely come back on our next trip to Chiang Mai. Read less

Very good restaurant with excellent service and great food. We have been here many times before and the restaurant is very stable. We keep on getting the best food and service that we are used to since the beginning.
I was there for a vacation, found this best because of my friends. Pizzas here are the best i have ever experienced in Thailand. The staffs were very nice , specially the Chef.

Located on the rooftop of the chic Akyra Hotel is the tastefully furnished Rise Rooftop Bar. A great spot for a romantic interlude or a get together with friends. A great selection of cocktails and food to enjoy while enjoying the distant views of The Nimman area of Chiang Mai. I'm definitely coming here for their sunset hour next time I come to Chiang Mai

Just had a very tasty lunch. Went with the ex-pat ladies of Chiang Mai. (20) The veggie menu was very nice, Shared (4) bowls of salad and another of gnocchi. We all said that if we had a choice we would not of shared because they were so tasty. The pizza was a very nice size. The staff are helpful and friendly, all the ladies gave a thumbs up 👍🏼. It's in a good position between Nimmanhaemin and Sirimangkalnajan Roads. In walking distance from Maya Mall and Kad Suan Kaew Shopping Centres.

A rooftop bar that offers the probably most expensive martinis in town (390$) and puts only a third of the amount of the standard recipe requested gin. That's what we traditionally call a rip off. So if you like lukewarm sugarsweet vermouth for the price of a whole dinner for two, welcome to join the club.

I got a chance to dine at Italics & Rise at Akyra Manor Chiang Mai while I was staying at the property during my two week holiday. The food is lovely specially the non vegetarian picks. The food was presented in a lovely manner and tasted great with generous servings. Paste is a must try and so the coffee ice cream.

Read a few other reviews before deciding on Italian food in Chiang Mai and was not at all disappointed. Pizza was a wonderful crisp firm crust with numerous toppings available. Pastas were cooked perfectly and sauces all very tasty. Ravioli with Edamame in particular was nice. For dessert try the Mango panna cota or the tiramisu both very well done. Worth the visit.

I was staying at the hotel and since the breakfast service was so amazing and the food to die for, I decided to give it a go for dinner as well... was not disappointed. Service was just as professional and attentive as during breakfast. Food was simply amazing... Honest, authentic food in a very stylish locale. Must try.

In terms of restaurant facilities and taste quality, this is a must go place if you are staying in chiang mai and your palette has been tired if the thai flavor. The seafood pizza, the rissotto and the thai lemon tea taste exactly the same as what you would have expected from high end italian restaurant in metropolitan around the world! Enjoyed it a lot. But am disappointed at the choice if rice for rissotto. Its not exactly italian rice, texture just like ordinary thai rice. Doesnt have al dent texture at all. Would have expected more given this price in chiang mai. Maybe its a fusion? I am not sure. The bread was good too. Its sift inside and crispy outside. If its served on olive oil plus vinegar instead of mint that would be fantastic. Service was good. Attentive on details on serving the food in our needs. One thing can improve was, because we went un over lunch, would have wished the waiter to have shown us option to set lunch an d tea set instead of just the a la carte menu... was but surprised to see the set lunch menu in the doorway only when we left. Decoration was excellent! Definitely worth spending a night on it. Read less
Everything was on point, the soups, the salads, the pork chops, the cute waitresses, the lighting, the vibe. the complete dinning experience!

ขอเขียนรีวิว 3 ส่วนใหญ่ๆ ( สถานที่ - บริการ - อาหาร ) "สถานที่" หาง่าย รถแดง อูเบอร์ ต่างก็รู้จัก แถมพูดติดปากว่า "ร้านที่ดาราๆ ชอบไปนั่งใช่ป่าว ?" ร้านตั้งอยู่ใจกลางซอยนิมมาน9 ซอยทั้งซอย มีร้านรวงสุดฮิป ร้่นนั่งชิล หรือบาร์ฝั่งตรงข้าม เพราะงั้น ไปร้านนี้ ก็สามารถเดินไปหาร้านนั่งฟังเพลงถัดไปได้ ทำเลคุ้มมาก การตกแต่งภายใน หรูหราสมกับแบรนด์โรงแรมหรูไซด์เล็ก ( Small luxury hotel ) มีให้เลือกทั้งแบบแอร์คอนหรือออลเฟรชโก้ด้านนอก ใช้โทนสีดำเป็นสีหลักในการตกแต่ง ขับความรู้สึกแบบ italian fine dinning ได้ดีมากๆ นอกจากเป็นร้านที่เหมาะกับทุกโอกาส พาใครไปเดท ก็มั่นใจได้ว่า โรแมนติกใช่ย่อย น้อคใจแฟนคุณได้ชัวร์ๆ ครับ "บริการ" คุณแป๋ม ( ป้ายชื่อเขียนว่า Pam ) คือดาวเด่นของร้าน ชอบที่น้องสามารถแนะนำเมนูได้ดีมากๆ ใส่ใจต่ออาหารแต่ละจาน คุณแป๋มจะอธิบายว่า ถ้าเราสั่งตัวนี้ ควรทานคู่กับอาหารจานไหน เพราะอะไร และไม่มีการยัดเยียดขายอาหารจนอึดอัด ชอบที่น้องบอกเราว่า อย่าลืมเผื่อท้องสำหรับของหวานด้วย พนง ท่านอื่นๆ ก็น่ารัก ที่นี่ จะมีช่องว่างปล่อยให้ผมกับเพื่อนได้ทานกันเป็นส่วนตัวจริงๆ "อาหาร" เราไปถึงร้านประมาณทุ่มตรง ลูกค้ายังไม่เยอะ ทำให้เชฟใหญ่ของร้าน ( เชฟเบส ) สามารถเดินมาทักทายพวกเราได้ รู้สึกเซอร์ไพรส์กับความละเอียดของการเลือกวัตถุดิบ เช่น มะเขือเทศที่เลือกมา จะสั่งจากยอดดอย โครงการหลวง ส่วนผสมจึงสดใหม่จริงๆ อาหารที่สั่ง แนะนำโดยเชฟเบส โจทย์คือ ผมไม่ทานเนื้อสัตว์ เพื่อนผมไม่ทานเนื้อ เชฟจึงแนะนำมาให้ 4 จาน ( ผมเขียนคำแนะนำต่างๆ พร้อมภาพแล้ว ) เวลาไปร้านอาหารใหม่ๆ ผมจะเชื่อใจคนวงในมากกว่าเสี่ยงสั่งเอง และเชฟก็ไม่ทำให้ผิดหวัง ผมไม่ทราบว่าอาหารอิตาเลี่ยนขนาดแท้เป็นยังไง แต่รสชาติที่ได้ คือกลมกล่อมถูกใจคนใต้แบบผมและเพื่อนมากๆ อยากให้ลองสั่งสลัดที่ผมทาน มะเขือเทศหวานมากๆ แถมซ๊อสเพสโต้ก็เข้ากันได้ดี ยิ่งเจอชีสก้อนนุ่ม ผมนี่ ฟินลืมโลก ตัวย้อคชี่ อีกจานเด็ดที่การันตีว่า คุณจะจำร้านนี้ไปอีกนาน ย้อคชี่ที่ผมเคยทานจากร้านอื่น จะแข็งบ้าง เนื้อด้านสากบ้าง แต่ร้านนี้ น้อคผมอยู่หมัด อีกตัวคือกุ้งทอดในน้ำมันพริกเผากระเทียม เพื่อนผมบอกว่า ความหอมของกุ้ง ไม่ได้มาจากทอดน้ำมัน แต่มันหอมเหมือนผ่านการอบหรือย่างมากลายๆ ทำให้ชูโรงเด่นขึ้นมา ของหวาน เราสั่งแมงโก้พานาค๊อตต้า ผมชอบที่มันหวานพอดีคำมากๆ มะม่วงที่เลือกมา ก็หอม ขับให้เนื้อพานาค้อตติาที่เราทาน ลงตัวไร้ที่ติ ปิดจ้อบชนะใจโต๊ะผมแบบเต็มๆ ตอนเช็คบิลเห็นราคา ผมแทบช๊อค ราคาไม่ได้แพงเหมือนที่คาดการณ์ไว้ในใจ เพื่อนผมทักว่า มันน่าจะสูงกว่านี้นะ ถ้าเทียบกับอาหารต่างๆ ที่เสริฟออกมา และบริการต่างๆ ที่ทำให้ร้านนี้เป็นไฟน์ดายนิ่ง หลายๆร้านอาหารในนิมมาน มักได้ยินว่า ลองดูนะ ลองไปนะ แต่สำหรับผมและเพื่อน เห็นตรงกันว่า Italics & Rise คือเพชรยอดมงกุฎของนิมมาน Read less

I have frequented Rise Bar for the past 4 months--it is the most consistent establishment in Chiang Mai. On top of a luxury hotel, Rise Bar only seats about 20 people, so the rooftop remains casual and intimate. Sit on a soft couch overlooking Doi Suthep and sip on delicious drinks. I recommend the Sangson Whiskey Sour. 17:30-18:30 is Happy Hour buy one get one free. Staff is super friendly + free wifi. Drinks range from 150฿-220฿

Had a fantastic dinner here. The service team made us feel very welcome even our big group talked a bit loudly, sorry about that. But thank you that they're still served us as professional. Food were fabulous. Love burrata salas , beef carpaccio , larb tuna. Really went well with the house white wine And of course the thin and very crispy Hawaiian pizza. Sooooo nice. However saw previous reviews about tax and service charges, its really common if you dine in restaurants at hotel. We happy to pay anyway because everything there really perfect to us. Highly recommended !!! Will be back soon :)) Read less

We'd heard amazing things about Italics (especially the Akyra Pizza) but after the pizza's we received tonight, we feel rather let down... expensive, oily and bland. I'm sorry but I've had much better from 'chain' pizza stores at a quarter of the price? I expected more 😕Perhaps it may have been different if we were dining in? Maybe we ordered the wrong thing?

This place came well recommended, and it was indeed nice. But not as good as the raving reviews; the pizza base was not as good as it should be; wrong flower and not risen enough. Only other comment besides that: pumkin on a pizza is just a bad plan.

We had happy hour at Rise, two for one monitors that were very good, watched the sun set. The bar area is not very big, and hard to find space to move around (bar is where the swimming pool is, which has limited seating as well). We had dinner downstairs at Italics.
