Good bread with delicious pesto sauce. We split a delicious Cesar salad. I had squid no pasta with squid stuffed with sausage--very unique and tasty. I took the leftovers with me for a tasty lunch today. My husband at chicken saltimboca with rice, also very good. Not your usual Thai prices but a nice evening out and the food is worth the cost.

Nice atmosphere, decent but unremarkable pizza and good service but be prepared for bill that's 17% higher than advertised (there is a small notice only on the first page of the menu). Literally THE ONLY PLACE I'VE SEEN ACROSS DOZENS OF RESTAURANTS IN CM THAT ADDS TAX + SERVICE TO THE BILL. Complete hustle.

Firstly THANK YOU Tong(Barman at Rise) whom made the start of our evening brilliant by being so friendly and service focused while we enjoyed the spectacular views across Chiang Mai. Upon heading back down to Italics to eat again we were blown away with the service from the staff. The menu is just mouthwatering but we choose to try the Pizza after spending the past 2 weeks loving traditional Thai dishes as you should while here in Thailand. Being from Melbourne(Aust) we have the 2nd largest Italian pop out of Italy and I can honestly say that the Pizza here rivals the ones back home...delicious We will be back. Read less
We ordered Akyra pizza and Rissoto as our dinner.. the pizza is delicious and crispy The decoration is so beautiful and romantic ambience
Good pizza, I enjoyed, it was thin, with tasty cheese, the service was fast, good and chilling atmosphere.

What a fantastic find!. We read a quick review of Italics & Rise on Tripadvisor and thought we would drop in for a drink and perhaps something to eat given the great reviews. Absolutely fantastic!. We started with a few sensational cocktails on the rooftop bar Rise at dusk, what a view!. 2 hours later went down stairs to Italics for a magnificent dinner. Menu and service....faultless. Absolutely sensational!. We were so impressed by the food, service and the hotel we promptly decided to check out of where we were staying and move to the Akyra!...... LOL!.... this place is the bomb!. Can't wait to update after our stay. If you are looking for a smart cocktail with a spectacular view followed by a superb dinning experience this place would be hard to beat. Read less

This place has delicious food for both breakfast and dinner. Their Thai breakfast plates are truly some of the best, their pizzas are delicious as well as their drinks and shrimp Thai cake. Only disappointment...avoid their eggs Benedict, the rest is great.

The food here was really good, but pretty expensive. Unfortunately if you don't make a booking you're likely to be sat outside where we were a bit uncomfortable in the heat, so I'd recommend making a reservation. Unfortunately due to being outside the service was a little but sporadic and at times we were waiting for long periods to order drinks etc. Overall it was still a nice evening and as I said, the food was good.
Staff are extremely polite and attentive. Food and cocktails are delicious, we had the steak and gegetarian pizza, would definitely order again. Would recommend.

I walked in with the sign saying open and at least 8 staff members. After hearing the entire menu I was subsequently informed that the kitchen was closing for dinner prep. First rule of travel is if they cannot get their hours straight, the food is next to go. There are far better options in Chiangmai that remain open in accordance with their posted hours as well as have better reputtaions

We live in Chiang Mai and so we were looking to have a nice Easter Meal somewhere in town and we couldn't be happier with our choice, started out with the wonderful service and kind people that work here excellent plus presentation and ambience was very nice and comfortable. Food was delicious and generous portions definitely a go to place when friends come in from out of town. Highly recommended 👍🏻

Nice food and service for the first 5 minutes. For the sixth the service become rock bottom, no drink filling, food was forgot totally ignore for hour. Everything for this place are already good, food taste, location, decoration, but the service really need to focus on the customer. At the time we were there the place is half occupied, so it is no way that the kitchen is too busy.

We had an amazing evening in this wonderful restaurant. We are two backpackers from austria and we love thai food. But tonight we wanted to have something european and to treat ourselfes. Luckily we found this restaurant! The salads, which we had as starters, were fresh with a tasty seasoning, just brilliant. As main courses we had pizza and beef tenderloin. The pizza was allready great but the beef tenderloin was even better! I have rearly had such a good tenderloin. I ordered it medium and it was on point! If you go to this restaurant you can't miss the homemade lemon iced tea and the fruit sodas - they are refreshing and very tasty! I can't forget the dessert, as i'm really into chocolate and other sweet stuff. I had the chocolate lava cake and honestly - i can't describe in words how amazing it was. It tasted like heaven! The homemade coconut icecream was a blast! The prices are reasonable because all of the food is freshly made and high quality. The service and the atmosphere were brilliant! Thank you for this nice evening, we would definetly come again. :) Read less
The design of the restaurant its fantastic the service is excellent and the food was extraordinary! A little bit expensive for Chiang Mai but what you pay its what you get so 5 stars!
I had the best lychee martinis here. They were amazing and the service was also very good. Watching the sun go down was beautiful too. I definitely recommend a visit here.
A great place with an excellent view of the city and mountains. The happy hour is one of the best places in the city for the sunset along with amazing cocktails.
The food was amazing. This was our second time eating at the restaurant. Lovely staff and cozy atmosphere. I Highly recommend this place!
This place is so good! The food is great, the service is excellent and you get the food at the same time! In Thailand! What! It's no expensive at all and really good! Go here!

We had breakfast in Italics while staying at Akyra. They offer a la carte menu two dishes, they serve as buffet fruits and there is variety of bread, juices, dry fruits and salad. The restaurant is very modern with Italian cuisine and also Thai cuisine. The food was delicious and the staff also great! We tried egg benedicts with salmon, waffles with ice cream and a Thai soup. All the food was amazing!
Pizza was delicious with lots of cheese! The open chicken was very tasty and topped with yummy purple rice!

It's our last dinner in Chiang Mai after three days pleasant visiting time. It's located in the nimmanhaemin road and hidden in the themed hotel called akyra manor. We ordered the summer salad, the snow fish and the signature cocktail. All the dishes are well presented and the taste is very fresh and delicious. We like the crab meat in the salad, the crippy fish skin with the orange color source. The cocktail is a bit strong with milk flavour, the CO2 coming from the bottom. Strongly recommended for all guys and ladies.

The look of the restaurant is really nice, service quick and attentive. The pizza was very good and big, they did half and half of toppings for me, couldn't even finish it and I'm a good eater! It's a little on the expensive side, expect to pay a little over 300 bhat. Only downside i had was that i somehow got charged 90bhat for water which was just filled for me at the table so i guess each time you drink some water they charge you, or it's simply unlimited water for 90bhat? Overall a definite recommend i saw a guest put in a bespoke order to the chef too so they do try their best!

I came with my friend for happy hour time at No.8 floor Rise bar. They have a fresh cocktail, wine and friendly staff (May) He always smile and taking care of me and my friends. I recommended for every one who would like to enjoy drink before dinner....come come come

This hotel and roof top bar is a refreshing experience after staying in the old city of Chiang Mai before hand. Being from the U.S you get a little spoiled so this was a nice change in the middle of our stay. Great cocktails and happy friendly staff.

Italics is a great choice if you fancy some italian food. The pizzas are delicious and so are the pastas. Service is very friendly and quick. The ambient is classy but not too posh. Prices are a bit higher but fair.
Excellent service, friendly staff, delicious food in an amazing location with great view from the roof top bar. Totally reccomend.

We were a table of 6 friends. We have heard about this restaurant long time ago but just had a chance to visit this time we were in Chiangmai and it's worth the experience. Lucky that we ordered many dishes to share for variety of tasting. The service is superb and decoration makes you feel artistic relaxing, most of all those delicious dishes convinced us to go back again.
The best steak in town. Tomatoes is super sweet. Wonderful staff and very handsome chef. Must come back.
Fantastic Italian restaurant in a heart of Nimman. Pesto with prawn pasta is the best in town, along with fresh salad for this summer.
A great spot to watch the sunset with a cocktail, the staff is attentive. Need to take the elevator up to the 8th floor of the Akyra.
We loved akyra!!! Super festive and great Italian food - feels like your in Italy!! Great place to stop by if your in the area :)

A wonderful and perfect experience at Italic Restaurant. The taste is authentic and delicious! The Mango Panna Cotta is very perfect! Mango, passion fruit and panna cotta well integrated with each other. If you go to Chiang Mai, you must go to this restaurant and try the food, drink and desserts. I think you will enjoy them very much!
Fantastic food, fresh products. I ordered a burrata salad to start with and I felt like I was in Italy. Nice and relaxing atmosphere. Recommended.

My wife and I chanced up this hidden gem of a restaurant while on a date night in a trendy area of Chiang Mai. The servers all spoke english and they were always ready to help you if you looked their way. And yet, I didn't feel overly pampered. My wife and I could enjoy a quiet conversation while we shared a Parma Pizza and Garden Greens salad. Excellent food. The chef even came out on my request and we chatted about how he could prepared the soft carrots to add to the salad. After dinner, we took the lift up to the roof for a coffee and more relaxing conversation. The bartenders were friendly and even remembered our names form the last time we were in a couple of months earlier! The only downside would have to be that the evening we were on the rooftop, one of the farang guests had his feet up on a sofa arm, which, in Thailand is considered impolite. But I cannot say anything bad about the staff. It has now become our favorite date night dining spot. Read less
I had a tuna tartar, too spicy for me, but very tasty. The atmosphere of the local is pretty cool and sophisticated. I recommend!

We arrived for happy hour sunset drinks and were greeted by a bar filled with helpful, polite staff. The happy hour is buy one get one free on many drinks from 5.30-6.30pm, some lovely complimentary tasters were also offered. We will definitely be back during the rest of our trip.
Had a great experience. The wait staff was very attentive! Would definitely recommend to anyone! We had the diavola pizza and the beef Ragu raviolis. They were phenomenal!
Great cocktails ! Great mojitos Passion'ista! Happy hour from 5.30 to 6.30 pm ! Nice view ! Nice staffs !
Nice view and service ! Happy hour good deal 5.30-6.30 pm. and awesome Cocktails ! Special mention for the lychee martini ;) Very good staff and welcome ! Good roof top to enjoy chiang mai !

We've found this cool place on Tripadvisor and gave it a go during our Chiang Mai trip. Had a very nice meal in the restaurant - the homemade potato gnocchi and the parma ham pizza were both delicious and the fried sticky rice balls with mango and coconut ice cream gave it a nice finish. The rooftop bar is also amazing with a good view of the city, there is a fantastic see-through pool and some great deals on cocktails. Worth a visit!

Came here tonight with my friend, warm welcome from the staff (especially Pam and May who were lovely and couldn't do enough to help), we sat at the rooftop bar, had two brilliant cocktails - mojito and strawberry daiquiri which were the best we have ever tried! The food was lovely - lasagne and Italian sausage pizza (huge portions!). This is a must for anyone in Chiang Mai, you won't be disappointed!

Visited Italics with my wife (who dislike non asian food). However, the food here was amazing, far above expectation. My wife and I were impressed with the Prawn Aglio Appetiser & Spicy Tomato Seafood soup. The parma ham pizza bread was delicious as well. The Lamb Loin with baby potatoes was nicely done. I practically wiped cleaned the entire plate of it. Next came the panna cotta, the sourness of the passionfruit, the sweetness of the mango, nicely complimented each other with the panna cotta. Definitely a must try to end your meal with. The head chef was very friendly and proactive. He would be out in the dining area making sure us as customers were happy with the food he prepared. His frontline service staffs were attentive as well, promptly changing our serviceware for different courses. 1 most impressive thing to comment is that we were joking with the head chef about my wife was interested in the french toast from the breakfast menu. He actually surprised us with a nicely done up french toast as another dessert for us. 5 stars for food. 5 stars for service. 5 stars for the wonderful experience! Read less
Lovely place for a slice of luxury:) friendly staff, good music, beautiful view. Comfortable couches:)
Beautiful view, great architecture, excellent service, nice music, perfect drinks. We enjoyed a lot to came here. Perfect place yo chill out

Quite a small hotel but packed with modernity and style. My well designed room had an extremely comfortable bed and I they provided me with a nightly cocktail mix in the room so I could become my own personal mixologist. Breakfast in Italics was a great mix of healthy fayre and personal service if you want anything off the menu, such as my egg white omelette....well cooked and well delivered.

Pretty nice restaurant and atmosphere. Just like other comments here that you can probably find a good one with lower price but I think it's still worth to come. You can find Thai food here also but we are not sure if it's traditional ones. Will recommend to anyone who is a bit tired of thai food of the flavor or spicy.

Nice restaurant with good selection of wines i love this place whenever i come with my friends and family. this restaurant always make me full and happy. Australian beef steak and Pama ham pizza with a glass of red wine is my favorite order. Staff are nice & very friendly(Pam and Pang) they look professional as well. If you are looking for the best restaurant in town here it is!

Great service, good food and cocktails, Tong is a great bar man and host! Our friends and I go here all the time and we love the atmosphere! Always come for happy hour from 5:30-6:30 and watch the sunset!

Everything here is great. We tried pizza and pasta and both were delicious. Beautiful environment, kind waiters and and in the end you get free dessert from the chef! The best restaurant in Chiang Mai and maybe in whole Thailand too.

I visited italics restaurant and i was surprised by their food . The staff is so kind, the decoration is so good and their pastas is so delicious !!!!! If i came back to chiang mai i would definitely visit italics restaurant again 😃

We ate at the place twice!! And both times it was great! It is high quality italian food at the price of pizza hut! The stuff was very kind and they treated us with much care! I would totally recommended it to everyone!

Went to Italics & Rise and was really impressed!! Great food & beverages menus. My wife's Pizza was awesome and for my meat was terrific. We even met the Executive Chef Mr. Phubase who came to talk at our table... always appreciate to Chef on the restaurant floor and talking to the guest. Service was also really attentive and nice to see smiles all the time. I don't travel often to Chiang Mai but definitely this restaurant is really a place i will recommend to anyone being in the city. Also the hôtel Akyra Manor is the best one in Chiang Mai.

Took my parents for their wedding anniversary. Had a fantastic dinner, mixed thai and Italian food, both very delicious and the chef even prepared some free dessert for my parents! After dinner we enjoyed some cocktail at the stylish rooftop bar with great view over chiangmai. Had some of the best cocktails in my life there... Will surely come back and highly recommend this place. Prices may not be cheap for Thailand but it's worth every baht. Topclass!

Great sunset cocktails for happy house. From 5:30 to 6:30 you get buy one get free all cocktails. Tong and Mae, the waiter and bartender, were so nice. Would highly recommend coming here for a nice sunset view and delicious cocktails.
A classy resturant with great service that speaks great english. I'm not a pizza kind of guy, but the one i tried here where really good, and very hearty. Would recommend whole heartedly.

We visited Italics restaurant and Rise rooftop bar on our last night in Chiang mai and what a perfect way to end the trip! Every single member of staff gave exceptional service and couldn't do more for you, the food was absolutely fantastic and there is so much to choose from on the menu. To top the night off, a drink in the Rise rooftop bar just made it for us! I really can't recommend this place enough, it's a must do! For how good this place is, it is incredible value for money! Thank you so much for the perfect evening!

The ambiance is everything; Beautiful place. It's Italian, with a spin of Thai. The staff is extremely nice and speaks great English, which is convenient for me. Ordered a mango strawberry and tangerine smoothie and it was great. More than enough food too

Excellent view of the city with delicious drinks. Passionista drink was tastiest. Had dinner at the italics restaurant the night before and the wine, pasta, and pizza made for a delicious night out in Chaing Mai!

It's so many times we have been in Chiang Mai but this is our first time to visit here at Italics & Rise Restaurant. Of course it's easy for finding something to eat but it's not to easy for finding something different in Chiang Mai. I think this restaurant will meet you if you are looking for something exotic ....

We had the chance to go twice. Brunch time and dinner. Both was top. Pancakes, waffle just like at home. At dinner time we enjoy the cocktails list. Delicious pasta and risotto. The kids enjoy the pizza, I had the rib eye and was cooked perfectly. Service was very attentive to the customers. Make you feel well welcome.
One of the best place we been in chiang mai. Food cocktails service was the best we had in our trip. So bad that was our last day in chiang mai.thanks a lot to the team. See you soon.
Very nice place! Good food and perfect environment. The people serving are nice and fast, the food comes very quickly and are tasty as it bests!!!

After a while in Thailand you just want to eat something that taste more similar to what you have in your hometown. For this reason we choose a more modern and western environment. We could not choose better. The restaurant itself is quite small, the music is good, waiters are efficient. Excellent food, fare prices for the foods. The beverages in the other hand are expensive. I had a great meal, we even received a complimentary deserve after our meal... everything tasting delicious. After living this restaurant tonight I can say that is the best I had in Thailand.

What a talented chef there is in residence at this lovely and uniquely decorated restaurant at The Akyra Manor Hotel. The beef ravioli with a light cream sauce, flavoured with truffles and mushrooms was so light and delicious and the salad I had as a starter had tiny Japanese tomatoes that are now cultivated in the surrounding mountains to the city. This was my first time to eat them and I have to say they were absolutely delicious. I also happened to notice that a very nice bottle or 2014 Merlot can be had for just THB950 which is remarkable and such a fashionable venue
We stayed at the hotel so enjoyed the amazing breakfast each day. Evening cocktails to watch the sun go down were a highlight of the day!!

Some friends and I stopped by this rooftop bar and had a wonderful evening. With comfortable furniture nestled next to a transparent pool, with the mountains in the background, the setting here is calm and beautiful. Their happy hour was a great deal, and each cocktail I sampled was just delicious. The staff was really nice too. Definitely worth a trip!!

It was an awesome place to chill out for drinks, pasta and pizza! The atmosphere was great and service was good :) I had Margherita pizza and Strawberry italian soda, it was delicious! I will visit the restaurant again.

After doing mae hong son loops with my friends we decided to go for something nice for dinner on our last day in chiang mai. I have to say we have the best meal in chiang mai, The gnocchi with truffle cream was hand down the best i ever had! The chef is so passionate in what he does and it shows in every single dishes. A must to visit if you are in chiang mai!!!

Nice furnished rooftop bar with cozy sofas, a transparent swimming pool, a nice view on Doi Suthep and absolutely great staff. Best place in Chiang Mai to sit and relax with friends, enjoy a glass of wine or a great cocktail.

Excellent Italian food!!! We heard this famous restaurant, Italics from our local friends in Changmai. We were a group of 5, so we ordered all kinds of food. Pizza was our first picked-half parma ham with rocket salad and the other half was salami and cheese which tasted so juicy delicious. Pasta Anchovy was my favorite, "Yummy". YumSteak was also everyone's favorite- The combination of the northern and Italic's style. Quality beef steak! The last one was the Garlic Shrimp- Spanish style?, but amazing for us that we shared. Oh! do not forget the desert... we ordered a small combination of tiramisu, **panna cotta with passionfruit**, cheese cake, and another slice dish of mango. we all Love the moment of sharing the delicious food together. Thanks you all the chefs at Italics. We will definitely COME BACK. Read less

Visit Italics & rise with my wife. We really enjoy the place. Great welcome. All the staff are very attentive to us. Great selection of cocktails. We ate the pizza and the seafood pasta. Was to die for. Thanks for all the team.

Been there with 4 friends. Great welcome by the girl at the entrance with a big smile. Start with the food. The pesto seafood pasta are so yummy. Pizza with a reel crust thin and crunchy. The italics burrata salad and summer salad was perfect. Superb drink list and cocktails. True Italian cuisine with a excellent service. 3 days left in Chiangmai and will Definitely visit this place again. Read less

I recently stayed at this lovely hotel and was blown away by the great food and service. The food preparation by the Italics restaurant staff was simply amazing. The head chef puts in a lot of detail in the food and the taste is even better. Chef Base even took time out of his busy schedule to ask me how the food was and if there are any improvements that the restaurant could make to it's food and menu selections. The fact that he took the time to ask me impressed me and better yet...it will leave a good lasting impression on me. I personally told him all the meals I had during my 3 night stay were fantastic especially the breakfast entrees,pastas, and Pizza. I am a Canadian who has traveled all around Southeast Asia and now work and live in Seoul,Korea. This is the best thin crust pizza I've had since I left Canada 5 years ago and definitely the best I had in Asia hands down. I personally recommend the Parma ham pizza... but the others are just as tasty as well. Eating at the Italics restaurant was definitely one of the highlights of my trip to Chaingmai. I will definitely be back and will highly recommend this hotel and restaurant to others. Keep up the excellent work! See you soon Read less

Four of us were headed here for dinner, and we were enthralled when we saw the open air bar on the 8th (top) floor of this hotel/ restaurant. There is also a swimming pool with a glass front on the top floor. We enjoyed the great drinks (slightly pricey, as you'd expect) and service. Two people in our group are vegetarians and there were enough selections for everyone to be happy. I ordered the Caesar salad with chicken. Additionally it had several nice pieces of crispy bacon in it that were delicious. My husband loved his handmade ravioli. All the dishes came with a little side of shaved or grated cheese, depending on what was appropriate for the dish.
Highly recommended. Great ambience food and service. Cosmopolitan area in Nimman Chiang Mai. Good wine list with a good Cape Mentelle house red.
We had an amazing time seated on the beautiful terrace in the middle of nimman road. Pizza were especially good and service remarkable . We will definitely come back. Great job italics team

We are a friend family group of 5 that stayed at the Akyra hotel for 4 days in Chiang Mai. The food at Italics Restaurant was fantastic! We loved the breakfast menu which is different than most Asian hotels that have huge buffets. Chef Base created a choice breakfast menu that we delighted in choosing hot entrees, eggs, omeletes, veggies, waffles, fruit, etc. Each morning you are greeted with a beautiful tier platter of fruit, breads, and a special treat created by Chef Base. I always looked forward to the special item each morning on the tray because it's a great way to get to taste Chef's creativity. Then you order your desired entree for your liking. The coffee is outstanding at Italics. That seems like a given for good restaurants, but it's not. Chef Base specially selects the coffee for the restaurant as well. I didn't need to go out and find a good coffee after breakfast each day. My family loved the waffles, eggs benedict with salmon or bacon, and the beautiful poached eggs on toast. The dinner menu is just as impressive as the breakfast. We ordered off of every menu over the course of our trip and everything was very good, from the Thai specialty dishes to the pizza and appetizers. I also love the drinks at the pool bar on floor 8. The best Collins I've ever had! Special thanks to the staff and Chef Base, we will be back for more delicious food at Italics. Read less

After days trying amazing and spicy Thai food, our bodies needed a break to return to better known taste territories! The food, the service and the place were really good. It's definitely an upscale place with prices you would encounter in a low budget place in Europe. A very good deal indeed. Special Kudos to the service, all smiling, attentive and well trained. If you need a break don't hesitate.
One of the better experiences in Chiang Mai. Dishes where great, service excellent. Highly recommended if you want to have a quality night out.

After dining at various tradition and stylised Thai restaurants this Italian restaurant (with a touch of Thai fusion) is a refreshing break. Nice atmosphere and great attentive waitstaff. The combination of Thai ingredients on pizza's and salads was defiantly something new. Their selection of cocktails are also a must try.

We enjoyed so much at Italics restaurant located at luxury akyra hotel, the service was great as a fine dining restaurant in Europe.., and surprisingly by the food , its much better than expectation... Very high standard and the price is not expensive tho, compare to what you get, and yet they also have a hidden rooftop bar for you after the meal to visit... Good job

This is my second time dining at Italics. Food, services, everything is great! Even greater! If you are looking for Italian fine dining with surprisingly reasonable price. Italics should be the top of your list. We ordered Mushroom risotto, Mushroom Ghocchi and Summer Salad - all dishes were so nicely seasoned and balanced in flavor. My favorite is the Gnocchi so rich in flavor of mushroom. Definitely coming back!!
We were looking for some western food and found this on TripAdvisor near our hotel. Everything tasted soooo yummy. Pizza, soup and desert. Waitstaff was very nice and honest. Wish we could go again.
So nicely pizza pasta and strawberry crazy ! I love it And cozy restaurant .. 😋I and my family enjoyed so much tim here , the place to visit. When you arebin chiang mai
This place is located in the most convenient area. Rise has a charming view of Chiang Mai and very friend staffs. Pizza at Italic is also very testy.

Having been in Thailand for a couple of weeks, we were craving some variety of cuisine. We came to italics to have pizza & calamari... and also had to try their Khao Soi. We LOVED the beverage selection, wines, food and dessert. Would definitely come back again.... very soon!
We ate here on our anniversary and were not disappointed. Lovely food and cocktails and the staff were super friendly!

My wife and I went here to kick off our anniversary weekend and it was a fabulous way to start things off. The food was stellar! Full of flavor. The kind of place when you take a bite and pause to enjoy it. Totally worth going!
Chef Base and the Italics staff were amazing. Breakfast was delicious and dinner was amazing! Thanks
The venue is nice but the food was just so so. Everything was quite bland but perhaps the place is better known for pizza, which we didn't have. Quite expensive for the quality too.

We had a royal experience at Italics with Chef Phubase and his wonderful staff!!!! We came in for dinner our first night in town and it was a show stopper! The arugula and prosciutto salad was refreshing after our hot day and the balsamic gelée was on point in the salad, the gnocchi was like pillows of heaven, the main coarse of fish cooked to perfection and paired well with the wine we had! Enjoying our dinner so much we signed up for the chefs cooking class on Saturday! The class started with a trip to the local market where chef explained different fruits and veg, showed us coconut processing, and guided us around the market! Back at the restaurant we had his personal attention while he showed us how to make our lunch which was a buffet of Thai cuisine. An experience to never forget could not recommend italics enough!!!!! Read less

Great impressions first on. Right underneath Akyra manor and entry is from either the hotel or directly from the road. Welcomed us right away and I was surprised that there were only two groups here considering it's ranking so far up. The main lady was extremely friendly and always liked to smile with the kids antics. Carpaccio was brilliant; starters and drinks came very early on. They realised we lived the bread they gave us so they ended up giving the kids another two free of charge. I wanted to order another carpaccio but the waiter promptly told me I had already ordered a calzone, which of course was lovely but I didn't realise was so massive. Plus we got free desert for writing a review :) Definitely recommend especially if you're in the area Read less

Having heard many good comments about this restaurant 5 of us went on Monday 16th January. We did not book abd had a e0 minute wait. Italics is part of a hotel and is midway down Nimmerheiman Soi 9. It has a car park at the side and also in the basement. Style is modern contemporary with the restaurant overtaken by huge candelabra possibly a few to many. On the 8th floor top there is a sky bar. We went to the bar with extensive cocktail and wine list while we waited for the table. Drinks slightly above average prices waiter service. Our table was ready in 20 mins we went back down to the 1st floor. Extensive menu we ordered and the drinks and starters appeared quickly. The main courses 4vpizza and one pork chop took for ever. Nearly 1.5 hours. We complained 3 times and eventually a pleasant manager came to apologise. Discount given from bill. My advice is try it food is good would we go back well maybe. Access to restaurant is up 8 steps with no handrail very tricky. Lift access from basement. Read less
This place has attentive staff and good Italian/Thai food. I have been back twice already. Although pricy in a local context, worth it.
Excellent food. Whether you are eating at the proper restaurant or getting something at the rooftop bar from the shared kitchen, the food is delicious!

First visit to Chiang Mai and wanted a good qualityItalian meal. Searching TA this came up high on the list so gave it a try. It's upmarket fare by virtue of its hotel restaurant status, and it's pretty good , but expensive for what is is at B3800 for two. I would be surprised if there was actually an Italian chef in the kitchen , more it felt like it was more cook by numbers. The wine list was a little limited and what we wanted was not available, but luckily the second choice was decent at B1400 ++ but actually not as good as the taste we had from the ( 2 days opened ) wine by glass offering. The mushroom and truffle risotto was excellent, as was the garden green salad and the Burrata salad, but the gnocchi was too hard and the Zucchini was a disgrace, over battered and over cooked. Those two dishes almost ruined the dinner but somehow they didn't. Upmarket Italian they want to be , but some work still needed to convince us purists. However , a beautiful setting and a wonderful risotto made for a lovely evening. I hope they tweak the faults, as it is a lovely place . Read less

Great food at good price! We had a seafood pesto pizza, lamb chop and chicken breast with black garlic rice, all cooked very well and even my food-critical Italian company was very satisfied with food and wine. Good portion size. Friendly staff. Definitely worth a visit. Afterwards you can go upstairs to thei bar or just pop in one of the local bars in the same street.

in my tour for op 10 restaurants in chiang mai in last 2 months, i was at Italics 3 maybe 4 weeks ago, at lunch time with a friend. beautyful place, beautyful menu and pizza, and i like speccially the eggplant. beers little bit expensive but agrre with the place!

We booking for this hotel and go down to test food in Italics @ Akyra. Everything is great for me and decor so beautiful shop.They have little souvenir shop near restaurants and location easy to go to shopping and take it relax in nimmman road of chiangmai. We will get back soon.
Italic & Rise offers the best pizza in Chiang Mai in a classy, yet relaxed atmosphere with impeccable service and refreshing beverages.
Food is excellent in a modern stylish environment. While it specialises in Italian cooking the Asian dishes are seriously yummy.

My friends and I went to this restaurant to have dinner. We were a bit tired of thai food so decided to go for Italian food. The place was nice, with beautiful decorations, the food was really tasty and the service was excellent.

Morning breakfast starts with the chef's daily special of an authentic local thai dish, fresh fruit and croissants with endless refills:) This is to start your choice of 2 amazing light and/or decadent sweet or savory options. Rise on the rooftop offers great light bites and amazing drinks poolside with a city view and mountain tops. Who could ask for anything more?! Room service, always hit the spot. We left satiated and with smiles from every single meal.
If you're looking for a sunset view over the mountain from chiang Mai, this is your spot. Small but classy rooftop bar at the hotel.
After bkk i come to xiengmai is my first nigth here i arive very late and i find this restaurant i was have pizza magarita is was very yumy
We have had a great experience at this restaurant with great food and service. They also have good vegetarian options. Highly recommend this restaurant
The restaurant atmosphere was great with amazing design. Creative foods with very nice presentation and of course very tasty! We really enjoy it. Highly recommend to everyone!
Good food good service good and fresh pizza. Smoking is allowed outside in the terrace area. Good place to sit down and talk with friends. Quick service. Reasonable price.
Good taste and atmosphere. Nice to have dinner with family or friends. Good location with parking lot.

We had a really great time dining até this place! The pizza was really good, staff was very helpful and we loved the lava cake desert! Beverages are expensive though (the most expensive coke in Thailand), but food price is ok!

I might give out 5 stars easier than I would in the US where I am more critical. But this place was very delicious. Great options for vegetarians, as well as some very unique drinks. Specifically the Italics drink. The price is more expensive than say the little street vendor, but cheaper than any Fancy American restAurant. Loved the Chiang Rai Four Cheese pizza, as well as or Mushroom Risotto. Highly recommend to anyone.
A good combination of northern Thai and Italian recipes. Highly recommend Chiangmai salad. Good choices:)
The restaurant is luxury and the menus are reasonable price (hotel style - inc. tax and service charge). Food is clean and very tasty. Very recommend to others who love Italian Food.

Overall all the dishes we ordered were delicious! We had pizza pasta and salad and they were all so tasty. Its great to have some italian food after travelling for long in Asia! The staff were very attentive and friendly. The prices are a higher than in other restaurants, but its worth it.
The Tuna Pasta and the pizza was amazing. Best Pizza on our journey through Asia! And last but not least the staff is very very very friendly.

I know it seems odd to be rating an Italian restaurant in Chiang Mai Thailand this enthusiastically, but this lasagne was so sublime, not even sure how to start. The pasta was made in house and fresh. The local northern Thai sausage was the meat. The tomato "sauce" seemed to be simply roasted cherry tomatoes. And, then tons of cheesy goodness. The restaurant was also lovely and quirky, but still very elegant. Although I was in shorts and flip flops, I felt a little under dressed, but no one gave me a second look. This place is a must for any future visits to Chiang Mai for me! Enjoy!!! Read less

The place was not too busy on the night we went (Saturday), it is part of an upscale boutique hotel. The food is excellent with attention to details. I had Gamberi Pesto pasta and my daughter had sausage/arugula pizza. We finished the meal with Mellow Mango desert (Fresh mango with smooth coconut milk/pudding, a scoop of mango ice cream) and Americano coffee. Total bill ~1450 THB ($42 USD) can't beat it anywhere in the world for the quality food and services that we received here. Highly recommended. Read less

We had lunch at Italics and were beyond delighted! My husband and I are both of Italian descent and we couldn't believe how authentic the pizza was. The crust was thin and crunchy, yet tender and flavorful. I had the parma ham pizza, complete with a light tomato sauce, paper thin slices of prosciutto, mozzarella, arugala, freshly shaved parmesan, and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil. The cheese was melted perfectly! The other thing I loved was that the chef didn't add the arugala to the pizza right away (a common mistake resulting in wilted arugala). This arugala stayed fresh and crunchy on top of the pizza to lend a peppery note throughout. My husband had the Chiang Mai pizza with northern sausage, ham, and arugala. He loved his as well, noting the sweet and savory bites. Their wine list is also excellent. A must try! Read less

It was our first time in Chiang Mai, the restaurant made our trip better. Excellent food, excellent service, friendly people, modern architecture, etc. In the end we received a "gift" from the chef. It is one of the best restaurant in Thailand.
Views from rooftop bar were stunning, as well as the general decor. The food was delicious as were the drinks. However, the price was a bit steep with an extra service fee. Overall a great place!

First off all I will say the place looks great and the service is 5 stars. The food is 3 stars and the food prices are reasonable. What is not reasonable is 175 baht for a small beer that if you add the 17% of VAT and service charge it makes a small beer over 200 baht. That is the most expensive beer I have had in 8 years living in Thailand. OK I should have checked the prices when I was given the menu but come on..
Highly recommended restaurant, in a very nice and changing area of Chiang Mai. Very good food and wine. Super service. Hi and you will like it!
Best Italian food in Chiang Mai. And I've lived here for ten years. Service is great, food is great, and the staff is great.
Delicious meal, good service. Everything here is so nice. I love Pizza the most. Absolutely, come back next time.

We went to the roof top bar of this hotel for enjoying a drink for sunset. There is a great view on Doi Suthep and the atmosphere is very chill. After enjoying our cocktails, we decided to try the salmon tartare, the cold cuts board and few other dish. Everything was perfect, fresh and yummy ! Special Thanks to the bartender, cannot remember his name but he was knowledgeable and did an excellent service. Will definately be back on my next visit.

Amazing restaurant...so crowned that night but everything still seems so nice and very good service , everyone really took very good care of me even i was in the corner alone and didnt order much, the food was superb, italian bread with parma ham was top notch, and pasta i had beef ravioli with parmesan sauce so well balance of flavour , the taste could tell that must be a very talented chef there... So 5stars recommended
Great vibe, inventive cocktails, grand views coupled with polite, helpful and smiling staff earn 5 out of 5 stars from me!

Generally pretty quiet spot for beers and a cheeky dip in the rooftop pool. Towels provided which is great and fast wifi if youre wanting to knock out some work. Definitely a good viewpoint for sunset too ✌
Higher end pricing but a pretty unique pool! I recommend coming for a swim and sunset. Free popcorn and pork skewers was pretty ideal too

We arrived at 2pm on a Saturday and therefore there was no crowd. The staff was very attentive. We shared a pizza and it was an ample meal for 2. The Akyra pizza was very tasty with upscale ingredients on a cracker crust. The edges were crispy but the inner part was soft.

It's normal in the west they food is priced low to get people in and then rip them off with drinks. I haven't seen it in Thailand before now. Ok, the food IS good and the decor and service is great too, but the drink prices and a few other details knock it down to 4. The rooftop bar by the way has a really great bartender and although drinks were expensive there too, we had a good time. Read less

I have read from TripAdvisor so I came with my mom. I think Italics is the best Italian restaurant now in Chaingmai. Even house wine is good. I ordered Italics summer salad, the taste is good. For pasta, I ordered spicy bacon spaghetti, pasta is just right and bacon is really tasty and crispy. Try this restaurant, you won't be disappointed. Ambience was great and staff is even better.
Very impressed on our first visit to this restaurant. Pizza and pasta dishes were cook to perfect. Service Was very friendly if you staying around here would recommended it

Visited for an early evening meal. House wine was good, service was excellent and food made with fresh ingredients. Mid range european prices $70 for two with wine, so maybe good for a special occasion. I would highly recommend it.
The restaurant was very accommodation to us we just waled in with no reservation. The pizza was delicious, service was excellent and attentive, Highly recommended
We had pizza chrispy and tin and also good thai food. Got seved fresh, warm bread with pesto as starter for free. The restaurant looks stunning and we enjoyed our pizza and cocktails at rise bar

if you are looking for a lovely place with a fantastic decor, exellent service and creative cuisine "ITALICS and RISE BAR" is your choice tried pizza and pasta. For full experience have a cocktail on roof top bar to see doi suthep view.

We went for special dinner.The staff was perfect, Pam was our server she take care about all details, thank you very much. for food we tried some thing different from last time. About main dish seared tuna and seabass very very yummy after that we tried mango panna cotta. we will come back again and again.

I came here with my boyfriend for 2 year anniversary. The restaurant is part of the hotel with a modern decor and hip style the staff very friendly and service very quick. We order pizza and the main dish (pork chop and snow fish). After that we went up to rise bar for cocktails at night time to saw chiang mai sky. Very very romantic.

I went there last week with my boyfriend for our first anniversary. We ordered Italics Burrata salad and Summer salad for starter it was perfect! And then we had Parma ham pizza and Tana tartar as main dish it's went well with house wine. We appreciate service team and also kitchen team as well. Thank you so much for amazing night! Highly recommend! ❤❤❤

Came up here for a bit of a western dinner (I'm weak, I'll admit it, but they do offer many thai options too!) and I must say, I was pleasantly surprised! The reataurant is part of a classy boutique hotel, which also features an awesome rooftop bar. The decor is modern and very elegant. All in all the place has a really nice vibe. The staff is friendly and professional, service is quick and precise. As for the food: we absolutely loved it! Myself being italian, I have to admit, I'm difficult to please, but my appetite has been fully satisfied tonight! My partner had the mushroom-truffle gnocchi and she said that that's the best "pasta" dish she's ever had...so far. I was slightly jealous! The fried zucchini sticks were delicious too. For once, I've regretted being a vegetarian. I would recommend this restaurant to anyone! Read less

We ate here as a couple. I recommend you make a reservation. We had none and were seated on the terrace. We ate pizza, gnocchi, roquette parmesan salade and zuchini sticks. Honestly, it was so good !!! True italian cuisine. Their pesto is delicious!!! I will come back.

My wife and I went here after a long three days in Chiang Mai while on our honeymoon. We were looking for a respite from the old city and a legitimate cocktail. Rise was the perfect night cap to our evening. We woke up early to head up Doi Suthep and ended the day looking back at the mountain with delicious drinks in hand.

After being iver 3 weeks in Thailand and 2 in Spain, you always want a change. I just wanted to pamper a bit, and this is the place for it. Fav italian food. The service was just perfect, exceeded my expectations! As I couldn't go back to my hotel, the staff at this hotel provided me with a tooth brush and tooth paste. The toilets are divine. The location can't be any better, I even tried to get a room here, but it was fully booked. Can this be any trendier? Huh! Read less

Nice place, very good pizza. We also ordered the lasagna and the carbonara, but were not so impressed by these dishes. Also, the food did not arrive at the same time, which was a bit disappointing at such a nice restaurant. Apart from this the service was very good.
Must give it a try :)) great combination of Thai and western, good atmosphere, nice staff. I've try beef steak and it melt in my mouth... two thumbs up!

The Pumpkin soup was good! The italics Burrata salad was good! The pizza was big disappointing! Not real Italian type. Thin type pizza , but the dough was not ready and the taste was too heavy. We return it back and they offer us to make new pizza, but we refused. We did not order any other food. A little Far away from the city center Personally I enjoyed the quiet.

Such a delightful experienced to have a try Italian-Thai fusion style dishes :) Two-thumbs-up for CHEF Phubase's highly recommended dishes; Pizza & Tenderloin gnocchi (ask the Chef !!! lol) love the aroma of truffle oil on it !!! ..... Can I give this review for more than 5-star ? Lol !! Amazing ;)
Had my birthday dinner here. It's a pleasant surprise to find this charming place in the neighborhood. Food is awesome. Recommend the fluffy gnocchi.
My family is having the dinner now. Food and environment are good. However, my daughter keeps complaining she got bite by mosquitos. So please try to keep out of mosquitos then it is perfect. 😄
Despite i am not an italian food fan, me and my wife have experienced a nice italian food in chiang mai. Gnocci wad delicious!
They seemed to be trying too hard and some things didn’t quite gel. As other reviewers have pointed out, they seem to have improved over the last few months.

Very nice Italian dinner.. Expensive when compared to other Chaing Mai restaurants but good value when compared to a North American Italian dinner. Bread with basil spread very yummy. Caesar Salad was amazing. Pasta with Burrata/ fresh tomato sauce. Could use more basil & pasta was a little too chewy. Very nice setting & excellent service

I have eaten here several times. At first, although the food was good, it was not as good as the stylish decor or the fine service. But that has changed and the last couple of times the standard of the food has been excellent. Recommended.

Today was my birthday and we want something special for dinner, so... we went to this restaurant. The staff was perfect (today and always, we visit this place 4 or 5 times). NiN was our waitress and she take care about all the details,she is very lovely and careful, thank you <3 . About the food... we tried the menu for lunch one time and was very good and you have lot of dishes for choose. About pizzas... we love parma ham, it is very delicious, but we taste the others and was good too. About desserts... tiramisú it's amazing and banana cheese cake too :) . See you soon :) Sorry, my english is very poor :)

Had my wife's 30th bday and our 5th wedding anniversary dinner here. Small but cozy. Has a brick oven for delicious pizzas. Reasonably priced. I highly recommend the deli meat platter with some cheese.

I recommend Manango and Passion Fruit Panna Cotta at this place, it is superb and a genious mix of tropical fruits and Itaian panna cotta. Food is nice but keep space for dessert. They are so good and too late for photographs.
Good food, we tried T-bone for two. Cooked as ordered (medium rare), with sophisticated and exotic side dishes and sauces.

The service was excellent. But the food was disappointing. I don't know how they got this many great reviews. Risotto was terrible. I don't think they know how to cook risotto. I was so excited for my plate but man, the texture was off and it was not cooked with love. Don't believe the hype and the display of the food. The Hawaiian pizza was too dry. It's been in the oven for too long and they need more help in the kitchen. It was not a great night for both of us. We don't recommend this place.
Very nice Italian/international food - and the service is really high quality. On the rooftop there is one of the best bars in Chiangmai so this place can be perfect for a night out.
Very nice Italian / International food. Service is attentive and there is a good ambiance in the restaurant. The bar upstairs has a nice pool and bar.

If you're looking for an upscale dining experience in Chiang Mai, with good service, this is it. We have visited twice and thoroughly enjoyed. From the calamari appetizer (perfectly prepared), to the pasta and risotto dishes, to the Akyra pizza, to the meats and incredible fish, our family group enjoyed it all. Can't say enough about the wines and the tiramisu too. A little on the pricey side for Chiang Mai, but realize this is more a high end restaurant like you would find in Bangkok. Overall, well worth it!

We recently stayed at the Akyra Manor Hotel and this restaurant is part of that hotel. It is where breakfast was served and we ate a couple of evenings. Now you can eat Gluten Free relatively easily in Chiang Mai so long as you avoid Soy Sauce in curries etc. However at this restaurant the Chef was excellent. We advised in advance I was Coeliac and he arranged to have Gluten Free bread, pasta and flour in the kitchen. At each meal Chef Phubase came to our table and tailored dishes for me. He even bought in Gluten Free sausage for my cooked breakfast. He made pancakes for me and assured that each dish served was noted as Gluten Free. Excellent food, fantastic Chef and an amazing find. Read less

The restaurant was very accommodating to us as we just walked in with no reservation on a clearly busy night. We were asked to wait at the bar on the roof terrace, no problem. The food was DELICIOUS! pizza was really very, very good. Service was excellent and attentive. We also received our mains one after the other, which was odd! But really had no issue with it as we always share anyway :) We would have left a good tip if not for the service charge! Wish places wouldn't do this as we wanted to do it voluntarily to show our gratitude. However, highly recommended for pizza etc. Because believe me you will really crave one after 3 weeks of Thai food! Read less
One of the best in the Nimmanhaemin area. Vast choices on menu, tried and like the Italian dishes. Pizzas are great, and so are the desserts!

We had really nice evening here, the food was fantastic as was the service! We had a pizza and the base was perfect... if you want some good Italian in the nimman area this is worth a visit...Highly recommended!
This Italian restaurant will provide you with mouth-watering food and stylish design, I highly recommend this place to people coming to Chiang Mai!

Very impressed on our first visit to this restaurant. Pizza and pasta dishes were cooked to perfection! Impressive wine menu, and superb service. Would recommended it, if your staying in Chiang Mai, and crave decent Italian food.

We found out about this restaurant on the Internet when we were looking for places to eat in Chiang Mai. It came up as one of the 10 best restaurants in Chiang Mai. The place is lovely, wonderful lights and music (not too loud nor too low), very friendly and attentive staff, wonderful Italian cuisine. This restaurant didn't disappoint us, it just amazed us. The desserts were fantastic, specially the mango and passion fruit panna cotta. Regarding the prices it's not cheap but it's also not expensive, it's a reasonable price for the wonderful experience. We highly recommend it.

If you are craving for pizza, pasta or rissoto don't skip on this one. The food is way above the average italian restaurants, worth the price. Stood up were the fried zucchini with sour cream and sweet chilli sauce (an italian dish with a thai spin)

We at a late lunch here and ordered 4 dishes and a pizza. The four dishes were khao soi, Thai sausage salad, tuna larb (our group's favorite dish), and satay. It was delicious, contemporary Thai cuisine at a reasonable price. The pizza was outstanding and came with a wide variety of condiments. For four people, including beers and drinks, it was $80USD. If you're looking for a good meal in an air conditioned space that is extremely well decorated, this is it.

Our visit at the Italics & Rise was breathtaking. My boyfriend in I enjoyed a more then proper italian meal at the Italics. I am not sure what was more satisfying the delicious food, the sweet service or the design of the venue. If you want to treat yourself to a nice night out in Nimman this is the place! Both the designer and foody in me were very impressed. We topped it off with a cocktail on the rooftop.. It was late so we were gazing at stars, the golden temple of Doi Suthep and neon lights of Maya mall while sipping our cocktails. Gorgeous, nice music, fun staff! I am absolutely sure that coming during happy hour and sunset for a dip in the salt water pool will be on my itinerary in the next few days!!!

I've been living in Chiang Mai for 10 years and working in the luxury tourism business. As an expat, the Italics & Rise is my go-to place for a sunset-cocktail-dinner combo. In addition to the stylish design and laid back rooftop lounge boasting a swimming pool (open to the public) and a stunning view of the city and mountain, they go above and beyond in so many ways - from the unique cocktail blends to the exceptionally well trained staff. At the Italics, they speak perfect english and strike the right balance between being attentive to your needs, without being overbearing or awkward. The wine list was exceptional, boasting rare vintages from France (I imagine, on account of the French General Manager) and the tapas selection was excellent. The calamari was light, crispy and tender and the wood fired pizza has a great crust. Despite being a 5-star hotel, the prices are fair and the value is excellent - they even offer a generous discount for local residents! I highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a taste of home, with a contemporary Thai twist! :) Read less

Try the zucchini sticks! Basic recipe but had a great crunchy batter. Diavoli pizza had simple topping, thin crusty base but a tad salty. Enjoyed the tray of extra seasonings like oregano, chilli flakes, Parmesan provided for us to add to the pizza. Grilled sea bass was done just right- tasty and light in flavours. As usual service was brilliant!
In dont want to use many words but if you go to chiangmai and you want Italian food, go to this place.

After a long day at the Chiang mai zoo, we searched TripAdvisor for a restaurant which is good & near by, we came across this restaurant, and decided to give it a try. Comparing to other lunch options in the area, this is a very expensive restaurant (but actually costs about half of what we are used to pay at home :) ). The food is delicious, and the kids (used to western food) enjoyed it. We ordered 5 dishes and one appetizer, pasta with standard tomato sauce - the kids loved it, pizza margarita, gnocchi (which we ordered twice - as it was so delicious and was gone quickly) and we had to try a phad-thai on a fancy restaurant - so we ordered one as well (I really liked it, my wife liked it less) Generally, the food was perfectly cooked, and the place was calm (except for my noisy kids) and peaceful. The only down side was the price, we ended up with a 2300 THB bill (plus mineral water and some cold poison-fruit soda) Read less
The service was great, the food was delicious and the whole experience was perfect. We ate the gnocchi and the ravioli, both dishes were great.
A good date night location, nice atmosphere, good food and service. Also has a rooftop bar you can kick on to after. Have eaten here a few times and quality has been consistent

Easily one of the best restaurants in the Nimmanhaemin area and an extensive menu of Italian delights and traditional Thai food. The salad was fresh, pizza delicious and the panna cotta is out of this world! Italics also have an extensive wine list, with a promotional class of wine 190 Baht. Good value for a five star hotel restaurant!
Food in Italics restaurant is nice. Service are nice too. It was a good time to have a meal in the restaurant.

Great service, awesome food, the staff was very friendly. Chef is pleasant and sweet. This is truly one of the best Italian Restaurant in town. You can’t go wrong with anything here. Definitely will be back here again when we’re in town!

이하 ㅣ가 ㅋ 낮에 갔는데 우리 테이블 뿐이었는데도 신경도 안쓰고 ㅋㅋ 주문 받는 직원은 개거만하고 어처구니가 없어서 참나 음식 맛은 와인이랑 마시면 될 정도의 간이에요 약간 짜지만 그건 우리나라 기준이니 신경 안 써도 되는 분은 문제 없겠죠 나중에 서빙한 직원은 스윗했는데 처음에 서빙한 키 작은 여자 진짜 짜증나서 아주 별로임 귀찮아서 후기 안 쓰는데 열 받아서 써봅니다 트립어드바이저 후기 보고 간 건데 이 어플 이제 지워야 할 것 같아요 You would better go to another restaurant if you would like to expect meal with nice service. I am not sure that the night time but it was terrible service at day time. Just instagram atmosphere. Read less

Absolutely marvelous design, the staff was so pleasant and welcoming, the design itself is very innovative and intresting. We chose a pasta dish and a pizza dish, both cooked to perfection. The cheeses used were grade A materials for sure. The restroom was one of the cleanest I've been to in my life. Just a must experience!

Stayed at this hotel, so got to enjoy breakfast here each day. In addition, we had dinner here one night. It was a nice change of pace from Thai food and the pasta was really exceptional. Didn't get to try the pizzas, but they looked amazing as well. The cocktails are well made as well and creative. Would recommend highly.
I came back again and really enjoy for dinner staff is pretty good and helpful. food was superb. ^_^

My starter dish is bred with Pesto sause, both of them are very tasty. My main dish is Penne tomato sause with scallop, this is an excellent Penne which so soft and tomato sause is very fresh and juicy. If someone looking for a good place for dinner and chill with friend, Italic would be the best choice. Ps. This hotel provide roof bar also.
four cheese pizza is amazing, and enough for a very hungry person! staff is very nice too, I really enjoyed this place

The food all the dishes are very good, best quality i get. Great place for a view and nice cocktails on the roof top bar. Thx for the good service. 😊 You will pleasure if you come This restaurant is highly recommended 😄

Our family went to Italics for my brother's birthday. We had a wonderful dinner. The food is delicious. We enjoy the signature pizza and found that it is one of the best pizza in town. All dishes served with quality ingredients. Steak is also a must, juicy and yummy till the last bite. The service I really like is the valet parking as Nimmanhemin area is crowded by car and people. The parking space is hard to find so this service solve the problem. We definitely go back again and again. Read less
We visited Italics during summer time. I had a pizza and seabass puttanessca for sheared and chocolate lava for dessert. Thank you for Jane to take care our dinner

A great evening with my family. we had a very good pizza (pamaham pizza) and enjoy a sighnature cocktail. very good view from the street. nice atmosphere to chill out, great service by Jane. we will going back soon.

I had amazing dinner experience with a reasonable price with signature akyra and pamaham pizza and superb tiramisu for dessert. I would like to thank you our waitress (Maow) she had taking care my dinner and also high recommend for rooftop bar at RISE Bar number 8 floor at akyra manor hotel for drink at night time. I will be back soon.

This restaurant makes great pizza, so we wanted to try out their breakfast. It was a disaster. it cost almost 900 baht for their open face breakfast sandwich and some pancakes with fruit and a couple of coffees. They do not provide water, and if you ask for it, they charge 60 BAHT for a small bottle (which costs about 10% of that price in any store). Honestly, who doesn't offer free (or at least reasonable) water to people who are already overpaying for breakfast? The pancakes were awful, and the eggs on toast was tasty but extremely skimpy. I do not mind paying extra for a nice breakfast, but at these prices is is a complete rip off. Terrible value for money. Great serving staff. DO NOT EAT BREAKFAST HERE. EVER. Read less

My wife and I recently visited Akyra for dinner and were very pleasantly surprised by how good it was. The steak was one of the best I have had in Chiang Mai, with my request for rare being perfectly cooked. The house wine was the best I have had in Chiang Mai as well. The decor is stylish and the atmosphere very comfortable and the prices very reasonable for the experience. The staff were very attentive and always wore a smile. We will certainly return soon!
A great evening with some splendid food and good atmosphere. Personal favourite being the Parma ham pizza which was divine.
They have free car park. The guard was very helpful. We went there for lunch. We order pizza and pasta. The price is affordable for us. We really like the pizza.

Such a great moment spend at Italics, We stayed 2 days in Chiangmai and it was the best western food experience we had so far. The manager and the chef came for welcome us, a really nice touch for start the diner. I would advise to order the pizza, Parma ham specially. To die for! And Chef Basse, are really good with all the fish/seafood dishes! Everything we ordered was yummy and tasty ! Do not miss this place if you're passing by Chiangmai! Cheers Jeriko Read less

We visited Italics during Songkran 2016, first off the evening didnt strat great as our taxi couldnt drop us off outside and we had to walk up a road where there was a foam party and just basically a big songkran festival!! i have no problem and to be honest would have joined in if appproraite but we were dresses for dinner - what i have to say is Italics were waiting at the door for people to arrive so they could whip open the door and get you in as quick as possible and stop you from getting wet!! when we arrived we went up the roof top bar and some lovely cocktails (enjoyed watching Songkran - even though it made me feel old) we ordred and then went down into thne restruant to eat, its a shame but songkran was so loud that it overpowered a bit but thats no fualt of Italics at all. The servie was very good and so was the food!!! they were so hospitipal and even arranged for a private car to tack us back after! We will certainly go back next time we are in Chang Mai Read less

Enjoyed a nice romantic dinner for one on the patio. Food was excellent and enjoyed a glass of wine. Great view of the street and a couple local bars with live music so sights and sounds kept me entertained. Beautiful night so I stayed a little longer and enjoyed some gelato before catching a tuktuk back to my hotel.
Amazing food when you ask for vegan Cocktails are the best in cm Pool is unreal View spectacular Staff brilliant Manager is spot on!

I have been to Italics for few times. Firstly I was impressed by the location since it's located in nimman where you can find lots of restaurants and cafe, Italics is one of the best restaurant in Chiang Mai, it was decorated by the designed lighting with the golden color and it's so bright at night.... I love it! The staffs were friendly and well trained, they can remember what do you like or don't like if you already been there for few times.... The service was excellent so far. Khun Bom (Restaurant Manager) and his team went out of his way to the guests not only me but to every single guest. Finally, the food was great.... I love pizzas but here is the best pizza I ever had. Congrats to Chef Phubase & the entire team as well. Will be back soon! Read less
Very good italian restaurant with a wide chose of pizza, pasta and sweet. We come back the night after to taste again parma pizza. Really excellent!

I have left many reviews over my time but this experience is by far the most disappointing! I understand faults do happen but we were told there is a fault with the pizza dough! Basically it's not edible and more dough is being made! We were told it would be a 20 minutes before the dough would be ready! So, we ordered drinks, cocktails etc as 20 minutes is nothing to wait!! Then, it was 1hour, then it was "there won't be any pizza today at all''. Now I'm not fussy, I'll eat most things but the children wanted pizza as they are a little 'Thai food out' so that's why we decided to come here! I know these things happen but I would rather have been told there wasn't any pizza before we spend £30 on drinks! Other than that, the drinks were delicious so there was something positive from the experience! Read less
Excellent ambiance, service, and food. The interior is very modern and unique, and the servers attentive but not intrusive. The food was beautiful as well as delicious.

Our friends recommended us "Italics", the restaurant of Akyra hotel in Chiang Mai, so we went there to find out if this place matches our expectations. My family and I ordered different dishes, from the famous pizzas, to fish, and vegetarian for the girls. The dishes are well presented in a very luxury and modern way, like the ambient in the hotel. It was delicious and you can feel that they use fine ingredients (good value for money). The staff was also friendly and professional. We will definitely come back !

I have already written a review on Akyra Manor, but I believe their restaurant deserves another review solely for praises. We stayed in the hotel for 6 days and only decided to eat the Italics on the last day (which isn't a great idea considering the fact that the food was SO good). There is a variety of options to choose from the menu, from the meat platter as the appetizer to pizzas as the main dish. The Italics is probably the only decent Italian restaurant in the Nimman area and would really recommend anybody who misses Italian food whilst on vacation in Chiang-Mai!
Date_Written: a review on Akyra Manor, but I believe their restaurant deserves another review solely for praises.
