The Italics is probably the only decent Italian restaurant in the Nimman area and would really recommend anybody who misses Italian food whilst on vacation in Chiang-Mai!

Detail: We went to this restaurant via reviews from Trip advisor. Despite some bad reviews, I must say we had an amazing experience. The service was too class alongside the food. It was refreshing having something other than Asian food, after being in Asia for 10 days. I had the grouper and my husband had the seared tuna. Both dishes were phenomenal. Wait staff very polite.

if you want an over-priced breakfast in the pretentious Nimmanhaemin district then this is a reasonable choice. perhaps twice the price of a similar meal in the tourist concentrated/competitive east side of old town (with the additional charges of the VAT and a mandatory 10% service charge). you do get a cloth napkin and prompt service but the wifi is awful--slow speed with several dropped connections during the time it took to eat breakfast.

Food here is great! the menu is mostly Italian but as we are in Thailand there is a selection of great Thai dishes. The choice of products is outsanding being those imported from Itlay or the top of the top of what you can find in Thailand. Many delightful young ladies do a great service. The General Manager we got to meet is a young Frenchman, extremely professional and absolutly charming. He has a great knowledge of wines and that shows on his wine list. He slowed us the rooms: wow! great! Read less
Nice and cozy ambient and very close to the most famous place in Chiangmai (Nimmahaemin). Food and service are excellent will be back again for sure :)

This is a very nice restaurant, serving excellent food at a slightly higher price than some other restaurants in the area. However, you definitely get what you pay for! The bar is relaxing and comfortable with a great atmosphere.

My boyfriend and I went to the restaurant twice during our stay in Chiang Mai. We tried their pizza, slow cooked pork belly, crab cakes and chicken. Their dishes, especially the western ones, are delicious! The drinks are fresh too (highly recommend the passion fruit soda)! The decor of the restaurant is chic. It might be a bit pricey compared with other Chiang Mai restaurants. But with the great food quality and good service, it is definitely worth a go.
Really tasty food at a really reasonable price. Staff were friendly and knowledgable and always topping up our drinks. Would definitely recommend.

My boyfriend and I fell upon this restaurant looking on Tripadvisor whilst in travelling in Chiang mai. It is more expensive than most Thai restaurants but is definitely worth it. It is definitely a restaurant where you would pay more than £100 in England. The staff were very attentive, especially to say that I am allergic to sugar - they prepared a beautiful sugar free dish for me. My boyfriend had a pizza and said that was amazing. The restaurant itself is very quirky and the decor is very modern. Thanks - we had a lovely evening and would tell anyone to go! Read less
Very chic upscale restaurant. Great Pizzas and pastas. Servers breakfast and also very vegetarian friendly. We had a great time. looking forward to visit again. Must call for reservations.

Nice place with modern decoration. I went there with my friend to have an afternoon tea set the other day. The service is good both in the restaurant and parking. Only one thing that bothered us are the Chinese tourists and their children, noisy and have no manner. Their children kept coming to play at the bench that I sat while the parents ignored her , did not warn her not to annoy other guests. They also talk in loud voice , over our heads ! Your staffs should learn how to mange this kind of the guests! Anyway, back to the afternoon tea set, 650 baht per set including everything but when the bill came , we pay 400 baht each to cover the tips... Savory bites are delicious , almost every kinds except cheese sandwiches , a little bit greasy .I like Chicken satay roti the most. This is the most delicious savory bites place among Afternoon tea sets I've ever had while almost all places only focus on beautiful decorated desserts .Sweet bites are common , did not make me excited...but did not disappoint . We spent many hours there , chatting and the staffs are polite to us. Will come back to try your Italian food some day... Read less

We had brilliant pizza, and also good Thai food. Got served fresh, warm bread with homemade pesto as a starter (for free). The location is in a street full of nice bars and restaurants; nice atmosphere there. The restaurant also looks stunning, and we thoroughly enjoyed our meal there.

What a luxurious restaurant. Too bad they don't give Michelin stars in Thailand cause this would get at least 1. They receive you like a king, the table dressing is fantastic. The food and choices are, for being in Asia, exquisite. We had a tapas plate with the best cured ham ever, and the homemade bread was excellent. The main dish was seared tuna, and how delightful that was, still get water in my mouth thinking about it, It s a bit more pricey for Thai standards but what you get is A-class cuisine. WOW... Toilets super clean and shiny too. Eat like kings....(and queens) Read less

I am just amazed of the food quality here. The pizza, spaghetti and lasagna are all nice surprises to us. Kids love their lava cake too! A fancy restaurant with very kids-friendly staff. Will definitely be back again!

Cozy roof top bar, seemingly for guests of the hotel. Seating comprised of four sets of long couches, at eye level with the raised rooftop pool. Service was courteous. They had a happy hour promotion, 2 for 1, from 5:30 to 6:30 on a Friday. Beverage concoctions were classics done with a local twist. Their version of a 'Tom Collins' was prepared with kafir lime leaves and lemongrass which proved to be crisp and refreshing.

The pizza was pretty good, but not quite as fabulous as we had expected based on all the rave reviews. The calzone wasn't great, mostly full of air. There was too much water in the spinach and ricotta filling, so when cut open, water leaked out. The akyra pizza was good. The toppings are quite minimal, but I actually like pizza this way. As for the bacon, there may have been half a piece of bacon on the entire pizza. It still tasted pretty delicious though. The biggest complaint we had was the snobby atmosphere. Once we sat down and they realized we were going to pay, everyone was friendly and very helpful. But when we entered the restaurant, we were greeted with "what can we do for you?" Our reply was, "well, we'd like to eat of course." As we were eating inside, we noticed patrons who were dressed a bit more casually being lead outside. Not sure if this is company policy or this was just our impression. Overall, the food was good, the prices were high for Thailand, but not so expensive, especially compared to the west. The pizzas were around 300 baht. However, the drink menu was quite steap. Be ready to pay a pretty penny if you want to drink anything, even a small water was 60 baht. Beer is 120 for a small Chang, and wine started at about 300 a glass. Overall, we think this restaurant is highly overrated and overpriced, especially compared to other restaurants in Chiang Mai. Read less

Great atmosphere to chill out with friends, great tiramisu:) will be going back again. The service was great, they were helpful and engaging, great food presentation too, looking forward next time to try more of the bar options

We had the best time at Italics, their Italian concept downstairs and then dessert and drinks upstairs at Rise after dinner. After eating Thai food for 9 days straight we needed a break. I was a little hesitant to eat Italian food in Chiang Mai but my husband and I were so so pleased at the quality of this place. There was a mix of attire, some more causal and some dressy but this place can certainly be used for special occasions and a fancy date night. The service was both professional and friendly. The room was gorgeous and the upstairs bar was comfortable and beautiful as well. You sit on sofas right next to the transparent pool wall. We got the tuna laab, calamari, seafood pasta, potato gnocchi, diavlo pizza, and passion fruit and mango panna cotta. Seafood pasta is a must. Great red sauce and homemade noodle. The pizza was delicious as well, the crust is nice and thin with crisp edges. The panna cotta was superb - vanilla panna cotta topped with passion fruit seeds and chunks of ripe mango. Most entrees are around 300 baht which is a little expensive compared to other places in Chiang Mai but this meal is definitely on par or better than Italian meals we have had in the states so it's still a great deal compared to the US dollar value with this quality of food. I would definitely recommend this restaurant and the Akyra hotel brand (we actually stayed in their Koh Samui location and had the best experience there too). As we were leaving, David commented that the service and atmosphere was so good that it seemed like they were trying to get a Michelin star. I totally agree and am so happy we got to eat here! Make reservations if you want to ensure a spot at Italics or Rise, we lucked out as walk ins. Read less

This restaurant is perfect in every way. My friend and I saw great reviews and decided to try it out. We sat on the covered patio and loved it. It started to rain and felt magical with the warm weather and the heavy rain that lightened up after a few minutes. We live in the desert, so rain is a novelty to us. I had a calzone and my friend had a pizza and both were delicious. The service was great, and when I went to use the restroom I saw how gorgeous the restaurant was inside. I felt a bit underdressed because everything was so beautiful. The bathroom was pristine and lovely. They even sold jewelry and little trinkets by the host stand that were gorgeous. I would definitely recommend this to anyone, especially tourist. Weather you want lunch on the patio, or a romantic dinner inside. You must try the chocolate lava cake, it's divine! We will probably go back before we depart from this amazing city. Read less

We found this restaurant in our neighborhood and we're thrilled with its food and atmosphere! The place is gorgeous! The decorations are modern and romantic, the staff is lovely and speak great English, and the food is top notch! My friend had a calzone and I had the sausage pizza! The crust is delicious and you can tell that the ingredients are quality. We then treated ourself to their amazing chocolate lava cake. Oh. My. God. It was spectacular. My friend and I were sad we decided to share one. I wanted one all to myself! If you are craving good Italian head over to Italics! You won't regret it!

Great service (Mr. Bomb), nice atmosphere and excellent food. We went there twice because kids loved it too. Bruscetta's really nice. We ordered spaghetti carbonara, arrabiata and pizza's. Valet parking service. Highly recommended!
The food was super nice. We are amazed by the papaya scallops. So fresh and tasty. The pizza crush was very crunchy. We love the chef recommended pizza. Try it!

Truly amazing food served in Italics restaurant. There were so many things on the menu I would have loved. I dined with 3 friends and had the carpaccio, the ravioli and the chocolate lava cake dessert. Every course was absolutely divine. I really can't rate the food here highly enough. They must have pretty amazing chefs in the kitchen. Ok, it's not so cheap but it's not too expensive either. We would definitely come again. Probably not a children's restaurant. Read less

Right in the middle of the tredy Nimman area, you should try this very nice restaurant. Very modern decor as the rest of this boutique hotel, both service and food are very good. Breakfast here is also an experience!
Love the pizza and everything at the restaurant. The test is very good, so delicious. I want to try another flavor in the next time.

Went for dinner and lunch on a recent stay and the pasta Bolognese was excellent as was the pizza. In a very fun and active part of city and the hotel looks very interesting May give it a try next time.

I'm in two minds about this restaurant. It presents itself as an Italian restaurant. It is not Italian food. You could call it Italian with a twist or one of the other terms bandied around but it is not Italian. I was looking for a good Italian meal but that's not what we received. My wife and I ordered an appetiser each and then we shared a pizza. Our appetisers, scallops for me and crispy zuccini sticks and as dishes they were quite good but not pure Italian. Now the pizza, didn't look like a pizza, didn't taste like a pizza but it was nice. Unfortunately the best Italian restaurant was Beccorfinos but it was bought out and I would contend that there is still no good Italian restaurant in Chiang Mai. It was also very expensive. Read less

5 stars doesn't do this place justice. Everything from the food, to the decor and the staff was top notch. I have been to many cities in Italy and I must say that the pizza at Italics topped many of the places I dined at. Really delicious pizza with generous toppings. In addition to this is necessary to to also add that the the local dishes were amazing as well. They have tried to keep close to the street food you would find and you really see that their local dishes are authentic. The decor is amazing and very different to other places I have been. There are chandeliers that look a bit like trees indoors. The staff is amazingly friendly and happy to recommend dishes. I was there for my birthday and everyone really made it a special day for me! I definitely recommend this place. Hands down! Read less

Located in the Nimman area of Chiang Mai we found this little gem as we were staying a few minutes walk away. We popped in during the day to make a reservation for that evening as it gets very busy, the staff gave us the choice of the seats left so we could choose were we wanted to sit. The service in this restaurants is some of the best service I've ever received; the staff were very friendly and always there when you needed them!! Properly cooked stone baked pizza which was very nice! Great decor, this place had plenty of character and a good atmosphere - all in all ticking every single box a restaurant should be :) Read less

This was a delicious meal in a great setting with excellent service. Be forewarned the portions are not small! We ordered a cheese plate, which was great and a generous portion, as well as a calzone and pizza to share with wine. We were stuffed but couldn't stop eating because everything was delicious. When you need a break from spicy food, I think this is an excellent romantic choice in a fun neighborhood.

We just happened to be on walk about around Chiang Mai and stumbled across Italics as the hunger pangs were setting in (along with a bit of exhaustion). It is located within the Akyra Manor Hotel which itself looks very stylish & interesting and probably worth checking out. We shared a starter of prawns and ciabatta bread which was amazing, really incredible flavours. We followed this up with pizza & they were relish, everything a pizza should be & more. There is a very good wine list and they do appreciate how wines should be handled and served. The staff are very professional, friendly and have that personal touch all of which comes from good training and engagement in what you are doing - top class. The setting is stylish, chic, cool & relaxing. It has an open plan design so the restaurant is just to the side in the foyer area - it looks a bit strange at first but I think it works well in the context of the overall setting. There is a life size art statue of a horse and other unusual items & snazzy lighting which together give it a unique appearance. There is an outdoor seating area, though the other diners seemed to have opted to stay inside to relax with the benefit of AC like ourselves. This restaurant is well worth a visit & I suspect dinner would offer an even better experience, either for a romantic evening or with a gathering of friends. Top nosh, excellent service in a top restaurant - couldn't recommend it enough. Read less

I always have problem with where to have dinner in Chiangmai but after we found this reataurant, i enjoyed eat there so much, we like many dishes , pizza is highly recommend, homemade gnochi truffle cream is superb nowherelse like this , recommend by the chef there , and here they also have very nice Thai dishes and service is outstanding. After your meal they also have amazing rooftop bar waiting for you on the 8 floors. Just my new favorite place in Chiangmai

We stumbled across this restaurant on TA and thought we'd check it out. We had such a great evening, the ambience was lovely! The food was delicious I ordered the spinach and ricotta calzone- best calzone I've had! The food takes a while to come but it is totally worth the wait. If you're craving some food Italian food this is the place to go to!

I had dinner with my wife and it was fantastic. First I had brucetta and the garlic chili prawns that was delicious. After that we had both a pizza with parmaham and a dessert my wife chocolate lava cake and I the tiramisu it was all so finger licking good! I really recommend this place if you are in chiang mai and you want Italian food
You walk into this restaurant and go WOW. The beautiful lighting is very unusual but stunning. The menu is excellent and the quality of food is brilliant. Well wworth a visit mike and Sue

Decent Italian in a nice hotel off Nimman Soi 9. With a lovely rooftop bar. Italics restaurant is on the ground floor and serves modern Italian cuisine and decent pizzas. We had a selection of Salumi and cheeses with homemade bread which was delicious. On another occasion we went for Valentines Dinner which was also very good. The staff are very nice and helpful and they also park your car for you. A nice addition to the Nimman scene.

I was in Chiang Mai for business and after eating some good food over my week there wanted somewhere close to my hotel for my last night. So glad I checked Trip Advisor and saw this one was 10 mins walk away. From the lovely greeting to leaving it was really great. Bomb ( yes his name is excellent !) made sure everything was perfect . Food well presented and full of flavour wine was good and atmosphere is also great . I will go back for sure.

WOW! Whatever I say about Italics will not be enough to convey what a great experience it is! The food - Italian mainly, but some Thai dishes as well - are just delicious! I was so surprised that the Italian food was sooo good - if you need a change from Thai food, this is definitely a place worth going to! Excellent food, attentive service, beautiful contemporary setting - what more can you ask for? Go and check it out yourself!

The restaurant is located in the hotel lobby which was sort of unexpected as many people pass by just to reach the elevators. That did not really bothered us as the decor and food quality was great. Thor pizza was think and crisp and tasted wonderful. Highly recommended in Chiang Mai.

I went to this hotel for several times as the first at the beautiful roof top bar spent time with my friends very much like it and good relaxed enjoyed drink. Second visit last few day ago have lunch at their restaurant, the food is very good the price are compare with the quality for me this reasonable, service and hospitality of staff are the best. I will go back again when I visit change Chaing Mai.

One of the reason I travel to Chiangmai is visiting this restaurant "italics" , and so impressed with this place for my dinner. I am Thai I am not a really fan of western food but all the dishes which recommended by the head chef there I enjoyed so much, simple caesar salad but dressing is the best ever, pizza as everyone recommend is the star, and the price is very good compare with other nice hotel like this , the service I got they are so friendly , treat me like very important person , so this place you can not miss when you are in Chiangmai .

If you need some western style food, and are willing to pay western prices, then Italics is perfect. On really hot days we go here when we're missing that type of food. Great service and pretty good food.
very good food served in a gorgeous setting by helpful and friendly staff. Prices were excellent too

Had dinner here lovely place! Great design, food was really good, only problem was hey bought out all mains at the same time excluding one and when it can out, they for got the side until half way thru the dish not so good? But yes great pizza lovely presentation would definitely recommend

Good taste of food and nice atmosphere in the center of Chiang Mai. It locates on Nimman 9 Rd. that surrounded by popular places here. I recommend truffle risotto at Italic restaurant on first floor of this hotel. moreover, there is rooftop bar on 8th floor

I went two nights ago and had the Magaretia. It was served with luscious bread and fantastic service! Cold beer and the sweetest waitress! I am going back tonight! Don't give this a miss, I was just wandering about, craving pizza and stumbled upon. You're welcome!

we went there after reading so many good reviews, so let s try... it is impossible in a city like CHiang Mai to say it is the best pizza because they all pretend to have THE best pizza. well, we can only say one word : EXCELLENT. it was big, tasty, just what we were looking for. quality has a price, here you will definitely have quality, in a modern setting. as someone else mentioned, choice of wine by the glass is really too short, in fact chilean red or white wine, nothing impressive. but with a cold Sanpellegrino, i can have any meal any time. staff is very smart and caring mango and passion fruit panna cotta delicious as well in a generous portion : Thanks for a nice dinner Read less

Had dinner here with a friend. The food is a classic selection of Italian cuisine one will find anywhere in the world cooked quite well. The wine list was good but i would expect a bigger variety of wines by the glass. The service was very good and the ambiance is quite special. Recommended for a cozy casual dinner but don't expect to have a culinary surprise. The prices are reasonable.

A buddy and I decided to try a place off Niman we hadn't tried before. Italics on Soi 9 is a very nice dining room open I believe for breakfast, lunch and dinner as it is situated in a modern hotel. His coffee braised short ribs were excellent and my chicken saltimbocca was tender, moist and tasty. Easily the best poultry lunch I"ve had in quite some time. Portions were ample, service was very pleasant and unobtrusive. Prices were in line with expectations that accompany large cloth napkins, good cutlery and fine plates. Very nice presentation. Not as fault to be found. Will probably be back with the wives for dinner. On-site parking is available which is an excellent benefit in this crowded and busy area. Uncrowded when we were there for lunch but I'll call ahead for dinner reservations. Read less

From the minute you step through the glass doors you know you're in for an awesome experience. The restaurant is ultra modern and beauifully appointed. After 2 weeks travelling through asia, we were surprised to see such good reviews for our favourite cuisine on trip advisor. It did not disappoint! Warmed freshly baked bread with home made pesto was complimentary and followed by sharing a cold cuts platter. Good sized portion. We enjoyed a mint lemonade and italian apple soda which were both very refreshing. Our wood fired pizzas were light based and crispy in the edges...yum! We had to have our leftovers boxed up to take away but not without sharing a bowl of pistachio and chocolate gelato. Just perfect with plenty of antioxidents in the rich dark chocolate! The wait staff were polite and attentive and the head chef came out for a chat where we discovered he was Melbourne Australia trained, where it is the largest Italian community outside Italy. Highly recommend and we would glady eat here once a week if it was back home! Read less

Rise has great service, generous drink pours, a super 5:30pm Happy Hour, an amazing view and a refreshing infinity pool! This is definitely a must for those hot nights where all you need is a swim and a cocktail! The tapas menu is delicious too! Highly recommended!

We were 4 - 2 couples, and had a fantastic diner. The Service is very good, friendly and smily. The place has a massive decoration. Very original with great lighting. We tried many different dishes and shared most if them. Everybody was super happy. The wine list is perfect -even if some of them was out of stock. We stay there more than 3 hours and left the place full and happy. I could go back today if i could. Perfect place for a date as well :) Bravo ! Read less

It's easy to be skeptical of the quality of pizza outside Italy, but Italics hits the mark. You can taste the quality of ingredients they use, much of it locally sourced. The thin cracker crust is perfectly cooked and the tomato sauce flavorful. While not cheap, it's worth shelling out for an excellent pizza. The restaurant environment is upscale and zen. If I had my druthers, I'd prefer their pizza in a 'hole in the wall' Italian joint, but alas, that's my only criticism. One pizza is plenty for one person for lunch or dinner, plus you may have a few slices left over to take home.

Just go there and eat until you fall over. Delicious pizza, massive serving of outstanding tiramisu, great service and perfect cocktails. Classy, but unpretentious in a very nice neighbourhood. Most excellent.

I and friends enjoyed so much here, this is one of the best restaurant for us in Chiangmai, worth every penny. We really love the signature here which recommend by the chef, Gnocchi with truffle cream and mushroom, smell so good, rich and very tasty! Moreover, pizza is real! Big, crispy, fresh and even cheaper than fast food pizza place in Thailand. We will definitely come back here again.
Excellent experience with attentive staff, great Italian food and very child friendly service! Try the pizza, one of the best ever had...we will be back definitely!!!

My husband and I had a fantastic dinner here. We were waited on by 'Nin' and 'Bomb' who both gave us such amazing service the best we have had in Thailand and made us feel special and very welcome in their beautiful restaurant. We ordered the cold cuts and cheese platter as a starter to share which was excellent. High quality cheeses, cuts of meat, pickles, quince jam and crackers and a good selection of everything. My husband ordered the lasagne and I had the four cheeses pizza. Again both dishes were excellent. Lots of flavour, fresh and quality ingredients. We were served complimentary warm breads with pesto to start off with and refresher towels at the end of our meal which was a thoughtful and lovely touch. The complimentary breads were amazing! Again the service we received really was outstanding. We were very happy with all aspects of our meal will definitely return and recommend highly. Read less

This Italics is not just a hotel restaurant but this is a proper fine dining with reasonable price, full option good service , great food, its very good portion especially pizza is the best in town. And you can not miss the rooftop bar , we were invited by the chef to inspect, its amazing rooftop bar for hang out in Chiangmai.
Tenderloi steak is superb here and staffs are excellence especially Chef Base, he is talented , never disappointed. Akyra is one of my favarite restaurant in Chaingmai.
Well presented excellent food. The flavored are fresh, varied and distinct. Loved the dramatic decor. We had starters and mains but were just too tired to say for dessert. Highly recommend this stop.

This restaurant is located at Akyra hotel, it's quite small hotel but very nice decoration, I and family had a trip in Chiang mai , and try at dinner Italics for the first time, the food there is just outstanding, all the dishes were well prepare, the pizza was super good, the best in Chiang mai for me, and chef there is very friendly and helpful to us, and check the comment after our meal, so impressed. So this would be my signature place for me and recommend in Chiang Mai
We took pasta and meet and both were very good The wine was PERFECTO and the atmosphere was DELICATES

The Italics restaurant is one of the best restaurants to eat at in Chiang Mai. Located in the Nimmanhaemin area Soi 9 this restaurant of the retro Akyra Manor hotel offers great Italian (particularly the pastas and pizzas) and Thai cuisine albeit on the pricey side. Well worth it if you looking for a fine dining experience.

I have been travelling to Chiang mai every year for long time and I always try something new here , and this restaurant located at Akyra Manor Chingmai right in Nimman area soi 9 impressed me so much to make me write a review. Great food, really good standard in everything, chef so much helpful with my picky ordered , wanna try many things there, especially breakfast! And the pizza was the best I ever had, highly recommend, all staffs are very friendly and good English, definitely come back to this hotel!

Had one of the most amazing anniversary dinners there. Food was great, wine list extensive, ambiance excellent, chef came over and spoke with us just to ensure everything was perfect. And to top it all off, a small cake was brought to us. Two thumbs up!

I heard about this restaurant from many people that is really new happening in Chiang mai and really worth to go, so i have no doubt to go there. First impression is outstanding decoration, and the food is excellent , really detail, fresh and yummy, and the chef is really good take care of us, well experienced. Service is super good worth with what you pay. And also rooftop bar is stunning. Defintely this place is a must in Chiang mai, I would recommend.

The restaurant is located in the first floor of the Akyra Hotel, which is 5-star hotel on Nimman road. We had tried pizza and i would say it was one of the best in Chiangmai The price is a bit expi though...

It seems counter productive to go to an Italian restaurant and eat Thai food, but Thai food is so delicious so why not? We had their pad thai and kho soi, both of which you could have acquired for much, much cheaper pretty much anywhere else in Chiang Mai. But we were not going to go get was the beautiful interior of this charming place. And decent wine. So yes, we paid more for a meal, but it was a good place for a date and we were very pleased with our meals, the service and the decor. We would definitely revisit this place and maybe, just maybe, even try the Italian food next time!

If you don't stay at the hotel, which is a mistake, you really should - at least eat at the restaurant. Breakfast is incredible and dinner is amazing. Banana rotis & Khao Soi are my two favourites on the menu.

Amazing food, especially the cold cuts platter. Went back twice for this. Very good atmosphere (quite fancy) but you don't have to necessarily dress fancy at all! Swing pool on roof which is nice too. Excellent and professional service. Would have given 5 stars but when you get the bill at the end they add on a 10% tax and 7% service charge so it's a lot more expensive then you think when you look at the prices on the menu.

I got a chance to visit Chiang Mai on last weekend for business trip. My clients and I would like to try new Italian restaurant at Akyra Manor Hotel. I found that the many dishes are very Delicious such as Seared Scallops , Smoked Mussels , Melon Pork.If you would like to try pizza ; I recommended Akyra Pizza. ( really really good). For tiramisu lover.I was told by Khun Bomb ( the assistant restaurant Manager) that " Tiramisu at his restaurant is the best Tiramisu in Chiang mai" And it is truth. It is very very good for some dessert after big meal. For the price, it is not too high if compare with good quality of ingredient. ( more Cheaper than Italian restaurant in Bangkok) The staffs is very helpful and good service. Next time , I gonna try to over night as well. Stayed January 2016, traveled on business Read less

It was definitely better than what we have expected. The place certainly delievered. The service was impeccable, staff were attentive and initiative! Very pleased with how professional and well trained the staff were. For appertizer we had Larb Seabass (Special request. This is not on the menu) and Arugula & Prosciutto. The seabass was excellent and probably the most delicious ones I have tried. Very well seasoned. Main course we had Homemade Mushroom Tagliatelle (Special request. This is not on the menu) & Seabass Puttanes. Both dishes was beautiful done. I would have preferred the Homemade Mushroom Tagliatelle . It was al dente and delicious with the fresh ingredients. The dessert Mango Panacotta and Mille Feuille & Caramel Cream provided the wonderful ending to the palate. A place to go back. Read less

Ate here on the last night in Chaing Mai and wish we had found this earlier. Absolutely fabulous, ready pleased we came across this restaurant. They were so attentive and great at reading your mind! Toilets were also very clean. The executive chef came out at the end of the meal to ask if everything was ok, when does that happen in the UK? Three had pizza which were delicious and I had the chicken which was excellent. The deserts were also very very good. Well done all at at this establishment you all did a really great job tonight. Read less

I've eaten there several times. The food is consistently very good, good quality for good price, the staff proficient in English, dishes arrive together (not drop by drop as in many other places). What I really appreciate is that Akyra Manor Chiang Mai pays special attention to us locals who live here permanently. A 15% discount card is available which I shall often use.
We had breakfast every day of our stay here and dinner once. The food was great and the service was even better. Goi and Junior were are two favorites. They were attentive and kind!
I ordered my favourite calzone and it tasted really good and it's the giant calzone I ever have! they also serve calzone with fresh salad. given the service and good food I think it worth the price.

delicious foods and nice atmosphere, ideal for family dining...the foods here are very tasty and fresh, cant find from any other Italian restaurant in Chiangmai, very detail in every dishes, and the pizza is the best of the best I would say . Price is average but service is unexpectation, so this place is highly recommend in Chiangmai
Beautiful place , Nice atmosphere , fantastic food (great pizza & smooth tiramisu) good selection of wine and very helpful staffs

Today I was so lucky to be greeted be the executive chef of Akyra Manor Hotel. My friends and I were hearing so many great things about this global chic Italian restaurant located next to the hotel's lobby. We were super starving so we ordered quite varieties of dishes such as spaghetti carbonara, smoked salmon linguine, black truffle gnocchi, caesar salad, and of course the chef was recommended Akyra's signature brick oven pizza which made per order. We enjoyed the foods like no tomorrow. Finished dish by dish with 110% satisfaction. We enjoyed the foods so much, the chef came around for the 2nd time and amazed of what we did to his creations. He offered us 3 dishes tasting portion of complimentary desserts which were tiramisu, mango panna cotta, and caramel mille feuille. They were to die for!!!! My friends and I decided to give Italics to the best Italian Restaurant in Chiangmai. We love your food creations and we will definitely come back for more!!!! Read less

This restaurant completed my first Chiang Mai trip in late February. It's apart of the small luxury hotel called Akyra Manor Chiang Mai and located in a very good spot. I love its elegant decorations which gives a feeling of modern and luxurious in the same time. The services and hospitality are exceptional, staff are very well-trained and friendly. Talk about food, I had a chance to try some dishes as I was a solo traveler, but all dishes I ordered as well as some chef's recommended dishes were excellent and tasty. All teh beef lovers please don't miss "beef carpaccio" chef said it's a Lanna style, my main course was "Homemade Potato Gnocchi" with mushroom, I personally don't like gnocchi but this one made a big change in my life! For those who is looking for a chic and cool place to have a good Italian dinner with reasonable price, Italics should be in your bucket list! Oh! Don't forget to sip a little drink or two at the rooftop bar and enjoy Chiang Mai city view ;) Don't just believe me, try it yourself! Read less
I had pizza. My partner steak. I ate pizzas in many countries before. This the best I had. My gf ate steak. She eat it well done. Even if well done still juicy. Fresh salads and very nice restaurant.

First, we traveled a lot, and this little tasty decorated Italian restaurant is such a surprise! All the food we had are fresh and delicious and more than our expectation! My husband had home made mushroom gnocchi, it's almost the best he ever had, mine was fresh river prawn and pesto, the prawn is so fresh and goes so well with pesto, since my husband is vegetarian so the salad and soup they put the meet or seafood at side, so we both can enjoy it, so thoughtful. The chef even sent a surprise tiramisu after he learned it was my birthday, so sweet. And I realized why the restaurant is not on the popular list on Tripadvisor, it only opened since 6 months ago, give it time, it will definately made to the top list. By the way, they also have excellent wine, this restaurant is such a bright gem, I hope it will keep shining! Read less
This Restaurant its not on the main road bud wen you use google map its easy to finde.Very stylish Restaurant,very friendly staff.The food its very very good!!!!!👌👍🍷

We went looking for pizza and we were not disappointed. The staff were very attentive and the restaurant had a very cool and interesting style. Please be aware though this is not the cheapest place to eat with the cheapest mains on the menu being cheese pizza at 250 baht and they pour water when you sit down and then charge you for it. We didn't mind as we assumed it wasn't free but something to be aware of.

We had a delightful quick appetizer and drinks at Italics and were positively surprised by both the quality and quantity of the cold cuts platter. It may not be the cheapest place around, but much more affordable than similar quality would be in Bangkok. Drinks were equally impressive, with a particular honorary mention given to the strawberry&honey ice tea. Lots of nice little details like refreshing iced towels reflect the 5 star quality of the establishment.
Very tasty food ! Excellent service ! High quality restaurant ! Really enjoy it, specially the pizza !

First we start at rise bar rooftop in the evening I saw very nice view with poolbar.You can enjoy with chiang mai's city view and doi suthep view from the heart of nimmanheamin while you have some drink. Then we went to have dinner at the restuarant.Ceasar salad is my favourite starter but I love ceasar dressing here.I think this is the most deliciouse ceasar dressing that I ever had.More than that I really really love pizza,It's thin and crispy particularly akyra pizza.If you'd like to find the best pizza in chiang mai,you should try pizza here.Firstly I thing we gonna have some dessert but everyone got full already but I'll come back again for pizza and have some dessert soon. Read less

Food is very delicious and unique presentation. Food is cooked by heart and soul which is the best italian restaurant that I ever taste. Staff is very friendly and professional service. The restaurant is nice atmosphere and the location is the heart of Chiang Mai.

A very beautiful restaurant with some amazing food. We had fried pork belly with ravioli and a really good Italian thin crust Prosciutto pizza. I wasn't sure we would be able to get a table with a 4 month year old baby, but the staff were friendly and accommodating to our needs. Excellent service.

Went to Rise Rooftop Bar with friends during the happy hour (buy 1 get 1 free cocktails from 5.30-6.30pm) Great location on the busy nimman road. Spectacular view and atmosphere on the rooftop. Friendly staff members looked after us. Cocktails taste delicious!!!
Nice menu, friendly staff, very clean, also has a pizza bar. Many special entrees. English spoken, beautiful at night
Went for Friday happy hour. Nice space, smallish, good vibe. Inventive cocktails and nice views. Couples, singles, international. A good time!

Me my family went to have dinner here yesterday.first we started to the rooftop bar on 8 floor to drink and watch sunset at doi suthep.My family impressed with a friendly staff and a nice view here,then we went to the restaurant to have dinner.My boyfriend really really love akyra pizza and truffle ghocchi.All we had 1 appertizer 2 salad to a starter and then for our main course,we had Cabonara,Potato ghocchi,akyra pizza and chiang mai pizza.Especially my boyfriend really really love akyra pizza and truffle ghocchi.All my family was very happy yesterday.I will come back again.
It 's a nice place for the view!! Get a good chill drinks and enjoy the rest of the night here!! Nice foods & the people too nice!! I will comeback here again next time.

The design of this place is just surreal, and you immediately feel transported to another world — and the meal for the Valentine's Day event was a wonderland all its own. The rooftop pool has an overall atmosphere that's inviting, sexy, and stylish. Great themed cocktails for the evening, too: red crushed berries in a flute of bubbly were just perfect. Downstairs, the meal for the evening was course after course of delicious delight. We especially liked the sea bass, and the chocolate fondant with local ice cream and a rose petal... it was such a perfect Valentine's crescendo. Really a special place, and we feel lucky to know it. Definitely a fine place for atmosphere, style, and delicious drinks and dining. Read less

Read about this restaurant in a magazine and was attracted by the chef who had worked in the Aziamendi in Phuket. We had a very good experience in Aziamendi and so have held a high expectation as there is no such type of fine cuisine in Chiangmai. The restaurant is very nicely decorated but have limited number of indoor seats. We went there at 7 pm and the indoor seats have all been booked but tables were available in the terrace. It was fine except for the presence of mosquitos. We asked for some mosquitos repellent and was given one very promptly. Menu was presented interestingly in a newspaper like fashion. Service is among the best I could find in Chiangmai. Waitress speaks very good English. Wine by the glass and by bottles are not cheap but are reasonably priced taking into the service and settings of the restaurant. You could bring your own wine and they only charge you 300 Baht which is very reasonable too. We ordered a glass of prosecco for each of us. I had the spicy tomato soup as starter and a pizza for the main course. My husband had the pork belly as starter , followed by the seafood tagliatelle and then their signature dish coffee infused pork ribs. He ordered a glass of Argentine red wine to go with the ribs. Basket of bread with delicious fresh pesto sauce was served before the arrival of dishes . The soup was delicious with a tint of Thai spice inside. The pork belly was also good. It was served with ham and tiny vinegar jelly cubes to counteract the richness of the dish which is very good try. The pizza is the thin crust one and tasted good but I won't say it is the best in town. The crust could be a bit more crispy. Pasta also good but still not al dente enough. We were most let down by the signature dish. The gnocchi that went with the dish was delicious,crispy on the outside and chewy on the inside. But the ribs bit tender enough and it was a bit of hardwork chewing them. The favor was good though. We mentioned that to the restaurant manager when she came to check out whether things were ok. She apologized and waived the dish right away which was very much appreciated. Overall it was in interesting and pleasant dining experience. I hope there could be improvement later on when the team has run in and I do hope the chef could continue his innovative cuisine so that there is more diversity in the restaurants in Chiangmai. Read less

We like the decor, the plates and everything, but the quality of the food don't match the prices. The pizzabottom seemed to be produced elsewhere - it was absolutely tasteless. We didn't expect to have to pay for water, as this usually is free - unless you order it. Also the service is a little bit overdone.

The Staff was great. I could feel great hospitality. The rooftop is very stunning for the nice view point of the area with mountain line, gorgeous !. The menu that we had are Akyra Pizza, Gnocchi, Truffle and Mushrooms, Zucchini Sticks, Wood Fried Italic Lasagna, Tiramisu, Strawberry honey iced tea, and more drinks. The price was very reasonable for 5-Star dinning. All was great. We will absolutely return there.

We don't usually review restaurants, but this is a wonderful find in Chang Mai. The chef is very innovative and the ambience and food are amazing. Service is impeccable.Highly recommended if you are in the city. Stayed at the hotel (also wonderful) and able to try breakfast lunch and dinner. All were excellent.

I was there with my bf months ago and the memory of our meals here remains a big part of the whole trip (where we've eaten at many restaurants but I remember only our meals here) food and atmosphere are perfect combination. Oh and I also like very much the rooftop bar. Don't miss to check it out after your dinner.

I had a great dining experience at Italics, located at the ground floor of the hotel Akyra Manor in Nimmanhaemin soi 9! There is a large choice of dishes on the menu, including the traditional Italian favorites and some with a twist. Every dish my friends and I ordered were tasty and very well-presented. The staff is friendly, skilled and attentive. The atmosphere in the restaurant is very pleasant, with a beautiful and modern decoration. After dinner, we went to have a drink at the rooftop bar, which is also a great place overlooking the area and facing Doi Suthep. Will definitely come back!

Italics is the best pizza in Chiangmai. If you like thin pizza, wood oven smell and fresh product, you will falling in love with Italics pizza for sure. For my personal. I love four cheese pizza and the northern pizza. Will be back again very soon.

We had a lovely meal here sat out on the terrace. The food was good and beautifully presented. The service was attentive without being intrusive. Our meal was very much Italian - crostini and a cold cuts platter as a shared starter, with pizza and pasta to follow. It wasn't the cheapest meal and, for us, counted as a bit of a treat but we weren't disappointed. The one thing I felt was lacking was the option to have an affordable glass of wine with my meal. Wines by the glass started at 280 baht and I couldn't quite justify that. It is also worth noting that tax and a 10% service charge are added to the final bill. All in all we had a very enjoyable evening and will definitely eat here again.

Very elegant and tasteful decor in this very fine Italian Restaurant conveniently located on Nimmenhaemin Soi 9. Wonderful, kind, and attentive staff who spoke great English. The thin crust pizza and the fish were superb as was the wine and the salads with amazingly fresh lettuce that smiled upon us. Bathrooms were so clean stylish. The lighting was superb. All of our dishes were greatly appreciated and devoured.

Great Italian fare in Nimmanhaemin Road, Soi 9. My first visit to this newly established restaurant and l was not disappointed. Located on the ground floor of The Akyra Hotel, the decor is in keeping with a modern Italian Restaurant, l was only here for lunch but will return soon to experience dinner and the roof top bar. A car valet available upon arrival, what more can you ask for. The dishes l tried were tasty and reasonably priced, they also offer breakfast from 7 am, and on Friday nights, there is live jazz music available from 9 PM, also they have an 'Happy Hour' from 5.30 to 6.30 PM, this is a place well worth a visit, almost forgot to mention the staff, so friendly and great service

It was a good experience to visit the Italics hotel and restaurant. Summarising, superior quality food and service, friendly staff, good English understanding, nice roof top bar. All well, including outside terrace. I will do this again ( and again).

During the recent trip in Chiang Mai, we found this hotel on Nimman road and learned that they have just opened their Italian restaurant on the lobby floor. We all love Italian food so we agreed to check it out! The restaurant design is a kind of luxury modern style, in my opinion. Look a bit mysterious when entering because of the lighting. In over all, however, it looks nice. The hotel and restaurant staff are very attentive to service. From its menu, there are a variety of Italian classics and my favorite wood-fried pizza are offering as well as other dishes like pasta, fresh salad and desserts. Impressive list of signature cocktails and house wine are offered as well. I have read some comments from other guests in here and found both good and bad comments. I believe that it is because the restaurant has just recently opened so the team should keep the service, the food taste and everything up to the standard and keep it consistency. For me, I had a great dinner here and will surely return when visiting Chiang Mai again in the near future. Read less
Not only for pizza s a perfect choice, but also the à la carte menu, offers for every one something. The breakfast are also out of the world, this comes with very friendly staff

RISE BAR is a fancy place to be with friends before dinner or for a nightcap: A rooftop hideaway at sundown. They serve classic cocktails, fine wines and some snacks right next to a chic design swimming pool. Great service, nice atmosphere, ok prices.

My wife and I found the food over priced and only fair tasting. We've been there twice and had take away once. The only trip we enjoyed was the pizza and there are many better places in ChiangMai with better and less expensive pizza. The decor is a bit over done, I wish the food lived up to the decor.

We were referred to Italics by an Italian chef at another establishment in Chiang Mai. Overall, we weren't disappointed. We had a nice dinner here for my wife's birthday. I highly recommend the "spicy tomato seafood cioppino". The "homemade ravioli" and "penne arrabbiata" weren't the best we've had, but the "sea bass puttanesca" was good. Service and ambiance are excellent.

A nice combination of choice between Italian and local food. The breakfast menu is extensive. One little tip when ordering eggs mention that you like them hot and they will be. We attended their Christmas eve dinner and that was very well done complete with carol singers. For a light meal go for the pizzas.
The service was nice with friendly staffs:) the restaurant decoration is unique. Food and desserts are delicious ^^ I recommend for a special dinner.

Four of us had a memorable holiday dinner at Italics just before Christmas. This is a new restaurant, but it's a impressive how fast they have established high standards of service and top-notch quality of food. Only minor suggestion for improvement would be slightly crispier thin crust on the pizza. The cioppino approached standards of the best Italian seafood restaurants in my San Francisco hometown. Daring contemporary design, especially beautiful dining ambiance.

We had the intention to go in an other restaurant. But it was fully booked. So we went to Italics. Ant I have to say that I do not regret it to have been there! The restaurant is made so nice. I felt pretty comfortable when I entred it. The personal was also verry nice. And the food! I had crochettes (they were amazing!) and after I had a pizza. It was too much food but so good that I have mostly eaten the whole pizza. I would really recommend you to go to this restaurant if you are in chiang mai.

Thai and Italian fusion concept works well and served with panache. Only food negatives were that Portions on small side and pizza didn't stand out. We travelled across town to get here and not convinced this restaurant was worth the trip. Very contemporary inside and outside dining space. Slightly upscale. But ambience underwhelming.

Amazing food, vast choice, original menu and excellent service. We were craving something different in Chiang Mai amongst all the street food stalls and came across this restaurant, good value for money!

I was excited about trying out Italics as it looked like a beautiful restaurant and the prices seemed responsible with mains around 420 baht. But when the courses came, I realized they were tiny. Two of us ended up spending 2,280 baht on an average meal that should have been half of that. We ordered: 2 Mains 1 Side Salad to share 1 Glass of House Wine that was 289 baht + tax and service 2 Scoops of Gelato I think it was the tax and service on top of the food that made it more than I expected, and house wine is normally a lot less in Chiang Mai so I didn't even look at the menu. If the food was exceptional or the portions were larger I would have been happy, but with "okay" food and tiny portions, I won't be going back. Read less
Nice decoration, friendly staff, good wine selection, not too pricy. The chef fuses thai and italian cuisine and I must say the lasagna was the best I ever had.

The food was excellent, not as expensive as I would have expected for what you eat. The decor looks great, but the seating is uncomfortable and not very private, you are almost sitting at the same table as other people. The wine selection was good and reasonable. Also valet for the motorbike which was a first for me. 4 stars for seating and the fact they have a service charge. Hate the service charge, pay your staff and do away with it. I hate to see Chiang Mai start having service charge everywhere.

So my fiance raved on how good Italics looked, I hadn't checked it out before hand and didn't have any expectations. The hotel has a beautiful look on the outside not your normal concrete building although its surroundings are some what plane. The welcome was really pleasant and the place immediately had a luxury feel to it. The decor was very modern and you could see the kitchen and chef which we like. The price in THB was a bit more than we were used to paying but after all we are backpacking for two years so this was a splurge. In terms of the GBP it was a freaking steal of a meal! So we started with the Croquettes (Tasty,slightly bland required seasoning but very filling) you get four beautifully presented croquette balls we shared them between two persons and felt it was just the right amount. They cost 180THB however on the bill at the end they add Tax & Service charge. Mains was a spaghetti Carbonara 280THB it was actually very heavy but loaded with bacon. Then we also had a pizza so good!! that was 240THB (i think) we had two waters and the total bill charge was around 1970THB. The roof top has a gorgeous bar with a stunning pool we plan to go and watch the sun set over a Mojito. The guest who were staying at the hotel all looked very happy and new guests got welcome drinks and cold cloths on arrival. (Can anyone tell I am a people watcher?) Read less

This place has very cool decor. Very modern. The food was nicely plated and made with notably high quality ingredients. Recommended for a nice date night. we had the caprese and a pizza, and the bread they serve beforehand was very yummy and served with a fresh pesto sauce. The wait staff was very attentive and sweet.

I went to Rise Bar on Loy Kratong night, I loved the atmosphere of this rooftop bar, Perfect spot for looking at thousands of Lanterns on the sky with the full moon, so beautiful and feel so relaxing. You can swim if you want to :) it's really cool. Great food & drink, great service from the staff and reasonable price. I m already looking forward for the next visit. Possibly a few night stay at Akyra Manor. Really impressive! great experience! Read less
Good food. Fantastic service. The rooftop is very beautiful as well. Definitely a place to visit if you fancy a more upscale place. 8/10

The service is fantastic, as is the ambiance. Elegant, but comfortable. They provided some fugazza and bread with a pesto while the food was preparing which was great. The only downside came with my expectations I guess. Some of the pizza in tripadvisor pictures resembled the result of a wood fired brick oven pizza burning hot enough. While the pizza I was served was good, it doesn't qualify as wonderful. The cheese was pretty melted, but the dough was not crunchy enough, so it feels it was cooked long in an oven that was not hot enough. It was good nonetheless and enjoyed fully. Read less

I wanted to treat myself and enjoy some fine dining. I enjoyed Khao Soi and a Caesar salad. The chef was nice enough to go out of his way to make it vegetarian (no anchovy sauce). Service was on point and the staff was friendly. I will definitely come back!
Awesome!! Great food Great Chef.. Perfect atmosphere and really impressive in service. Will definitely visit again. Love this place!!
The atmosphere was classy clean and comfortable. As for the food it was delicious with nice services and friendly chef ka
Absolutely amazing!!! The best food best we have had in Chiang Mai (and we live here!). Only criticism is that the desserts are very expensive.

A friend from Japan was in Chiang Mai and I wanted to surprise her with something special, and Italic restaurant was it. When we arrived, my friend gave out an audible gasp when we entered the front doors due to the stunning and stylish beauty of the dining area, and also as a result of the smells wafting out of the kitchen. The chef came out to greet us and asked us if we had any questions about the menu, which was very helpful given the size and breadth of the thing. We shared the savory and aromatic Akyra signature pizza from the wood fired oven and a huge garden salad of mixed greens, roasted vegetables,fresh tomatoes topped with generous amounts of shaved Parmesan. In addition, we had the huge portion of light & fluffy lasagne laced with Chiang Mai sausage in fresh Royal Project heirloom tomato sauce. The mango panna cotta was a dreamy finale to our dinner. Afterwards, we went to the hotel Akyra's rooftop bar, Rise and enjoyed an aperitif from their premium bar staffed by friendly and professional bar tenders. This bar has one of the best panoramic views of the city of Chiang Mai, all next to an incredible one piece acrylic swimming pool. You will not be disappointed. Read less
I have eaten at Italics twice and both times excellent..the menu is small so the selection not so big but everybody happy with their meals and the service is excellent. A lovely Ambience

went there for lunch a few days ago, was warmly welcomed by staff and the management. They took good care of us without doing too much. Chef came to check on us, very kind and for sure he is talented. Nicely presented, tasty, I enjoyed every moment of my time there. Very original decoration by Singaporean designer. definitely a place I recommend and would return.

Had dinner tonite here...very impressed! Wonderful, genuinely caring, attentive staff & the manageress 'Cy' was friendly but officiant & perfect English! Ambience was relaxing, & I love the modern but comfortable decor. Food was really good, we had pizza, the "Italian sausage with caramelised onions & Gorgonzola cheese"...delicious! We had a passionfruit shake & 'Tiramiso' for desert. Both of which were first rate! Whether it's for business or pleasure this restaurant is a real treat! I asked about the rooftop bar & pool & immediately one of the gorgeous girls on the front desk escorted us up to have a look...beautiful. Perfect for a romantic date! (I dream on¿) Only one more thing to say...ENJOY!! Tracy :) Read less

I have been to this restaurant many times with my friends, I really like this place , first impression for me is design of the hotel but the reason i write review because the food here is amazing, its very detail in food and i can ask for anything i like with the chef even not in the menu , they can make very proper italian taste, and much more with some fusion dishes which can not find from other restaurant, and thai food is superp which i didnt expect at first and cant wait to try their breakfast looks so great.And the service is over expected its more than five stars even when i was there its very busy the staffs are still so friendly. Italics is already my favourite place in chiangmai.
Great romantics Italian dinner experience. The menu is innovative and tasty. Service was very good and friendly. Will be back for sure

Quite romantic, smoke mirror ceiling, & elegant presentation. I had the tomato basil soup, taste very much like gazpacho, excellent. Dinner chicken with celantro, beautiful presentation, and delicate flavor. Desert cheesecake with hot cream and chocolate shavings, a must. Drink lechee soda, loved it. The Chef came out to introduce himself to me and to inquire about my meal, nothing but glowing remarks. Service was impeccable with proper dinner settings ( crystal wine glasses, and heavy silverware, and proper cloth napkins). After dinner, one is able to wonder up to the roof-top bar and pool, romantic. Great find! Read less

wow, the best restaurant in chiang mai, was just there for lunch, and i made a reservation for dinner too, i ate paccheri caprese, and fish with black ink risotto, the pasta was al dente, great food quality, everything was perfect, service, ambiance, i can't wait to go back this evening, thank you very much ITALICS....

I love Italics... since a friend told me about a new Italian in Nimmanhaemin that had great food, service and ambiance about a month ago, I think I've been there 14 times!? On Saturday I went on the spur of the moment to discuss something with Cyrielle, the Restaurant Manager and decided to stay for dinner. I had the Gnocchi with mushroom and truffle oil (I asked for a 1/2 portion so that I could have it as a starter, which was no problem) it was simply spine shivery awesome! This followed by the coffee infused short rib (served in a miniature La Crueset style roasting dish) was also perfect. Love Italics... will be a very regular guest there and would recommend to anyone seeking innovative I - Thai cuisine. Read less

Not cheap but great quality, beautiful pizzas & pastas. I had Italian fennel sausage, caramelised onion & Gorgonzola pizza. Amazing flavour. My husband had the homemade ravioli in a spicy tomato sauce with pork belly on top. Both delicious & filling. Loved the bread for the table. Nice wine list although we didn't have any this time. Great service. I didn't read the fine print & I'm unaccustomed to a service charge, but I didn't mind paying the 12% or so for such good service & the "free" bread basket.

We only ate pizza - tasty, thin and crispy. Modern and stylish environment - in black. Unfortunately the price of wines (and beers) is excessive in relation to the quality (a small glass of Chilean wine costs more than the food!). This restaurant is a good choice for tourists residing at the hotel while local residents have a wide choice at much lower prices.

Friends and I enjoyed a very good dinner at Italics last night. The welcome and service was great; the décor was stylish and inviting; and the food was very good. For dinner, Italics serves a range of pasta, pizza, appetizer, and other dishes. Every member of my group liked their choice and went home satisfied. Italics is a little pricier than nearby restaurants, but the service and quality food are worth it. I would recommend it for a couple that wants a romantic meal, friends, and, well, just about anybody else. Note that as well as Italian, Italics serves some Thai dishes too. Read less

We were a group of 9 celebrating a birthday. Lovely roof terrace and great restaurant decor. The cocktails are served in glasses a bit too large with too much ice. The food was very delicious, but unfortunately our hot food was served in shifts, instead of together, with was unpleasant. They will better timing here.

I love this place, from the food to he staff to the ambience, etc. I had to try several things the first time I went there (do not worry, I took a lot home), and enjoyed everything. Also, they serve an early breakfast beginning at 8 a.m. and I am going there this weekend to try the smoked salmon eggs benedict (I know, it is not ham, but I do not know what else to call it). The wine list is superb and the rooftop bar is a wonderful retreat in the evenings or a cool afternoon. The prices are mazingly reasonable for what you get. The smoked salmon bene for example is 270B. I have also referred friends there and they have made it one of their top places. I could not recommend it any more highly. Read less

We ordered pizza downstairs before heading up to Rise bar to enjoy the cool breeze beside the pool. Being a photographer I loved seeing the beautiful photographic portraits displayed in the lobby and up at Rise. We ordered drinks and were given cool moist towels while we waited just a short time for the pizza to arrive. The thin crust pizza was a good size, lots of cheese and flavorsome toppings, cooked perfectly. The atmosphere was perfect and relaxing with good views and a nice breeze. We'll be back!

Had a lovely meal in this modern Italian restaurant. It's a place to come if you're looking to try some interesting, creative dishes not found else where. The Coffee Braised Short Rib came highly recommended, so we tried it. It was lovely and full of flavor. The gnocchi cooked in duck fat was amazing, and went really well with the beef. The other dishes we had were nicely done as well. Italics would be a good choice for a special occasion, or if you'd like to try something different! Read less
You will find that they provide you with great food and great atmosphere in italic the meatball is awesome

As part of honeymoon in Thailand, we went to eat at the restaurant. First, the restaurant design that combines authenticity of Thailand into the modern era. The food, cocktails and service is very high level. We enjoyed so much that after we finished the main course, we ordered another one. The restaurant menu suitable to everyone. It was our last night Chiang Mai and enjoyed every minute of a romantic evening.

So that night was my last night in chiang mai i was feed up and tired of sea food i was looking for some authentic italian cuisine since i am a fond of pizza and pasta.. At first glance at the resturant i was blown away by the beauty, sleek, modern and romantic design... Anways i got over my self and ordered 'four cheese pizza' and 'chilli garlic spaghetti ' and the food was yummmmmmyy also they bring a set of spices with your pizza which is a big pluss! Also the spaghetti was amazing the food is so fresh and the ingredients is well balanced. For desert i ordered termisu served with coffee icecream, the best termisu i have ever tasted! The staff were so polite i actually fell in love with them! The price was fair. Read less

If you would like to taste with tge real italian food, don't miss this restaurant. Its a new place but its not a new chef. I hv been here cause a chef is my friend, he is have a lot of experiance such as Centara Phuket, the famous rest in Melbourne etc. Anyway, this is not the reason that im writing and review this rest on tripvisor but i wanna say the food is also great. I tested the 4 cheeses pizza there and yes...its very yummy and not expensive. If i have a chance, i ll go there again for sure...
Modern relaxed atmosphere,good discreet service, great chef! All this in the middle of action in Soi 9 off Nimmanhemin. What more could I ask?

Visited the restaurant one hot afternoon and the drinks menu called out to me. They have an excellent selection of thirst quenchers which looks and tastes good. Had a Hawaiian Duck pizza which I liked. The crust was thin and crunchy with a little bit of chew. The staff were friendly and the vibes of the place made me feel like staying in the restaurant forever.
Nice place and yummy food you guys should try I promise I'll go back there again and next time I will take the photo to share to all of your guys more than this

My husband and I were in Chiang Mai for a quick getaway. Our second night there, we decided to try Italics which a friend had recommended. We thoroughly enjoyed our meal as the service was on point and the food even more so. Our favorites were the 4 cheese woodfire pizza, the crayfish risotto, and the special salad. We would def go back to try the other dishes!

Service: Quite good. A bit too stiff and waiters scared to not meet their own aspirations. They were polite, educated and fast. Food: Complimentary bread was served but only with a tiny little bit of pesto. When asking for butter I was brought a peanut-sized piece of hard butter. As a starter I ordered a cold cut platter. Quality was good, presentation o.k. For the main platter I was served a pizza. The dough was very good but the cheese was of lower supermarket quality. This was disappointing. Not surprising, they are not capable of distinguishing between "Edamame" soy beans and "Edamer Cheese" even in their menu. For them it is all "Edamame", even their cheese balls are made from "Edamame". Wow. Atmosphere: black floors, black walls and ceilings and an non-existing atmosphere make this place quite gloomy. Only new rich Russians or Chinese who need to drink their afternoon champagne will like the concept. There must be a reason that the restaurant was completely empty on a Saturday night. Also, the aircon was way too cold. The restaurant is quite small and needs to share its space with the reception. That does not help a lot either. The pricing is definitely one of the highest which can be found in Chiangmai (and Bangkok) but this small place has not the class to compete in this league. Read less

No words can explain how good it is! I will try other pizza next time. Just want to say Love this Pizza....Italian Sausage 👍👍 มีโอกาสได้ลองชิมพิซซ่าหน้า italian sausage ต้องบอกว่าอร่อยมาก พิซซ่าร้อนๆ กลิ่มหอมๆ ชีสเยิ้มๆ ได้ลองทานแล้วมีความสุขมากค่ะ ❤️❤️
I love to be here again soon. I recommend pizza so greatest in Chiangmai and good design and great service and good feeling

Excellent dining experience. We asked the chef Phubase to choose for us few of his signature dishes for us to share at the table and the all experience was just amazing : decoration, quality, presentation etc...definitely the place to go in Chiang Mai for a great meal experience.

Everything from start to finish was awesome! Great cocktails, awesome pizza, and the braised short rib pasta was also amazing. Save room for dessert the mango pannacota was to die for!!! Service was top notch and there was a great ambiance to the place. If you are looking for a romantic dinner this place will not disappoint.

We went here with a large group of about 18 people and thoroughly enjoyed it. In the past at other restaurants with a group this large the service has poor. Not here. The service was excellent, as was the food. And the atmosphere is lovely with very attractive decor. You receive complimentary bread with pesto spread and water (and butter upon my request). Our meals were served promptly, and our water glasses refilled often. I had the classic chicken Cesar salad and it was the best I've had here in Thailand. My husband had the sea bass which was divine. The only problem was he's a big guy and it was a small portion, so he was still hungry. So he ordered the fried rice to top off with and it was very good (priced per the surroundings however). Everyone seemed to enjoy what they had (rib eye said to be melt in your good, and the pizzas, lasagna, and spaghetti and meatballs all good). This is not a cheap night out in Chiang Mau, but it is well worth it and a great special occasion place. There is tax and service charge of 17% added on to the bill. They have complimentary valet parking which is a great bonus. Read less

i went to this place a few days ago, because l and my friends always look for the place for dining. and when i saw this place it looks very interesting from the design so different from others in chiangmai so i decided to have our dinner there, we ordered meany things, and the food were just so great over i expected , pizza is amazing, a lot topping reasonable price, and the rest also great too, they have many fusion food for appetizer and also thai food, but the main dish and pasta is so italian taste , the chef there must be very good experience, and the staffs there so friendly always smile and keep taking care of us , so i really like Italics , new destination in Chiangmai, will go back again. Read less

I was in Chiang Mai couple of weeks ago with my friends and one night we decided to try anything that is not local. We are staying in Nimmanhaemin Rd and came across Italics; a restaurant inside Akyra Manor Hotel (apparently opening soon!) The interior of Italics, when looking from the streets, is amazing. Like in a magical place. My friends and 1 ordered a lot of dishes to share. Our experience was basically overwhelming. We loved the staff, they were very attentive to us and always serving with a smile. Food was also great, i especially liked the Coffee Braised Beef Short Rib, their Special Salad (quite interesting mix and a must try!), and the wood fired oven pizzas. Ambiance was really good, very casual and friendly. I will definitely recommend Italics to my friends and family. And i really wish they will work very well. Keep up the good work Italics! Read less

i been there at frist, im so proud of everythg, such as environment, kind of food, food presentations, staff, event Chef be kind taking care of us. i d love to invite you to come and try @ Italics at Akyra (cnx) with fantastic#excellent#best# over all of food and service... ^_^ C u again on November !

The food,The ambience,The background_Everything seems so well together,My friends and I really enjoyed our dinning experience in this restaurant.If you have someone special in Chiangmai,you must bring them here.

I have a wonderful dinning experience at Italics Restaurant located in Akyra Manor Chiang Mai during my recent trip. Love the unique interior and friendly service. I ordered mussels, rib eye and dessert and are very impressed that all the dishes are above my expectation, will definitely recommend to my friends.

I went to Italics restaurant which located Akyra manor the new 5 stars hotel in Nimman soi9 because of my friends were there and I just went to meet them , at first sight when I was there this was such a amazing fancy design place I ever see in Chiang mai, and then I tried the food from my friend because I didn't plan to order any food , but the pizza there is super good, one of the best I can say and all other dishes also very good , I sort of know from the food that the chef here are well trained and carry on strong experience, and then I would love to order something in the menu but it's a beef dish then I asked service staff to call the chef to talk with me , and then chef came over at my table , and I was so surprised that the ex chef here , he is Thai, and then I asked him how can you cook this this instead of beef to something else , he was very helpful with my problem then I got this dish with very tender pork belly so amazing, apart from the food wise , the service is super good, I know they are 5 stars hotel but the service there was over expectation , friendly and well trained , so this place is strongly recommend from me and the price is very reasonable compare to other 5 stars hotel , I would go bak to try more food there.
