It was our last night in Chiang Mai and we just wanted to get the hell out of there and go somewhere else where to enjoy our time. Take my advice AVOID this place. Food/drinks all average. Service SUB-PAR. Read less

Went to celebrate a great time with friends. I should have known something was wrong, when I ordered white wine and they brought me red. They would not return it, and billed me for it. When we went to order, the manager put items on the order list which we did not order, and verbally was rude and refused to remove it from the bill. My friends were outraged by the managers behavior. I do not accept padding the bill. And, no was no mistake in what we ordered. I see that this has happened to others. This was one of my favorite places to eat in Chiang Mai, Now I WILL NEVER GO BACK! There are too many really good places to eat in Chiang Mai, this place does not deserve your time or money.. Read less
Food is amazing that is good taste and nice decoration. The food almost is fusion however it's original taste. If you love to try something new. Please try Mix. They are creative and delicious.

Mix in the past was a good restaurant with a wide selection of Thai cuisine beautifully presented and some Japanese and international dishes. Then the success has ruined it: the quality of food has gradually expired, the service has become slow and confused, the manager rude... In my visit today the dish I ordered was incorrectly served to another table (as we have been confirmed by the waiter). The manager called - instead of apologizing for ruining my dinner and for the (understandable) mistake - has instead argued that the delay (more than an hour and a half) was due to the special preparation required of the dish (something patently absurd and not real). All in Thai language without addressing me a word, or say hello or a smile. Bad experience, restaurant to erase. Read less

Came to have dinner with my gf after we arrived from BKK. The service was slow and our appetizers and drinks didn't come for 20 mins. There was some confusion on our entree choices and we ended up with 3 instead of 2. Seemed a little sketchy, we ended up paying for a dish that we didn't order just to end the drawn out payment process. I felt like in was in Phuket not Chiang Mai.

Went to Mix with couple friends for dinner. The manager took our orders but when the food came, there were dishes that we didn't order. Our wonderful night was ruined as we spent 15 mins + trying to reason to the manager that we are unwilling to pay for the dishes that we didn't order nor eat. But the manager insisted we ordered them and refused to remove them from the bill. If you value your time in Chiang Mai, skip this restaurant.
Mix restaurant and food is a great place to dine and with in most budgets with a huge (almost too much to choose from) menu. Good service... excellent presentation and warm atmosphere.

I know this sounds a bit dramatic, but as a frequent traveler to Chiang Mai, tonite humilating for both me and my guests. I went to dinner with several friends visiting from the US. I have been to the Mix several times with a good experience. The were billed for food they did not order, the manager insisted they did. One of my guests was actually allergic to some of the food delivered to the table. Now, I understand Thai well, and there was no mistake in ordering here. All items were ordered by number system. I am unsure if the manager with trying to pad the bill or what..either way no one should attempt to take advantage of visitors like this restaurant did this evening. I was embarrassed for both my self and guests. This type of behavior is not acceptable in Thailand. I am recommending that you avoid this restaurant or if you do go confirm your order not once but twice. You can not trust the staff. In Thailand you are responsible for the bill even if its not all yours. This is not a place i could recommend. Read less

Three friends and I went Mix for dinner. We had been to this location in last year and their other location in April. We were celebrating a friends birthday and were exciting for a nice dinner. We ordered with ease as the menu has pictures and two people were native thai speakers. After we started getting the dishes we ordered it became clear there were dishes we didn't order appearing and one missing that we did order. We mentioned it to our server who ended up being the manager and after of him telling us we were wrong, we asked to see the order pad. The Mix menu is quite large and has the benefit of having picture of MOST of the items on the menu. We ordered by pointing to the pictures. Well it ends up, the items we didn't order didn't have pictures. The server/manager insisted we ordered the items. Finally after 15 minutes of belligerence, we gave up paid the bill and left. I am not sure if they were just trying to over bill us or it was an honest mistake but regardless it was handled quite poorly. He never once apologized or offered that there could have been a "mix up" at Mix. Needless to say, what was supposed to be a festive night turned out to be uncomfortable and bordering on rude. I can tell you we were not there to pinch pennies. If you are not comfortable getting charged for items you don't order or getting told you don't know what you ordered, this is probably not the place for you. Looking for a nice relaxing evening with drinks and dinner with friends, don't come here at the risk of confrontation over challenging their mistakes. Read less

The desserts were presented beautifully and taste just as good. Must try: Apple sorbet! They made it on the spot right b4 your eyes! Salmon & oyster in a spoon is also superb! Fresh! Will be back again the next time I cm CHIANG MAI

A nice restaurant to have dinners, whether you are visiting just the two of us or with a bunch of friends! Nice food, extensive choice of menu, the outdoor seating is pretty nice too, will definitely visit again!
Tasty, creative, huge variety, excellent value for money, excellent service, will recommend and will be back.

If you are looking for a cool and chic place for dinner in Nimmanhemin area, this is definitely the place! The food was really good with loads of selection of menu and cocktails. The food is international and Thai fusion which is very cool. The most important things is that, they were all delicious. My favourite is the ambience and the music. It's a very hip and cozy place. I have been there many times, service might not be the best, but it's not that bad. I would recommend people to go.

I read Mix Restaurant from an excellent magazine in Chiang Mai called CITY LIFE. Based on their great review, I visited this restaurant without a reservation. I wanted to sit inside (they have outside patio dining also). The restaurant was full, but, they found a table for one - inside - for me. The menu is extremely extensive - from Thai to Japanese to Wester dishes etc. I asked my server, Tam who is also the owner's son to help me. He did an excellent job. I had chicken soup (clear) and fried rice. Both dishes were delicious. That was my first visit. One week afterwards, I went back - this time with a reservation. Tam served me again and I had steamed fish in soy sauce. Very good. They have a big wine list that also includes certain Promotions. Please look for that to get a good wine at a reasonable price. Read less

Two friends, who are well acquainted with Mix Restaurant, invited me to join them for dinner last night. Wow--it was amazing and I lamented for the first hour that I had never been before. The menu is extensive, so I spent ages looking at all the options before we settled on cheese and spinach triangles and sates for appetizers; followed by northern Thai curry (panang) with New Zealand lamb and roti, stir fried scallops with broccoli and dried scallop paste, King's Project trout steamed in pandanus leaf. The final course included profiterole, crepe with fresh fruit and a chocolate lava cake. Whilst the presentation of all dishes was beautiful - the food was amazing! The scallops were tender and melted in your mouth as did the trout; whilst the panang was delectable and the rotis amazing. The sweets were delicious. Mix is a restaurant experience not to be missed. Bottles of Heineken, cocktails, mocktails, tea and coffee were drank throughout the evening and the bill was under $30 a head (900 baht) Read less

This is the first time I felt strong enough to write any reviews ever on my travels. This restaurant has terrible service beyond belief. The staff treated us very rudely. My dad has Lung problems and we requested for a table change after sitting down due to smoke from neighboring tables. We were told to there were no tables when clearly there are at least 5 other empty tables!!! Seriously are they for real?? There are plenty of other restaurants you can try in chiang mai - stay away !

This makes a change form the local food you may have had throughout your travels. The menu is extensive, there must have been more than 300 options, ranging from thai to international. The food is well presented and has a fancy restaurant feel for a less than fancy restaurant price. Expect to pay more per dish than your used to (around 250 Baht) but expect to be excited with the presentation and variety.
Fantasy night with my family to here have a big dinner, great taste food and great place, do not pass here, you must enjoy your dinner here.

When you first time enter the place its really a WOW affect! Nice Location outside and inside, you get a big book as your menu, so it will take a while until you can order. Service is a bit strange, like they ask you: You want Wine? and if you answer yes, no more reaction, no advice nothing. A special are the cocktails, if you wanna make a show in the Restaurant and also make all the other tables look at you, order one of the Molecular Cocktails and everbody in the Restaurant will look at your table, quite funny ;-) Food was nice, nothing to complain and at the end was a really nice evening. if it is really one of the Best Restaurants of Thailand since years, like all the Awards saying on the Wall, hmm not so sure about that, but for sure a nice place to go for Dinner! Read less

How sad that such a great restaurant in the past is now well below par. have been here several times but last two times have been a complete disappointment. On the last occasion took 2 friend s from HKG there. We ordered drinks. I asked for a bourbon & coke. Reply from waitress was " what is that" I rephrased to" do you have jim beam or jack Danials" reply I know nothing about alcohol. so I ordered a vodka tonic. the three other people also ordered. My drink arrived 10 minutes later, unfortunately it was a gin & tonic, when this was pointed out the eyes rolled on the waitress and she strutted off, it took 40 minutes to deliver the 4 drinks. The food order was also very complicated it seems for the inept waitress, I asked for . " spare ribs" reply once again was , what is that. . All our food finally arrived gradually over 30 minutes, all was over cooked and disappointing. Well end result is we will not be going back here or recommending to our guests. . Sad for once a really great place Read less

I've been there 4-5 times, service is really bad, coktails are ok, food is juste above average (and way overpriced for what it is), desserts are good. First time there my friends had the time to eat all their appetizzers before someone come to tell me mine isn't avalaible (and asked me if I wanted to change .....). Last time there, main dishes were served before appetizzers. Portions of food are too small especially the side dishes. The food is quite okay (exept carbonara pasta which are drowning in cream) but too expensive for what it is. Read less

Overall we were very pleased with our experience. I ordered a frozen lemon grass mixology cocktail and the mixologist came table side to prepare it for a unique experience. We shared plates, so the order at which the food came out was fine (they brought out the rice first which was good). We sat indoors and it was very cozy yet still felt private. There is limited parking. The food was very well thought out and creative. It was very pricey, so maybe a good place to go on a special occasion. We found the food to be tasty and would recommend the restaurant.

Visited this restaurant this evening, arrived when they were preparing for service and was told that I could not sit at a proper table as all the tables were reserved. No problem. The menu is very extensive, with photos of the food. Ordered raw tuna and avocado salad which was delicious, some of the best tuna I have tasted, the chicken salad was also good. For main course the roast duck and the Australian lamb cutlet were ordered. Both meats cooked well and both came with flavored mash potatoes and a sauce. Unfortunately the mash and sauces were cold. For dessert the crime brûlée was nothing special and the molten chocolate sponge was cold! This could be a great restaurant, and for Chiang Mai it is, but they need to make sure the food is served hot. Prices are very reasonable and the portions are large, I would eat here again. Read less

This is not a cheap eatery, so my expectations were that it should deliver a better quality of food and service than less expensive restaurants. It did not, the service was very disorganized. We were part of a group, individual orders arrived haphazardly with one of our group being missed completely and having to complain, when most of the group had finished eating hers finally arrived.

Overrated Restaurant. Food very average. One of our courses never arrived but no apology. Wine price higher on our bill than on Wine List but would not honour price . Service poor. Waste of money. Would not recommend at all.
I have been here for the third times.I like to try many food such as thai,chinese and international cuisine.They have good service and many kind of wine.

Mix offers an interesting selection of fusion Thai and Western flavors that often hit the mark. I would not say the cuisine is innovative but more on the simple side. For example, the sirloin beef in Phanang sauce I had was tasty if unspectacular. The same went for every other dish we had. I enjoyed the freshness of the vegetables and the beautiful, artistic creations on the plates. I liked the funky atmosphere of Mix, with its red-cushioned walls, Indian/Chinese artwork and old-house vibe. Converting a house into a restaurant has its challenges regarding functional space, but I thought Mix did a pretty good job with table positions. It is a good thing the restaurant has a large outdoor seating area with a bar. Our seating inside the "house" was comfortable. The service was quite good when we were there. One of the waiters was very patient with explanations of foods and what he thought we should go for. The bar had a nice selection of imported beers, so that was another plus. The location is good, with a large property at the end of Soi 1 on trendy Nimmanhemin Road, but with limited parking. Mix is the kind of place where you go for something different. If you go there looking for the finest of Thai or Western food in Chiang Mai, you would leave feeling cheated and disappointed. Read less

I'm really surprised when I read 5 star comments claiming how the food is good at Mix. Is it a joke ? Cocktails arrived after appetizers, some main dishes before appetizer but don't worry the bill arrived at the end ! I was the first time that I had to ask to have a talk with the manager at the end. He tried to explain to us that we had to specify that we wanted the cocktail before appetizers and main dishes. So if you order desserts, I suggest to say that you want it at the end of the lunch/dinner. They make a mistake for one cocktail we ordered but charge it ! Look carefully at the bill... They tried to be fusion/asian/international/.../ but it's too much ! By trying to be everything they are just nothing. It was my 7th trip in Thailand, I never saw that. The taste of every dishes was just terrible, not fresh at all and we prefered not to finish to be sure to be not sick ! I suggest to go there for one singha because the atmosphere is not so bad but be care that the bottle was not open before... Read less

You can enjoy many kinds of food here..from Thai, Japanese, Western, etc..you can also enjoy the attraction from your order..such as flaming ice cream in global warming menu..it's very worthed to see..there are many kinds of cocktail too..the service is good..the athmosphere is very romantic in the night..suitable to bring your spouse or gril/boyfriend in the weekend..but the price is a little bit pricey..but it's okay compared to overall value..the taste of the foods are also very nice..nice presented too..

The good: This restaurant is in a nice setting, with a pleasant outdoor area as well as stylish indoor tables including a nice green wall. The gin martini and northern style lamb curry we ordered were fine, if nothing special. The bad: The service was indifferent and bored, like the staff didn't really want to be there. The curry was luke warm. We ordered two of the molecular cocktails, which are priced at a premium. The first we were told couldn't be made by the bartender, the second didn't look at all like the fancy picture and looked and tasted just like an average cocktail at any old bar. Not ok at these prices. The ugly: We had ordered an appetizer of prosiuitto with melon and a spicy salad. The salad was so spicy it was inedible, even though we have a reasonable tolerance for hot foods. We told the server this in basic English, indicating the uneaten salad - she either didn't understand and/or didn't care, and made no response. In summary: poor service, and average food that is way overpriced for what you get. Not recommended. Read less

I have been Mix restaurant couples of time and my recent visit is about less 2 weeks. I had great dinner as always with cosy atmosphere and garden , staff very polite and willing to give u best service. Food was superb with good qualities of eyes catching recipes & material and taste plus impless dish decoration. While you dining here u will find all your satisfaction. Mix became my top list favorite restaurant. My friend was there for the first time on my recent visit and absolutely he really like the place and food very much so we will come back here again and again. Try to make your visit there...it's much better than just reading my review :)

The title is based on how "the show" seems to be more important than what is being served in this place, we ordered 2 drinks (2 Mix cocktails) and after 25 minutes of waiting, whisking, dry ice, waiting, whisking, dry ice and feeling very uncomfortable we were served our drinks which tasted very similar to the alcohol slush puppies you can get in all the tacky bars round Ibiza/Kos etc. We only went there because of a magazine in our hotel where if you took the page, you only paid 100 baht instead of the 250 baht. I gave this flyer to the guy when I ordered and it was only after we quickly drank our drinks and left that I realised he had charged me 500 baht but I couldn't be dealing with the place anymore. This is another example of how paying attention to the customer or their enjoyment/needs plays a far off 2nd to smoke and mirrors TGI Fridays on speed wizardry. The menu has over 300 items on it also which I found really overbearing. I think with the right direction it could be somewhere great but at the moment its doing too much to do anything very well Read less

We made a special trip across town to visit Mix, but were disappointed. We ordered an expensive cocktail which took forever to be prepared by a man who looked bored himself to be whisking dry ice into a bowl. The atmosphere was cold and uninviting, and one drink took so long to arrive we didn't bother with food, we were hungry and didn't want to have to wait a long time. I've never seen such a huge menu in my life, but I don't think that's a good thing, I'd rather go somewhere that concentrates on doing a few things exceptionally well, than trying to cater for every type of cuisine in the world.

Mix bar and restaurant is decorated with the modern chinese style preparing romantic and luxurious atmosphere. It's located in the commercial area on Nimmanhemin Rd. Sure, it's not only the atmosphere of the restaurant looks nice, but all menus are also wonderful and look so delicious. The first time in my life eating here, I can tell you that..oh my god..it seems to be a paradise for those who love international food since there are many various kinds of menu such as Thai, Italian, Chinese, Japanese and also I love the desserts so much. Yummy! Just looked at the heavy menu (more 100 menus ..I'm not sure, but there are so many menus) preparing the pictures for each dish. Wow, the menus look fantastic with delicate decoration. Well, this is another restaurant in my heart. This restaurant also serves all kinds of alcohol, and you can also bring your bottle of wine or some kinds of alcohol to drink here, and then you just give waiter or waitress some money for service charge. Nothing to say....I love this place. Love it at first bite :) Read less
I have back because some of my friends like it here but the service is getting worst and worst. The food was ok and the service was terrible.

We have been there five times over the past two months and it has become one of my favorite places to eat.The food is absolutely delicious, the menu healthy with no options to take you down the naughty route and it leaves you nicely full and satisfied.It is spotless and the staff are very nice. The prices are spot on too, very reasonable! Can't wait to be back someday!
I have been to this restaurant many times. The food is fresh great value for money.all the staff were very friendly and our food came out on time. Overall is was a very good and excellent.

The atmosphere of this restaurant is nice with both an indoor and outdoor setting but it is clear that little care is put into the preparation of the food. 4 of us dined here and each of the dishes was extremely oily and we all left feeling sick. I have no idea how this place got so many good reviews because none of the food we experienced here left us satisfied.

Hands down, best restaurant you will visit in Chiang Mai, and maybe even Thailand. It's all about the food here. Their menu is a large folder with mouth-watering dishes (all contain images) of Thai, Chinese, Japanese and International Food. I ordered way too many dishes and if I could, I would have ordered everything just to try it. It is soooooo hard to decide....! The setting is very nice also and the service is good, but you go here for the food....!! The food outweighs everything else...! Value is really good and excellent if compared to Western Restaurants of the same caliber. Main courses run between 120 Baht to 999 Baht if you want to try their amazing Lobster. I ordered 5 dishes (2 starter and 3 main courses), 2 drinks and got out of there for less that €30 including tip. It's located in the Nimman area of Chiang Mai. More Thai locals than Tourists and so many great bars, cafes, restaurants and spas in this area. Come to check it out...! Read less

I thought the food was excellent. The huge menu made it hard to decide what to order. Service really should be better for this level of dinning. We went with a group and were given 4 menus for 15 people. The servers had no idea who had ordered what-with the language difference it made food delivery chaotic. Management really needs to focus on better training the staff. We'll certainly be back and given how much they've worked on the decor and food I'm sure they'll do the same with the service. Meal was about 600bt/person.
Nice looking restaurant and menu but food did not quite live up to expectations. Also, today the toilets didn't have water and was quite a mess. They should not let that happen.

We went for lunch, the restaurant was quiet. The service was the worst that we have experienced in Thailand. The food is ok, but we were not offered further drinks or desert.. The dirty dishes from the entrees were not cleared, very disappointing. I would not recommend visiting this restaurant - truly an awful experience.

The service was awful, the food just ok. The second and last time we tried to eat there they refused to serve us on the grounds that we were 15 minutes too early. The staff did not even offer to serve us a drink while we were waiting, so we left, never to return.

I'm a regular in the Mix Restaurant in Niman Soi 1. I in particular like the outside sitting area since the restaurant is in a dead end Soi and there is not much traffic. The food is tasty and always well presented though it's not the 100% original Thai food if you are looking for authentic food. Anyway, they have a huge range of dishes and also some western choices beside the well presented Thai dishes. Pricing is ok for what you get. There is also a choice of wine to order which is rather unusual for a Thai restaurant. It's a pity that they don't serve Chang Beer and it would be nice if this could be added soon. It's not a place you want to go when it's raining since the AC inside is making the place uncomfortable. Read less

This is fusion when confusion is blended with in general decent food, we had some dished which were absolutely great, and some which were not as good as to be expected. The shrimps were all frozen small and falling apart, it were with every dish, here MIX will have to improve, also ensuring that every dish is absolutely fresh. Being 8 at our table, service was good, friendly, we all left happy, an acceptable dining evening all considered, as most prices were acceptable and portions in general larger than most Thai restaurants. Though not 100% satisfied it worth a visit. Read less

This restaurant was recommended and my companion had eaten there several times before. It did not disappoint! Although the decor was 'young modern chic' (at least to an older guy!) with underlit glass tables and a variety of different settings inside and out, it wasn't overbright or gaudy. Definitely a 'younger' person's type of resto but there were quite a few 'matures' there obviously enjoying the food. Ah yes, the food! We shared five different main dishes with a few side dishes. We couldn't fault any of it and it was all beautifully and imaginatively presented. I even managed to 'pig out' on a dessert of banana 'fritters' (the term doesn't do it justice!) in a sesame caramel sauce which, put simply, was the best I've had anywhere. The wine list was pretty extensive (it is almost a 'wine bar' after all) and priced 'reasonably' for that type of restaurant. Service, as you might expect, was very good too. All-in-all excellent value for money. We will definitely be back as often as we can! Read less

I have been here a few times and really enjoyed the food, setting and ambiance of this restaurant. The food could be more expensive in terms of other restaurants in Chiang Mai but it is excellent value. Little tricky to find, but well worth looking for.
The food is nice with chilling outdoor seatings but very hard to get the waiter's attention...
I really love everything of the restaurant, the varieties of the foods, the taste and the price.

Mix restaurant is excellent, near the University area of town and away from the crowded tourist trails. The Chef does an excellent job of Eastern / Western fusion, with an expansive menu that certainly delivered on taste and presentation. A bit swanky, and a little pricey, but well worth it for the delicious fare.

Only open at night, this place is really beautiful and has some of the nicest food and cocktails in Chiang Mai. Staff are great and the outside seating is sheltered if it rains. Was expensive for Chiang Mai but worth it for a special occasion.
Good food. Adventurous combinations. Modest portions. Fab ambience. Friendly. A gastronomic delight

Mix is a fab place to go for a special night out, it's very popular with Chiang Mai's hip people and serves good food which is beautifully presented. I would suggest that it is probably better to go in couples or groups of up to four people as most of the dishes are in individual servings of four and having to double up makes it a little expensive. Beautifully presented marinated prawns are served in individual china spoons and other things that I cannot remember the name of, but taste good, come in little shot glasses. This is where I go when I have been a naughty boy and need to score some brownie points at home, thats about once a week then! better than flowers!
The service felt genuinely welcoming and professional. I felt well taken care of throughout the visit. Will definitely come back here again!

The restaurant offers a warm, inviting atmosphere that immediately sets the tone for an enjoyable meal. Staff members are friendly, attentive, and genuinely invested in ensuring guests feel welcome. The menu features a thoughtful selection of dishes, each prepared with fresh ingredients and well-balanced flavors. Standouts include the beautifully seasoned entrées and the desserts, which are both creative and satisfying. Portion sizes are generous without being overwhelming, and pricing feels fair for the quality provided. Whether you're stopping in for a casual dinner or a special occasion, this restaurant consistently delivers a memorable and a well-rounded dining experience Read less
Just like Taiwan, it's not a lemon butt, but it's delicious, two people taste chicken leg curry butter, pineapple fries, moon chicken, pork necklace and shrimp guacamole.

This restaurant is an absolute disaster, and I cannot stress enough how poorly it performed in every single aspect. While the menu looks appealing and the location is convenient near the U Nimman Hotel in Chiang Mai, that's where the positives end. In over two weeks of traveling and dining, this was by far the WORST experience I had. I arrived around 6:45 PM when the restaurant was hardly busy, yet after being greeted promptly and shown to my table, everything went downhill from there. I was brought complementary chips and sauce, which was a nice touch, but after that, nothing. I sat there for TEN MINUTES, watching no less than five different employees pass my table without so much as a glance. Not one of them took my drink order, introduced themselves, or acknowledged me in any way. I was literally ignored while I sat there, hoping someone would finally come over. After waiting in vain, I decided to take matters into my own hands and walked to the front to ask if anyone was assigned to my table. The staff there had no clue and just looked at me, confused. I asked to speak with a manager, who then asked me to wait even longer. He spent the next few minutes standing at the POS system, staring at the table layout with no apparent sense of urgency or purpose. Honestly, it seemed like he didn’t even know what was going on. It was bizarre. After five minutes of watching this unprofessionalism unfold, I told them I was leaving and would find somewhere else to eat. If you’re going to charge three to four times the price for a meal in Chiang Mai, you better have good service and food. Unfortunately, this restaurant offers neither. I ended up heading to One Nimman Plaza instead, where I enjoyed much better food and service from local vendors for about half the price. Chaing Mai Secret was underway. This place has clueless management, slow and unprofessional service, and prices that are laughably high for the experience. Don’t waste your time or money here. Skip it entirely and support a local restaurant that actually values its customers. Read less

I had the most delicious birthday dinner here. The atmosphere was nice. We were there right before closing. We had time to eat, however it was VERY clear when they wanted us out. If I were not with my best friend it would have definitely ruined the experience for me. I recommend not seating anyone if there is a strict time limit. The food was excellent! We really enjoyed the flavor and the medium spicy was just that, medium, which was great! I would like to go back in the afternoon to see how the non-rushed experience is to I can feel better about eating there without staff hovering around waiting to take my plate up.
Nice ambience. Clean and nice. Food is good. Restaurant is well air conditioned. Great place to be to escape the Chiang Mai heat

We went to eat at this restaurant following the positive feedback, but it was really a disappointment! We love Thai cuisine and we expected to have authentic cuisine but first the dishes didn’t really match the pictures on the menu, my dish was too spicy and on the menu it wasn’t indicated that the meal was spicy. In any case much too expensive compared to what we ate, the price was not really a problem for us if really what we ate was worth the cost but too bad the quality / price ratio is absolutely not respected.
Wonderful interior, and great service! Will always want to come back here at this beautiful restaurant with the best Thai food

The atmosphere is lovely and staff is accommodating. It is a bit pricey but worth a try. Tom yum soup with river prawn was delicious. Ayuthaya river soup prawns taste like qld Fried rice serving was tiny, and it tasted ok. Pad Thai with crispy egg bits wasn’t as good, egg had no seasoning and the noodles were missing crushed peanuts. Serving of noodles was laughably small, covered up with large amounts of crispy egg bits and sprouts. In summary, if you are not worried budget, do come and try different items
It’s on the pricey side, but is worth every penny The price tag is not for the faint of heart, but it’s worth it.

I had an amazing dining experience at Nara Thai Cuisine in Chiang Mai! The food was absolutely delicious — authentic Thai flavors with a refined touch. Every dish was beautifully presented. The atmosphere is elegant yet cozy, and the staff were incredibly kind and attentive. Highly recommend this place if you want to enjoy a taste of Thailand in a stylish setting!
Traditional Thai cuisine with next level plating. The taste is great and especially love the creativity in decorating.
Friendly, attentive and respectful service. Food was delicious. We had the pad thai and the tom yum soup. They cared about our services and made sure that we were well cared for
Great service and delicious food in a convenient location. It never disappoints every single time. They have a variety of options for every taste.
All staff provided excellent customer service. They even gave our kids pillow to sit on and paper to draw on to distract them after finishing meal. All dishes were delicious.

The dining experience at this restaurant was truly exceptional. From the moment we walked in, we were welcomed with warm hospitality and genuine smiles that immediately made us feel comfortable. The ambiance was elegant yet cozy, creating the perfect setting for a memorable meal. Every dish was beautifully presented and bursting with flavor, showing great attention to detail and a passion for quality ingredients. The service was attentive without being intrusive, and the staff anticipated our needs effortlessly. It’s rare to find a place that combines excellent food, impeccable service, and inviting atmosphere so seamlessly. Highly recommended!
Nice atmosphere , the service is excellent. The food here is good.It is convenient, just a few minutes walk to maya mall.

Thai lemon fish, money eggs, and the taste of dried eggs at the end of pork is very good, recommend these three ways, money eggs are very thick, Thai lemon fish are currently the best to eat, pork has no dried eggs, but also the best to eat 👍
My friend recommended to come cos she was here last trip. We’re happy that l there's a wide selection of food, staffs is so friendly and helpful. We’ll surely come back ☺️
The best Thai food in town! Most recommend the pomelo salad and the stir fry basil leaves with beef/ pork . The service is also good !

The food looks very nice and tasty, The atmosphere in this restaurant (Nara) is very unique Thai style. Overall I would say that, It is a very good restaurant for people who want to try Fancy Thai Foods.
The atmosphere is very good, it's possible to park inside of Nimen, air in the cozy dining room, good food, service, and clean bathrooms.
Excellent food! Large generous portions The plating is beautiful Service is exceptional Highly recommended! Will come back!
Very nice thai traditional food. Tase is always perfect and value added . Nice to have a dinner again if have a chance in future .
All dishes are rich, from presentation to taste, take care of every detail of taste, quality. Excellent place for family and friends.

Good restaurant, the dishes are delicious despite the high price. I still have the impression that it is intended for a Chinese population: large table, dishes are shared... it's not disturbing but it's good to know! Ideal for large groups.

I traveled from California, USA, to Chiang Mai, Thailand looking forward to tasting the culture’s reputation of color and flavor unlike any other. Food experience reviews of Nara Thai Cuisine Chiang Mai read to be promising. I left disappointed from 2 orders of 4. Pineapple Fried Rice and Fish Cake Appetizer were awesome; but the Sea Bass/Coconut Shoor was dry and unmemorable while the Deep Fried Soft Shell Crab in Yellow Curry tasted more of butter cream.
Ambiance is good but food is very expensive. The dishes are good but small portion. Probably because the restaurant is in nimman business area

We are family of 5 with no reservation asking for a table. The waitress was not welcoming and pointed somewhere gesturing ‘over there’ and I wasn’t sure it was the right table by asking her again. The place was not busy at all. I work in hospitality and train staff myself, that’s the attitude I would not accept, borderline rudeness to say the least. On the table, there is a card saying Free Drink but once I scanned it, the T & C was to give a 5* review right at the beginning and I was not ready to give an untrue review for the sake of a free drink. Food was average and the only dish we enjoyed was the pineapple fried rice. For the price we paid comparing to the street food we had just opposite Nara, I am sorry to say I rather go to the street food. Read less
This is a beautiful restaurant in Nimman. The food is wonderful and the staff efficient and super friendly. There is lots of choice in Nimman but this is one of the best. Thank you for a great meal.
Had an amazing lunch and dinner here. The food, service and decor are all first class. The food is wonderful and full of flavour and spices. Give it a try you wont be disappointed.

The food was very good everything was cooked to perfection! My fish and Yum Yum soup was so good! The service was also very good. I would highly recommend having lunch or dinner here if you’re in the area.
Ordered on grab, food was very good and tasted just as good as UK.
We ate outside which was great with the plants and Christmas lights, the staff is professional and kind and the pizza is top notch! Highly recommended
We are 2 Italians w And we loved this pizza! Everything was perfect: the food, the location, the vibes and the service ( and also the price) .
Great pizza, service and ambience. The owner welcomed everybody. Fantastic italian stone oven. I really recommend it.
Love Thai food, but this was a very nice breakaway with lovely pizza. Best Pizza i've ever tasted in Thailand. Try the sunflower!

My favorite pizza has reached a new level of perfection. The recent addition of sourdough pizza to the menu is a resounding success; the flavor and texture are noticeably superior. While I won't go on and on about my admiration for this restaurant you know my sentiments, I must reiterate that the quality of the food remains consistently excellent. Even something as seemingly simple as a salad was impressively well-made, possibly due to the exceptional homemade dressing.

Based on the accolades, I thought it'd be better. With that said, it was not bad. I had the pepperoni and added spinach. There were inconsistent bites (that was probably the worst part). Some were good; others were average. My wife had the margherita. She thought hers was good. The service was okay. It's not worth a return trip.
The hosts are very cute, the food is delicious, and it's also a favorite in my heart so I really appreciate it.
Delicious, the best pizza spots in Thailand It’s really delicious—everyone has to try the hearty pizzeria, the dessert is delicious, it’s worth it.
It's really delicious. It's right, stands.1 It's all really good. The pizza is really fuzzy. I never ate it but I'm going to eat it again.
Good service, delicious food. I recommend spaghetti cavanara. The front pizza is really spicy, 5 star, very good quality food.

I had a wonderful time at this Italian restaurant in the middle of the Thai mountains. I hope you enjoy this rich and varied menu that will transport you directly to Naples. The owner of the place, who studied in Florence, made us share a magic moment as if we were in her family. Thanks you so much 💞

One of the best pizza restaurants in Chiang Mai! 🍕 The pizza is absolutely delicious and the pasta is just as amazing. The place has a cozy atmosphere, perfect for enjoying with friends or family. This spot is well-known for its pizza, and it truly lives up to the reputation. If you’re in Chiang Mai, this is definitely a must-try. Highly recommended

Omg this place is a total food heaven! 🍕 The pizza is insanely good – crispy crust, gooey cheese, flavors that just melt in your mouth 🤤. And don’t even get me started on the spaghetti 🍝 – rich, flavorful, cooked to absolute perfection. Honestly, every bite feels like happiness on a plate . If you’re looking for the ultimate comfort food spot, THIS is the one. Highly, highly recommended! 🔥❤️

Pizza My Heart is my favorite restaurant in Chiang Mai if I am in the mood for Pasta or Pizza. They have such a great selection with unique toppings for their pizzas. And their pastas are always delicious. They only use the freshest ingredients and a beautiful presentation. The staff are always friendly and accommodating. And after a great dinner don't forget one of the best tiramisus for dessert. You won't be disappointed!
One of the BEST Pizza in Chiang Mai ever. Must try!! Pulled pork pizza is great. The service is great. Outside is busy, but inside is calm.
Came here to pick something up for my mom's birthday. Crazy good, loaded with Cheese. Definitely the best pizza in Chiang Mai (Pasta is great too, especially the carbonara)!
The staff is very helpful! Good conversation and recommendations for those who have never tried a pizza before, the staff is happy to recommend the dish.
The pizza at the restaurant is really delicious. It's the tastiest wood-fired pizza I've ever had. The cheesecake at the restaurant is really delicious.If you're in Chiang Mai, you should try it.
The food is delicious, the service is very good, the style is delicious, the pizza is delicious on every side.

Once again, you’ve had a snack, you can’t even take a picture. The fried chicken is really delicious, the fried vegetables underneath are delicious. Order pizza, pasta, all the delicious dishes, and I’ll repeat it again and again.
Consistency is key, and this place has amazing pizza every time. We always enjoy our time here and we will keep coming back. Sure there are other pizza places in CM, but none like this.

Pizza My Heart At Nimman is easily my favorite pizza place in Chiang Mai. The crust is thin, light, and crispy, the toppings are always fresh, and the flavors are perfectly balanced. You can tell they really care about quality here. The staff are super friendly and welcoming, which makes the experience even better. The atmosphere is cozy and relaxed, perfect for hanging out with friends or enjoying a casual meal. Every pizza I’ve tried has been delicious, and it’s always consistent. If you’re in Nimman and craving authentic pizza, this spot should be your first choice. Highly recommended!

If you’re a pasta lover—or even just pasta-curious—you have to try this place. The flavors are spot-on: rich, comforting, and perfectly balanced. Every bite feels like a warm hug. The texture? Just right. Not too soft, not too firm. It’s the kind of dish that makes you pause mid-bite and say, “Wow.” I didn’t expect to love it this much, but it totally won me over. Whether you’re craving something classic or a twist on tradition, this pasta delivers. It’s not just good—it’s memorable. Trust me, it’s worth the visit. You’ll leave happy, full, and already planning your next trip back.

My meal is even more special because pizza is the main dish for the celebration. Who’s looking for something to eat for a party or a special day?Pisa is truly a fulfilling answer to both the stomach and heart. The celebration is even more special, with the finest pizza from Pizza My Heart @ niman. Some of the pizza powders here are fine, the tops are crispy, the cheese is crispy, the smell is crispy, and every word is happiness. The festive atmosphere is filled with laughter—the hotter the pizza on the table, the more special this day. 💕 Who’s looking for a delicious pizza for a party or a big day, Pizza My Heart @ nimman is really a “eatable delight.” Read less

As someone who truly loves pizza and has tried some of the best pizza spots back home in Los Angeles, it’s great to have a place I love here in Chiang Mai. Pizza My Heart has become my go-to—delicious food, friendly people, and a spot I’ve been coming to for years.

We were after some good pizza in Chiang Mai! This did not disappoint… The base and sauce were amongst of the best we have tasted and even better than had in Italy itself! They customised the toppings to our requirements and the pizzas overall tasted sensational. The hosts were warm and accommodating.. We would love to visit again if we get a chance!

Always love to go this place . My daughter love to go and enjoy food here . They made best salad and pizza . She like to play with little pet . Junie and mew are so friendly , always warm welcome us . Highly recommend this place .
I was there with my wife having anniversary dinner. We order pizza and spaghetti. Food was fresh and tested. Owner and staffs are friendly and helpful. Highly Recommend this place .
Pizza is sooooooooo good, pasta is delicious😚 Me and my Friend been here many many times we bring our friends here and they love food here too! Owner are nice
i always come for Pasta, Chicken BBQ and Homemade Tiramisu. My husband have Pizza and Salad. The staffs are friendly. Location is great after you have dinner can go to nightlife on Nimman Road.
The seafood black ink pasta was recommended, I was so surprised how delicious it was. The pasta was unique and flavorful, the seafood plentiful and fresh.
I went here with my newly wedded wife and there are so many nice families here. The food is delicious and the pets too. The dessert is delicious.

Pizza my Heart keeps getting better, and this is the reason for my updated review from last year: They regularly work on improving and offering new pizzas and desserts. Their dough is now literally the best. They even offer to experiment with a free option to add sesame seeds, which is surprisingly delicious. Staff is still great, friendly and welcoming, and very good at making you feel special as a regular customer, remembering orders and preferences. This last year I’ve had pizza in Bangkok & Europe, and every time I eat pizza elsewhere, I’m looking forward to get back to pizza my heart, the best pizza in town, but also likely the best pizza in Thailand. Read less

If you're craving for a pizza when you're in Chiang Mai I would highly recommend you to come to this restaurant. Their pizzas are magnificent with a true Italian home made flavor and also the price was very reasonable. The service was also great and I will definitely come back again 100 percent. Keep up the good work!
The food is delicious, the menu is diverse, the authentic Italian dishes, Pizza SoGood, the atmosphere is very good, the heart of the Nimen neighborhood is affordable, the journey is convenient.
The pizza was delicious. The owners were very friendly, with light music and delicious fruits to come back.

If you're craving authentic Italian pizza in Chiang Mai, Pizza My Heart is a must-visit. Tucked away in the trendy Nimman neighborhood, this cozy spot offers both indoor air-conditioned seating and a charming outdoor patio—perfect for families, friends, or a romantic dinner. 👨‍🍳 Food The wood-fired pizzas are thin, crispy, and bursting with flavor. Chef Kitty, trained in Italy, brings true artisan quality to every dish. Must-try pizzas include the Parma Ham, Pepperoni, and the unique Tom Yum Fusion Pizza, which blends Thai flair with Italian tradition. Their homemade pasta and hand-crafted gelato are equally impressive. 💁‍♀️ Service The staff are warm and attentive, and the owners often greet guests personally, making you feel more like you're dining at a friend's home than a restaurant. 🍷 Atmosphere Modern decor with a relaxed vibe. There's a small wine bar with a curated selection that pairs beautifully with the food. Ideal for a laid-back evening or a special night out. ⭐️ Overall Rating 5/5 – A hidden gem in Chiang Mai. From the food to the service to the ambiance, everything is spot-on. Highly recommended! Read less
Come to Chiang Mai, the pizza is delicious, the salad is delicious, the mouth-watering pastas are a treat for the lovely owner.
It was very good. the food is delicious and the service is nice. the restaurant is beautiful. Its my pizza place for Chiang Mai :)

Delicious pasta & juicy meatballs! Rich sauce, great service—highly recommended! The staff was friendly and attentive, which added to the overall enjoyment. If you’re a pasta lover, this dish is a must-try!
Revisiting after a few months away I can say it’s still the best pizza in town. Great crust. Attentive service and great value.
Food is so good.Good service Whenever I want to eat pizza, I always think of this restaurant.Everything perfect. 🥰🥰🥰
Excellent food very rich pizza very good atmosphere very good option if you are near the area very fast super economical service
The food is delicious, the taste is delicious, the portions are abundant, the pizza is delicious, the pasta is delicious, the food is tasty, and the new menu is cheesecake.

Pizza My Heart absolutely lives up to its name!. My favorite pizza joint, and hands down the best pizza in Chiang Mai — perfectly crispy crust, rich tomato sauce, and fresh, flavorful toppings that really hit the spot. Their menu goes way beyond just pizza too, the pasta, salads, and other Italian dishes are just as impressive. Everything tastes homemade and full of flavor and love. The atmosphere is cozy, the staff are friendly, and you can really tell they care about quality. Whether you’re a local or just passing through, this place is a must-visit for any Italian food lover. Highly recommend 5 stars for sure!

Loved our dinner at Pizza My Heart! The diavola pizza and carbonara were both super tasty, and the tiramisu hit the spot. We also got to meet the owners, Junie and Kitty, who were so welcoming and friendly. Great food and great vibes! Definitely recommend if you’re in Chiang Mai.
Tastes great!!. The best pizza in CNX/ feel like the original pizza in Italy.and I love pasta too/that beyond “Delicious”

As a traveller, coming back to Chiangmai always remind me of Pizza My Heart. It's like coming home to a place filled with warmth and good vibes. Any one looking for a cozy place to chill and feast on authentic Italian food, look no further.

I love this place. It's a little oasis of Italian cuisine hidden away in Chiang Mai's Nimman neighbourhood. I've been here several times and Everything I've tried was great. The roasted garlic pizza is awesome! The owner, Juni and his wife, are wonderful and friendly people. Give it a try!

The food was delicious. Real Italian products and a great service. Probably the best pizza restaurant in town. The waiter girl(she said she makes the Pizza too) she was very nice and friendly and gave a big smile.

All pizza that I have purchased after eating here has simply fallen short of the standard set by Pizza My Heart. The crust is by far the best I have ever eaten, and you can taste that the ingredients used are of the highest quality. Please take the time to dine in, the atmosphere is great and the pizza straight out of the open is nothing short of amazing. I would not be at all surprised to hear that this place has been awarded a Michelin Star and I will simply refuse to visit Chiang Mai without eating here at least once every 3 days.
Very tasty Pizza with the correct amount of filling and crust for my taste. Chef and staff was very friendly. I also had my best tiramisu ever here. Home made and tasted line heaven. 🤩

This was the best service we ever had! We called late at around 21:50 for a 12 person dinner and even though they closed orders at 22:30, they invited us to come and didn’t disappoint. We came after 20 minutes, and had many kids with us and the employees were very patient and helped us a lot. The food was great, that we barely took pictures as we were busy eating it. The pasta carbonara was done al-Dente and creamy, the pizza dough was thin and airy, done greatly. The desserts and hand-made gelato were incredible! Recommend the alcoholic ones. At the end of the dinner, we enjoyed an amazing conversation with kitty the owner and chef who more than being a great chef, she also is an inspiring woman. Read less

My favorite and I believe the best pizza in Chiang Mia, and I have tried so many I lost count. Not only are the pizzas amazing, but what’s more surprising is the pasta dishes that really taste good, like you are in Italy. Owner/chef lived in Italy where she got her training, very pleasant and friendly owners with very attentive staff, located in the trendy Nimman area in town.
Amazing food and perfect service ! The owner of this place is so nice You can go there with your eyes closed Thank you for this great meal
It was very good.Lots of people and the pizza was great.If you like truffle try the truffle pasta.It was so delicious!🍕🍝
Dude, pizza was amazing and I am from Italy, I know what I am talking about. Maybe could be cheaper, but it Is not easy to find something similar abroad.
Delicious pizza dough and excellent products as a topping. When we arrived, from outside, I thought it was a scam and instead I absolutely recommend it because it is an amazing pizza!

I've eaten several times at this place. Pizza and pastasciutta pasta really good and made to perfection. The restaurant is clean, cozy and easy to reach. The staff is friendly, discreet and fast. The chef, shows great professionalism. In short, if you feel like eating pasta or pizza in Chiang Mai and choose this place you will not be disappointed.

If you're a foodie searching for a culinary gem, look no further than Pizza My Heart, where every dish is a celebration of flavor. Nestled in a cozy yet vibrant ambiance, this restaurant offers a menu that beautifully balances tradition and creativity. Their Pasta Mushroom Truffle. This dish is a masterpiece that tantalizes the taste buds. The perfectly cooked pasta is enveloped in a creamy, velvety truffle sauce that exudes elegance with every bite. Fresh, earthy mushrooms add a delightful texture and a rich depth of flavor, elevating the dish to gourmet levels. A sprinkle of Parmesan and a drizzle of truffle oil complete this culinary work of art. Whether you're a local or a tourist exploring the area, Pizza My Heart promises an unforgettable dining experience. Pair this delectable pasta with a glass of their carefully curated wines, and you'll be in foodie heaven. With its exceptional flavors and warm hospitality, Pizza My Heart is a must-visit destination for anyone who loves Italian cuisine. Come for the pasta, stay for the memories—it’s a slice of perfection you’ll savor long after your meal. Read less

As Italians we can say: The best pizza we’ve ever eaten in all Thailand!!! It is in a true Italian pizza, also Pasta and Deserts are incredible. We spoke a little bit with the Chef, she told us about her experiences in Italy, studying for many months how to make a proper pizza, with original ingredients, etc. Also the stuff it’s very kind and, if you are lucky enough, you can meet their super small and funny dog. Simply fantastic! Read less
Thus is a great place to find. Great that they have so many options about the Pizza & Pasta and Dessert. Excellent ower. Very friendly service!!

a real rare gem. Caprese is good. Pastas are great. 👌🍝 I highly recommend Greek pizza. So scrumptious. If you tried all that and still have room for dessert, try their home made Chocolate ice cream. You won't regret it.
Best Pizza (and Pasta) in Chiang Mai! If you are in Nimman Area, please do come try. Very warm and cozy. Owners very friendly. Everything is done with care.
Had a date here, then ended up eating here 3x the same week because it was that good! Kind owners, kind staff, excellent service. Best calzone in Chiang Mai! 10 stars ⭐️
Had a mix of pepperoni and parma ham pizza. It was unbelievably tasty, super good crust too. Very friendly staff!!!😍😍😍
The Italian-style dough pizza, crispy of Hawaiian and vegetarian : ) Good, delicious, a few times, 10/10 to fuck, the thimsu at the restaurant is awesome, the sweetest is honest.
So delicious / good service mind / the best greek pizza , It’s have a pepperoni extra , good spaghetti i very recommend , good wine
The best pizza in Chiangmai , hidden gem in Nimmanhemin if you want to try Italian food please come to this restaurant 👍👍👍
Good foods , italliian pizza can be found here. The owner is the chef, she quit amazing and you can tell her your fervor tastes.

Best pizza in Chiang Mai. The chef/owner is so passionate about her food. Amazing, fresh ingredients. The ricotta cheese inside the sunflower crust was so delicious. We also tried the Greek pizza. Yum. At the end of the meal, she brought us the best tiramisu I’ve ever had and a taste of her homemade lemon cello made with fresh lemons grown outside the restaurant.
The best pizza and pasta in Chiang Mai. After dinner, please try home-made Tiramisu it is delicious. Good service and great atmosphere for family dinner.
super tasty pizza seafood sunflower style and dried chill bacon pasta ! service was good. cosy atmosphere and friendly owner. ,y new go to pizza place in chiangmai

Always a great meal. Excellent service staff. Fantastic pizza, also wonderful pasta, salads, full bar. Don’t forget desert. All Homemade with care and respect for ingredients. Appetizers through desert…complete joy! We eat here often.
Good pizza and good service the owner kind and friendly. I ordered chorizo and Jalapeño pizza the pizza taste very good cook with bricks oven .

Last night, I came here with my friends who had gone for dinner the night before and raved about this place. We had 3 pizzas and a pasta dish, and they were all amazing. Two of the pizzas were local spins on flavors. Tom Yum pizza was a great surprise and was my favourite. And the Khao Soi pizza was definitely great if you love khao soi, the most popular meal in Northern Thailand. I learned that they ferment their sourdough 72 hours which shows that they know what they're doing. The head chef studied in Italy to learn how to properly make pizza. And in addition to this, the owners are some of the friendliest and charismatic people I've met here, and we talked for at least an hour. Definitely come here to enjoy some of the pizza you'll ever have! Read less
Excellent service with hot and crispy pizza. Yums! Will definitely come back for more. Friendly owner! Highly recommended! What more can i ask for. 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

Best pizza in Nimman! Big selection of gourmet pizzas using nothing but the best ingredients. You can really tell how committed to perfection the owners are. Speaking of the Owners, they personally will stop by your table to make sure you are enjoying your dining experience. Great selections of pastas too. I highly recommend!
super tasty pizza margharita! service was good. cosy atmosphere and friendly owner. ,y new go to pizza place in chiangmai
Phenomenal pizza and cozy atmosphere. These people really care about striving for excellence in pizza and it shows!! I will absolutely go back and hope to try everything on the menu.
How many times will not disappoint? Every time you order two pads of pizza with spaghetti, your favorite dish is spaghetti with dry sea chili, fresh seafood, and it will definitely come back again.

I missed USA food (well Italian really) and hadn't found anything good in Chiang Mai. Settled for some Pizza and chicken wings and holy hell real real good. Hit the spot. Awesome friendly staff too :)

Amazing pizza and pastas, the best in Chiang Mai without a doubt, and I’ve tried most pizza places in town over the years. The reason is simple: everything is delicious, the whole team provides great & attentive service, and prices are fair. Special mention to their Pepperoni pizza, Parma pizza and their Greek pizza, their carbonara (it’s the real italian recipe with guanciale, egg and parmesiano, not the “pasta with cream” you get in tourist places). The desserts are homemade, including their ice cream which is to die for (home made passion fruit ice cream is an experience in itself). You can feel and taste those desserts are made with love, it’s like getting a hug to your soul through your stomach 😋 Hands down the best pizza place in town. Read less
The pizza is very very tasty! The added value is the kindness of waiters. Everything was wonderful, They have a kindly staff .🥰🥰🥰
best pizza and pasta in CM all the staff are fantastic and leave room for the home made ice cream! Delicious!! All the staff are so kind and welcoming
This is my second time within a month. I have tried four different pizzas and they are finger licking good. I’ll definitely come and try some other flavors again.

Really good pizza, in Italy you definitely eat worse. You can choose between Regular and Thin. The ingredients are also good. Very kind staff; the lady owner has learned a lot about the trade in Italy. If you are in crisis from Thai food...... highly recommended!

Pizza my heart never disappoint me! I've been here like...6-7times already and every service, every taste, the vibe...everything impress me every time I come here. I reviewed to my friends and boyfriend to try here and they love it!! Of course I gonna come back again and again because soon I will miss the taste of this place!! Thank you so much...Thank you❤️❤️❤️ ps.Oh! and the owner so cute!! So kind and friendly
Amazing place to eat, kind staff,good price,😊 👍. I know a good pizza when I see one and I would highly recommend anyone who loves pizza!

‘Legit’ is the first word that comes to my mind when describing their pizza, family when describing the staff, and passionate describing the owners. Be sure to get the penne ala vodka as a side dish. Good seating both inside and out. Forcryingoutloud they even have a swing set out front to sit on and have a beer if have an order to go!
Everything is so wonderful. They also have good stuff and kind. I recommend this place. This is a good place. 🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰

This is my go-to place for a good quality dinner made with the freshest ingredients, still the best pizza in town and a nice selection of pasta dishes. You really can't go wrong here. A bonus is that the owners are super nice and go out of their way to make you feel welcome. I highly recommend!😍
Dinner was great, we tried pizza, pasta and salad cesar, it was all super good. The service was also very friendly and attentive. The night after we repeated without hesitation.

Tonight very nice dinner in this restaurant! Although there was no room, the hostess was able to offer us a table within 5' by putting 2 tables together.
