For all this we paid 2600 THB or about 65€. We will definitely go back this week! Highly recommended!!! 🍕🍷🍸👌👌

We are from New York and we know great pizza and this place has great pizza. They make the thin pizza crust and the toppings are exceptional. We will definitely go back to this pizza place again before we leave Chang Mai
My favourite restaurant when I'm craving Italian food. Great Authentic style pizza. Must try when visiting Chiang Mai...

If you want the best pizza in Chiang Mai, this is the place. There are so many delicious choices, wow! Great food, great service and a nice atmosphere. The owner is lovely and came over to our table to say hello. I highly recommend it!
Really good pizza with lots of selection to chose from. More expensive than other restaurants but definitely worth it for a proper homemade pizza!

After my previous post, I talked to the owner to explain everything on why I was upset and how it can be fixed and improved. The owner invited me to her restaurant once more to make it better. For the food, it’s still and always “GREAT” but this time the service is better (though the red-hair waitress was on leave that day). The calzone here is one of the best for me, period! A MUST TRY when you visit. During the meal, we had a chance to personally discussed and talked to the owner and shared many things together. I even met the waiter who talked to me last time as well and he sincerely apologized me for not being service-minded on that day, which was fine to me. TIPS: Please make a reservation when you drive there, so they can arrange a parking spot for you. Read less
Good food good pizza like it a lot nice location near the shopping mall like to eat pizza and pasta love it all food good for everything

I recently visited Pizza My Heart with family and friends, and it was an exceptional experience once again. The chorizo pizza was incredible, and the garlic spicy pasta was equally delightful. We also enjoyed the plentiful and delicious tiramisu, as well as the crêpes. The atmosphere was very family-friendly, and the staff were attentive. The owners were hospitable and made us feel like part of the family. If you love pizza and pasta, I highly recommend visiting Pizza My Heart.

The vodka penne is really good. The tomato sauce with the herbs is yummy and fresh. My wife had a pizza. The crust was good and thin. With simple wine, and really good service, the evening went perfect. Finishing off, the tiramisu is delicious, Italian proper style. Parking is difficult. It is in a popular neighborhood full of night life. But, also. It is reasonable and casual.

Pizza My Heart is unlike any other pizza restaurants. It is the restaurant of choice for my first meal upon arrival at Chiang Mai. Since my first visit several years ago and happened to chance upon this jewel in Ninman, I have been coming back to this gem every time I pay this city a visit for my pizza fix. The Question is why? They are already good and getting better. The difference is passion. Their menu has expanded. They have stacked up. Unlike renown restaurants in some major cities which are cutting cost and scaling down their menu offerings, Pizza My Heart is going the other way. more choices, more varieties, from pizzas to pastas, and desserts. I had a Divola and it was different. Besides the generous servings of pepperoni and salami (which you have to pay extra as a top up from where I came from), there are the olives and dried chilli, rendering a taste so good it keeps you wanting for more. It's ironic that the best Italian food is not only found in iconic mega cities, but in little exotic Chiangmai as well. Read less
I order pizza from pizza my heart . Super first service . Pizza delivery was great and fresh. I enjoy my dinner . Best pizza ever I had . Highly recommend this place .

Excellent pizza with a light dough and very good ingredients. Only one pizza tasted too sweet. I recommend the homemade tiramisu which is truly Italian and maybe even better. The service is good and the wait is not long. A good place for Italian food lovers.

Loved it! Pizza was awesome, quality ingridents. Definitely worth visiting. I had pizza in Sukothai and it was terrible. This place is fantastic! It's a little but out of the tourist area but worth visiting if you like pizza. I ordered the Margarita and I loved it!

Best pizza in Chiang Mai! The taste, the smell, the service, everything was excellent. I was recommended by one of my best friends to try this place, so I did try it for the first time with my family, and we all agree that we have to come back

We found great and comfortable dry zone shelter here during the Songkran Festival and whilst outside everyone was playing with water we have indulged in excellent Italian cuisine such as pictured Penne alla Vodka and their signature Seafood Pizza. I highly recommend the homemade tiramisu it's probably the best I had in Thailand, yet. 😋 Attentive service with always a smile. Will come back again, soon!
I always have pancetta pasta, chicken wing, caramali, and fruit shake. It is the best pasta italian food that i found in Chiang Mai Nice and very polite staff.

If you're looking for a good Italian restaurant in Chiang Mai. I would highly recommend Pizza My Heart At Niman. The food here is absolutely delicious. Every dish that we tried was cooked to perfection and bursting with flavor. The service was wonderful and the waiter was very attentive. The restaurant is also nice and clean. Overall we had a great experience at this place. Hands down, the best Italian restaurant in Chiang Mai in my opinion.

This is my favorite restaurant to visit in Chiang Mai. They recently updated their menu and have a great selection of Pizzas and Pastas. I love their calzone, all fresh ingredients. And their Tiramisu is one of the best I've ever tasted. The owners are great and everytime I go I feel like family. Highly recommend a visit.
Our Diavole pizza was superb. Service excellent. Cannot fault the place. Saw the review on TripAdvisor, not always best , but without a doubt a visit here is recommended

This place WAS one of the BEST Pizzeria in Thailand for Me, but Now, It's NOT. Here is Why... Normally, the service is great and the food is even better, but for my latest visit, this is not true anymore. I visit this place few days ago around 17:00 pm with only ONE customer in (from what I saw and where the customer was seated) and asking the waitress (not the red-haired one) INSIDE THE RESTAURANT whether there is any parking spot available. She went to ask another waiter INSIDE THE RESTAURANT, then he came to me and asked "Do you want to eat here?" (I said, Yes). He told me "Sorry, there is no parking spot available" then I asked whether can I park nearby, but he still repeated his answer several times. So, I DECIDED TO EAT SOMEWHERE ELSE INSTEAD!!! IF THE STAFF DOESN'T WANT TO WORK, THEN I WON'T BOTHER THEM! (when I drove by, they grouped together to chat, not even service or look at the customer!) PS: Pls visit the place when the owners are there OR look for a red-haired waitress for best services. IF YOU DRIVE THERE, IT'S BETTER TO BOOK THE PARKING SPOT IN ADVANCE. PS2: The photo was from my earlier visits to this place. Read less

We wanted to eat something other than Thai food, so we decided to look for an Italian restaurant 😃 and came across the Pizzeria My Heart. The food was absolutely AMAZING😍 we've actually eaten pizza in Italy very often🍕 but you actually have to look for a long time in Italy to get such quality. Absolute must if you are in Chiang Mai. The owner then offered us a homemade limoncello 👍🍋 We would come again and again 😃😃👌🍕🍝

Always great! Great food, great service. We ate there twice this week and enjoyed it with friends. We tried two types of crust (thin and thick) and both were done to perfection. You cannot go wrong here.
The pizza is great - we had the sunflower shaped pizza and beer. The best pizza in Chiang Mai. I was nice to get a change of pace from Thai food!

The best pizza I’ve had in Thailand. The owners are hands on and do everything to make your visit as enjoyable as possible. Kitty (co owner and chef) works magic in the kitchen. Pastas and tiramisu are also highly recommended…and a special shoutout to the staff.
Really nice food however main courses (one pasta one pizza) came out at different times. Good value for money and food was really nice
Long wait, disappointing pizza, thin pizza but very little cheese. not justified to arrive. Most of the customers are tourists, apparently because of the rating on Tripadvisor

Delicious , quality food. We had: pizza, spaghetti bolognaise, Greek salad, fresh smoothies. All were very tasty. The service was also excellent, and we had a pleasant table outside. The pizza in particular was excellent, crisp, with a chewy crust, and cooked in a wood oven.

the service was exceptionally good, very cooperative with personal needs. the food was very authentic and delicious!! the restaurant is spacious and comfortable. this place has very good vegetarian and jain options. 10/10 i would recommend if you are on chiang mai! 😃😃

Love this place! Always great pizza. Always great and friendly service. Our first stop after returning to Chiang Mai - straight from the airport. The new menu looks great, easy to choose anything, all in English. Some of the dishes are new like more pasta and desert choices and we are eager to try them. You can’t go wrong here.
Yesterday we had a fantastic dinner. We enjoyed chicken in lemon sauce as appetizer and 2 pizzas after that. All was very tasty en the service was great. We will come back!

The service was excellent and the food was delicious and not overly price. Good quality all around and the Pasta was exceptional. The restaurant also is located in the heart of Chiang Mai Nimman area.

I don't understand how this restaurant has five stars. We ordered three different dishes and none were as tasty as described on Tripadvisor. Wrong ingredients were put on the pizza. The pizza had no nice taste and was very dry. We also ordered fries with cheese. For the price you pay in Thailand you get very little. This is very unfortunate. We were really looking forward to the meals.

Thought the pizza here in Chiang Mai was ok and I liked it. The bread was good and the heat of the pizza was perfect. Looked like a family restaurant and was good the only thing bad was it took so long time to get the food thats why the rating only becomes a 3.

We came here for a late lunch and wanted something other than Thai food. The pizza was excellent and the service very good. Spoke to the owner briefly and he also spoke good English. As a plus, Diego is also present.
Hands down the best Calzone I've found in Thailand. Hahaha I had already given up but lo and behold I found this place right by my condo and it's better than the calzones back home!!!
Best Pizza Best pizza I have had in chiangmai. I amazing pizza from pizza my heart. The own off the shop is very friendly.

Normally, I'm a person who likes to eat pizza. I like to try many shops. This shop is another shop that you have to come to again and again. The pizza dough is very soft. This time, let's try the pizza with mixed mushrooms. It's very delicious. Whoever comes must come and try it. But really everything is delicious.
Still best test and first service. I order pizza by grabs. Is arrive I expect than first . I always recommend best pizza place in Chiang Mai , Thailand .

First evening in Changmai and we were hungry for pizza and found this restaurant via Tripadvisor, I did not regret this choice for a moment, delicious crispy pizzas! Staff very friendly and very attentive.
I had been away for a year so was excited to get back. Pizza was even better than I remembered this time around!

We appreciate how they gave us a good set of their delicious pizza with fries and salad that is fitted for our budget. We hosted a networking event and everyone loved what we served. Thank you so much.

It's been a while since we visited PMH. They not just still the best pizza in town but actually even improved the dough came out absolutely fantastic and the added extra chili's made it perfectly spicier totally love it!

Friends and I had to come here after all the great reviews and delectable food pics. Happy to confirm that the pizzas and pastas were truly outstanding, and service was delightfully friendly and efficient. And the tiramisu was the best we ever had. 10 of 10 all around. Dont miss it！
Staff we very attentive, happy to help. Pizzas were cooked 5 metres from us from fresh which was interesting to watch. It was s brilliant experience!

My first day back to Chiang Mai, after 6 months, I had to have Pizza at PMH, Nimman. I was able to special order my fav. pesto and tomato sauce, with veggies and sprinkled with crunchy garlic....It came out perfect. I had the Lao IPA, thirst quenching, and my other favorite there is the homemade Tiramisu....The chef Kitty came out and greeted me and Junie the owner also stopped by. Personal service with a smile, and great food to make for a perfect experience for my first day back...I will return often.

If you are looking for one of the best pizza in Chiang Mai, look no further, it's hands down Pizza My Heart. From the food to the ambience, right up to the service, the experience is simply outstanding. Above all, if you have the opportunity of meeting Junie at the door, his beaming smile and energetic welcome will warm your hearts for a delightful meal.

The pizza is absolutely comparable to the Italian one: the base is excellent, the ingredients are of high quality and the cooking is done in a wood-fired oven. The service is fast, the staff speaks excellent English. A special thanks goes to DD for his friendliness and kindness
Absolutely Great Pizza and the staff , DD was great! Specially he did everything to keep us happy. highly reccomend it!!

I have had pizza all over the world, including Italy and also must have tried over 95% of the places in Chiang Mai as well, and I can say there is no better pizza around. Having lives in New York for over 20 years as well, I know pizza. Pizza My Heart does it right, from the taste and texture of the dough, the cheese to the amazing toppings it’s just what good pizza should taste like. The crust is perfect to save for last and eat by themself, still moist as when it first arrive fresh from the wood burning brick oven, and even better dipped in their own blended hot chili oil. The restaurant is set in the trendy neighborhood of Nimman, reminds of of SoHo NY. The atmosphere of the restaurant lets you forget you are in the north of Thailand the city of Chiang Mai, the aroma of all the delightful other foods bring prepared make so want to taste them all. Beside their amazing pizza, they do many other scrumptious Italian dishes many I have tried but always go for the pizza. The owner/chef and her partner are always welcoming, and greets you when you arrive or while you are dining, something that’s very much missing from just about every other restaurant I have been to, they make every customer feel special and always make sure the food is excellent and also takes the time to make you feel right at home as you were in Grandma’s kitchen, lol. When you find a restaurant that serves great food, friendly atmosphere an inviting feeling you know you have a winner. There is absolutely nothing that I can say bad about this restaurant, or its food or the proprietors, it’s just Italian done right plain and simple. 10 Stars I give, without any hesitation. Read less
Pizza cook with brick oven the taste was very good. I ordered spaghetti bolognese was perfect cooking and taste. I will come back again.

Hello everyone! I want to recommend a great restaurant, pizza from the heart like the name it is! , delicious dishes! Pastas, salads, and one of the best pizzas we've eaten! , kind staff, and the owners of the place are attentive to every question and request! worth trying!

The pasta, both white and red sauce, is delicious. We love the atmosphere and there is a dog. We love it because everyone likes the dog and the dog is not annoying. The pizza is made with good quality ingredients. The ice cream is different because they make it themselves. I am writing this good review because the tiramisu is really what it is supposed to taste like. Amaretto, good cream, and good aftertaste.

Best pizza in Chiang Mai! The owner speaks English and is super friendly. They literally put all their heart into making their pizza. Great tasting pizza and pasta. Staff are also super friendly and speaks English. Full service restaurant with good selection of wine, beer and spirits.

I’ve been coming here for a year since I moved to Chiang Mai. Pizza is excellent but what really sold me was the carbonara. Just like Florence. Reason for that is the chef trained with an Italian chef. Certainly tastes like it.
great pizza and pasta , Good selection of wines and beverages. the owner takes care very well👍👍👍👍

Have been coming here since they opened and always enjoyed their pizzas and salads. The owners are extremely welcoming and the atmosphere is warm and relaxing. Great choice of pizzas and they are often adding new options to the menu. Will most certainly be back again for a pizza and beer with the guys.
I love this restaurant. Consistently excellent pizza and the owner goes above and beyond when it comes to helping his customers. Go! You won't be disappointed!

What can I say about Pizza My heart? I honestly loved it! I've been living in Chiang May for two months and this is the best pizza place in the city! The staff is extremely lovely, the pizza and pasta are amazing. The atmosphere made me feel like in Italy again. I will definetely keep coming back!

Consistently Great Pizza and Friendly Thai staff! I've ordered take out pizza at least 20 times over the last 5 weeks from Pizza My Heart. The pizza is ALWAYS consistent, and Staff always friendly.. The pizza is a more traditional Italian size and style. Perfect for two people or one hungry person.. The red sauce is a little sweet, the toppings always fresh and tasty. Dukes has bigger pizzas, but often undercooked and over priced.. Pizza My Heart is a must try if you are hungry for Pizza and in Chiang Mai.

We have tried a few places, and definitely this one has the BEST pizza in the area. The staffs are very friendly, and the owners lovely! They are always very kind and polite. We have been there MANY times in the past 3 months, and loved the experience!! I'd recommend the four cheese/margherita pizzas and the squid as an appetizer. The tiramisu is worth to try as well. It's very tasty! :D The place itself has a nice vibe, and you can stay indoor or outdoor, whatever suits you better. Read less

Fresh ingredients are critical to this restaurant's success. Even the calamari is straight from the sea. There is no skimping here, just excellent food coupled with great prices, A Chaing Mai favorite.
When my wife and I are in town Pizza My Heart is a must visit for us. Fresh ingredients produces a fantastic meal. The owners are kind and welcoming along with the staff.

While the pizza was generally very tasty, I did find some room for improvement. Firstly, the buffalo cheese used in the pizza did not seem to be freshly made and resembled more of a mozzarella cheese. Secondly, I was disappointed to see that despite having a large woodfire oven, the pizzas were made in an electric oven instead. It felt like a wasted opportunity. Despite these drawbacks, the overall experience was good. If the restaurant could improve on these aspects, it would certainly elevate the dining experience to a much higher level.
Awesome fresh pizza. Lots of choice. Everything went fast en the staff was very friendly. I would recommend without doubt!

The best pizza right now in Chiang Mai is from Pizza My Heart and I explain you why: ' the dole is light and crispy, the tomato 🍅 sauce is delicious, the mozzarella is Italian and margherita pizza 🍕 is the one I try to feel the quality, because when the margherita is good means that all the pizza are going to be good... because is the base of almost every pizza this 3 ingredients. I had also a tiramisu to end the dinner and was really good too. A must try in Chiang Mai

Best Pizza in Chiangmai, fresh and good quality imported materials, best tiramisu i ever had also homemade ice cream and great service staff . The owner always comes to ask how your food was. Highly recommended .
We love the dog and a lovely atmosphere. The food is excellent quality. Pasta is awesome. Perfect. Pizza is thin and tasty. My wife always order her own style she loves pasta.

Having spent 10 days in Thailand so far (6 in Bangkok and 4 in Chiang Mai) we as a group of 7 needed a rest bite from Thai food and the spice, Pizza my heart was like finding a hidden jewel. The Erma Franklin song (take another piece of my heart) sprang to mind as we left the restaurant! Junie, Kitty and Grace welcomed us and provided us with exceptional food and service, especially our waitresses, Grace who was attentive and thorough in taking our order. Majority of our group is pure vegetarian and Junie and Kitty (the owners), happily accommodated our dietary requirements and we all are the best made pizza and ice creams here, I personally was transported back to my time in Napoli where I thought I’d never eat a stone baked pizza like that but today I was pleasantly surprised and proved wrong!! Chiang Mia now also hosts an eatery that would compete with traditional Italian pizza from Italy. The only difference is that we were able to have a Tom Yum style pizza which I don’t think you find anywhere else, a must try. We all ordered a pizza each so we had a selection of pizzas which we shared and devoured to our heart’s content added with a huge helping of friendly staff we really felt at home. Price wise, between 7 and including starters, main and dessert including beers our bill ranged between 175 - 230 Bhat per person by it honestly speaking, we were expecting to pay around 500 Bhat per person, so saving money was an added bonus. I would thoroughly recommend you to visit Pizza my heart @ Nimman. I don’t usually write reviews but on this occasion I thought I’d break my rule and highlight this venue to those currently in or planning a trip to Chiang Mai to visit Pizza my heart. Thank you once again to Junie, Kitty for your homemade ice cream and to Grace for your caring nature to ensure we had the best service possible 🙏🙏❤️ Read less

My family and I went here after reading the reviews and it did not disappoint! All of us (me,parents and granny) ‘LOVED loved LOVED’ every bite of our pizza and then the tiramisu and ice cream were a lovely finish off.. the owners and staff were so attentive and made sure that they could cater for the vegetarians just as much. Cannot recommend it enough - the pizzas will take you to italy itself.
Wonderful pizza. Best I have had in Chiang Mai. It’s crispy and flavorful, everything I need in a pizza!

I’m from New York and I grew up on pizza. The chef-owner and her husband business partner studied pizza making in Italy - and it shows! Friendly staff and good casual atmosphere.. Great location in the Nimman area near Chiangmai University
Delicious pizza and capresse salad, went twice during our three days in Chiang Mai, you should try if you are looking for something different than Thai food
Great pizza! Great atmosphere. The severs were very attentive. We had an amazing tiramisu to cap off the night. Definitely would go back.

The food is always so good here! The pizza's and pastas are made with the freshest ingredients. The staff and owners are amazing. If you're in Chiang Mai definitely put it on your list of places to try.

without doubt the best place to have authentic Neopolitan pizza in CM .. fresh, high quality ingredients, especially the mozzarella which is made in Phuket by Italian artisans. Most importantly, the owner Junie is very welcoming and personable and creates a positive vibe. No better place for Pizza in Chiangmai

We had a fantastic lunch a very nice chat with the owners. The pizza was amazing, you could tell the ingredients were fresh. They have a lovely garden where you can enjoy your meal, the interior is also very lovely. The owners are a very nice couple, who gave us fantastic tips for our Thailand trip. Will definitely eat there again!
We came here twice to eat authentic Italian pizzas. Tried three different flavours and all of them tasted excellent. Very good value for money with the service being always attentive and friendly.

The owner are so lovely. They are certified pizziolas and you can tell by the taste of their pizza. If you are out in about in Chiang Mai craving some western food. Look no further! Better than most pizza I had in Italy.
Best place to have dinner . Owner and staffs super friendly and best service they give me . Price is reasonable. Clean and nice place . Feel relax . Worth to visit here . Highly recommend.
This is a cozy place where you get excellent cheesy pizzas and the Service is great with a smile. Have it along with chilled beer or any hard drink

Absolutely brilliant. Great atmosphere and wonderful pizza and pasta. They freshly made the pizza.It was extremely fresh. And I really loved the seafood pasta. It’s also very busy at this place and the employees are just so darn nice and great .

Amazing pizza place in Chiang Mai, definitely the best we’ve had in Thailand and one of the best overall! Quality pizza pairs well chill vibes and friendly service to make an overall great experience.
Superb pizzas and pasta, friendly attentive service all at all very reasonable prices. The tiramisu and home made ice cream was the perfect finish to an outstanding dining experience.

Great greek salad, good pizza, friendly. Went back a second time and had a good caesar salad and very good pasta carbonara. Homemade ice cream was not too good. Overall good. Owner stopped by to make sure everything was OK.
The pizza was really good. They offer different kinds, all around us looked happy with their choice and seemed very pleased. Thanks!

Excellent pizza, lovely welcoming owner. I was there as a solo traveller but always felt completely comfortable dining there by myself. I've been three times already. Did I mention the pizza is excellent?

The day before we had dinner at B Samcook Home 16 and everything from we arrived to we were delivered back to our hotel was perfect and 5*. Yes the bill was 33% more expensive but the 7 courses and the service was exceptional. Today the Pizza, the pasta was good but we were just a number in the restaurant and not a special customer.

This lovely restaurant is just around the corner from our hotel we’re currently staying in and my partner and I have just returned back from our beautiful meal there! I had to write a review straight away, the service was amazing, the staff are so friendly, we sat outside and it’s just so pretty and welcoming. The food was amazing, I had the seafood pasta which had so much flavour, definitely recommend and then the homemade brownie with whipped cream AND a generous serving of ice cream which is also homemade and you can choose which flavour of ice cream you want. If I was a local this would 100% be my go to restaurant. So many pizzas to choose from too. I definitely recommend this little gem, what a lovely meal. Thank you! Read less
We enjoyed the pizza, the atmosphere and the price. Walked it many times but when I read the great reviews decided to go in. Try it, you'll like it!

Having heard of this pizzeria's reputation as the best in Chiang Mai, we had to head to the Nimmanhaemin area to give it a try. It was excellent! They even made us a special sauce because we cannot eat onion or garlic. We had 2 different pizzas, and we especially liked the Greek pizza.

Title says it all. I have been here several times and the food has been awesome. Ice cream is flavor forward and not too sweet. Owners are great and really care about the customer’s experience. 5/5 for sure!

This is without doubt the best pizza in CNX and I am indeed not sure where you would do better anywhere else in the world. Juni is a master of his trade and also very friendly. I went four times and was delighted every time.

I’m originally from New York. Pizza is one of the basic food groups for New Yorkers. Pizza My Heart has excellent pizza. The chef studied Pizza making in Italy! And it is very good, fresh quality ingredients. Great location in the Nimman area. A family business with the owners on location. Friendly and clean! Enjoy! Read less

Arrived with a grab taxi since TripAdvisor said this place was n1 pizza. Let me say this is not n1... by far. I think its a new owner or something, since at the register there is a picture of some other people holding an award . Let me start by saving... Service is very, very chaotic . Staff was friendly but friendly only takes u so far... this place reminded me of fawlty towers. We were left by ourselves when we entered the place... so we went for the terrace, where it looked like it exploded. Tables were full of the last customers stuff, chairs missing everywhere. We ordered 2 pizza's, got a wrong order served twice. Drinks were served after we recieved the food. The 1 pizza i recieved that was correct was not bad, but more mediocrish. Sooo yea, chaos Read less
Excellent pizza, great Greek salad, and friendly staff. Came here weary and tired, entire family of five loved it. Our girls loved Diego, the dog that greeted us. Would recommend without reservation.

I‘d confidently say that this is the best spot for pizza - at least in North Thailand! The Pizza was delicious, we had a Pesto Pizza (with extra spinach) and a seafood pizza. Both were perfect, we‘ve been to Italy a few times and this place could literally be in Italy. The owners as well as the staff were super friendly. They visited us a few times during the evening and checked whether everything is okay. Also make sure to taste the amazing self made passion fruit ice … Thanks for this beautiful evening!! Read less

Been loving the amazing Thai food we’ve had on our travels but all were in need of some western style carbs! The owner was sooooo friendly and the food fantastic- pizzas with delicious toppings and crispy bases. Wine by the glass a bonus!

As much as we love all the traditional Thai foods my boyfriend and I were looking for something different to eat for dinner, and got recommended this place. Honestly one of the best pizzas I’ve ever had! The pizza base was perfect and the pesto was made on site it also had a hint of the best Thai spices which was delicious, pizza was crispy and ingredients were so fresh! The cheese was unreal. Honestly you will regret if you don’t go. We also tried out the crispy lemon chicken on a base of dried kale - wow! The staff were so wonderful, Perch the waitress was so lovely. The owners walk around chatting with everyone and shared their story with us. Normally I alsways save half a pizza to eat later as I love cold pizza - but this one I had to eat right away 😍 Two pizza with extras toppings, two drinks and a starter was around 950 bhat. Read less

We came for lunch, ordered pizza, pesto pasta, greek salad and chicken wings. All the dishes came in time and very fresh, especially the greek salad. The staff was super super nice!! The nicest restaurant staff I have met they even helped us order a taxi and gave us suggestions for places to visit. Definitely would recommend a visit :)
Very good food and top quality service! Best in Chiang Mai when it comes to Italian Food. They have a real pizza oven which makes the pizza’s delicious.

Found this great pizza restaurant today while driving around Nimman. The pizza was great, the taped music was awesome and really nice to listen to while having a drink. Juny the owner sat with me and we talked for an hour. Highly recommend this place.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This burger place was near our hotel and had good reviews so we chose to visit for dinner. As we sat at our table, we noticed the large burgers at neighboring tables and were sure that we had made a good choice. My wife ordered the Super Mac burger (245 baht) with a beef patty (it was also an option to have a pork burger). She ordered it medium well, but it was served cooked well done. That was the only issue with her plate. The fries were good, and the Mac & cheese atop the burger was tasty. She also had a chocolate shake (125 baht) which she really enjoyed. The menu had pictures of all the burgers so I chose the Nashville hot chicken sandwich since it looked so good. The waitress mentioned to me that the sandwich would be spicy but I assured her that would be fine since I like spicy food, and I have had that type of sandwich several times before. It was served with fries which I liked and topped with both pickles and jalapeños. I removed the peppers thinking they weren’t probably needed. The sauce that the breaded chicken was drenched in was so much hotter than any chicken sandwich I’ve eaten before. It bordered on actually being “Thai hot!” The sandwich was still good but I didn’t enjoy it as much as expected because of the level of heat. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: YUM!!!! I don't love Thai food ( yet I go to Thailand) so I was thrilled to find this place. Our truffle burger was fabulous and the onion rings were huge and delicious. Fun vibe with the rock music and great service. Would highly recommend!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good place with delicious burgers, all very good. The staff are friendly and attentive, and the prices are good for the quality they offer. Also, the location is very good. I'll definitely be back.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Terrible Spareribs. Served cold. Asked to be heated again. Returned same coldness. Asked for chef. Beside sorry sorry. Nothing I worked in kitchen myself. I asked for the bill. Got it payed and left. Can not recommend it at all

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Really good food and burgers. Loved that it is a really generous portion, specially they offer the best onion rings I have tried in Thailand.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The staff are friendly and welcoming, and the food is excellent, especially the smashed burger which was the best patty I’ve ever had.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Super friendly staff! Huge sized portion burgers as well. It came with fries and onion ring and a whole pickle worth the price. I highly recommend the passion fruit soda as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A very top place to enjoy a few burgers if you fancy a more “home” night of food. They are very rich, they are big, they come with potatoes and an onion ring (we didn’t know and ordered more extra potatoes). Mood very cool with great rock music hits.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you’re American and looking for just a burger then look elsewhere. This isn’t the spot. Maybe just a fluke but ordered a medium burger and came out super rare. Been sitting here for 20 min after burger showed up and no one has come check on me. There is some lurking dude just eyeballing people but idk who that guy is or if he even works here. Fries were good and strawberry shake was great but after a long day of hiking around ChiangMai I was excited for just a regular great burger and I came to the wrong place. Seriously. The menu doesn’t have a bacon cheeseburger at all. Nothing that even resembles it. So they have a just plane cheeseburger but comes with 3 pattys. It’s for some reason the most expensive burger. Honestly if it was cooked right I’d probably be happy but it’s been at least 20 minutes and still no one to check on me. Just sitting here with an almost whole burger and there is definitely a problem but no one around to know…. Definitely disappointed and now I guess I’ll go find something else to eat if I could pay for the meal I can’t eat. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My biggest wish in the world: A Rock Me Burger restaurant in Denmark! I love burgers and this is the best Ive had in my 45 year long life!!! Ever! Fair prices and nice staff. I wanna move to Thailand so I can have those burgers every day 😀. Nothing bad to say. Keep up the good work Rock me Burger!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We were in Thailand for 3 weeks, Phuket,Bangkok and Chiang Mai. Had probably 10 burgers at various locations, these were by far the best. Teenage kids loved them and returned the next night for more. I had this 2 beef Pattie monstrosity with fry’s and onion rings on the side. Burger had an insane amount of cheese on it. Patties were thick n juicy. Could not fault the place.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers were a good size and all came with fries and onion rings on the side (menu didn’t mention this). Kids left very satisfied.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Cool atmosphere with nice staff and burgers that look like they are from the U.S. They are tasty however everything seemed a little too sweet and greasy. Also the meat quality is not the same. But it is an approximate burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: All I’ve got to say is get yourself here right now…best burger I’ve had EVER. And the vibes are great and the staff are lovely!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A great place to switch up the Thai diet for a meal. Lots of choice for meat eaters (less for vegetarians) and the burger I had was delicious. This also served some of the best onion rings I’ve ever eaten - I’d go back just to have them.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: there aren’t many veggie options (there are loads otherwise) but the burger was really good - the fake meat was super tasty and it even came with a giant pickle on top! the onion rings might’ve been the best I’ve ever had! the chips weren’t the best but were definitely not bad. I was too full anyway from the onion rings which are a must to buy - the chips aren’t even needed!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: One of the best burgers ever! The sauce, the bun and the meat, just wow! Wil definitely go back there. They really know how to make a burger here

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place is great! The burgers were amazing. Huge portions, and such a nice change from all the rice and noodles. We loved it so much, we went twice!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Fancied a change from rice and noodles and in the Nimmon area then it was a good choice. Visiting relatives and they had eaten here before. Good place to people watch outside or inside is air conditioned. Service was good and smoothies pretty good. Burgers well presented and tasty. Chicken meal was a bit dry and beware the spicy sauce it hyper hot! Its not a low priced place for food but worth the visit.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burgers & Bar: I had been to the Red Lion for dinner but as I was in the washroom the staff gave away my table so I rocked on down the street and rocked into the Rock Me Café after bypassing the Hard Rock and it’s prices. Here much better value with good enough service.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This review is for the Nimman branch which I couldn't find on TA. Unfortunately we found this place on our last night in Chiang Mai otherwise I think we might have eaten every meal here! We popped in for a quick bite and within an hour we were back again to have a full meal. The staff were so friendly especially Pack who really looked after us... the meals were amazing beyond belief, we didn't come to Thailand to eat Western but the food we had here was better than anything we have ever eaten back home in Australia! If you're looking for something tasty then please drop by and give them a try, we cannot wait to come back again and try everything else on the menu! And thank you again to Pack for looking out for us and making sure we were well taken care of both times we visited, restaurants need more staff like him to keep people coming back over and over! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great tasty burgers and good vibe. Staff are very friendly, lovely and helpful. Desserts are also very nice. Cocktails are good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you want to eat a decent burger again, this is the right place. Large selection of different burgers and many other dishes at a fair price. Nice and attentive service. Coole Location. The only downside: no alcohol is sold between 2pm and 5pm. That was a bit disappointing, would have liked a beer with the burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: No vegan options at all - like nothing! Really disappointing particularly in Changmai Will not be coming back here again ever

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food was hot and delicious! We shared our burger per a previous review mentioning large portions and it was perfect. We were also able to share the truffle fries which were just as delicious! The atmosphere was also spot on!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good place to vary and rest a little Thai food (whoever you need). Huge portions and very good quality with really cheap prices. Also the local and the workers are very friendly.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent food. The portions are huge. You may want to share. We really loved the local food in Chiang Mai but if was nice to have a bit of variety. My husband had a fat boy burger. He said it was the most delicious burger he’s ever had.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Tonight the four of us had dinner here and it was nice, but a little too greasy. We drank 1 gin tonic, 2 mojitos, 1 long Island + 2 colas and 1 soda. We ate 3 burgers and 1 salad + each extra 'fries' with onion rings. This actually turned out to be too much as fries were already served at the burgers. This is unclear on the map and the English of the waiters is not sufficient to explain this. Despite the rather greasy feeling of the fries, we liked the burgers. For all this we paid 2400THB or about 60€. It was definitely worth it.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burger in town. So yummy. Big portion. Very value for money No so expensive. Always delisious. Don't missed this restaurants

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Loved this place! Fantastic atmosphere and great music - relived my youth listening to 80s rock! Delicious burgers & shakes. Staff were great too, very friendly & helpful.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Mac burger was tasteless, chicken in the sandwich was pink, and the caesar salad should be renamed mayonnaise and raw egg salad. Worst food I’ve had in Thailand so far.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burger and service is great. They were very on top of everything especially for a group of 18. The burgers were really great and we finished so fast.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: soooo good! i thought it was amazing and very well cooked. the fries were really good too. I recommend eating here for sure.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The smash burger was the best! The fries were perfect as well. Don’t think I would have changed anything about my expirience. The staff was so nice as well!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We are back. We came looking for something different in Chiang Mai and it turned out to be more than a success. The pastas and burgers are very delicious and different. The attention of the best 😉🌹

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing burger - felt very authentic and I even got it delivered on Grab and the quality was so high. All the fixings were put on the side and I also ordered truffle fries which had the truffle sauce on the side. Fries came with a lovely onion ring as well. Definitely will order again - and from the comfort of home too :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We spent a great times in Rock me. The burger were absolutely delicious ? We even came back the next day, this is definitely the best burger restaurant in Chiang Mai. The prices are great tho. Food went crazy

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was getting tired of Thai food, so I went looking for a hamburger with a good reputation, and I was right. The hamburger was delicious, of course, but the hot dogs were even better, including the deliciousness of the bun itself.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place gets rave reviews,my friend and I went to Loikroh bar. Terrible burgers would be being kind,burnt buns,’burger’ was about 4mm thin and burnt to the point you could snap into pieces. Paid and left without complaining as not my thing. By the way my friends burger was also shocking also,all in all a very bad choice,disappointed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Lovely food and Nice staff Probably the best burgers in Chiang Mai and a Big variety og dishes i would definently reccomend

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Yum amazing food and fun setting. Highly recommend. Kids fancied a change and l have to say after protest this was def worth it

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ate and drank delicious burgers, fries and milkshakes. Lots of choices in burgers but they also have other dishes! Top tent

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burgers accomplishes a rare feat in Thailand - They are able to construct a perfect burger. Fresh bread, quality beef, and cooked to your request. The mild shakes are also rich and creamy! :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Wow wow wow! Delicious food that was served very quickly. The mac and cheese burger was cooked to perfection. The chips were yummy, as was the onion ring. Would fully recommend to anyone in Chaing Mai!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Granted I'm not a fan of American cuisine. The sandwich lasts for two weeks. Very well made with a very diversified choice. Average price. Advised

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'm not a fan of burgers; frankly, I don't remember ever ordering them in restaurants, and neither does my family. For this reason, we passed by this establishment on the first evening, but noticed it. On the second evening, not finding acceptable alternatives nearby, we ventured in and did not regret it at all. We returned here again and also with a very positive result. Excellent, tasty and filling burgers. This is probably not the healthiest food, but after a week of Thai food, when Khao Soi comes out of your ears, it’s great. The prices are also reasonable. In the city center, for the same money you can get slimy noodles with pieces of egg and chicken of unguaranteed quality, mentally compare it with a juicy cutlet and turn it here. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ate here while in chiang mai and made it a priority to go again the following day! Top class food and nice service.. would highly recommend to burger lovers

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: One of the best Burgers that I ate in my life if not the best one. I highly recommend every Burger and order it with medium roast. The staff is very helpful, the prices are reasonable. I have ordered the Rockstar Burger that is with caramelized Backon and truffles cream that was amazing and My wife ordered the American Pie burger pinat butter with crispy onion ring and with caramelized bacon. Well prepared and amazing Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burger was pretty tasty, though I would strongly recommend you order it well-done, as my well-done came out medium rare. I’d be nervous to see what ordering medium rare will get you. Fries were cold and underdone. Onion rings so-so. The Nutella shake we shared was delicious. An acceptable location if you’re just needing a little Westernised break between Khao Soi Kai’s and Tom Yum Goongs.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The best burger i have ever had. Perfectly cooked and delicious. Cannot fault anything at all. Service excellent. Open kitchen so can see food being cooked.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here for dinner yesterday. Burgers were mediocre, nothing special. The best thing about the place was probably the interior design. I was just wowed the second I walked in. Staff were friendly, but the main thing I focus on with a restaurant is the quality of the food along with the service. Burger was not very juicy, and felt a bit overdone compared to what I ask.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We both agreed they were the best burgers ever. While the Thai food we have been eating has been both fabulous and ridiculously cheap there does come a point in the holiday when you fancy a change. I am not (and I might have to go into hiding for saying this) a Mukky D's fan and as a result burgers are not my go to however we had walked past Rockme a bit earlier and there was something about it that made us decide on trying it for lunch. The menu looked pretty amazing and I can only say that what was served up lived up to the menus promise. We had the Rockstar burger. Fabulous!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place was amazing! Really cool Vibe in The restaurant. The waiters were really nice and good at English. Outstanding burgers at a reasonable price and the waiting time was short

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Taste 👍 Portion 👍 Price 👍 Service 👍 A Triplex beef burger at THB350, with union ring & potato wedges. Forget about BK MD 😜. Now I understand why 'the legendary burger cafe' was closed 🤣 MUST TRY

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Lovely delicious burgers. They are quite large with a serve of chips and an onion ring included. Venue is really good, clean, air-conditioned and comfortable seating. Service was good and prompt. My only issue which is minor was communication. Our waiter struggled a little with English. However we worked around it and the meal was good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ordered a vegetarian burger with fries, BBQ wings and of course a long Island iced tea. The burger was great, tasteful without the need of any condiments. The bread was light and fluffy and if it wasn't for an allergy I have to beef and pork, I'd have sensually indulged on what I assume could have been pork/beef patty bliss that would made demi gods cry out to the heavens. However that is where my mini love affair ended with the food. Since I love chicken wings (I can't tell you how many hundreds of restaurants I've tried) - I listened to the reviews and gave them a shot. Unfortunately the wings were a solid miss. The batter on the outside was fried and ultimately became soggy from the BBQ sauce. No sumptuous texture greeted me as I bit into the wings, just a mediocre sauce taste. The chicken itself was bland. I'm saddened by the back half of the experience but I would absolutely dodge the wings and get another burger. Worth a stop and chow down... unless you're in it for the wings. Thank you, wait staff and cooks for the opportunity to eat the food you've prepared, it has been a pleasure. Oh, and the drink was pretty strong and tasty as well - thanks for having my back, bartender extraordinaire! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: For a restaurant that must churn out so many same orders with regimented cooking times, to receive an undercooked (pink meat) chicken burger is not acceptable. The restaurant was quick to apologise and offered anything else. Given the lack of confidence in chef cooking, I opted for no meat / vegetarian burger. The only problem with the replacement meal was a hair in my fries….. I question the cooking and hygiene standards of this place and the street markets are by far a better experience.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Me and my partner went to rock me burger after we’d walked past a few times and noticed the awards it had won in the past. We’re big burger fanatics so was pretty excited to try this. We were trying to be seated, saying hi to a few members of staff to catch their attention but we just got completely ignored. We decided to seat ourselves at a table and hope for better service from there on. We’ll it took one of the waitresses around 5/10 minutes just to bring us a menu! We hadn’t even been greeted yet, asked for drinks, nothing. Starting to get pretty irritated I just wanted a nice meal to arrive which I was sure of. I don’t mind a bit of spice but if you’ve been to Thailand then you know that “a little bit of spice” means head blown off, so I asked for a burger simply without the jalapeños just to cool it down. We had some “crispy seasoned wedges” that came with our burgers and because we’d been waiting for so long we actually ordered an extra portion of loaded bacon fries. My boyfriend asked for a couple of adjustments on his burger too - but nothing major. When the food came out, it was my burger first, nothing spicy had been removed, the chicken was partially raw which made me poorly the next day, and the “seasoned crispy wedges” were McCain Crinkle cut oven chips that looked anemic! After a further 20 MINUTES, our loaded bacon fries came out with my boyfriends meal aswell, after I had already finished. Not once did a waitress smile, nor even attempt to ask how anything was, look at us or even acknowledge that we were eating at their restaurant. All of this was annoying enough as it was, but then the bill came. I would’ve been happy to pay extra for an exceptional meal. But we payed triple what we’d pay anywhere else for a truly rubbish experience. I know this place is a chain so we could’ve had a bad branch, but that was no award worthy meal or customer service for that matter. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Everything was great from start to finish … although they had no whiskey 🥃 … Excellent burger taste, and presentation. ( although If I was going to be extra critical, the burger should be large enough to fit the tasty bun, or, a smaller bun to fit the patty ) Not a fan of crinkle cut, frozen chips, but, each to their own. 😉

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Disappointing experience We have been several times before Covid. And now returning we tried burgers golden wings and fries.. The burger had a beef not larger than a biscuit, that was a huge surprise as the prices are above average in Chiangmai. The golden wings were very very salty actually so salty the wife and I only had one wing each the rest we leftover. So what was once a good experience is now a place we won’t go back to. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The place was very nice clean and comfortable. The food was perfect and the meat was so good. The staff was extremely nice. We had perfect experience🤗

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This reminded of a boutique rock'n'roll dinner in the US. It was very clean and the staff were great. The menu has a good variety of burgers etc and also a good drinks menu. Prices are reasonable. The decor and environment is really clean and fun. It's a great place to stop for western style food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food here was fantastic the burgers were massive and the prices were good. However the veggie options are non existent. They only had a veggie burger which was not good whatsoever. The beef was fantastic though. The service was what let the place down. They were severely understaffed and it was very slow. All the staff working tried very hard but it was still very slow and quite poor.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Just the worst service. So slow. How long does it take to cook a burger 🤷‍♀️ Can’t comment on the taste as I’m still waiting an hour and a half after arriving! Not even busy…

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The best burgers in Chiang Mai. The menu includes alot of other things like chicken, ribs and more but come for the burgers. Big, messy and delicious. The service was great and fast. I came for lunch and will be back for a dinner in the future. A bit hard to find but take a grab and its easy.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Many new dishes but same dishes are always good. It worths coming back. Burger is always good, service is good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: we thought that we were coming here for burgers and craft beers. The burgers were fine, but there were no craft beers or other (adult) drinks available. At the end of the meal with a pretty big group, we were embarrassed to find that they don't accept credit cards.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place has been on my “to do” list for a while and I finally stepped through the door. Better late than never. Nice big comfortable booths. Every employee I interacted with was friendly and helpful. Great tunes playing. Ordered root beer float for a starter and it was excellent followed by honey wings that were crispy and delicious. After that we split a large bacon burger with truffle. Juicy with lots of flavor; great burger. Fries on side were great as well with an amazing dipping sauce. For dessert we split a chocolate drizzled waffle with coconut ice cream. Great ending to a perfect meal. I’ll be back sooner than later. Highly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If your looking for proper delicious American style food in Chiang Mai look no further. This place has everything you need! There was two of us and we ordered wayyy too much. Be warned the burgers come with wedges and onion rings! We got onion rings, the bacon topped wedges and bbq wings for starters all delicious. The wings were so so crispy yet smothered in sauce. I don't know how they do it!! Then we got ribs and a double cheeseburger. They were absolutely huge. Most things came with this lovely little pot of buttered sweetcorn and bacon! The ribs were gorgeous the meat fell off the bone. The burger was massive! As you can imagine we could not finish but it was the best meal and so affordable too. So many other things we want to try from the menu like the desserts and the Mac and cheese!! 10/10 Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ordered a take-away for the very first time from here, as we were in a 'burger 'mood' Delivery was fast via Grab, well packaged food, still warm. Hmm, well, the burger itself was good but personally I did not like the 'herby' taste in the beef patty, I prefer mine plain. Served with an onion ring & half-a-dozen chips, lettuce & a pickled gherkin--all fine although not made very clear when ordering as we ordered extra chips (150) without sauce(which came anyway) not sure what flavour the sauce was supposed to be but it was BLAND. Chips were good, thick-cut. Not really a mind-blowing tasty burger for our tastes but good enough! Not sure if we would order again--maybe-maybe not.!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good food, equally good service, average prices but with a lot of quality. I am in chiang mai for 6 days and I will definitely return to eat in this place.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burger place - just above average. Burgers are tasty and juicy. Too much sauce. Big portions. Will I come again ? - not sure.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Still delicious! Had my order on Grab, food was fresh, piping hot, loved the way it was packaged and served. Everything was perfect! Great veggie burger

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Really good burger, unthinkable to find in a small reality like that of Chiang Mai. The fried foods are good, even if a little too greasy. Fresh ingredients. Definitely acceptable prices compared to the Thai average and the cook speaks and understands English. The staff is helpful

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had a beef and a pork burger and both were excellent. Service was quick and attentive. French fries were disappointing however as they are cut extremely small ( smallest I've ever had ) and also small in quantity. Not a place to try and save money especially if doing American burger joint. Fix that and rate a 5 star.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I've been to both locations many times. They always great food and great service and good pricing. I hope nothing changes.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: It was a “need a break from Thai food night” and everyone was itching for a burger. Found this place on Trip Advisor and it did not disappoint. The setting was casual and the staff were great. Burgers were cooked to perfection and the onion rings and fries were yummy as well. Highly recommend this place!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I’m currently in Rock Me Burger and an old angry man was rude to the staff because he didn’t like the 3% credit card surcharge. Said he was going to leave a bad review on Trip Advisor. So if there’s a review that pops up within a few days of this one that sounds like it was written by a sad angry entitled man, he is all those things and the staff dealt with him very well. Well done staff.
Date_Written: by a sad angry entitled man, he is all those things and the staff dealt with him very well. Well done staff.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had an amazing burger! The Double was amazing and too big to fit in your mouth! The Mac’n Cheese burger special also was really good!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Been here several times.. I was very impressed with the waitress fluent in English. This helps so much getting the order exactly right.. Thanks so much for the great service. I highly recommend the burgers and dishes of mac and cheese.. We ALL enjoyed the ham bacon mac and cheese dish. A+++

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After weeks of Asian food we were looking for something more western and we found this great burger place in Chiang Mai. Owned by a rock lover guitarist this place has unusual but great burger combinations. Tasty and great value. Absolutely worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place was a complete accident. We had originally planned another restaurant and that wasnt available so we walked down the main street and could see the flames of the grills flaring. So we decided to give it a go..... and my god I'm glad it happened. The menu is great with lots of unusual burger combinations you wont have tried anywhere else. I had the purple rain burger and we shared a mac and cheese which was also delightful. Would eat here again for sure

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is a MUST for one of the most amazing burgers you will ever eat anywhere! The buns are amazing. Even if you do not eat bread, eat this bun! Burger was also so taste. And BIG. At least six inches in height and worth every single bite! Find this place and go! Staff was super friendly. Meal was so good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Wandered past this restaurant as it was near our place, and I’m very glad we did! Great value 435 baht for mac and cheese, a beer, a bottle of water and a burger. Very tasty with friendly service! Don’t hesitate.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We honestly didn’t have high expectations going in.. the inside looks a bit dated, and we were the only ones in the restaurant. The outside bar seating was cool.The menu options were great. Had a really hard time deciding which burger to try; they all looked amazing. Finally went with the American Pie burger. Service was super fast. The burger blew us away! It was perfectly cooked, well seasoned and the bun was soft and fresh. The home fries were tasty. My only regrets were not trying a milkshake and not having time to go back again ! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After reading previous comments, I was excited for a bunless burger. Told by staff, burgers are not gluten free, no gluten free buns. Only gluten free options are fries, steak or Caesar salad with no croutons

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good home made burgers. nothing amazing but made on the spot . Ok atmosphere. Good locationWent there for dinner after few days of Thai food

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: What I can say!! The burgers here are absolutely amazing. The bun is homemade and beef patties are fresh and cooked to perfection .

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We really enjoy Thai/Asian food, but after a number of days in a row, we needed a good old burger. These were amazing! Cannot recommend Rock Me enough -- it's a place I would go back to again.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you need comfort, or just really good food this is the place to go. Service is brilliant, chefs are fun (if you sit outside next to the kitchen). But the food... Oh my god! The food! I haven't had a tasty burger like this since the 90s when I frequented sesam burger in Trondheim. Their cooking is spot on, their spices are spot on and the sides and buns are perfect! And they have good music too! I'd recommend anyone who's got a food hunger to come here atleast once while they're in Chiang Mai. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great food (huge menu) all delicious. Would absolutely recommend if craving a change from Thai food. Lacks atmosphere but the food compensates.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Not your typical burger bar, far from it. The burgers are specific to your taste, mild, spicy etc. and cooked just how you prefer your meat cooked. Real chips to accompany the burger and a salad garnish (Thai style). The service was perfect, the staff helpful and friendly. I'd certainly recommend visiting Rock Me (just for a change).

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: High quality burgers and huge selection and reasonably priced. The service was a bit slow due to very busy.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Coming from Canada where we are pretty decent at making burgers I definitely did not expect to have the best burger I’ve ever tasted in Chiang Mai. I was super impressed by the Aloha Pork burger. It was perfectly cooked the way I wanted (medium), the sauces were outstanding and the grilled pineapple was definitely a fantastic touch! We got a bit of the back story from the servers, the owner left Thailand to go on an American rock band tour, fell in love with American cuisine and opened his restaurant to bring the best burgers alive and he certainly did! A must visit! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The meals were very generous portions and very tasty. Service was good and the food came out quickly.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This chicken aioli burger was the best chicken burger I have ever tasted. For garlic lovers this is the burger to eat! Loved every bite of this one and my first bite was the definition of foodgasm. For scandinavian people they also have garlic sauce for free in a basket filled with spicy and the regular sauce that you want with your potato. Or else some cheese dip from the menu. The prices are great for that kind of rare quality and we are definitely coming back to try something else on the menu!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We came for lunch and they moved us from table to table and then took 45 minutes to bring us our order... And the place was just half full. The food was good, but I cannot recommended this place based on the abysmal service.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The location is nice, and their menu has a very interesting and original variety of burgers and hotdogs, which can be pretty basic at some places. I had the mac and cheese burger, which was good but lacked seasoning. The service was good but nothing exceptional overall. I expected something better because of the price and the look of the restaurant. It feels more like a gimmick then a true savoir-faire. I would recommend if you are after a good burger, but don't expect something traditional or too be full if you like to eat a lot. The portion could definitely be bigger. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Beer was cold and “Fat chick” sandwich was delicious - as were wedge potato fries. Ordered extra pickles on the side (25 baht for generous serving) and glad I did. Pickles were just like what’s served at a New York deli

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Service spot on, Best burger I’ve had in a while and the hotdogs are bang on the money also, Aroi Mak Mak!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The choice of burgers they have is big & they all look very good. Fortunately they look the same or even better after you receive it. Enjoyed it very much!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We don't really go for multi-patty burgers, or those layered with exotic toppings, so we chose two 'original' 150 gram single patty cheeseburgers and asked for them 'well done'. They arrived soon after, perfectly cooked and great tasting, with a few tasty fried potatoes on the side and a battered onion ring. The burger bun was an unusual orange colour, but tasted good and I liked the slice of gherkin. A chap with a guitar was arriving to play just as we were leaving around 7.30pm.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Now we didn’t come to Thailand to eat hamburgers but buster, believe me when I say do not pass this joint up! The whole menus had our mouths watering. This whole place is a great plan perfectly executed. Don’t stuff your self so full that you pass up the amazing shakes.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Mouthwatering meals served piping hot to order. Huge portions sizes with reasonable prices. If you love burgers this is your place with so many varieties it's a difficult choice. Also many types of sizes orders and friendly staff.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I look forward to eating at rock me when in chiang mai as they have a fantastic choice of burgers and similar fare at reasonable prices. The quality is excellent and consistent and the service is good. On some evenings they have live music on the night which is also good but not too intrusive. Maybe the best of its kind I've been to in thailand.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burger ถนนลอยเคราะห์ ชั้นใต้ดินโรงแรมเรือนระมิงค์ เมืองเชียงใหม่ ถนนลอยเคราะห์ ถนนสายสำคัญ เรียกได้ว่าเป็นแหล่งรวม ความบันเทิง รวมไปถึงวัฒนธรรมชาวล้านนา และยังมีวัดลอยเคราะห์ วัดซึ่งได้ชื่อว่า จะได้ลอยเคราะห์หรือขจัดเคราะห์ออกไป ทำให้มีแต่ความเจริญรุ่งเรือง และอยู่เย็นเป็นสุข Rock Me Burger ถนนลอยเคราะห์ อีก อีกหนึ่งสาขาของ Burgers คุณภาพ หลากหลายเมนู เรียกได้ว่า คงจะเป็นตำนานเบอร์เกอร์ ในเมืองเชียงใหม่ ได้อย่างไม่ยาก Rock Me Burger นอกจากจะรังสรรค์เมนูความอร่อยส่งตรงสู่ลูกค้านักชิม หรือผู้บริโภค Rock Me Burger คงมีแต่การพัฒนา ในเรื่องเมนูต่างๆที่มีรสชาติอร่อย Burger จะยืนหยัด สร้างความสุขและความอร่อย คู่เมืองเชียงใหม่ Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place is great! A wide range of super fat boy burgers make choosing what to have challenging. A selected the crispy garlic aoli burger, and it was so tasty! The pickles are sweet and delicious and the cocktails fabulous. We'll definitely be back next time we're in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great location for people out at night for a good time. Staff does not speak good English but were friendly. Menu was a little hard to read but OK. Hamburgers look great and fries and onion rings look great, Drinks are ok. Hamburger was not cooked and red blood raw inside. Waiter did not ask how I wanted it cooked ( no English) and I did not say well done. Hamburger was dripping blood and grease and completely soaked the bottom bun. IT was hot. Veggies were great but no one eats raw hamburger ( processed meat). I could have sent it back to be cooked again and asked for new bun and I am sure they would do that. But one bite of raw meat killed my appetite. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was fabulous, we really enjoyed the food and the fantastic cocktails. We ended up going again before we left Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food comes really quick, no hassle with waiting for your meals! The variety of the burgers is bizarrely amazing, and they come cooked to your preference. They also LOOK like their pictures in the menu, unlike places where the illustrations are for advertisement only. This place does not go half way, but all the way.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Lunch : < 350 Baht pp (average) Rating : ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Amazing steak, burgers, fries, cocktails and service, it is surely a little gem in Chiangmai. For it price and quality, I think I would surely come again in my next trip even if it means I’m missing out on getting the most of Thai food in my trip - it was that good. The Steak and Fries is something I would really recommend, it literally was a huge piece of steak, done as we wished, medium rare. I was not expecting a lot, and was expecting that the steak would come all cooked, but I was wrong. Then, the BBQ ribs and the burger came, it left us with no words. While we were devouring our food here, we were already thinking of returning to this bar after night market, only to find out it last order is 10:30pm. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The restaurant is nice, the burger is great, but the meat seems a bit chewy because it's overcooked, and the staff are quite friendly and helpful

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had the naked burger it was the best ever. Had some onion rings on the side very good. Staff friendly good service. Clean and spacious very tasty food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Me and my friends went for lunch there yesterday. We ordered one burger, and two steak special sandwich. The placed looked modern and nice. Don't let it fool you. After a few minutes we noticed a few cockroaches roaming around the bar area, and climbing all over the counter and bottles. After around 15 minutes, we received our food. The steak sandwiches were unedible- The steak chunks was like rubber. We ended up spitting the lot of them. They added an unproportional amount of cheese that made the whole thing collapse and turn into an oily mess. The food is seriously over priced, and we ended up paying 800 baht for unedible food. Tourist trap. Beware. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Was craving for some burgers and came across this place. The one I went to was in Nimman area. Love everything about the burger - the bun was made crispy and warm with a coat of egg dip; the beef was cooked just right; the wedges are small and crispy, makes you want to order another one of its own; and the crispy onion ring... yummy! Definitely coming back to satisfy my cravings!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you wana try something else after the great Thai food that is the dicht Palace , those burgers are amazing !!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Now this fantastic restaurant is a true hidden gem. The food, waiters and drinks was made to perfection. The staff was extremely friendly. This is in my opinion the best restaurant in Chiang-Mai. My whole family cannot stop talking about the fantastic food they had at Rock Me Burgers & Bar.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I always come here when I am in Chiang Mai. The burgers are the best I have tasted in Thailand. Cooked fresh and to your liking. Not overly expensive. Polite and happy staff.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We walked past this place many times on the way to one of our other favourite restaurants in nimman and finally we tried it tonight. Hands down best burger I’ve found so far on this trip! Had the Mac and cheese burger with a beef patty and bacon on a house made bun. Absolutely delicious!!! 10/10

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Sucks! ordered three dishes, rock me original was fast, but the dirty cheese was freaking slow. Ordered at 14:32 got it at 14:56. What is it! The meat is made from Mars? It takes 24 minutes for a freaking dish! Order another dish like philly cheese that didn't come. The place wasnt even crowded!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Very very dirty. Hamburger without salt and without flavor. Careless staff! Overpriced dishes. I don’t recommend it! For this quality it is better go to fast food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great food, fast service. Good value. You will not eat a better burger in Chiang Mai, maybe the world!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We stopped here for dinner one night on our tour of Thailand The burgers here are amazing Hope your hungry because they are massive Staff were very friendly with good service Very well priced too for this quality of food Some good old rock music to listen to too

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The best Burgers I have had. We went here twice on our Chiang Mai Holiday. Excellent burgers with good friendly service and reasonably priced menu. We had two burgers, two beers and a Cesar salad all for around $33 AUD. Well worth it. Hence our second visit. Great atmosphere too. Many menu choices available

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
