Detail: I really liked the burger I ate at this place. Good meat, fresh vegetables, correctly cooked... but the french fries were cold. The milkshake was delicious. I would recommend this to anyone who wants to take a break on his trip to Chiang Mai and eat non Thai food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Such delicious burgers and chips. All burgers come with an onion ring and are big filling meals. The meat is cooked either medium or well done and tasted incredible. Good service. The purple rain burger was so good I got it 2 days in a row.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you are craving American bar food, this place will definitely appeal to you as it did to us. If you set your expectations on average, you may not be too disappointed. The food is just ok and there were a lot of strange combinations on the menu. I would not return.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rich Burger buy reasonable price, Open from day to night, I can walk to Rock Me Burger about 5 mins from my hotel. Delicious

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent burger, a bit more mayo then I prefer so will ask to leave it off next time. The potatoes were delicious and not greasy at all. Onion Ring also very good, more greasy then the potatoes. You can ask for beef or pork burger and how you would like it cooked.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A friend and I came here excited for mac and cheese and what we got was a small bowl filled with gooey cheese which looked delicious but made us both feel ill by the time we were half done. It was literally 80% cheese and 20% macaroni... it just felt like we were eating a bowl of cheese for dinner and it wasn’t even a good cheese. I really really love mac n cheese and i love cheese so for me to say this is not that great and way too greasy and cheesy is saying something lol. The burgers looked good but we didn’t have any, also the drinks were good but they fill the glass completely full of ice so either ask half ice or you get barely any flavour. If you still want the mac and cheese ask for half the cheese.. seriously. The service was okay and the building was really nice, like a rip off of hard rock cafe. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a week of having Thai food 2 times a day for a week in Thailand, I was craving a proper Beef burger. And boy Rock me burger turned out to be an experience! We were a group of 4, sat outside, ordered our drinks and burgers! The portions were commendable! My double patty burger with 2 sides ( Onion rings and fries ) was almost a challenge to finish! The place has a lovely vibe, highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Better arrive at this place with an empty stomach because the portions are huge. Their burgers in my opinion are second to none. I enjoy watching the burgers being made in front of me whilst I’m having a cool beer. My go to burger is the Rock me Double, perfectly cooked patties of ground beef with cheddar cheese and a home made bun. Yummy!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ate here at about 3pm on a Monday. Service was excellent, however the food wasn't even edible. Ordered the Mac and cheese burger. The Mac and cheese was average at best. Greasy and not much flavor. The burger meat was absolutely disgusting. Really weird off-putting flavor. Dry but greasy at the same time. Ate about 1/3 of it and gave up. Fries actually were really good. Don't believe the good reviews and the delicious looking food. You will be disappointed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I like to think of myself as a bit of a burger aficionado. As one of my favourite foods I've eaten them a lot, I've attended burger festivals, and I know how to cook them well myself. I even briefly worked for a top burger joint. These are some pretty great burgers. Not the best I've ever had - not by a long way. It's really quite difficult to get fantastic burgers in SE Asia but these are good. The wings were good too but the sides were a bit strange for my tastes although I grant you that's a personal opinion. The staff were friendly and efficient and the vibes good. I enjoyed eating here. I did find it really expensive though compared to local food you got to expect that really. All in all, recommended.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is the best place for burgers in Chiang Mai. They might be a bit on the greasy side, but they sure fill you up.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great and gigantic burgers here. The ambiance is so-so but the food is high quality. The portions are 'American'.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Every time I start missing home, I zip down to the Rock Me and grab a burger. They grill up a mean one, made to order, and the onion rings aren't half bad either. I have to mention this--get the mac n cheese. You will regret it if you don't. Yum!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I am a burger guy,, yes I am,, seems like it's hard to find a great burger,,, But I cherish the thought of one at Rock Me. You won't be disappointed JP Tenacity

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Both meals we got were actually awesome. If you want a break from the Thai food the sandwiches are awesome! You get a couple fries and one onion ring, the fries are really good but the onion ring is mostly batter. Seeing how little fries you get almost seems like a concern but the sandwich was so filling it didn't matter. We were there twice for lunch and it wasn't the most lively place but if you just want a good western meal this is one of the better spots in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I visited here based on a YouTube recommendation at a quiet lunch time. The staff were uninterested in serving me. Brought the drink only after I asked repeatedly. Worst of all the burger was raw on the inside and not edible. They did not offer any recompense. Don’t bother, you’d be better off at McDonalds for a burger fix.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I've been before & I'm back again. What a burger this place serves! The very best burger I've ever been served anywhere in the world! The staff are friendly & helpful but the burgers are just awsome! Did I mention the burgers here are very, very good! Give it a go, you won't go home hungry or disappointed!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is the place to be having the best burger of Chiang Mai... we had multiple around the world but this is the best... further excellent service and price is ok. here... but come here for the burgers!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burger/chicken burger and very tasty fries too. Chilled atmosphere with loads of choices! would recommend for a casual date night!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food is fantastic and all the staff are very friendly and English speaking. The service was very quick and there was also some live music going on which was really good. Will be coming here again!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great escape from local Thai food if you are wanting some comfort food. Speedy service, affordable prices and scrummy burgers and sides. Everything you want and need from a burger bar.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went here hoping to have an American style burger and a drink. That is not quite what we had. First of all, it was the weekend before Thailand’s major election, so they did not serve alcohol. Apparently, they are preparing for the actual election weekend and they don’t want people inebriated. 🙄 Next, the menu seemed like it was going to be good, but it was really a little odd. The burgers were extra greasy, and very strange combinations, the wings had a beautiful presentation, but were a little weird tasting. The fries were OK. They tried really hard to look like a Hard Rock café, but it kind of fell flat; in decor, atmosphere, and food. A for effort, but D for application.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food was phenomenal. I would recommend chicken garlic burger and ask for there bbq sauce on the side it's devine! <3

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ate here on our first night in Chiang Mai and the burgers were sooo good, we ended up coming back again with another couple we met and they also loved it! A bit more on the expensive side but so so worth it if you like a good burger. Would highly recommend, especially ‘The Fat Chiq’ burger is unreal!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Sat down and was given two huge menus each, I decided which burger I fancied and when we eventually got serviced the lady informed me that they don’t have any of the two pages that my choice was on... would of been good to be told this at the when we were given the menus?! My boyfriend chose a simple cheese burger (no fancy toppings) but they seemed to struggle with this as it arrived 15mins after my meal. When it did arrive, he then had to wait for his chips. Not really acceptable especially as I basically had finished my meal.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: RockMe burgers and bar, Chang Mai. We had Red chicken wings (spicy) and the Angus boy hamburger, 150 grams of Aussie Angus beef. There are bigger burgers and a great selection of toppings. Go wild. There are also ribs and more. Plenty to drink. Cool inside for a nice break. It was clean, Free Wifi and the staff were friendly and helpful

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers are huge and usually loads of Americans in there and other Chinese tourists taking lots of pictures of the huge burgers. If you like taking picture for social media and filling your belly it's worth a visit if you dont fancy the amazing Thai food around. I had the mac n cheese burger and was nice but so big couldn't eat the bun. Partner had a 300g burger with a fried egg and polished the lot off. Enjoy!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Probably the best burger I've had in 5 years. Friendly service, too. I had a patty melt, which was 300 grams of beef. With a coke, I paid 310 baht. The restaurant is air conditioned, which is nice if you go there on a hot day like I did.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you fancy some western comfort this place is great. Delicious burgers with great names, and a good range of cocktails and soft drinks too.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'm from Texas (USA), where burgers and bbq are the every day norm, additionally I love to cook so I'm comfortable knowing what is "rare, medium rare, medium, medium well done, and well done". The Fat Boy burger I ordered medium was served rare. I mean what the hell ? On the menu there are two option cooking options - medium and well done. Great presentation for the burger, the beef was absolutely disgusting - rare and cold, slightly browned on the outside. Rest of the order of Korean Spicy wings, onion rings, and pasta w/sausage had good tastes, as well as the drinks. They have an extensive menu, with a large menu of specials too. If they only have one cook, he/she needs to learn how to cook beef, especially frozen beef. If they have multiple cooks, fire the idiot who cannot cook a beef burger. I will not return, no need to risk myself to serious illness eating rare meat. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I liked the design of this place very much so stopped for a quick snack. The burgers are very well presented, too bad my battery was died and couldn't take a picture.. I would go again there are some other interesting food items on the menu such as pulled pork sandwich or the ribs.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have lived in ChiangMai for years, but only recently tried this place at their Nimman location. I prefer a simple cheeseburger, medium well, without a lot of toppings. They have a bug menu full of giant burgers, but I opted for the simple Standard with cheese that came with an onion ring and fries. The burger was cooked the way I like it, the roll was good, and the fries were also good. They have a good selection of local and a few craft beers, reasonably priced. The waiter was very attentive and though the restaurant was busy, the food was served quick. There were come other options on the menu ( vegan burger, chicken burger) if you don't want beef. A good place when in mood for a burger and a beer. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good burger. Cooked to order. Coke Zero came with a glass of ice. Totally accommodated our low-carb approach to burger (no bun, no fries, no onion ring). Nice break from Thai food. A bit dear relatively speaking at 190 ($6) Baht for a burger. Then again a burger of this quality in a US city would be twice the price.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you're a bit tired of local food head here. The menu is amazing, burgers, fries,onion rigs are to die for. Cheep drinks too. The service is great, super friendly!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers here are amazing, only in Chiangmai for 3 nights and had burgers from here on 2 nights. Great menu to choose from, would recommend the buttermilk batter chicken burger , it was lovely. Friendly staff Cocktails are nice , not to expensive Would recommend a visit if your in the area

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great service, from the minute we walked through the door to leaving. We both had the classic burger, and it was delicious, I’m not really a fan of burgers, but this was very good, and the prices were very reasonable for western food in Thailand.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burger was delicious the bread is super unique! Ask about it! Also got chicken was delicious. Can’t go wrong especially if you need some western food! Will come here again! Yui is awesome! Great customer service!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Reading all the bad reviews and I’m baffled! The portion sizes are massive and the beef is served medium (which is perfect for me) just had a burger with extra toppings and was roughly 270 bhat which is more than you might pay for a Thai dish but if you’re craving a decent burger it’s definitely worth it! Staff were really nice! 10/10 would recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My friends and I are traveling from the UK and have been craving a nice juicy burger with all the trimmings. We stumbled across rock me burger whilst on our way to another restaurant which turned out to be a fast food place so we came back. We were seated very quickly and were overwhelmed by the monster burgers on offer! We ordered and the server was super helpful. I opted for the classic rock me (beef) without a bun (gluten intolerant) and added caramelised onions for 30B. We all made moderations to our orders and the server made to double check by reading it back to us. Our food was served in food time and all came out one after the other. It was so delicious we ate it so quickly and it’s safe to say our cravings were fully satisfied! Would 100% recommend to anyone wanting a decent burger. 5 stars! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I literally walked out of there 20 minutes ago. Whoever is on duty today dropped the ball. You want a bowl of white lettuce with a raw burger on top for 180 baht? Go here. No ice in the glass. The food was dropped in front of me like you’d feed a unloved dog. Low care factor. Hey day is over. Cross this one off the CM list. No matter how hungry.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Food was acceptable considering we only ordered two salads. The real disappointment was that second salad was served 20 minutes after the first. Simply no excuse for such poor service.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The only thing less impressive than the food is the quality of the service. I would advise strongly that you avoid this place far better choices in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place had so much promise. Perfect location, and it looked wicked cool. Walking in the door is when the expectations were shattered. The menu is amazing - all the burgers are unique and fun sounding with clever names and descriptions. Super cute! Number one, who the heck is your server in this place? We were greeted by one person, our drinks brought by another, then another came over to take our order, food brought by another, and could find no one to get our check or order anything else after that. ???? I ordered the purple rain burger which seemed SO COOL, with a purple bun and everything! Too bad the bun was gigantic, so big that I couldn’t even find the burger. The burger was actually less than half the size of the bun, sitting looking minuscule inside of it. Not only that, but I took one bite and immediately spit it out. I had ordered the burger medium, and it was raw. Bleeding, still cold. Cooked on the outside and nothing more. My friend had ordered hers well done and gotten medium rare, but at least hers was edible. I flagged someone down and asked them to cook my burger more. They agreed, begrudgingly and looking confused that someone had asked such a thing. FIFTEEN MINUTES later, they brought it back out. My name burger. Like, the burger I had given them. As in the burger I had cut open with my knife to show the rawness to the server. She put the plate with the burger on it not he table and walked away, not even checking if it was okay. Of course, it wasn’t, and whene I looked at it again, it STILL wasn’t cooked. It wasn’t cold, but it was still. Leading and still bright red. That’s right, they took my burger, took 15 minutes to put the SAME BURGER back onto the flat top to cook better, and then STILL brought it back to me raw. Tried asking for a manger, and they all pretended they didn’t understand English. Finally just paid and left and didn’t even eat more than a bite of the burger lest I get sick. Also ordered three Irish flag shots that took 30 minutes to show up at our table, and when they did, they were room temperature despite being a creamy shot. Gross. Took it anyway, but why so long??? They get two stars because of the cool concept, and creativity. However their service sucks and so does their food. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had some appetizers at this place before heading to the night Bazaar. It was a very good experience, the service and food were good too, we were satisfied and were thinking to come back for diner next time.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ordered the mac n cheese burger and it was close to cold, I will not be returning. The meal seemed to be more focused on presentation than taste.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After we got our burger without any veggies (they only told us when they brought the food, of course at that point we didn't want to send it back and let it go to waste) we figured a discount on the bill would be appropriate. The manager hardly disagreed with that and became really unpleasant and rude. So I will definitely never gonna go there again. Despite I have had better burgers in southeast Asia before (even with veggies).

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: DO NOT VISIT HERE. My friend and I went for a casual dinner and both ordered the standard burger, when the burger arrived we were only then informed that there would be no vegetables with the burger (no tomato, no lettuce, nothing). As we were starving we ate but after we discussed with the manager a reduced bill considering we only got 1/3 of what was on the menu. From that moment onward I had the most unpleasant discussion I’ve ever had. He was rude, spoke down to us, he was threatening and with no attempt at an apology. It is safe to say I will never return and also warn others do not visit this establishment.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: One of the juiciest burgers I think I've ever had, best burgers are the original and rocking in heaven, if you get the Caesar salad order without the egg or pray your stomach is accepting of it. Staff are very friendly and helpful, we ordered take out to the tattoo parlour and they happily walk it down the road to you for free (we still tipped)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a week in ChiangMai we were wanting a good burger...and wow, did we ever find the place. The menu made it almost impossible to choose as there were so many burgers stacked with every topping desired. After drooling over the menu we finally decided, and ordered a original burger and a salad. Boy how: And

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The flavours were delicious and innovative, meat was perfect and the buns were exceptional. My boyfriend wants more!,,,

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We stopped by this place after looking up best burgers in Chiang Mai. After coming from Bangkok, and having Thai food for over 5 days straight I was looking for some comfort food. This place did not disappoint. Amazing burgers at a good price. Come here!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: It took them over 40 minutes to realize that they forgot to submit our order to the cook. Who knows if this place has good food, because I never got the chance to eat any. It's quite pathetic that they approach you 40 minutes after placing your order only to ask you if you had placed one or not. Mistakes happen, that I understand. Except this mistake also happened to the couple sitting at the table next to us. I've never encountered a restaurant that didn't submit my order after taking it. What's the excuse? They threw our orders in the trash. If you decide to eat here, understand that you're taking a gamble. If you value your time, maybe consider going somewhere else instead. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is not only a wonderful delicious burger joint. The displays of your orders are like arts pieces...staying at Raming Lodge now and restaurant is just downstairs!!! Prices are great. Merry Christmas!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We have eaten here a couple of times now - the food is usually really good! I ordered a smoothie from the menu for a drink (non-alcoholic) and I didn't get it until after the meal, it thoroughly confused the staff, which is why I only gave it 4 instead of 5 because I didn't have anything to drink at all and it was very confusing LOL. Still great food though!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: What a disappointment, this place used to be good. We sat down at a slightly rickety table and we're handed the menus. After deliberating we chose Super heaven and the Angus boy, the manager took our order and pointed out that the Angus had run out so I opted for the standard burger. We also ordered the carbanara. The manager was very professional and polite. There is a certain greasyness about the condoment bottles and also the menus. My burger arrived first and it's presentation was not as the menu or as I remember it previously. I started by tasting one of the "hand cut frys" they also are a different shape and don't look hand cut anymore but to my shock my chip was soggy and cold, I touched another and sure enough thy were all cold. I called over the waitress and she said she would sort it however her tone was not pleasant and I started to worry. Rock Me Burger is unusual in the kitchen is outside at the front of the restaurant. I decided to see how they were treating my burger while they 'fixed' the chips. As I walked through the doors all I could hear was that unpleasant waitress gossiping about me with her colleagues, that not bad enough the manager was just stood there listening and remember this is a public area! How rude talking your customers down in front of other customers. I then noticed that to keep my burger hot they had put the whole thing bun and all on the flat plate. I said that was not sufficient as the meat would get cold and it was bad food hygiene practice. At this point the waitress was mocking and mimicking me very rude indeed, my partners order then came out and this rude dispicable waitress said I better check thouse chips are hot she put her fingers all over the chips while the chef held the plate. I said are you serious you just handed the food, do you know anything about food hygiene? The reply was "l know everything". Don't forget all of this in front of the manager who did not say a word, until that is I said "right I'm out of here" back to the table and we started heading out. But the manager stopped us and asked us to pay for our partially drunk drinks. 1 star is now far to much for this place, what a pity it used to be one of if not the best burger joint in Chiang Mai. Avoid if you care even slightly about food hygiene and being insulted by the rude waitress. To the owner: one bad waitress like this can bring your business down, if they insult customers their colleagues might start to follow suit. My advice get rid and try to repair your reputation before its too late. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: So, I was craving a burger, walking in. Unfortunately it was already very late to eat so heavy. So I tried the Caesar salad with Onsen Egg, different for me but definitely loved it! My wife chose the Rock Me Wings, also very tasty! Enjoyed the ambiance and service we received. Thank you very much!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After weeks of curries, stifrys and soups this is just what we needed. My husband got the double stack beef burger medium & absolutely devoured it. I got the kimchi chicken burger and it was really nice. The chicken was actually chicken thigh instead of breast so it was thin and juicy. The crispy coating was crisp and dipped in a spicy sauce. At home all chicken burgers are made with the breast which sometimes makes eating them hard but I quite liked the chicken thigh instead. They come with wedge fried which were great. I got the kiwi & soda drink which was unreal. I could have had 5 of them. All together our bill was $355 baht. We got the last table in the house so we were at the back. The kitchen is actually outside on the street which was kind of cool. I would go again if I needed a fix of home. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you are really looking for a true taste of burger, try this restaurant. The patties they use in their menus, have unique taste which you ll never find anywhere else in town. the restaurant has 2 branches at 2 great location.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If your in need of a burger fix then thid place certainly fits the bill. The burger was tasty and a good size and the place seemed pretty clean. Service was a bit slow and muddled. Price wise cheap by western standards but you can certainly eat better for less elsewhere.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you want a really great burger, spend a little more, and order an Angus Boy. You will get Austrailian Beef. It is of better quality than the usual ones. If you want better quality than that, you can take a trip to the State of Texas in the USA. There is also other very good food here. Please keep in mind that a restaurant that serves great food and is busy, that you might have to wait a little longer for your food than otherwise. If you want quick food, cook it yourself. The staff has been always friendly and attentive to me. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Located in a road with so many bars, restaurants and massage joints; this place undoubtedly served delicious burgers that can satisfy burger lovers’ tastebuds.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I've been here twice. Once with friends and once alone. First time I got the original burger, delicious, and my friend ordered the wings. I wouldn't recommend wings, unless you like tasteless, heavily battered. Second time there was live music and I sat outside at the bar and again ordered the original burger and a vanilla shake, delicious!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: As my 15yo was craving a burger we visited Rock Me Burgers on the recommendation of our Grab taxi driver after we found Beast shut. There is a good selection of burgers and the service was prompt and polite. We ordered our beef burgers well done and they were great - cooked through but not over cooked. I’m not a great lover of burgers but really enjoyed mine. The chips were good too! If you need a beef-fix then Rock Me burgers is just the job.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We were craving some western food so stopped in here! Tasty burgers - mac and cheese one was tasty! Served quickly! Nice big portions!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My friend and I had a monetary mishap while on vacation and we were cashless. Before we knew of this place,we stopped to ask what restaurant would take cards. A British man who owned his own restaurant on the same block suggested here because, "whenever I'm craving an authentic tasting burger, this is the spot in all of Chiang Mai!" So we took his advice. And he was not wrong. The staff is super friendly, the place is clean, the menu has so many mouth-watering options it makes it hard to choose, and the drinks (both non and alcoholic) are really good. The vibe is super chill and the best part was that in this time of emergency, we were able to pay with card. They also accept WeChat and Alipay for those expats like me and my friend that reside in China - however it normally only accepts Chinese citizens so just a heads up If I'm ever around the area I will definitely stop to eat there again! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We visited quite late in the evening and were served immediately, being the only customers. Service was good, enjoying a joke with the waiter. The burger and fries were tasty. Fair price and portion size....and whey better, in fact a different league to mcd or bg.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best burger in Thailand. I had the classic, but there are plenty of choices. Some combinations you may have never heard of but the classic was awesome!! The meat juicy and the bun was probably the best burger bun ever. You have to try it!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was not a planned visit but it was raining so hard that I sought shelter in the first place I could. The waitresses first impulse was to laugh because I looked like a drowned rat but they were all very pleasant. It was hard to choose because all the options looked so unhealthy but the plain burger was actually very nice and great value.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We liked the beef burger more than the pork burger The service was great, the waiters speak good English Good prices

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: What is happening to a place when successful and enjoyed!? Well as customers we tend to recommend and revisit. Since my last visit in 2017 I have to state the 2018 visit was a big turn down. It may be the low season - but the place has lost an interest for their customers that is for sure. The menus are repaired and taped with duct tape and service staff seams to be hired from the street. Sorry for the negative comments, but to see one of my favorite eating places in Chiang Mai losing it is not ok. If there is a management in place please shape up and get back in there....Delivering the perfect experience and not only great burgers!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Delicious burgers and friendly staff! Happily accommodated to my gluten allergy! The fries were good and this was a nice change from all the thai food we had been eating for a month while traveling around thailand!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: When I want a great burger, I go to Rock Me Burger & Bar. There I can buy an Angus Boy. It is 150 grams of Australian Beef, Tomato, Lettuce, Chedder Cheese, on a Homemade Bun. It comes with French Fries and a Fried Onion Ring (not shown). Many other dishes are available. The staff is very friendly and attentive.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: ร้าน 🍔 เจ้าดังที่เชียงใหม่เปลี่ยนเจ้าของหรอคะ? วันนี้ไปทานมา ผิดหวังสุดๆ!! ห่วยมาก 🍔 5-6/10 มีร้านที่ลำปาง ทำ beef patty อร่อยกว่าที่ร้านนี้อีก, burger bun.. nothing special 🍗 2/10 ปีกไก่รสชาติเหมือน BonChon ปลอม พอกแป้งมาหนามาาาก กินไปคนละชิ้นแล้วไม่มีใครแตะอีกเลย 🥗 3/10 ไม่ผ่านอย่างแรง แต่ต้องกิน เพราะผักใน burger เค้าให้มาน้อย 🍟 เดี๋ยวนี้กลายเป็น shoestring fries แบบของ Mc.Donald’s ไปซะแล้ว เมื่อก่อนดีงามกว่านี้มากมาย สรุปภาพรวมทั้งหมด = 4/10 Customer Experience แย่มากๆ ตั้งแต่ไปถึงสาขาแรกที่ Night Bazaar ฝ่าดงรถติดตั้งแต่สถานีรถไฟเชียงใหม่ ข้ามสะพานนวรัฐ กว่าจะมาถึงเจอรถติดเกือบชั่วโมง พอไปถึง..แม่ง ร้านปิด แต่ใน Facebook หลักของร้านก็ไม่มีการแจ้งบอกว่าปิดนะ (อันนี้เราเองก็ผิด ที่ไม่โทรไปเช็คก่อน... แต่ในเมื่อ Internet บอกว่าร้านเปิด เราก็เลือกที่จะเชื่อ Internet) แล้วก็ต้องฝ่าดงรถติดไปอีกครึ่งชั่วโมง เพื่อไปทานสาขานิมมาน พอไปถึง.. ไม่มีที่จอด 🙄 ต้องขับไปจอดเกือบปากซอย 15 แล้วเดินย้อนกลับมาที่ร้าน คือพยายามมาก หิ้วท้องรอมื้อนี้มาตั้งแต่เช้า จะกินต้องได้กิน! ถึงร้านแล้วเดินไปนั่งโต๊ะในสุดริมกระจกข้างใน ข้างนอกมีฝรั่งนั่งอยู่ 1 คน และ มีคู่นักท่องเที่ยวชาวไต้หวัน(มั้ง) ทั้งร้านมีลูกค้าอยู่ 7 คน มีพนักงานอีกประมาณ 6-7 คน ถือว่าพนักงานเยอะนะ ต่อจำนวนลูกค้าในร้าน แต่..... พนักงาน ไม่ attentive เลย!! เรียกได้ว่า ไม่สนใจลูกค้าเลย พนักงานเอาเมนูมาให้นะ - แต่พอถึงเวลาจะสั่งอาหาร เราต้องลุกจากโต๊ะแล้วเดินออกไปเรียกพนักงานให้มารับออเดอร์ พอพนักงานเอาน้ำมาเสริฟ ยังเทน้ำไม่ครบทุกแก้ว - เราต้องเดินเอาแก้วไปเปลี่ยน เพราะแก้วสกปรก ยังมีคราบเศษอาหารแห้งติดขอบแก้วอยู่เลย พอจะเช็คบิล - เราต้องเดินออกไปหน้าร้านเพื่อขอเช็คบิล พอจะจ่ายตังค์ - เราต้องเดินเอาไปให้เค้า (พนักงานคนนึงทำท่าเหมือนยืนรอรับอยู่ แต่เค้าไม่มองโต๊ะเราเลยนะ เค้ามัวแต่ยืนคุยกับเพื่อนร่วมงาน สายตาเลยมองไม่เห็นมือที่เราโบกเรียกเค้าอยู่ประมาน 3-4 ครั้ง ปรากฎว่า ร้านนี้ไม่รับบัตรเครดิต! จะขอจ่ายเงินแบบ QR Code ก็ไม่มีอีก!! 😡😡 สรุปต้องเดินย้อนกลับไปที่รถ ขับรถออกนิมมานเส้นหลักมา (เพราะรถจอดเกือบถึงปากซอย 15) แล้วขับเข้าซอย 17 วกกลับมา เพื่อจ่ายเงินสดให้ร้านที่อยู่ท้ายซอย 15 นี่ถ้าใครรู้ว่าเค้าเปลี่ยนเจ้าของ หรือเปลี่ยนมือผู้บริหาร ฝากบอกหน่อยว่าควรหาผู้จัดการร้านที่เป็นผู้ใหญ่และเป็นงานบริการหน่อยนะคะ พนักงานมีแต่เด็กๆ ที่ทำงานบริการไม่เป็นเลย อีกอย่าง จ้างเชฟคนใหม่เถอะค่ะ!! เสียดายผลงานดีๆที่เคยทำไว้ในอดีต และชื่อเสียงที่สั่งสมมานาน อยากมี Burger อร่อยๆ ไว้ทานเวลาไม่อยู่กรุงเทพ อยากกลับไปกินของอร่อยๆแบบเดิมอีก Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The ribs are really good as is the selection of burgers.Service is friendly and fast and the location is good for tourist venues

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Love the chicken in a box and rock me fries here. They are delicious. Hubby had the Chiq Sandwich and said it was delicious.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good prices and quite a selection of burgers. Friendly staff. It filled a hole but we probably wouldn’t return.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Needing a burger fix, this was the place. The restaurant itself wasn’t as thriving and rock’n roll as social media would suggest, but the burgers more than made up for it. Super speedy service, and literally little wait time until these babies hit the table. Spoiled for choice, the most time consuming part was decided what to eat! Small suggestion would be meat slightly rarer, but medium is still pretty good. Insect repellant needed though, as I was relentlessly terrorised by mosquitoes from the moment I sat down. Not a huge issue, more an annoyance. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The vegan burger isn't vegan. The waiter forgot my order, after I reminded him and politely asked asked again I was informed only then that the vegan burger isn't actually vegan (The Pattie has milk and eggs inside, while the toppings include cheese and mayo). If I hadn't asked, I wouldn't have known until the order came in. They did not offer anything instead as compensation (though I didn't ask) and didn't have an explanation to why it says that the Burger is vegan and not vegetarian. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After traveling in Asia for 3 weeks I wanted something other than Asian food, so I used trip advisor to see what the best place for a burger was, and Rock Me Burgers was #1. I went there mid lunch hour and was happy it wasn't too crowded. After the waiter handed me the menu i noticed about 1/3 of it was covered in black tape, marking items they no longer had. I was even given a side menu that had everything covered except one item. That was slightly disappointing. The only had bottled beer but one was an IPA so i ordered that, which was very expensive 200 baht. When i first sat down I asked about using a Visa and they said yes only if i spend at least 500 baht which, as a solo traveler, was pretty steep. I asked if they had avocado as an add-on, a common thing for burgers, and they didnt. So i asked for caramelized onions, and sauteed mushrooms. I expected these to be on the burger, but instead they were on the side. Also, the mushrooms had onions in them, which i wish I would have been informed about because then I wouldn't have needed to order a side of onions. Burger was really delicious though, i have to admit. I just got the basic burger and that, two beers (one cheaper one), and the two add-ons came to barely over 500baht so i was able to use my card. Won't go back probably but wouldn't say its a bad place. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'm really confused by some of the reviews labelling this place as expensive. I paid 190 baht for a really big burger with a generous portion of fries. That's not expensive at all. Great food, LOW price

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: While the meals here are not going to win any awards from the healthy eating people, if you are in need of some "get-well" food after a big night, this place is hard to beat. A variety of burgers, hot-dogs, ribs and wings to satisfy any craving, highly recommended for a one off during your time in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had been to this place twice a few years ago and decided to give it a miss, as I didn't find their burgers to be extraordinary. But I came back after having tried a few other ChiangMai burger places, mainly to let a Thai friend discover what a real burger looks like. Indeed, she's used to go to...you know, the fastfood burger chain with a clown... And she called it delicious. Back to rock me burger I must admit that the taste of their burgers is really good now. Plus the potato wedges I complained about in a past review have been replaced by fresh French fries, the temperature is right and you get real mayonnaise for the fries (yeah, I'm Belgian...). As for the price, 190 Baht for the "rocking on heaven" burger with bacon, egg, salad, 150gr meat, fries, onion ring (...) makes it a real bargain!!! The price of the water is the only let down. 25 Baht for one of the smallest bottle of water you can buy (400ml)... If it was spring water I would say ok... But no it isn't. By the way, they have live music on Saturdays and Sundays. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Still a great place to visit for burgers, fries and shakes. Free wifi. Nice staff. Bring your appetite!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had burgers, ribs and drinks. The burgers were very tasty but definitely not worth what we paid. This is something to try once though.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: the best burger I ever have,nice place,in or out ,good choice of burger,very tasty,salad and fries was amazing

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: went to the newer location just off Nieman Road in Chiang Mai last night I had been to their location in The Old City many times and enjoyed their burgers last night the meal was just okay the beef tasted a little bit strange I had to rock me double beef the french fries were fine and the onion rings are fine and the burger bun was fine just the burger meat tasted a little bit strange would go back again but would have a chat with the staff to see what was different from the last few visits that I had.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place had the most amazing tasting burgers! The spicing used was fabulous, and the topping choices were very good. The fries were crispy and golden. Everything was so good we went back there again! After days and days of pad thai, this a great change.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Outstanding place - as good as any New York burger joint. Very high quality meat cooked beautifully. Very impressed. Would come back. Family loved it. Fantastic milkshakes.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Unfortunately I I have no pictures because I ate the burger before I realized I hadn't. I'm a no fuss foodie, and the burger made me do my happy dance. Looking for something disgustingly guilt free delicious here is the spot!!!! I don't know if I made sense, well like these burgers!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Awesome food and service. We stumbled across this restaurant after looking on u tube for bars and food in Chiang Mai. Manager was first class. You won’t be disappointed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This restaurant is part of the Raming Lodge Hotel. They have seats inside and outside. The menu is not that big, mostly burgers and fries. I had their fish and chips, which was served in a little bucket. It was quite greasy and salty. For me the last time.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A great find in Chiang Mai. After many days of delicious Thai food we fancied a change and something a bit more like home. Rock Me Burger has a huge menu of burgers, steak sandwiches, chicken and more. Our group of 4 had 3 burgers and 1 steak sandwich and we all really enjoyed our meal. Our meat was cooked "medium" but was a bit rarer than expected so maybe get well done if you don't want it red in the middle. All of our meal came with fries and a large onion ring. Price was reasonable, more expensive than Thai food but that was expected. We shared a chocolate milkshake after which was also delicious.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had intended to go to Restaurant next door however it has closed down. How lucky were we. Fantastic burgers and best chips we have had in Thailand so far. Highly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had the Mac ans cheese burger. It was delicious. The band that played there was really good and the staff were super friendly and nice. I recommend this place

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Just a wonderful place to hang out for a great lunch and cold beverage! Very friendly staff and the food is honestly excellent!!! Ate there several times

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Overly rated good looking burgers. We ordered the Double Rock Me and the Angus. The buns was nice and crisp. Unfortunately the patties were too salty for both burgers. We left with numb tongues. Good service though.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great tasting burgers on a delicious home made bun. This place gets the seasoning just right in the beef, I ordered the Angus burger, ground Angus beef and the correct amount of salt cooked perfectly. The staff do ask how you would like your burger cooked (rare, medium, etc.) the fries are cut and cooked on site. We also ordered a Mac'n'cheese which was just a little bit too cheesy would have preferred more cheese sauce then just bland American cheese but each to his own. Highly recommend Rock Me Burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent menu and high quality, food, atmosphere and service. Apparently, "Falang-trained," so you can be "sure to enjoy a 'drama-less" meal with family and friends"!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This burger joint stole our hearts. We visited the one near Nimman Rd. Their burgers are truly delicious, try the purple burger!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I went there in the afternoon, the place was not too crowed, tables and bar seating is available. I ordered the original rock burger, it came with hand made fries, the meat was perfectly cooked (medium rare for me), it was delicious :) Beers wasn't available because it wasn't 5pm, but good to know that they have nice local beers. Staff was great, very friendly and helpful !

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went to three times in the past few weeks, the manager is very nice and the food is really great. We had the vegetarian MKB burger, the sides are great and the portion serves are huge. The shakes are even better. The macaroni and cheese is also really well made. There's no fault here, amazing food and amazing service. We will be back for sure.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: They taste great and good sized portions. An easy 5 star restaurant. Better than most burgers back home in New Zealand also. Milkshakes are top knotch.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best burgers in Chiang Mai and the presentation of the burgers is great. If you like burgers you wouldnt be disappointed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here with 23 of my friends. Thank you for letting us call ahead and reserve a table for our large group, and thank you for quick service. Everyone went home fat and happy. So many great burgers, I want to try them all!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Loved the milkshake here but the rest of the food was not to my liking. The portions are really generous but too greasy for my taste. Very good service though

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had the mac and cheese burger, first time ive seen this type of burger and loved it! Service was also very good

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We came for a birthday burger for my son. We were served quickly. He accidentally ordered the wrong thing and his mistake was quickly fixed up with such good grace that I give them a definite thumbs up for service. Even with some language barriers, they tried to make our order the way that we were requesting it. We all enjoyed our food. and had the bacon cheeseburger, the loaded fries. We didn't love the chicken sandwich because it was kind of soft coating with dark meat.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burgers has the perfect name because that’s exactly what it is! Rock and roll and hamburgers. Delicious burgers and a good beer selection were the highlights but the live music and friendly staff helped to make our dinner even better.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Can’t complain about a thing! Great service, good prices, well presented and clean. Staff very happy and friendly. Couldn’t ask for anything better. Check out the size of the meals

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: in my opinion this is the best burger in Chiang mai, i always enjoyed it! big portions, fairly price and good service.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burgers very wide choice. Not so thai but for a quick and big lunch it is your way! The waitress was nice and helpful

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Such good burgers, leaves for dead anything ive had in the USA which is supposed to be the home of the burger. Nice seating and prompt service with beautifully cooked burgers. Right in the heart of the action in chiang mai

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good burger. Reasonably priced. Comes with potato wedges and an onion ring. They have wifi too. Bad service. I don't mind waiting for good food, but the way waiters serve, treat, and welcome diners are not as good as its food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: best burgers in chiang mai. located in loi khro road, this is the spot if you looking for a burger. highly recommended.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ordered the Super Mac Burger. Was extremely disappointed when I took my first couple bites into the burger and the patty wsn't normal ground beef, but instead loaded up with onion strings mixed into the beef. Done in some slight to add extra listing weight to the patty and they never inform that there's onions inside to those of us expecting a normal burger. I couldn't finish after a couple bites, so jsut ate the Macaroni off the top instead.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My girlfriend wanted to go to McDonald's but I was able to change her mind and suggest we try out Rock Me. My burger came with a descent amount of fries and 1 onion ring. That onion ring is a very mice touch and the batter they use is simply delicious. Presentation was nice, service was quick and helpful. My girlfriend had the pork burger which came with the same and also a nice size pickle. The price was even cheaper then McDonald's. How they do it, I don't know but I will definately be back and highly recommend this place to anyone in the mood for a great burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If your looking for a charge to the local cuisine and after a dirty burger then Rock me burger is the place to visit. Good tasty burgers and great milkshakes....

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had an Aloha burger there. Fantastic burger. Onion ring was excellent. Atmosphere good while we waited. Had take away but only 2 minute walk. Very close. Fries were blah. They were limp and soggy. I know it was takeaway but was literally only 2 minutes away. Fries should have been better. Burger was so good, still warrants 4 stars. Would go again but leaving CNX in the morning.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Came by to exchange money in Loi Kro road. My wife said to go eat at rock me. I didn’t expect much, but I was very surprised of the great taste of my double rock burger. Fresh meat, super taste... way better then McDonalds. And also my soda mojito was excellent.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Easy going cool atmosphere. Decent drinks and burgers, casual in the main bar street of Chiang Mai. If you had enough Thai street food and want something different, a good option. Right opposite of it, a great place for foot massage.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My husband and I were traveling in Thailand and spent some time in Chiang Mai. We were thoroughly taken by the ambiance, the service, the decor and the FOOD at Rock Me Burger! The burgers are especially delicious ~ to every detail ~ homemade buns, homemade pickles, freshly seasoned beef, not to mention the homemade french fries. Since we were there ourselves we recommended this place to two sets of honeymooners who spent time in Chiang Mai. They all LOVED Rock Me Burger including their warm welcome by Ratawit Ratanayongpairoj, the owner and head chef. We couldn't be more proud of him ourselves, as "Best", his English nickname, is our former AFS student from scholl year 2001-2002. If you are ever in Chiang Mai, don't miss Rock Me Burger. We hope to go back ourselves one day! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you are on budget, go to McDonalds, but if you want a specialty burger, this is the place. Service can be a little slow at times but certainly understandable as the restaurant was packed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: 190 baht for a burger with bacon, scambled egg, pickle, French fries and one onion ring. Bottled water was 25 baht more so you might as well get a beer. Very popular place.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Original rock me burger was fantastic - the bun was soft yet crispy, the meat was high quality and the sauce was indescribably amazing (order more for the fries!). The loaded fries were great, but we liked the fries sans cheese just as good. The Mac and cheese was good, but the pulled pork seemed tossed on top and didn’t really meld with the macaroni or sauce. Definitely go for the burgers and fries - they will not disappoint! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was here for a meetup event. Service was fairly decent but it was hard to find staff when I wanted the free wifi password (it's on the napkin holder but there wasn't one on our table) and to order another beer. The beer was delivered quickly with a glass and ice but they only have small Changs and that cost 60 Baht which is a little expensive. The Rock Me Burgers BLT super bacon was 160 Baht which was also expensive. It came with fries and was fairly decent but although I noticed the bacon, I didn't really notice the burger at all. Long and short of it, if you have plenty of money, you'll probably love this place. If you are on a budget, I'd go somewhere else.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Delicious burgers! Outside seating in quaint passageway to hotel- all lit up. Centrally located on busy street to people watch.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I usually been there. And I really love this place. But today I went to Rock me Buggers I really feel bad about time to closed I went there on 11.05 pm. In the information list told : 11.30 am. - 00.00 pm. It's forth times I got it , I feel so bad about this restaurant Did your staff really need to go home fast ? Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Don’t waste your time with this place. The burger patty tastes like meatloaf or meatballs. There are better places for burgers in Chiang Mai. The fries and onion rings were decent. Maybe try something else than burgers here.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers look great, but there is nothing to them. Flavorless meat, way too much mayo on a soggy bun. The service was absolutely abysmal as well. #NEVERAGAIN!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This my review is valid ONLY for the NIMMAN BRANCH of Rock me Burgers. I am a long time customer of the Rock Me Burgers at the Raming Lodge Hotel. Anytime I come to visit Chiang Mai, twice a year, I have always gone to RMB for luch or dinner, several times. Always lovely food and very good service. This time,as I was already at Nimman, I decided to try the new open RMB at Nimman Branch. What an horrible surprise. First of all, the menu is less than half of the original branch at The Raming Lodge. Second, my wife, as she saw the burgers of our next tables , she told me she wasn't going to order because the food seemed to her to be different from the RMB at The Raming Lodge. And she was 100% right. I ordered a Rock Me double, the meat was over greasy with a strange taste. There was not the usual fried onion ring on the top of the burger, as it is at the original branch. The french fries were the worst surprise of the day. Never eaten in my whole life such a disgusting stuff. They were cold and full of oil. Seemed to me they were fried at least 45 minutes earlier and then left at open air. Cold and greasy. Awful. The next shop is still work in progress, so the place is full of dust because the staff is leaving the door between the two shops always opened. Toilet was small and dirty. Still now, after two hours from my lunch, I'm still burping the taste of the meat. Dear General Manager of the RMB : if your company decided to open up the Nimman Branch just to get easy money is really up to you. But be sure of something : you will never ever see me again. 315 THB for this awful food is a waste of time and money. I will visit soon the Branch at The Raming Lodge and check how the food is there. Keep you updated............... Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great restaurant, packed every day. High turnover of people which is a very good sign and we visited here once for lunch. The food was well priced for the portions although the service was a little average. We were sat in a non smoking area with people smoking, I asked the staff to address the issue and they said it's OK to smoke there. After a few backwards and forwards about the sign stating no smoking, they agreed to stop people smoking in the non smoking area. My wife had their signature Rock Me Burger and it came with cheese that stained your fingers. Even cleaning them straight after couldn't get the stain off, which was a little concerning, so just make sure you don't get any on your clothes !! I would recommend the food, it was a very nice burger and would happily return. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers we had were nailed to the wooden plate with the knife. Not easy to get the knife out. However, the meat was quite greasy and did not taste good at all. Finally we returned half of it. As somebody else has written before. There are much better places to go. I will not go here again.
Date_Written: before. There are much better places to go.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Slightly disappointed. We came here for dinner and ordered 2 of the Rock Me Original with some add-ons and the Rock me fries. The rock me fries is just cold fries in a bucket with shredded cheese and some bacon on the very top. The burgers came out slightly undercooked even for medium and the add-on of mushrooms came 5 minutes late after we asked them about it. Staff are friendly, nice street bar seats which was nice given the weather. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Nice place in Nimman that we just stepped into while hungry. Had just the right options for a heavy brunch that we needed. Good menu and cheerful staff. The burgers were imaginative in mixing with Thai herbs and flavours. Satisfied

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: One of the few #latenight restaurants in chiang mai, we arrived at 23:00 for dinner. The only reason I put 4 out of 5 stars is because I expected a better meat for their high end burger and that the place has no dessert except some capped Icecream. Staff is extremely friendly! Overall vibe is cool. Price is 5 out of 5, you’ll never get a better value for food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Delicious, good portions and surprisingly not expensive. Expect Hard Rock Cafe style burgers and food at 1/3 of the price. Friendly staff. Just go!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: It is raining outside, we wanted a warm place, a beer, some food and no more Xmas music... we found it all in here! Good attention, great food and fair price. Excellent burger, nice home made bread, good meat quality... totally recommend.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Awesome burgers here with many different add on’s. The burger is cooked to order mine came out just as ordered a perfect medium. The buns are fresh and soft just the right amount of texture. All in all one of the best burgers I’ve had any where in the world hands down and at a very reasonable price.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: That was my nr.1 burger I have ever tried!! Fresh ingredients, nice staff and a lot of locations in Chiang Mai town.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: love how to create the signature menu like Ka-Prao Burger or how to put many kind of cheeses for complexity of flavor. I ordered the Burger with Mac Cheese, It was pretty good, I love how they cook Mac cheese and bun. The Beef was juicy and tasty. The price it just 200 THB something. Let forgot the Burger Kind and Mcdonald once you are in Chinag Mai

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I dropped in on a casual Friday night to see what all the fuss was about. Hailing from Melbourne, Australia, a burger-loving city, I was keen to sample the best that Chiang Mai has to offer. I ordered the original with bacon. I must say, it was pretty damn good. Starting with the bun, it was proper brioche, toasted on the inner side and supposedly baked in-store too which is cool. The beef was juicy and tender and I love how they cook it right in front of you at the outside bar. The sauces in the burger, not sure what they were, weren’t overly prominent and so I didn’t really taste them. Also, the chips, while they were crunchy and again, cut in-store, were actually pretty cold. Overall I’d say this is probably one of the best I’ve had in Asia, a place not really known for its American cuisine. But still, Rock Me does a commendable job at producing a top quality product that any burger connoisseur would likely drool over. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Not much to say apart from it was one of the best gourmet burgers I have ever had. Staff very friendly and very chattery. Nice to sit outside at the bar.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burger was well dressing, nice side, but the taste of burger was normal. It is only good for one time.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me was recommended to me as a very good burger restaurant. Im of the opinion that it is average, good but not special. I think you should try the burger trucks on Nimman. If your in the area then sure but not worth making a special trip.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Really good burgers if you fancy a change whilst visiting Chang mai from traditional Thai cuisine, also really good cocktails!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good food, good variety of drinks and most of all cheap/amazing value for money. Service is excellent, friendly helpful stuff and my husband loved the classic rock that they played. Would recommend to anyone looking for a break from Thai cuisine.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food here was excellent and the portions are very generous. We had the ribs and a chicken sandwich and both were cooked to perfection. Would definitely recommend this place to anyone that fancies a break from Thai food - but come with an appetite! Another thing that impressed us was that because we were sat outside, one of the waitresses came out and sprayed our legs with Mosquitos spray. We didn't ask for this but it was a lovely gesture and added to the great service and food we had at rock me burgers.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was craving a burger and didn't fancy a Macdonalds or Burger King as I wanted to go somewhere that wouldn't have been on offer back home. I decided to try this place as the pictures looked very good, it seemed a bit pricey but thought it would be worth it for a good bit of meat. Unfortunately, I wish I had went to Macdonalds! The burger meat was greasy and didn't taste very nice, it wasn't cooked properly and therefore I ate everything else on the plate bar the burger itself. The fries were ok, nothing special and I had a pina colada which was a bit too sweet. The staff were the only good thing, very helpful and friendly. I was so disappointed but I think the other reviews are right...all style and no substance. I wouldn't waste my money there again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Not su h a bad joint if your looking for a western style burger in Chiang Mai. It is made for the western tourist with a Thai slant. The atmosphere and service is good. Worth a try the prices are high for Thailand but still good value.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The once 'a le carte' dining-room, of the adjacent Raming Lodge Hotel, has now become the hamburger paradise of Chiang Mai. Whether you want single burgers, doubles or even triples, they're on the menu. Add to that numerous fillings/toppings, onion rings and potato fries/wedges you're set for a meal of note. Not in the mood for burgers then take your pick from many other options; ribs, fish, salads. You won't be disappointed. A word of advice "Go Hungry".

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We stayed at Raming Lodge so was at our front door, we had been out on an all day tour and arrived back quite late and tired, wow biggest juicer work ever, Cook how you want, very quick and friendly serve , only thing missing was refresher towel for when you had finished, would go again

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We walk around the old city at night and found this restaurant accidentally. They menu looks interesting and they serve every dishes big portion. Surprised! Suggest for the people love cheese and oilly foods. For me it too much fat. Event I am meat lovers. Sorry that I have to say. I feel bad to eat it. Maybe have to asked more than two people to share foods.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My girlfriend and I ate @ rock me burgers, and had one of the best burgers we ever ate. the toppings were really special and interesting. Everything was seasoned so well and the fries were amazing. although the price is a bit high for thailand, it's not so expensive and definitely worth it. We highly recommend this restaurant and especially the mac&cheese hamburger!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Showed up after craving a little familiarity and they nailed it! Burger was perfect! Would go back in a heartbeat. For two of us meals and soft drink worked out only $20 bucks.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Probably the best burger in town ! It was awesome for the same price as mac donald in Europe, big recommandation !

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: On occasion, westerners crave a burger and this is a good place to enjoy just that. The standard size is 100 grams and if you have a large appetite, go with the 250 gram big-boy. They cook to your liking and fries and an onion ring are included. The flavors are great with their spicy mayo impressive. As I am senior, the music is played a bit too loud and it makes it difficult to converse. The wait staff are attentive and courteous.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a few beers already, this was an excellent pit stop to fuel up before carrying on. We sat at the bar outside opposite the grill; after seeing the burgers cooking I couldn’t resist. I had the burger with mac and cheese on top. It came with some great skin on fries which you can see them making from scratch. The Mac and cheese itself worked well on the burger with the other flavours. But by itself could have been a bit tastier. The burger pâté itself was cooked to order, and they got it medium rare perfectly. The bacon on it was excellent, and really crispy without being burnt. Good homemade buns. Delicious onion rings. Big tasty pickle! For under 200 baht I couldn’t have asked for anything more. Would loved to have had time to go back and try more of their burgers! My girlfriend had a milkshake cocktail type drink, which tasted like an awesome rum and raisin ice cream, with extra rum! Highly recommended! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers are good and tasty. Salads also are good especially the cesar salad. The chicken wings are too oily. The price is ok.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I know, I know, travel to Thailand and eat a cheeseburger. But after a few weeks of Thai cuisine, my travel partner and I needed a little taste of home. This place did the trick. There were a lot of customers in the restaurant when we visited but the level of service still remained high. It was definitely expensive for Chiang Mai, but it's a novelty place that gave me the taste of home I needed. The burger was well cooked and freshly made to order. The onion rings were fantastic! All in all, this restaurant provided my girlfriend and I with a good, greasy gut bomb that left us satisfied (and ready for a nap!).

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had a meat feast, we got a heaven and hell burger with cheesy bacon fries Was tasty and fairly priced The resteraunt is well presented and always busy!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My boyfriend and I came here because the reviews were promising and we were not disappointed! We ordered the classic cheese burger (170 Baht) and the beef aloha (180 Baht) which were both very yummy and cooked to order. They each came with a handful of fries and a crispy onion ring. We also ordered the Rock Me Fries (129 Baht) which came with cheese and bacon. These were delicious and crispy and well topped. Overall, very happy with the meal, the staff were lovely and the atmosphere of the restaurant was really cool. I will definitely be back next time I'm in town. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is an amazing place that i had visited very often while i was in Chiang Mai , the staff have their own ambiance and vibe , which made me feel at home. The food though is the real game changer which gives the place that attraction which always manages to rope you back. i suggest the Super Mac burger , which is a massive burger with 150 g augus beef patty with bacon and a whole lot of mac and cheese , followed by some fresh home cut chips and a massive deep friend onion ring. I had this burger at least 15 times .

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: a simple and a small resto with limited sitting. they serve the best burgers in town at very fair and reasonable prices. service is a bit slow but worth the wait.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ate here one night when I was in a hurry for food and enjoyed my cheese burger (170 bhat) for the bar outside. It came with a small serving of fries and a pickle. The staff was friendly.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We are so happy we came across this place. We had classic Chesseburger and Mac and cheese burger. Both very fresh and tasty. The staff was nice as well and prices were below what we expected for the quality. So good!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Comfort food made wonderfully! They have good burgers, and some pretty nice steaks. Their mac-and-cheese is just average though. Nevertheless, it's worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here for lunch as my hubby and I both wanted something like we could get at home. I chose the chicken in a box, he got the aloha burger and we shared mac and cheese. The chicken was so good, as was the burger and the mac and cheese. Really couldn't fault it. Yes it is expensive by Thai standards but the quality is good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went there 2 times , one for lunch and the other to take something for drink abd both were really good. Kind and friendly staff makes our visit a complete pleasure. Beef burgers were superb !!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have been here twice and funny enough both times I never went in, I ate at the outside bar. The food proportions are large and the quality of food is medium to high, so their slightly more than moderate pricing is justified. The times I went the staff were friendly, nice , and accommodating without being intrusive. Outside was a nice place for me to people watch as there is constant flow of tourists and street traffic, without being too crowded, but I do wonder what the inside looks like :) Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Visited this place twice when needing a break from Thai food. Burgers and chips really good and filling, shakes to die for, more like desserts. Definitely worth a visit

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I normally approach any western style place in Asia with a healthy dose of scepticism but this place is actually fantastic. My girlfriend and I both had burger with a side of wings and it was all really tasty. Proper burger patties and the fresh made buns were a nice touch. Fries weren't soggy and the salad / onion rings were also pretty good. I felt guilty having a night off Thai food but if you are then this is absolutely the place to do it! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Loved it here! We had an exhausting day after spending a busy day at elephant nature park and were so hungry for food when we got back. We decided to eat here and it hit the spot perfectly. The burgers are so good - cooked on a grill outside so you can watch if you want too. Good meat, good buns. We ordered an extra side of onion rings- the burgers only come with one onion ring unless you order extra. French fries good too! Milkshakes also great- try the Oreo one :) Heineken was a cheap price too. We had a great time. Friendly staff and manager. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Outstanding Burgers cooked right in front of me..Street Bench seats, cold beers, great vibe and friendly staff. Plenty of option for food..Indoors and Out. Get a street seat.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The Super Mac burger was tasty but i loved their mac and cheese the best! I would go back fot that :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My friend was craving for some Western food and saw online that this was good place. The burger was really good, the meat was juicy and I liked the fries! They serve the burger with fries we but we also ordered an extra Rocking Fries. The Rocking Fries is with bacon and cheese, too bad the cheese wasnt melted. Because it was the July 4th we had a service drink, really nice of them! We were really full afterwards actually ordering the Rocking Fries was maybe too much haha.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place is the best place for burger in Chiang Mai also the staffs are really nice good cocktails they made a special cocktails for us on my friend's birthday. But it took quite long time till the food is ready.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amaaaazingg. 🤤 highly reccomend . The Mac and cheese burger is soo heavy and delicious get it. Milkshakes are amazing 2!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burgers if you want a change from all the spicy Thai food. I came back 2 times cause there were so many delicious things on the menu. The milkshakes were divine and the onion rings with honey mustard sauce were heavenly delicious. The angus burger is also very good. They grill the burgers outside which is also a nice site when walking in. And the staff were very kind aswell Prices were high for Thailand standards, between 200 and 400 baht for a burger, depending on your taste or hunger. But they really pay attention to decoration which is nice cause the eye also needs something! God I'm getting hungry just talking about it! Just check the pictures and let the water run in your mouth!! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had the mango salad which was way over sauced and my husband had the steak special and asked for medium but it was still bleeding all over board it was presented on. My husband didn't want to make a fuss but I insisted. It's his money at the end of the day so if he says nothing they won't know he's unhappy. The manager was happy to cook the steak a little more for him. The steak was way over priced for what it was though. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: It may be hard to imagine but if you do get sick of Thai food and you suddenly feel like a burger, then this is the place to fix that craving. The meat is cooked to perfection and fairly priced. I went here 3 times during my visit. Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ordered through food panda and it took about 30 minutes for them to accept my order and another 45 to prepare the food and be delivered. Food was hot when it arrived but for $20usd of food we were really disappointed. We got a BLT and chicken burger and fries. The fries were good and my boyfriend said the BLT was just okay as well as the fries. The chicken burger however was not edible. 🤢 It's a dark meet burger (which happens in Thailand) so I wasn't super upset about that. The oil they used to fry it in was so bad. I took two bites and had to throw it out. I asked my boyfriend to try it (who eats everything) and even he said it was disgusting. For the price, it was definitely not worth it. I wouldn't eat here again. Maybe the burgers are better but I'd stay away from anything fried. 😬 Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After more than a month of eating only Thai food I wanted western food so badly and when I found this place I decided to give it a go. The burger was absolutely brilliant! Can't describe in words how tasty it was but I felt that my burger did not come from the kitchen but came from heaven. I also ordered vanilla shake which was more than amazing. Highly recommend this place!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: felt like something over than thai food! i had a mango margarita and a double beef burger. the fries were tasty and very moorish but I wish there was a bit more of them! same as the one onion ring - wish there were more! super super tasty. average service (like all of Thailand to be honest) but the food was amazing.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
