Detail: Even if Thai food is amazing, sometimes you need to eat something completely different when in Thailand. This place came highly recommended, and I have no problem understanding why! As soon as I walk in the door, I got a rock feeling with the music and instruments on a small stage just inside the door. It made me feel like I wanted to come back at night to see what happens here. As a restaurant, I must admit that it lacked a little bit of that soul they tell you that they want to make, but that was forgotten when I saw the menu. Lots of choices and original configurations of burgers made me spend a lot of time with the menu, which also had a lot of pictures. I ended up ordering the "Rocking in hell" menu with bacon and a sunny egg on top. When the food was served, the first thing I saw was that the burger bread was black! Nice touch! And the sauce was perfectly spicy and the burger was perfectly cooked. It was all served on a wooden plate with a knife through the burger to keep everything in place. The burger looked just as delicious as in the picture. This is definitely one of the better burgers I have eaten, but not on the top ten I must admit. The toppings and the sauce was very tasty, but the burger didn't compete in flavor compared to everything on the plate. But still, all in all, a very good burger! I will definitely come back here to try the other burgers on the menu, and if you are in need of a break from thai food, I will highly recommend this place! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had a double burger (300g) in total. Very good meat and great fries. I left the restaurant full and quite happy. Overall a pretty good burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Chips were great, onion ring was good. The burgers while super filling just lacked any wow factor, they were quite bland, despite looking amazing. I may have got a bad one but my friends both said there's lacked flavour. Chips are really good must emphasise that, there looked to be some amazing milkshakes also but didn't get around to trying them

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a week of Thai food, we were craving American food. We don't eat hamburgers on a routine basis, but this hit the spot! I had the Aloha burger with pineapple, etc which was fantastic. They have a variety of burger options, awesome fries, but also salads. Still much cheaper than in the US but just as good if not better.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Our group had a very entertaining visit. Very cool setup, as you pass by the chefs when you walk in, as they do the cooking outfront. Menu was great! Lots of options, especially for the American who just might be craving a burger or sandwhich while in Chiang Mai. And the staff were BERY accommodating... from the music selection created for our group, to finding a creative way to put together a Bday cake/dessert at the very last minute. Hope you enjoy your visit too!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ate here twice while in Chiang Mai! Our food was delicious! We were ready for a good burger too! The beers were ice cold as well! Loved the music and the location! Thanks Mr. T!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Oh may gosh, we had a total of 36 people . The staff did great. This place is great, unbelievable. The food was the best, and the atmosphere was just wonderful. The price was unbelievable great. Everyone was happy. I would recommend this place to every one . If you have attitude, and a big frown on your, face coming in the place. You will leave with a big smile on your face, and have met new people in your lives. Plus you will have some fabulous food. This place is very friendly. I honestly can not say enough about this place. It was one of the greatest places I have brought my group too. Thank you so much for everything.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If your into Meat burgers this is a good choice between the moat and night markets. As a veggie not much on the menu. They very nicely left out the burger and I had mac & cheese. There is fish and chips. Very good value for money. The staff are helpful & friendly.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stop in and get a quality burger at a reasonable price. I would have liked a few days to order everything. Also, the fries are superb. Don't change a thing!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Very pleased with our visit here Good food, good service. Wanted to introduce my Thai girlfriend to a classic burger and they delivered. Had the house burger and cheese and bacon fries. Fries were more like wedges. Nice.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best place for hamburger in Chiangmai so far! The meat is juicy & the bun is perfect. Also the rips are great too, recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers are good. I chose Angus beef burger. Cheese and extra bacon topping were tasty. The meat itself, however, lacked some flavour. Fries are with skin. Seems like the better burger place in the area. Lots of burger choices and they ask how the burger should be cooked. Better than average!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: What a burger!! As soon as they asked how would you like that cooked we knew we were in business. Finally a burger in Thailand to get excited about. The loaded fries were epic, the burgers were juicy and so yummy, the mac and cheese was just what we needed. The chocolate milkshakes were also amazing... What a cheat meal :) thanks will def be back

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The atmosphere isn't great. Burgers are good though. The price however is far more than what it is worth.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Tasty burgers and delicious hand-cut fries. Drinks were good and prices were quite reasonable. Definitely recommended.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: You can usually tell a good restaurant by the quality of its beef even if its in a burger. This place has very good burger one of the best i have ever had, many to choose from. Downside is it is very busy some nights with people waiting, mid range on price. Definitively recommenced.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I couldn't believe the menu options. We ordered so much food. Too much. I thought I was going to clog and artery and loved all of it.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burgers delivers the goods. Many options to choose from no matter what your preference is....from Bacon Burgers to Blue Cheese Burgers and everything in between. Good ambience as well as good service. Parking may be a bit of a issue since Rock Me Burgers is on a popular street...but if you go during the day, it's usually no problem.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: So this place has awesome fries, the burger arrived at is looked awesome. There was a funky taste in this burger. I think it was the egg and my friend thought it was the beef. The presentation is great, the lettuce was fresh, the bun was good, but sadly we both did not finish our burgers because something just did not taste right. Not sure if this was just one off but we will try the hard rock next for our burger craving. This place is cheap and had great music, if you come have the fries and maybe try the wings!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a month and a half of traveling through different countries, my other half and I were on the hunt for a traditional burger and we were happy to find one here at Rock Me Burgers. They had a great selection of drinks and the menu was quite large. We got wings and a cheeseburger and enjoyed them both. The prices are a little high (.. for Chiang Mai) but still a decent price point. The staff was quiet, but friendly. I would definitely recommend checking it out if you are looking for for Western-style food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have come here several times over the last 3 years or so. This is my go to place for a decent burger. Service can be a little slow but the end result has never disappointed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: As much as I love thai food occasionally I get a hankering for a burger. I heard a rumour that rock me burger was good but that was an understatement. This place is exceptional. Greeted with a menu as I was seated, then trying to decide what to order. Opted for the cheesy nova burger...... Great choice 300g of juicy beef cooked perfectly came with skin on fries. This definitely hit the spot​. I then had a milkshake for dessert which was an amazing experience. Rock me burger is the best burger in Chiang Mai by a country mile.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Overall it was good. We got the burger and aldo the ceasar salad. It was good with the price. Easy to find

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The only thing good was the service. My burger wasn't any special taste wise. My wife got ill after eating here.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Boy and his staff (Mind :)) are Amazing fun, kind people.Good Music and Great Drinks.I spent 5 nights with them during my stay and the water festival, I intend to go back and am sending a friend to say hello during his trip in May :) look forward to seeing them again in October!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burger place, one of the best in Chiang Mai, huge range of burgers and other dishes, great service, Love the place.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: dunno why i was skeptical about eating here. perhaps because i'm a fat american who is picky about burgers... i shouldn't have been concerned. the food was really good!! first evening's burger was so tasty that i decided to come back on a subsequent night and try the korean chicken sandwich which was also really great. good service, good tunes playing, good food... good spot! check it out.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Me and boyfriend came here after reading the reviews and they weren't wrong, I had the burger which was really good however my boyfriend had the ribs and it was amazing! Would definitely recommend coming here just for the ribs.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Better burgers than ive had in the states. Really great burgers, a lot of choice, and really good value, huge portions with fries for 5/6 usd, the macncheese burger was fantastic. We ended up coming a few times over a week in chiang mai, and we never normlaly eat in the smae place twice.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is a great place to eat if you want a great burger in Thailand. My wife and two of our new friends just ate here on our last night in Thailand. We were tired of the rice and needed something different

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing food, we sat outside. Very quick for food to arrive ! Great quality!!! Yum! Good cocktails especially the Thai special ! Staff very chatty between themselves outside though a little customer interaction could help!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Too good to be true. Dont miss out on the two tone burger. My wife had the cow melt and licked her fingers, I personally think you should stay with burgers here since they are simply burgasms! Simply amazing.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Really nice meaty burgers, good sides and drinks. Big portions, ideal if you've been on rice and noodles for a few months and are craving some greasy western food. Fair price for what you get. Most burgers around 190-200 THB. Will be back

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing food!!! Great drinks, nice atmosphere. Minside and outside seating including outside bar. Great music - you can be the DJ! Very clean - even the bathrooms. The food is to die for and the prices are very reasonable!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great service. Our server spoke perfect English. Drinks came fast and looked amazing! Food came quick and was hot, and WOW. Portion size very generous, and at our table of seven everyone thoroughly enjoyed their meal!! We will be back before we leave Chiang Mai, for sure! A unique experience that was above the competition!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great restaurant, tasty food, especially the hamburgers...cool atmosphere, very kind weitreses! Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had read the reviews on Trip Advisor and they're all pretty positive, so I walked down there for a light lunch . I had a spicy salad with fries ( yeah I see the irony) , the salad was fresh and the dressing perfect didn't really eat to many fries as the salad was a very generous serve . Will definitely try to get back for another visit

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stumbled on this place and wow! We love the burgers and French fries and even onion rings. We also shared a salad Lady Shandai and it was plenty for two. Coconut pineapple shake in a coconut and amazing. Thanks

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Restaurant is part of the Raming Lodge hotel. Great burgers. Chicken wings good.inside and outside dining

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We have just had lunch here after reading on TripAdvisor. We have spent a couple of months in Asia and were craving some more western style food - and this pace did not disappoint! We had a a pork burger (can't remember the name but it had scrambled egg and bacon, it is the first one on the menu) and one of the days special burgers which was beef (or pork) with peanut sauce. OMg they were both delicious and so filling! My partner also had a coconut shake which was delicious as well. I would definitely recommend this place - sure it's not as cheap as local food, but for burgers in Asia - it's great! They also were playing great music! It was really quiet as we went midday, but there is plenty of room. Great job rock me Burgers - beautiful food! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent food by anybody's standards. The cheeseburgers aren't just "good for Thailand" They are good, and well presented with good French fries and onion rings. Nice decor, live music occasionally. Definitely should try.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went with my wife. Restaurant really looks authentic American(and has nice rock music), and owner really cares about burgers plus he speaks very good English. Actually had a small discussion on BBQ sauces. Burgers are cheap(around 170 bath for most versions without extra meat), tasty, well cooked(welldone and still juicy is no easy task) and with a goood bun. Could use a special dressing. Could have given five stars but I'm just the kind of guy that reserves that for something really really extraordinary.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ordered an Angus burger the "Super Heaven. " I thought the waiter told me that they were out of the 250g burger but could have the same version in a smaller patty. He then brought me a plain cheeseburger. I said I didn't want that with so many fun versions I thought he was bringing me the Super Heaven. Apparently they were out of that so I chose the "Rocking in Hell" burger medium (because it's partially pork). It came rare, so I asked them just to cook it to medium! When it finally came back it didn't have the egg on it. So I asked for an egg like the menu describes. By the time I got my order so that I could eat dinner, my daughter was completely done with her burger. When we got the bill they charged me for the egg! They said I could only have one on the 1st burger I ordered! I said you never served me what I ordered! After some discussion they said fine I didn't have to pay for the egg. It was the worst customer service ever! It took four times for them to get my order right and I didn't even make any special requests! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best burgers I've had, the chicken wings were incredible, the homemade fries were even better & the burgers were just delicious!!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best burgers in Chiang Mai. Made with 100% Aussie beef with tomato, pineapple, beetroot, cheese and a special sauce in a bun with chips.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burgers and not that expensive. I had the mac n cheese burger. wife had a sallad that she liked...

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food meets that need for western comfort in the middle of diverse and non-American cuisine. If you like pork, go for the prime rib rack. If you like chicken, the corden blue sandwhich will hit the spot. And if you like beef as well, go for the double burger (more than enough to fill). Most of the patrons when we visited were Western, and the staff spoke English generously well. You won't be disappointed with this burger joint located on one of the busiest streets in the city. ขอขอบคุณ K̄hx k̄hxbkhuṇ, Thank you! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing atmosphere! Great burgers and fries! Try the super mac burger. Really good live music too, and the prices are good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burger place. Sure a burger is more expensive than Thai Street Food but sometimes I just want to have a good, tasty burger. For me this is the place to go then. Good music (sometimes they even had/have live music but not sure sure when), Air Con inside or bar style outside. Last time I was there the service even was reducing the amount of mosquitoes inside, which was very nice (we are in Thailand, there are mosquitoes). So what else ... Service is very friendly, when I am very hungry I order the Mac'n Chees, the combination of the macaroni, cheese and burger is great. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great selection of burgers, all were delicious, and nicely presented. Good service and reasonable prices. Enjoyed the burgers, and the mocktails.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent burger and chips. After 5 weeks cycling in Thailand and Laos I craved some Western food.' this was really good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great find when you need a break from noodles and rice, very reasonably priced, good service, good presentation of food, delicious burgers

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After traveling for some time, my husband and I were craving some juicy burgers and fries. Came across this spot while walking towards our hotel and we loved it! Very juicy, great portions, and some good fries and or onion rings. Highly recommend it if you need a little break from the local food

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Occupying part of the Raming Lodge hotel, this place is certainly well worth seeking out. The range of American type burgers which are well prepared and presented are offered in either beef or pork variants are extremely tasty and very well priced. Each dish is cooked to perfection and served on a 'tree' - a gimmick perhaps but it all adds to the overall effect which is both pleasing and satisfying.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Hi All... Normally I stay away from North American style food when we travel. We want to experience the various foods from different cultures and not eat what we can prepare at home. On this night it was a matter of convenience so we gave it a shot. Now in my humble opinion this ranked as the second best restaurant burger for me, the first was at the bungee jump in Zambia. Back to Rock Me, they have a great selection of burger styles and meats, chicken, pork and beef. I decided to take on the triple burger, it comes presented on a slab of wood with a sharp steak knife stabbed right through the center of the burger embedded deeply into the wood. The burger stood a solid five inches tall and is served with one onion ring and a handful of home fries. I'll say this, you can not get your mouth around the triple burger as it is presented, I had to take out one patty in order to bite the trough the burger. Awesome, good price and I was full beyond capacity for more. I had one of the house special drinks, "Pirate of the Caribbean" . This is a blue bubbling rum based drink served with a small piece of dry ice to give it an creepy look, good flavor and tasty, Service was prompt and friendly and the overall experience was good value for your money. So, go ahead try the triple I dare ya.... Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: How can anyone write a bad word about this place! Incredible! From the smokey drink I had (purple haze) to the huge burger.. all amazing! I had the rock me original and my boyfriend the 'fat boy', both came with homemade wedges and onion rings... so delicious!! We shared some chicken wings and needless to say our eyes were bigger than our bellies!!! Will be back to try something else!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: It looks and sounds amazing but the food was not nice. We ordered a steak baguette thing. Perhaps naively and the fact they promote their grill I was expecting a piece of beef cooked to my liking, sliced and served in a sandwich. They did indeed ask me how I wanted it cooked, why they asked this I don't know as what I got was thin, gristly slices of beef you get in bad takeaways in England. You couldn't cook it to order if you tried. The fries tasted like stale school dinners. The cheese sauce was greasy. I immediately felt ill after eating some of it. One thing that was ok was the service which seems contrary to other reviewers, perhaps we got a good day because the waiting staff were very attentive. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best music. Burger is absolutely delicious. Very quick service and a happy stomach. Arrived there after 3 days doing the mea hong son loop and they delivered exactly what I wanted. Gonna come back here again for sure! Double burger for hungry people ;)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: No way your mouth will wrap around this burger. The egg on the cheeseburger was a good surprise. The staff wes well trained and nice. It's a lot bigger when you walk in and it can handle big groups.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you need a greasy (good) cheeseburger in Chiang Mai, this is the place. Burger portions were generous, but very skimpy on fries (not a big deal, IMHO). Looks like they're set up for evening entertainment. My visit was during lunch. Cold beer.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Looks the part from the outside together with the impressive menu presentation. However that's where the good experience ended sadly. The place was busy (but not at capacity) so we expected a bit of a wait but 1 hour for a couple of burgers is excessive. My fiance's food arrived first. After 10mins without mine arriving i enquired and was met with an unapologetic and a sharp rebuttal that it was on its way. The food itself was dissapointing. I had the melted cow which promised lashings of cheddar cheese over beef strips. The yellow liquid was a watery tasteless and very uncheese like substance that would have made the whole thing unedible were it not for my famished hunger at having to wait 1hr 15min for a burger. Fries were ok at best. Fresh garlic sauce was great but you know you won't be coming back to a place where the condiments overshadow the food. With so much competition for great food places in Chiang Mai i exptected far better. This place will do well because of it's Man V Food look and visual hispter appeal but it appears that has made them forget about what matters to a restaurant: good food and good service. Both of which are absent from Rock Me Burger. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My significant other and I were thoroughly impressed by both the burgers and wings this restaurant made. I can easily say these were the best burger and wings we have gotten in South East Asia. The prices were very reasonable and the staff externally friendly. I highly recommend anyone staying in Ching Mai stop by and give them a visit.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I've been here 3 times, it's perfect. Everything is reasonably priced, and it's only a short walk to the night markets from the restaurant. The food, as well as the cocktails are fantastic and well priced for the portion size you are given.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Soft bun, juicy burger, with the right amount of salad and potato wedges on the side for 170 baht. I'm not really a fan of burgers, but this was first class.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Not a bad price for the size and quality. Great atmosphere for the whole family. Took a break from the sun to enjoy a burger and some AC. Lovely break for lunch. Great music too!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place has a very interesting menu. From homemade sausages, to AAA angus beef burgers with eggs Benedict and hollandaise sauce, to squid ink pasta. They have quite an elaborate drinks menu as well. We ordered #17 ; a chicken burger with coleslaw and Mac and cheese, in home made bread (resembling French toast). So good! And huge! We had enough by two. It was 150THB ($5CAD). I also ordered a drink. One of the first on the menu, it was blue (forgot the name!). It was fuming when I received it, almost as though they had put dry ice in the drink. It was interesting, and very tasty! Friendly staff, great experience. We're dissapointed that we didn't have time to go back before leaving Chiang Mai! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ordered the garlic/honey glazed wings that came with three sides. The wings were moist and tender. Didn't care for the sides except the coleslaw. Also ordered the ribs, which took 30 minutes. I didn't mind the wait since the waitress let me know before hand. In hindsight, I would probably pass on the ribs and stick to the burgers and wings. Oh, and we can't forget the chocolate milkshake! Yum! We visited twice, once for lunch and once for dinner. During lunchtime, outdoor seating was not available. We ate outside for dinner which was nice but don't forget your mosquito spray. Warning - if you don't like cats, stay inside as stray cats come around waiting for you to drop some food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Wow! This place just blew me away! While I was aware that Chiang Mai had plenty to offer in regards to good Western food, this really blows it out of proportion. I had a Mac Daddy, a burger with homemade Mac & Cheese, and my mouth is watering even now reminiscing about how delicious ot was. And it was only 212 THB (roughly 6 USD) If you're longing for nice, good ol' burger, do not miss out on Rock Me Burger!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: What an awesome find. The burgers are amazing and aroi mak mak! To make burgers like this is absolutely a dream. Located within the Raming lodge and spa hotel.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burgers ribs fried onion rings. Very pleased with service and food. Very tasty mocktail mojito and I had the manjo margeretia. Was tasty, thoo I wish they had a traditional as well. Highly recommended

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: tiny little burger, had bits of plastic wrap in it.. everything tastes like it comes out of a frozen box from China, I live in Chiang Mai.. feels like this place just looks for tourist dollas, bot into repeat customers.. go elsewhere for your beef fix!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Cannot fault the service, the staff were very friendly and attentive. There was a great atmosphere too. Food was good standard but not amazing.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you get tired of noodles and rice, this place offers tasty burgers and milkshakes for a reasonable price!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was very satisfied with my Super Mac burger cooked medium. The mac n cheese will never be like mom's but it was very good. There aren't many choices for my vegetarian partner but he enjoyed the fish and chips served to with bread to make a sandwich. The drinks are also exciting.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have to come back and review again. Last night took a date here to show how great.. i was served my meal first asking the mac cheese separate .. she seemed to understand.. apparently not understand english and was served extra and 100 bhts tacked on bill. My date's meal arrived 20 minutes after mine. No one apparently understands english as i kept asking about her order. DISAPPOINTED

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I really like this place. The outside area is really cool you can pull up a stool which the nightlife wonder past and enjoy a ice cold beer and a really good burger. The prices are really cheap for what you getting. I like the house burger and the pet Ka pow burger can't remember the name but basically takes a traditional Thai spicy mince meat dish which I love and mixes with a American burger awesome. Fries are good here big chunky ones. Staff are really friendly and enthusiastic. If your missing a taste of home this is the place for you.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: 5 stars alone should go to there garlic sauce, it's fantastic. I'm a huge fan of garlic mayo and their garlic sauce trumps all. The burgers are massive and cooked to your liking I.E medium, well done etc. The milkshakes here are tasty and different from what you'll find anywhere else. Had a great meal here and would definitely eat here again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was the beat burger we found in Chiang Mai also at a reasonable price, the macaroni and cheese it also great!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We have ate a lot of burgers in our lifetime. I had the Mac & Cheese Burger. I wanted to ask for more Mac & Cheese. Then add it to a delicious burger. Beautiful! Also if your into interesting sauces, ask for a side of their BBQ sauce. It's not normal BBQ. We decided it kinda tasted like salsa with chili sauce. Either way try dipping your fries in it! Or put it on the burger itself. ( it might be just us but worth a try )

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We decided to check out this nighttime incarnation of the Raming Lodge's coffee house on our first night and it was a great choice for dinner! We ordered Chicken Skewers as well as a Cheesy Hot Dog, both of which were excellent, and are as tasty as what we can get in Hard Rock / TGIF / Chili's - or maybe even better! So this is indeed a nice and cheaper alternative for American-style burgers, other than that famous chain with the circular logo up at the Night Bazaar area... A must-try when you're visiting Chiang Mai! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Service was super fast and attentive and the food was incredible. Onion ring was unbelievably good, rock me fries were tasty! Forewarning though-I got the "road to hell" burger and I thought halfway through the burger that my mouth was going to burn off. That burgers got some kick!! Really really delicious!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Only went as saw reviews and wanted something different than Thai. Burger was nice but not great, just felt like stodgy food. Average value for money. Just didn't do it for me. Had nicer home made burgers from Thai resorts.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ate here for a change of scenery after 6 nights of Thai food. The burgers were great and plenty of choices. As the name might suggest there was no music playing, not even in the back ground. Great food, lacking a little atmosphere.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: the meat was decent. nice and juicy and made it medium rare just how i asked for. The biggest problem was the buns which completely broken apart even before my first bite. This meant that I couldnt use my hand and have to use knife and fork instead. just ruin the experience of eating a burger a little bit.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Lots to choose from on the menu, the service was fast and the portions were huge, we couldn't finish our meals. Prices are reasonable and they were pretty good burgers, you won't leave hungry!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We enjoyed our meal here , good burgers and quite good service . Live music too , worth a visit and better than hard rock !

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great variety of burgers, but their signature burger cooked to your liking is awesome. Great value for money.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: _Simply the best burger I've ever tasted, so so juicy and tastefull - should be set as the 8th wonder of the world

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After reading several good reviews we decided to try it out... so glad we did!! Everyone was super friendly, our food came out pretty quick! We sat @ outside bar and watched our food being prepared. Also the location is perfect cuz there is some great people watching. We had the Super MAC Burger (mac & cheese w/bacon) it was great- none of that Kraft Mac & Cheese, no American cheese good ole cheddar.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was a good burger with fries and an onion ring. Had I been served it anywhere I would have been happy with it. We ordered the burgers cooked medium which was perfect. I think cooked well would be dry. Buns were fresh and my teen daughter was happy with the quality of the pickle.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had the double which is tall enough that it's served with a knife though it to hold it together . You can eat on the bar stools on the street , indoors or The Raming Lodge atrium . Quality of beef seemed good but the cook missed medium by quite a way which dried it out a bit .but was still tasty

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Visited this restaurant with 6 friends during our time in Chiang Mai. Had no problem getting a table and the service was very fast and the food was amazing, staff also very friendly. Would definitely return :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good Burger good service, but nothing special... Maybe a good choice if you're tired of Thai food and want a burger ! The price is okay.i think I payed 180 for a burger. 3/5

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I finally decided to try this impressive looking burger yesterday. Hats off to the chef! I ordered the super mac burger. omg! I am a 200 lb guy and I barely finished it. In my opinion for yummy burger in Chiang Mai this is the place. GREAT SERVICE and nice atmosphere inside along with seating outside.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great place for a quick stop over for a burger and a beer. I had the cheeseburger with fries and onion rings. Very nice.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good restaurants offering different choices of burgers and meat. some thai dishes too. price is good, worth a meal!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: When you can't face another phad thai eat here. It seems to be popular with locals and tourists. They do a very good job with the burgers and the fries are more like potato wedges. I recommend the cheese steak sandwich. Reasonable price for western food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best burger I've had in Thailand. Everything is fantastic. I love the atmosphere, and it's a great location. True to the name, rock music is always playing. You can sit outside at the bar or inside of the restaurant. In February there is an eating competition that I will definitely attend to watch! The burgers are also really creative, my favorite is the Aloha Burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: So nice, we had it twice. The food was perfect. Classic hamburgers cooked to order, real milkshakes, and a macaroni and cheese that is to die for. The chili cheese dog is nothing to scoff at either. I would highly recommend this restaurant to anyone craving a tasty, juicy burger. Also, the cheese sauce... Form: faultless Interpretation: magnificent I give it a 10/10.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I would not normally eat an American burger in Thailand but these looked so good. Plus the place was full of Thais. I was not disappointed The burgers were amazing

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went to this place after checking trip advisor! I'm from Bristol in the Uk and we have some pretty good burger bars and bbq meat restaurants so I was keen to check this place out. The burgers are fantastic and cooked to your order. The variety of different choices on the menu is epic and the sides and appetisers go hand in hand with the burgers! I must say I was impressed by this place, if you don't go here while in the area you're truly missing out! I advise the Mac and cheese burger!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: AMAZING! We had the best time! My boyfriend and I couldn't decide what to have, but we stumbled across this restaurant! From the outside it looks like a really nice place and then when you get inside the staff are so welcoming. The wait time was next to nothing and the food?! My goodness! I ordered the Aloha burger, which was a beer burger with BBQ sauce, cheese, ham, pineapple and salad it came with the best chips and an onion ring! Literally amazing! My appetite and tastebuds were thoroughly sated and satisfied. ❤️ Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers were tasty - I mean tasty! They were huge. Had one with macaroni cheese in and a chicken burger with wedges on the side. If you need a break from Thai food go here, it's on the expensive side but so so tasty it's worth every penny!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: How come you can't get a burger this good back home? We went twice and left with full bellies as well as the disappointment of know that we were leaving the next day and couldn't have these burgers again! Be prepared to consume calories and it's definitely not for those who are watching their waist lines or into clean eating! Sinfully good!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Here is the new menu of Rock Me Burgers & Bar. It is a fried chicken wing. It serves with salad , cheesey rice and some vegetables.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers, Burgers, Burgers and Fries lots of options if you like burgers fries and onion rings. Quick service.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: No complaints.. ...big burgers, double is alot of food,,seasoned well, fries were well above average.. tasty mac and cheese, Nice atmosphere, air conditioned. Friendly service .

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: First of all, it's nice to find a place in the middle of Chiang Mai with both air conditioned and outdoor seating. The place features with a lot of rock memorabilia and an awesome music selection playing. The burger was pretty good. It was definitely the best one I've had in Chiang Mai but would be pretty average back in the states. Unfortunately they only have the super sugary Thai ketchup as opposed to the more tangy American style. This definitely didn't help the burger and fries. The wait staff was good and attentive. My cocktail took longer to make than my meal though. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me is a great little getaway for those that need a break from Thai food, but still want some great Thai hospitality. The food is excellent, the service staff are all friendly and love to stop and chat, ask about your trip, make recommendations for other things to do in the area etc. Also, this is one of the few late night spots on this particular street that isn't flooded with street-walkers (aka "ladies of the night"), so it's much better for couples and/or families. Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you fancy a change from Thai and your partial to a burger get yourself here!!! Absolute quality burgers, the double is a must if your hungry. Good polite service too!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ate at this place last night and will definitely be returning soon! They were the best burgers we've had in Chiang Mai and were so reasonably priced. I had the chicken burger which came with wedges and onion rings - it was a huge portion (couldn't finish it) for only 180 baht! Drinks are slightly more pricey at 60-70 baht for a small beer. The staff are really friendly and speak excellent English. Would definitely recommend if you're looking for a western meal without breaking the bank.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have eaten many burgers in Chiang Mai but Rock Me stands heads above any other. A great menu choice that includes beef and pork burgers, chicken, ribs, pulled pork and lots more. The fries are really tasty and some really great shakes and drinks. If your feeling like a burger then head to Rock Me burger, you won't be disappointed

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I keep eating here when I'm ravenous and I would love to recommend a particular burger, but they are all so good, not to mention the chili-dogs and wedges. Not bad prices either, my kinda place

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I went here yesterday night, everything was perfect ! The burger is awesome and the portion is big ! It was the best budget ever I ate.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have been to Rock Me Burger multiple times and can say that the portions are generous, but the burgers are standard. Coming from the US and having some awesome West coast burgers, these seem to be overloaded and not as tasty as some smaller options elsewhere in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was not happy about our meal here last night. The Heaven burger was only OK and pretty slimy. The fries were cold and our chicken wings had spaghetti sauce on them instead of BBQ sauce. The restaurant looked cool and it has a nice ambiance but the food was not worth it.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Wow. The food looks really good. But it tastes terrible. I could not eat my chicken burger. It was inedible. Super slow service, too pricey and just bad food. Giant portions masking the fact that the food is gross. Skip it.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: NY hotdog + hamburger for the kids were more then enough for them. Cezar salad and cheeseburger for the adults were big portions. Ambiance was good with mixture of locals and tourists and there was live music as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had a hot dog with cheese and bacon. It was delicious. It came with potato wedges and I also ordered a side of mac and cheese. The mac and cheese may have had a mushroom in it. I am not sure but there was something that slightly resembled a slimy mushroom or slug or something in the mac and cheese so I didn't eat it. The hot dog was amazing though. I will definitely go back and try their burgers they looked good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Okay, live review time! Was seated and helped promptly. Menu items look amazing. I've been searching and searching for a good burger in Thailand... Hopefully this will be the place. Atmosphere is nice, classy. Chocolate shake is great, and cheap! Food came within eight minutes, looks and smells amazing... I actually loved everything BUT the meat. The bun, veggies, cheese, and eggs were amaaaazing. The meat itself was bland. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Massive burgers, good setting, great service. What's not to like? Great location as well, and the bar staff know their way around a cocktail menu.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I Came by this place by pure luck😃. I had my fair share of Burgers, but this one was out of this world🖒I will not hesitate to recommend this Joint to anyone. Enjoy😋

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Dropped in here with some friends, good service food was really nice though a bit greasy. If you need a western fix give it a shot.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I stayed at their hotel, so I visited the restaurant for lunch twice because I liked it. They mainly serve American cuisine (onion rings, burgers, steak, wings, etc.) Their onion rings are super crispy from the exterior and molten from the inside (yummy!)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We stayed at Raming Lodge for 3 days out of 7days in Chiang Mai. We ate quite a bit at Rock Me Burger.The Thai food there was excellent.I never ate the burgers but my friends said that they were pretty good.I did have some late night fried fish and wedges. The fish was great, the wedges say so. I was so happy to get some food at 11.00pm at night at this place. The place rocked throughout the night with Bon Jovi,kiss, metallica etc There was a professional guitarist there on one night.He was great. Boy (Vinny) made the best cocktails and looked after all of our drinking and music needs with the best service. Sau served up the food with the biggest smile in Thailand. Te is a magic bartender.He gives another dimension to the night with his magic tricks.Ask him to see a trick. We had great times and food at Rock Me Burger. Looking forward to coming back. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Driving in front of Rock me Burger nearly every day, I wanted to try this restaurant for a while. It seems to be always busy, which can be a good sign of quality. The service was very fast, as soon as I entered, a waiter let me choose my table, brings me the menu and takes my order, which arrived after about 5 minutes wait. Great start. The burger (double) looked great, served on a wooden platter. Sad that the food did not meet my (quite high) expectations. The potato wedges were cold, dry, some even rock hard. The big onion ring, while tasty, was cold too. The burger itself was huge and good but too bland for my taste. Extra attention could be put in introducing new sauces or toppings maybe. Beef was good but slightly chewy, cheese and scrambled eggs were very good though. All in all not a bad place, really, but I wouldn't make it my favorite restaurant... The burger was priced 270 baht (good value), the soda water 35baht, expensive by Chiangmai standards. Average rating for me, mainly for the cold sides and bland taste, but wouldn't need too much effort to get a "good" rating. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We've been in Thailand for 9 days now and even though we LOVE thai food, we absolutely needed a burger! So we looked online and went for the#1 in Choang Mai. As always it WASN'T disappointing! Our burgers were good, big and tasty! We got some wings and onion rings for appetisers, but we recommend that, if you get a burger and are not SUPER hungry, only get one appetiser. The burgers come with delicious home-made fries and ONE huge onion ring (had we known this we would have saved ourselves the onion ring appetiser). Only one "complaint": we would have liked a larger range of desserts.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: kinda expensive but worth it its basically a mountain of meat for 7 bucks everything on the menu is great

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers are ok. Nice atmosphere. Get rid of the country music but then I guess that is what burger eating people like.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you are looking for the best western styled burgers you've dropped in on the right place! I tried the Osaka burger and it's the best combination of a Japanese styled confetti tempura topping, with a minced purple cabbage ginger, lettuce and carrot and zucchini topping, with a wasabi dressing! Talk about palate explosion! I also tried the Rocking on Heaven Beef burger! It lived up to my expectations! Single burger patty, fried egg, bacon, lettuce tomato and pickles! I tried the Rock Me Double Pork...it was very good but not the taste I wanted at that moment! It was flavorful, loaded with cheese and dressed with lettuce and tomatoes. The onion rings are awesome too! There is something special about the buns as well! I will try the chicken and ribs on the next order! ENJOY! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you want a wide range of Hamburgers that are huge and juicy, then this is the place.Warning, though, hamburgers are about all they do. There fries are hand cut and very tasty. Pleasant, clean and the staff are friendly and efficient. Full bar as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had heard great things about the burgers--and to be fair, they were pretty okay, but I couldn't get past the greasy menus, sticky ketchup bottles, and general griminess of the place (we kept using hand sanitizer--and I am not normally a germ-a-phobe!)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great food in the heart of Chiang Mai, when you've had too much Thai food and crave a juicy burger, amazing milkshakes too. Staff really friendly and willing to help

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is the place for burgers in Chiang Mai. There are a variety to choose from. We tried a few recommended ones and all were good. It would be nice if they add more selections of beer. A slight issue of this restaurant is the car parking. There are only a few spots for side street parking.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Absolutely the best burgers and hotdogs in Chiang Mai! I come here about 2 or 3 times a week and they never disappoint. And the price is almost the same as McDonald's and BK. Service is quick and friendly.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Decent burgers, especially for the area. Would recommend if you're looking for some "American" food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Delicious food, quick service and great restaurant set-up. Very conveniently placed, about a 10 minute walk from the Night Bazaar (and our hotel). Would definitely recommend to anyone looking for a good burger place in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was a night out for our tour which came highly recommended. We were not disappointed. This was by far the best burger ever. We travel a lot and I now find myself craving a visit back here.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: GREAT Burgers! Some of the best I've had! A MUST if you're in Chiang Mai (for a while, looking for a change during your holiday or, just craving a burger...) Rock Me double (double burger: 2x150 gr.), Rock Me in Heaven (double with bacon and cheese), Rock Me in Hell (single with spicy sauce) are absolute TOP!! And you can add some extras (bacon, onion rings and plenty more...) Surroundings are not that nice as the place is located in the "red light" area. I'd suggest to sit outside if you want to feel the vibe of the place (nice bar where they cook in front of you) but inside if you come with your family or larger groups. One way or the other, you'll enjoy it! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After 5 weeks of travel I was in need of a western food fix on arrival to Chiang Mai. After messaging my partners son who was in CM earlier in the year he recommended Rock Me on the basis they were the Best burgers he ever had. He was right amazing burgers good beer a fancy San Miguel I think. Chose to eat opposed to outside for a little more comfort. Good rock music in the background. Wings to start plus top of the range burger and 2 beers. Good value food £8 all in I think which is quite reasonable for western food in Asia Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Title says it all. Food cooked properly, ordered a medium burger and received one. Presentation was pretty nice as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Was just walking through and as i smell burgers i stopped.And went in.One of the best places in city.Yeah great food , great rock music.And beyond all, two magical guys working there with magic in their hands.Thanks to Mr Tee and his friend.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ordered a double burger and it really was huge. There was a very small side of fries but taste was good. The burger was good but my only complaint was that its perhaps far too fatty/greasy.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We came in here after looking at the menu outside, the food was delicious and staff were friendly, cocktails were really impressive and all at a reasonable price, great choice!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stayed at Ramming a few years ago and was underwhelmed by the whole place but decided to give the bar/restaurant a go. Wow had the Alohah which was very tasty paired with an amazing cocktail to pick up the pineapple. Had a Purple Haze which was a stunner visually as it had dry ice and a shot of blue Curacao which just kept on giving. Going back to get photos of cocktails.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Under our hotel Raming Lodge, we decided to have one night western food. The burgers were large and tasty. Around £5 each it came with chips and a large onion ring. The burgers were cooked to order and came out fresh and hot. Would recommend

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Honestly, after Viking Jungle, I wasn't sure that I'd be able to find a comparable burger to that, but boy, Rock Me Burgers really gives it a run for it's money. It's easy to say just get a burger and you'll enjoy it without any details but seriously, just order whatever everyone else is having and I'm sure you'll love it. One of my dear friends turned me on to this place before he left here and I wish that I would have made the trip here sooner. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was in need of eating something 'not Thai' so came here on Trip Advisor recommendations. It was clean, had air con and a huge menu. It has a picture menu which is good as there are a lot of one off named dishes. Had a double burger and it was fresh with decent beef and tasted great. Also saw the Mac and cheese burger which was also great. We had signature fries with cheese and bacon to start which were really good. As usual over here great service and good western food for a change. Decent portion sizes also. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My favorite burger in Thailand, have to say even my home country whitch is in Europe they dont make so good burgers. If you are in Chiang Mai visit this place. My favorite was rock me double.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place has fantastic food. The burgers are awesome. The staff are great. The decor is very nice. A definite place to visit if you are looking for a great burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was a nice break from Thai food. Burgers were excellent, cooked well, and great flavor combinations.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: These guys do serious burgers! I want to try them all, but I always have to go with the Mac & Cheese burger...because Mac & cheese!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Very nice food at this restaurant, I went for the made in heaven (double) burger with the beef cooked medium. Very nice, the bun seemed to be oiled or cooked in a way that made it soft and moist, but not too greasy, which I hadn't had before - but turned out amazingly.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The variety of burgers here was excellent, easily as many combinations as you would expect in a western burger restaurant. Food was very good although a little more pricey than other restaurants in the area.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great place to come for a change after 7 or 8 days of spicy Thai food Lots of choice on menu and all burgers are cooked to your taste all on a grill on the patio in from of the restaurant .The burgers are delicious and huge with homemade fries and lots of toppings The staff were very nice and attentive and also some great music playing inside which we enjoyed as some bars or restaurants in Chiang Mai can be a bit quiet ! Highly recommend Rock me burger !

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Top quality beef, I had my burger medium-rare( I could tell the beef was fresh). All the ingredients were high quality as well. The onion rings were great, and the fries were very good. Service was top notch ( fast & friendly). If you are in the mood for a great burger, this is a great place to start.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We love Thai food but , you know when you stay a while you feel like western Food .After reading Trip advisor I took my son (15) for our Brunch .Very nice service...Very nice burger...Fantastic choices...Amazing Coconut shake ...And what make us laugh .My son and I asked for An extra of Pickles (30bht)...And we thought we will have a poor slice ...like they do in Australia!!! No we had each a cup Filled with The beautiful Molossol Pickles See the photo We love them but couldn't finish😋 Place to recommend.....

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Huge burgers and home made fries. Lots of options to choose from and combo sets Great value. The onion rings were really yummy.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burger cooked to order and was spot on, delicious; fresh baked bun with all the trimmings. Great fries and onion rings. Milkshake was more milk than shake; asking for extra thick should do the trick. Enjoy

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I went to Rock Me Burger with a couple of friends after hearing it has great burgers. We ordered cheesy fries and a burger each. I remember I couldn't eat a bite out of my burger after cutting it open, and the smell was overwhelming to the point where I felt like I was going to throw up. It spelled overly greasy and like old meat. The cheesy fries were a bit too salty and soggy. The table was greasy and felt like it wasn't cleaned beforehand. The employees were no where to be seen.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We can't say more about it. The food, especially the burgers (I love their salad), the portion and quality of food, with the price tag, I'm not sure anyone want to miss it. You need to go and experience it yourself to know how good it is. Our 5 nights stay, we ordered room service once and ate another 3 times there. We just love it to bits.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Big tasty burger! Yummy fries ! Was huge did feel abit of a fatty after leaving but its a great treat meal! Staff are really nice

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock me Burger has a large selection of American favorites, burgers, hot dogs and ribs are all on the menu. I went with my wife and daughter for lunch and we had a burger and two hotdogs. It seams a lot of thought has gone into making the food authentic, unfortunately it was overflowing with grease. I couldn't even taste the pineapple in my burger over the grease. Maybe I've lived in Thailand for too long, but I couldn't wait to get home to brush my teeth, to get the feel of cuogulated grease of my teath. If I was 20 years younger and nursing a hangover, maybe..... :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Food was really good and about 600Baht for 2 of us! I would strongly recommend if you get bored of Thai food

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Nothing bad to say about this place, I have been multiple times and it's always excellent, it's on the more expensive side of the Chiang Mai burger places but the burgers are delicious and do have beef.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stopped by twice for late night takeaways as Rock Me Burgers is located at the hotel we were staying in. Once all the bars had closed the only street vendor we could find on both occasions was selling banana pancakes. Alternative of course was 7-11 but I opted that we go for the burgers and potatoe wedges. With White Plate gone I had hoped that Rock Me would cater for some more unusual flavoured burgers like White Plate had done but that was not to be. The burgers still tasted good, very filling and they made the effort for takeaways by putting the food in paper bags lined with foil in an effort to retain the food's heat. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Fast, courteous service! Great location! Nice restaurant ! Great big delicious burgers! Amazing sides and just amazing home made soda! A must if you are crazy one American style food in Chiang Mai! 10/10!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Fun to sit outside at the burger bar, watch people go by and enjoy seeing the food get cooked right in front of you. They have an efficient line with decently priced food and beer. Bring an appetite, try the mac and cheese! Would have given 5 but my medium burger was cooked well done (still good though!)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had a great burger here. It was fresh, hot and tasted great. The service was attentive and very friendly. I didn't have anything but a positive experience with the staff. I couldn't believe how hot and good the onion ring and fries were that came with the burger, also for 40 baht tried the mashed potatoes with gravy...great! Like so many others, I enthusiastically urge you to try the Kiwi soda; really refreshing. The vibe and music is laid back and pleasant and the restaurant is clean and well appointed. The place is easy to find and there are many westerners and Thai that will point you to the restaurant. It has air con and outdoor seating. I'll be back.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I will start this review by saying I have never been to Rock Me Burger. Then how can I do this review!! Rock Me Burger is on Meals on Wheels Chiang Mai (A home delivery service in Chiang Mai). A friend has been there several times and told me that the burgers are fantastic. Seeing that they are on Meals on Wheels Chiang Mai, I have now ordered from them three times. I will say that the Burgers are fantastic, good quality meat patty, fresh bun. Just a very good burger indeed. Over the next week I am going to dine in there. Just on a side note, many places that offer home delivery don't package properly. The three times I have ordered from Rock Me Burger, the food has always been well packaged. Definitely a fantastic burger joint in Chiang Mai. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ate here for lunch. I got a mac n cheese burger which was a little above average. I was encourage by the title. The Mac n Cheese was good but the beef was just average tasting.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good burger and also onion rings. One of our burger was a bit too red in the middle which I think it was frozen that's why they couldn't cook it all over. Still the rest was the nice meal and it tasted good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My husband and I visited in June. The burgers are supremely awesome. I had the 'pork for me' burger with a side of mash potatoes. I know that sounds strange but we visited last week and had the ribs which came with the mash potatoes. They were the best I've ever had. My husband had the beef burger with bacon and loved it. I had a coconut shake with my dinner which was lovely. The set up has table and booths. The cooking takes place outside where there is a bar and music. Really cool vibe. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best Burger / Food in town. We stayed at the Rambling Hotel and ate here most days for lunch or dinner. Great burgers for a cheap price. Nice bar out front on the street to sit and drink and visit with other travelers. Awesome customer service. The owner seems to be there every day from open to close.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was very hungry and ordered one of their biggest burgers. When it arrived, I was like, Woaahhhh! That IS huge! But I challenged myself to finish it... which I couldn't. There was a quarter of it left but as I don't like to waste food, I told the waitress I would take the remainder back to my room. She told another male staff in Thai that I wanted to pack the rest, and when he saw it was only a quarter of the burger left, he put on this patronizing look, and gave her a disdainful, questioning look with one eyebrow raised. Hello? Your customers have eyes too and can see your 'silent communication' to your colleague. Is it that big a deal to pack my burger into a paperbag anyway? Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had the ribs to share . Was awesome. The wife also loved the potato dish was also good . The waiter brought us a wine bucket so we could wash our hands .

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers are excellent and very juicy and tasty. Very varied menu . Something for everyone. Really good value for money. Ribs are very good as well. They do a 1/2 kg portion which is not the menu. Plenty big enough and really meaty. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We walked by the place with our minds set to eat in another place. However after seeing the name and knowing that our friends went there and raved about it we decided to try it out. The smell at the grill just outside the entrance was really inviting. When we wanted to enter, a waiter carrying 2 plates held the door for us to allow us to get in. I thought to myself... Hmmm good service, in other places the guy would have not even try it. Boy was I wrong. We entered, sat down at second table on the left. And we waited. This was for lunch and there were other 4 tables occupied that I saw. And we waited. There were 4 Chinese ladies at the table next to ours and they were having trouble communicating. From what I saw they wanted to split the bill. And we waited. The waitress went back and forth 3 times to the bar and spoke with someone behind the bar as well as someone in front of the bar. And we waited. Nobody even looked at us let alone greet us or bring us a menu or anything at all. And after waiting for what seemed to us close to 15 minutes, we gave up. And we did not wait anymore. We stood up, left and still nobody said anything. Worst service I have ever experienced. 5 tables in total including ours and at least 5 staff. We ended up 2 restaurants down the road and we ate some of the best noodles. Could I have waived a waiter? Could I have stood up and go to the bar to ask for service? Yes but it is not the type of service that I would pay for. Definitely a no no for me this burger joint. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good service! Reasonable price and many choices on the menu. This is the one of my favourite restaurant in Chiangmai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went here with 3 friends. Everyones food tasted godly. Seriously. Simply amazing place. I would recommend rock me heaven burger. The fried chicken in the box was also much better then any fried chicken I ever had. But wait, its not over. I ordered Heineken and regretted immediately. My friends ordered "House Soda's". They were non-alcoholic but they were HUGE. They also tasted ridiculously good. My favourite one was the one with kiwi. I would have rated this place 6stars if it was possible. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went to eat and they had great burgers (coming from an American!) and we went a different day for the bar outside and it was a good environment and great staff! The bartender was great!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I went to this place with my friend, just for Lunch. They made a lovely meal with thai beer and i love it. Also price is reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Been travelling around Southeast Asia for 11 weeks now and this has to be some of the best! Great for when you need a break from local food and need a reminder of home! Friendly staff, meals arrived really quick, completely fresh! And big portions! Burgers looked incredible too.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The fries were excellent but the quality of the meat was quite average, I also asked my meat to be well done and got it medium/rare. Playlist is good though!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great food and super nice staff. We thought it would be more of a bar, but it's a comfortable restaurant that is also nice for some drinks. It has a pool table, nice specials, and it's just overall a very good place. We were all impressed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a number of nights eating Thai food, my husband decided that it was time for a burger. This place was recommended by a friend. My husband being a burger fan really enjoyed his burger. Me on the other hand did not love mine so much. The patty was just a bit too meaty tasting for my liking. But to be fair...not many burgers rate very highly for me. The sides were all excellent, the service fast and friendly. If you like burgers definitely give it a go.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have been in Thailand and have missed a really good non-fast food burger. Things are picking up in that regard and I am proud to say Rock be Burger is the best in Chiang mai.. I had a double beef cooked medium rare and the burger juicy and not over spiced, fries were also very good. I wish they had more burger options and perhaps a patty melt,

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best Burger in Town for me, but expensive between 240 and 500 bht. Be careful, because sometimes there have no free seats or the meat is empty. So come early for dinner...

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good alternative to thai food. You need a good burger once a week. Quick service. Nice location. Big portion. First western food place i came back twice for 3 months travelling. Price for a main course is 4-6 dollars.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My boyfriend and I just walked around when we're lucky enough to find this place for lunch. Really good burgers with homemade fries, I would say that they tastes exactly like burgers in restaurants at home. Nice staff as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was told about this place, by a couple of young German chefs I`d met while on holiday. They`d rated it as the best place to get a burger in Chiang Mai. I agree with them 100%. I could`nt fault the place. Service was quick and the burgers were to die for. Gets very busy.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: First thing was that I had to flag over someone after sitting unnoticed for 10 minutes. Who knows? Maybe not a regularity. Atmosphere is good The burger didn't "rock me" am afraid to report. I wanted to like it, but the bun went completely soggy straight away. Chips were good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We sat outside as we did not want to sit inside in an airconditioned room. This did not make the service bad though - the staff was very attentive although not many people dined outside. We ordered a burger and a hotdog and both came very fast. The burger was absolutely delicious with a very tender beef pattie, fried medium to perfection. There is also an outdoor bar playing rock music at the front. If you like burgers, go here!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing food and such great value for money! Looks really lovely inside and the staff's customer service skills are great. Worth a visit if you're in Chiang Mai !

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great burgers and various other meals. Plenty to choose from. The fries are really good. You may want to phone ahead or even book a table at it was really busy when we went. Luckily we managed to walk in and get a table, but some groups were sent away. Live music here too which was a nice touch.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Do you miss western food? Don't walk around try to find anywhere else than here. Burgers, chips and drinks are 100% western. Very good for a casual night out

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We visited this restaurant for an evening meal, the staff were lovely, good atmosphere and good presentation of food. The taste of the burgers were not that great and we asked for medium rare but it was more like well done. I would recommend a visit as the cost is amazing and atmosphere is great- maybe have a hot dog?!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Look, you will be able to get your Big Mac anywhere, but when you are in Chiang Mai, come here instead. I was looking for a cafe to get some work done and found this place almost empty, it was around 3 pm, so went in. Ordered the safe option "Rock Me Original" and totally got blown away. They also did not mind that I stayed there for over an hour to finish my work. One problem, could not get a beer as it was before 5 pm, some stupid law prohibits selling even beer before it... not sure why.. I was so impressed with the beef patty that I took my wife with me the next night and managed to secure a table during rush hour at 8 pm! The waiting staff were friendly and served us timely. You must try the Rock Me on Hell (or something like that, forgot the menu name!). Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Really fancied a nice hand made burger, after look through the 3 menus we where given, eventually found one I wanted. Ordered and it arrived looking lovely! Tasted it and again mine (medium) was so tender and I really enjoyed it. My finances came (well done, as ordered) and was a lot harder and chewier. She also asked for extra cheese which was on the bill but didn't get it. So the food was good, what was really anoying was the amount of mosquitos that where in the restaurant, every few seconds another one would fly past your face.. Luckily we had good insect repellent.... Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great selection of burgers to choose from, portions are a good size and good quality. If you need a break from the Thai cuisine, here is definately a nice change.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers were large and the prices were low, and the food tasted good too. Wear insect repellent as there were a lot of mozzies!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The staff and the presentation of the food was top. Lots of people told us about the fantastic burgers but we went for spareribs. Looked awesome so full points for the deco BUT no tender and lack of sauce. However the starter a Cesar salad was one of the best ever. Bravo but sharpen up on the ribs. 5 stars for the overall impression of the place and staff.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Does what it says on the label 👍. The burger selection and quality was excellent backed up by speedy service. When you need a break from the local food and craving for a burger, this is the place to go.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent burgers, wonderful fries, awesome extremely crispy onion rings, original topping options (Mac and cheese...!!!). The only point for improvement is that I personally didn't like the colslaw, as it was with too much mayonnaise and chopped too small. Loved everything else.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you need a break from Thai food get your butt into Rock Me burgers. Had a life changing "melted cow" sandwich. Great bread. Real cheese. Good beef which is hard to come by in Thailand. Also indulged in the Mac and cheese and almost cried with happiness. Creamy cheesy heaven. Unlike any other I've crossed in Thailand. So many menu options for burger variations and a good atmosphere. Staff has great English and willing to adapt to special requests or alternations for menu items. I wouldn't recommend any other burger place in chiang Mai. Get in here, your taste buds will thank you!!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'd come across this place on Trip Advisor, as one of the top rated places to eat in Chiang Mai. It was only a 10 minute walk from our hotel so we thought we would give it a try! In a nutshell, the food here was absolutely superb. The quality and quantity of their burgers is second to none. The burgers were offered up on stylish chopping boards, with that classic home bbq look! They have an impressive selection of drinks too, and their cocktails are very unique and lovely!
