They even offer an impressive soft drink cocktail selection too! All in all, this was a fantastic restaurant, with fantastic food and fantastic service. It was.. Fantastic! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent food ,portions far too big!!! Delicious burgers , slaw and fries if you fancy a night off the Thai fare.Ice cold beers finish it off well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We were here 6 months ago and the burgers were fantastic back then....but today's visit was highly disappointing: sandwich ham in a burger, cold chips, burgers are smaller, ribs too spicy, no coleslaw, salsa was terrible, mashed potato was cold....we won't be back which is a shame. Ps if you're cleaning the tables, don't spray and then use the sponge side of a dirty window sqeegee instead of a clean rag or paper towels!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good burgers, huge portions. We ordered a side of fries and cheese for my son and he really liked it. I had their special burger and it was really big, juicy and tasty. I order fried mushrooms aside but I was disappointed that they weren't fresh but from a can. The fresh pineapple and watermelon juices were delicious.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This was next to our hotel and we had our eye on it when we checked in Finally tried it tonight and thought it was pretty great. My wife and daughter had the original, one beef and one pork. I tried the rocking in hell and really enjoyed the spicy basil sauce. All burgers came cooked as ordered and showed up within 5 min of ordering. My wife had the virgin mojito and my taste of it left me wishing I ordered a mojito instead of a beer If you are looking for a break from Thai food then I'd say this place will do the trick. Fries and onion ring that came with the burger were good too. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had better one in phuket. But amazing. Much better than u get in europe like england, sweden and southern europe

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ate at Rock Me Burger twice during my visit to Chiang Mai. On the first occasion, I sat at the outside bar where I could watch the chef cook my specialty burger whilst also people watching on the busy Loi Kroh Road. On my second visit, the outdoor stools were all taken so we had to sit inside. On that visit I had the huge plate of ribs. On both visits the food was excellent but the service was a bit slow. Definitely worth a visit. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place is really cool. The burgers are so juicy and the onion rings crisp. I thought that being American that it would serve massive burgers, but they were just a normal size (thank goodness). A band was playing inside which created a great vibe.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is located at the front of the Raming Hotel and is quiet popular. The burgers are usually shared as they are so big. Worth a try while in town.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ate here as it was next door to our hotel, plenty of choice of burgers all freshly cooked and well presented

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here for dinner today and oh my what a treat, if you've had enough of Thai then this is where you need to be, good quality meat, huge burgers and delicious chicken wings. Genuinely better than some burgers I've had in England.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Typical american dinner😃 . lovely friendly staff. Good atmosphere. Nice food. Highly reccomend. Chess beef pork chicken amazing fat fries shakes music nice location

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After travelling for 5 months in Asia and in India not being able to eat beef it was a treat to spoil ourselves and splurge on a rock me burger. Nice setting in the heart of Chiang Mai rock me is a place you go to kick back and dig into some yummy food. Staff are always very friendly and professional. There's one guy who works there who is hilarious, always makes our visit memorable. Highly recommend trying the rock me original burger which is a standard beef burger but always awesome!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing juicey filling burger. Chips. Smoothies. Ribs. The lot. Walk in empty stomach. Walk out full. The manager used To live in south London so knows the score. Say no more.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: What a great place.Sat at the bar watching them cooking the food.There is a huge choice that took me ages to decide on.You can sit at the bar, inside or round the side outside. If you like burgers forget those fast food joints. I will be going again.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Trust me! It rocks! greasy, juicy, burgers! The grill outside with burgers grilling... it enough to make you crave!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A chilled out place on the Loi Kroh Road, with the widest selection of burgers. Excellent preparation and great value.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is a shocker. I never expected to find a burger to get excited about in Thailand. My friends and I all agree that the management of this place has done n incredible job.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great service and very friendly staff. All three in our party had burgers and they didn't disappoint. Cooked to perfection. Recommended for lunch or dinner if you need a quick meal or get tired (yeah right) of Thai food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burger is part of The Raming Lodge Hotel with a bar at the front of the building which you can sit at. There is also seating inside if you prefer. If burgers are your thing, they will not disappoint, however the chips that are served with them are too greasy for my palate. Service is a bit slow for this type of outlet and they could do better. Not particularly cheap, but hits the spot if you need a break from the great joy that is:Thai food ! Why would you ?

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Me and my girlfriend had 1 double burger,Caesar salad and fish and ship. We can not finish it,but anyway the burger is very nice. We had a big meal amount rock music in this restaurant. We really love this restaurant and we will come back again.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place has made my short list for best burgers in Chiang Mai. It is definitely worth the visit if you are hankering for a cheese burger. They have some creative spins on my the good ole burger. The service is great, price is very reasonable for gourmet burgers, and the place has a very comfortable feel, located near the heart of Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ordered a burger and was told it would take a while as they were quite busy. I asked if they had any starters that they could serve me fairly fast as I was starving and the waitress came back and said a Caesar salad. So I orderd that as a starter with the burger to follow. After about 20 minutes, the burger arrived but no salad. The salad finally showed up when I had just about finished the burger. No recipe for Caesar salad that I have ever seen includes no chicken at all that I could find just a raw egg. no croutons, just some cubes of dry bread and an awful lot of lettuce...it was TRAGIC. The burger was OK but I personally don't much like the unpeeled potato wedges that it came with, I prefer "allumettes" McD style (about the only thing I like about McDs). If this is the best burger joint in town what the hell is the worst one like! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ordered the hot dog and wings and was satisfied. Food took awhile to be prepared but it was worth it

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent selection of Burgers.Cheese(s),Bacon,Egg fried or scrambled with Onion Ring.Can sit outside at the bar and watch them create different burgers.Burger will definitely take your Hunger away.Their french fries are Excellent but they do Not give you Very much with the burger.You'll need to get side order.Tastes great with a pint also.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Speedy service, free wifi, absolutely delicious burger and great chips. What more do you want? I was actually dining with a vegan and even she admitted the burger smelt amazing!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Food was creative and good and filling. Wait staff was short handed and very slow as result, drinks took 20' and when time to close tab we had to walk up to the register to get it going

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I ordered two of their signature burgers: Rocking in Hell and the Super Mac Burger. The service was prompt and polite, and the prices were extremely good. As for the taste, the meat was amazing by itself, even without all the extras on top. The Rocking in Hell was very spicy, and literally dripping with flavor, which is exactly what I wanted. The Super Mac didn't skimp on the mac & cheese, and the flavor demonstrated the chef knows how to do american food right. Can't recommend enough. I'll be going back tomorrow!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The service is poor. Wait forever to get a menu with 6 or 7 workers right around, then wait for a long time to place an order. Food comes quickly, however pork is cooked with beef, chicken is deep fried in the same fryers as onion rings and french fries. The food is cheap, but you are getting low quality food, and dodgy preparation. Much better burgers can be found elsewhere in chiang mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Enjoyed our burger night out with rock me. The staff is very friendly and the burgers are delicious with big portions at reasonable cost. It should be a must try for burgers in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place is in our hotel (Raming). They serve giant burgers and pretty good French fries. Our meal was 180 baht per person plus drinks which range from 30 baht for mineral water to 200 baht for mixed drinks. Any pretence of an Asian meal is gone but sometimes that is OK.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Walkin along one evening on Loikroh road deciding on dinner and "POW", right in the nostrils... that beautiful smell of hamburger on an outdoor grill. Easy choice, ran inside and grabbed a table, Wow, great choice of meals to suit the style of foods. Even asked to sample some product to make up my mind and asked how I wanted my burger cooked. Almost a struggled a little to finish, just what I needed. Great staff, Cheers !

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rick me burger must be one of the best in the area, great staff friendly able to speak English which is a plus. The burger was a good size really tasty I enjoyed it. The menu is has a good choice. Recommend.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: "Rock me Heaven" is my favorite one. I love the meat which is fresh n tender n juicy. The burger serve with fresh veggie which is the best part.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: My parter and I both ordered the super Mac burger (burger itv Mac & cheese!). It was the best burger we have ever had. The service here is also excellent. The staff were very friendly, and helpful! They offer you a menu & a photo menu to help you decide from their wide range of choices! You can opt to sit inside the restaurant or on bar stools outside, on the street if you prefer a more informal setting. Outside, you can also watch them cook everything! It was hands down the best burger we have had in a while! We will definitely be returning here before we leave! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is a nice place, and they provide the excellent breakfast buffet for the Raming Lodge. If you have a vegetarian in your group, though, go elsewhere.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Having stayed at the Raming lodge a few times I was always aware of this restaurant attached to the hotel but not really being into burgers I've always given it a miss.However after the constant spicy Thai food diet I just fancied some western food so thought I'd give it a go.Wow was I impressed,these are real homemade burgers made from fresh minced beef and pork,Cooked to order and to your preference of rare medium or well done and boy do they taste good.This a world away from the bland cardboard excuse served up in a couple of well known high street burger bars so it maybe an alien experience to our American friends. I had a double cheese burger which was served on a wooden board with homemade chips(fries to our America friends) and onion rings.With a drink about ฿320 really excellent value.If you've never tried a real burger before I recommend rock me burger bar quite superb. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is honestly the best American style food we have ever had. The portions are massive and the taste is great, in sitting here on the wireless internet trying to share it with you all as its a must for some decent food. Even the Chinese are coming in here to eat! Enjoy!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I had been craving a burger 2 weeks into my trip through Thailand and that's when I stumbled upon this place. I went in for a late lunch and was quickly sat down at a table. The restaurants wasn't very busy and I quickly placed my order for a burger containing a runny egg and boasting a spicy taste. I knew I'd come to the right place when the waitress asked me how I'd like my burger cooked. I opted for medium rare. She then went through the buns they offer. Wholewheat, pumpkin and cocoa. Since she recommended the latter I went for that. Alongside this I got the Chiang Mai Coconut Milk Shake. The shake came first and it was in my opinion the best use of coconut I had ever tasted. It was topped with cream and raisins and simply delicious. The burger arrived not too long after and was cooked perfectly medium rare on the inside. The egg was runny and there was a lovely spicy taste running throughout that didn't overpower the other flavours. The burger came with potato wedges and an onion ring which were both fine but nothing to write home about. All in all I had a burger that beats most of the burgers I eat back home in London! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After 2 and a half weeks of Asian food, With the need of some western Cuisine. This burger took me to heaven! Highly recommend if you have a similar craving.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We just finished the burgers and chicken schnizel, and it was tasty and delicious. Great staff, lovely place. Will come back. Rare find

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Wow! We were recommended this place by a fellow American traveler and it was the best burger we have eaten in a very long time, my girlfriend even said "ever". We had "Rock in Hell" and also tried "Melted Cow". Too bad that we didn't have time to go back!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Now we're demanding customers when it comes to burgers, but the visuals and all the paraphernalia are spot on at this new Chiangmai burger grill: fantastic brioche buns, very nice potato wedges, etc. The meat seemed very good quality but overall both our burgers tasted too bland to be blown away - the foundations for a top burger experience are there but a few details regarding the patty and maybe the sauce could yield huge improvements.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Amazing burgers, great selection and great quality beef used. Staff are very friendly and efficient, great laid back atmosphere, Would recommend to all, if you're not a big eater I would share one as they're huge 😃😋

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Popped in for a burger service was a bit slow, but they were busy. Good selection of burgers and other food. My meal arrived in good time and was as ordered. No beer before 5 o'clock

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you want a decent burger, onion rings, and milkshake -- this place is great! Note, if you are eating with children, bear in mind that this street can be "interesting" at night. Lunch may be a better option if you want to sidestep some of the night life options.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: the burgers we got here were rather good, with tasty toppings. size was good for me (but likely small for the US standards). you can either sit inside or outside on the nice entry Hall of the Taming Lodge hotel. unfortunately they do not serve any dessert and do not serve any alcohol before 5PM. price are definitely higher than other Thai restaurant, but still lower than Western standards.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I do not think that I have had a better Burger and I have tried reputed places in NYC, Hard Rock Cafe etc etc Not instantly served because cooked to order. All seems to be home made. Full of flavour and not to fatty. Real chips. Some five star hotels could take lessons from here and what makes a great burger. Staff friendly, helpful and tested me well, even as a solo diner who is all too often parked in a corner. Just four burger choices, with a choice of extras. I had original with bacon. Fell full with it being excessive. Clean and live band. One of my most positive reviews! Do I have peculiar taste? is it just me? I suggest that you try. Clean plate :-) Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Me and my Thai burd order from here now and again when we take a break from Thai food. The meat they use in the burgers is very good. Decent sized burgers and if you go for the more extravagant options there's a whole omelette in there as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was staying at the hotel attached to the restaurant so decided to give it a try. I had their main burger (can’t remember the name) but it was a burger with the lot (egg bacon tomato lettuce ect). It arrived quite quickly on a wooden board with a steak knife drive through it into the board which was actually difficult to get out!! The burger itself was delicious. So delicious in fact I went back the next day for another. The burger comes with one large onion ring and a pile of hand cut homemade fries. Both times I was there the service was super friendly (even for Thailand) and they checked how your meal is going and if you need anything with guanine interest not just because they have to. They also do ribs, chicken ect which all looked great (although I did not try them) They have an inside restaurant, and outside restaurant, and a street bar setup with water mist fans all as options to sit at. On the Sunday I was there, they also had a live 2 man band playing rock and roll acoustic tracks and where quite good. Defiantly worth going to. I would totally go again next time I am in town! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers are ridiculous. If you're looking for a break from Thai food head here without any worries. Onion rings were awesome to and attentive service.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Highly recommended. This place serves the BBQ ribs we've had in Chiang Mai --- and better than most places in the west. We ordered the 1 kilo BBQ RIBS. It's enough for two unless two of you are starving. The sides -- mashed potatoes and coleslaw were very tasty. Give this place a try! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stopped by here on the way for a night of May Thai fights. Needed some good food before beers. I got what I was looking for. Everyone that worked there was great. Indoor and outdoor seating. Burgers were very very good,size, taste, everything!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I am a New Yorker and was in Chiang Mai 4 years ago. I just returned this week and noticed the Raming Lodge hotel has a burger joint attached to it now. I was very skeptical as getting a burger in Thailand overall can be a little nerve wracking but the menu had potential to be a Westerners paradise. It is. I was shocked at the quality of the burger...even the temperature requested was perfect. I spoke with the manager, Dang who gave me a bit of history including the fact that the owner was an exchange student in the states for a bit and decide to open up Rock Me just last year in part, based on his experience. I spent 4.5 months previously in SE Asia and I never encountered a better burger on this side of the planet. My understanding is that the menu is expanding so I will save my 5th star for that experience. This place is a gem especially to folks who have had enough noodles, rice and curry for a lifetime! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Fantastic menu with lots of choices. Great quality meat & it is cooked how you like it. The staff are friendly & welcoming & service has always been prompt. The burgers are very, very good here & very tasty too. Well worth a visit if you are craving western food in Chiang Mai. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had a dinner here for 5 persons. I ordered the burger set. It is amazing big value plate. Wonderful tasty burker with French fried and side salad. My sister and her husband ordered other burker menu and it is very good too. My parent has a rib bone steak. Wow this plate is very recommend . Very big piece juicy and tasty . The cost for all is not over THB 1200

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: When they first opened, the food was superb and service was good. Now service is pretty non existent and the food is so oily. Fair play I'm not expecting a healthy burger but the amount of oil left on the plate was pretty sickening. Way overpriced and not worth a revisit. I much prefer Big Daddy's burgers. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great place for eat a burger,big selection of burgers and low prices,the imgrediemts are really fresh. The location is in the old city in a busy area. Hightly recomanded if you wanna eat a great burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ate there today was asked how I would like it cooked ,medium. What I got was raw in the middle and I guess they feel they have to add something for flavor which I understand Thai beef is generally not very flavorful. I really don't like it when they do that, Dukes does it also and I don' eat there either. Macro has better beef.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ordered the cheese & bacon fries to start and the chips were stone cold. Our burgers came & they were good :) We then waited for our plates to be cleared for 20 minutes. None of the staff (who weren't actually doing anything) approached us to ask for more drinks, dessert, how are food was. Disappointing customer service! Not the greatest birthday dinner experience! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Came here with my girlfriend for her birthday meal out. Got seated and the waiter came over to ask for our order. My better half ordered her burger with Mac n cheese and a side of cheesy bacon fries, no problem. I came to order my aloha burger and wanted a fried egg along side. The waiter point blank refused to give me my fried egg claiming 'it doesn't come with that burger'. The menu had extra sides on it so I wanted a fried egg!! After conceeding and moving on from the lack of a fried egg, my aloha burger was, nevertheless, amazing! Upon finishing main courses, multiple waiters and waitresses walked by our corner table. They looked at our plates, then walked away. After 20 minutes of staring at my empty plate, the waiter finally came over and cleared the table. Bearing in mind it wasn't exactly packed, I thought this was a bit of a lengthy wait. I work in hospitality so have an idea of how long you should wait to clear mains, 20 mins is unacceptable. Anyway, our plates were cleared but the waiter "forgot" to ask us if we wanted any more drinks, any desserts or coffee. Next time I visit, I will be taking out and not dining in. Such a shame. Food 5 star, service 2 star. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here with my partner, was served by a man called Dane (I think). He spoke very good English and was very welcoming. Ordered the 'Super Mac' burger with bacon and macaroni cheese. The food was amazing and the portions were huge! Definitely recommend this place.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A fantastic range of burgers and hotdogs. I had a New York hotdog that was fantastic. The meat and cheesy mac burger was a sight to see, and finished by a hungry daughter.Have a purple haze drink for the drama.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place was amazing!!! The staff were amazing as well. They even allowed us to take away a burger for our friend who was working. I had a massive burger and added a fried egg and the wife had a salad that was huge. The burger tasted lovely and was cooked to perfection. If you are craving a little meat go here!!! A must do!!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This is a must try for those wanting to try something other than asian food. A little taste of home.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: American food in Thailand is always a little disappointing, but these burgers are actually fantastic. The bun is awesome and the burgers are thick and juicy. Would love if they had some better beer options, but it's still Thailand.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Do you like burgers? If yes... GO HERE! Easily found on Loi Kroh road, this place sells burgers that are fizzle manizzling amazing. For 185 baht you get a 'Rock me Heaven Burger' (which I always have) A massive patty cooked however you want, and when you say rare, they do it rare! A delicious slightly toasted bun, an entire omelette, two big slices of well cooked bacon, cheese and a little salad, with some home made potato wedges/fries and big chunky onion ring. I can never even finish it! The picture next to the restaurant name above is a joke and does not do justice at all. They also have hot dogs, fried dishes and other tasty treats, including beer. Service is great, very friendly guys who speak great English and you can sit either inside with AC or outside without. One think I like about this place is the full selection of condiments, including real mayonnaise, of which you can have as much as you want. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The service is good and the environment is comfortable in this restaurant. I ordered 'haven' set and it was amazing. Will definitely pay a visit again.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ate here twice. They have amazing burgers. The staff is friendly and the atmosphere is fun -- kind of like a Hard Rock Cafe. They do a great job here!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This restuarant Is delicious I had reg. Burger came with fries and one huge onion ring-160thb. And extra side of onion rings w/thousand island dressing-109 thb and coconut pineapple cocktail by the way delicious - 150thb. soft drinks coke and sprite drink 40thb. All mixes drinks here u can't go wrong. staff are very kind and helpful and appreciate so much if u consider them giving a tip which they all split.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Just like in the States. Burgers are very authentic and tasty. The owner cares a lot about his customers. Tjey even have yellow mustard. Don't leave Chiang Mai without eating here.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'm not usually a burger person but I went here with some people when feeling a bit fed up of Thai food. I only had the Rock me original but it was the best burger I have ever had! We all loved it so much we went back a few days later.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ok for those who want the artery buster Falang burger this is it. I actually spent a half hour or so watching the staffs cooking and it was a treat. This place is as good as any burger place in North America except the cost is Thai. Really if you want a burger this is as good as it gets. Really. Nuf said.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: if youre sick of asian food and have a desire to go back to western burgers and ribs even if its for 1 meal, you must come here for a mind blowing meat menu. well worth it.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We were in the neighbourhood and looking for a place that also served good Western food. This turned out to be an excellent choice. Their burgers are delicious, as are their shakes. Sad that we didn't get to eat here again before we had to head out!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Came here by coincidence and had the best chickenburger I've ever had. Meat was very good and the potato wedges were delicious. We also ordered an appetizer, but I think something went wrong, beacuse they didn't serve it. Which was for the best, because we had to do our best to eat the whole burger. If you looking for something else than Thai food, I would definately recommand this Burgerbar! Not very expensive and you get a lot of food it!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock me burger really ROCK !! Tried so many times until I don't even need the menu anymore :) Best burger in town !!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers in the place were very nice and the perfect size. The chips were excellent too. Waiter we dealt with was a very nice man and the service was good throughout. . The price was reasonable too. The restaurant itself is quirky inside, it's trying to get that american diner vibe but just misses out, but is quite enjoyable to be in. Overall a very good meal for what it is

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Was taken by a friend and was pleasantly surprised. The food was surprisingly good and the serves generous The staff were very good, happy, smiling and helpful It is in the middle of a tourist area know for its Bars and Night Life, therefore the prices are to be expected, no its not great value for money but it is worth a visit to indulge yourself Will I return: Most likely yes if I am hungry and nearby, I wouldn't go out of my way to go there.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Quite enjoyed they food a lot was a little hung over so it helped. My second visit to this burger joint and both times I have been satisfied with service and quality of the food. They put a lot of love into their meals. Will be back again.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Staff is friendly and all speak good English but the most important this is the hamburger. Perfectly done and delicious, just amazing- no burger like that in Israel.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Me and a Friend decided to visit Rock Me Burger, because we were in the mood for American/ Gastropub-type food and were disapointed. The Restaurant itself has a nice enough, but not very special atmosphere and the food was average. The chips we had were wedge-style chips, which was nice, but they had an insane amount of salt on them. Some of the food was good, but some also tasted like wasn't home made. Especially the sauces and dips, eg Gravy, BBQ Sauce, Cheddar Sauce. The cheese at Rockme was terrible, which I would have expected at a local restaurant that only has a few western dishes for tourists, but not at a burger bar. That being said, the service was very good and all the Staff were attentive and friendly. They also have some interesting looking burger combinations on the menu. It is slightly more expensive than othe places in chiang mai I've visited. I wouldn't come back, but I don't feel like I completely wasted my money either. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After spending 7 days at the elephant nature park in Chiangi Mai where all our meals where vegan the first thing everyone was hanging out for was a burger lol. Well let me tell you this place was awesome the meals where to die for. We had great service the staff are all friendly we had 2 table groups with 10 on each table not 1 person had anything negative to say definitely value for money. My wife and I returned there 2 nights later with another couple that had arrived back into Chiangi Mai and they also enjoyed there meals highly recommend for anyone traveling to Chiangi Mai you won't be disappointed.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Hard to describe, kind of a gourmet bar food place. Great burgers, sandwiches, salads and chicken wings. We ate here 5 times on a 6 day stay, the family really loved the food, and the service is excellent. They have good music playing, good seating arrangement, well staffed, clean bathrooms.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers here are truely awsome. Great quality & very tasty. I ate here a couple of times during my last 10 day stay in Chiang Mai. The menu is extensive & whilst the burgers aren't cheap they are well worth the price. My only negative comment would be that on both occasions I visited with my mate his burger arrived very quickly & mine didn't arrive until well after he'd eaten & completely finished his burger. The service was always friendly & the staff very helpful it was just the disjointed delivery of the meals that let it down. I would certainly visit again though because the food is great. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The food was pretty average. Okay for a quick bite late at night. However the service was very quick and efficient. Many more choices all around but good in a pinch

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you like burgers this is the place to go. I prefer the local thai food but we tried it once and it was very nice I have to say

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Crisp toasted bun, hot salty fresh wedgies, cheeky onion ring...all served on a wooden slab to keep them warm. Rocking in Hell, or Rocking in Hell.....just makes you want to go ooooooooh. A great place to watch the crowds go by....with great friendly service. What more is there to say.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great Food, good selection of food, Water mist sprays out the front. Friendly and good English speaking staff

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent... Beer cold ... Burger hot... Music great... Want good food .. Go!!! Short walk from night market and Le Meridian

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Visited restaurant once. Ordered crispy chicken burger. Burger was delicious. Presentation was really nice. Staff were attentive and service was good. Worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Good selection of really tasty burgers. Great staff too. Enjoyed it a lot. Easy to find, on the street towards Chiang Mai's night bazar.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We have been in Chang mai for a few days and came across this burger bar whilst searching for some home comfort food after suffering really bad stomachs, trying the local food stands. This place Looks so cool and fab from the outside, very clean and peaceful inside which is what you need in crazy Chang mai sometimes. The staff were so so polite and really went out of there way to make us feel comfortable. The food was out of this world, I didn't even manage to take a photo because I just wolfed it right down! It is not over priced at all, if anything it is underpriced for An amazing burger with quality meat! When they say cheddar cheese they mean cheddar cheese, so any of you Brits having cravings,this is the place to go! We will 100% go back to this place, the staff seem very happy and cheerful to be working there and we felt more than welcome! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went there with a friend today as he recommended this place to me and the food was lovely. They asked us how do we want our beef to be - we went for medium and it was so delicious. They do not try to save on meat or cheese even if thats very expensive in Thailand and we still had a very good value for our meals - 200 baht each for tasty burger with chips it was very good :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The Rock Me is attached to the Raming Lodge Hotel and has the best burgers and hot dogs I've had anywhere on my travels. The Thai food is very good too. You have to ask for the Thai Food Menu as they usually just hand out the burger one. You'll have to eat there a few times to sample both types of food as the menus are so extensive. I stayed at the Raming Lodge for a week and so tried quite a few dishes. The staff and the manager, Dan, are really welcoming and aside from providing great food and service at a reasonable price, they have a great sense of humour. In short - great food, cold beer, friendly staff and reasonable prices. I recommend the Rock Me and think that it's a "must visit" when in Chiang Mai ! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This place has the best burgers I have had anywhere on my travels. The staff are so nice too and looked after us so well and remember us the next day when we went back!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This restaurant is part of the Raming Lodge and had been modified. The old restaurant was over priced and not that wonderful, but this place has the best burgers in Chiang Mai and I go here to eat even if I am not staying there.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: For a teacher in Thailand who doesn't live in a big city and doesn't have access to hamburgers, Rock Me Burger is heaven. I ordered the simple hamburger, and it was absolutely delicious. Cooked to perfection. And the bun is incredibly yummy as well. The French fries are also fantastic. Staff was lovely and location is good, walkable from old city. Highly recommend! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers, golden fries, caesar salad, coleslaw tasted just amazing, loved it and will definetly eat here again during my stay!! Also great milk- and fruitshakes. Nothing bad to tell.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'm not exactly why this is, but no burgers anywhere in the world are as good as ones from the States. Not fast-food ones, but ones from the best local joints. They're just...better. Perhaps it's the meat (but I've had too-notch beef in many countries), but something always seems to be a bit lacking flavor-wise. And no, this is not some displaced patriotic loyalty to my country of origin! That being said, Rock Me Burgers in Chiang Mai is "as good as it gets" in this foodie town. Best of the bunch, hands down. Ample, tasty beef (chicken, pork and veggie options exist as well) patties, served on good buns (toasted, as they should be), and all the trimmings (except come to think of it--onions, but I'm sure they can be requested). Nice steak fries served with one perfect onion ring complete a near-perfect meal. Service was decent-plus, and a nice English-speaking manager checked in with guests throughout my visit. Two caveats. I ordered my burger medium-rare, and it arrived very rare. (This was promptly and courteously remedied). I'd keep this in mind when ordering: you might want to order up one notch of "doneness" according to your preference. Also, especially given the large portion size of the burgers, I feel a few more fries on the plate would contribute to the meal. The portion size of the great fries was just a little skimpy. Will I go back? You betcha, the next time I get a burger-Jones, I'll be right there! It might not match its US competition, but then, have you ever had Pad Thai in your home country that matches even food stall noodles here? Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We live an hour out of town so when we come down to Chiang Mai we want something tasty and different to the meals in our mountain village. We ordered the original burgers and they where spectacular. They have a real home made beef patty and tasty melted cheese. We will definitely be back.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We ordered the original burger and a beer - it came out, all stacked high full of delicious REAL beef pattie and perfectly melted cheese (that actually you can TASTE) - with hand cut fat chips and a huge onion ring. It is big and oh so good - I couldn't finish the chips but hubby happily chowed down on the remainder. It was a little early in the day to continue boozing, however another visit to consume some cocktails is a must! See you soon!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: So good! Dan the man speaks amazing english, the borders are almost just like home. Everything is super tasty!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Super super nice burger, onion rings amazing, fries top class. 180 baht. What more can I say??? I'll be coming again soon

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Friendly. Well priced. Good quality food and lots of it! Worth a trip if you're in need of a break from street food........

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Best ingredients selected by its owner. Nice decorating, very friendly staffs, and the atmosphere is great! The taste of my burger, 'Rock in Heaven', was stunning. Worth to try once in your life. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Haven't got such a nice burger for a while.......I love this place. Staff speak perfect English, nice place for lunch! I think is 100% for me. I will come again!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stumbled upon this place and I sure am glad I did, I don't know about the bad reviews but my burger was perfect, the meat tasted like it was seasoned and had a great flavor fries were a little well done but I didn't go there for fries, my wife had the ribs they were excellent and they had a side of potato salad that was the bomb, it tasted like it had wasabi or horse radish mixed in it. our waiter was named Dang and he was a dang good waiter spoke excellent English and had a great sense of humor, overall I really enjoyed this place and plan on going back again

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Very good burgers here. Fries are nice an the onion rings were done perfectly. You can sit outside at the bar or eat inside. Staff were nice and restaurant was family friendly If you want a break from Thai food in Chiang Mai this is a good choice.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The first time we went here we couldn't get any service at all. My partner insisted we go again as they have good boutique beer. This time we were pointed towards a table & given menus farely quickly. We ordered drinks - a Black Butte for my beer loving partner & a Rock Me Green mocktail for me. We shared a serve of ribs & sides & a side salad. The ribs were average. The side salad was lettuce & only lettuce - no onion, no cucumber, no tomato. My partner wanted a second beer, our waiter had disappeared & getting the attention of another waiter took ages. We had to ask twice for the beer. I was hoping to have dessert. There was no waiters around to ask. When one eventually turned up he said 'you can have ice cream'. We had to ask for the dessert menu. I eventually ordered a banana split - the waiter eventually came back & said they had no bananas. We asked for our bill. After waiting for 10+ minutes we got up to walk out, one of the staff ran up to us with our bill. 1050+baht for a very average meal & abysmal service. BTW, my mocktail was fluorescent green & tasted like lime cooler from the 60s. Don't go here. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Located right at the entrance of The Raming Lodge where we were staying. Rock Me Burgers has the most yummy burgers which were huge! We also ordered the chicken skewers which were massive. Check with the staff if you don't like spicy as the BBQ sauce on the skewers was hotter than I was expecting. This restaurant is a little pricy in comparison to other restsurants but still cheap when we compared to what we would pay at home. Well worth a visit with staff who are super friendly. We had the pleasure of meeting Dang who served us on the night we were there and he was the nicest man you'd ever want to meet. Service with an A+ smile.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: All in the title, a great surprise for my wife and I! After being tired of eating rice all week these burgers were just heaven in our mouths! Keep rocking!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Greatly surprised. Good cheap eats & quality burgers. Good sized meals too, just check the bbq sauce first, kids found it a bit spicy. Best buy though was the ribs, 1.5kg of bbq pork rib that melted in your mouth. On the will visit again list.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Excellent Burgers! It was delicious and exaclty what we needed after 8 days in motorcycle around north of Thailand

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great range of Burgers, Hot dogs, Asian meals. A little expensive in comparison to other Restaurants, but meals are TOP quality

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had a group of six people all thoroughly enjoy their meals Enormous fish sandwiches were a hit along with the burgers. The ribs were good but could have had a spicier sauce for my taste. There wasn't an empty table in the house and the atmosphere was very good.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: At the Moment probably the best Burger Restaurant in Chiang Mai,was pretty surprised to get such a good burger in Thailand. The shakes are also above average ;)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We came here for dinner and we weren't dissapointed! The food here is just amazing! The service was brilliant our waiter was so friendly and helpful. I had the Mac n cheese burger, my bf had the cheese and bacon dog and our friends shared the 1kg of ribs. I do wish I could have had a bigger stomach because the food was so amazing I would have eaten it all over again if I could have fit it in! Its a very busy restaurant, lots of locals there wasn't many tourists in there when we went. Their cocktails... Amazing, try the pirates of the Caribbean, it comes bubbling with dry ice!! There was a slight wait on food,but you expect that because it's Thailand and this place is super busy, BUT worth the wait!!!?? Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Waited a long time for my food and when it arrived it was cold. Paying B450 for ribs and they can't managed to get it right. Disappointing

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Was just passing by and the smell of beautiful burgers pulled us in! They were great tasting and well presented, also the staff were great and had plenty to say about things to do and see in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We came across this restaurant by chance which we are so glad we did! A wonderful atmosphere with friendly staff and fantastic food! The burgers are some of the best we have had! They were more than happy to accomodate a vegetarian like me and nothing was too much trouble. 5 stars!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: simply the best in Chiang Mai!!!!! the pattie delicious and can come rare as the meat so good, the bun is home made corn bread, plus many other things on the menu. A must try is the amazing wasabi mayo for the potato wedges that come with every burger. The place is clean the staff are very polite and well spoken in Thai and English. I will be returning and recommend to all except vegetarians unless you want to be converted.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Being from the UK I'm not sure of the standard of burgers in Thailand; especially as it's not their own dish. Of you're looking for burgers or meat in general in Chiang Mai, this is the place to go. The restaurant was clean, the staff polite and spoke a good level of English. The burgers were cooked to your taste (medium, rare, well done etc) and were delicious. The meat tastes quality and was cooked correctly. My order didn't come out with my bacon as ordered but this was rectified, mistakes happen so I wasn't too bothered. I'm UK sterling two gigantic burgers, two alcoholic drinks and one side set my partner and I back about £17. Good value for great good. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Lovely smell while I waited but the burger was disappointing as the bap was a lot bigger than the burger and too much lettuce etc. It tasted fine but not cheap. In saying that it was always busy so they must be doing some right. I wouldn't go back though.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Crazily overpriced for what are really average service, a dirty bar counter and below average food... don't stop here, keep exploring the amazing culinary landscape of Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Warning: the soundtrack will make you want to stay there forever... A great little place for burgers with classic rock playing and memorabilia proudly displayed. We had quick and friendly service despite a slight language barrier with some of the waitresses and there was variety in the menu. A must for rock fans.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Burgers are about it. However, very well done including medium or well cooked choice. Can sit in air conditioning or @ the road side bar. If you enjoy eating burgers, give Rock Me a try.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Hard to find a good burger in Thailand so I stopped here. Same Same like everywhere else could not chew most of it and spit it out. "Buffalo wings were NOT "Buffalo" style. I come from Buffalo NY. Not even close.Not even served with blue cheese dressing. Typical Thailand - "Face value" -- if it says it on the menu it's so. - NOT! The place looks cool though - again - face value...

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you find yourself in Chiang Mai missing Western food get yourself here! We stumbled upon it by accident and enjoyed one of their amazing burgers. I'd also highly recommend the mango mojito! Enjoy!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers here are beyond belief. Just the single patties alone will fill you up but if you're really hungry you can order a double. They also have fish and chip, hot dogs and chicken burgers. All very tasty at a reasonable price.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I went to rock me just before 11pm,last orders.not had anything to eat that day either.they said ok no problem,I order the middle of the road burger.come with onion rings included.the meal come out presented nicely,the meal was filling and very tasty.alot to eat for a hungary person,but I ate the lot.highly recommend a burger there if you are hungary and want a good burger in chiang mai.i will go back again for sure.so look it up if you are on a visit to the city

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you love giant burger try this one. The main menu in restaurant is home made burger with large sized served. The meat quality is good and don't take a long time to wait. The price isn't expensive for food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Nice burger and onion rings, chips are great! Wasn't a fan of the chicken burger personally but it wasn't bad. Not bad price, nice staff and good for a change from Thai food :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I enjoyed the yummy burgers from the Rock Me Burgers & Bar when we stayed at the Raming Lodge Hotel early May 2015. My favourite burger was the Rock Me Aloha burger which came out with a medium bbq burger plus a slice of sweet bbq pine apple. I would also recommend their 1kg bbq pork spare rib and the coconut shake.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: An outstanding tasty burger was had at this restaurant. On my first visit I had a double burger with a pork patty and a beef patty. The staff asked how I would like the burger cooked and it came out exactly as requested. The accompanying wedges were also nice. On the second visit I had the double burger with 2 beef patties, again cooked exactly as I asked. The price of their menu items is very reasonable and offers great value.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We've tried a couple of Burger joints in town so far, amongst them being all those places who claim they have "Chiang Mai's best burger".... It's all complete nonsense as none of the burgers out there does even get close to those juicy patties they prepare at Rock Me. The very same applies btw to their hotdogs and ribs. Their staff are great too, so you will walk away not only with a full stomach, but a big smile on your face, too.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: That the burgers are very good at Rock Me Burger is indisputable. However, one should not deprive themselves of other top offerings on the menu, thus requiring more than one visit. The rack of ribs, for instance, was marvellous having been cooked to perfection and almost more than one person could eat. Delicious! Strangely though, they were awash in a tomato sauce rather than a nice, traditional barbeque sauce, which, of course, gave them the taste of spaghetti. It might also be noted that service and cleanliness were not found wanting.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: This restaurant serves great burgers to a good price. We had the Rock on heaven, a great choice but I bet they are all tasty. 180 bath for the burger(and that includes the very nice fries, onionring). We went to this place the night we arrived in Chiang Mai, and we will return once more before we leave.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock Me Burger & bar : the best burger i ever had!! Really good! The service was excellent, very friendly! Right at the Raming Hotel & Spa. I was here during Songkran, amazing, what a happening! Never experienced anything like it! Hope to come here again one day.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: great burgers i had the double and had it deliver to my room open till midnjght in the ramiinglodge hotel.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The first time I went I ordered the cheeseburger, it was FANTASTIC! The staff is extremely friendly and attentive. I have been back several times since and the food is consistent. I have taken quite a few friends to the restaurant after my first trip and everyone has commented on how GREAT the burgers are. If you come to Chiang Mai as a tourist or you live here as I do, you have to try this place... you will not be disappointed. I would never eat french fried potatoes with the skins on but after trying theirs I am sold, every time I have been there I have cleaned my plate, which is unusual for me.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Same place as raming lodge hotel....nice food....good price, and the drinks were cheap too. If you are staying at the hotel, great for an evening meal.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We loved the food in Thailand and Cambodia, but after three plus weeks I was ready for a burger. This place also has beer from the Deschutes and Rogue breweries so I was sold before I ever tried the food. Very cool outside bar right on the street so you can people watch as you enjoy your brew. I had a burger and my wife had the chicken strips. Both were very tasty. We came back two more times!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a week of eating vegetarian food, me and my friends were keen to satisfy our meat cravings. We actually stumbled across this restaurant on the off chance but, boy were we glad that we did! We were greeted quickly and seated in the outside courtyard which was lovely. The staff were incredible, especially as we kept adding additional items to the order (cheese sauce). We were all pleasantly surprised to be asked how we wanted our meat cooked and I was allowed to adapt my order to suit my diet. The food is beautifully presented and the burgers are sublime! It probably isn't the cheapest meal that you will have in South East Asia but compared to western prices, it most definitely is cheap. I opted for the original beef burger and a diet coke which only cost me 200 baht. £4.00 for a burger and soft drink is pretty good if you ask me! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Returned to Chiang Mai after a 3 day trekking trip and was craving a burger. This is the only place I have been abled to get a proper burger since coming to Asia. Don't undermine the pictures in the menu, you a really large portion of food. Fairly good prices and amazing food. P.s. They know how to cook bacon right ~ crispy and delicious.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Fancy classic rock style dinner. Fair prices for tasty food (if you are american food lover). Smart choise of cocktails.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We went there for our last dinner in Chiang Mai, little tired with Thai food, an we were not disappointed. Food was absolutely amazing, great burgers and appetizers (best onion rings and fries Ive ever had). Our server didn't really speak english, so there were few confusions but over all it was great ;-) if we are ever back in Chiang Mai we'll definietly visit again.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: 'Rock Me Burgers' has an amazing selection of burgers! The meals are massive and everything we tried was excellent. The Philly cheesesteak was one of the best I've ever had, and the burgers were outstanding (and huge!). The sides were also excellent, particularly the onion rings. The milkshakes are authentic and very tasty. Try the coconut milkshake! The service was also great. The staff was friendly, helpful, and came around often to offer help.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After spending more than a week in Thailand and always having Thai food for lunch and dinner (which was excellent, most of the time), my husband and I suddenly felt like eating burgers. And when we want to eat burgers, we mean it. No industrial burgers allowed!! So we bumped into this restaurant and bar, that looked 'just alright' from the outside. It was full, but I thought it was full because of the bar. So in a nutshell: This place really serves amazing, juicy and tasty burgers!!! And I mean it!! My husband had the rock me in heaven and I had the see you in hell (i could be wring about the names, but it had heaven and hell in it) and were blown away just after the first bite. Everything was perfect! Really one of the best burgers I have ever had! The second best after the one that I had when I was in Hamburg. For you who like something hot and spicy, I really recommend the "see you in hell" burger. I can't explain with words, I just had a really satisfied face after eating it. Don't think twice, if you are a burger lover, you will their burgers!! Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Ran in here late one night after a burger. I went to the middle of town first, as it was late. Walked into McDonald's and was absolutely offended by the prices. Everyone knows what that stuff costs and no, I'm not at all desperate enough to stand on a long line and pay those prices. Well, enough about where I didn't go! I sat on the counter here at Rock Me Burger and ordered the signature burger. Bacon extra as I wanted. I'm thinking I should have asked for well done bacon, as it wasn't quite done. I did like the fact that the hamburger itself was not frozen, at least not then. The meal itself was professional in presentation and appealing. I went over the top and ordered a strawberry milkshake as well. It was quite good really. It was odd though,it was missing something. The burger itself had a lack of flavor I couldn't erase. No amount of salt or ketchup could repair it. As has been stated before; great for South East Asia. I know that's not a glowing report but that's all I got. One tip though- it came with a handful of fries but the menu doesn't read that way. I ordered fries and couldn't get to them at all as there were enough on the plate. I made a comment to that effect to the server and he took them off. Better result than that can't be had! Try it. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you want a good burger anywhere in Thailand, you could be looking a long time. This place is a good bet given the dearth of great options here. It's on a busy side street and if you're flying solo, they have a neat bar along the sidewalk to eat at. As for the food, if this were in an American city, it would likely be considered above average. They stack them high and somewhat messy if you're into that kind of thing. The fries were very good, the buffalo wings rather average. But this isn't in America. Given it's here in Chiang Mai, or anywhere in Thailand, it's a solid choice. It's relative to the location, here where good western food is hard to find. It's new as of last year, modern and clean, well above typical Thai standards, so that counts for something. Prices are very reasonable. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A wide variety of well prepared burgers - what else you may ask for? Honestly, if you are in Thailand and ocasionaly still want some old fashioned American food - there is no better place for that in Chiang Mai. There is nothing fancy about the place, just does what it suppose to and does it well. Burgers are served on a big plate along with some French fries.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here with some friends after a couple of recommendations. We all ordered various burgers and all that arrived were huge and accompanied with chips and onion rings. I will call these gourmet burgers as they are different to what us Aussies are used to but still worth trying. Will definitely go back again when I am in the mood for a hit of western style food.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I'm American and I've lived in Asia for six months and this might be one of the best sandwiches I've ever had in my whole life. I'm not a beef eater so I had a fish sandwich but it was incredible. The bread was just fantastic. I recommend sitting outside at the bar to watch them cook- it's great. I was really doubtful at first since it's a hotel restaurant (owned by the Raming Lodge) but it did not disappoint!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Tasty burgers and generous salads. Cute concept, well-executed. Another example of how Raming Lodge is trying to accommodate guest's needs.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Wanted to try out this place after reading it in a magazine. We went there last Saturday evening for dinner. We all wanted to eat burger so this is the right place. There are various types of burger to choose from and to us their burger were juicy and the buns also had flavour. We ordered 4 kinds of burger and they all pretty good. The milkshakes are also pretty ... thick and creamy. The portion is also good size and with the price of the burgers are within 200baht ... not bad at all. The service is ok ... the staff are nice and polite but nothing special. The restaurant is located in the city centre in a popular busy night life area. There are both inside as well as outside seating areas. Plus additional outdoor bar style sitting area where you can enjoy the street view and the making of the burgers. If you fancy a burger then it is worth a visit. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We've eaten here a few times during our stay in Chiang Mai and have always left satisfied (and full!) The burgers are great but what we've really enjoyed are the ribs and chicken skewers. We could not believe the size of the portions, enough for two to share and well worth the price. One of the servers we've gotten to know there, Deng, is always very friendly and attentive. Great place!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: As a change from Thai food we dropped in for a burger. Restaurant looks good so gave it a go. The patties tasted good, you order whether you want it rare, medium or well done. They come on a timber plate, fairly juicy and a reasonable size feed. Staff were friendly but after finishing the burgers they left us alone for quite a while until we asked for the bill. They could be trained better to be a bit more attentive.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The burgers are ok... Super greasy and not very special.. Also the burgers are not that big.. I would give it a 6 out of 10..

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Been here with my friend, I had the Double Pork Burger and my friend had the Double Beef Burger. We both agreed that it's one of the best burgers we've ever had. From my personal experience, I thought the pork had a burst of flavour, the bun and cheese were soft and combined well, tomatoes very fresh, overall a great burger. The burgers came with a side of fries and onion rings, which were both on par with other burger joints. Our meal ended up being cheaper than the McDonalds meal we had the day before, and much much tastier! The only negative I could think of was that the waiter that served us was somewhat confused, and had to come back and review our order two times because of what I assume is just a language barrier, but it really had a minimal impact on our experience. By contrast, the owner is great and apologized on his behalf and made sure we were being looked after. Highly recommend coming down Loi Kroh road and checking out this great dining experience. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here twice in our week in Chiang Mai. Had the standard burger both times, 180thb which is so cheap for what you get, beautiful burger with tasty chips. If you want an American style burger with great service and music here's your place. My GF had the chicken skewer and it was hugeeee, and really tasty too. Shame they don't have these places in the UK :)

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Love their Pork Aloha burger with the black buns.It has some interesting tastes.. The meat patty has balanced taste - not too tasty but not bland. It looks like a huge serving but it's actually not that big. A little to the pricey side but I can understand because it's in the touristy area. Wanted to try the pork ribs but it only comes in one size, probably one person can't finish it alone. Next time! Service is good. If you are craving for gourmet' burgers, give this place a try!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: After a hot day, all I wanted was a cold beer and some solid American food. The burger had some good flavor, but the patty had the texture and shape of being something that just came out of a box. Maybe this is the norm for Thailand and I'm just naive, but I was expecting more for a specifically burger restaurant. Good wait staff however - lots of people working, which meant there was alway someone walking by. And onion ring was good as well.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here quite a few times during our two months in Chiang Mai. The food has been fairly consistent my only complaint being that the sauce on the melted cow sandwich seems to vary somewhat. But my boyfriend loved the burgers and said the ribs were some of the best he had anywhere not just in SEA. Service is ok. The environment is a little odd, they are clearly aiming for a hard rock cafe feel but the interior is definately missing the mark and feels a bit like a canteen. But overall great dining experience if I was in Chiang Mai I would definately return.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Stopped here for lunch as fancied a burger. Sat outside on the bar stools where you watch them freshly prepare them. The burger I chose was very tasty and of good quality and the decent chips went well with it. Good menu with other things than burgers on it

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Great food great price and very friendly staff. The best burger in cm. I will be going back every week.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: The marketing of this place is very enticing. The photo and descriptions of their burgers really make you want to stop and try one. They are, indeed, impressive. Large size, with various choices. Some people may like the taste, but I wasn't overly impressed. Then again, it's not easy to find a good burger in Thailand. The Rock Me burgers are not bad, but most people can do better preparing your own at home. Certainly beats the fast food burgers, but at a much steeper price, of course. Located right on the main strip of pubs and bars, so it makes for a good food break between pub stops.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Rock me burgers and bar has the best burgers by far in thailand! I've seen some pretty awesome burgers in my day and none compare! The service is amazing, the music is rockin, and a chill atmosphere to top it off. Definitely a must see if you are up in chaing mai! Kudos Rock me burgers. Ill be back!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Went here for a dinner with a few of my friends because I heard they had some good burgers at Rock Me Burgers. Unfortunately, they were far from good. We all ordered our burgers well done and what we got was something like "ultra-raw". One of my friends even asked them to make another one which they agreed, the new one was still raw (it took them 20 minutes to make the new burger). I wouldn't suggest this place to anyone who likes to eat burgers (real american burgers).

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We discovered Rock Me when walking to the Old Town. It was a little pricey but well worth it as the burgers are massive and good quality. We decided on the double burgers, and could bearly move after we had eaten. Both the ouside bar and inside space was nicely decorated.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I've had many burgers but the quality and size is something I really didn't expect!! Absolutely brilliant bit pricey for Thai but well worth it

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: When you want something else than thai food...then this is à good choice. Maybe the chips can be a little bit more.but i eat really good here

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Had the cheese burger with the beef, rather than pork, patty. It was okay. The current trend of huge, unwieldy, burgers with giant patties is not to my personal taste. The patty itself is quite dense, as though packed together with machine strength pressure. Something I've experienced only in SEA. Otherwise a pleasant enough experience. Avoid the lime juice. It tastes like chemicals.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: A very nice bar situated in a busy part of Chiang Mai. Very friendly staff who made you feel very welcome and nothing was too much trouble. We visited on more than one occasion and were recognised each time we returned. Definitely recommend a meal, which were tastefully presented, along with a drink whilst soaking up the atmosphere. The best Singapore Sling in Chiang Mai! Dang the man is the waiter you need!!

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Being from the US I was looking for an open flamed burger here in Chiang Mai and finally tried Rock Me on Loi Kroh. This burger holdd its own to USDA ground beef. One half pound grilled to order, melted cheese and fresh lettuce and tomato on a solid toasted bun. Have gone back 3 times for my burger fix. Kudos to Rock Me Burger Grille. Mike Pattavina

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I went once and that was enough for me. I didn't pick up on any of the rude staff stuff that the other guy said. I ordered the main burger which I think was called a rock me burger or something. I thought with the place being as big as a pub that the menu might've been bigger but it was quite a small selection of burgers and that was about it. A couple of minutes after I sat down 2 thais came in and sat down and ordered. We were the only people ordering food. There were 2 or 3 guys outside drinking and that was it. So the burger took an incredible amount of time to arrive at around 25 minutes. There may have been some problem in the kitchen as I swear I heard the sizzle of a burger going on to a grill just after I ordered. Anyway the 2 Thai people got there 2 meals well before me which to me didn't quite make sense. When my burger finally arrived it was well presented which was the highlight I guess. The patty itself was ok. I requested medium. What I got was a little under medium but that could be debated. The bread was nicer than most burgers. It tasted like how bread tastes when you dip it or fry it on the fat from a roast. So I guess they are frying the buns in fat or something. The egg was actually a bit of omelette and it had a little bit of shell in it. forgivable. I think as the omelette was a cut out wedge it was prepared earlier. Still tasted ok so no issue. actually I tasted what i thought was hollandaise sauce which was nice but I can't be sure as I was too busy stuffing it in my gob to check. Also the onion ring and chips were nice. There were only 7 chips in total but i'm not complaining, I understand they are just a garnish. Overall it was a decent burger but too much of a wait for me to want to return. A bit rare as well. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I have put the title in the past tense because I would like to think the mediocre experience I felt I had may have been due in part to my choices. I sat outside, I like sitting at bar height but you are right by the roadside and that is a little intrusive given the road is Loy Khro. I ordered a plain burger which arrived dressed boutique style with 4 wedge style chips (fries for you US readers) anchored to a wooden platter by a steak knife. There was an onion ring along side the chips and burger as well. The burger itself had a good amount of meat but little seasoning with a sort of milky cheese air to it, there was a good slice of tomato an a large leaf of lettuce that promptly flew to the floor to escape attack. Burgers to me are tasty comfort food and in that this venue failed, 4 chips and an onion ring all neatly arranged does not hit the button especially when not far away there are some really good burgers on offer. Would I go back, I may try inside and a different dish. Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: If you're craving for a Western fix, this is the place. The meat is delicious and the rest of the burger is tasty. Makes me hungry writing this! I went there 3 times during my stay in Chiang Mai. The burgers are quite big so you might want to share with a friend. The price is okay compared to Western prices but it's quite expensive compared to other meals in CM.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: I was there with 4 friends for dinner. I ordered baked potatoes and chicken in a wooden box. After 5 minutes they told me they haven't the patatoes but they didn't think to handle me the menu back so I can ordered something else. My friends had the time to finished their dishes before mine was served ... And it was just an over breaded chicken. (There was only 10 personns in the restaurant ... so can't understand why it took so long) I didn't like the thai live singer who played very soporific guitar music that night. So for me it was a bad experience but my friends like the burgers and want to come back ... Read less

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: We had the double burger and steak and cheese burger. Both fantastic. Really great food with live singer.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: It's very difficult to find a decent burger in Thailand. But now I think I've found it...The burgers here are how it should be. Tasty and well cooked meat, beautiful condiments and an overall great burger. If you're looking to have a break from the lovely Thai food and want something a little more familiar from back home, Rock Me Burger is the place to go. It's easy to find on Loi Kroh St.

Restaurant_Name: Rock Me Burger & Bar Nimman Branch
Detail: Not often I would take the extra time to add a restaurant to Tripadvisor, but this new burger spot (opened Feb 24, 2014) deserves a look by anyone passing through the area near the night market in Chiang Mai. The chicken sandwich has a great, light and crispy breading, as do the onion rings, and the burgers match up among the best I've had in Southeast Asia. Presentation is also impressive considering the relative speed and affordability of the food. My chocolate milkshake was served thick with two Kit Kats sticks and a sprinkling of mini chocolate chips, and all the burgers came with a handful of steak fries and an onion ring on a wooden log platter. Service was very accommodating and friendly, and everyone from families and couples to groups of friends and single backpackers seemed to be enjoying the vibe. Read less
