Detail: Wandered to here as it was near our hotel. Glad we did! Honest restaurant serving locals(we were the only westerners in the place) Food was authentic, tasty and moderately priced. Service was excellent, friendly, despite the language barrier. If you are in the area pop in, it just might surprise you, as it did us!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Restaurant is over 23 years old... so one of the first restaurants in the Nimman area. Restaurant may not look much, but food is really good.... especially their northern Thai style dishes. What makes their dishes so good is they use high quality raw materials. Loved the Thai sausage (very meaty and not at all fatty like the ones you get in the local market), crab meat curry (lots of crab meat), Khao Soi (beef curry in coconut milk topped with crispy noodles). When you go there, don’t ask for the menu... just tell the waiter what kind of food you don’t eat and get them to serve you their house specialties. The owners told me that they will rebuild the place next year... so looking forward to their new restaurant in my next visit to Chiang Mai😊 Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: A lovely restaurant serving delicious thai food at a good price. Highly recommend to anyone looking for food in the area. Staff were excellent and couldnt be more helpful.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: This is a great neighborhood gem. The food is decently priced. Had khao sot and thought it was great!!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: This was a regular weekend staple for us as it was pleasant, not too expensive, and high quality Thai food. When it was sold several months ago, we went in and noticed right away the staff was not as professional or friendly and food came out cold. This place used to be packed on weekends with local Thai familys and tourists alike. We went back about a week ago after a long day and we were hungry so we stopped in. You used to see someone with a mop in hand all the time as it has indoor and outdoor seating. This time it was filthy. Food was okay, service was slightly improved, but it just isn’t that good anymore. There are better places now :(

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I last ate here in 2009 and returned tonight with some local friends. The food was delicious, the portions generous, and the prices very reasonable. The staff was very friendly, polite, and smiling. The atmosphere is casual and the place is clean and inviting.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We ate here on the 1st Jan 2018, after receiving a recommendation from a tour guide. We were very disappointed. First of all our waiter couldn’t tell us what was in some dishes on the menu. When the food arrived it was overcooked & cold. The last and most worrying was the rudeness of our waiter throughout. He obviously was in a rush to leave work as he brought us the bill before we finished our meal. He then hovered over our table until the bill was payed (I had to leave the table in order to enter credit card details at counter). Prior to us leaving, while waiting for my wife to return from the restroom, he again hovered over the table making a point of continually looking at his watch. Just to note, we were not there for more than an hour so definitely did not overstay our welcome. I definitely would not recommend this restaurant. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: The food isn't bad but the staff must have been recruited from the extras on a zombie movie: there was no attempt to smile, make any effort to communicate (I speak Thai) or make you ever want to go back. If you don't care about customer service and like a bit of lugubriousness in your server then this place is for you. Poor.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Saw this restaurant online and decided to try. Did not disappoint and good was great. Authentic Thai cuisine

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: My wife and I come here often, and I am particulary partial to their somtam gai yang (papaya salad with grilled chicken). They have a good selection of dishes that are not easy to find in most tourist spots inclusing some northern food. If you want a burger, there is a place right across the street that they have menus for at khun mor. It might be one of the better burgers you can get in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Great selection of local fare- from khao soi to pork noodles to the dishes with rice etc.a lot of things to sample at great value,you'll be spoilt for choices.the space in your stomach will be the only issue.comfortable sitting with air con for children as well.definitely one of the better casual dining place for local food in town-reco for lunch

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Stopped for lunch. Great food with locals. Only difficulty with service was a slight lack of English initially but they got the English speaker to help out. No problem! Great yellow curry and chicken basil.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Really delicious Thai and Lanna food. The restaurant is cleaner than other local restaurants. Reasonable price. We visited this restaurant twice during our visit in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We have been eating there for over ten years, long before Nimman became trendy and when it was just a hang out spot CMU students and staff. We always had satisfying lunch at khun Mor. Never had dinner there. The menus have expanded over the years. Price also went up significantly (so as real estate prices in Nimman). Our Thai friends who work at CMU are no longer regulars as a result. Anyway, our favorites are crispy whole fish with spicy green mango sauce, stirred fried crispy soft shell crabs in yellow curry powder and eggs, northern style sausage, (although you are better off buying it in any local market for for much cheaper), fresh crab meat fried rice, kao soi, all kids of fried noodles. Being able to speak Thai definitely helps. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Went there because saw good reviews. Disappointed. Food and service average, at best to say. Not cheap, nor was it expensive, but certainly not worth it. Plenty of restaurants serving more tasty and cheaper food.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: This is one of those restaurants you are glad you finally went in. 3rd visit in 3 weeks. Probably the best Thai food for its genre. Amazing menu ewe are working through. Not much English spoken but that is not a problem. Food is so tasty and some I haven't seen in other restaurants. Rich curry with crab. Real lump crab! Decadent fried omelet with spicy pad Thai. Omelet is somehow shredded and deep fried. Squid lime hotspot. Many som tams to choose from, I prefer som tam Thai. Spicy though, if that's a problem leave that alone. Fresh!!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Small group for a birthday. Mixed up orders, still waiting 1.5+ hours after ordering for food to come out. They 'forgot' to tell us they were out of spring rolls after 45 mins waiting and Spring rolls being sent to another table. Some orders didn't come out, without explanation, and the food that did come out was overly sweet.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Everything in this restaurant is delicious . I love northern sausage . very tasty !!! Easy to find . the owner is very nice and good services Superb !!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Been many years ago with my wife and the food was excellent. Today we ordered the The mixed starting platter, mixed vegetable rolls. Food was medio. Fried chicken pale crust color. Service just average. Small portions for what we paid. Total bill 500 baht for 2 dishes, water and lemon juice. Luckily there are many new restaurants open who can do a much better job. What a pity. Be Interesting to know reasons. New cook? Owner? Portions just to small

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Not cheap (not expensive either) as you are in a trendy neighborhood. We went there based on travelfish review and were a bit disappointed. The food was ok. We definitely had better / more authentic in other places

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I have been to Khun Mor several times 2007-2008 and then a few times in 2015 and again now in 2016. The food quality has almost been the same - so good food. Although prices a bit on upper side. Atmosphere has not changed much in open air but fully covered area but air conditioned area has become bigger over the years. Service is surely where lot of improvement is possible. Please see Khun Mor management. They do a okay job but if they a bit better then would be so great. This is not just a restaurant rather quite a place in Chiangmai which was setup by legendary doctor practicing medicine in Chiangmai with unique recipes. This time masaman curry was not available at all. Not today not this month told the people serving. Boat noodles khao Soi etc amazingly good. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Inexpensive restaurant with reliable thai favourites. Unprentious good food. Not for special occasions but worth the visit

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Have come here 3 times over the last 6-7 years. While the food is still top rate (best boat noodles you will ever taste), the service seems to be getting worse e.g. waiter forgot to pick up one dish from kitchen, served wrong drinks. All in all though, would still recommend.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: not very cheap compared to other places but the service was fast, food was good and they accepted credit card! i went back two more times to eat the soft shell curry!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I was there for 5 nights in Chiang Mai and went to Khun Mor on the last night, only cause someone recommended it to us.Thought it was pretty average to be honest, the little roadside garage eatery right opposite this restaurant was so much more tastier and enjoyable.The satays we had ordered were pretty toughand really not upto the mark, the khao soi was good though.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Foods were okay, but thinking about the price and amount? Not very satisfied. You can have better and more foods in another restaurants.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Our first meal in Chiang Mai, it's on the way to iBerry, easy to find. Special taste of Tom Yam Soup, different from others. Pineapple fried rice is delicious.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Stopped here for lunch on a searingly hot day, as it was close to the hotel. Very good, friendly service. We had the selection of starters with som tam, barbecued pork and some fantastic deep fried fish. All very well cooked

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Our first meal in Chiang Mai, this place was around the corner from our hotel. It was solid, the price was reasonable. We enjoyed the meal, nothing fancy here, just consistent northern Thai cuisine.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I ordered chicken with coconut rice and veggie spring rolls, tasted but left it on the table. The bad experience cost me 250 baht.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We made a quick stop for lunch. They have variety of choices for lunch. Presentation of food is good but taste very sweet so more like for tourist. The restaurant has air conditioned room and terrace without air con.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We should have guessed that an empty place would be bad... The dishes are not fresh (mushrooms and green veggies were probably outdated since we had stomach aches), even the rice was not good. The beers we ordered came warm. The worst of all: it's twice the price of any other Thai restaurant nearby. Only good point: the waitress was really nice. Better go on the other side of the street, it's more authentic, tastes way better and is cheaper.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: A Chiang Mai local brought us for some solid khao soi and boat noodles. Both were delicious along with the amazing starter of nam prik - a spicy dipping sauce - with sausages and fried pork skin. Great place for groups.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: The Resturant was much spacious than I expected. There is an air-condition room with an extra 5 baht charged per person and I think it is worthy. The food was good with many choices and I definitely visit again and there is happy hour from 1700 hrs to 1900hrs with price go down by 1/3 for some dishes.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: When in Chiangmai I always visit Khun Mor's in Soi 17. The atmosphere is great. Many locals dine here, thus the food must be good. The food is great, but spicy. Try the local sausages and the minced beef with herbs (laap). Besides that, there is a lot to choose from the well illustrated menu. You have to be a bit proactive to get the staff's attention. They are busy and only few seem to speak a bit of English. Nevertheless a place to come back to.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Going to jump on board with most of the reviews on here and agree, pretty terrible experience. Wait staff was not super friendly. Would drop off our food without even saying a word or even putting it infront of us, it was just as if he was chucking his car keys on the table or something. We ordered two dishes one of which they were out of, which was fine so we ordered something else instead..however each time we tried to order the other item we had a new wait staff member coming over to tell us they were out of the original item we ordered... We had the same conversation with 3 seperate wait staff before they finally got it. English is not great which in all reality is fine as we are in thailand but definitly made it hard to communicate. We got our two dishes and one looked nothing like the picture, said fresh lime and pickled cabbage which was no where to be found, the meal was luke warm as well. Prices are not terrible but for the service and food not worth it. I wouldn't go back. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We arrived at 9 knowing they close at 10, we asked if we could smoke they said yes, we ordered various dishes and beers. Once the beers were served they announced that 3 of the 4 dishes were unavailable. When I lit my first cigarette they asked me to go out (it's a roofed terrace). We paid 600 bath and couldn't order a dessert because apparently they wish to close early. Right now it's 9:40 and we have to hurry to finish our beers to let them go home. All the shutters are closed, we wonder when they will turn off the lights on us. BTW I love thai food, was saying before coming here that I had never been disappointed by restaurants here, and now my plate is still full because this fried rice was the fatest thing I ever had (and I went several times to US!). And I am hungry, ready to have some lovely street food far away from this place. Enjoy! Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: And both times service and food were great! Affordable though a little bit more costly for Thai but well worth it. The atmosphere is great and open

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We usually visit this restaurant when we are in Chiang Mai but were utterly disappointed. Ordered the new special which was beef shank with noodles, well the beef was inedible, so tough literally could bounce off the floor. Called the waiter across and explained the situation (in Thai) so off he went to the kitchen and that was the last we saw of him. Suddenly it was as if we had Ebola, nobody would come to our table to sort it out and when the account came the different waiter pretended not to know anything about it. Better value and better food available all around Nimmanhemin without having to put up with this type of rubbish.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We had read that this place was fantastic but we were not that impressed. The atmosphere was decent but the food was just average. We had fried pork skins, chicken wings, pad Thai with deep fried egg and still my rice. Everything was ok but nothing was great. For over $10 we would go somewhere else next time.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I've become a bit of a Thai noodle addict of late, and love to stop by Khun Mor Cuisine as a huge part of their menu is Thai noodles. The food is delicious, I've actually eaten here a number of times and haven't been disappointed. The service is fast, and the restaurant walls are open air which creates a nice ambiance. If it's too hot out, they have an air conditioned room in the back. They charge an extra buck or so to use it, I never have, but there have been people back there each time I've been there. If love Thai noodles, check it out. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Delicious food taste, we have been here more than 3 times now. The northern sausage was really good, less fat than other places. However, Kao Soi was not that good last time we were there. The menu is variety and creative. The location is right in the middle of Namman soi 17. The price is quite reasonable. The only thing is the restaurant is quite big and has many of big pillars in the middle so it's a bit hard to get the waiters's attention or service. Beside that, everything is good so far.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Went there yesterday based on trip advisor comments, but it was so bad! Lousy service, they forgot our drinks and the food was not good and overpriced.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: In my wanderings around Niemanhaeman I'd picked this out as a place I wanted to try. Well I have and won't again. I had Deep Fried Noodles with Vegetables and Sea Bass. The noodles were not deep fried and the whole thing swam in a glutinous MSG-laced gloup. Service was minimally interested: I asked which of two wi-fi I should connect to and was told the wrong one. When I enquired about the Password the waitress looked over towards the bar, said "5" and walked away. So I went over to the bar and took down the details. When I asked for the bill it was put on the table as far away almost as possible from me. When she returned with the change my waitress lingered beside me as I set about collecting it until I told her to clear the used dishes, etc. Just before leaving I noticed a door to a room off the open terrace-like area. On the window it said:" Air condition room 5 baht per person". It rather summed up the place. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: This is my first time at this restaurant, the food is very nice, the place is very comfortable and relaxing.However, my orders were taken incorrectly. I had to wait a little long before my correct order arrives. The food did made up for the long waits though.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Test's not bad but price is too high than food quality . The worst thing is hair in my food and big rat ran out the kitchen to me, booooo man that make me up set. What a crap

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Even if Khun Mor had the best food in Nimman, which it does not, it would get 1 star for the abominable service. Not only does the wait staff not speak English, Chinese, or any other international language, they have no idea what's on the menu. When I pointed to two entrees that had exactly the same descriptions in English but different prices, the waiter was first unable to grasp the question and then unable to explain the disparity. After I suggested 5 times that he ask the cook, he decided he would ask the cook. Upon returning, he explained that the cheaper entree came with rice. After considerable prodding, he was finally able to speculate that the more expensive entree had MORE VEGETABLES! Then there was the discussion about whether I wanted ice in my glass of water... FORGET KHUN MOR. It' s simply not worth the frustration. Go somewhere that farang business is valued enough to hire staff that can actually communicate! Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We were looking for Khun Churn restaurant but it is moved so we decided to try this restaurant. It turn out to be a really good choice! There are plenty of choices on the menu, we liked everything we ordered. The restaurant is spacious and have two big rooms with air-conditioner so it is a good place to escape from the hot sun and get a yummy meal after walking around the neighborhood.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Overpriced for Thailand standard. On a side note, The neighborhood is nice to wander about, it's a mini hipster area with nice little cafes and and designer shops to look at random stuff.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Ordered the clear tom yum soup; pad thai; roast pork noodle and kway teow soup. The tom yum soup was really salty and it wasn't spicy nor sour to my disappointment. The roast pork noodle and thai iced tea was good, the rest is really mediocre. Will suggest you to try some place else for thai food. The service was good though.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We went to this restaurant partly because Khun Churn next doors had moved away and we were pretty hungry. Also, they had a long list of thai foods sounding good, and lots of vegetarian options as well. The service was really friendly (I guess there can be a cultural difference here; some of the previous reviews state the service is unfriendly - maybe you can feel so if coming from english speaking culture, where waiters are known to be very active and talkative, but for us coming from Fennoscandia, the privacy we got felt really good - I'm not so comfortable with someone strange asking all the time if I am okay, that feels very rude to me) and they came to us immediately when we waved hand and smiled at them. Food was very spice without asking for it which is always splendid. The athmo isn't anything special though but it's worth the tastes and friendliness of the service! Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We visited for dinner one evening and wished we hadn't. The service is truly, truly dreadful. We were seated fairly quickly, handed menus and had a drinks order taken and delivered, and placed our food order. Around ten minutes later one of our mains was delivered (what happened to the entrees?) by a non-smiling, non-talking waiter and that was the last we saw of any of the staff. The dish that we did get (BBQ chicken with coconut rice and papaya salad) was just OK, nothing to rave about. We waited 25 minutes more and nothing. Not one staff member came near us. We left enough baht on the table to cover what we did get and off we went - and no one even noticed we were leaving. Don't even bother. Really. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: The choice of dishes looks good and someday i may get to try it but after going there twice and never having anyone take my order, i have left after 15 minutes. I do carry my laptop and go online when i am there (the WiFi is good) so maybe that contributes to my experience but i do leave the menu open with the edge hanging past the edge of the table. i have had staff look at the open menu and keep walking on. i could get up and engage the staff to take my order but with countless other options in the area, i would prefer to give them my business. i think i will continue to make a short stop there for the WiFi and see if anyone ever takes my order. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I have been many times here with my boyfriend. We loves foods here a lot ! Fair price and good taste . Place is very clean , staffs are good speaking in english.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Great place to have thai food.the price and quality was great. the service was excellent. Really nice place to have dinner with your wife!!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Seemed they presented noodles as their favorite dishes. It was good but there were many traditional thai food with reasonable price around that area. Personally if you look for fair price with good taste meal, I will head up to other restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I've been coming here for years, WAS my favourite restaurant in the Nimman area for awhile and I still go there but the service the last time was brutal. I mean it sucked!!! The restaurant was empty (two tables) and the floor staff of 4 just stood by the cash register texting and being useless. I walked up to get the menus and thought that might inspire one of them to take a drink order to start the standard dining out experience. It didn't, in fact I ended up having to walk up again to have a server take our order. Mind you we were sitting on the small patio just off the main dining area but they knew we were there. The order was made and the dishes arrived out of sync and in an odd sequence. The coffee ordered by my partner didn't arrive til' well after the meal and throughout the meal I had to get up to retrieve condiments, napkins and yes cutlery. Perhaps the worst service I've been witness to as each and every time I got up to get something no one even flinched. The floor staff is undeserving of this job as they show no interest in serving food. Nothing wrong with having no interest in serving people food, just don't continue to do the job if that's the case. I hope the owner/manager reads this and acts on it because the kitchen delivers on their end of it. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: The best vegetarian food I have eaten I Thailand and have been here a yr. fantastic at 129 bahts for all you can drink eat salads galore and lovely deserts. Perfect for a quick lunch on the run or an afternoon of chatting the day away. Only negative it's only open from 11.00-2.30, but has a la carte . GO THERE IT'S AMAZING and the staff our so friendly. Don't forget the lemon grass juice it's to die for. Definitely no need for Dinner after a lunch like that . Words can describe how wonderful it is. ENJOY, you will .....

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Noodles are okay. However I like the durian sticky rice desert. It's awesome! Besides, the wifi is not reliable that I can't access it in the restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: The food at Khun Mor's has been good the several times that I've been there. As a lady on a budget, I oftentimes stick to their noodles and other less expensive fare, but everything I have tried is delicious!

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I live in Chiang Mai and love the food at Khun Mor, which means doctor in Thai. They specialize in noodles, but they have a great menu with a wide selection of foods, mostly Thai. However, I have taken other Western people here, and there is always plenty of the menu that they can eat. The food is very good, and the price is right. They make an excellent noodle dish where you get to pick the kind of noodle and the meat, and it is delicious. However, it does contain animal blood,, but I recommend it for its delicious flavor. Among the Thais this is one of the most popular dishes in the place,

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Really like this place. Service is good, food comes quick, and its always tasty. The sour pork and their super fresh salads are really good.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We visited this one evening during our stay in November 2012. We chose it based on what's available in the local area (limited) and wanting to try some traditional Thai cooking. We arrived and were shown to our table promptly and while the restaurant wasn't busy it took us a while to order food and drinks. The food was ok when it arrived - nothing to write home about, it was hot and tasty but nothing amazing. We had starters and a main course and we were halfway through our main course before having to physically get up and ask for our drinks. Turns out they'd run out of beer (despite indicating we could see it in the fridge?!) so agreed on two cokes so we could finish our meal. It was a painful experience which I don't think you can just put down to the fact we don't speak the language. To be honest we finished as quickly as we could and left. I wouldn't hurry returning here if I find myself in Chiang Mai anytime soon. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Visited with my wife, having eaten here on a number of occasions and found the food to be good. We arrived around 7.45PM and there were only about 3 tables taken. We were offered a table and the waiter left us a menu. So far so good. Sadly that's as good as it got. Ten minutes later the waiter had not bothered returning and we eventually managed to attract his attention, not an easy task as he seemed determined to avoid eye contact. We asked for two soft drinks and were told that they had run out of soda water. Undeterred, we eventually found 2 drinks they were able to provide and we ordered these. As we had already chosen a starter and main course we tried to order these before the waiter disappeared back into the Khun Mor home for uninterested waiters. After some cajoling , the waiter conceded defeat and accepted that he would have to take our food order. We attempted to order 2 different starters and, by this time, were not entirely surprised to be told that neither of these were available. The waiter wandered away to clear up another table. We wandered off to find a restaurant which offered food and drink. Clearly a restaurant trying to live on past glories. A great shame but clearly they have given up caring about pesky customers. After all if the waiters are happy, what else matters? Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: This place serves both Thai n Northern Thai cuisines. Said to be open by a doctor, now if only hospital food taste this good. I returned for a second time to tried out other items on the menu. Fried big rice noodles to me is a must. The place has both non AC area n an AC place n is mozzie free. It's always a good sign when u see local dining here. Meaning it's local n not a tourist trap. Try it.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: I came across this place by accident. I was tired and hot and I just wanted a place to rest for a while. I was impressed by the variety of the menu, though many things on it have a "cancel' label. It's good that they have many vegetarian choices. I am not a vegetarian but I decided to try a few veggie dish. So I ordered a veggi green curry (the manager said it's medium spicy), veggi spring rolls and a fried tofu and mushroom. All were delicious, except the mushroom were not soft and juicy enough. I'm a mushroom lover! I spent about 1.5 hours there, enjoying the free wifi. I usually do not like oily Thai food but this place's food is fresh and not oily. It is really my taste. Definitely will go again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: We were first taken here 5 years ago and it's still fantastic! The menu is seriously extensive- around 20 pages of gorgeous food photography, informing you of the level of spice in the dishes and is totally drool-worthy. This place has a great reputation amongst local Thais and little wonder, the food ticks all the boxes. Their drinks are popular, as is their Northern Thai specialty sampling dishes, the tom yum goong had 6 jumbo prawns/shrimps in it (we both like spicy food but this was VERY spicy!), the noodle dishes were devoured by our children. The prices are on the more expensive end for Thai food restaurants (I'm talking around 80B for fried noodles so it's very cheap compared to Thai food in the West but at local Thai restaurants it's less than half that). The food is beautifully presented, really fresh and flavoursome and good value for money. You can choose between air-conditioned seating or sitting in the restaurant, which has no windows so is like alfresco dining with a roof! Khun Churn, a vegetarian buffet, is across the road and it has some pretty good reviews on TA. We asked to go in and look around at the food before deciding whether to eat there or not. We definitely did not regret walking out and heading back to Khun Mor's which ended up being cheaper than what it would have cost our family to eat a vegetarian meal at Khun Churn's. Located in a hip part of Chiang Mai, this place is definitely worth a visit to eat seriously amazing Thai cuisine. Read less

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Walking in the area looking for a place to eat my wife exclaimed that she recognized the name, as a well recommended restaurant owned by a doctor, so we had to try it out. It had a good choice of Thai style cuisine (including meat dishes), solid in presentation and taste. Looking around you’ll see well off Thai upper middle class that reflects the standard of this establishment. Both indoors air-condition seating or open air comfortable and clean dining. It’s situated on a side street with free parking on the other side that’s a major plus.

Restaurant_Name: คุณหมอคูซีน
Detail: Glad to be the first to review this place. Our taxi driver/tour guide brought us to Khun Mors for lunch. We sampled Khao Soi, Tom Yom Noodle, and Chinese chicken noodle, and the famous lanna style sausage. All were outstanding. The wife especially love the Khao Soi which is a famous lanna style noodle dish in Northern Thailand. Khun Mors has both A/C and non A/C rooms at same price. Total for the three of us (with drinks) came to about 450B. Very reasonable indeed. It's a great find, off Soi 17 in NimmanHaemin area. By the way, we really enjoy this area which is quite trendy with many modern and upscale coffee houses and restaurant. Much better than the typical places in the tourist area like Night market. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Very generous menus but frozen meat and especially not terrible induction hobs to sear the meat.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I will preface this by saying I didn't get the KBBQ as I didn't have the time and needed a quicker meal. What I did get was the Ramyun and Heamuljeon seafood pancake. The Ramyun was disappointing as it had no flavor whatsoever than being spicy. It tasted like plain boiled noodles with oil sauce that had spice and nothing else. The seafood pancake was ok but in comparison to Japanese style Okonomiyaki I had at Botan restaurant a weak earlier it wasn't as good as that. Both the base amount of flavor in the plain pancake as well as dipping it in the sauces was not as much as Okonomiyaki. Okonomiyaki is better in my opinion due to the mayo and brown glaze sauce that usually goes on top of the pancake by default. Then considering the price for what I got I just felt it wasn't worth it. I am sure the KBBQ is good as other people say but not getting KBBQ at a KBBQ restaurant is a mistake I won't make again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: It was the first time that we visited this place. We chose for a barbeque formule 'à volonté'. Me, my wife and our kids. Delicious food, very friendly boss and assistants. They gave explanation about all dishes. We also ate the best kimchi ever. We did many many restaurants in the world in our live, but this one gets a place in our absolute top ranking. Love it!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I just don't understand all this enthusiasm about this restaurant. I would have given a ball if it wasn't for the staff who were so kind and friendly. We took practically the whole menu and there was no good thing. The only table near us did the same. Hard and tasteless meat even from a discount store... but have people who gave 5 balls ever eaten good Korean meat? Boh We finally got up and went to eat sausages on a cart right in front of the restaurant. And anyway, the fact that on a Sunday night there were only two tables is quite significant. Rejected

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We gave this place a 3 stars only because the atmosphere is very nice with the street view from the rooftop. The staff were very friendly. However, the good quality of this restaurant did not transferred to their foods. We ordered unlimited meat including beef. The meats were fresh enough but they weren’t very tender. The briskets we ordered were tough and chewy. As for their kimchi stew lacked in flavor.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Restaurant located on the first floor with outdoor terrace. The Korean barbecue is excellent. The waitress was very friendly and really wanted to do her job. However, she had great difficulty understanding what we were asking her. Have cocktails BEFORE food. They arrived after. And have the chickens breakdown WITH cocktails for the aperitif. The chickens arrived at the end of the meal.:-)

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Fantastic Korean barbecue restaurant. Great staff and location. Lots of choices on the menu. Definitely recommend this one.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I would say that the chicken meat is not that great. The beef and pork is okay. The meat is a bit too hard at times. Service is good.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Chef James offers excellent quality meat specifically the beef for Korean bbq at an excellent price. I grew up in K town in NYC and this beats all those restaurants out of the water. Had a food coma in the restaurant. Kimchi is homemade and out of this world. Worth the visit!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

They made one small mistake, owned up to it, and then the owner came out to apologize. For all of us, this was massive!!. We were all very impressed. Wonderful food, wonderful service.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Detail: Delicious food, the grill in the table is delicious and after a week of Thai I was ready for some BBQ beef, but it had to be good and that was it. Location is great because you don't notice that you are above a small shopping center because it is separate with an outside balcony

Detail: Modern and welcoming room, the staff is adorable and efficient, the manager takes great care. Ideal for discovering Korean cuisine, the BBQ is perfect. Special mention to the khimshi. Really a beautiful place!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: The food was amazing and the staff were so friendly and made sure all of your request where taken care of. Also lots of information about how Korean BBQ is properly done and what food is common. Would definitly go back. (Ps, The fried chicken with chili and lime topping was stunning good)

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: james (the owner) is an amazing host, explained all the dishes in detail to us, helping us to understand flavours and what we would like before we ordered. very accommodating for the vegetarian in our party, offering modifications to dishes in order for them to be vegetarian friendly. food was so delicious, a must visit if you enjoy korean food. thank you james!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Best korean food and experience i’ve had! From service to food and the sorroundings was top notch. They explain How they’ve prepared the food, from which season, and their purpose, aswell as health benefits! The food was unbelievably tasty, and price was reasonable aswell! Everyone greeted us when we arrived and when we left. Amazing! I advice everyone to take the trip and really experience korean bbq

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Amazing food and an amazing host! James was too kind and explained the menu to us. My boyfriend had the mackrel and i took the fire fried chicken Ramyeon. The spiciest dish, but they halved the sauce which made it a bit less spicy. Spiciest and best noodles i have ever had! We also had some Korean Chicken! To end the meal we had the chocolate brownie with vanilla icecream. James made our evening amazing! Loved the vibes! Definitely recommend it!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: The place is cool, I met the owner. His name is James, and then he so nice. If you want to eat big portion, you can order premium buffet, when you regular portion, you can BBQ Buffet. Whole the yangyeom jjigae is best i ever had, you must trying this. Rating for restaurant ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I love Korean food and I was so happy to find KOBQ in Chiang Mai. It’s the best Korean restaurant I’ve ever been to in Thailand. The place is spacious and modern, with a nice view of Nimman Road. The staff are very friendly and helpful, and they explain everything clearly. The food is amazing, fresh and flavorful. I tried the barbecue buffet and it was worth every baht. They have a variety of meats and vegetables that you can grill on your own table, and they also provide sauces, side dishes, and rice. The meat was tender and juicy, and the vegetables were crisp and tasty. I especially liked the pork belly and the kimchi. They also have some fusion dishes like bulgogi tacos and bibimbap that look very tempting. I will definitely come back to try them next time. KOBQ is a must-try Korean restaurant in Chiang Mai. It has great food, service, and atmosphere. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Delicious food and friendly, welcoming staff. We arrived with the kids in meltdown and the team gave us some space and explained how to approach the unfamiliar meal

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Great place with great owner and staff. We've been to many Korean bbq restaurants but this one was taste wise the best. Special thanks to Eak for the good service too

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Great food, but more importantly great service from Jum Mai. We needed some help ordering food and she helped us a lot and recommended us perfectly. She is also very sweet and patient. Our experience with this restaurant combined with the service is 5/5.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: There’s a Thai phrase “khong gin len” that means “food to eat for fun” which pretty much sums up KOBQ in Chiang Mai. As novice English travellers to Thailand we were looking for a celebratory birthday meal that was sit down rather than street, has variety and ideally some English speaking staff not that it would have mattered since the menu has good representative pictures with Thai and actual English. Although we love Thai cuisine we thought Korean might be educational and so it proved. Having eyeballed a few local diners selection we went mad and ordered the KOBQ Signature Buffet with the SOGOGI thick beef sirloin steak with a selection of dips, sauces and sides including Japanese rice (one between two or three is fine). In addition we had a particularly good DOENJANG JJIGGAE which is a traditional Korean soybean paste stew with mixed vegetables including mushrooms, onion, chilli, green beans and, I think, morning glory. Very tasty. The barbecue is clever and follows Szechuan and no doubt Korean tradition where you cook on a hotplate at the table which is great as you can pace yourself. We kicked off with the pork and griddled some garlic, mushrooms and chillies with a splash of seasoned sesame oil with soya sauce then experimented with some of the dozen dips one of which was a bit like Chinese gochujang that worked well. We loaded up lettuce leaves with meat, garlic, and Japanese spring onion which KOBQ brine and dried if I understood it correctly from James the owner. We then experimented with the dips like sweet chilli sauce (good with pork) and homemade kimchi and tim nam Thai seafood sauce which was excellent. Although everyone else was drinking local beer - all locals - we opted to drink a bottle of nice Australian Riesling which lasted two of us the meal taking in the palate cleansing broth that came with the buffet. At this point the heavens opened with a crack of thunder so we decided to try a bottle of Chardonnay and wait out the storm which had brought the terrace diners indoors. That meant we could see their choices. The KAELAN JJIM Korean steamed egg looked enticing as did the POTATO or SEAFOOD PAJEON which are billed as Korean pancakes but look like supercharged omelettes or Kati roll to us. Next time. Anyway, we had a great time and good food which is as much as you can ask for £95 gbp or about 3900 bhat which is a fraction of what you would pay in Lancashire let alone London. You could have a good meal for two for half the bhat. Excellent value. Not too high brow. Excellent food. Lots to choose from so it is what you make it. Attentive staff. Smart kitchen. Could be busy so book ahead. Recommended for foodies. And thank you James for the strawberry tequila shots! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Nothing remarkable about this restaurant either for its food or its decor. The light is harsh and the premises are basic without charm, a little worn by time and the many customers. We ate there out of desperation given the late hour. The staff were very friendly but we will not be returning. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: really good food, made by nice and courteous staff and a very personable owner. we were thrilled and it tasted good too. All the best for you, see you next time

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Warm friendly greeting from the staff. Delicious tasty food with great service. The boss even came and had a chat with us to check we were having a good time. 100% recommend this place,

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Excellent selection of BBQ items, great service provided from the entire staff and left completely satisfied with my meal. KOBQ had a really simple menu where you could choose from two buffet items and their other dishes were just as good. Highly recommend and would come back!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Very good food in a very nice place. Staff super kind. First time tryng korean bbq, great experience... let's try!!!!!!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Our family LOVED this place - really fun to cook our meat! The thin sliced brisket was out of this world! We loved the sauces, sides, and the drinks. The service was super friendly and helpful. Honestly this was the best Korean BBQ we’ve had and we’ve tried several in the US.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Boy, this is a tough one. The food here was pretty darn incredible. Every - single - item was delicious. The service was impeccable, and the price was completely within reason. But I have to have comfortable seating, decent lighting, and a pleasant atmosphere. This place was like eating at an American fast food joint with hard seating and bright florescent lighting. The kind of place that wants you to eat and leave. Literally made me uncomfortable. I did see outside seating on a kind of deck, so if I go back, I'll probably go there.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We enjoyed a wonderful meal here last week, first time for Korean bbq. Fantastic service and very tasty food, James has a top notch restaurant!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: This was our first experience with Korean BBQ. It was wonderful!! James the owner was very gracious and staff was courteous and attentive. So much fun to try the different meats and sauces. Thank you for an unforgettable night!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: The service was amazing. Special shout out to James whose advice on the dishes was so good. Food simply fantastic. Highly recommend

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Good food, good service. We had beef butfet. Beef is ok. I felt like pork and chicken barbecues are better.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Cool vibes at KOBQ. Very efficient and polite staff. Nicely spiced , zingy kimchi and signature meat cooked on the table..vegetarian gimbap and rameyeon dishes were tasty to. Very reasonably priced and a great memory worthy dining experience.staff went out of their way to get us our taxi.The main man has some Lancashire roots. Top bloke! Definitely recommend

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: They have all traditional Korean dishes. We went for bbq. It was great food but mostly they had extensive kids entertainment so they could draw and even got some candy when we left! Just go if you are looking for great Korean food in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We speak English and got a server that was training and did not speak any English. There was another server trying to help but I definitely think there was miscommunication and we received below standard in service according to the reviews. We were also told we could not order the BBQ because it was an hour before close and they could not guarantee extra meat. I said it was ok because it was an hour before closing and we made reservations so we would still like to order the BBQ. In my mind we would not be ordering a ton of meat anyways. We ordered 2 Korean Corn Dogs (skip those unless you want to just try something unusual) and one Korean BBQ and an order of Beef Bigoli Tacos (which were fantastic). We thought we would just share between the 3 of us. Unfortunately it was not explained that we would be charged for 3 Korean BBQ's and 2 other dishes. So our bill was more expensive then we expected. So now we have WAY TOO MUCH food and cant even begin to finish the meat that we did cook or cook the meat we did not cook. So we asked for a to go box. And was told they were not allowed. I can understand you do not want to encourage people to order extra meat for take home but in this case--all the food got thrown away. We really did not get to enjoy much of it because we got full on the corn dogs and the tacos. I really hated so much food got thrown away that we PAID for. It was not like I did not pay for 5 dishes and was not allowed to take any of it home. I felt like the service was way below the reviews and our table was SOOO crowded with dishes everywhere. The food tasted fantastic I just feel like we did not get to enjoy the experience especially for Christmas Eve. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We love bbq's and were not dissapointed at all after our visit at KOBQ! The food and sides were tasty and the owner and staff very friendly and helpful. We sat outside and had the signature bbq buffet and some (very well priced) beers. It was a lovely evening, we will visit again soon!

Shout out to Aong who greatly assisted me by explaining everything thoroughly and offering cooking assistance. Very attentive. Great value. I highly recommend and I’ll certainly be back!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: That was a terrific diner here and Aong was a wunderful and extremly kind and dedicated host. Thnaks a lot

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Best Korean Barbecue in my life with the best service in a long time by our favorite waiter Aong! We will definitely come back!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: excellent food and service .. the two serving staff were incredibly attentive and polite .. so pleasant . thanks to Aong and Gina who served us and to the cooks whose food prep was delicious . we shall return

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I grew up in the restaurant business, working fine dining for 15+ years. KOBQ Korean bbq was the cleanest most professional service we have experienced in our 4 visits to any part of Thailand. The menu costs more than we typically spend, usually keeping our meal costs to between 30baht-200baht each, so we are generally just looking for delicious and friendly, not an experience that is customer service based. But traveling during Covid times, hoping for clean tables, chairs, and eating surfaces takes on new importance! Our server was named Aong, and he really delivered excellent service in all the ways we were hoping. Really fun food and atmosphere! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Excellent Korean food at KOBQ restaurant in Nimman area. Our waiter Aong was wonderful and highly skilled. Recommended for delicious food, outdoor dining and great service. Thanks for making our day great, Aong!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Had a very enjoyable meal here! Fabulous service, our waiter Aong was very helpful and super kind. I will come to eat here again! Thank you Aong!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Superb BBQ and even better service. We particularly liked the range of sauces. Many thanks to Ang for making us feel so welcome! We will be back!

Detail: Arguably the best Korean restaurant in Thailand that I’ve eaten at (lived here 6 years). Definitely none better. The food was fresh, tasty, and generous portions. The menu had some cool looking fusion items, such as Bulgogi tacos (and others), I had the Bibimbap and the wife Bulgogi. We enjoyed both, did I say healthy potions? A potent mixed drink cocktail (gold burst?) was a nick on a whiskey sour, and hit the spot. To top it all off, the wait staff was very attentive, professional, and kind. They even solicited advice on a new fusion dish they brought out for customer testing.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Great, attentive and very kind staff, good quality meat, excellent service. The owner and staff are very kind and attentive. They went out of their way to explain the various combinations and the ways in which to compose truly delicious.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Detail: Enjoyed nice Korean dinner here. Most dishes were great, flavorsome and tasted great - especially the spicy noodle dish. Although for the bbq part, I may have understood the items ordered were supposed to be raw. It appeared like the pork we ordered were already cooked and then put into the grill again. I'm not sure if this is for hygiene purpose, but the pork was clearly dry in texture and therefore did not taste the way I expected. Otherwise, most dishes were well done and one of the highlights was the seafood pizza. The restaurant offered many soju flavor selections too, and nice to have enjoyed this over dinner. Overall, nice Korean bbq in Chiang Mai; although, I'd consider twice when going for their bbq options. Service was excellent, attentive and friendly. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

We were greeted by a lovely waitress who seated us and proceeded to explain the menu in detail, dish by dish. The food we ordered was with us within 15 mins and was absolutely beautiful. Very filling and very spicy as we asked. The price was very reasonable too. All in all a great experience and would defo return. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Really nice and fresh Korean bbq. The staff was really friendly and helps us also with cooking the meat etc. I would recommend this place to everyone who enjoys good food.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Wondering though chiang mai and come across across this Korean restaurant. This place looked and smelled amazing so we decided to give it a go, KOBO did not disappoint, this was our first time eating Korean food and it was amazing, both food and service were wonderful.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: This was a superb experience! Not only was the food incredible, the service was impeccable. Three of us ordered the BBQ buffet reasonably priced at 399 baht per person and had the food cooked right at our table. There were refills of everything and they were on top of getting us new portions of the sides every time we were out. The fourth in our party was a vegan and they had plenty of options for her and were very helpful in helping her decide. James, the owner, was so nice and explained everything that we asked about thoroughly. He told us about new drinks coming to the menu and we ordered them and they were delicious. The white mojito was great! He even sent over a samples of their new shot, tequila rosè which was so great that we ordered another one! Overall, it was a spectacular experience and I highly recommend taking the time to eat at this restaurant on your visit to Chiang Mai! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I have been here for 2 time the staff always sincere smiles to me than during the food staff bring me a very good service specially Mod ,Som and Pim It’s was good experience in this Korean restaurant

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: First time eating Korean barbecue with my friends. For 400 Baht, you will receive food in an amount that can feed a pack of cows! We loved it! The waitress stood by our table and explained how we should take it on. She even prepared special bites for us?! I do recommend, it’s awesome!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Great korean restaurant. They have the authentic korean dishes. We chose the BBQ buffet (with free refills) and really enjoyed it. Alsof plenty of side dishes.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I had passed this restaurant many times before, and finally tried it the other night at a friends recommendation. It’s on the 2nd floor at the corner of Nimman Soi 11. It’s furnished in a modern style and very comfortable. The staff are excellent, friendly, helpful in explaining the dishes, efficient. The restaurant offers standard Korean fare, Beef or pork BBQ, Bulgogi, Bimimbop, kimchi soup etc.., as well as a selection of drinks, beer and wine. I have spent a good amount of time working and traveling in Korea, and think the food here is authentic and of good quality. It’s reasonably priced and I will definitely return. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: When I take guests/clients here, I usually order the buffet BBQ, which is always tasty, but this time around I went off the beaten path and ordered the sirloin steak and and a really exceptionally delicious pancake. My mouth is watering just writing about it. Really attentive snd speedy service as always and the food and the ecperience is always a big hit with my clients. Highly recommdnded, but hallf if me wants to keep this place a secret.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Just OK. Nothing special, but good. The spicy pork had a nice bite to it. Excellent and friendly service. Nice atmosphere.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: this place looks nice, clean and in good location, but the food is just ok. i am from Europe and over-there barbaque is something more tasty and not so bland. anyway recommended if you are a meat lover.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We found this restaurant from the already amazing reviews submitted on TripAdvisor, and we weren't disappointed! Everything from the soju, to the Bibimbap, side dishes and grilled meat were fantastic. The service was attentive and the owner, James, visited our table frequently to make sure we understood everything on the menu and that our food was as good as we hoped! Highly recommended..

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Located upstairs in a bright and cheery atmosphere we were pleased to find a Korean BBQ similar to those we have at home in Koreatown Los Angeles. The kids ate all their Bugogi and we ate every morsel of our veggie Bibimbap. It wasn’t served in the traditional hot stone bowl but it was good regardless. Condiments, sauces and kimchi’s were stellar. Service, beers and fancy soda drinks for the kids were all very good and most of the staff spoke excellent English. The prices were more than the street vendors but the air conditioning, cleanliness and comprehendable staff made it worth the extra expense and hike up the stairs. It still cost only a third of what we might have paid at home.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: My husband and I were staying in a hotel down the road and decided to eat here when another restaurant we looked for was closed. We were so pleasantly surprised and impressed that we ate here AGAIN for our last night in Chiang Mai. Our waitress Unchalee was the SWEETEST! The first time we ate here, it was only our 2nd night in Thailand and we were a little out of sorts. She took the time to explain the ENTIRE menu and answered all of our questions. When my husband decided to try the korean BBQ, she made recommendations on how exactly to cook and eat the food. We LOVE Unchalee. She also made fantastic recommendations for our drinks as well. The food itself was outstanding! We sat outside to use the real charcoal and the smell was amazing! The manager (unfortunately I don't know his name or I would name names!!) also was very kind and came to check on us twice during our meal. We just felt so welcomed and comfortable at a time when we felt so out of our element. Of all the places we ate, if someone asked me where they should eat in Chiang mai, I would INSIST they eat here. I can't say enough good things about our meals here. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: What an amazing experience from start to finish. So good we went back the next day. And if we stayed in Chiang Mai longer this would be a regular spot for us. Thanks to all the staff, we had two different lots of staff over the two visits and they were just perfect. James, I believe he's the owner, is such a lovely guy. So chilled, yet so professional. The food, just wow. Top quality. We had the chicken stew on our first visit. It was massive. We were starving and I tell you that dish could feed four. The two of us did well to almost finish it. Today we went back for the barbecue. One of the best barbecues I've had in my life. And for an Iranian to say that, well that's just top honours. We're practically born on a barbecue. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We had some really good and really spicy korean bbq. The potato pancake was also very good. Good service and clean.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: My wife and I ate here on a whim, the waitress “Som” (I hope I spelled her name correctly) went above and beyond. She explained the entire menu to us and the portions accordingly, the manger came to the table twice. Made us feel very welcomed and comfortable in a country we do not speak the language in. The food was outstanding!!! My wife had a very delicious noodle bowl and I opt’d for the barbecue, cannot express how great the experience and dining was!!!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: this was the second time i had a korean bbq and this one i can say is the best. their korean bbq buffet is such a great great deal. talked to the owner of this restaurant, (james) from london, and he is really accomodating and nice. he really knows how to take care of his customers. we're glad that the waitresses can speak english. we will definitely be back again.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Delicious Korean food and wonderful service. The fried chicken is tasty and the spicy one has a right kick to it. We also had the kimchi omelette and bibimbap, along with a selection of traditional sides. The place is clean, spacious and the staff members, including the manager, are absolutely brilliant with our 2-year-old.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Wonderful meal with the kind attentiveness of a young waitress Som. Chatted with the owner James from London. The buffet BBQ, beef bulgogi, fried chicken and kimchi were all delicious! Enjoy!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We had a great night at KOBQ. We really appreciated the real Korean charcoal BBQ grill. Good meat quality and the dakgalbi was super tasty. We had the chance to meet James, the owner, he’s a super humble and nice guy. The service was perfect! Our server Som was incredible. Can’t wait to go back again!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: One of the best Korean BBQ in Chiang Mai. Stuff and service was very friendly. The Owner is a very sympathetic guy. Food is fresh and good quality! If you travel in ChiangMai, go an eat there!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Service was excellent, spoke excellent English. We ordered the chicken. It was good, but we felt it was just kfc with some extra spices and far too much batter. That being said, looking at other people’s dishes they looked much better. Portion sizes are big so keep that in mind (we were able to take it home in a takeaway box). We would go back, but we would definitely order something different.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We stumbled across Kobq looking for dinner on our second night, new years day and we were so happy we went up the stairs to find Kobq. James was so nice and explained to way of eating the Korean bbq and it was delicious. We had the Jjamppong and it wasn't too spicy it was just right and had lots of seafood in it. We are definitely going back this weekend to try out more on the menu.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We had the first page recommendation of the buffet, all you can eat pork neck, belly, and chicken plus plenty of Korean kimchi and sauces. All was fab over a real well tended charcoal fire. Delicious and all that we could eat. The highlight evening was our chat with the proprietor, James. His passion to create a unique dining experience was evident in as learned a bit about the history the restaurant. in the center of the Nimman district on the second floor overlooking all the action. Highly recommended, we’ll be back. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Went here for my birthday. Superb service and introduction to Korean BBQ by the owner, James. We ordered a shared platter we can cook ourselves. Meat excellent as well as all of the sides. They even brought over some chicken wings for my birthday which was a lovely touch! Would definitely come back here if in Chiang Mai. 5* definitely recommend.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We wandered in here by accident when we walked up to the second floor of the plaza. The staff were extremely helpful; advising us on suitable food for the kids, who did not want anything spicy. I can recommend the spicy ramen ( which is not a soup but rather a spicy sauce with noodles), the sweet and sour pork (not spicy at all) and, especially, the fried chicken (which came with a delicious somewhat sweet and definitely spicy sauce).

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Really enjoyed my lunch there, the staff were super helpful, I have some food allergies and they were happy to explain the menu and ingredients in detail. Loved the BBQ, felt very authentic and everything I've tasted was amazing. Would definitely recommend to my friends and come here again!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Arrived here by chance. We took a buffet menu and it was very taste. Music is great and the staff is one of the best i have ever seen. Helpfull and they even run to provide you the best service. Very contrary to what i am used to in Europe. Id recommend sitting outside, that's where they use a real BBQ. Inside you get a gourmet!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: There are Korean barbeques in most larger cities. Whilst often offering a cheap and plentiful meal, they do not leave one with a great dining experience. KOBQ is offering a higher class experience whilst still being affordable. We had the Chicken & Pork option which was excellent. Service was also at a high level. I suggest a table on the terrace offering views of the busy Nimman Street and away from the rather BBQ smokey inside atmosphere.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Went by chance and It was a good pick. Nice menu with all Korean classical plus a few others. Pleasantly hot dishes (strength is color coded), reasonable prices. Giggling and smiling service, but ultra efficient under James supervision and all this on a terrace over the street.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Went with a couple of friends and we all got the all you can eat buffet. Though it isn’t a traditional buffet, they basically give you ten side dishes they refill at your request (from rice, to kimchi, to other lettuce and sauces to dip the food grilled at your table). It also included endless meat, which included chicken (which we found the most tasty, which is rare, as marinades in Korean BBQ usually make the pork and especially beef usually the better choice), and two types of pork, pork neck and your usual fat back stomach portions). Also ordered a beef sirloin steak since beef is the one thing not included in the all you can eat. Everything was wonderful, and the manager cane out several times to check on us and assure we had anything refilled we wanted. The kimchi wasn’t as potent as most places, but was very good. Cooking at your own tabletop is always a joy, whether hanging out with friends, eating with family, or even trying something out of the norm on a date. So I highly recommend the place, food was excellent, service was top notch along being extremely friendly! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I lived in Korea for 4 years and the taste at KOBQ was totally authentic. James and his staff did an amazing job and I can’t wait to go back.....probably tonight!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Good quality and service here with reasonable price. The owner is very friendly and caring. The sauce here are homemade with such a good taste.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Went here to have the korean bbq, all you can eat for 399 tb. The food tasted good, and the people who worked there were really nice. Even though it is an "all you can eat", we kind of felt that they waited untill we had eated up all our meat before they asked if we wanted some more, and then we had to wait for them to come with the meat, and then cook it, so we ended up eating less. Probably good for buisniss, but not that great for hungry guest who wanted a lot of food. Everyting tasted really good though, so would probably done it again.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Menu seemed very interesting for Korean specialities and food on other tables seemed really good but we wanted to have the BBQ meal at the table. (Grilling your own food over charcoals BBQ) Quality of the meat was ok but sliced too thick to my taste. A bit expensive compared to other Thai restaurants. (Around 3000 baths for 2 with beverages and extra prime meats). Wouldn’t go back but wouldn’t say it is a no go either. But in the end I would try another Korean BBQ before this one. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We were greeted by friendly staff and had an excellent meal here. She recommended really good dishes and they live up to the expectations! Come here if you want a good night and enjoy the live music here!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Don't usually eat Korean but really pleased we gave this place a try. You walk up a set of stairs to get to the entrance (or take a lift). Don't let that put you off. Came with friends and we tried a big meaty pork dish. Waiter (Pon?) was absolutely delightful but new, so he didn't realise he could've suggested rice and vegetable dishes to go with it. However, it was filling on its own, and we enjoyed the cold soup (delicious) and the condiments as a starter. Sat outside and being one of those lovely warm tropical nights, it was divine to relax with a cold beer and tasty condiments. Later the owner came out for a chat, which was great. Always terrific to talk to the locals and find out about the restaurant and its history. Great staff, delicious food and superb ambience. Can't ask for too much more than that. Well priced, about A$12-13pp for what we ate. Cost triple that if we'd eaten the equivalent in Australia or NZ. Give it a try, you won't regret. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: By far this is the best Korean place in CNX. The service was great and food were excellent. Definitely will go back there again in my next visit to CNX.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We’d never tried Korean before but found this almost by accident and oh my are we glad we did. Were a family of 4 adventurous eaters and went for the korean buffet. Surrounded by plates of food and no idea what to do our waiter was excellent as was james the owner. Nothing too much trouble and wonderful wonderful food - well be back

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: My wife and I were in Chiang Mai for our honeymoon and were very impressed with KOBQ. We come from San Diego where we have a lot of choices for Korean BBQ and this place was as good as any that we've had before. We did the all you can eat chicken and pork which included soup and 12 different sides. All were very tasty. The owner actually came out and spoke with us to be sure we were enjoying our dinner. We told him it was our honeymoon and he offered us an appetizer on the house as a compliment! Although there are so many places to eat in Nimman we will definitely come back to KOBQ once we come back to Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Great restaurant where the staff where just fantastic. Food was unbelievably tasty and buffet just kept coming and coming. Will be back (probably tomorrow!).

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: This is our second review of KOBQ. In our previous review, we described trying Korean BBQ for the first time at KOBQ. It was a great experience (see previous review for details). After having Korean BBQ multiple times at KOBQ, we decided to expand our horizons and try some other dishes. Given our previous experiences, we trusted the chef implicitly, and asked him to bring out several of his recommended dishes for us to sample. This made for an exciting meal, as we did not know what would be served until it was actually brought out to our table. As with the Korean BBQ, the service and food were both outstanding. Some of the dishes we tried were: Korean Fried Chicken (which had chili lime, traditional and mango flavors); Gimbap, Tteokbokki, and Jjigae. All of these dishes were excellent, and we recommend them all. So, in addition to the great Korean BBQ, be sure to check out the menu for other great items to sample, too! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: My wife and I have been living in Chiang Mai for nearly two years now. We had been quite disappointed with the local Korean BBQ options - until today when we visited KOBQ! It's located along the busiest stretch of Nimman Rd in the old OMG Cafe space. The interior and exterior are modern, bright and immaculately clean. We were greeted warmly by the owner (James) and his friendly staff. Service was extremely attentive and fast throughout the meal. We ordered the BBQ set which came with unlimited meat and banchan. The meat was thick, juicy and flavorful - impressive compared to a lot of the proteins served up around town! We were impressed with the quality of all ingredients including the lettuce leafs for wrapping - sizable, lush and green with zero wilting. Perfect for wrapping the grilled meats up with various sauces. The staff diligently grilled the meat table side to perfection. The banchans were incredible and plentiful - especially the kimichi and daikon radish...pickled to perfection! We also ordered the spicy beef gimbap which did not disappoint. It was HUGE and could have been a meal on its own! We lived in LA for years (home to great Korean BBQ) and have been to Seoul for the real deal. I must say that we were extremely impressed with KOBQ and can't wait for our next meal there. Highly recommended for an authentic Korean BBQ experience in Chiang Mai! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: My husband and I ate dinner here tonight and it was absolutely wonderful! This is authentic Korean food which is nearly impossible to get in Chiang Mai. We were very impressed. We had the all you can eat BBQ set--the meat was awesome as well as all 10 sides you get plus kimchi stew! Highly recommend! The fried chicken is not to be missed. And the Gimbap was top notch! Everything on the menu looked and sounded delicious that it was hard to choose! We will be coming back next week for sure! Also, the staff and the level of service was top notch! The staff was consistently asking us if we needed refills on the sides or meat. It was such a wonderful experience. And the owner James is AWESOME!!! He knows what he is doing and is the friendliest guy! I highly highly recommend this place!! :) Enjoy!!! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: One friend recommended me this restaurant. So I got the chance to try it. The food at this restaurant is fresh and tastes great. The staff recommended me a menu is the meat barbecue, which taste of meat is very good.I'll go back again soon.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: How best to describe KOBQ? Well the title says it all. Some of, if not THE best Korean fried chicken I've ever had. Great menu, reasonably priced for the quality and quantity of the food you get. This does not mean it's cheap, but it DOES mean it is excellent value for money! The service is first rate! The cocktails were excellent and the establishment comfortable and inviting. I strongly recommend giving this place a try. And if you like it spicy, ask for meal extra extra spicy then sit back and enjoy the heat 😊

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Hands down this is the BEST Korean BBQ spot in Chiang Mai. The food and service was absolutely amazing. This trendy spot will not let you down!!! The owner James is a real gentlemen. Support this place because it’s a real gem.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: This place is just under a year old and totally amazing! The owner oversaw our meal and explained the menu to us with an incredible amount of care and attention. Her husband is the head chef and everything is hand made from scratch. We ordered the bbq buffet and she recommended the Beef Gimbap and the Chili Lime Battered Chicken and the original Soju for the table. The flavor in the meat and the kimchi was fantastic! After a hard day of walking and shopping ;) we were ready for a good meal and this was a meal we would come back for again and again!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Place worth your visit. Food very good and price reasonable. Service excellent and friendly too. Accessible to transportation.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Best Korean food in Thailand! Delicious bulgogi and kimbap. The restaurant takes me back to living in Korea!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We have visited for family dinner and the taste was better than I had expected. If you would like to have good Korean food in ChiangMai you should come!!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: This is the first time trying korea food in Chiangmai. It was great! Recommendation from us: should come after the sunset

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We had bbq buffet here for many times. Pork is very good. Kimchi and Condiments are variety and very good. Definitely recommend for everyone. The location is good too, its at very center of Nimman

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I've had BBQ buffet here. Than you all staffs for a great service. The BBQ was nice as well. I recommended this Korean BBQ near Nimman road.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We had the Korean BBQ at KOBQ, and highly recommend this restaurant. Our meal included three different cuts of meat (that we cooked at our table), soup, rice and many different accompaniments. All of these items were replenished throughout the meal as often as we desired. The owners warmly greeted us when we arrived and provided information about the history of the resturant. Since it was our first time having Korean BBQ, they also provided detailed guidance and ideas on how to best enjoy the experience. The staff was very attentive, too. All aspects of the meal were outstanding. The conversation and service were both great. The food was fresh and of excellent quality. We are planning to return soon. If you are in Chaing Mai, do not miss the opportunity to visit KOBQ. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Came with a friend and got the buffet set. They provide so many side dishes. A plus for that. Recommended!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: There’s a nice place to enjoy a korean food and beverages. about the reatuarant, it’s in nimmanhaemin road and close to the city

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Some of the best korean food ive had outside of korea!! Went last night and had a terrific Korean BBQ and had the bulgogi which was delicious as well. Going back before we leave Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I don’t have much experience of Korean food but going by this evening’s meal I truly have been missing out. The food at KOBQ was fresh, tasty and spicy. The staff were really friendly and eager for us to enjoy our meal. Out of the handful of restaurants I have tried in Chiang Mai so far this is the one I definitely want to revisit. Highly recommended.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
