Detail: Literally stumbled upon this place, and had a completely unexpectedly delicious supper. Fried chicken with mango, and a Korean noodle, chicken and cheese (yes, cheese) dish that absolutely rocked (to my wussy Western palate, it was hot as the sun though!). We’re here in Chang Mai for a week so will swing back for more.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I just had bbq buffet for dinner this evening they come with 10 side dishes , kimchi soup,and short grain rice it was so much delicious .... very good staff ... it was very worth it to bring me here

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Trust me, I was not sure if I should give a review to this place for my selfish reason, I wanna keep it all for myself! We spent 3 months in Chiangmai and this is one of the best restaurants. The food tastes amazing and has a really good quality. It's not cheap but totally worth every Baht. You don't wanna miss this. Just don't. It's awesome.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Lived in Korea for 2 years and the best Korean food I have had outside of Korea. I have been several times, never had a bad meal. Service is perfect, atmosphere is cosy, and the owner is welcoming. Good value for money as portions generous. Don't have a bad word to say. Try the 'Bossam' - delicious!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Not having a lot experience in eating Korean food I am now a convert. The food was so fresh, flavoursome and delish. This simple,clean resturant provides great food at very resonable price. The staff are very welcoming and even though not very confident in speaking english are very charming. James who is the owner is delightful. i wish this new resturant all the very best. Perhaps they could add wine to their drinks list. Next time a group of friends and try the bbq. We chose from the menu

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We were walking down this street after deciding to visit and see what it was about and were all very hungry. We saw Kobq and from the outside it looked amazing and inviting. Some of our group had never had Korean before and we decided to check it out. The service provided was amazing, the waitresses were attentive and helpful. They helped to explain the portion sizes, options and what the vegetarian options available were. We ordered a selection from chicken to a veggie bibimbap and we asked for extra spice and everything was on point. We were also shocked to hear from the waitresses after finishing that the restaurant had only opened around 5/10 days before. We know this place would go on for success. Happy to review such a promising yummy restaurant and will definitely recommend family/friends to come here in the future. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I'm half-Korean and have to say that KOBQ is a great find of a place to eat with good prices as well. James the owner was super nice and the Thai staff were friendly and welcoming. So if you are tired of Thai food and want to change it up get in an UBER and eat here with your friends. You will be glad you did. :) Nick and DeAnna, Honolulu Hawaii

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Not sure why everyone so far has raved about this place. But for us, we were definitely not overwhelmed by this neat, clean and modern Korean BBQ place. I wouldn't call myself an expert in Korea cuisine. Although I should say that I have worked with a large Korean conglomerate and had eaten a lot of Korean both in South Korea and outside to at least know what a good BBQ is. The BBQ meats were simply average. The kimchi was average. The side dishes including onions, pickles etc were all average. KOBQ has so much potential. The staff were all very accommodating and pleasant. Very professional when taking orders. The decor was minimalist, uncluttered and very modern. Plus, very clean. The drinks menu was decent enough and priced like most restaurants in that range. The kimchi jiggae was actually very good. But the letdown was the BBQ. And no, even the fancy and modern table-top stove that is remotely controlled does not even warrant an extra star towards this review. To get an extra star, KOBQ needs to offer better BBQ meats including the different marinades and please look at the sesame oil that is currently being used as a dip. It is not as flavoursome unfortunately. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I never give all-star reviews... they're a bit over used. I am not exaggerating when I say that if I could bring this restaurant back to Sweden with me. I would make a fortune. Reasonably priced amazing food in unexpectedly large portions. Friendly staff. Authentic Korean sides... seriously try the iced seaweed soup. I had the half order of mango chicken. I don't even like fried chicken and I wanted to eat the entire batch. Love this place. It's a must if you're in Nimman. Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Try the BBQ chicken, it's absolutely delicious! And the kim chee accompaniments (which come on the house) are the real deal. I'm heading back soon to try the on-table BBQ which looked incredible and I've never seen it done using induction cooking before - very environmentally friendly! Also the service was very warm and attentive, plus they pointed out the free wifi password. A hidden gem on the busy Nimman strip.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: After eating Thai food for the whole week, my friend and I decided to try other cuisines for a change and she stumbled upon KOBQ, which was walking distance from our hotel. Either we came during their down time or not too many people knew about the restaurant because we were the only people there. I've frequented several Korean barbecue restaurants so I always order samgyeopsal. I was pleasantly surprised to receive seven side dishes (all refillable!) with my order. I had three types of kimchi, sesame oil, onions, garlic, spring onions, lettuce to make wraps, and a cold seaweed salad. EVERYTHING WAS DELICIOUS! We also ordered cocktails because they were BOGO from 5-8PM. I had the Shark Bite, which was very smooth and paired well with my meal. The service was also superb. Usually you grill the barbecue by yourself, but the server graciously did it for me. In the end, we also received complimentary chicken wings because they were sampling it to add to their menu. I hope more people learn about this restaurant! :D Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: This place just opened. I highly recommend the bbq! The food is delicious and the staff brings you starters and sidedishes, you can ask for more for free. We had beef, pork chicken. Try the omelette roll, its really good. I had Korean bbq before in south korea and its really similar. I would come back again! The staff is very friendly and really wants you to have a good time.

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: New restaurant with great Korean food and very friendly service. We enjoy very much and come back again!

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: I live in Bangkok and Chiang Mai and always looking for a nice Korean restaurant because I love Korean food and just found out this Resturant KOBQ in Nimman road, make me feel like I'm eating the food in Korea!!! Love the kimchigikae and Fried chicken and the BBQ buffet is very cheap compared to the quality of meat.👍

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: Me and my boyfriend had the lovely chance to eat at this amazing restaurant, we were walking in the area trying to find something different that Thai food (we really wanted to eat another type of cuisine) and we saw the sign of KOBQ so we entered, and by far the best food decision made! The food was absolutely delicious and the portions were huge! The best part is the service! They are so attentive and nice and at the same time very honest. We left them a tip but we didn't say anything, like 5 seconds later the lady comes back and tell us that we have given to much money so we told her that that was her tip. I was really happy to see how honest the people was and how amazing this food experience was! If you are in the area try this delicious restaurant, you won't regret it! Read less

Restaurant_Name: โค บี คิว
Detail: We were walking across this and we saw the sign showing the Korean food. The restaurant had only been open a couple of weeks. The food was very tasty the Korean fried chicken was my favourite! Staff were very friendly and and the chef even took initiative to come out and double check if the vegetarian dish was correct. The only point I would say is that the toilet is a shared one between a few restaurants and you have to pay to use it. I would definitely coke back here when next in CMai! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: This was a quick stop and they made noodles for us just before closing time. I loved the air conditioning too.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Nice and friendly place, with a very few dishes to choose from. The soup was full of taste with a lot of lemon grass.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: We had tom yum noodle and fish ball noodle with chrysanthemum ice juice. The price was only 110 Baht. The soup of noodle was very delicious. We would like to visit again.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Good, tasty noodles for a decent price. Portion leaves something to be desired, but still good. Lots of koreans.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Here is a great place to visit for local noodle, they made a great noodle and truly loves their dumplings, homemade fish ball, we tried 2 different type of noodle and both were done very well! A must is their home made ice milk tea which is so favourful!!!

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: I haven't much to compare with. This was to be a change of taste and one time lunch visit. With the decent pricing, location and nice tasting food. I think it was quite a nice place to eat.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Delicious fishball noodles and Tomyum soup.. and cheap amd kind place to go. A must place to go while your in Chiang Mai Nimman heamin..

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: The fish ball and fish stick is not fresh enough with a smell. The pork rib soup are light or near to tasteless. Luckily the noodle is good, it compensated the short coming in the ingredient.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Nice food. Great fishball noodle. Not sure but looks like close on every Sunday Pink noodle soup is hardly recommened in this place

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: This restaurant is near somtam yok klong at nimnman soi 11, stands the left side from Main Street. Fish ball is normal not good as I expected. Soup is okay.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Simply the best and freshest fishballs in CM. Simple. clean, friendly. My go to place for a healthy fish ball noodle.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: Delicious asian food at affordable prices in Chiang Mai. Try some of their flat rice noodles with their homemade sauces.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: I simply love the noodles here. Everything is home made and the pork-rib soup is clean and delicious. Some of the best fish noodles in the entire city. My kids love the noodles here too as well as the crispy fried wanton skins that they somehow manage to make pop up into little pillows.

Restaurant_Name: เซียะ ก๋วยเตี๋ยวปลา
Detail: I've been a royal customer for this shop for ten years at least. This shop at Nimman is the second branch. The first one is around superhighway rd. So gland that they open this branch in town. TomYum soup for noodle is great. Fresh homemade fishballs is fantastic. Try putting crispy fish skin in your noodle, you will find it good combination adding to your noodle bowl. It is quite hygiene comparing to other noodle places in Thailand. There are some flies but i guess it is normal for warm country. Dishes and table are clean, fresh made noodle in front of the shop. This is the only fish noodle shop i come back for more in Chiangmai. So i'm impressed.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Many choices of soups, salads and sandwiches and even breakfast choices. Even the side salad that came with potato wedges had various lettuces. I love the make your own salad that has wide variety of add-ons. Everything tasted super fresh.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Arrived at 8pm left at 8.30pm because the restaurant closed early without knowing. So there's no possibility of dessert. As far as salads are concerned it is quite correct but a lot of lettuce compared to the other ingredients. And disappointment for the Burgers. And it was relatively expensive. I advise against going there.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Been here for a dinner and also a breakfast and both times I have to say that the food was extremely delicious and fresh, and the salads are excellent as is all the other foods we tried including the chicken burger I tried and the coffee is great too and there is a wipe range of healthy options on the menu and great selection of juices and smoothies and deserts. See my youtube the travelling social worker or tiktok ttswtravel for a quick video on this place.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: All the food was delicious. Loved the delicious fireplace salad, so there was a chance to bring the family. Parking was ample, the atmosphere was cool and calm.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great food and big dishes The food was combined of fresh components Very pleasant environment and friendly service Highly recommend!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salad concept has a really big menu of soups, salads, and sandwiches. If you want a break from the noodles and rice of Chiang Mai, it’s a nice stop. It is a lot pricier (about 200 baht and up) for meals, but you’re paying for the freshness and diverseness of the meals. It is pretty good food, you’ll definitely leave feeling happy and full

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A generally good place, nothing extraordinary but good choice on the menu for an affordable price, can go if you need a quick lunch or dinner

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Absolutely fantastic place, huge variety on menu. Very, very good quality salads, and one of the best smoothies I have had. If I lived near this place, I would be eating here more than once a week.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Just be loved this place so much! Nice clean atmosphere and the salad was out of this world!!! They have the biggest selection to choose from and everything is so fresh and beautifully prepared. The dressings were delicious and servings generous. Really reasonably priced too! A big salad plate with extra toppings and two dressings for under 160 baht.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A few years ago I wrote a scathing review of the staff at Salad Concept in the old city. The staff were replaced and the new staff are absolutely wonderful. This deserves a mention because the atmosphere in this restaurant has changed for the better and I can highly recommend it now.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Full air conditioning, a real fridge. A pale neon light. A fast food look. We fled to another more welcoming place without even bothering to eat there.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Food still good, service still robotic. More than last time! What is going on? Why can’t the owner train the staff properly? Ugh!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Don't be fooled by the exterior and franchise-looking menu. This place is local and legit, with great food and lots of healthy options.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ate here a couple of times. There is a wide variety of healthy dishes to choose from in the menu. I find the food tasty but a little pricey. The food portions and environment were good though. Staff were polite and helpful as well.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A great idea and realization of the opportunity to design your own salad for every taste. The portions are large, and all the ingredients are very fresh and healthy.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We love this place! Great salads with no end of choice and at a very fair price. They are very large, could feed two, I think. A nice change from the usual Thai fare. Try it if you're in the Nimman area....

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I love Salad Concept, it is one of my favourite restaurants in Chiang Mai. As I live in the old city, I eat at the branch on Moonmuang, opposite soi 7. I ate there daily for years before the pandemic. Now I am back in CM and am appalled by the terrible service in this restaurant. The salads are still fresh and delicious but the attitude of the wait staff is horrendous. I have heard so many complaints from my friends, who have stopped going because of a certain female waiter's rudeness and sheer "couldn't care less" attitude. I get no smiles or greetings from any of the staff and no reply to "Sabai dii mai krup?" - a first in Thailand! It's not as if they are rushed off their feet, but they seem to prefer the take-away orders and resent anyone sitting down. I no longer tip obviously. Maybe some training in customer service is needed! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: ...even though it looks like it might rain. Wasn't really sure about what I wanted to eat tonight and just ran into this place - glad I did. Food was fresh, and the service was good. Had a grilled chicken breast that came with a small salad and something called riceberry rice. The chicken was fine, juicy and well seasoned. I don't know, I thought the riceberry rice was a bit bland - maybe I was expecting something a little different than what I got with that. I thought it would be some kind of fruity, berryish flavored rice but reading a little bit about it now, actually it's a rice variety of its own considered by some a brown rice substitute. I'm sure it's more healthier than white rice. I also had a chicken larb appetizer that came only 5 minutes after the main course. Also very good, but I would have preferred to have some shrimp chips to put it on like the way my friends Dung & Grace would make back in Hawaii. I miss them so much for some reason. Sometimes I think I wish I was there in case they need me, though I don't think they ever have before. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Excellent chicken Caesar wrap. Portion size was huge, too large to try to eat with your hands. I also had a very good coconut shake to go along with it. This would be a great choice for eat in or take out. Facility is clean and cool. Staff are attentive.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ordered from their restaurant at 9:10pm through grab, then they called at 9:35pm to inform the kitchen has closed at 9:30pm so they will not be delivering the food which has already been paid for. “Not our problem” and “go contact the app company” was their responses when I called them back (my gf had spoke to them when they called). Super annoying as many more places do stop accepting more orders at 9:30pm so we couldnt order from somewhere else. Disgraceful.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: as a vegetarian, this place offers me tons of value at a great price, the salads are amazing you can find almost everything you need this place

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I went with a couple of friends. This place has a nice vibe and staff were quite friendly too. There are a number of different options for salads, combined with multiple types of toppings etc. Its quite a creative concept, I felt. The food was top class. The place is also clean and hygienic.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I didn't have a great experience here. The decoration is nice but the food is just not good.. I don't understand the hype around this restaurant and I wouldn't recommend it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The location is right off the main street, so it is easy to find. There is parking in the back. The restaurant is big, well decorated and suitable for large groups. There is a large selection of food items and the portions are more than enough. The restaurant also has a large supply of healthy drinks. Everything is fresh, delicious and well presented on the plate. I think the cost are appropriate for the type of food, the freshness of the food and the portions.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We were back to the Salad Concept for about the third time. It had been a few years but the place hasn’t changed. The salads are huge with tasty, fresh ingredients. Drinks are also fresh. You can’t go wrong here.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: i had lunch with my girlfriend, because was a while that we wanted to try an alternative that was not really Thai food, and it did not disappoint our expectations, the environment was well kept and with large windows facing the outside, the staff nice and good food, the only thing i would recommend is to make the portions slightly larger. We will come back again

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nimmanhaemin Road branch. A good location and a smart restaurant that was clean and spacious. We were unable to fathom out why only certain people were allowed to eat outside. Clearly some silly rule at work here. Another example of poor management is that meals do not arrive together and our starter was served after the main course. But, the food was very good and freshly made and prices reasonable for what we had. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I ordered a Cesar salad and it came with uncooked bacon on it. I promptly removed it from a top my salad and asked my Thai girlfriend to please have the waitress cook the bacon. She said the waitress said they "steam the bacon and if they cooked it, It would be too crunchy hard". We had them cook it more anyway. Later that day, I was on the toilet and everything came out both ends. Sorry to be so graphic, but I need to be honest with what they are preparing and serving and how it affected me. No more salad concept for me.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The menu is quite varied, and most of the dishes are built around raw vegetables. You can build your own salad, which my friend and I did, and the servings are generous. We both chose a different salad dressing so that we could share them. The tofu was disappointing, and would be so much better if it was marinated before cooking. This place is always busy at meal times, especially in the high season, so you may have to wait for a table. Also be aware that it's quite noisy.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I visited in Dec 2019, the food was really good for salad. And they understand English very well ( yeah but some crew didn’t understand) The ambience really nice with a christmas touch. The crew was really helpfull as well. Will come to visit again next time going to Chiangmai!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: No dressing for the Cesar wrap....and no tuna in the wasabi salad....too much for one lunch....see you in long time !!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We ordered twice from here- one was delivery through Food panda, and the second time we ate in. Both times , we were happy with the large portion sizes- definitely filling. And their menu indicated items that were liked by kids. I like their commitment to serving healthy wholesome food, but was a tad disappointed to see the usual supermarket style ham served with the American fried rice dish. We loved our drinks order- a set of 10 shot glasses with fresh juices- from beetroot to wheat grass! Overall happy with the service and food. Happy to go again if I'm in Nimmanhemin

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Fun stop. Parked our bikes for late lunch. Cash only place. Ordered pineapple fried rice with quinoa but the quinoa was just a sprinkle. My husband’s order was nice but the salad had too much sauce. The wellness shots were superb. Also the peanut butter banana smoothie was nice. I ordered salmon but they couldn’t give cooked salmon as add on option... they handed raw salmon to me and I declined, they were nice enough to take it back due to misunderstanding. Good service. Nice ambience inside.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My wife and I ate here twice for breakfast. The meal size was perfect! salad with breakfast is actually pretty dope.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My fourth time here. Everything is still the same. The menu which is quiet extensive offering from plain green salad to fancy one you can choose your own various vegetables as well as dressing. A la carte menu such as Tofu salad, Avocado salad, Salad with steak; fried fish; fresh salmon are among various menu. However, the amount of dressing accompanied with the ordered was not enough and they charge extra if u ask for more dressing. At peak hours you might have to wait 15-20 minutes for your order.quiet reasonable price compare to the food and place.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salad concept has become our go to lunch spot during our trip to Chiang Mai. Easily available on food panda or in store you can select from a large menu of ready made salads and wraps plus breakfast options, or create your own salad or wrap. They have a wide selection of add ins which will surely satisfy your fresh food needs.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad concept has been in business many years, and since it is always busy they must be doing something right, namely serving good healthy food at a reasonable price. The salads are always fresh, and of generous size for the price. I have tried a few of the soups and they are good. I was not as impressed when I’ve ordered sandwiches, but that may be that in their efforts to appeal to vegans, their sandwiches aren’t made the traditional way. Great place for a healthy, reasonably priced meal, but at peak times there maybe wait.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Wonderful food very filling, I had a vegan salad plus a wheatgrass shot and a beetroot detox juice, good service and reasonable prices

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My family has been coming here since it first opened as a humble four-table restaurant, and we've loved it since then. Compared to American prices, it's ridiculously cheap. Without any premium toppings the enormous salads (really, one salad is a full meal) are below five dollars -- regular Thai pricing. The drinks are good as well, although unlike the salads, the prices are comparable to those of the Western world. There is not really any outdoor seating, although there is a sort of open area towards the back where the wall of windows and stag horn ferns make it feel like you're outside. I do understand the poorer reviews as far as the taste of the salads go -- because of all the options, it might take time to find dressings and toppings you like. It's took me several visits to settle on my favorite regular: a regular salad with tofu dressing and corn, pasta, mushrooms, egg, tofu and avocado. And I still have some experiences where I try something new and don't love it. All this being said, I absolutely love the Salad Concept. Everything is clean and fresh (the vegetables are grown in royal gardens, so it's cleanliness you can't beat). The mission of the restaurant is commendable, and all the options ensure that if you keep trying new combinations you definitely will find something you love! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The place has amiable staff and the ambiance is pleasant. I ordered avocado salad with strawberry sauces. The serving is big enough and the price is reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: You can create your own salad by choosing veggie, salad sauces and other. Price is acceptable for food quantity and quality. If you visit this restaurant for the first time, I will recommend you to try salad wrap.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: You choose your own veggies and toppings from the list on the table ( selection menu ) and make your own salad dish. Nice ambiance and healthy salad. Good choice to eat different from the thai food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I ordered a salad with food panda here once. I got a couple Tesco bought salad bags and packets of dressing. What a rip off. The salad was not made and if I wanted to buy groceries I would have gone to Tesco to buy salad bags

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Really wanted to dislike this place based on the fact that it’s a trendy western restaurant resembling a Jason’s deli from the outside. Sometimes you just need something fresh and after a month eating Thai food, I was there. Ended up eating here twice in one day. The menu is extensive and has plenty of options from salads and smoothies to quinoa bowls and huge selection of appetizers. One of the only places I’ve found that does actual fruit smoothies with real fruit and the option to have no sugar added in most. Highly recommend giving this place a shot if you’re craving some greens!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Big menu of salads, fresh juices and much more at excellent prices. Service fast and with a smile. Place is very popular as well

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: As I am a salads lover, we love their menu, love the dressing, has been there for twice times during my vacation in Chiang Mai, highly recommend if you are caring about your healthy life. Great ideas. Bravo girls

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My best friend and I came here yesterday and our bodies have been trying to get rid of the salad both ends. AVOID if you dont want to lose a day in bed being ill

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It looks good on the menu, its not when you eat it. I had the pancakes and eggs+bacon. Not good at all, and they make you pay 135 bhat for something you can make yourself a 100 times better. They give you a pile of salad on the side where 99% is just lettuce. The service wasnt any good, the food took much longer time then needed in reference to what you actually get. I would say to go litteraly anywhere else.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Loved the food, salmon salad was lovely and came with a lot of ingredients. I got a take away one day and ended up with 8 plastic packets and pots. Take your own in if you want a take away and you get a free ingredient extra. Best to eat in. Staff could be more friendly but I dont speak Thai so my fault ordering was hard not theirs. A smile would have been nice when they made a mistake though.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Delicious fresh, healthy food (and also not-so-healthy, e.g. Northern-style sausage, if you're so inclined), with a huge selection of super-healthy and delicious juices and smoothies. In contrast to some reviews, I found prices very reasonable, ridiculously so in some cases. (For example, a huge chicken caesar salad wrap, so overstuffed with big chunks of chicken, croutons, lettuce and a delicious dressing that it fell apart when picked up, plus a freshly-squeezed carrot-apple juice, all for 206 THB? Crazy!) Good breakfast selection too, available all day, but with too late an opening time (9:00 AM) for me to partake. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I paid 369 baht for a meal but it is worth. I choose B Berry with all kinds of berry is the best drink the I have drunk. The big bowl of salad is made by fresh vegetable. The pasta is so tasty.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I read some of the bad reviews for this restaurant. There were some criticisms made which may be appropriate but our meal was really delicious. There are lots of great juice bars in Chiang Mai but we were craving a green leafy salad and the salad here was awesome. We also enjoyed various juices and a shot of wheat germ as my wife was coming down with a cold. I also had the Laab with chicken which was spicy and very tasty. No complaints from us at all.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We had a good light meal, though we choose not to be 100% healthy. Had fried fish and fried mushroom, but with quinoa veggie wrap and a salmon sashimi salad.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The Salad Concept is a nice place for a lunch break from the heat. In an (over) air-conditioned restaurant that would be at home in New York City or LA, you get to build a bespoke salad or wrap using a check list on a piece of paper at your table. Veggies, proteins, dressing, etc. Perfect for our dirty ketogenic/South Beach way of eating! Lunch is a bit pricey here – it runs us about 400 Baht for the two of us ($13US), but the salads are huge and awesome. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food at The Salad Concept is colourful, healthy and delicious. I can highly recommend the mango juice, the quinoa and rice balls and the spaghetti pesto with mushrooms. The staff are friendly and efficient. The Salad Concept has a laid back atmosphere, in a clean, bright and spacious restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I used to go to the Salad Concept often and then tired of it and then go back to it... The menu now offers a wide variety of all kind of meals, including wraps, breakfasts, potato wedges, mixed bread with cheese, and many other dishes. The food is always very fresh, especially the salads (many varieties and if you take the basic, which means you create your own salad, five toppings are included in the price, unless you take the more expensive items (such as salmon, chicken, shrimp). I could never finish a salad meal here because they give so much. Another nice feature of this restaurant is its fresh juice bar with healthy speciality drinks. I do like the outdoor sitting at the Nimman branch. I would recommend this place to all my friends, especially if your vegetarian of Vegan. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My family of four ate here during a recent trip to Chiang Mai. We found the food to be quite good, although pretty pricey. the service was average. If you have special dietary restrictions, this restaurant is a good option.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We went to this cafe as we were in Nimman area during lunch. I love how fresh the salad is and they also have a variety of choices to choose from! You can even make your own salad or wrap! The waitress did get one of our drink order wrong but that’s ok. It’s a place to go if you want fresh salad! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Drinking water is a basic human right. Offer free non-plastic bottle drinking water and I'll re-reveiw.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I booked a hotel on Nimman Rd, very busy area, lots to do however my hotel only served Asian buffet. After the third morning I was craving for a big Canadian breakfast, eggs, bacon, sausages, pancakes and bacon and more 🥓. I went searching and saw a cafe called Salad Select, sounded somewhat Canadian, so went in looked at the menu and my 👀 nearly popped out of my head, eggs, bacon, pancakes, more and more. The chef cooked everything to perfection, I’ve been here every morning and it’s great, even nightly dishes are so tasty and healthy. You have to try it. This is a easy 5 star review for me!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I love this place in Chiang Mai!!! Great food, quick service, good price, and fabulous atmosphere. The salads are made with the freshest ingredients; the wraps are made to order and delicious...it is just too bad that they do not have more locations around Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food is yummy (we visited twice) however the wait time is quite long even when the restaurant was only half full and most people already had their meals. The menu has a huge variety including lots of vegetarian and vegan options. They struggle with changing meals, I asked if I could have boiled eggs instead of poached (as other options on the menu have boiled) and they said no which I thought was odd, although, this wasn’t a problem and I am not one to complain. Also wifi was not working at the time. Overall, good place to come especially if you are looking for fresher, healthier options.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Please get the dressing right! I went in wanting a simple Caesar Salad , simple! However, the caesar dressing was very sweet almost like Kraft Italian dressing. I don't know what happened. I tried to explain to the staff that the dressing is way too sweet and the consistency of the dressing is waaaay off but nada. If this is in fact your Caesar dressing I would like to say that it is way too sweet and vinegary!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have been coming here for several years. The menu has expanded but I suggest you stick with what they do best - SALAD! Actually, I take that back. Get your salad in the salad wrap form. I suggest this because 1) the salad is so large your jaw will get tired and 2) they tend to cut the lettuce leaves too large which makes eating it a a bit of a chore. The wrap makes it so much easier to enjoy. You can’t go wrong here. You choose 5 extra ingredients for your salad, choose 1 of many excellent dressings. It’s all fresh and delicious. I have been here 20+ times and never been disappointed. Aloha! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I ate here several times during my month long stay in Chiang Mai. The sashimi salad is excellent. It comes with a spicy wasabi dressing that is unexpected and delightful. I didn't eat a single thing here that I didn't like.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My first experience at this restaurant was disappointing so I decided to give it another try. I went there with my wife for dinner and was again disappointed. Service was not good and food was almost as bad.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I live round the corner from this restaurant. Since January 2012. I visited this restaurant for the first time for dinner today 9 December. Very happy with the food. the service and the price

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ok in a pinch if you want healthy. Has air conditioning which is nice in the heat. Frequently out of avocados but oh well.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: As soon as the morning doors opened, 9am, we were in. Excellent menu options with great photos of each. Many many healthy options to choose from. We had the eggs in a pan with a large salad and pasta with dory fish.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The omelette salad here is huge, and you get a choice of 5 free toppings and a free salad dressing. Other items can be added on if you want to. The food is delicious, but service was a bit lacking - they didn't know their own wifi password and got my salad dressing wrong. The food was still good though.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This chain has a couple locations around Thailand, and all of them were healthy, tasty, affordable options for lunch and dinner. I also used their wifi to send some emails and work one afternoon. I recommend it for those reasons!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Best eggs Benedict I’ve had in a while. Presented with salad can’t miss this one. I’m back again tomorrow

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It really takes a lot for me to enjoy a salad, I genuinely avoid them at all cost. However I came here and built my own with raw salmon, grilled beef and a Northern Thai sauce and was blown away. It's well worth a visit and I have struggled to find a salad that matches it anywhere else.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I see more shopping more now !. plenty of chic eateries and cool cafe & restaurants are emerging everywhere making traffic on Nimman Road almost stand still - indeed it’s a ‘Little Bangkok !. Sadly , after walking up&down in this area for 2 days I don’t see many ‘ Everyday food restaurants’ that suit me. I am not a ‘Heath Freak’ but Salad Concept suits me fine. Other than plenty of salad ,soup and bakery, it serves meat dishes too , prices is alright -still cheap by Thai standards . Where else -you can get delicious ‘ Rice berry with roasted chicken served with a portion of green salad ‘for 85 Baht and a ‘ large serving of Caesar salad ‘for 115 Baht ? Mind you ! there is no service charge. The ambience was great , clean and presentable with good lighting and attentive staff . If you are tired of eating ‘Khao soi and Nam prik ong ‘- try this place for a change ! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Personally, I absolutely love this place and so happy I stumbled across it. I find it quite hard to find this type of fresh food in Asia sometimes and the fact that you can create your own salad is heaven to me. I checked every second box on the order list and added a tonne of toppings plus double dressing and they didn’t hold back. Fresh and filling and tasty! Had the creamy sesame and beetroot dressing with my humongous salad which were sooo good! Plus the detox juice and wheatgrass shot. Not cheap but well worth it if you need to nourish your body :)

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is a great restaurant when you want to eat healthy food or you want a change of food intake from Thai and Western Food. Excellent healthy salads and a juice bar are two of their specialties. Their prices are reasonable, all this in a pleasant atmosphere.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Delicious make-your-own salads! Don’t look at the menu just grab the yellow paper and pick your ingredients (the menu will tell you which dressings are vegan). Bit pricy perhaps, ~180 baht for a salad with two extra toppings, but it’s the kind of salad that will make you full. Wide selection of drinks, also has soy milk.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We had heard a lot about Salad Concept so thought we would drop by while we were out walking. The menu looks very good and since we were not hungry, we just got smoothies. It was good size for 85 Bhat and tasted really good. We watched as other customers got their food and the portions were big and looked good. We would come here again and try food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad Concept is a casual restaurant focusing on salads and other healthy choices. It was renovated a year or so back so now has a better atmosphere. The basic salad comes with a choice of 5 toppings ( ie tomatoes, cucumbers, peppers...), and you can also add on extras like salmon, chicken at extra cost. The salad is very fresh and a good portion, it is a very good value for the money. It is on a busy main tourist road so can get very crowded. They also do take out, but not sure about delivery.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Even if you are not eating vegetarian you will be also delighted. But being a vegan eater myself this has become my place to eat in Thailand and especially here in Chiang Mai. Wow the two sisters have created a incredible place. All greens are super fresh. The salad dressing are various and home made. Wish i could find such a place in the West. I would even love to meet the two sisters and talk about opening up a possible franchise, but on enquiring about them I was told they are both pregnant and are coming in very seldom. They took care of their father when he was ill with cancer and helped him to recover by eating green. Way to go girls. Then when they saw him recover by eating green and healthy they opened this restaurant and now together again the life force offers them an extra boon by giving them the appearance of Life in their belly. Grace to you. The only minus on a 100 +s is that hardly any one can speak the very simple basis of English. 40% of the guest in a filled restaurant where “Fahreng” white people and yet I had three girls coming to my table to answer the most simple and basic question, then they managed to find a forth person who managed to answer me. Thank-you Tang May for making me feel less of a Martian. Going back today for my breakfast and lunch all in One. Bravo again food excellent even you could win a Michelin award for such incredible food. Decor is also a 5 star and cleanliness also. Serge Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Where looking for supper and came across this place. They serve a wide variety of salad and mix of fish and meat.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I visited with 3 more friends. At the First sight seeing menu there were quite many options and well organized. We ordered all different foods and tried. All food quality were good and tasty. Price was also reasonable. Will visit again.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: So far we have had no luck finding somewhere selling fresh salad dishes until we found The Salad Concept.... Serving up a wide range of delicious salads, quinoa & rice dishes mixed with a range of different fish & meat we felt hugely revitalised after our meal. Also my friend is vegetarian and they had a lot to offer for somebody like herself. Going back for breakfast this morning !!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you'd like a healthy and classy place to be...it's here. Their food is tasty with generous portions of fresh salads. The Egg Florentine , all day breakfast, is one of the best I've had. So is their fried Dory fish to go with the brown rice for dinner. Service is professional from the servers to the pantry staff preparing the food. There's a wide range of menu... vegan, eat fish &veg only..., eat eggs + veg only..., white meat only..., to satisfy everyone.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great salads, great staff, helpfull, great atention,clean full, best place for salad in chiang mai. Its not easy to find a place to eat fresh vegetable, on south east asia, here we found, we go everyday, fair price.Highly recomendable

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The people that started this place had a good idea. Try to appeal to a wider customer base. They have a fairly healthy menu but it could use improvement. Good place for a healthy meal.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I used to go to the Salad Concept often and then tired of it. I decided to go back and rekindle my taste for healthy food. Today, the Salad Concept has a history of 9 years and obviously have learned a lot from this experience. The menu now offers a wide variety of meals, including wraps, a large breakfast choice (e.g., classic pancakes, bacon and eggs and eggs Benedict), potato wedges/balls, mixed bread with cheese, and many other dishes. The food appears always very fresh, especially the salads (many varieties and if you take the basic, which means you create your own salad, for 69 baht five toppings are included in the price; for every additional topping, you pay 6 baht, unless you take the more expensive items (such as salmon, chicken, shrimp, about 25-35 baht each). I could never finish a salad meal here because they give so much. My salad came to 99 baht and I left about one quarter because I was full. Another nice feature of this restaurant is its fresh juice bar with healthy specialty drinks (hote, not fresh if you take the berry smoothie, so you know). The service has improved considerably from when the restaurant first opened (I actually mentioned the poor service to one of the owners- maybe that helped), but still could improve. Finally, the property has been renovated several times and now offers a quite decent environment, with both indoor and outdoor sitting. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I’ll admit the options were overwhelming! So I settled on the Mango salad with shrimp and a strawberry dressing . It was delicious but lacked just a bit . Overall everything was wonderful . The kids picked pancakes which are served all day and came with this amazing coffee mouse topped with strawberry preserves ! My husband chose the spicy chicken salad tacos and quinoa salad , but a bit spicy .

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My wife and I went to the Salad Concept around 1:30pm but opted for a couple of breakfast dishes. I had the pancakes, bacon and eggs. She had the eggs Benedict. Both items came with a large side salad. The salad itself would be worth the price of the meal in some countries. It was fresh and nutritious. Both of entrees were delicious. It would be better to put the salads on separate plates as it cools off the hot entrees. Portions are generous. Service can be a bit slow as many items are put together when ordered. Staff is friendly and healthy. The build your own salads are still on the menu but seem too difficult for many people to handle and certainly slows down the process. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We've been to The Salad Concept three times while staying in the area. Two for dinner and one for breakfast. Had the wraps, salad, potato balls, wedges and spinach omlette. All have been good. Salad is very cheap and big, you can select additional toppings. Juices and smoothies are very nice too and a large selection. Good table service. Very nice environment.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A regular salad is 69B(choose 5 toppings). Extra regular toppings are 6B each. Special toppings such as guacamole or smash potato are 20-40B each. 1 sauce is free, extra is 25B each. I recommend northern style green chili sauce. The mixed bread with cheese is great!! Juice and smoothies are about 85B. 基本沙拉是69B可以選五種料，特殊配料20-40B不等，可免費選一種沙拉醬，第二種醬料要加25B。果汁、冰沙大約85B。推薦泰北綠辣椒醬！建議點綜合麵包作為澱粉來源，搭配起司很好吃。

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nice juices and shots. Food is not bad but not fantastic either Nice juice selection. Nice area. Air conditioned.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Interesting menu but really the best thing is their juice shots. Ordered quinoa with no cheese but the waitress told my Thai friend the dish was not good without it. Horrible but 4 stars for the juice shots.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Came here for breakfast, the pancakes were pretty good, with eggs and bacon served with a side salad. Would be nice if the salad was smaller or separate, the salad dressing was on the pancakes slightly and was not a nice combination. The only minor niggle about the food was that, it was good and I enjoyed it. They have a good selection of very heathy to not so much, my choice being the not so much!! The young guy who served us needs more training in the art of hospitality, he couldn't hear the order we were trying to make as his earphones were blocking his ears!! I found it quite embarrassing. The food was as you would expect for a mid-priced breakfast Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Very value for the money even compare with the same quality of salad and smoothies in Bangkok, lovely place, well service, delicious, good atmosphere, highly recommend

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you are looking for a good salad place, go no further than salad concept. My favorite are the wraps that you can customize. The smoothies are also delicious. Salad Concept delivery are also done with Food Panda delivery service, which I have used numerous times.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Have been on a number of occasions and the food has been fantastic each time. Staff are still learn new skills and I hope hey will improve with time. The menu is large and there are ready made choices and make your own. They offer both sit in and take away.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: every once in a while I want a salad, not sure why cause i love meat but this place has a good selection of different salads and at 69 baht you can't beat the price.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have walked passed this place many times and always thought just salad But wow it’s not They serve all kinds of food With Salad And it’s delicious I have never eaten such Fresh Salad and they even do mash potato 👍 They Also do all kinds of heathy drinks I opted for the blueberry soda Check this place out you 👍 Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great place. Very clean good healthy food. Reasonably price. Regular nice size salad with 5 free toppings Just 69 bath. Great atmosphere with good air con

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I go to salad concept regularly because their food is good but their service and staff are terrible. They are worse at the moat location than the Niman location, but they usually get your order wrong, can’t figure out bills, change and receipts, and often are just rude.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food is amazing, the tea and coffee are amazing, the staff is sweet and the place is cute! highly recommend

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We we’re really looking forward to trying the vegan mac n cheese, after reading plenty of good reviews on it. However on the first visit, they didn’t have it in stock, which wasn’t a problem, we just had a drink instead. Yet a few days later we visited again, and were told they did have it in stock. So we ordered our meals and drinks and waited. Roughly 25 minutes later, the waitress came over to say that actually, they had ran out of the meal we wanted, even though we’d been made to wait for so long, thinking the food was on its way. How this miscommunication between the kitchen and waitressing team happened- I’m not sure, but we wished they had told us at the beginning they had run out!! Overall a really disappointing experience- wouldn’t visit again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Love this place for healthy, fresh meal options! Their soups, salads, and breads are all good. Their homemade dressings are really delicious! Best Caesar dressing I’ve had! If you want something warm, their fried dory fish with a salad is also very nice! TIP: Ask for a member card! 10% discount on food, and it’s free and easy to get!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great atmosphere and friendly service. The food was fresh tasty and good size. Also, wifi is available.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I've been hearing about this place for ages and finally tried it for lunch today. I was disappointed. Yes the salads were fresh but I felt the vegetarian options were lacking imagination - being vegetarian doesn't mean I only want to eat vegetables! I had a tofu salad wrap which contained big chucks of bland tofu in one half and vegetables only in the other half. I could see a couple of seasame seeds on the tofu but couldn't detect any flavour at all. My friend's iced coffee was so sweet she couldn't drink it and I ended up with iced tea rather than hot tea - partly my mistake but partly the waitress, none of the waiting staff seemed to speak English. It certainly wasn't terrible, just average. I've waited a long time to eat here. . I'll wait an equally long time before I consider going back. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I liked the waitresses, they were friendly. But the food and the drinks were just average, nothing special, for me. All the drinks, wraps, and sausage meals were just average and we were hungry too.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A good place to eat if you are on your own and looking for a mixture of Western and Thai dishes. It tends to be noisy: poor acoustic setting but meals are tasty.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salad dishes are many varieties you can choose.Salads are tasty and fresh. Juices from different kinds of VEGETABLES and fruits for detox

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is place has one of the best salads in Chiang Mai- as is build you one style. They also have a wide range of “ custom salads “ and lots of other options. So it’s not just a salad place. You can also get your fix of fresh squeezed veggie juices. I have been coming here for 1 or 2 times a week for years and still love the place. Prices are reasonable for what you get.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After reading several negative reviews, my husband and I were a bit cautious about eating at The Salad Concept...but the food was delicious and fresh. Yes, the waiters are slow and were not the brightest bunch of servers, but the food tasted great. In fact, we liked it so much that we ate several meals there. I would recommend it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Came here for lunch and had the chicken caesar wrap, was absolutely delicious! Fresh dressing, chicken, lettuce. Prices aren’t cheap but are reasonable for the quality of the food. They have a large menu with lots of variety, good internet connection, and kind staff. Would definitely go back here.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The largest and most fresh salad that I’ve had over the past two months throughout South East Asia! Couldn’t believe the size of it. I had the tofu salad (main) ..150 baht. Good value for money though.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: "Organic vegetables", if hydroponically grown qualifies in your view. The Internet is the slowest I have seen in Chiang Mai -- and worse, the routers are so mis-configured that no VPN connection is possible. This raises the security risk of doing anything much over the Internet in this place. That said, the vegetables do taste fresh and the grilled salmon is very good. I come there pretty often and just do not use the Internet for anything serious.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A famous salad restaurant located at Nimman road, this restaurant is famous from a variety of salad dressing (there are traditional salad dressing also) and fresh vegetable. It provides a big portion for one plate. Be calm when you order haha. ร้านสลัดชื่อดังย่านนิมมาน จุใจกับปริมาณและความหลากหลายของน้ำสลัด รอบนี้ของสั่ง wrap salad roll มาในรูปแบบสวยงาม เลือก topping ได้ตามชอบใจ เค้าจะใส่น้ำสลัดมาให้เลย กินง่ายกว่าปกติ (แต่ถ้าแตกก็เละเลย 555) ส่วนตัวชอบนะ แป้งที่ห่อมาอร่อยเลย ปริมาณเหมือนน้อย แต่กินไม่หมด เพราะสั่งอย่างอื่นด้วย ส่วนเห็ดชุปแป้งทอดอร่อยดี เนื้อเห็ดเด้งดึ๋งชิ้นโต แป้งทอดมาก็กรอบอร่อยมาก Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We chanced upon this great little cafe by accident. The food is really fresh, interesting and plentiful. We could have shared a wrap it was so stuffed with fillings. It is spotlessly clean, air conditioned and decor matched the freshness of the food. We will definitely return when next in Chiang Mai. This place offers a refreshing break from Thai food when our western tummies need a change. Don;t miss eating at this delightful cafe.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Sawasdee Today at the Sompet Branch, the Staff requested me, my wife and my baby to move away from a Double table occupied from a single person because they was unwilling to figure out a bill...! We have asked this female guest prior if there is space available and she agreed without any problems. After that,the staff, unaible to attend us properly, requested in a rude manner to move to another table , much smaller and inconvinient for us. So, we felt unwelcome and left said Location. I visited Salad Concept since its opened and meet one of the owners once personally ,and she explained me the background of this place . Its a shameful act of ignorance towards me and my family. Im sure its also bad for reputation to treat long term customers in such a impolite way. I highly suggest to give proper instructions to staff to avoid furthermore such situations. Those staff seem to be unskilled and not trained enough. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Hands down the best place to eat delicious healthy food in Chiang Mai. We had been eating Thai food like crazy in Bangkok and by the time we got to Chiang Mai, our stomachs needed a break. The prices are more than fair and the quality of food went beyond all my expectations. Heck, my father even loved The Salad Concept and he's a die hard meat-eating American. Thank you Salad Concept for giving our fried/spicy tummies a little break on our recent trip. I will make it a point to come visit you guys the next time I'm in Chaing Mai. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food was very good! It tasted fresh and tasty! We will be sure to go back as I am craving that banana smoothie again!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salads are excellent and are cheap. We were looking for a clean restaurant and to have a decent meal, ... we found it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Was pleasantly surprised. Salads , smoothies, paninis and burgers. Of course the sales sell the place and it will take you several months to explore all the options! Don’t miss the smoothies or fresh cold ginger drink.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My husband and I had two salads for dinner - gigantic portions and all for 148 baht. Leaf lettuces with the choice of 5 toppings such as seeds, beans, big red pepper strips, hardboiled egg, and so on. I topped this off with delicious tamarind and sesame dressing, while my husband enjoyed the avocado cilantro. Really, you can make a meal out of this. Oh, and did I mention 148 baht!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Amazing salads, super fresh produce, go a couple times a week. My only problem with the place is their huge leafs of lettuce. Armed with only a fork, who wants to deal with a hand-sized slab of lettuce all covered in sauce when eating a salad? That's just laziness. Cut it into manageable pieces, so we can eat it on the go, and not end up looking like we were in the blast radius of a ranch dressing factory explosion.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food was a very high standard. Lovely healthy options and the passion fruit soda was delicious!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I was happy to find a restaurant that was combining both features: being healthy AND delicious. You can design your own salad. That is fine! But getting a juice that is only a puree of fruits, without sugar, condensed milk or ice etc. is like heaven.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Visited a few times. Salads were good then decided to try something different on the menu. Two other plates (one fish and the other a meat in a bread pocket) was not so appealing to me. So if I want a salad then I go here, if I want something else then I go somewhere else. Enough said. BTW - a bit on the pricy side for me but service was good.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A great place for some healthy food in the Ninmin area. Build your own salad or go with one of their suggestions. Also great wraps. A nice change of pace and bright clean place for lunch or dinner.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Popped in for two snacks yesterday. The place was empty except for one customer using a laptop. It was clean and tidy, but the staff were not friendly, though efficient enough. I had a mushroom soup, which was one of the smallest portions of anything I have ever had (photo provided) - half a dozen spoonfuls and it was gone! Tasted alright, but not of mushrooms and it wasn't hot enough. I also had a berry smoothie which was of appropriate size and tasted wonderful. I would go back for this alone but not for the food. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Just perfect for a light lunch, modern and Thai hip, serving lighter faire and salads. Staff bring the meal to you, the soups are amazing if slightly spicy. All the other dishes we saw being served looked really good. Very reasonably priced for the quality, saw several Salad Concepts in Chiang Mai, the one we tried we would go to again.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Came here for lunch and it was conveniently located close to our hotel. I appreciated the large colorful menus with photos, the airy and cool ambience, and the fast WiFi. But the service took forever. Our waitress seemed to be serving every other table but ours even though we sat down before others. And eventually we had to flag her down to get her to come to our table to order. This issue might be to two room dining area setup in the restaurant. The food took a loooong time to come out. I ordered a tofu salad, which was good but I also ordered a watermelon pineapple smoothie that was absolutely terrible. It tasted so artificial that I literally took two sips of it and left the rest because it tasted like liquid bubblegum. My husband ordered a salmon salad and berry smoothie that was good and my brother in law ordered a mango smoothie which was good. He also ordered a fruit salad that was kind of disappointing as it felt like mostly apple slices. Overall, some of the food/drinks were very hit or miss (DON’T order the watermelon pineapple smoothie!) but service very slow. Somewhat disappointing for the relatively higher prices that were paid for the food compared to other places in Chiang Mai. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Really yummy, healthy food. Good range of options on the menu using fresh ingredients, including burgers, salads, wraps, pastas and grilled paninis (plus more). We ate here twice whilst visiting Chiang Mai and even managed to find dishes that our three and six year olds found appetising. The healthy hotdog was fantastic. Both times (a lunch and a dinner) it was packed, which was a good sign. The smoothies were a real winner with our boys and the fresh pressed juices were delicious. Recommend sharing the Rainbow Shooter selection of juices, although our kids got a bit of a shock with the beetroot juice! Reasonably priced by Western standards, but expensive compared to the Thai street food options available nearby. A good alternative when you feel the need for a healthy alternative to the usual holiday food. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: i ate at the salad concept today and tried to order risotto, the waiter didn't speak english and didn't know what i was talking about... i asked for the manager and then asked for risotto again, she said it was off the menu, then i asked for mac and cheese, she said it was off the menu, so i said give me a salad wrap, when it came i took a bite & i could see there was a small bug in it....i asked for my money back telling the manager and she wouldn't give me a refund, i want to warn people XXXX to go there, the salad has no taste and is dirty and the servers don't seem to care.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Had a superb dinner there: risotto with quinoa and a wrap, all very good and the drinks / smoothies are great. Recommend the set of juice shots!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Everything on the menu looked great, and what we tried was amazing and fresh. The drinks are nice too, try especially the rainbow shots!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The Salad Concept is mainly a salad and soup restaurant in Suthep, a touristy area of Chiang Mai. The place is of good size, clean and comfortable. They have wide variety of what appears to be healthy salads. I hose fruit salad which was good.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If your on a health buzz I'd highly recommend this place. Huge selection of really good fruits & vegetables.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A very option to break from Thai food. A variety of healthy and not so healthy choices from the menu. We loved to create our own salad for less than 120 baht. We were given a very generous amount of vegies.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I went back three days in a row with various people from my hotel, because it was so yum. Honestly though, I didn’t have anything except the wrap and the soup. The salad and wraps are their specialty so when you come here just get them. Nice big serving size. They will wrap them to go or eat eat. They can get a little messy. But the veggies were fresh, avocado was perfectly ripe and it hit the spot of a healthy fresh meal. Reminded me of something I could of eaten at home. I felt really good eating it and afterwards. I also had a frappe and the cold pressed juices (on different days). Both were great. They had soy milk and listened when I ask for sugar on the side and it came in a little baby jug. The juice was also good, although not the biggest serve. But I asked for lots of ginger and I got it. Only downside I can think of was the highly annoying Christmas music playing. 🤦🏼‍♀️ Would come back. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We have been there at the 30.11.2017 in the brunch on the eastern side of the channel. Looks like brandnew opened in a modern style with view to the mainroad. By the menu we have choosen first each a soup of pumpkin and one of mushrooms and after the basic mixed lettuce with 5 "free" toppings of choice just for 69Tbh... thats a value deal for the Salad in Thailand ! In the beginning its a bit confusing to create your own Salad and order it by little sheet of paper but they do have also a wide selection of already set uped onces. The quality and quantity of the basic mixed lettuce is perfect..the quantity of the toppings could be improved even for some more money. For the salads they are offering a wide selection of different dressings. We have choosen a creamy one with honey and seasam and one with mushrooms. They were ok but the could be made tastier even as the soups. The service there is friendly but the stuffs english knowledge should be improved. Our resumee for that Salad concept brunch... we will come back but just for the basic mixed lettuce. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I was able to order a salad to go. The inside of the restaurant was roomy and nice. The price is really good for how big the salad was, I couldn’t finish it! Fresh ingredients and it was excellent.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The dishes are big, but price is not that expensive...They have quite a variety of salad, wrap, and rice dishes to choose from...can also create your own salad or wrap which is pretty cool

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This concept supposed to be all about health, but that does not add up the fact they heat their soups in the microwave! I asked them about it, and it's just how they do it, they told me. Overpriced concept which has not much to do with real health.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Me and my boyfriend we were so tired of eating rice every day, so went tho the salad concept for lunch. It's great - you get huge portion (I couldn't finish it all) of fresh, healthy salad for decent price. I took mango salad and a latte and my boyfriend - egg benedict and Thai tea frappe. We rare rally recommend it if you get tired of rice and noodles, as we did :)

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Located on bustling street of Nimmanahemin, the Salad Concept is a must for those who love salad. Apart from regular dishes, one can also choose the preferred vegetables for his/her dish.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My boyfriend and I have been here twice in the past two days. Good to have a fresh salad in Thailand as salads are many abit of iceberg, cucumber and tomato! Huge choice and can select what you want. Also have vegan options. We had breakfast on our first day, reasonable prices and was pretty quick with food! Staff don’t have the best English but this was never an issue I asked for sauce on the side etc and I had no problems :) Would deffo recommend if you’re into a big filling salad/wrap while visiting Chiang Mai. Very good aircon (and toilet!) Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great to be able to get a choice Air conditioning Good simple food Great juice, small Salad bar very complete

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I asked for water. I was given 2 unwrapped plastic straws (that I didn't ask for or want) and a plastic water bottle branded with the restaurant name but no information about its source. Looking around I noticed every drink was served with an unwrapped plastic straw. PLEASE think about the environment! We do not need so much plastic wastage. Only unwrap and give customers straws when they ask for it?! Ideally also don't use individual plastic bottles especially without any information about what it's origin is. In most countries that is illegal. The food was pretty good (not great but good) but such inconsideration for the environmental impact of what you do is unforgivable for me. The restaurant was freezing cold. Excessive use of air conditioning. 25 degrees outside; about 15 degrees inside. My guest and I left early because it was too cold. We all have a duty to minimise our impact on the environment. Please change. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: That was wonderful salad for our family there were variety of dishes. Healthy food price is moderate reasonable

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We don't know how we found this place but when we did we came back. A lot. After being in Thailand for 3 weeks we were desperate for some good clean food and you get that here. The salads are incredible and the sizes are very good. We highly recommend a visit here. You won't regret it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I usually don't eat raw veggies when I travel outside of the West but made an exceptin for The Salad Concept. I'm glad I did as I enjoyed the freshness, quality and variety of the menu during my recent visit to Chiang Mai. I liked it so much that I ate there twice. Definitely recommend! (I am vegetarian but there were many non-veg options.)

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Absolutely love this place! The food is very fresh and well put together. Large range of foods not just salads and the price is unbelievably cheap for the serving sizes. The menu is great and even explains the benefits of the ingredients you are eating.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I'll keep it simple, this place is great! If you're looking for a little familiarity and health with good price tag come here. They have so many salad options the smoothies are amazing and so are the juices! Highly recommend this place.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Where can I start? I actually used to LIKE this place (I went twice on a previous trip) but even back then the service was wooden and unresponsive, however my experience tonight convinced me that I should NEVER ever give this place my custom again. The waitress twice reached across my partner to update the bill and aside from invading his body space, on the second occasion he was actually eating with his fork poised to go in his mouth! I was utterly incredulous and there was no excuse me offered, clearly a waitress on auto pilot with zero customer awareness or customer service training. My meal took ages and arrived much later than other diners but the waiters seemed to think that the side dish (mashed potatoes) would content me until the main (tofu burger) arrived. This was a sorry affair: a piece of mulched cardboard that was supposed to be tofu, the coarse cut chips were undercooked and the mango wasn't ripe. I asked for tomato ketchup and they brought tomato soup. Eventually having lost interest in eating, a condiment rack arrived (why didn't they offer this earlier?). The waiters have a very shaky grasp of English too, ok if you are in a small restaurant in lamphun but not in an international city like chiang mai. Hey, waste your money if you want to but I will never set foot in there again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After being in Thailand for almost three weeks, this restaurant saved me and my stomach from all the sauces and different flavors of all the Thai cuisine. Came here on the last days of my trip. Found it by chance on my way to an Italian restaurant I was looking for. And it was the best. The food is very good, sure it's mainly salads, but still... quick service ( but a lot slow on the register), tasty food, and great option for those who got tired of choosing which thai dish to avoid.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I like this restaurant as they have variety choices of salad and salad dressing. Their vegetable are very fresh and also juice great. Reasonable with good service. Location is easy to find as it located on the Nimman road.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I ate at the salad concept every single day that I stayed in chiang mai! It is hard to find a good salad place when travelling, especially when that's what I eat everyday at home. This place was fresh, tasty, and very friendly. Even though the staff does not speak perfect english all you have to do is write down your order on a piece of paper! You can create your own salad or wrap, or pick from the menu. It was a great place to get a nutritional meal and was not too expensive. You definitely get your money's worth! The wraps are HUGE

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Overpriced food from cans. No quality. Staff speaks NO English. This was my second and last visit to this place. Both times we had issues with the order, the staff and today the owner. I asked for a box/container multiple times. Staff ignores you but nods as if they understood. The bread was horrible. The honey vinaigrette looks greenish. When I asked what that is they confirmed this was the honey vinaigrette. Olives are from cans. The avocado served was black. No taste whatsoever to the salad. The sandwich on my prior visit had some possibly to lots of salt added. Internet was non existent both times. Save your money and go somewhere where they value your business.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Another regular spot for me, big servings of fresh salad with a good range of add on's if you feeling like a heavier meal. Good range of healthy drinks. Very reasonably priced venue Great place to catch up with friends

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We went there twice and love it... trendy space, awsome smothies, fresh ingredientes, tasty.... and not expensive. Just love the concept

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Being a Vego I find this place very easy to find something on the menu, not that it's Vego only, definitely not, but like most places they have a great selection of Vegetarian options. A modern clean Restaurant with maybe not the friendliest staff but still fast service & happy to help. A huge choice of meals on Menu, all day breakfast, American, English, croissants, toast, buns, fruit muesli, choices for everyone. Good Coffee, juices, smoothies all the great things needed to top up the tank for a big day exploring. You won't be disappointed, not a lot of parking but just over the busy road from Old City, walkable to most places.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Love, love, love this restaurant. They have a lot of good vegetarian and vegan options, but also meat dishes. I love the wraps and the fact that you can pick what you want to go into them.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I recently developed a disease where becoming vegetarian is in my best interest, booo!
