Anyways, after I discovered this unfortunate news I had to find some go to staple-places to eat and given the Salad Concept in Old Town was just around the corner from me, and I'm lazy, it become my place.. The make your own burrito option was good for me since there is a lot of foods I can/can't eat... but I can understand where some people say it lacks taste... I don't think it lacks taste, but it doesn't carry it's own unique flavor that makes it stand out above any other burrito joint... but I don't think that's necessarily what it is going for... The ingredients inside the burrito do however taste clean, fresh, ripe, and made me feel healthy... however they do overkill it with the salad if you don't request less... I also tried many of the risotto's and other dishes and felt the same way... The restaurant itself is clean and tidy and the staff are friendly and glad to help... there is a nice atmosphere which is good for people who want to have a read, chat with friends, have a casual business meetings etc... as in it is calm and peaceful inside.. I kept going back for a reason so I can definitely say it's worth the visit! Ah and prices are moderate enough, you feel like you get what you pay for! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food was okay the cafe looks very trendy and the food presentation was good but lacked the taste.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nice!!!! Beautiful restaurant. Good Prise and many choices to order your own meal. 🕺So if you don't know what do you want to eat or drink, you will find it in this place!! Hope you enjoy 😊

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you travel a lot like i do, and you are in one place for a while, some times a break from the typical food is welcome. Love Thai food as i may, i needed a time out from pad thai, sticky rice, and the like. This place was a great palate cleanser. The menu is expansive. You can choose from pre-build wraps, salads, smoothies etc., or you can build your own. I decided to build my own salad. There are a lot of ingredients to choose from. Everything seemed fresh, you can build a health meal or indulge. The environment was clean an bright. They also have a selection of western-ish desserts. Again, i was looking for that. I indulged in the lemon berry cake and a caramel brownie to take away.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I loved this place. If you fancy a change from Thai food and want a heathy option then you'll struggle to find something better in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nice and cool, food fredh, service frienfly, interesting concept of placing an order, a note pad on you're table. Anyway we had chicken salad pita, fried tofu and a assionfruit soda and a lemon soda. Taste was good but not quite enough. A little pricey for what you get.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: When you're in the mood for some greens, this is the place to go! I've had the salmon, chicken, and sashimi salads and my fiancé has tried a few of the wraps, all very good! We also like the detox drinks as well. Not too sugary and very tasty. Portions are large, and they deliver by food panda as well. The only downside is slow service. Every time we've been here one person gets served their food and the other person doesn't get theirs until the first is almost finished with their meal, so don't come when you're starving! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Eaten there a few times and the food is a good. It's a fresh and healthy choice for a light vegetarian meal. I was surprised however to find that they don't accept payment by card, its a busy and modern restaurant and this should really be an option. Also, the only option for drinking water is home branded plastic water bottles. This is not a suitable option for such a restaurant, which prides itself on the source and quality of its produce.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great atmosphere and delicious, fresh salad. Built my own salad and tried the rainbow juice flight. Portions were generous. Will be back!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Clean, health food but bland, flavorless. Not bad but not delicious. Had the Quinoa Salad Northern Thai Style with a Pineapple Ginger smoothie. Brightly lit, busy, family ambiance. Not recommended. Try healthy food somewhere else.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Eaten here a few times. Consistently good. Love the berry smoothie. Love the wholesome and very huge salads. Soups often half a bowl (I think their ladle is getting smaller). Staff extremely friendly and helpful. Highly recommended.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: So good. Portions are huge. Ceaser salad was the best I ever had. Smoothies are way above average. Easy to find.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Having been on the road traveling south east Asia for a few months now it's clear it's hard to find a good hearty salad that compares to home. I had been on the hunt and we wandered into this place and it did not disappoint. You can build your own salad or order one of theirs they have quinoa as well which I had also been missing in my life. The food was excellent and we also tried their fresh pressed juice flight that was so wonderful!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A must eat in Chang Mai. Best salad I have ever eaten by far. You get to create it yourself with a variety of delicious toppings. The drinks menu is also as appetising, I had a mango smoothly which was to die for. I honestly considered moving hostels so I was closer and could visit for lunch daily.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Entered the place after a long walk along Nimman main road, staff were attentive and friendly and I bought a detox juice (apple, beetroot and celery) as takeaway. Juice is concentrated and real nice for a person like me who likes fruits and vegetables. Good to visit at least once during a trip at Chiang Mai as it serves food and drinks with a healthier concept compared to other restaurants and cafes.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food here is quite good, good portions and for an affordable price. Definitely refreshing after a day out in the heat.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad Concept is super affordable (69baht for basic salad,89 for wrap) and all the ingredients are incredibly fresh. I had a wrap with broccoli, onion, croutons, carrot and cucumber and it was one of the best things I've had in Chiang Mai so far. I also had the potato cheese balls which were great. 10/10 would recommend and definitely going back

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This restaurant has a great fresh salads menu. Interesting and many choices for customers - a combination/variety of veges, meats, dressings, soups, etc. Really refreshing.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It had been so hot during the day that we wanted something refreshing to eat for dinner. We found this restaurant close to our hotel 'Chedi Home' and it turned out to be the perfect place. The salads are huge and so fresh. You can buy a basic salad with 5 additional ingredients plus you can select some optional toppings. The soups were also very good as well as the various smoothies and drinks. They had free wifi with a password which was displayed on each table. The service was very good and the staff friendly. We ended up eating there 3 nights in a row! We would definitely go there again and wish we had something similar back home. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We came here for my birthday meal. The restaurant is very clean and modern. We chose our own ingredients to go in our salad and also ordered the tempura mushrooms and cheese and potato balls. Everything was delicious! I highly recommend the lemon ice tea. The flavour was incredible! Certainly be coming here again.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Basic salad is 69b. Meals cost abt 115b. Nice ambience, hygienic, free wifi and lots of seating. Near shopping area so really nice. But note that this is considered expensive for locals.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We came here a couple of times during our stay in Chiang Mai. The salads are great and fresh and perfect size for two people. We also really liked the pumpkin soup and their fresh veggie juices. Great for when you want a break from all that street food and could use some nutrients to boost your immune system.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Was there for dinner with a friend. Fresh salad and juice. That was what we needed after a long week of work. Although the dressings were on the sweet side. I ordered tamarind dressing but had to order another one at 25thb as it was too sweet for me

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ordered regular size of salad but the portion is just way too big! Don't forget to try their herbal drink too (iced butterfly pea tea) :) if they have smoked salmon instead of raw salmon on menu, that would be perfect :D

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This venue is opposite Somphet Market, but on the other side of the moat. If you're craving vegetables and/or salad, this is the place to go. Fabulous food at reasonable prices.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This a great option if you're looking for a place to get a succulent salad or wrap. All the ingredients are fresh (wide variety) and you can choose among many different dressings (vegan options as well). Good value for money. Very nice ambient (although the AC is usually really cold). Great smoothie men as well. PS. They also have some meat dishes on the menu

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We drove past here and the next night I popped in. I was pleased to find fresh salad options and ordered the Organic Tofu Quinoa Salad which came with a sesame tamarind dressing that was DELICIOUS! The next night my partner and I came again and added potato wedges to our salad mix and that was also really good! My partner ordered the red curry which was spicy but good. The only reason I'm giving this 4 stars instead of 5 is because I'm not sure that they use organic produce which to me personally is important. Aside from that the food was great, portions are generous, and the service is good! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Came here wanting somewhere nice to sit and something healthy after a few days of fried food. Says salads starting from 69thb but actually it's pretty slim pickings at that price. You need to add a few extras to get a nice salad (about 25 each) and no nice spicy Thai salad options which seemed odd. Had a salad in a pita which was disappointing and had a rather strange dressing. Also a spicy chicken with salad and a sort of wild rice. The rice was lovely and the lettuce leaves were too. The chicken thing tasted of the smell of a pet shop. Don't know how they managed it. Shouldn't have ordered something that wasn't a salad. Staff were lovely and it was a nice place to sit. Very quiet though so you can hear grazing vegans (I think it is a good vegan option as lots of choice). Won't be returning. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: What a find! Loved the time spent here. Staff were friendly, food was nutritious and so enjoyable, well done to the chef in charge, you are doing a great job! The place was buzzing and so bright and airy. Will of course return when in Chiang Mai again.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great food! Not the cheapest place to eat but it is worth to visit this place. Salads for every taste.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The founding ladies continue to reach higher by sticking to a refreshingly healthy / tasty menu plus expanding the choices. After closing for a number of months to remodel, adding a delightful atriam, expanding the kitchen, and substantially broadening the menu, Salad Concept sticks to its baseline business model. Great Move!! In addition, the menu now offers meat lovers some healthy options. An aspect that deserves mention is a venturesome creativity while carefully keeping a keen eye the underlying motto - healthy dining! One of my favorites is the quinoa wrap! Without doubt, this spot deserves AT LEAST a try....... Lets give it a 9.5 on a 10 scale. I'm a pretty rigid Vegan, but I can still take all my non-vegan friends along and keep them happy.... Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place is great because their menu is full of food from everywhere! Great quality, good service, and tasty meal

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: 你喜欢不喜欢纯素食？水灵，好吃。蔬菜沙拉（豆腐，蘑菇，南瓜，胡萝卜，黄瓜，奶酪feta,豆类，菠菜），印度茶（Ahmad), 245 泰铢。 Fresh vegetables, nice feta cheese and spinach. Clean and nice environment. Salad with cheese , pumpkin, cucumber, carrot etc and Ceylon tea ( actually Ahmad tea, 55 bht ) and spinach 245 Thai bath altogether. Huge portion. Unfortunately not all staff understand English and they didn't give me answer about Gluten free food. But they all are very polite and nice. Definitely come again, ask them again haha. Чистое и приятное место, персонал вежливый, еда не очень дорогая. Свежие овощи и вкусный салат. Не все понимают по английски к сожалению. 245 соо на фото. Индийский чай - Ahmad 55 бат. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A great location, a nice atmosphere and a delicious selection of dishes. A parking place is available if required.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Highly recommend to take a trip too salad concept great choice or make your own. Salad selection is fantastic lots too choose from and this can make your decisions very hard as you will not know what to have so I suggest visit this place many times. Each visit I have chosen something different and I have not been disappointed. It can get very busy lots of none Thai people visiting as well as Thais. Easy to locate with lots of transport to get you there.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A must while in Chiangmai. Simple and amazing. Tip: try not to wear white T-shirt while eating there. ;)

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Stopped in here after reading reviews, whenever I see "huge portions" to me I just assume it will be a normal size, however the salad was truly enormous and delicious. Simple checklist for what you want, tons of options (white sesame dressing is really good), starting from 69 baht for a custom salad. Add ons like cheese and avocado are available for extra, also a wrap option starting from 89. Would definitely go back to balance out the fried foods around thailand!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We mainly wanted healthy juice and smoothies. But once we saw the menu we stayed for lunch. Lots of great healthy choices from rice dishes to pasta to burger. Interesting fusions of Thai and western taste. Good atmosphere. Food takes a bit long to come out but smoothies and juices hold you over

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Good salad and service staffs are friendly, have to many different foods for you to try, not to expensive

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I had a great wrap for only 89 Baht with plenty of options to fill it with! I also had a protein smoothie, which was a little on the expensive side (it was actually more than my meal) which was also very tasty! Would recommend a visit!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We went twice to this place in the last two weeks - we tried the eggs Benedict and one of the 'make your own' wrap! I definitely recommend the wraps (the salads look pretty amazing too), they are massive and full of fresh goodness. So many options for food and drinks, even though we thought the drinks are a bit over priced. On the down side, the service wasn't great both time we went there, you need to get the attention of a staff member if you want to get service.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Stayed in Chaing Mai for several weeks and this became my daily breakfast or lunch spot. Higher price than Thai street food but you get salads that are absolutely HUGE, so fresh and full of fantastic ingredients. English language isn't always the strongest with some of the staff but they are very friendly and try really hard and ordering is always easy and tick sheets are used to build the salads. Must try the juice shots too - perfect for hangovers and the flu - tried and tested by me!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Clean and bright with a huge salad menu as well as breakfast, burgers, coffee, healthy teas, smoothies and desserts. Everything is beautifully presented and tastes amazing. You could easily mistake The Salad Concept for a chic Southern California eatery. The prices are reasonable and the staff is friendly. Mostly tourists and business travelers and everyone seemed content. I recommend the eggs benedict with salad for breakfast (and multiple visits).

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The Salad Concept used to be one of my Chiang Mai favorites. Great salads in the restaurant, at the outdoor patio and outdoors at the pavement. Now they did an insane renovation. No tables outside and the patio has been demolished and is now part of the indoor restaurant. The interior architect behind the renovation must do bathrooms normally, coz the whole restaurant now looks like a giant bathroom. Still great salads but an ice cold place without a grain of cosines. The acoustic is like in a bathroom don't forget your earplugs, coz you are not going to hear anything inside the "Bathroom Concept." Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We ate here several times during our stay in Chiang Mai. Freshest vegetables I ever ate in Thailand. So many choices.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Typically myself and my partner wouldn't opt for a salad oriented meal but we gave it a try and it was fantastic! I had a vegan quinoa wrap and the flavours were unbelievable, very filling as well. We will definitely be going back.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nice, clean, modern environment where you can choose from many salads OR start with the basics and build your own. We had the avocado salad w shrimp and a build salad with salmon and an appetizer of guacamole (tasty) w potato wedges and vegs and a couple waters. Bill was about 400 THB or $12. Will definetly go back. Was heading there this morning for breakfast, but does not open until 11am :(

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Very western food. Lots of different types of salads or you can make your own combo....lettuce, toppings, dressing etc. The pictures on the menu make the salads look small but they are not small, they are large! They also have soup and salads. Good juices, smoothies and shakes.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ever since they expanded the main location, the service is terrible. I've been at least 5 times since the change, and something is wrong. This review is more about comparing how they are now to what it was like a year back and before. So, on two occasions, either items have not shown up at all, or they were the wrong item. I'd normally not really think much of it, as mistakes are made everyday in a crowded and popular place, but it's happening regularly, and I'm hearing it from friends too. Plus, I've seen it happen at other tables while I'm there. Something is amiss in the operation. And because I have absolutely no experience in the food industry I couldn't begin to tell you what it is. The normally friendly staff also seem a bit stressed. Is this because of a new change, I couldn't tell you, but they don't really seem the same. I know, that's not clear, but it's my perception. Additionally, the other night when I went in and they completely forgot another two items, the owner (a Thai lady) was sitting behind the counter doing some work, overheard the whole exchange (having to take items off the bill because they never showed, and apologizing), and she glanced up at me, looked perturbed, then went back to her computer. I gotta be honest with you, this is not the way I like business done with me, feeling like I've annoyed someone because THEY screwed up. I keep going, will probably continue to go because the food is good, but the unfriendliness is a put off. I think I'm probably writing this for the owner as well, as I like Salad Concept, the food they offer, but find the service now to be way below a good standard level. Oh well. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We had a great last meal in Chiang Mai at this awesome restaurant. Had to wait a few minutes to get a table when we got there but not too long. The menu is extensive and creative with a multitude of really nice options. It's almost too hard to choose something, too many things I wanted to try! The salads were huge and very flavorful. I just wish I had found this place sooner.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great customizable salads and nice smoothies. Even if someone in your group doesn't like salad, they can find something to eat here.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad concept specialise in salads, as you can probably imagine. They have a huge menu with heaps of salad and wrap - based options. Leafy green salads with chicken, fish, or a number of vegan/vego options - tofu, avocado. They also have a great range of juices and smoothies. Was pleasantly surprised that they also have very good coffee (by Chiang Mai standards) at a reasonable price. The prices are much more than your average Thai food restaurant, but you'd expect that because what they serve is so different. Totally reasonable and comparable with places with a similar menu such as Blue Diamond in the Old City (Chiang Mai) The salads we had were very fresh, the dressings were really good - not too oily, not too vinegary, not too sweet - and generous servings. The service is really friendly and the overall atmosphere is very nice, with good air con and pretty comfortable seats. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We found the salad concept to late into our trip. It is a very nice place with an excellent selection of food and very good food. It's hard to find heathland food on the road but this is the place to go. Both my meals where awesome, I had soup and a bun and eggs, bacon and pancakes along with the rainbow shots (fruit and vegetable juices). My girlfriend had a chicken salad and egg Benedict. We were both very pleased with this place. Check it out if your in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We have eaten at both the Salad Concept locations and found the Nimman one the better but in both the staff service need to improve. We found that they were not very friendly having forgotten how to smile at custipomers and were quite slow at noticing when you needed something. The food on offer is a very wide range to cover many tastes but if you don't like salad then you won't like it here. The salad portions do tend to be on the large side biput there is tremendous variety to choose from either in what to eat or in what to drink. The entire menu is very healthy with many combinations of rice, quinoa, spaghetti and omelettes together with chicken, pork, tofu and fish. You will spend ages choosing your meal! Drinks are healthy options with fruit juices, smoothies, various teas etc. Plenty to choose from. Food very good and tasty but if you are predominantly a meat eater, you may be disappointed and come away a bit hungry as the place is geared towards salad - hence the name! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Expat central with excellent salads and wraps and for me really delicious smoothies. Salad Concept is a great concept. Salad restaurants around the world take note!! Very good and friendly service.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: my brother and i went in for our lunch as my brother likes the wraps and we have been many times before BUT on this visit we had problems from the start. we had to call a waiter over to take our order after waiting 10 mins trying to get someones attention and the young man came and we ordered one wrap as that part of the order one fills out ones self and i ordered a mushroom risotto also two bottles of water. the water came two glasses but just one bottle of water so no problem we will get another bottle as we need it. ten min later my brothers wrap came and he sat waiting for my meal to come too so we would eat together but after ten min of waiting i told my brother start eating mine will come shortly im sure. my brother tried to get the attention of staff but they seemed too busy there were 22 customers in the restaurant 3 floor staff two behind the counter and another few mulling about so being over run with customers was not the case here anyway my brother finished his meal and i said lets just pay and go ill eat elswhere so we asked for the bill and it was when they brought the bill that we was able to say one meal was missing and one bottle of water from which we got a smile and they said we have only charged for one water yes we know that but why did we not get the other water and the other meal to which there was no reply we paid and left one of us having eaten and one hungry. a pathetic way to treat regular customers. so all in all a bad experience Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Had a nice mango salad and pineapple fried rice for lunch. Pretty good and prices very reasonable. It's the kind of place if I lived there I would probably go once a week for lunch.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Coming from someone who normally hates eating salad or pretty much any type of vegetables, this place was amazing. The food was quick to arrive and was very filling and healthy(in fact I only ate half and had the rest for dinner!). It was healthy and it has made me realize that eating healthy isn't as hard as it seems.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great fresh salads and coffee for cheap. Right up the alley of the health conscious, alternative traveler of which there are probably many in Chiang Mai. 'Anti cancer' shots (wheatgrass etc) are a bit of a bold statement though.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you are looking for natural delicious yet filling food this is your place. I really liked the environment and the way you can chose your order. The food was a good amount and delicious taste. A little more than an average Thai street meal, but good value for the type of food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The Salad Concept on Nimman has just re-opened and looks great. The open planning and indoor plants really make it a great place for lunch or dinner. It's a great concept and the food is very nicely prepared for you, usually in quick time. Simple salads made with a little creativity. I have eaten here several times and it is always good. Even the basic salads have taste with the many dressings options to choose from. They have a range of specialty salads and some traditional northern Thai style favorites fused in also. This restaurant can be quite busy so sometimes waits are required for ordering and paying, but the food comes quite quickly. It can also be a little loud with the number of customers inside, so find a table at the front if you would like a little more peace. They will also have some outdoor seating available soon. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Bland and lacking in style. Staff are not particularly friendly nor knowledgeable about the food on offer. The salad itself is ok, but quite basic really. Good for a quick wrap or salad bowl but don't expect too much excitement

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Being vegan in Thailand isn't as easy as you may expect. The Salad Concept was a lifesaver throughout my 2-month stint in Chiang Mai. A little on the pricey side for what it is, but if you're looking for a fresh, healthy departure from the greasy, heavy Thai street food, this is your place.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We had lunch at this lovely spot on busy Nimmanhaemin street.The place was pretty crowded at lunch. The service was fast,the place very clean and the salads were very fresh & tasty.Highly recommend this place for a good salad.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Caesar salad and dressing were very delicious. I added roasted chicken to mine. I tried the Bael tea which was great cold. Service was good. This location has recently re-opened after renovations. Now it offers a fuller menu with burgers too. It's a cute place with 2 entrances. The back entrance has a small parking lot. Bathrooms have been updated too.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: In fairness to Salad Concept on Nimmanhaemin I have eaten there and enjoyed it in past years but... Today the service was awful. They never bring dishes together even at the best of times but this morning my eggs Florantine arrived when my wife was finishing her meal. To make matters worse the eggs were stone cold. They did start again but why was it necessary to do so on a quiet morning?

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I found this place at the end of the street from my hotel and I didn’t even look at Trip Advisor before entering The Salad Concept restaurant, as the place was nearly full, a good sign. I ordered a salad where I could add the toppings and protein of my choice. The salad was very good along with a tasty Banana Bran Smoothie for total cost of 189 baht. The table across from me ordered wraps, they were big wraps and looked delicious. The restaurant inside is air conditioned and quite clean, the service isn’t a selling point, it’s all about salads and wraps at The Salad Concept.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: must to visit this restaurant if you love fresh salads! they have a great variety of salads! i m always enjoy there! beautiful after renovation!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Good food quality and tasty menu. We loved that it's a customizable salad bar and this is a great "have it your way" concept. Clean and trendy facilities, too! A few things that would have made this a better eatery: 1. Accept credit cards. They do not accept credit cards. For me, I'm a bit less inclined to buy things I don't need when they don't accept credit cards because I like to keep cash for other situations. I would have purchased more (perhaps a smoothie or cold pressed juice) if they were able to take my credit card. 2. The salad should be tossed. It's odd to eat the oversized pieces of lettuce on a plate and you can't easily mix it ourself since it's on a plate. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is one of my favorite places to eat be it either breakfast or dinner. Very good staff and excellent salad, juices and meals. Free Wi-Fi doesn't go astray and it's reasonably priced. Give it a try...

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After traveling around the country for two weeks and eating nothing but local delicacies (which are delicious don't get me wrong), we decided to stop in here for dinner to change things up. We also wanted to appease the vegetarian we had in our group, who struggled to eat during our travels. We ordered a couple wraps and a mango/passion fruit smoothie which was very refreshing. It was nice to have a fresh, healthy meal. No complaints about the food- it's hard to mess up tossing a salad together. My only qualm is that, when we went to pay at the register, one of the women behind the counter was blatantly picking her nose...I saw food preppers wearing gloves but was disgusted that someone who works at a food establishment would pick their nose inside the restaurant, behind the counter in front of customers no less. I can only hope she didn't continue on to prep someones meal-eek! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I love local food but there comes a time when I just want a really good, fresh, and big salad. This is the place for that! The wrap was a big portion and I created my own, adding the ingredients that I wanted. They offer many choices of salad toppings, dressings, and ingrediants. Perfect place if you are vegetarian and wanting to focus on a plant based diet.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: So if you want a delicious healthy meal, and to also bath in that same meal, order a wrap at Salad Concept. I've visited this place numerous times both before they closed for renovation and after they reopened. Before, they always made tight wraps that you could eat with your hands (which is the point of wraps) without getting it all over yourself or the table/floor. Now they fall apart from the moment you pick them up, spilling their dressing-soaked contents all over your arms and all over the table. It makes for quite an unpleasant eating experience. So to the people at Salad Concept: whatever you did before renovation, start doing it again. Train your employees how to roll a wrap for starters. Maybe serve dressing in the side. Cut the wrap in half and keep it contained in the paper. These were all wins that made eating your delicious wraps worthy of praise. Now, I might as well order a salad. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nothing wrong with this restaurant however difficult to give it 5 stars as there is no real cooking, at least in the dishes I tries. If you're after a salad fix definitely worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The Salad Concept was recently renovated and is now open! If you want some fresh food in the form of salads or wraps, this is the place to go! Wraps start at just 85 baht and include up to 5 veggies and one dressing. Meat is an additional 25 baht which is still super cheap! I also recommend the Aloha Mango wrap.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Very happy they now have vegan options And the salads are sooo big The dressings are very good the pumpkin is vegan and carrot they don't say it is because it has sugar and olive oil I love the salad and my daughter always has a wrap

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Very nice modern salad bar. Freshest salads which you can assemble buy yourself, very fresh juices and good wraps, I loved the concept and the freshness only thing was that the salads come not premixed on a too small plate so it is not that easy to mix them. I would give 4,5 if possible

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Cool concept with a big choice of fresh salads, wraps, breakfast dishes and juices! It was very tasty and the location is modern. I'll come again!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The service was slow and mistaken when we asked for a chicken salad, we had salad with no chicken, it never came despite asking again. Despite this the food was very good the surroundings were clean and the salad was fresh. I had a wrap, it was huge so you won't be disappointed with portion size.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The restaurant was on the main road and was easy to find. It was quite and bright at the noon. Many kinds of fresh vegetable could be chosed. The wrap was really Big Big Big ! I will go many times if I stay in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We've had many, MANY meals at the Nimman Salad Concept and most of them were pretty good. I especially love their vegetable juices, at around $2 each, I was basically swimming in juice during our last stay in Chiang Mai. It's definitely worth visiting if you are looking for a quick and healthy meal.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After a day getting back to Chiang Mai I needed something fresh. The salad concept delivered!!!! The food is fresh and delicious, accompanied with a stellar staff. I'd recommend if you need your veggie fix.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: YUM! Have so been craving some raw food these past few weeks and it was lovely to find this place in Chiang Mai. Fantastic salads and delicious juices. Had the quinoa salad (vegan's choice, apparently - can totally see why!) and it was fantastic. My fellow deer had the vegan tofu salad and that looked exquisite too. They have non-veggie options, but I obviously have no interest in that. Sooooooo yummy! Great wifi and a lovely, A/C space in which to hang out. Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The third times visited to this salad house in different branch.The ones at Nimmam road was closed for heavy renovation work.We sat at the front part of the restaurant which the strong sun light came thru, feeled slightly hot and then we shift at the back part of the restaurant.Ordered mixed salad with selected toppings, caeser salad chicken wrap and prawn salad.For drinks we go for berries soda and lemon soda.The salad came out huge portion, tasty and fresh.The berries soda was refreshing.Total bill was not expensive and they provided good service too.Highly recomended for those who loves crunchy and fresh leaves.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: When I tire of the cooked vegetables that are so common in Asian food and want something more raw, a salad is the perfect answer. And The Salad Concept offers large and inexpensive salads that are much more than an appetizer. The veggies are fresh and the dressings are tasty. A nice, healthy break from vacation Thai food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I absolutely love this place. I went to the second shop just to the north of the Tha Phae Gate because the first branch is currently being renovated. The food here is so good. Get a monster salad, pick 20 different ingredients you want in it, and enjoy! Healthy and delicious. The staff are nice too, but even if they weren't I'd still come here. Absolutely love it!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Currently moved to new location, but clean, tidy diner-like style, with big extensive menu of salads and more. Also, try the ice cream. Wide selection, you choose the dressing. Plenty of vegetarian options.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: this is my second time to have lunch at Salad Concept since two years ago at Chiang Mai. Everything same, tasty food and helpful service

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great selection of basic salad items, and the dressing are very good. On the whole the service is good, and the salads are large. They even offer a 10% discount card.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Perfect place to get a put-together-yourself-salad or wrap - good service, delicious ingredients and a really cheap good filling meal! You won't be disappointed dining here

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I found myself today looking for a light lunch so headed off to The Salad Concept because l know l will never be disappointed, large portions and you get to chose which of the many items on offer you want in your salad, they have a nice selection of sauce to accompany your salad, although it is only salad l find the portions very filling but if you do have room they do have a range of desserts, please give it a try, you most definitely will not be disappointed, probably the best salad in town

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Portions are huge and you get to build your own salad or wrap if you're super picky like myself. Definitely a healthier option. Prices between 100-250 baht. I've eaten here a few times now and enjoy both very much. The salad portions are huge and me and my girlfriend split one and couldn't even finish it. Staff is very friendly and the atmosphere is very modern and comfortable. I asked to sample two different dressings as they can make or break a salad and they let me try them no problem. I definitely recommend the creamy sesame! I will be seeing you guys soon and recommending you often.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The gem of this vegetarian restaurant is homemade salad dressing, the pumpkin dressing is quite amazing. If my memory is right, the owner's idea of making absolute healthy food is inspired by his mother, who unfortunately caught cancer.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We were looking for another place, which we couldn't find and ended up dining in the Salad concept. It was also very convenient as it was on the same street as our hotel. It is an airy buzzy place that offers huge salad portions. You can choose different toppings and make your own salad. They also have a separate vegan menu with three different options although the spicy quinoa salad has fish sauce so not really vegan but they were ok to take the order back. We had the stuffed omelet with quinoa and veggies and quinoa beans salad with black sesame, both fresh and delicious. Staff doesn't speak English so communication might be difficult but apart from that we had a very pleasant dinner. Recommended if you want to have food different than thai. Will return. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Lovely place for a meal just on the outskirts of Chiang Mai. Delicious smoothies and coffees, build your own style salads and mouth watering all day breakfasts. Everything is fresh and is very nicely presented. The only downside is the cost! Whilst it is a very delicious and healthy option, it does also come with a price tag much higher than any other coffee shop I have been to in the region. Still definitely worth a visit, even if it is just for the strawberry and mango smoothie!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: we order two salads. it was all lettuces.....only! dissapointing. service was ok but not value for money.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Got dropped off by a taxi in front of this place and decided to give it a try. We were not disappointed in any way. Fresh salads with an interesting variety of seeds and sprouts. Strawberry yogurt dressing pictured!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I came here and really enjoyed myself. The vibe was super fantastic and the food was pretty good. The staff was nice and pretty helpful. I had the healthy quinoa omelette thingy and it was good but would probably get a normal wrap next time, they looked good. My friend got a salad and it looked delicious also. Good place👍🏼

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Beautiful salad shop recommended by the locals. The service was quick and staff are friendly. Had the mango salad which dressing was superb. The portion is big and price is reasonable (139baht). It's healthy and delicious!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you're not into Thai food and want a big bowl of salad this place is recommended. You can choose your own vegetables and sauce and also you can get it in a bowl or a soft wrap. The salad dressing varies and some might have a stronger taste than you think. But as long as you put in the right amount I think you're good. I like the concept and the atmosphere of the store. However, wouldn't say the taste itself is revolutionary. Just salad. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This has got to be one of the best restaurants I've eaten in, in Chiang Mai, definately the healthiest - poached eggs with the largest yummiest salad. I will definately be going back there again.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Stumbled across the salad concept while in Chiang Mai, the food was excellent. We both had a build your own salad, all the ingredients were very fresh. The best salad I've had at a restaurant. Would highly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Last year i went here a few times, so when i came back to Chiang Mai this year, i wanted to go back to the Salad concept too. And i was not disappointed: the salads are still good. I love the idea that you can create your own salad (dont understand why there arent more of these type of restaurants). Staff is friendly.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The best thing about this place is they offer Wheatgrass and Fresh Vegetable juice. Unfortunately they seem always to be out of Wheatgrass and Avocados.. Too bad because Avocados are a staple in a good salad. Has a/c which is a plus but other than that no big deal. Average but worth a trip in a pinch

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A medium-sized restaurant. Several salad options, all looked pretty healthy, and also a build-your-own option (which I chose). This includes 5 added toppings at no extra charge, and the options made for a good, eclectic, hearty salad. Big enough but not too much. Wait staff were friendly and attentive. The dressing (carrot) was really incredible - and healthy as far as I know :). This is on a popular walking street and near al lot of cafes - fun to explore. And so so affordable!!! My salad cost less than 3 dollars (!).

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Delicious freshly prepared salads and wraps. The wraps are in fact a whole salad in a wrap! Basic leaves, then lots of options to personalise your meal. Very reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is one of our Favourite place whenever we visit Chiangmai in Nimmanheim. We have recommended many of our singaporean friends not to miss. Fresh veggie n varieties of the Salad is awesome. However, This time the portion of the mushroom soup seems too little as compared to the last few time we were there. Anyway, we enjoyed our meal. Keep up the good job!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Slightly confusing at first but can create almost any kind of salad or wrap. Huge portions and fresh food hence the price. Over all good quality but more of a fad than its worth.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If your fancying a healthy refreshing meal then this place is perfect! Very modern and fresh place to eat, you can pick from a great range of salads, or create your own. We opted for creating our own salad wrap, you can pick from a large range of toppings and fillings. I chose carrot, tomato and boiled egg with chicken & bacon with spinach. The wraps are massive! So be prepared to be filled! I saw other people get just salads and they are huge!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Such a fabulous idea, all so fresh and delicious and you get exactly what you want and don't have to pick out the bits you don't like. We ordered takeaway so the dressing was on the side and such great value. We had it for dinner as a side to grilled chicken ( fed three people generously) and it was fabulous. All the ingredients were fresh and crispy, specially loved the asparagus and the French dressing. Having it again tomorrow night as a side but it would also make an amazing lunch. Impeccably clean and lovely attentive hardworking staff.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I went there twice but I never have a good experience with this shop! The fist time I try to order but the staff are ignore me. The second time I found cockroach in the restaurant. Just crawl near my salad dish!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salads are good with crispy vegetables, they have wraps that you can choose how you want to style it nice teas if you want that kind of stuff. Nice staff and atmosphere

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Environment is nice. And it is easy to find. The vege is fresh than i expected and the sauce taste good. Like it ^^

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: have to go this restaurant when u sick of heavy food. Salad makes you feel light than ever as you know. The salad concept provides you a fresh and huge sized plate which is you never feel hungry until you get sleep at night.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Open in time for breakfast, the Salad Concept always has great fresh food. A new addition since I visited last is the Quinoa Roll, which is wrap made with super-thin omelette as the 'wrapper' and a superb quinoa salad inside. This generous meal comes with a good side salad and soy dressing. Good value, great taste

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I ordered the beef salad here. What arrived was a bowl of lettuce with a tablespoon or so of meat. In no way did it resemble the dish shown in the picture on the menu which at a minimum (from what I could see) showed tomatoes and egg. I called the waitress over and told her that the salad didn't look like the salad on the menu as there were no ingredients other than lettuce. She took the dish back to the counter whereupon a kitchen worker, in front of me, grabbed a handful of baby tomatoes and threw them into the bowl. I was actually quite taken aback by his almost aggressive action to be honest. I then said to the waitress the photo also showed egg and the waitress grovelled around in the lettuce and found one slice of egg. I said the surely there must be more than one slice of egg and she said no it only comes with one slice of egg (she informed me that the dish wasn't meant to look exactly like the photo on the menu). In summary, the beef salad is sadly disappointing and of poor value. Man, after all, cannot live on lettuce alone. Of a higher priority, more finesse and care in customer service is needed by the restaurant staff when dealing with non-routine matters involving patrons. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I stay near this place,and it is always busy, and for good reason! The salads are western-level quality that you would find in any high-end place in New York or L.A. I always get the Japanese beef salad, because I need balance in my life.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This restaurant offers a nice customize your salad option that makes it pretty easy to get exactly what you want. They do have some pre made ones as well that are also really good. Also the portions were huge! I was really surprised by the size of the salads when they brought them to the table. I'd definitely recommend if you're looking for something fresh and nutritious.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We've visited Salad Concept twice and have had good dining experiences. Both times we've had salads made to order and they've been decent sizes, they haven't skimped on the good stuff (aka, not just a bowl of greens) and everything tasted fresh. We've also had good juices and smoothies there. the do offer a few other things like wraps, warm meals etc. but we've always stuck to the salads.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My boyfriend and I each ordered a salad wrap. They were filling and tasty! It was a refreshing change from all the Thai food we have been eating these past 2 weeks.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Hadn't been to this place in over a year, as it's usually very crowded and I don't like to wait. Went the other day, and was happy with the quality of food and price. The order forms are a little complicated, and the wait staff could be better, but the salad was fresh and plenty of options. I always stick with the salads, as on prior trips I found the cooked items mediocre.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad Concept has a wide range of salads, very, very delicious and very good value for the money. Also juices and smoothies are excellent, so is coffee and cakes.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I eat normal Salad and I can choose topping and dressing. I love it make me happy. And the place it have Aircondition also have outdoor seat too.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great salads, wraps & smoothies, everything is fresh. You choose what you want on/in your salad or wrap by checking ingredients on a preprinted ordering slip, couldn't be any easier. Reasonably priced & friendly staff. We were a large group & had a couple issues but they were corrected promptly.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Went here pretty much everyday during our trip to Chiang Mai. We had been craving some healthy options after eating rice and noodles for months and it did not disappoint! Salad's were big and tasty and the wraps were delicious, as was the lychee soda. I wish they had more restaurants like this around the world - it's a brilliant idea.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It is a good place to eat healthy and to feel somewhat good about the meal. I have been there several times and the food is quite good. The staff is friendly and fast to take the order and to deliver the food at your table. It is somewhat inexpensive and a good value for your money.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This popular concept has a second location north of Tha Pae gate. Walk north from Starbucks past Miguel's Cafe and you will com across The Salad Concept. This is just like the one on Nimmanhaemin Rd. The salads and wraps are great. The restaurant is relaxed and air conditioned, with great music playing. The staff is friendly and helpful and the food comes out quick. Wonderful fresh juices and other healthy drinks are not in short supply. This location opens for breakfast at 9:30am and closes the kitchen at 9:45pm. If you want salad, check it out.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I ate here twice during a recent visit to Chiang Mai. I have been living in Siem Reap, Cambodia, and it was a HUGE treat to have such well prepared, FRESH foods. The portions are generous, and they have a great variety of salads, wraps and entrees. I know there is more than one location, but the one in Nimmanhaemin was in a great spot, easy to locate, and large enough to accommodate many people. Highly recommended for people looking for a fresh thai twist on Western health cuisine. (LOVED the spicy green chili dressing!)

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We wanted to take a break from the heavy, sweet Thai food and The Salad Concept proved to be a perfect solution. During our two visits we enjoyed delicious salads for a very low price (app. 60-120 THB, depending on which toppings you choose). Their vegetable smoothies contain no sugar and taste delicious. You can choose and build your salad (or wrap) and smoothie how you like it. Simply fill in the order form and a few minutes later you have a delicious meal. The staff did not speak English, but thanks to the order forms this was no issue. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Well, I've driven passed this place 100 times and I thought boring and passed it by but after my Mexican Food 4 hour lunch including many Margaritas yesterday I decided to be good today. Anyway, and first of all the facility was spotless including the restroom. They have inside and outdoor dinning with AC provided on the inside seating. The service was great although it took some time and instruction to completely get the ordering system. Although many thai dishes, salads and breakfasts are available the main program is a build your own salad or wrap. There's a pic of the menu and order forms attached, So I started with a salad filled wrap and could select 5 extra items out maybe 15 choices, you can select more for 6 baht each. The wrap was 75 tb, including my picks, sliced almonds, radishes, boiled egg, asparagus, and celery. Then you can add protein, I chose shrimp and spinach and paid 59 tb for both, then it's a dressing I picked 1000 Island but there were 15 or to choose from and finally added a Mango Smoothie. It was delivered in a few minutes and it was simply wonderful everything was so fresh and I was quite proud that I had a healthy lunch except for the 1000 Island and i went to restroom and was forced to pass the pastry case where a Banoffee Pie thing jumped on to my table. It was equally fabulous. So if a light but quality lunch or dinner is in your plans you must consider The Salad Concept. Oh almost forgot the cost 299tb or $8.80 USD including the 80 tb desert. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After two weeks we were ready for a break from Thai and wanted something fairly healthy and light this place did not disappoint. I got the detox juice and chicken Caesar wrap two days in a row and it was fresh with good portions!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: my wife loves salad, veg etc, healthy food and we went here for dinner and it was very enjoyable. great menu, tasty drinks and good service. the prices are very reasonable. give it a try.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The best wrapped salad I have ever eating!! Who love salad will love their options of salad and wrapped salad. One of my favorite place!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After being in Bangkok for 6 days and eating the most awful, frozen attempts at western food, coming here was like a breath of fresh air! Amazing menu and everything is so fresh, staff and friendly and there is air con too !!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you're craving heaping plates of health-conscious ruffage in air-con, this is your place. The ordering process is fantastic for foreigners, because you can either point to something pictured on the menu, or grab a card on the table with all your options and build your own salad or wrap. Huge salads for 69 Baht; juice and smoothies closer to normal prices for places that cater to foreigners. Build-your-own-juice option is awesome. Try wheatgrass-ginger-carrot-apple for a healthy kick. ;) The servers are your average Thai kids, so they joke around and aren't always attentive. Not so bad if you dont mind flagging them down, and creates a fun, relaxed atmosphere. Also, I've had a few items not come to my table but stay on my bill. Wait for that. Still, one of my favorite spots on Nimman Rd. Highly recommended. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: When all else fails, go here for lunch. That is, if you like salads and such. I come here regularly, and I almost regularly get the Caesar Salad Wrap. It's my best friend in a cold cruel world. Lately, I'm getting the mango salad thing with strawberry dressing. She's become my lover. So, I'm usually eating with my best friend or my lover. Can't lose. You'll understand later.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Been here more than 10 times a month but at another branch. I couldn't find it on tripadvisor. Friendly staff to help you pick menu.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A perfect lunch on what was a really hot day! After walking around in 40 degree heat it was lovely to sit in their air conditioned cafe for a cooling salad. They have salads you can order off the menu, or you can also build your own. It's 69 baht for mixed leaves and 5 other ingredients of your choice. Then you can add extras like meat and cheese for a little bit extra to make it more substantial. You then choose what dressing you would like. The salads were ready quickly, were generously sized and very fresh / tasty.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food is fresh and not expensive at all, the place is very nice, often full but never crowded. The service is great, super attentive, fast and very sober (even if sometimes they don't speak great English, but hey...) I just love this place, and hope it stays like this for long.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I love the build your own salad option. So many awesome toppings and amazing dressings to choose from! My favorite dressing is the pumpkin! Very decently priced and large portions! Air conditioned inside, cute patio seating & wifi as well. I could eat here everyday! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Friendly staff in this restaurant, but see my title, not so many choice on the menu. Herewith I mean meat, because for vegetarians it's a very good menu. Fresh salads, cold drinks. As my wife and I like meat, we did not eat very much in this restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We've done CM a few times now and this is by far the best place to get you salad fix! Build your own or buy off the menu - both are fantastic. I never thought I would enjoy salad so much in my life. Good, efficient staff and a warm welcome. Great area too - plenty of bars to frequent after you have eaten. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Love the build your own salad here, use the checklist to pick your options. You can also double up servings of your favourite toppings. Take away service is fast and servers friendly.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Everything looked very fresh. But The Sauce(french sauce) Didnt taste good and Most of the vegtables tasted dull imo.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: fresh healthy clean and affordable .center of town,now very popular with many locals . Choose ingredients salads , meats ,vegetarian,great choices..

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Build your own salad and choose from an array of toppings and dressings. You can also choose to have your veggies/salad in a wrap instead. They also have pretty good coffee, as well as other drinks like smoothies.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you want a healthy place to eat, this is it. Salads are huge and beautifully put together. They are trying some new items and the taco salad (rolling a spicy filling in lettuce leaves) was worth trying. The service is nice and friendly and the place is flooded with light and perfect for lunch.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I've lived in Chiangmai for over 2 years and this was a frequent stop to quench any salad desire you might have. I recommend the Northern Salad which has a local sausage that is a specialty

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have been living in Chiang Mai for six weeks and had been avoiding this place for some reason. Finally went with some friends for dinner this evening and will probably return a hundred times! Portions are HUGE (which is really only a good thing when it's salad). Excellent make your own salad options, healthy dressings, wide variety of topping to choose from, and a delicious dessert selection! Great service and speed and prices were unbelievably low! Already looking forward to going back.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A nice place with good service, good food, wifi, plenty of tables, and a variety of salads and wraps to choose from. Vegan options. You can also use a checklist to decide on different toppings, extras, vinaigrettes etc.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I absolutely love the strawberry dressing. The quality of the food is okay, I would not recommend eating meat here. Western prices and big servings. Typically out of avocados. The mango salad is also good.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I think the Salad concept is a great restaurant as there is a huge choice of organic slads on the menu at a reasonable price. Sadly I don't visit it thaty often as it is in the busy Nimmenhemin area and I hate going into the center at lunchtime.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great delicious salads, not cheap for Thai standards. Went for breakfast, ordered egg in a pan breakfast, came with a nice salad and strip of bacon. Quality of products, good location just across from the Tapae Gate. The avocado frappe comes in small glass while the other smoothies in a large glass. I would have ordered a pressed juice but they came in very small glass and I knew other places were you could get large and fresh juices. Our server was Nain, she was good.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Love the concept! Modern set up. My fave is the Caesar salad wrap. And the manga smoothie. Food is good but the service is mediocre. Lots of staff idling around the counter but it's difficult to get their attention. They obviously lack training. But I will still return for the food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: we eat here regularly when we need a break from usual Thai food, makes you feel healthy and clean, big salads, lots of variety and options, great dressings!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Almost hidden, bit somehow very large, this is some of the best Thai food I have ever eaten. As the name states, it's mostly salads, but they are all amazing with very unique flavours that I have not experienced in Thailand before or anywhere else. I had the avocado salad with strawberry dressing which was divine with a mocha frappe I had to return on the same day is it was so amazing and that afternoon I purchased a northern Thai style salad which had a Thai mint chilli dressing. These are flavours that I've had before but never together in this great mix. It is a must. The mango passion smoothy was out of control amazing (pictured) If I had money I would franchise this place in Australia as I believe it would be a huge success. Twice in one day. Will return for more. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Went here with a couple friends after a long day of eating heavy Thai foods. Was the perfect way to get in some delicious and more nutritious foods. The salad portions were huge and you can mix and match a ton of different salads. I'd recommend getting the quinoa omelette wrap. Very tasty!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I had a tuna salad and my husband a burger salad. Both where so delicious and fresh. The vegies where crispy, colors bright and tasteful, service good. Would definitely return

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My wife was craving a salad all reviews pointed us to The Salad Concept. It was a short walk from our hotel. Busy and definitely popular, we found our way to a table and began to figure out the ordering system. You fill in three different slips: one for build it yourself salads or wraps, one for drinks, and one for items fully described in the menu. They offer all day breakfast. These egg items were on the menu but not on the slips. You told the waitstaff if you wanted one of these items and they wrote it on a separate piece of paper. It was quite confusing. My wife ordered a make it yourself salad that included beef and avocados with a Caesar dressing. It was quite large with a large amount of avocado and beef. The dressing was served on the side. The ingredients were very fresh. Quite tasty and worth a trip back. I, on the other hand was reminded of the old food adage: If you go to a place with "Salad" in its name, order salad." My eggs, pancakes and bacon came with a salad. The salad was very good with very fresh ingredients. The eggs were overcooked, the bacon was dry (but not crisp), and the pancakes edible. I knew I was taking a chance when I ordered this but always think if you are going to bother putting something on the menu it should be as good as your other items. I would go back again - for the salad. This restaurant has several seating areas and is nicely decorated. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The orders are filled out on preprinted sheets with tick boxes, but not all the items on the menu are on the sheet and they are easily misread in the kitchen. When this happened we asked for an order to be corrected, then waited. We followed up at intervals with four different members of staff. When the order finally arrived the rest of our group had already received and finished our food. No one in the restaurant seemed able to see a solution to getting an order back to the kitchen and altered. The restaurant was not busy at the time and this must be a problem which has come up before. The selection of different items to add to your salad is very nice but don't go for the grilled vegetables. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We ate here this evening and to be honest I felt sorry for the staff. They were doing their best but with CM so hectic, the place was too busy. Food was very average, the Caesar Salad, not my first choice, they were out of avocado, was only ok...no anchovies. My spaghetti had been microwaved

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: On a hot day last week we needed a place to eat something fresh and healthy so we tried this place. Great salads and some nice side dishes also nice environment as we had a young baby with us. The service was fine.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: While in Chiang Mai we thought we would try this salad restaurant. It was fantastic. The freshness of the salads was a delight. The portions were very good. There was a good choice of meat and fish to compliment the salad as well as the most delicious dressings. There was also a fantastic choice of non alcoholic drinks to accompany the meal.The staff were very helpful, they were needed to help with trying to understand the ordering of the meals. This was done by reading the menu and then completing an order form and handing the completed form to a member of staff and your requested meal would appear and be absolutely yummy.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A very popular spot. It took three attempts to get our order using the multiple order sheets. Some of the menu items are not on the sheets and some that are on the sheets are not available. Meals arrive at random with some main courses arriving before starters. Despite many chases one main course, a simple salad wrap, arrived after our other three diners had finished and more annoyingly the diners at the next table completed their meal, paid their bill and left and were replaced by another group of diners who ordered and were served before this meal arrived. Not cheap and really a poor experience. There are all sorts of really good eating places around; use one of them.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: DO NOT GO HERE! Stopped here for lunch with my girlfriend. First of all, the service was abysmal. None of the waiters were the least bit helpful and were very condescending to all the questions we had. We ordered the potato cheese balls and they tasted like uncooked doe with stuffed cow manure (no joke - that bad). We had one bite, sent them back and they had the audacity to charge us full price. All in all, very poor experience. Spend your money elsewhere. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Want here 4 out of 5 evenings I was in Chiang Mai. Amazing every night except they had run out of Avocado twice. Definitely recommend this restaurant, friendly service, very quick and clean. Great value for money.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: By far the best salad I have tasted in comparison to British salads it very similar, if not better! There is lots of choice. Service can be a little slow and language is a small barrier but the note pads to make your own orders make it easier and when I wanted to pay I just went up to the counter rather than ask for a bill. The food was exceptional though! So well worth a try especially for all the British salad lovers!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We loved the build your own salad concept - Bht 69 buys you a filling salad the five choices of toppings; add Bht 6 more and they will "wrap" it for you. Special salads were also filling and reasonably priced. Our only regret - no Salad Concept in Bangkok.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: one of my favs in town for healthy eating. typically eating here once a week or more. highly reccommended

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: First time at this place. The portion is huge!!! And the toppings is generally quite good and delicious. The pricing is not that cheap for a salad bar and they only have one selection of salad mix when I was there. The other options was not available.. Worth going there when you felt you pigged out too much in Chiang Mai and need something light.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I recommend this place to everyone who is in Chiang Mai. Fully packed. First time I went no one seemed to care because no tables were available anyway. I decided not to visit this place again but the next time I came to Nimanhaemin road I went straight to this place and did not regret. Great tomato soup, quinoa roll and ginger soft drink. Perfect lunch!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great place for lunch, dinner. Amazing drinks. Thai style tea is my favorite. We we living around the corner and had many lunches there and enjoy every time. We were never bored, could select our own salad composition. Wify available, good service, healthy fresh food. outside tables are nice and quiet

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Everytime I visit Chiang Mai I must come to have a lovely healthy salad here.Pork grilled salad is the most my favourite salad. You can select the vetgetable what you like on your own. The service is quick and friendly,inside the shop is clean and the prices are resonable as well. The shop is located in Nimmanhemin road the center of Chiang Mai city.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ended up eating here 3 times because we couldn't get enough of the juices and the salads and wraps. These are the stars of the show and you can choose what you like to eat. So even if you are vegan, have dietary restraints, or are just a finicky eater you can enjoy it here. The deserts were hit or miss and the fried potato and cheese balls seemed packaged, but everything else was fresh and delicious. Try it out! Don't know what people are complaining about in terms of price. The salads are huge and with a choice of 5 toppings come to 80 Baht, which is very cheap indeed (unless you're a backpacker?).

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place maybe a little expensive, and a lot of staff. But everything tastes great. Its simple pick your Salad Bowl or Wrap, kinda like a better Subway. The wrap is packed and after the first half you kinda wonder if you can tackle the other. It is good tho!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Typical, make your own salad place. Great range of food, all is fresh and its a fun dining experience! There is a reason that they have opened more branches this past year:) The only thing that can be a bit annoying is when they skimp on some of the ingredients and you get a really unbalanced salad.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Breakfast and salad. What a great combination. And by breakfast we mean the traditional dishes you might be used to it you're from the west ---such as bacon and eggs or eggs Benedict. It's all so yummy! The entrées here are delicious and iconic. It's worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Ordered two wraps for takeout yesterday which were good. Ordered two almost identical wraps again today. One wrap had ingredients and the dressing packaged separately instead of actually being incorporated into the wrap. The other was an inedible leaky mess that squirted dressing out of every crevice. Instead of bringing my change the waiter gave me the receipt and told me to come back tomorrow and exchange it for a pineapple soda. What?

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My girlfriend and I loved the salad concept. The healthy food is fresh, is served quickly and portions are really big. We went back several time and always enjoyed our meals.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It's a great place for health concious people. The salad and eggs in a pan are delicious. The restaurant is on Nimman street which in the heart of Chiangmai. The ambiance and decoration are great. But the staff are quite noisy.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We came here for a fresh lunch and were not disappointed. Everything was very fresh. You can build your own salad and customize your toppings. Compared to thai standards it's a little pricey but not what we are used to paying for a salad. Our total came to just around 400 baht for 2 giant salads. Must try the strawberry dressing!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Happy to find a good and simple salad restaurant without any other expectation. Weathgrass shots and quinoa + a wrap Cesar salad and everything is top!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I am a regular customer but I will never visit the place after today. My order of a simple omelette didn't arrive for over 50 minutes !! When I tried to call the staff over, I got purely ignored. As I was just walking out the order finally arrived. The bacon was so hard and cold. The omelette was alright, not perfect. My whole afternoon was ruined and j was late for the rest of the day. Unless you a tourist with all time in the world to wait for your food - AVOID !!!!!!!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: One of the healthier places to eat in Chiang Mai...great selection of fresh salads in a welcoming atmosphere with friendly service. I drop in here almost once a week. My favs are the chicken Caesar salad wrap and grilled beef salad...both are delicious and a nice taste combination. If none of the menu salads suit you, you can create your own salad from a long list of salad ingredients and dressings. The cakes here are fantastic too, especially the chocolate mousse cake and carrot cake. Would give the place 4.5 stars if I could...not a perfect place to eat but very close to it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Amazing salad , you can make your own or order a la carte . They also have a great wrap and some dishes with meat ans fish. The Caesar salad is super , also the chicken. Prices are all about less than 5usd

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After all the buffets, lovely Thai food that I have been indulging in, we chanCe upon this nice restaurant with great Fresh salads. Would recommend this if you are not too hungry or over loaded with little space left.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Whenever I'm in the Nimmanhaemin area around meal time, I always choose the salad concept. My favorite dish is the Caesar wrap and the Unicorn Cake! The service is great, the staff is welcoming, the atmosphere is pleasant, and the establishment is clean.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: After visiting all morning on a very hot day, it was really nice to find this place. Great concept : you get to choose what you want your salad to be made of, from a long list of ingredients. Portions are generous, everything was freash and tasty. Great lunch.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Monstrous giant megagiga portion of nice vegetables... it was absolutely fantastic. The choices you have and the dressings are absolutely spot on. You definatelly need to taste it. Wealth is Health!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Once you've figured out the process, which isn't so difficult, we had a really great and much needed salad. Local touches to the ingredients helped make it interesting. And great drinks too. All healthy stuff, and nice aircon too !

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I'm not a vegetarian, as a matter-o-fact I kinda resisted the idea of going here, but MAN was it good!! after 5 weeks of traveling and eating noodles and rice I was really craving some green stuff! this place cured what ailed me. it was nice to eat something healthy and the mango smoothy was delicious too! if your in the mood for something healthy this place will make you feel great!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Had two amazing fresh salads here. A salad type place you'd find at home. Juices are good too! A little more $ but very worth it. Fast wifi. Good portion sizes

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place had way more staff than necessary, more than there were customers! Most of what we ordered they said they didn't have.
