Ended up with HUGE plates of average salad that any person could rustle up - couldn't finish the massive portions either. Wasteful. Not really worth going IMO. This is the salad version of a D-grade Subway.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The few things they could actually offer on the menu was little more than a few drab salad leaves andstale chopped vegetables. Made up for only in size. Disappointing.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We came here to try and freshen up our diets as a lot of Thai food is fried. I had the beef salad, my girlfriend had a salad wrap and we both had a berry shake, all very tasty and big portions!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Visited here yesterday 02.11.15 with My boyfriend for lunch, everyone was very nice and Service was good. My wrap was amazing, well worth the money, also there smoothies are so nice too! I will be back!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: go to the nimman salad concept over the newer moat salad concept to avoid disappointment. service has gotten so bad near the moat that i've stopped going completely. whether it's closing thirty to forty minutes early at night, "running out of salad", or just grumpy servers, the moat salad concept is a drag. in nimman, you'll find good salads at a good price, the soups are great (pumpkin or mushroom), and the service is fine. nice atmosphere too.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I went with a friend to have a wrap today there. My friend found a snail inside her wrap, the waitress just said she was sorry and still want to charge us for the food but I insisted that she should cancel as my friend would not eat it.Salad leaves should be cleaned very carefully because if not it can cause serious problems to our health. After seeing a snail in my friend's wrap I did not want to eat mine anymore. She charged me anyway. I used to recommend this restaurants to my friend but now I don't trust the hygiene anymore. I just paid for my wrap even though I didn't eat it. Poor costumer service and hygiene.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Everything we ordered was fantastic. So many options, so many different ingredients, every wrap and salad was delicious. Staff were friendly and helpful, even when there was queues out the door. We went almost every day in a week in Chiang Mai. Highly recommended.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I really wish we had somewhere like this in my hometown! Basically you choose salad or wrap, pick your ingredients (5 are included in the base price but it's inexpensive to add more), add protein if you'd like, pick a dressing and voila! You can also choose from salads on the menu, which also looked tasty. I made my own wrap, cold-pressed juice (I chose ginger, passion fruit and wheatgrass!), and mushroom soup. Full and content! Visit here for sure!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This restaurant has an impressive menu for Thailand, where "salad" more commonly means a few green leaves, twelve carrot shavings, and a slice of cucumber. The menu is extensive and substitutions are possible in the listed items. There is an indoor A/C area as well as an open, porch-like area with lots of seating. The soi (street) is tight, but there is good parking lot in the back. Service was prompt and accurate, prices average for western food and worth every baht. There is a rush hour for lunch and dinner, so go earlier/later to avoid the crazy time.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Stopped here for some dessert. Fantastic selection of cakes and great coffee and tea! The salads look delicious as well but we had already eaten! Relaxed atmosphere with rapid wifi!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I really enjoyed the menu. I went to the branch near Thaphae Gate There is certainly something for everyone. I had the fried Dory Fish with a salad. Very tasty. My only criticism is the system for ordering food is a bit confusing and cumbersome with a different colored ordering sheet for each different type of food - one for salads, one for seafood, one for drinks, etc In fact, I order the wrong item. But was happy with what I got.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The ones who usually eat street food, know that there are not so many choices if you're vegetable lover. This place finally made my stomach happy. You can choose whatever you like (all ingredients one by one) - salads or wraps. Or if you can't make up your mind, then there's most popular meals you can choose from. Even though there was 8 of us, we all got our food on the table within 10-15 min. The portions of food are huge, so it's easy to get yourself a dinner even below 150 Bahts.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Both this branch and the one near the old town are excellent. The prices are very reasonable and the food is very, very tasty. The starting price for a salad is just 65 baht and there are a large number of add-ons that can be selected. You can create your own vegetarian vegan options. If you're looking for fresh, raw vegetables in Chaing Mai, check this place out.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Super fast service as it's mostly salad , looks amazing and have never been disappointed yet 65 baht gets you a massive salad and vegan sauce is lush , we eat here at least once a week

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Found it just by pure chance but was so on cloud 9 indeed. Totally my breakfast style, fresh fruit with plain yoghurt as a start, then coffee late with an extra esspreshot and pouched eggs with salad, bacon and whole mealbread total bliss. Toilets c

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have visited the salad concept Restaurant many times, there branch of the old city opposite moonmuang. Each time I go with my Thai partner things seem to Deteriorate. On most occasions my Thai partner has the Dory Fish, but this time it was very bland and the pot of sauce it came in had no taste whatsoever. I generally have the Tuna but this time was very disappointed there was hardly anything just like a tablespoon of it. The salad is always good but this times i noticed it was not fresh and was turn brown at the ends. Salad is cheap here so this did make me feel a little bit cheated. it is always well presented. But I think this branch needs a shake up, it has gone down hill. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A great choice for a healthy option! I love the roasted chicken and the freshness of the veggies! I always order a salad to go as well so I have one for the following day. They have tons of delicious dressing options! We go here almost every week!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It's hard to find a decent salad in Asia so I was excited to find this place when I first arrived in Chiang Mai. I go a couple times a week and the salads have always been excellent.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad was served with fresh and big portion and I love to order Salad Muang Muang which makes me feel to eat northern Lanna style.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I've been craving fresh vegetables and Salad Concept delivered. For under a hundred baht, you choose fresh ingredients for a salad or wrap. The portions are extremely generous so you wont walk away full. If you are still hungry, they have some tasty looking cakes. They also serve hearty breakfast dishes, mains, and freshly squeezed juices. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Was there repeatedly but found the quality and service slowly declining. After once being served a totally cold "fried" fish and olive oil that burnt the throat, I never went back.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: You can make your own salad or wrap with 5 free toppings and many extras starting at 65 Baht. Or, if you are like me and want to be spoiled, you pick from their extensive salad menu. I personally love the mango salad, avocado salad, and salmon salad with wheat pasta. The other ones I've tried are my husbands favorites which are good and zingy include the Thai beef salad, and the one with pork skin. Pretty much everything we ordered here, we love! From the potato and cheese balls, the custom or set salads, pasta, mushroom soup, and drinks. The relax smoothie is made with apples and is so delicious! The teas can be somewhat sweet, so let them know how sweet you'd like it. You have the option of sitting outside and get spritzed with water to cool you down from the heat, inside with A/C on at full blast, or in the covered patio with fans and portable A/C. The inside is usually packed during normal meal hours, so we usually sit in the covered patio. The service can sometimes be inattentive, maybe distracted from their headsets, so don't be afraid to flag them down. When you order for dine-in or take-out, you mark what you want on one of three pads: DIY salad/wrap, set menu, and drinks. Dessert is ordered from the waitstaff or the cash register. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The menu is so appetizing & colourful that you will spoilt for choices. You can even choose to make your own bowl of salad with your favourite dressing & toppings. They have many types of dressing to choose from. Apart from salad, there's variety of healthy fresh fruit & vegetables juices too. Not forgetting healthy soups. I've tried the mushroom soup, it's yummy. Clean restaurant & friendly staffs.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The staff are often not attentive - they seem to be more interested in looking at their phones/texting. Also the drinks person won't help other out - even if there are no drinks to prepare. Hygiene also not good - lots of flies, and the "cleaning" of the tables between customers is a joke. Shame, because the food and the concept is really good. Still recommend going here, but only for the food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I went to the chaiyapoon branch, so i dont know about the others, but dont go to this one, the staff are very rude here. The waitress wouldnt speak or look at me even though i was very nice to her. I was a little surprised that they wouldnt let me change the musli with yogurt to just musli with milk, but when i got the meal i saw it was just yogurt with just a little musli sprinkled on top, this isnt a biggy, its just you pay a lot for what you get. Such a pretty restaurant, but it is let down by all the staff sitting on the floor texting. When i went to pay, the guy wouldnt get off his phone to even let me pay. Eventually he relunctantly looked away from the screen to take my money, i felt they were annoyed to have customers there as it takes them away from their phones! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I wasn't sure what I was looking for when I stumbled upon this gem. The menu extended a bit beyond salads but not much. I got a Caesar salad and she got a tuna salad, both of which were 105 Baht ($3) and were awed at the size, presentation and quality. The drinks were fruit smoothies and were equally delish! Awesome, affordable and well worth the trip.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Very good location in hip Nimman area. Beautiful interior and peaceful atmosphere. Plenty of choice for your salads and juices. Good food, good service.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Frequently (70%) excellent but often (30%) disappointing. When you can get a server's attention and they have what you order, Salad Concept delivers. Service is often not very good though and the location on the moat, in particular, often seems to run out of things. Staff at that location also seem fond of closing up 20-30 minutes before posted closing time.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you are looking for some greens to eat go here. You can build your own salad or wrap starting at 69 baht or choose from there selection of salads for around 100+ baht. My favorites are the Grilled Beef or Shrimp salads. This was the first place we ate after arriving here and one of my favorites. They have a good selection of Juices, I've liked everyone I have tried, and very tempting and delicious desserts.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place has been my go to place for a fresh serve of greens and vegetables since i found it.. Outside area is nice and has great wifi.. excellent service.. easy place your own order tick box forms to choose the toppings and sides you prefer. Good location on Moon Muang.. i just keep coming back ! salads are 69THB with 5 toppings and a dressing of your choose.. you can choose extra sides, Warm or cold.. highly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A little bit away from city center, but so worth it! Huge salads with lots of options, smoothies, and some of the best cake I've ever eaten.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Amazing choices of tasty salad and you can also customize your own, choosing from different ingredients and salad dressing. Nice fresh juice and smoothie. It's located in the convenient Nimman area and the restaurant is well-decorated. Both indoor and outdoor areas are available.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We loved this place. The ingredients are fresh, plentiful, abundant and delicious. Lots of healthy options and easy to eat gluten free. Prices are quite reasonable. Salad with 5 ingredients of your choice for 70 baht. Add a protein for 35 baht. Cool decor, free wifi and just enough a/c. Excellent!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: very tasty salads of all types. not easy to find sth liek this in thailand. place is pretty packed at all times it seems. lot's of stuff, although a bit slow in seeing when you need sth. went multiple times.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: When you need a change from delicious Thai food, Salad Concept is an awesome alternative. Amazing and fresh salads and juices with a choice of delicious dressings. A healthy oasis!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: 地方容易找到。 價格超值 其實兩個去叫一個都吃不完 食物和飲品即叫即做 很新鮮，味道很好 是次品嚐了 1.Cheese burger salad (ard 155bath) 2. North Thai salad( ard 145 bath) 3.Anti cancer (80 bath) 4. Anti cancer with herb (80bath) 除了沙律，還有意粉，蛋糕和卷 Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: First impression : Very trendy and expensive style café. Reception : Not really concerned about the incoming customers. There was no free table inside and we were four. We had to put two tables together and arrange chairs and the tables by ourselves. Hall : Stunning heat during hot season outside, and stunning coldness inside. Just have to choose ! Noisy hall inside ! Food : Expensive but quite tasty. Salads are not too big, but not really small. Better take the salads then wraps if you feel really hungry. IF you feel really hungry you can also have a preference for pasta and potato filling ! Conclusion : Not too bad, Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The vegetable wasn't that clean and fresh... They need to cut the dirty part at least. But it was not a big deal. Dressing was ok and service was also good. Some of them can speak ok english and are ready to get order. The portion is huge compared to the price. (A bit pricey for chiang mai though). Well located also.. Centrally located in nimmanhaemin rd. Really Recommend to gym nuts.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Optimal portion size. Fast order response. Good taste, fresh ingredients. Very tasty.... Good location and price.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Craving for fresh food on a Sunday morning. The salad concept offer a wide variety of choices but because I'm a vegan, I prefer to stick with their wrap and juice. Got a wrap where you can choose 5 toppings. I went with pumpkin, beetroot, mushroom, raisin and lecture. It costs 75B. For the juice you can choose 4 fruits, but it costs 80B and the portion is a little bit small. Overall really fresh food and nice environment. A bit pricey when compare to restaurant nearby, but a good choice for travellers who are looking for light and fresh option.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Looking for healthy food after eating too much in cm and salad concept fits the bill completely. Expensive by cm standard bt we love it here. The portion is huge and taste v fresh. We are here almost everyday. Love it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Service was appalling, so so slow and couldn't be bothered. Drinks very expensive for very small size. Also requested a bottle of wTer as this is not a restaurant that offers free water. We were given a bottle of very warm water. The girl was rude when I asked for cold water and sId they don't have cold water. Won't be back and wouldn't recommend.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Easy to order and great fresh selection of salads & toppings. I also had a delicious fresher pressed juice with celery, wheatgrass and passion fruit.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The branch in Nimman is great. Nice seating and attentive friendly staff. 75 baht for a healthy wrap is not bad but drinks are way overpriced. Avoid the branch in the old town. Staff are rude with the worst service I've had in Thailand,

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Though the salad and the concept is the same, and the quality is unquestionable. But, for this time, I think it is too touristic. The staff is not helpful in customize the salad. They try to sell a set and suggested menu. Staff can not advice a good pairing dressing. Many new menu created is not healthy and can not call it salad. A lot of mango menu popping up. However, it still a good choice for finding a light meal after the day. Or, avoid others street BBQ and deep fried things. FYI, there are some new healthy choice food shop and stall nearby. Should research and find your need before make a choice! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Huge fresh salads with lots of choices of toppings - if you're not too hungry you could easily share one between two. Lots of other ranges of foods including fresh fruit juices (you can choose up to 4 fruits to mix) and desserts. Would definitely recommend!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I am not a salad fan, but it is very easy to do a salad at Salad Concept. Probably about every 3 months I will have a reason to eat at Salad Concept. They have a great selection of salads, including their own signature sauces and dressings. The basic salad is quite hearty and quite satisfying even for a big eater like me. I often go for the Potato Salad salad and it's very good. Food generally arrives up to 5 minutes after you ordered it. It's always buzzing and the staff are usually right there when you need them. I like it for a simple change to the every day, but I think you could do it every day, if you wanted to. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I had a caesar salad that had a nice dressing. A friend of mine made her own salad that looked good but nothing special. A little overpriced.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salad concept is a nice place for salads. The concept of chosing your own ingredients and dressing is very nice. Staff is kind.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Always been my favorite to have fresh salad and lite meals. They have various lie meals to chose from and healthy drinks to go with it.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: They have outside a very nice area to sit as it is inside always very cold. The salad or wraps are amazing...if you are searching something healthy. We went there many times, also nice for a business meeting.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great healthy food and drink to give your digestion a break. We loved the diversity. You have an option of the usual salad ingredients as well as seeds, nuts, beetroot, roasted veg etc. Good pressed juice. Easy to complete "menu sheets" at your table where you can indicate what you want added to your salad/wrap. Good service. Not super cheap, but enjoyable.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place appears to be a mere shadow of the Salad Concept on Nimmenhaemin Rd. & the quality I like. This newer location has uninspired staff, rap music playing, and quality of food is average. Ordered some feta cheese which unfortunately was the 'cheap' variety, olive oil dispenser leaked. Other than that, the place is clean.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If your stomach is hurting from all the Thai food, stop in here for some fresh nourishment. I have eaten here a handful of times during my stay and it's saved me!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: One of Chiangmai's favourite restaurant. Easy to find. The staffs were quite nice. The foods were really good. Delicious, healthy, and reasonable price.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad Concept provided us a wide range of salad and vegetarian dishes. To be honest the price was a little expensive compared to the cuisine price in overall Chiangmai Province but the portion of our dishes was a compensation for that matter. Nice and warm, cozy interior with a bit noisy outdoor seats available. Must visit.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Heard so much about Salad Concept we had to check it out and were not disappointed. Really a cool concept with lots of customization of your salad. Portions are really big, produce was fresh and prices very reasonable. You can get a salad that feeds two for around 100 baht.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It was just across the road from where we put up, seeing people eating there all the time even in the mornings! One evening we ended up there and found it great. I am a salad fan so it is all right with me, but for my wife and my daughter the portion was too large for them to chew up all. Sorry, I don't remember what we had but of course we had a good time.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I went there two times and enjoyed their salads and healthy drinks. I liked their light soya-based dressings. An alternative eating at affordable prices. Service was good. Location is convenient.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Different kind of salad can choose, North Thai style, cheese burger, etc we have it for breakfast to start a fresh day.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: First time to this restaurant...They showcase the salad and the salad and the dressings were the stars...No wait to get in but it did get busy while we were eating. Booth and table seating. Wide variety of menu items.Good items.....salad with several choices of types of lettuce and salad dressings...(try the black pepper salad dressing..very yum..Not-so-good items...pumpkin soup...not much taste to soup..needed seasoning and more pumpkin....Mom's French Fries.......I think frozen fries...hot when they came to table but potatoes had little taste......Blooming Onion.....OK, but couldnt pull stems out of onion to dip in sauce....nor could you cut pieces to dip...methinks it was undercooked (friend)...more disappointed in food then happy to be honest... Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We visited The Salad Concept on the corner of Chaiyaphum Road & Chaiyapoom Road Soi 1, across from the moat. The salads were fantastic! Fresh ingredients, homemade dressings, friendly & helpful staff AND a clean restaurant. The pictured salad was only $3.25US, a great bargain!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Amazing fresh salads and wraps - plenty of choice and large portions. You can choose what ingredients you would like. They also offer wraps, smoothies and fresh juices. A really great option for vegans.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Gosh i ate here for so long and so many times. It is just clean salad, easy and not the worsed option if you care to eat healthy. Chemical fertilizer indoor salads, not my favorite but what you see is what you get and you don't get disapointed when the waiters are not sleeping lol.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We waited for 15 min and not one person came up to us but there was at lest 3 worker walking by but never ask if we need anything thay were going to the 7-11 across the street and when i came in to ask if we can git something to drink CUZ IT WAS HOT all the worker were just standing around talking to each other and NO ONE CARE i just move to the neighborhood i live right across the street from this place and after that me or anyone i know well not be back

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We live in Chiang Mai and just recently discovered Salad Concept. They have two locations in Chiang Mai, one on Nimmanhaemin Rd at Soi 15 and the other on the east moat between Sripoom Corner and Tapae Gate. We have tried both and they are both superb. Each table has it own menu pads so evenswhen the waiters might be busy you can easily mark your order yourself and save time. The service is friendly and all the different items we've tried have been great -- delicious. My wife especially likes the Caesar Salad Chicken Wrap (115 baht) and I like the Regular Salad (69 baht) because you can choose your own 5 favorite toppings at that price. This place is nice, clean and cheerful with a good selection of vegetarian and non-vegetarian items. Try it, you'll love it! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We kept on going back here! You build your own salad and it was really great value for how much you get. You can also get a takeaway (I'd recommend the wrap for this). Always plenty of tables, quick service and brilliant.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you are tired of all those deep-fried dishes and stir-fried rice, then this place will be your relief. Fresh greens, all the possible ingredients for salad, different dressings and all this fairly-priced. One of the best healthy options in town,

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is the very best place for fresh salads and good soups and other healthy dishes at reasonable prices. Lots of variety and you can customize your salad as you desire with the base greens and five free toppings. We visit at least two or three days a week to take away. Excellent staff and friendly service and fresh ingredients. Great value and tasty too!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Pros: The ability to craft your own salad from a list of ingredients. A good selection of pre-designed salads. Delicious salad wrap. Good smoothies. Generally nice atmosphere (depending on location). Cons: Prices have gone up. Serving sizes have gone down*. The Nimmanheimen branch has terrible acoustics and cramped seating, negating what would have otherwise been nice atmosphere. Staff is often pretty clueless and inattentive. Good luck getting somebody to clear your plate from the table after you're finished with it. A few more notes about these points: The Salad Concept used to have a beautifully designed branch at Central Festival, but they closed it for whatever reason. The newly opened branch by the moat is cool inside and relatively quiet, though as mentioned before the service is pretty unimpressive. Regarding serving sizes and prices: I wouldn't have a problem here if they went up or down in tandem, but when they go in opposite directions (in the wrong way), that's disappointing. I crafted my own salad on my most recent visit and received half a hard boiled egg and the tiniest lump of feta cheese imaginable. Note to owners: if you're going to charge 35 baht extra for feta, and you're only going to give the customer that little bit, then maybe it's better to just remove feta from the menu entirely. Overall this place probably deserves something closer to 3.5/5, but it's not a 4 for me either. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Had salad wraps which were freshly made and Hugh! Very filling and highly recommended. Lovely coffee and reasonably priced.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salads look big but they are just a big bowl full of uncut lettuce leaves with a few random vegetables. The Caesar Salad dressing was so void of even the essence of anchovies that it should have a different name. My wife could not understand why they brought her so much Thousand Island dressing for her Shrimp salad until she started adding it to her salad. Sorry to say that the Thousand Island dressing flavor, was so weak in flavor and thin that it did take all of the dressing to make it palatable. So going here for a salad is a definite no. Backing this up is the inept, lackadaisical, untrained staff that really have little or no idea what most customers expect in the form of service. True they only have to verify that you have made out your order slip correctly rather than actually taking your order, but just try getting a small problem corrected like a rock hard roll and you will see what I mean. Even getting your bill seems to be almost too much to ask for. Salad Concept does have one nice redeeming value. Their back patio area is a very nice place to set and enjoy one of their cold drinks when you want to escape the hustle and bustle of Nimmanhaemin Road. As a side note if you really want to enjoy a good Caesar Salad go to Butter is Better on Chang Klan Road. It costs a little more but it is worth it. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I absolutely love this place! Everything is so fresh and extremely tasty! I particularly like building my own salad however the set salads/meals are also amazing! Cannot fault this place from the service, venue and food! A must go for a fresh, healthy alternative for when you get sick of Thai food!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We've gone here at least 4 times and have never been disappointed! Fresh quality ingredients, a variety of flavors, epic smoothies :) Refreshing from a lot of other restaurants in Asia.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Can't believe no avocado only 3pm and they have run out.I have seen plenty in the shops so why doesn't a staff member go and buy a couple. We will not be back.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Sometimes a salad is just what you feel like, but you are not brave enough to have one in case the salad has been washed with local water. We had a few salads here & found them fresh, delicious and tasty. No problems afterwards.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We went to the restaurant twice and quite satisfied. Here, they serve large portion of fresh salad so you don't have to worry if veggie can make you full or not. The price is reasonable and not expensive. They have wide choice of vegetables, dressings, and topping to choose from. From delicious Caesar to hamburg steak. We tried fried cheese for side dish and it's very good too. The restaurant is often crowded with local and full during peak time so expect some waiting. The service is normal. Overall, great salad restaurant with wide choice of salad at reasonable price. To avoid crowd, the best time to go is about 2pm-5pm. Don't go during peak hours if you're very hungry since it might take some time for food to be served. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: we were a bit tired of thai food and wanted a good salad. This place offered exactly that. Sort of like the Chopped restaurants in DC. Everything we ordered was good and done California style.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We were really excited to find a place that looked like it served super fresh salads, soups and other healthy options but... We ate here one and got take out once -- and in the end we just weren't overly impressed. I would probably go back to get a salad again but I would stay away from their soups. First time we tried the mushroom soup - it had a decent flavor but watery consistency. When we got takeout, we tried the tomato soup -- ooh it was NOT good. It wasn't a bright(ish) red flavor like I find in the U.S. but rather a darker rusty color with a super odd flavor... we couldn't tell if they also added something like carrots or sweet potato or if the tomatoes were old... it just tasted off (we took a few bites and tossed the rest). The chicken wrap we got was good and the tamarind sesame dressing was awesome and made both the wrap and salad delish! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It's sometimes hard to find salads in Thailand and Salad Concept is a welcome oasis. Their HUGE salads are amazing and taste so fresh and so good!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Best to order the regular salad or pizza salad because you can choose whatever food you wanted to add in to your salad.The salad is very fresh and the drinks is very yummy. i highly recommend you order pizza salad with your favorite food because the pizza is crispy and there are some cheese! the topping is the best topping ever because it is ketchup! I went there two times and the salmon is so yummy! It is very fresh and you must eat it if you are a fish lover.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Cesar salad really ? Just normal salad some cocked not fried bacon. Overpriced, overrated, it's all I could figure out.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I recently ate at the new branch along the moat. I don't really like to write this as i have eaten at the Nimmanhaemin restaurant too many times to remember and have never found anything to complain about. However, my last visit to the new branch left thinking if I will ever go back. I ordered the regular salad with 5 toppings, plus roast chicken. The chicken was perfect, the salad was good, but a few hours later I started to feel unwell. It could not have been anything I ate for breakfast as I ate only Shredded Wheat, and I never eat dinner so it could only have been the salad. I have never felt so ill, I looked 6 months pregnant when my belly swelled and I had to stay very close to the toilet; it came out both ends. The only thing I can think of is that the salad ingredients were not washed in clean water - what else would it be? I will return to the Salad Concept, but I will not return to the new branch near the moat. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This was a phenomenal restaurant with delicious food and large portions. I had a salad and it was 10-12 inches in diameter! Huge! I got the strawberry dressing and absolutely loved it! They make all their dressings. My friend got a fruit salad and Caesar wrap, both of which she loved as well! This restaurant is great for those who want a break from fried food or rice. It is full of fresh veggies and fruits and is a great healthy alternative. The only thing I was surprised about was why it wasn't more busy! It is so good! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: ....busy place with great salads, service so so but fast, as simple set up of pick and choose differentsalads. Sit outside for more quiet atmosphere.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salads are very fresh as they grow their own vegetables. The portions are big and there's a wide variety to choose from including some interesting dressings.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I think the title says it all. After lunch at Salad Concept, this evening I find myself dashing to the bathroom every 5 minutes plus the added bonus of vomiting on top of that. Will never visit them again. Stay clear of this restaurant

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If there is one place you go to eat in change mail make sure it's here. Wow!! Great job guys. I'll be back

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Found a big live squirming worm in my salad and hightailed it out of there. Pretty amazing too, because they had a huge number of employees just standing around doing practically nothing - must have been twenty servers standing around. But still can't get it together enough to wash some lettuce well enough to clean off the worms??!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Nice place with air conditioning and outdoor seating, the salads are fresh and well presented, main couses are very good too, we tried grilled salmon which was very good.Highly recommended.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place is one I frequent often. They have great dressings and a variety of toppings for great salads, and amazing teas and shakes. However, there is always something amiss- mix up of ingredients, veggies gone bad, or forgetting orders- even getting the bill feels like a chore. Worth a visit for sure, just don't expect the same quality of service.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you never get tired of eating salad, this is the place for you. It has indoor and outdoor dining, parking is easy, inside is fully air conditioned You are able to make your choices for sale on an order form provided also with a pencil by the staff, their menu is quite extensive also they have a large range of non alcoholic drinks available Service is quick, an ideal place if you are looking for a quick bite It is very reasonably price, and a place that l never get tired of Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A friend told us we should try the salad concept and so went there for lunch. It was humming mainly with Europeans and the mixed salads and unique dressings are certainly healthy, reasonably priced and the service was great. Would not hesitate to recommend to anyone especially if you like salads. Recently in Chiang Mai have noticed a mini explosion of Salad style restaurants and this certainly would be near the top of the list

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salad concept has it all nailed down from an interior designer's / atmosphere standpoint. It is really cool inside. The food is good, but not exceptional (at least not for the price). It's unique from other salad places though so i go sometimes.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Last night I intended to eat at the newly opened venue of Salad Concept in the centre of Chiang Mai. I sat outside, which in most restaurants is my preference. I ordered and then noticed a nearby table was occupied by people smoking. It defies logic how a restaurant that actively promotes a healthy lifestyle can permit smoking when almost certainly it will impact adversely on the majority of its users. - I walked out after complaining.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We are living in Chiang Mai for 3 months off of Nimman. Salad Concept is across from our apartment and we have to go at least once a week. As a family of 4 we get salads and a couple of smooties all for under $10. Not bad! The "french" dressing is to die for. Kind of like a creamy balsamic. For about $2 you can build your own salad. You pick 5 free toppings, if you want more they are about 6 baht each, so $.20. We really load up on the good stuff, then you pick your "pay toppings" like meats or cheese. We usually don't add those and then you pick your dressing from a list of 15 or so. They bring you the biggest salad ever. Actually Anya and I usually share one and that is plenty for the two of us. They have AC and wifi too. You really can't make a salad for less. Here a tiny head of ice burg is about 45 baht or $1.50, and that doesn't include toppings and dressing. They don't serve ice burg, they serve a nice mixed green salad. Love it. of course they have more than salad, they have huge wraps too. They offer delivery and sometimes we get it all to go. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is my first time to have a dinner here. The restaurant is not quite big, but they can service faster than some big restaurant. Thr taste of food is fantastic, and the price is valuable. I am surly to come back again

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We order one pasta.one deep fried potato filling w. Cheese and 2 SALAD DISHES during eating we saw the COCKROACH in our salad we asked the waiter to take that dish out. We stop eating another salad also...bcaz it 's feel like wanna vormit and so disgusting. Waiter asked we would lije to change new dish ..we said no we would like to check. Er eat only 3 spoons till see the crockroach. I assume that they not clean up the vegetable hygeine enough. UNBELIVABLE THEY CHARGE FOR COCKROACH DISH AND DISCOUNT 10% ....IS IT UNBELIVABLE.... IF I WERE THEM I WILL NOT CHARGE FOR COCKROACH DISH...IF IN US I THINK THE RETAURANT NOT CHARGE FOR ALL FOOD THAT WE ORDER. MY SISTER VORMIT AFTER WE BACK TO OUR PLACE. WE WILL NOT VISIT THAT PLACE AGAIN. IT S TERRIBLE EXPERIENCE Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I'm very surprised by all the comments. This is a place where you can eat salad that you can do by yourself. And the ingredients are not the best quality that you can find here in Chiang Mai. For me, it was not a good experience and too expensive for the value...

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We spotted this while on riding around town and decided to stop for lunch. It was very busy with no tables inside and outside was too hot but the staff were great and quickly got us a table inside. The salads were amazing. Fresh,tasty abd huge portions. The fruit juices great also. I would recommend this place to everyone.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We find this restaurant while we watching the reccommendation Chiang Mai channel and definately we not disappoint to have salad here.This is the best salad shop ever service is good even we sit outdoor table,all vegetable is very fresh and have many choice of westurn and asian style dressing for your selection. Beverage is also good and price is reasonable highly reccommend this restaurant

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I found this restaurant while walking along nim-man road in Chiang Mai. It offers variety of salads, topping and dressing. I ordered pan fried salmon salad and it was perfect for dinner. The veg was very fresh and the dressing goes along very well with salmon. Very recommend for those who love salad.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I keep going back to salad concept. I think it's because the food is fresh, and you can order exactly what you want. If you're following a special diet like me then this is useful. Also unusually for Thailand, it's veggie friendly and doesn't use MSG or other additives. Normally veggie food here draws heavily on genetically modified tofu. But salad concept has lots of great green and lovely avocadoes, mushrooms, asparagus - you specify whatever you fancy that day. They are generous with the salad leaves, which are crunchy and fresh. I really like the mushroom soup which has lots of black pepper. The potato salad is soft - properly cooked - and tasty. I have ordered the potato croquettes with cheese... yum. Various cakes too if you feel like using the calories you've saved on the salad. There are lots of servers - sometimes they're in another world - I suppose they work long hours and get bored. So you may need to wave them down to get served. But they're pretty good, the food comes quickly. They have an efficient system. Inside it's cool and air conned or you can sit out front - a bit traffic fumey for me - or in a terrace on the side with fans. That's where I prefer. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Superb range of salads and the option to create your own salad. All the ingredients were fresh and tasty with large portion sizes.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I was first hesitant to try the Salad Concept as I thought the place might be expensive. The good news, it's not expensive at all. A basic salad cost 69 Baht incl. 5 incredients of your choice. If you want more, it's 6 Baht per ingredient. So basically I choose a salad with 6 ingredients and a delicious strawberry dressing and paid 75 Baht for it. The value is amazing. The salad was big, the veggies were fresh and tasty. A wonderful healthy and organic meal! I went there yesterday and today again. I have a feeling I will stop daily there from now on. Love the place, best salad in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: One of my favorite restaurants in Chiang Mai. Amazing, fresh salad with different varieties to choose from!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My friend and I come here every time we get to Chiang Mai on the weekends. The salads are big and the price is reasonable. There are many great options for salads and wraps here. The smoothie are awesome as well. If you love salad and are sick of noodles and rice than head here for a healthy/delicious meal, you won't regret it. I love salad concept!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I was having lunch with this restaurant. when I walked in there are so many guests were sitting in the restaurant and I am alone then a staff asked me if I don't mind to sit outside then I am ok to sit outside cuz the weather is lovely. a couple of minutes afterward a service guy brought me a menu and i did order him and the drink was served in a few minute then my lovely salad came after. when I almost finish i was looking for a staff to ask them to bill but they all are inside and didn't even come to check me up how I am going with the food, first i think they are busy but it was not, they were chatting inside, I waited for awhile then a girl came out and I said "hey!" hey! she does't even look at my table so i just walk inside and ask to bill and one of then told me to go at the cashier. and the cashiers even don't know what I would like to do. Thus, they just had less attention and just talked something else not about work. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: An amazing restaurant with a brilliant concept. Its like customizing everything to your liking with veggies and meat like you would when you order a pizza, only difference is whatever you're eating here not only tastes amazing, its really really healthy and the best part is its all organic. Great concept, amazing food and lovely atmosphere, everything that a good restaurant should have, Salad Concept does it better. Its perfect for both vegetarian and non-vegetarian people.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: No need more - very nice, aircon place with fresh salads, great dressings and wonderful freshly squeezed juices. All reasonably priced. Love their Cesar salad, avocado salad, detox drink.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Whilst travelling Thailand the past 4 weeks, it becomes clear that standards are limited in the country. Not one place is the same for portion sizes, cleanliness, cost, etc. Having met some friends here for a salad it was a delight. My girlfriend and I are vegans, and Thailand is not particularly a vegan's best friend, but it has it's highlights. The portions here were fantastic, the drinks are good, but a little pricey. If you stick to water and a wrap each, you'll be eating for around 100 baht each. Add drinks and double it. Has a vegan dressing (which comes in a huge ramekin by the way), the tamarind, and it's great. However it wouldn't be to hard for them to add a few more, or have a make your own option with olive oil, chilli, garlic, or anything to that affect. Overall a fantastic place, with quick and efficient staff and great prices. Most of all delicious salads. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Agriculture is famous in Chiang Mai and what's better than having an organic salad there! A great meal for me but hubby feel too less meat...the wrapped salad is great as it can be custom made and it's tasty! Unexpectedly big portion! And it's cheaper than we thought it should be.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I built my own salad and choose the French dressing, felt super healthy and fresh. Prices aren't bad either, so I'd recommend this place for anyone looking for a food detox for a meal!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I was ordered the organic tofu salad for my dinner. I'm very appreciate on this dish included friendly service of the waiters. But when i almost finished my dish i was found 1 vegetable big worm dead on my salad. Actually, i didn't scared or disgusting of it because this is an organic food. However, i think they should improve the cleanliness. No one want to eat the worm salad if they not order. So i wrote what i found on the bill (if i talk to the manager, it might be annoy other people in the restaurant) I hope they will improve the cleanliness despite they are indifferent to my massage after they read. That seem like they always found worms on the dish in every day. If you order the salad, please be careful what you eat. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: they serve salad with really fresh vegetables, ive tried salad at various places in Bangkok, but it cant really be compared to this one in Chiang Mai, it's probably because the vegetables doesnt need to travel for so long in Chiang Mai, so The Salad Concept place can always serve a good quality of vegetables for their dish. Besides, the beef quality is also good, and it tastes perfect! . They also serve various types of soup as well, and the mixed fruit salad can also be a good dessert ;)

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It was my first visit to The Salad Concept after a long break, and I must sadly admit that this restaurant has deteriorated. The service became slow and inattentive. Numerous waiters acted like sleepy flies - unlike real flies, that were taking keen interest in customers and their food. The bathrooms' doors are out of order. The staff probably think they solved the problem by putting an announcement: "If you want to lock the door, lift the door up a little and then put the bolts". Oh, really?! The food was ok, except the fact that I had to share it with flies. I don't know if there's a way to get rid of the flies, but I often eat out, and I know that this problem is not common in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I love varieties of salad menu especially the salad called Muang Muang. This salad dish uses the signature of local northern food such as crispy pork and sausage in northern style to do salad and use chili paste in northern style (nam prik noom) to mix with salad cream. The portion is quite big and enough to make you full in one dish. The price is reasonable. You can have your own salad by your desire, select your own veggies, condiments and dressing. The fried potatoes stuffed with cheeses also nice. Another recommend dish for me could be salad with beef. The meat is not tough and the dressing goes very well with salad Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you want a clean fresh salad or healthily smoothie this place would be hard to beat. Fast service and excellent value.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If you are a salad-lover, you would addict to it! Located in the trendy area of Chiang Mai, the food here gives you a big break from the daily heavy flavor food. We order one plate of regular tofu salad with Japanese dressing and the other one is self-chosen salad with Chinese sesame dressing and one detox juice. Detox juice was amazing. The sweet and sour taste was really a cool fresh~

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is a famous salad place opened by the locals. They serve really fresh vegetables and there are salads, wraps etc for choice. For non veggie lover, they do have some choices that are not veggie related. There are also interesting drinks/shakes available like the Anti-Cancer drink which i believe is super healthy and definitely worth a try.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We had an excellent lunch for the 4 of us. Usually "men" don't care for the whole salad thing but they have other options that help the men folk agree to join us. The girls were in salad haven. Big, fresh lettuce with yummy dressings. They are a little skimpy on the "toppings" though. You get five "free" with the regular salad and you can add different meats and other vegetables for around 25-50 baht. This is my second time here and I plan to go back again.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I like that you can get a fresh salad or salad wrap here, but some things could be done better. (Don't get a fried dory filet...) I also like the tea and herbal beverages (although a bit over priced). I like how customizable the food is..

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is one of good restaurant in Chieng Mai, When you come to this restaurant, you will feel comfort and happy everything with you want to eat. Select vegetables and mix as you like, Nice place and good experience. ^_^

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is a place I always visit when I go to Chiang Mai. It`s healthy and really good. My favorite is to make my own instead of the set meals. The smoothies are also great, though a bit pricey. There is one thing I think they should change, and that is to chop the salad up a bit. Nothing is better than to taste numerous veggies at the same time, letting the flavors mix properly. Still among my favorite places around this globe.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A lot of selection for diners. You can even choose to 'make your own salad'. Ingredients used are fresh and the pricing is very very affordable for the serving potion they provide you. Strongly recommend you to try the one at Nimma Rd. What it could have been better: Waitresses/Waiters could be more proficient in english as it will be easier for customers to clarify or make their requests known.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I like to look after myself and also love eating delicious food. Felt I did both here. Staff were friendly. Smoothies were great.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: we stumbled onto this place and were pleasantly surprised. everything was clean and modern. lots of local university students there (a good sign). the juices and shakes were creative.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Always having a nice experience at the Salad Concept. Well tasting salads, very good smoothie and very friendly staff.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Don't be fooled by the pictures - which look delicious, the salad is nothing like it. If you are looking for dirty greasy bacon, mixed around with the odd rotten vegetable, then I guess you have found the right place.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: A great restaurant, especially for the health conscious. Basically every meal come either as a alas or with salad. Great value for money. Wraps start at 75 thb and salad with fried fish only 120thb. Make sure you try their ginger drink, absolutely lovely.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I wouldn't recommended Caesar Salad to anybody, had that one with my friend and we both got very sick.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Three of us had lunch at the Salad Concept yesterday and were all very pleased. Service was caring and well trained, the portions were very large, price on the low side, the options such as to please anyone, the room is attractive and very clean. What more can I say...I think the concept is a very good one and we will dine there often. For lunch, dinner or a late night snack ( they are open until 10:00 ) this is definitely a place to go. On behalf of Chiang Mai we thank you Salad Concept.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The food was very fresh and the portion is large! A bit crowded at lunch and dinner time, which also means it is a popular spot! I went there twice during my stay in town. It is a must go and a refreshing break if you are not used to the very strong Northern Thai food!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It is a popular shop for tourists (i.e. more expensive than local shops) After several local meals with all the spices I'd love to detox myself with more fresh vegetables. I had the passion fruit dressing which is very nice. Very refreshing!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: My salad was very good. Tons of great topping options. Nice, fresh veggies. I received good service.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I was thrilled to find this restaurant on Nimman and have now tried out quite a few of their salads and juices. My favorite is the Japanese beef salad... and I love that I can order my own combination juice. YUM! It's a bit expensive, but it's usually worth it for me to have delicious, fresh salad/juice. It seems to get quite crowded at lunch, but there is usually space in the outdoor patio area in the back.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The Salad concept is a great spot but portions re small for the price and are disguised by the amount of lettuce you are given, its all lettuce and no substance but still tastes good. Dressings are very good and the menu its self is well designed. Really for tourists or rich Thais . 2 salads and juices Euro 18 so not cheap at all.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This used to be decent for what it basically is, a salad bar, of the last 6 months or so however the service has gone from indifferent to uncaring. Apart from this the quality of the salad is about the same however the prices don't really justify a very normal non-descript salad.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: There are now two restaurants, the second in the new Central complex. I really like this restaurant, they serve just what you need after eating Thai food everyday. The good thing is that you have a choice of what you want to eat as a salad. Five types of lettuce, then you select five extras and there is also a large choice of meats and fish. My favorite dressing is the passion fruit, just delicious. The only negative point I have is that I do not get to Chiang Mai as often as I wish I could, I am hoping they open a restaurant in Pattaya.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Salad Concept is one I need to write a review for. It is always packed so many people know how great it is, but you can get a cheap and awesome salad for 60 baht! My boyfriend and I were always here, he loved their salmon filet and I was always getting a personalized salad with French dressing (try it, it's the best). Don't miss this place!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We are planning as second visit back to this busy restaurant, which serves a variety of very fresh organic salads, with a range of toppings. While offering. Set menu, the staff were helpful when we said we wanted to mix a few things up (e.g. A salad with a dressing that was different from the one on offer). I had fresh tuna with a smooth, hot wasabi dressing. It was delicious and filling. My wife had a Caesar Salad. We drank long, cool drinks - passion fruit juice (me) and lime juice (my wife). The place was busy, but the staff were helpful and quick. A word of warning: if avocado is on your 'must have' list go early. It's a popular choice and was off the menu when we visited.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have to say my last trip here was marred by poor service, I had to call a waiter over twice to order stuff. One waitress in particular was very miserable looking. I'm not sure why, they weren't even that busy

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Really wide range of salads, all the ingridients are organic and very fresh, you can combine your own salad or choose from menu. Huge portions and delicious dressings and toppings. My favourite place in CM.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Detox salad made in european style, organic with all kind of topping. Really clean, nice enviromental, cool peoples mostly expat or turist always full! I will be back here

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The restaurant is located at Nimmanhemin soi 13 . There are many choices of salad that you can mix and match. The salad is really big for one person but the tase is wonderful. I enjoy my dish here.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place left a lasting impression when we had visited Chiang Mai a few years back; so we were keen to see if it was as good as we remembered. The answer was YES. So much so, that we had two lunches in three days here! I can’t go pass the Japanese beef salad. Should I try something else, or stick with what I know is good. Stayed with the proven track record. Why is this place so good? I think it must be the hydroponically grown lettuce, which is always so crisp. Mango and passion fruit shake was more like a “slushie” in texture, but still full of fruit flavour and so refreshing on a hot sticky Chiang Mai day. The staff were run off their feet on our visits, yet they still made time to explain things and to apologise profusely when my wife’s lunch order got lost on our 2nd lunch time visit. I am sure we will visit Chiang Mai again one day, and no doubt it will be one of our first eateries to visit. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: i have been to Salad Concept dozens of times. The salads are fresh and toothsome and served by the friendly helpful well-meaning waitpeople. You choose your own ingredients and if you choose right it is going to work out just fine. I am a big fan of the tofu dressing and my friend opts for the knock 'em dead wasabi. The fish dory is also quite good. There are also their list of signature salads. I have had the tuna salad, avocado salad, and rocket salad. There is a new branch at the MegaMall Festiva. If you are dragooned to going to this over air conditioned monument to gluttony, take a breather from consumerism and go to Salad Concept. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This place does not have the best salads ever. But if you've been in Thailand a while, and are tired of oily, heavy, fried food, a salad is like a godsend. Heck, I almost NEVER order salads back home, but thinking about a salad at Salad Concept is making my mouth water right now after being in this town for 2 months. After you try a few combinations, you'll discover what's good and what's not. The Japanese soy dressing is delicious. The "grilled mushrooms" are rubbery and cold. The tofu is ok (I still order it, though). The tuna salad is decent. You can also order wheatgrass shots for cheap. There is a lot of indoor and outdoor seating. The a/c was so cold the other day that I had to move outside (not complaining!). Service is good. Free wifi. They have a selection of desserts that look absolutely amazing but I have not tried them yet. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I found this place to be overrated. The salad does not meet the standard I expect from that pricing range and the service couldn't be worse. The soup is bland and totally disappointing. I do not understand why it gets very popular but if you love food, this is the restaurant you should waste hard-earned baht on.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: So-so.... If you gotta have a salad and don't want leave Nimman...not much of a choice. Their Caesar Salad taste nothing like a real Caesar salad. Their pre-designed salads are a bit blasé with the exception of the crispy fish salad...It's pretty good, thanks to the crispy fish! But..they are busy so somebody really likes them.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It’s mostly busy, so it certainly creates the impression that it's worthwhile going. Although its not great, its okay for the price. Perhaps a place to see and be seen. The custom salads is just fresh veggies chucked on a plate without much finesse. The over-sized plate creates the impression it’s a big salad, but its average in size. I like the place, just wish it was a tad better.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Local Thai food is great but I was really wanting RAW veggies and this place has them!!! GREAT, HUGE salad. You choose what you want it to be made of and they choose their homemade salad dressings. The pumpkin one was DELISH!!!! And a little homemade roll with some fantastic REAL butter was like dessert!!! Go here if you want a raw veggie fix!!! It was sooooo gooood!!!!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Huge Salad! Amazing choice of ingredients and dressings. Also great juices. Food was a refreshing change when on vacation

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: At first I was excited to find a place where I could set the carbs aside and eat a fresh salad. First, the indoor seating was too full so I had to outdoors (they have seating), but it's seating that's surrounded and covered with cockroaches. No joke - cockroaches were falling from unclaimed seats. Needless to say, I inhaled my salad as fast as I could just to get out. I ordered the fried tofu salad. Fried tofu that I've ate in the past has always been warm - this stuff was cold, and I questioned if it had been friend at all. The dressing wasn't that amazing either, and I wish they had more dressing options. After eating here I did have stomach issues, not sure why. I'll at least give it one more try, but I'm not expecting to have a change of heart. I am hoping for one though! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great selection of greens and vegetables, the buffet was a little messy but clean, they serve nice smoothies, we enjoyed.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I love their salad menus and fresh fruit smoothies and you can select extra toppings for your salad as well. The price is quite reasonable, considering the food quality and the restaurant's location! (The potatoes salad and the salad dressings are awesome!) The only reason I didn't rate it 'excellent' was because I spotted a super tiny worm inside my salad bowl once. The staff was really sincerely sorry about it and quickly gave me a new one. I guess they just have to be extra careful with the cleanliness next time. Looking at the bright side, it just means the vegetables are really fresh.... Plus point: Bathroom, parking lot, free wifi Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: this is a local favorite and often full of locals and visitors alike. friendly young staff. many seating choices in side and out also behind the building on a small terrace with live music. Menu offers wide range of salads you build yourself or other classics like Caesar or chicken or tuna. Prices are fair and affordable. I paid 170 for a very large salad , water and "anticancer" mixed juice drink -- the place is also famous for these alternative types of drinks made of local ingredients (wheatgrass, thai herbs, etc) .. refreshing and interesting for the courageous diner. Try it out! Nice low-key , casual and comfortable.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great healthy food, with large-sized portions, we loved this place. Gets quite busy around peak times. But one of the best salads I've ever had!! Do it!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It is the most wonderful place in Chiang Mai. You can order a standard salad or make any of its ingredients. Lots of choice, you can get confused at first, especially if you do not cook, then make ready. They are all wonderful! And just nezobyvaemye homemade sauces! Delicious cocktails and excellent teas! The portions are very large! Oh, I never to try dessert here, but seemingly they are also very delicious!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Let me start by first saying that, I only rated Salad concept average because I wish they would have a larger variety of Salad Dressings other than their home made organic dressings. I think its great that they are a very health oriented and homemade dressing orientated place but they are lacking in different dressings. Overall its a great little salad place for a very decent price and good atmosphere.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Who would have thought you could make a salad that you look forward to eating! Salad concept allows you to do just that. You can select from the menu or create your own. There are an array of choices for toppings and dressings. The smoothies are also yummy! I recommend the B-Berries one.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We were referred to this restaurant by our driver and it was quite a pleasant surprise. The salads were great, everything so fresh and large portions. It was easy to order with the check list and the service was quick and friendly. All the ingredients tasted fresh, with some great lettuce and toppings. The prices were quite good, especially considering the portion sizes. The only quible I had were the dressings, there weren't too many Western ones and even those seemed to have hot seasoning in them. A go to must if you are craving some fresh food.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have traveled all over the world and this restaurant is literally my favorite. With its hydroponically grown foods to its fantastic smoothies, The Salad Concept is a must when visiting Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We have been wanting a real salad (ie not a little,clump of iceberg) and here it was. The salads are great,the dressings on the side, even better, and ordering is mistake free, with the little check off list on the table. Great experience, reasonably priced. When visiting Chiang Mai, this would always be on my list of must go.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I don't have dressing on my salads so I cannot comment on their salads. However, I do know that they will not allow you to have another item on your salad instead of dressing for the same price. The veggies were very fresh. The 5 leaf lettuce base they use is nice. They also have a big range of possible toppings, which I like. However, if you like a lot of toppings on your salad, including meat and cheese, the salad can be on the pricey side for CM.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: If I could eat vinegar, this place would be perfect. They make a wonderful salad with all kinds of exciting ingredients and dressing options for super cheap.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: It was too sweet! Please reduce sugar and add more salt, and sour tast. Most of Thai people eat sweet, but this is salad no need to have it sweet

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Great salads - and with an almost unlimited choice since the menu options allow you to make your own with your favourite ingredients. Basic salad is well priced but don't be daft with the number of add-ons. A refreshing option to Thai food or the old stand-by of pasta. A good addition to the Chinag Mai food scene.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: OKay, it's just salad but in Thailand a good salad can be hard to find. The dressings are great and there are a lot of choices. Is this 5 star dining, no, but they do have 5 star salads!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I have lived in Chiang Mai for a few months. Love Thai food, but was really missing western style salads. Google brought me to this Trip Advisor page, so I checked the place out based on these reviews. I was not disappointed. My salad was so large that I chuckled a little bit. Veggies were fresh and delicious, and the dressing was homemade Pumpkin (amazing). Also had a berry smoothie that was easily one of the best I've had in Thailand. This place was far away from me, but worth every minute of the drive over. Wait, I had bacon in my salad. I rate anything with bacon 5/5. ;) Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Came here every day for lunch over a two week period. Literally. My wife and I like eating salad, and this place is so much fun. You get to "build" your salad with the ingredients, add-ons, and dressing. Everything is fresh, you can seen them constantly bringing out more and more stuff, and the place is packed every day.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I am not much of a salad guy, but I LOVE fruit smoothies and make sure to get at least one healthy fruit smoothie a day. My girlfriend and I have probably become known to the staff as the couple who only comes in for the same two smoothies every night an hour or so before closing, haha. Even so, they are always VERY friendly, and the drinks are very consistent - all fruit, very tasty, perfect consistency, and refreshing! For salad lovers, this place may be your heaven. It is a sort of "build it yourself" restaurant where you look at the menu and check boxes off a piece of paper for what you want in the salad. The servings look HUGE. A must to, if nothing else, go and try a smoothie. If you like salad, I think missing out on this restaurant would be a big mistake! Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: SALAD!!! Oh how I've missed you :-) Really great. Yeah, there's lots of lettuce (but it's a nice mixture of types, and it is a salad), and if you choose hard boiled egg you only get 1/2 an egg which I did feel a little hard done by, but really, it's great. Loads of options, good quality ingredients, I think really well priced, approx 100-120 baht for a big ol' salad, but you get to add as much or as little as you like (base price is 60 baht and even that's a decent size). Really great smoothies too, slightly ridiculous names on the menu such as an "anti-cancer shake" :-b which enrages and amuses in equal measure, but delicious all the same. I ended up going back 3 or 4 times to get my salad fix, so it comes highly recommended by me. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I've been to this place twice, as I'm always willing to give a second chance. There's not gonna be third. I'm really surprised, how so many people are giving this place thumbs up. I live in Chiang Mai, and can honestly say that this restaurant is a rip off. The salads only look big, because they use so much lettuce. The amount of tuna, cheese, tomatoes, mushrooms etc. in my salad was a joke. The place was also full of flies, and yes, we were sitting inside. The staff was shouting and joking all the time very loud and service was poor in every way. I guess the owner has decided to employ only young students to work there, because you only have to pay them 100 baht per day or so. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Actually, the huge salads we order were over my expectation. Foods were fresh and taste good with reasonable price in the famous tourist area. Well service of the staff, highly recommended to visit to try their great taste.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I like salad concept. The salad is fresh and tasty, the variety is good for the salad. The dressings are just Yummy Yummy.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Everything is great there! Service is always present and food comes in fast. Salads are huge and very well served. All dressings are amazing. Wish I had been there more times just to try out different things on the menu.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Though I got kind of bored with Salad Concept after a while as I lived across the street for quite sometime, it was a reliable place to get fresh vegetables. I could take my vegetable-craving American friends there without any worry of anyone getting sick. I liked their salmon salad and tofu. The restaurant actually seems quite California to me. It's trendy and packed on weekend nights.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: if you like salad you need to visit The Salad Concept. you can choose and design your own salad....what more could you want!

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Lots of salad's choice, warm and friendly service. A one of a kind concept with delicious choice of sauce and condiments.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I can throw any uncut salad on my own plate at home. When I go out I would expect a bit more finesse on my plate and not have to take 10 minutes making it edible. I have tried it twice now and apart from the delicious dressings I have far to many other places I love to go to to worry about going back here.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This restaurant is full all day. People who come to eat here eat the food happily as if feeling they fed themselves with healthy food and at least will not gain weight. The sald vegetables are fresh and crunchy as it's kept in good temperature. Price is reasonable. Topping of choices, varieties of veggie, meat or dressings are offered. The staff are mostly parttime from university students, efficiently do their tasks. The street of Nimmarnhemin is hard to find parking space but the restaurant has parking lot at the side and back of the place connect to another pararelled "soi".

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: This is a fantastic place for salad and smoothie lovers. I am seriously considering going back just to get another smoothie:-)! Great value for money, very quick and attentive service in venue with aircon. The only negative was the toilet which was very unclean, perhaps it was an exception. Either way I would highly recommend this place.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: I decided to try this beautiful restaurant, and I was right. Even I prefer the kitchen of my land, I wanted to try this novelty. The food is very fresh, and the portions are plentiful. The costs are very acceptable, and the service is friendly and fast. You can also find some great soups, cooked with lots of style. Well done guys, continue to be good. See you soon...eh eh !

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The choices are great, the ingredients are super fresh, the taste is good, and the portions are large.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: We were given a recommendation to eat at Salad Concept by a couple we met in Chaing Mai, and when we found ourselves wandering up Nimmanhaemin Rd looking for a place to eat we decided to try it out. There are two options; build your own salad or select off the menu. We were a group of six and so some decided to create their own salad and whils others were tempted by the menu. At SC you fill out the menu choices on a small printed sheet, and the waiter checks that everything has been correctly selected before taking it to the kitchen. The service is prompt, the vibe is casual and relaxed. We sat outside but if you prefer aircon, plenty of room inside as well as a private courtyard/deck out the back. The salads are a generous size and the ingredients are fresh. So if you like clean healthy food with good service and a reasonable price (salads are 95 to 135 Baht) you will get great quality at Salad Concept. Read less

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Excellent idea to do this. Inexpensive and healthy you can pile up all sorts of veggies with many different dressings price is fine and in a good area. Love the concept maybe they should start a franchise

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: The salads are always fresh, the dressings homemade, fantastic shakes, the staff are efficient and friendly, and best of all, it's affordable.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
Detail: Love the japanese soy sauce dressing with beef. Try to create your own salad as some of the set salads contain large amounts of corn or onion. Just to balance the fresh salad taste you have some rich cocolate deserts.

Restaurant_Name: เดอะ สลัด คอนเซ็ปท์
