This place is international, however be patient with the service. Read less

Restaurant_Name: แยงซีเกียง
Detail: This is the place to come in Chiang Mai if you want Peking duck or suckling pig. Both are really excellent. The service and location are adequate.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: Simply the best chicken in Chiang Mai, if not the world; it's that good. There's not much else to say, really. Note: Just to avoid disappointment, please be aware that they do close in the afternoon, typically after 3 PM ish

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: Forget the other overrated venue in Nimman, this is the real deal. You can see the birds being grilled upfront, the kitchen is visible. The menu is up on the wall. Great value in a cafeteria type environment, this is not fine dining. I will return.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: This is the first place we go to eat when we arrive in Chiang Mai. Our chicken was moist and tender. The sauce has a nice tanginess. The papaya salad is spicy and refreshing. The sticky rice tasty and warm and a great accompaniment. We get take out so we can use our hands to eat without spectators. This is a big and delicious lunch! We decrease dinner when we eat this for lunch...

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: A very local place. Locals as well as tourists in a very basic setting. You can smell the chicken grilling on the large BBQ at the shop front from miles away. The chicken is tender and the papaya salad was tasty. Worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: Not expensive, nice atmosphere, good service. But I think Cherng Doi is #1 and Somtam Pa Bea Shop (ร้านส้มตำป้าเบ๊อะ) in Chiang Rai is #2 (not on TripAdvisor, Google it) and this is third place. Filling, I'm stuffed after ordering a half chicken (80B) and 3 other menus, total 245B. Hard to find, just follow your nose, could smell it a block away.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: One of the best local Thai spots in Nimman. The chicken is delicious, and so is the papaya salad. Get here before it get's overrun by foodies!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: I have been visiting here for years and despite trying a dozen others in town, nothing comes close. The perfect mini wicheran charcoal grilled chickens with the homemade tamarind sauce which is less sweet, bit more kick than others. The grill smith is a master. Arrive when a new batch is just done for melt in the mouth, fall of the bone tender perfection. Their Tom sap uses daikon adding an extra dimension to a savoury sour soup with loads of tendon & bone pork. Unlike other places, it doesn't remind me of bog standard clear Tom yum. Pretty unique and I prefer it. Also like their sup nor Mai bamboo salad. Fresh crunchy and refreshing. Everything else on the menu is top class too. Very basic decor, efficient friendly family run, no English on menu and 95% locals, a few intrepid expats and courious Chinese tourists. I waited 7 years to give this review . I didnt want the world to know. It's just getting hard to find parking and seating some days now. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: Signature roasted chicken is a must-try item. Equally tasty is the grill pork shoulder. Nice to come with Mango salad and papaya salad that are refreshing. Pork rib soup gives you a sense of Tom Yum Kong but with pork rather than the shrimp.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: Very local restaurant. Mainly local people visited the shop. The chicken is excellent and we never taste anything better than that before. The papaya salad is good too. But the sticky rice is a little bit not soft for us. The price is really really cheap .

Restaurant_Name: ร้านไก่ย่างวิเชียรบุรี (นิมมาน 11)
Detail: We order "to go" almost once a week. We order grilled chicken which comes with a nice sauce, sticky rice and som tam.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Kiew Kaw Ka is an excellent restaurant in the upper segment. Delicious refined Thai food, beautifully presented and with great taste. The service is friendly and professional. The prices are higher, but perfectly match the quality. Highly recommended for those who want to eat luxurious Thai food in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Wanted something light so I ordered the Thai Beef Salad. Beef was gray from being overcooked, herbs were wilted, dish was lacking completely of any freshness. What made the experience worse was the attitude of service staff. I asked her to repeat something she said which I didn’t quite understand and she sighed first and gave me an exasperated reply. It wasn’t as if the place so busy. There was only one other table that time as it was only around 1130am. The whole crew was just chitchatting by the counter loudly. My experience in this restaurant is consistent with the other reviews I read regarding the inconsistent quality of food and poor serving Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Excellent management here (and that is still often lacking in better restaurants in Thailand). For Westerners i.e. nice that you quickly get a table and you can order in English. The food was particularly good in taste, nicely served and really Asian (so also called 'spicy'). The mango smoothy should not be missed (and possibly helps to remove the burning).

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: While strolling through the White Market at One Nimman, known for its handcrafted items, clothing, and street food, we stumbled upon Kiew Kai Ka. We weren’t particularly hungry, just looking for something refreshing to drink. But after seeing the Michelin stars proudly displayed on the window, we couldn’t resist and decided to give the food a try – and we were not disappointed! The food was absolutely delicious. We were fortunate to snag a table since most were either reserved or already taken. The staff was prompt and friendly, adding to the enjoyable experience. We highly recommend this place! A quick note: Michelin stars are awarded based on the quality of the food, not the service, and reflect the skill, harmony of flavors, and consistency in the dishes. So, don’t be swayed by negative reviews – go in and try it for yourself. You won’t regret it! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: The experience here was HORRIBLE. My girlfriend and I walked into the mall, but decided to have a drink before exploring. It was very humid out. We walked into the cafe, and the air conditioning felt good. We were handed menus. I ordered a beer, she ordered a coffee and water. They bring the beer over and asked if we were ordering food. I said "not yet". The waitress said that we must sit outside if we weren't ordering food. I said "not yet. Can we have 15 minutes? Theres not a single customer in here other than us." She said we must go outside and brought our drinks there They put the drinks in this tiny table that's not stable, and it's rocking. Sure enough, my girlfriend hits the table, and a glass falls off and breaks. The waitress comes over and says" that will be 500 baht" ($15 USD) I went into GFY mode and refused to pay that. I could have bought the same glass for 30 baht in one of the mall shops. I have traveled all over the globe and that's the FIRST time I have been asked to pay for a broken glass, I have been involved in restaurants. They finally settled after my gf agreed to pay 50 baht. Broken glasses that didn't occur on purpose are the cost of doing business. Maybe the worst experience I have ever had in a restaurant and it only lasted 20 minutes. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Kiew Kai Ka at One Nimman (ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน) is a popular restaurant located in the One Nimman area of Chiang Mai, Thailand. The restaurant is known for its contemporary take on traditional Thai cuisine, offering a menu that emphasizes fresh, local ingredients and authentic flavors presented in a modern style. The ambiance at Kiew Kai Ka is cozy and stylish, often featuring a blend of traditional Thai decor with modern elements, creating a welcoming atmosphere for both locals and tourists. One Nimman, where the restaurant is located, is a trendy lifestyle mall in Chiang Mai, known for its mix of boutique shops, art spaces, and eateries, making it a vibrant destination for dining and shopping. If you’re planning to visit, you can expect a menu filled with a variety of Thai dishes, including some regional specialties and creatively presented meals that reflect the rich culinary traditions of Thailand. The restaurant is well-regarded for its attention to detail and the quality of its food, making it a favorite spot for those looking to experience Thai cuisine in a contemporary setting. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: I believe any store in the area is better than his. I had seen many Steelers recommend it on the Internet, but when I saw the dish that was delivered, I asked the waiter to confirm whether it was what I ordered. His answer was correct. I asked why I couldn't see any similarities. He smiled awkwardly and left. He didn't think there was any problem. It was a very special restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: My sisters found this restaurant while we were walking round One Nimman, impressed by all the Michelin Stars on the front door so off we went. It wasn’t practically busy and we were sat in a room and we were presented with a menu! The unfortunate thing was that washing facilities are outside the restaurant, very inconvenient. We ordered some drinks and my sister wanted a glass of ice and was told it will be chargeable which I found it unreasonable especially I work in the industry. Food was good, lots of king prawns in Tom Yum Soup, Morning Glory vegetables was not in big amount, curry inside the coconut was delicious but the steak was overcooked I am afraid. Things we ordered were quickly brought to our table which was very efficient and the staff are friendly. Reasonable price too, worth a visit. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Busy restaurant in a large mall, this place is great for a small group as the restaurant is small. Good local northern Thai dishes in a casual relaxed environment. Standouts include the Northern appetizer showcasing a wide variety of northern specialities, and the "miang" or fried krapong - quite unique.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: While the menu isn’t enormous, the food we ordered—duck red curry and curry noodle soup was great. The atmosphere is lovely, quiet and laid back. Would definitely recommend.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: The restaurant is beautiful, clean and the food is delicious, but my whole family got a stomach ache and food poisoning after eating. You should consider when you want to dine.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: A Michelin recommended restaurant,very well decorated,pretty nice ambient but seating slightly on the crampy side. Service is friendly and prompt.--4.5* The foods quality can informed their Michelin status,they are flavourful,tasty and well balance in most dishes. We love be the garlic fry Soft Shell Crab,it is done to perfection and very additive. Other dishes are tasty and delicious too. The only dish that didn't meet the standard is the grill pork neck,it lacks flavours and meat is too dry. Corkage is B$500/bottle which is the higher side considered their limited choice of wine. We end up drinking Chiangmai craft beer which are surprising nice. Overall,nice Michelin restaurants with affordable prices. 4.5* for me. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: The Wing Bean Salad is to die for. Loved the ambience and food so much I came back twice. Love this kind of Thai food and thoroughly recommend it.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Simply outstanding for its food.The quality and taste of their main meat dishes was delicious. Great atmosphere

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: It’s a very beautiful, petite restaurant at One Nimman. Service is great. Food was average and not so memorable, as if the focus on the taste buds had disappeared. I give it 3 out of 5 for the taste. This is a great restaurant for meeting friends and family, for delicious meal just go some place else!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: We were wandering through One Nimman and were enticed by the Michelin Awards posted outside. So glad we went in. Fabulous Northern Thai food on the menu. Even the green curry was especially well prepared altho there were many more interesting choices. Friendly, efficient service at a fair price. Don't miss it!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Kiew Kai Ka serves northern Thai dishes. To be able to savor more dishes, best to go in a group of 5 to 6 people. Kiew Kai Ka has been awarded Michelin 5 years in a row since 2018. The presentation of food and drinks is beautiful. The dishes are very delicious and we enjoyed our meal tremendously. The staff provide attentive service. If you are not there to eat, Kiew Kai Ka also serves great coffee. The Black Orange is very delicious.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: My husband and I where walking around One Nimman and again, had been over the road at the Mayer Center and didn't want to eat in the food court. We had the option to walk across the road and had a meal here. We have walked past this before as we had been at the Coffee shop just down from here and seen it and it look good. The inside was great with all the decorations that made it feel somewhat like a hidden garden. There was a Cannabis menu as well, which was a surprise so we ordered of this, but they didn't have the items that made it what it was. We stuck with the stuff we knew and where not disappointed. The drinks where cold and the food was Hot.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Excellent restaurant serving an amazing array of northern Thai dishes. The service and presentation were outstanding. We had a superb meal and I would recommend this restaurant 100%. I will return.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: 2 of my colleagues recommended this place and so I just had to try it. It was full when we arrived so we waited for half hour to get a table. The place was packed for a Friday night - both Tourists and locals. The thing is this is a restaurant that has unusual Northern Thai food - so you won’t be disappointed if you order the more unusual northern Thai food and not the usual Thai food that you may be used to (such as Green Curry). We found the ambiance great and enjoyed the food and thought it was nice. Rather surprised with all the negative reviews. However the service was slow - if you are in a rush, this is not the place to visit. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Came here with my boyfriend on holiday and everything was “meh” at best. Food was expensive (our bill came out to be more than $60 USD without alcohol) and nothing special. The meat dish was chewy, the duck was salty, and plum mojito didn’t even have alcohol in it! The whole thing was awful and we learned to NEVER to go a restaurant without reading reviews first — we made the mistake of assuming all Michelin guide restaurants were great. Do NOT waste your money.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Decor is nice, menu truly tempting. Period end about the good things. In a place (Nimman 1) packed with foreigners only one waiter (out of possibly 15) spoke a little English. No owner, no supervisor. Waiting for the food was endless, beer not even cold (and bad wine at a horrendous price) , they forgot one main course without even a propper apology. And on local standards, pretty costly. In a city packed with good places, do avoid this one.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: We only enjoy dessert in here (Coconut cream and Mango sticky rice), food is quite good, nice restaurant, but service isnot enough michelin star restaurant

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: The place may not be the best northern restaurant but I feel overall ambience, the taste & service are good for tourist & local people. There are mix of Thai, Northern food, good decor & comfort seat. Tourist friendly, menu with photos & credit card is accepted. You can spend time here for lunch or dinner & enjoy shopping some clothes at One Nimman.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Dinner : < 500 Baht Rating : ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ First and foremost, remember to book in advance! From it’s Grilled Fish Platter, to it’s Crab Meat Deep Fried Omelette, Char-Grilled Pork Neck, Deep Fried Pork Belly, Duck Red Curry to it’s cocktails and wine, it was absolutely mind blowing in terms of flavours, taste and presentation. The whole atmosphere was also not the ordinary thai restaurant, with the decor of a jungle, it definitely added lots of vibe, colour and liveliness to our dinner. Dinner was served efficiently, a plus for us busy bummers. By 9pm, a lot of the best selling drinks were finished, including young coconuts, so try to be there early! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: The food are extremely overpriced, the photos of the food look great which attracted us to try for those. However, the food is not taste as they look. The service is not as good as we thought. In simple word, it is not recommended to have a meal here as the food and services are bad here. Many street food nearby are cheaper and more taste.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: We only got in because it has a Michelin sign in the front but it is definitely not a Michelin standard, unless Michelin starts to rate for bad restaurants. The food was ordinary and small portion, we ordered three dishes but only two came. We then waited forever for the third dish to come and then had to cancel it but by the look on the waitress face she has never placed the order anyway. We then waited forever for the bill and again was forgotten by the waitress. Plenty of good food around this area so not recommended.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: I think they intentionally bring the wrong bill as it was not only me. Also, when I request them to correct, they looked uncomfortable and showed me very rude attitude. Also, while we are eating, they were swiping the floor. They got so complacent for overrated review and Micheline rating. No manager on site. Average and overpriced food, and poor service. So if you go there, you better double check your bill (it is written in only Thai) before you pay as they will raise their tone even though it is their mistake. And do not expect good service and food.
Date_Written: in only Thai) before you pay as they will raise their tone even though it is their mistake. And do not expect good service and food.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Horrible service. Beside the high price get charged on top 7%vat and 10 %service change. Never again!!! How come to get Michelin. Food taste is average. You can find another Thai restaurants which is much better and cheaper. Service is horrible. So many staff but no one really now how to work. They mostly stand and don’t see the work. Have to wait so long time for the food even the restaurant only 22 customers. It os my first and last visit!!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: We reserved a table for 20 people, it was my friend's goodbye dinner. The service was horrible. The waiters didn't want to come to our table and take the orders when we called for attention. It was not possible to pay separately. My friends ordered a dish without meat (vegetarians), the waiter takes the order, said it was ok. Delivers the dish with meat. And tells them after they waited it's impossible to have it without meat. They had to leave and find food somewhere else. The waiter didn't want to take my order without me having 'spicy' in it. So it is then. My two other friends didn't finish their meal, the food was disgusting. I don't mind paying westerner prices in Thailand, but I do mind when you really can feel that nobody in this place is willing to make any customer happy. Terrible service, will never come again. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: I'm totally agree with the reviwers - "Nrudra & eelsong56. What they both said was exact what happened to me. I've been there two times, once only bought takeaway coffee at the coffee bar outside the restaurant, and another time for dinner. Let's talk about the takeaway coffee first. Firstly, the girl stood at the counter was no smile and had a angry look when she saw us walking to her counter, no welcome and no interest for customers. Secondly, the coffee (Iced Mocha), is full of ice (I mean really the full cup!!), not much space left for the coffee itself! I finished drinking it in a few second and looked at the cup still full of ice. I paid for ice but not coffee!!? Now, let's talk about the dinner - we went there with 3 other friends, total 5 people, it was not busy but again, the staffs didn't show any interest (or too dumb)as we walking in and the atmosphere of the restaurant were not good. The menu was nothing special, many cheap local style restaurant or street food stall are better choice than this. We ordered a few different dishes, some are okay but there were a couple meat dish we ordered was really really uneatable!! The beef & pork were both so dry & tough ! I'm Asian myself, I travelled around Asia, I have never eat something like this before!! It was so disgusting and almost uneatable! Complained to the Manager but he didn't show any interest at all. Never mind, you lost 5 customers and more... we will tell all our friends, and leave reviews. We will make sure other people won't make the same mistake! Michelin Star!!?? You joking, Michelin!!!! It seemed nowadays, everybody can have a Michelin star!!! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: i have eaten there regularly three meals in a week and it is definitely overrated and i would not go by the michelin recommendation. the waiters are alternating between dumb and rude. most salads and few other dishes not available or soldout. after my senond salad for lunch i asked for more sauce for the salad and the manager guy with glasses walked over to tell me i willbe charged extra for the sauce .... certainly not wort it even for once the street food court few metres away is more exciting and the choices much better and service warmer

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: We were disappointed with this Michelin-rated restaurant. Meals were fine - nothing special that I would expect from a Michelin rating. Service was standard. Atmosphere was unimpressive. Our experience at Woo was light years better on all counts.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Nothing to complain about this restaurant. All of dishes I ordered were yummy especially fried rice and vegetable. Reasonable price, nice staff and well-designed space.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: This rubbish restaurant and staffs deserve -10 stars!! The service was bad , the staffs there didn’t seem to have much interest for the customers. Not welcoming at all for sure. The food was absolutely disgusting!! My friend ordered Mango Sticky Rice but the waitress said it is sold out!! A popular & simple dish like this - "Sold Out"!! Why you don't tell customer when you give the menu to customer!? I looked at the whole menu. Firstly, there were photos for different dishes but the photos were so bad. It didn't uplift my appetite, in fact, opposite. There were many dishes in the menu are duplicated. It just very cheap street local restaurant food but sell in a extreme high price for cheating tourist!! Secondly, as we already there and ordered a drink , so I tried very hard to find something to order, eventually, I ordered Penang curry pork. It was so...so...bad, I have never taste anything worse than this in my life! The pork is so dry & tough! It looks worse than any street food. Finally, I just had a few bite (I have to think about my teeth!) and leave it all on the plate. Then we asked the bill. I complained to the Manager (he said he is Manager!), he didn't show much sorry and still wanted us to pay for this disgusting thing! What a nightmare experience!! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Nice upscale restaurant with great service, Thai food and drinks! Highly recommend, pricier than street food, but worth it. 4 main courses, 3 drinks & 1 dessert, with tip under $40USD. Bon Appetite

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: As a tourist with not a lot of time to spare, I can safely say that this restaurant is well located, serves good tasty Thai food and desserts with good ambience and friendly service. We ordered red duck curry which was tasty, a vegetable appetizer with a spicy crab dip - was flavorful. We had a coconut slurpy and coconut ice-cream which were fantastic - highly recommend. The glutinous rice with mango was alright though the mango was not very sweet. The restaurant does not have a toilet inside as it is located in One Nimman mall - it uses the mall’s toilet which is just diagonally opposite the restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Been here for 3 times already , i will come again and again if they could maintain great service and food quality

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: The food is so good such as Crab omelet, Crispy pork The location is so easy to go, after finished our meal we can go to shopping around there.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: When we walked past this restaurant, we were told it has been awarded 1 Michelan star. I am not sure if this is true. I know it is in a Michelin book. The six of us decided to try it for dinner. The service was apathetic, the waitress did not seem interested. We asked if we could have less chilli in one dish, but that dish turned out to be the hottest one. The serves were small, and expensive by comparison to similar restaurants. It advertised itself as a green space. The plants in the restaurant were plastic. How ironic! We were all disappointed with this restaurant. I could recommend a few much better ones than this one in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: I was surprised the food was not better. My friend ordered a soup with beef and the beef was so chewy she had to spit it out. I didn’t believe her and tried and I also spit it out. I tried ordering the grilled beef, but apparently they were out of beef by 1:30pm!! So I ordered the crispy garlic pork. Was ok, however it is served in a deconstructed way that you have to figure out how to put it together. It was dry, and I expected more from this place. Service was minimal. Save your money and go to a street stall. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: In One Nimman, a really nice (for once) mall with artisanal Thai shops. Great food, good service and generous portions. Fine for kids, but was equally fine for my husband and I. He is celiac and they dealt with his needs easily. Fun!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Although this is in a bespoke purpose-built tourist area the food is genuinely very good (unlike similar "tourist" restaurants). Staff are friendly; service excellent and there is a good choice of very tasty Thai dishes. I have visited several times and noted that many locals frequent it so that is a good sign of it's authenticity.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Here is a restaurant with great Thai style appetizers. However, their main dishes are a real disappointment. The Chicken Mussaman curry tasted like the meat and the potatoes were cooked separately from the soup and the roasted duck curry was too spicy and lacked pineapple.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: We stumbled across this restaurant in One Nimman and so happy we did. The service was first class as was the food.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: Simply outstanding for its food.The quality and taste of their main meat dishes was delicious! The starters and little bites offer a good variety that’ll tickle one’s taste buds too. Kiew kai ka beer is a must to try . Staff and service was decent .Thumbs up for this one. Great location. Relax atmosphere. Recommended! •kiew kai ka beer 🍺 • red curry roasted duck🐤 • Fried fish serve with eggplant 🐟🍆 • omelet with crabmeat 🥚🦀 Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านเขียวไข่กา เชียงใหม่ วัน นิมมาน
Detail: One of the best thai restaurant in Chiang mai. There is traditional central Thai food that you can't easily find this taste in Chiang mai. It’s great.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very irregular restaurant. The third time, a disaster. Almost inedible dish, 50% of the ingredients planned, we put 3 stars for the first 2 meals.. A constant, friendliness is not there.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Delicious food! Well priced and great quality, definitely go! Very nice staff and yellow noodles were best we had in Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: GRAZIE THAI LACAL FOOD It's like they're competing next to each other at both restaurants. It's also a well-known restaurant offering Thai food at very low prices. Just like next door, there's a wait at lunchtime. The seasoning felt a bit thicker at this place. You may need to visit both restaurants to master Thai cuisine.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Good food for very reasonable price, lots of choice of dishes Fast and friendly service, everything is prepared before your eyes.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Often you keep your tail shut and wait for a table to open. Meanwhile, the cooks make flare-ups that impress the public. The dishes are ungenerous and moderately tasty. It’s still good value for money, but there are much better addresses, and even less popular small shops where you can eat finer, more generous, more traditional and tastier cuisine in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Typical restaurant idem street food with a cook handling the wok with dexterity: spectacular! Fast service, hearty and delicious dishes. Very good value for money. Not to be missed.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very tasty dishes. A little wait for service but full restaurant. What to do if you want to eat local and homemade.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Lovely little place away from the busy road , lovely food and free melon after your meal 😋🥰 Give it a try, support the little people 👍

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very tipical Place in Chiang mai! We loved It and we eated very special green noodle with shrimp, egg and vegetables! Tipical thay location and clients we would love tò come back!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I was really impressed. Spotlessly clean, with food prepared in front of your eyes with fresh ingredients, affordable, and courteous and quick service. The only problems are the difficulty of finding a free table and, perhaps, the open space that is only cooled by a fan.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The last time we’ve passed by we’ve seen that there was a huge queue so we decided we want to try it out. This time we almost immediately got a table. We had four different dishes and all of them tasted amazing. It tasted authentic and we were even able to watch the cook make it. The staff was friendly and the only complaint the guys had was that they only had Chang beer. (Not a problem in my opinion). We would definitely recommend this place to anyone asking

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: If you’re looking for the authentic Thai cuisine, this is the place. We stoped by and we weren’t disappointed. People are friendly, family business, small local. We had stir fried curry with shrimp and pad thai. Very good! All the dishes are being cooked in front of the customers. The cook said: “Even if I could make more money cooking 2 portions at a time, I prefer a satisfied client that enjoys the perfect taste of the food” Surely will go back. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very nice. Small restaurant but well eaten. Too bad we can’t see it from the outside. We have to go through a little path. We ate well.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Found this restaurant whilst surfing Tripadvisor looking for somewhere near our hotel. During our trip we have eaten at lots of places from street food to high end fine dining at 5 star hotels. Aroy Dee it’s top 3 restaurants. The god is outstanding, service is quick and the atmosphere is lively. Ignore the rustic matter of it, you won’t be disappointed!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We discovered the Aroy Dee restaurant at Christmas during our visit to Chiang Mai and that was a major reason for us to rebook more time on this trip. We think it is some of the best Thai food available and we have tried most of everything on the menu since we ate there about six times out of our 10 day visit, they have a very friendlywait staff And the owner always has a warm and friendly greeting. By the way, the prices are very reasonable and everything is fresh and cooked perfectly. We Will be back.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great dinner with dishes for all palates in a very quaint place. Super friendly staff! Really Recommendation

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Two excellent family meals! Great cooks who handle the wok with talent! A lot of kindness and attention, especially when there are people. You absolutely have to wait, it's worth it!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We went on vacation in Thailand in Chang Mai and we spotted a really well rated restaurant named Aroy Dee on Spotadvisor. I’m not joking when I say that the food in this restaurant is better than any that I tasted in Bagnkok or Chang Mai before. We were here for 5 days and we ate here 4 times. If you are looking for traditional Thailand food this is definitely the place you are looking for. Food is very cheap compared not just to EU but to other restaurants in Chang Mai too. I personally recomend A01 (rice with vegetables). If I ever visit Chang Mai again ill return to this magnificant place with pleasure!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Too bad, always very happy to eat at Surin.Unfortunately we found that after our last stay after Corona 2022 a lot has changed to the disadvantage. We got the impression that Surin no longer attaches importance to guests from Germany.During our stay this year, the restaurant was very well visited daily, 90 percent with Asian guests.Surin itself has increased the staff and only has a cashier function not at the table with the guests but at the end of the restaurant.Mass handling.Thai hospitality has fallen by the wayside , it only counts the turnover.The quality of the food is not what it once was.Since Surin 2022 informed us that he also rents a holiday home we asked him this year for a flyer , he puts us off for three days and then said to us this is not for you , I can rent the house to Chinese who pay five times the price.We were shocked and will not visit the Aroy Dee on our next holiday.Every guest of any nationality should be treated equally.These statements to guests are not good for the reputation of a house. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Ordered the chicken fried rice and spring rolls; the best meal I had in Chiang Mai! Felt very authentic and not as touristy as some of the other restaurants nearby

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Really cheap but incredibly tasty Thai food. I had the yellow drunken Noodles and it was the best meal I’ve had in Thailand so far. It was also quite busy with many locals which was a good sign.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Hate to give a bad review but sadly warranted on this occasion. Was looking forward to the meal based on the majority of the reviews. Service was very prompt and the food very disappointing. Had the Chicken with sweet peppers- bland and tasteless. No care or attention. Coconut smoothie similarly was so watered down I thought they had got the order wrong and given me coconut water. Filled with tourists (like myself) who no doubt had referred to the earlier reviews. Clearly they have got complacent and taken their patronage for granted.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great place and got seated straight away. Stafg was very friendly. Had some fried noodles as first dish followed by their Kao Soi w/ chicken as second, both were good but latter was phenomenal. Total price with a large Chang 230B, so quite affordable.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: So good that I went there two evenings in a row. The chef prepares the dishes one by one for all the restaurants so it takes 15 minutes to be served but it's worth it! The khao soi is delicious as well as the drunken noodles and the grilled cashew chicken.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A super good restaurant in the heart of Chiang Mai. We ate here twice and the second time the owner immediately recognized us despite the crowds. After closing time we talked to him for a while and he told us that everything is freshly prepared, one by one with the right attention. You can definitely taste that. The prices are very low and you get super good food in return. Highly recommended in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Best place on Chiang Mai. There is one problem......they have so many nice reviews that often there is a line and you have to wait.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Our first night in Chiang Mai, we walked down the lane/street from our hotel. Saw people sitting outside on chairs, waiting for a table. Must be good so we joined the queue! We had 9 in our group, but they managed to get us all on one table! Quite a feat as they only have about 30 seats in total! So we tried almost everything, and tops was the Khao Soi! And the mango sticky rice 😋. They really served us quickly and we finished all the plates. We returned for a second time, just before we left Chiang Mai, red curry and yellow noodles very nice! Thank you 😋

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great local restaurant, offering authentic Thai cuisine. The kitchen is oriented on the street, making it almost a cooking demonstration when you pass next to it. Worth stopping and tasting, if you pass by.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Nice food, up to expectations! We had to wait for a table, but it was only 10 minutes. We got the ‘drunk yellow noodles’ and it was very good! Exactly what to expect for a cheap price like this!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The very kind owner welcomed us at the entrance from behind the kitchen counter. He showed us how he cooks his dishes, a tradition passed down for generations. Excellent food: the Khao soi, the city's specialty, is absolutely worth trying.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Don't be too put off by the 3 star review, this is a nice restaurant. But there are a few things to be aware of. We visited on the basis of good reviews, & I'm glad we did. We had a late breakfast as they open at 10am. This is where the first problem appears. The staff only come in at 10 so there is a lot of preparation to do. This means the food is very slow, 30-40 minutes slow, even with very few customers. Secondly, they don't do coffee! Or any hot drinks at all. I love a coffee with my spicy noodles. It's not the end of the world as there are plenty of coffee stalls nearby. But I've already drank it by the time the food arrives. Nevertheless, this place is very popular! Queues outside for lunch. Definitely worth eating here, but just be aware of the limitations. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This is a lovely place with delicious authentic fresh Thai food! We have been here twice in the last two weeks and intend on coming back. Definitely worth the 45 minute walk from where we’re staying and the short wait time when it’s busy.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I really enjoyed my brunch here today. I ordered the spring rolls, khao soi chicken and a watermelon shake. All delicious and cool you can watch the cute staff preparing the dishes.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A very well-run little restaurant, with a very wide range of typical local dishes at more than reasonable prices.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Comfortable restaurnat seating with Street side food prepared infront of you. We love this place for authentic thai foods, breakfast, lunch or dinner all good. Lots of variety, choice of dishes. Evening often has a quest line up but seating moves along quickly. Worth the wait!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Myself and two friends had a mix of Khao Soi, green Thai Curry and morning glory. It was absolutely gorgeous and the staff were incredibly helpful and friendly, especially in dealing with some particularly difficult customers who were sat next to us. This is definitely a place I will recommend to friends who are going to pay a visit to Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This was by far the best restaurant we visited in Thailand. Food prepared fresh when ordered, delicious and the best part about it was how welcoming the staff and the owner was. We ate there many times and they were so happy to see us every time. I can’t say enough positive things abot them. Don’t miss out and visit them!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Perfect food and perfect stuff! We did return here again and again - the best dish is roasted cashew nuts and chiken, soooooo good!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Finally a real Thai!! We came as a group and tasted pretty much everything on the menu. Exceptional value for money. Absolutely recommended.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This restaurant is amazing. We sat here and the cooks are cooking in front of you in the restaurant. It was so reasonably priced we couldn’t believe how good it tasted.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: What a nice place, very hospitable and great food for an incredible price, everything is prepared a la minute

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Delicious food and very hospitable! Owner knows everything about the Dutch football team! Was very busy so be on time!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We have been eating here 3 times a day for months. The food is super tasty, always fresh and the price is great! Staff is professional and friendly. In short, a top restaurant

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: My wife and I have been eating here almost every day for months. Price-quality ratio is really good. The food is tasty, fresh, and prepared in an open kitchen. Staff and owner are very friendly.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very fresh, busy place. The food is great , juices as well. Good value for money. Everything is prepared in an open kitchen

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very good service and friendly boss. But the taste of food is adjusted to farangs. Maybe that’s why it is so popular with the foreigners. If you want real local thai food, this may not be the right place.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very nice place. The owner is so sweet and want to tell you stories about Thai/ the food/ culture and then he is doing a great job with the staff, since he is letting “refugees” from Mayanmar work at the restaurant so they can earn money for their families. Also great to be able to contribute to a good cause. And a extra plus, when great food are involved too! Definitely would recommend

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Simple easy to read menu. Good variety and quality of thai food. Prompt service Interestingly food is prepared and cooked fresh at the front of the restaurant. Food is mild but they can add more heat if you ask. Smoothies are all fruit.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: the best place to eat in Chiang-Mai!!! we tested several restaurants, we came back to the one 3 days in a row, unquestionably the best and not expensive

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A tourist place, for sure, but one of the pleasant kind. Smiling service, value for money prices - and simple but well prepared food - that even locals would like. I liked to watch the lady who runs the open kitchen at the entrance. Absolutely in control, with no wasted movement. Everything here comes "mild" for the farangs. Therefore I ordered my red pork curry "phet" (hot). Well, for Thai people it was still very mild. But it was well balanced and slightly creamy - very tasty! My wife had Pad Thai. The taste was not bad - but the noodles were overcooked. A very nice restaurant for a quick bite... Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This restaurant was a great find. It is extremely busy, but with a fast turn around well worth the wait.This Thai Restaurant has all the traditional meals at a good price. The food is fresh & delicious, deserving a return visit. I had the Tom Tum first visit which was tasty & any of the stir fries from the street kitchen were outstanding.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Simply awesome! We stumbled across this restaurant walking around and decided to give it a try and were super happy with the food and atmosphere. We tried 3 dishes and each one was delicious. Great food at a great price😋

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I went to Aroy Dee for some take out food,a curry and a soup with a pineapple shake.It was nearly an hour before I left with the food.The food was good but the wait was crazy.It took some people 10 minutes to pay their bill because no one was there to take the money

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Make sure you eat here- even if you have to wait on a table. The food is fresh, cooked to order and excellent. The staff are all very attentive and welcoming. The menu is extensive enough and very easy on your pocket. Highly recommend!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: BEST RESTAURANT IN CHIANG MAI!! Food quality with high standards, don't worry to get sick!! Organic and fresh food. Thank you for presenting so good food and service from all the staff!! 5 stars 🌟

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great food with tons of different options to choose from. The service was very good as well! The line out front proves how good of a place this one it!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The four of us ordered the fried cashew nut and chicken, it was delicious. This was our last night in Chiang Mai and we're so glad we discovered this restaurant before leaving. I'm not sure if I am going to get any meals this good again in Thailand. I strongly advice you to try this restaurant, the staff here is friendly, the kitchen is in front of the place, so you can see the cooks making your meal. Everything looks clean and well put together.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Super friendly staff, great food, very reasonable prices. All the food cooked at the front of restaurant - which the owner explained was to show they were being careful with preparing food. Thank you!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A very nice restaurant, excellent quality food and very kind people. We have spent a very nice moment. Thank you ! I strongly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This place is excellent! All of our 8 dishes were amazing. Such nice staff and again really good food. Would highly recommend!!!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Awesome food and super friendly owners. Clean establishment and food came out fast. Prices are very reasonable. Will be back :)

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We went to eat here 2 days in a row, great food. Owner and staff were really friendly and nice. Would recommend to everyone.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The food was incredible. I ordered a traditional Pad See Yew dish along with sticky rice / Mangos, as well as a fresh coconut. The desert was also amazing. Everything was vegetarian friendly. The owners went out of their way to make sure I had everything that I needed and also took the time to sit down with me and chat about activities in Chiang Mai / Thailand. This was much appreciated as I was traveling alone. He gave me great recs on different temples in the area, which turned out to be amazing as I visited them. We also had a great discussion on Muay Thai training and famous fighters. As someone traveling alone and looking for a good vegetarian meal and connection, this was the perfect place for me to stop by. I am glad I crossed paths with this place - you should definitely stop by, it was worth it! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Typical casual style Thai restaurant. Clean and simple. Fantastic, fast and friendly service with a smile. So happy I was able to have the wonderful Thai-style omelet in Chiang Mai during the beginning of the lockdown when so many restaurants were closed. Also excellent prices. Totally worth it.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Orders pad Thai, coconut base soup, and spring rolls. Great Thai food selection and quality. The service was also great. Recommend coming for noodles

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This place is similar to the restaurant a couple of doors away called Grazia Thai. Both are a similar standard...excellent food, good service and cheap. I’d recommend it.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Nice place. Nice Thai food. One of my best after school choice. Strongly recommend! Overall kind of sweet.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Ordered chicken 🍗 fried rice 🍚, morning glory, rice 🍛 with omelet and veggie spring roles. Very good taste, smoothies and juice 🥤 was fresh🥳. Nice staff and not surprises that restaurant was full when we left

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The best restaurant of Chiang-Mai I recommend it, you will be not diss appointed which the open kitchen and the food is just so delicious.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Excellent option for real Thai cuisine. Lovely. Good service. Opened kitchen in front of customers. Many Thai customers trust it.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Amazing food. We got two dishes and a drink each for under AU$10. Yellow chicken curry, chicken coconut soup along with a Fanta and a mango smoothie. We also got an extra rice! Service was quick, you order at ur table and pay after your meal at the counter. The man at the Till was lovely and helped me with my coins as I am still unfamiliar with them. Totally recommended and cheaper than many other places. We left full! All I suggest is keep tissues in ur bag as the toilet had ran out of toilet paper. This place gets busy with locals which is a very good sign! Enjoy!!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great food, huge variety of items, great staff and service, very reasonable prices, good location, nice place for dinner or lunch

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Had a late dinner there with my wife. They almost were closing and prepared their staff food but during seeing us looking a place they right away welcomed us in with a friendly and real smile! We had Tom Yam seafood...wow, fried morning glory with crispy pork..yuuumm and deep fried fish with garlic and pepper...amazing! All the food was fresh prepared and perfectly cooked. Owner came also for a nice chat and. was very helpful about what to do in Chiang Mai. Definely will visit again during next trip to CNX! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great restaurant close to the old-town. We‘ve been there twice during our one-week stay in Chiang Mai. Food is freshly cooked and delicious with locally sourced ingredients. Owner and staff are very welcoming and friendly. When you stay in the old-town or nearby you should definitely give it a try: Khao Soi and the Seafood Dishes were our personal favourites!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: There are so many options for dining in Chiang Mai but this really is one you should visit. As a English person, the hygiene in Thailand when it comes to food is often questionable but this place is clean and the food fresh. My husband and I visited yesterday and were so impressed, we came back today. Between us, we have sampled the pad thai, green curry, khao soi and spring rolls. All were absolutely delicious and very good value. The service was excellent, I can't fault a thing. They also have a cat (they call the boss) named Lucky who is very friendly which would give it a 6th star if I could give one!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Best place in Chiang to eat. Great fresh food. The owner is the typicall representation of the thai smile..and the cat...just go there and enjoy...and just go again. Aroidee 2 (not far away) with the garden is a beautiful quiet place..and the food same same

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Came for a late lunch. The dish was fine, tasty, and seemed to be MSG-free as advertised. On this hot day, it took a while to get the beer I asked for (they forgot), and when I asked for the bill, I received something handwritten and strangely undecipherable. (If the numbers were written closer together, I'd think they were trying to overcharge me.) Resorted to grabbing a menu and figuring it out myself. Won't return; there are lots of choices in town. Read less
Date_Written: and strangely undecipherable.  (If the numbers were written closer together, I'd think they were trying to overcharge me.)  Resorted to grabbing a menu and figuring it out myself.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Warm welcome late at night, good fresh food,they don’t add MSG in the food which is good for the foreigners, certainly a place to recommend

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Becareful here! We ordered fried fish with yellow curry sauce. Costs 130 baht but on the final bill we got charged 150 baht. I would've paid extra but it was a 1 star dish. We got 3 small fish fillets coated with too much batter. The second dish was oily and soggy pork with cashews and vegetables (80 baht). Again the pork was almost invisible with too much batter. The vegetables also soaked up all the oil that wasn't fried up in the wok cooking process. The third dish was average... chicken in coconut soup. I wasn't sure exactly what it was because we got the menu in Chinese. It lacked all the spices that are required for a good Thai feed. Small beer was 50 baht. No large Changs here. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This was a real treat! The spring rolls were great, all of us enjoyed our mains and the service was good. Best chicken and cashew nuts I have tasted. They serve the usual cold drinks and beer.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A simple set up, great food MSG free, so u get to taste the different spices in the cooking. Selection of Thai and Lana dishes prompt service with a smile and friendly prices. Excellent mango sticky rice. Definitely worth a visit....

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Aroy Dee is fantastic - the food is amazing; particularly recommend the Thai yellow curry, the banana spring rolls, and the mango sticky rice. Very friendly staff and had a lovely chat with the owner. Prices start around 50 baht for a main course which is great value!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The owner is wonderful! Very friendly and kind. They don’t use MSG or chemical sugars in their food. I

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Good food and well priced but the staff weren’t very attentive. At first they were brilliant but the moment bigger tables arrived, I was forgotten about (on my own). Focused on where the money was unfortunately

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I enjoyed two meals at Aroy Dee, both were delicious and well priced. The food is cooked in an open kitchen and arrives quickly. Everything is fresh and they pride themselves on no msg. All the staff were efficient and friendly and it was a nice touch that the owner came and chatted to me in person. Worth a visit.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We had one of the best meals ever. They cook the food right in front of you, the staff were so helpful and attentive. We asked for vegetarian and they had heaps of selections., the prices were very cheap. My husband said his green curry was the best ever.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: almost passed up this litte gem due it's unassuming exterior on a busy street. The food was fantastic, we ended up eating here 3 times in one week during our visit to chiang mai. Everything was delicious and the staff was lovely !!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: During my trips around the world I never been two times in the same place. With Aroy Dee I did differently. The food is really special: noodles, pad thai, spring rolls or cashew nut with chicken, everything is delicious. This is the reason why I’ve been there twice in Chiang Mai. Prices are really cheap (50-80 baths) and the quality is really high. If you wouldn’t spicy they support you. Staff is really nice and smiling.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I visited Aroy Dee twice and I was not disappointed. The quality of the dishes are superb and the prices very reasonable. The owner, Surin, told me the mango in the mango & sticky rice was grown on his property. Admittedly, it was one of the best mangos I've ever tasted. The staff are polite and efficient, and Surin is friendly and always willing to serve his customers to ensure a pleasant dining experience. I will definitely recommend this restaurant and I will be returning on my next visit.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I don't know why we waited so long to try Aroy Dee! The food is delicious, drinks/beer cold and the service friendly. We had Basil Chicken & Red Curry Stir fry... YUM! It is now on our list for next year!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We got the Khao Soi and Tofu Pad Thai - excellent flavours. Lovely little place with friendly staff. Good fan to keep cool.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We ate at Aroy Dee a couple if times whilst we were in Chiang Mai and it was great. The menu is varied and all traditional Thai food, at a very reasonable price (roughly 80 baht per main course). The service was quick. Overall would highly recommend to anyone after food value Thai food.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A great variety of Thai flavors created with passion & cooked to perfection. The family owners buy daily from local producers. If you love Thai food this place come Highly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This isn’t a fancy hotel bar so don’t expect that. The food is AMAZING fresh fish, great spices and the service is with a smile. Already planning our next trip. It’s plastic chairs and neon lighting with no air con but that’s Thailand! Don’t dress up, bring a fan and let your tastebuds enjoy their holiday too!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Local place by canal that always serves up hospitality with great food at great local prices. Owners are fabulous people, and smoothies are always good. I kept coming back for more!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We came here as this place appeared in a few blogs... actually if you stay nearby, there are about 3 Thai restaurants here side by side. Spoilt for choice really. The quality was decent (there are usually no really bad Thai restaurants) but I wouldn't say it was out of the world... except the Thai fried omelette. Really blew our minds. It's called Khai Jiao in Thai. This encounter really made me change my mind about Thai food, and after this we tried a few other restaurants, but Aroy Dee's khai jiao is the best. Go order this- and don't underestimate how delicious an omelette can be! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We came here in 2017 for the first time, celebrated our 9y anniversary. February 2019 we celebrated our 12th valentines day. We love this place, the food is wonderful freshly prepared. And very tasteful, cheap price but lovely food. Only love for this restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: ...after reading the reviews , we gave it a try, my Partner had a green Curry , it was OK , but nothing great. I had black pepper fish, the fish was crispy and the taste was good, but I had a few days problem with my stomach , after 3rd Day went to Pharmacy. After 5 days...than feel better. We would not eat there again, no way !

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The pad Thai was decent although I had to flavor it. The chicken yellow noodles were lacking in flavor as well. The portions are on the small side While it has high reviews and the prices are low, I wouldn’t come here again. There are many many better places in the area with equally affordable food. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Delicious meals affordably priced. We found ourselves eating several breakfasts and dinners at this gem of a restaurant. Friendly staff and gracious owner. We'll be coming back on our next visit to Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I visited this place after reading good reviews. However, I have to say that I don't understand how this place can get such high ratings. The choice of food is also quite limited. The only fish choice is fried fish fillet (I suspect it is pre-fried frozen) with different type of gravy. As for the fried vegetables, it does not have the "wok hei". Also, I can get much better tomyum soup from the street stalls. As an Asian, I think this is a terrible representation of Thai food. The food served here is very bland overall. Maybe it suits westerner's taste bud. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Been there 3 times as the food is delicious, the place looks clean (for the local standard) and the team really friendly! Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Amazing authentic fresh food, low prices, and the sweetest staff you can ask for. Me and my wife couldnt resist dining there twice in 2 days before leaving chiang mai. Had a chat with the owner and he is a very lovely humble man. A must if you are in chiang mai and looking for fresh thai cousine.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This is a really popular restaurant, full of tourists and clearly a great place to get lunch. We ordered meals for 4 people of various noodle varieties and it came to about 350 baht which is ridiculously cheap. As another reviewer did mention recently, the portion sizes are not extravagant, but Thai food is supposed to be light, not burdensome, so I think the sizes were appropriate, especially given the prices! Taste wise everything was delicious and it all vanished in minutes.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The food was great, the husband and wife owners were beautiful and so was their food! I felt like I was on a Anthony bourdain episode where you find a hidden gem down a alley way. RIP Anthony <3

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I have walked passed this cafe at least 20 times and not stopped. Today I did. Look past the basic and rough facade and give it a try. Very popular and busy with and open, street/walkway fronting kitchen. Watch the cooks cook and the table full of herbs, spices and vegetables. The food was hot and tasty. The decor very basic and has a local feel. There is a fruit juice bar at the entrance. It was 320 Baht ($13 AUD for 2 juices and 3 main meals) so good value.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I had a thai green curry with rice and it was amazing. Well priced, friendly staff and owner. Overall great place.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Partially the fault is ours. We thought that this is a cheap eats category place where you get good portions as well. Well, how they manage this place is by setting the prices really low (some of the lowest we have seen in Chiang Mai for a restaurant), but then they actually take quite a bit out from the portion sizes as well. The portions were quantifiably smaller than other restaurants we have been to, so don’t feel it right to give it a 5/5 in the cheap eats category. Quality is good though, just maybe plan with ordering two main courses per person if you are hungry (like we were by the time we got there).

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This restaurant was the highlight of our trip. The best thai food we had so far. And the prices are incredible!! Its very local and we highly recommended it for a true thai experience.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: They have delicious food and they are very cheap. You get there a lot of tasty food for about 1-2 Euro. The food is much better there than in many expensive restaurants in Chiang Mai. But you are lucky if you get a table for dinner. And the staff is very friendly!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: ... you’ll be waiting at least 30 minutes for your order to arrive at your table from the moment you make your request during dinner time (I am one person making one order), and every table in the restaurant is occupied. This is the second time this has happened and I’m at a point of nearly walking out. Drinking my beer sloooowly.....

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Packed house but we found a table, in the corner. Food was delicious and came out quick. We ordered shrimp pad Thai, spring rolls, and green curry.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We LOVED this restaurant. It has amazing authentic food, cheap prices, and great service. Check out this place for an awesome meal and fun experience.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Aroy Dee is my absolute favourite restaurant in Chiang Mai. I have eaten here for 7 years every November I come over for the Loy Krathong Festival, I eat here 8 times in my 10 day stay, the dishes are amazing, and the staff very helpful, especially the Manager, thank you for all your kindness Surin, see you again soon ! Your Kangaroo & Koala are on their way ! Ida

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Food is fresh and tasty, fried noodles are a must! We’ll definitely come again! Highly recommended restaurant!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We visited twice in 4 days. In between we tried other stores but were not as good as Aroy Dee. Most importantly Aroy Dee doesn’t use MSG. Still tasted great. We tried pad thai, pineapple fried rice and egg soup - was delicious. Tom yam goong was just ok probably because no MSG. But overall the experience was excellent.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Beautiful fresh Thai food, lovely service & very cheap price. We’ll be back again next trip. Friendly staff, who were polite & helpful. Free wifi.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The staff and so kind, the food is amazing and very affordable. My favourite restaurant in Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Delicious food, many choice, can see what they cook, cheap, good location, best pad thai in town. Fast service, must try if in CM

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We had sweet-sour vegetables, saute' cabbage, spring rolls and Masaman curry. Everything was DELICIOUS but the bland Khao Soy . The Thai tea was excellent and the passion fruit with yogurt was outstanding ! The service is friendly and the place is clean and inexpensive .

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Best Service and delicious fresh food for a fair price. I really love that Place and the Service was funny and super friendly. I absolutely recommend 😊

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Delicious! I sat outside at one of the two tables for 2. Because of the reviews I ordered the spring rolls, delicious! I also ordered green curry, yum! Very tasty Thai food. Comfy atmosphere. Very happy staff!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Simple but lovely Thai food, friendly and quick service, cheap to reasonable prices for everything on the menu. Open kitchen so you can see what they’re doing. The place is mostly busy but you never have to wait long on your food or drinks.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: 3 nights in Chiang Mai and we ate at Aroy Dee twice! Couldn’t fault it at all - lovely staff (the man who seemed to own it/manage was really nice), the food was delicious and for such a good price! Would recommend the spring rolls (the nicest we have had), the Pad Thai (probably also the best we’ve had) and the Chicken with Cashew nuts! :)

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Clean surrounds and toilet, friendly staff, food hot from the wok. Prices - 50 BAHT for chicken and rice etc. Cheap and delicious. Central location and easy to find. Will definitely be back!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Read about this restaurant in a food blog so wanted to check it out. Great location on the main road running parallel to the city wall/moat. I had the shrimp pad thai and the tom yung soup. Very fast service and delicious food - and cheap! I miss Thailand already because of food like this!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Went here after reading about how good it is in all of the reviews and all of the mentions it gets on the food blogs. We were expecting a great meal, we got an ok meal. Nice and fresh and served very quickly by attentive staff it has to be said, but the food was just ok. It has obviously been toned down for the western palate, which we feel is a real shame. If it is your first time to Thailand then perhaps this would be a good place to start trying things out, but if you are a little more seasoned, or like your Thai food with a bit more heat then I would say give this place a miss and have a look around. You are sure to find something more to your tastes. Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Best food in chiang-mai. Very nice owner and staff! We went there twice because the food was so good and cheap as well! The second time the owner came to us and thanked us for coming again. After eating we thanked him because everything was so good!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Food was great! Service was lovely, really enjoyed the meal here! Really recommend! A must eat in Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I went here for lunch and had my usual when in Thailand “friend rice” this was especially delicious. I also had a smoothie which was extremely good too! Nice environment and cheap prices! Definitely recommend!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: A friend recommended thus place, so weit went Here for Dinner - ans came back every single night during our stay in Chiang Mai. Great food, nice staff, reasonable prices. Must go ,while you're in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Great room, without charm,mix tourists and Thai guests (it's a good sign). The kitchen is open, we have a large selection of real Thai dishes, very good, without promising sophistication. The waiters are all nice and smiling. And, the price, really affordable. The real Thailand.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Compared to other places on the same street, the interior of this restaurant is much nicer. We ate there 2 nights and they delivered consistent quality.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: a very nice place. Very friendly staff, especially the boss "Surin Boonkum". We went to eat twice and left very happy and satisfied. Thanks for all the kindness Surin!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Visited several times over the years and always find it clean, fresh and tasty . Priced around 70thb a main

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very nice place with very friendly service. Excellent freshly prepared Thai dishes. Prices are very decent, which is common for street food. A must visit for everybody.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The waitor took an order from a table that came in after. The place is cleaner than it's neighbors and is popular with tourists. I had chicken with basil on rice- OK taste, small portion of chicken, but a big scoop of rice. The beers are more expensive than surrounding restauarts. My companion likes the egg noodles here. I was unimpressed and know this neighborhood well.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Had a late night dinner here on my last night in Chiang Mai. Fresh and delicious ingredients and fresh fruit juices! Tasty Thai curry prepared swiftly, in a flaming wok, at the front of the store. The atmosphere is relaxed and upbeat, cheerful background music and friendly staff - the owner is very friendly and chatty too so I felt very welcome. Overall, a super dinner place for a solo diner or group - definitely worth a visit! Read less

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I can recommend chicken mussaman curry. Very good food. Perhaps not the fastest, but it is worth to wait.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This is an excellent restaurant with very fresh food. The owner came over to check on us and explained that the vegetables were only used on the day of purchase, and fresh vegetables were bought daily. Flavors were excellent, try the masaman curry! Cleaner than most cheap eats, no air conditioning and they cook at the front of the restaurant for all to see.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We found this little place during a random walking in Chiang Mai. Unfortunately I have food intolerance, and this was the best place in whole Asia where they understood what is a GLUTEN FREE meal!! I had gluten free pas Thai, I had the best noodle and veggies soup ever!! The owner and all staff are hard workers, they never stop and always ask u if everything is ok! The restaurant is clean and the food is so fresh! Thank you to made my journey! Hope to see you soon

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I had some of the best food here when my boyfriend and I were in Chiang Mai.And it is cheap! I especially enjoyed the brown rice and all the fresh vegetables.The restaurant is very clean and your meal is prepared in the middle of the restaurant.The staff does everything they can to make you feel right at home.Love this place!!!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We got 2 meals and 2 bottles of water for around 100baht, both were lovely and fresh. Definitely recommend for backpackers!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Just an ordinary Thai restaurant. Very little for health conscious travelers. Cheap and traditional so it gets a pass. Nothing special..

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Ate here a couple of times during my trip and thought that the food here was delicious and cheap, the massaman curry being the best! The staff were friendly and it was nice to be able to watch the chefs cook the dishes while we were sat down in the restaurant, they can also tailor your meal if there are certain ingredients you don’t like, or want less spice! There is lots of variety on the menu and the food arrived quickly on both visits.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We ate here our first night in Chiang Mai and ended up eating here five times during our three week stay. The food is very fresh and cooked in front of you in sizzeling woks. Every dish we had here from fried rice to curries were superb. I have a medical issue with chilli (ha ha why am I in Thailand!) and the owner was so attentive in making sure I could eat chilli free and still have a flavoursome meal. Really enjoyed eating here as the food was consistently good and service excellent.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: I don’t know why this place has such great reviews. I ordered the tofu pad Thai and a passion fruit mango smoothie. The pad Thai was incredibly bland. It was basically just oily noodles and bean sprouts. There was literally no flavor at all - no salt, no sweet, no sour, no spice. I mean look at the picture. You can tell there was no soy sauce or chili at all, it’s just a blob of oily white noodles. The smoothie was extremely watered down, very little fruit in it.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: This place saved us a couple of times! It’s very cheap and the food is amazing! They cook everything in front of you so you can see the fresh ingredients, everything is made at the moment. The service is really fast and the staff also is very nice so I highly recommend Aroy Dee.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Honest price, excellent taste, fast attendance, clean place, with tables outside. I really loved my experience there :9

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Got the best Pad Thai Ive ever eaten here. I payed 50 bath!! Really good value for your money. Highly recomended.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Authentic Thai food. Simply the tastiest Thai food I've eaten in Thailand with correct use of chilli and spices. They don't give you the tourist treatment here. You pay peanuts and you Thai food like its supposed to be. The owner is also a pleasant chap and will even give you tips on where to go.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: Very nice and tasty Thai food at very small prices. The fried rice with prawns was amazing! Thank you very much!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: The best and tastiest Thai food, very cheap and very nice staff. Thank you for the best dinners in Chiang Mai!!!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We have eaten at this restaurant at least 6 times in 3 weeks. The food is fantastic, the staff are VERY friendly and prices are reasonable. I love the idea you can actually watch them cook your dish and the staff will answer questions about what they are doing. Hard to say what dish is my favourite. Can hardly wait to eat there again.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Detail: We are here tonight. The food was excellent, freshly cooked in front of your eyes in their open kitchen within the restaurant. Amazing price for good fresh food. The owner is very friendly & proud of his restaurant, he came over to have a chat too.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
